review_text: Feels like I'm home. Our family loves the swimming pool. Very nice place,  shops can reach on foot. Niki is very accommodating. Will recommend this place..

This is a hidden gem in the city. Great overnight stay. The host was excellent and very friendly. The rooms very clean and modern. Swimming pool in the backyard was wow! I definitely recommend this place for a short break in Athens.

If you beleive this review has been helpful for you, please don’t forget to press the 👍 button. Thank you.

Very nice people. I was there just to visit my sister who is renting the apartment. I am living in greece, so I have seen a lot of apartments. The owners are the most sweet people I have met. And the apartment is so clean and beautifull.
Amazing appartment full equipped.
The best place in Athens!

A simple campsite with great cleanliness and friendly people.  toilets are cleaned every day.  workers are available all the time, and in the evening they also have a security guard.  Getting to the city center is quite simple, because there is a bus station right next to the camp and there are plenty of taxis as well.  we paid €14 for a taxi from the camp to the acropolis.   We recommend it

Total lack of hospitality and respect for a bicycle camper.
The campsite was almost completely empty. And yet I should have made a reservation. I'd never heard that before.  There was only one night available on this empty campsite!
There is always a place for bicycle campers It is an unwritten rule.
I was assigned a spot of 2 square meters. Because it was not level, I moved a small meter. Then a  witch from One Flew over the Cuckoos Nest came and told me to just follow the instructions. I packed my things and left.

The campsite is located in a remote area, but there are buses stopping in front of it that can quickly take you to the center.
The service areas are extremely clean and the staff is very kind, friendly and always ready to help with information about the tourist attractions of the city.There is a supermarket and a fruit shop very close to the campsite.
I would love to visit the campsite again.

The camping looks good, but no WiFi available.  We left the camping because of the attitude of the lady that ran the place. Not helpful at all. We were basically told to shut up while she was talking, and if we did not like, we could go elsewhere.  Which we did.

Our experience when we left the campsite after 1 night in Athens and 11 days of other places in Greece was : either the owner is not Greek or something else is not ok with owners of this campsite… Strict, rude, really not polite… Simply not Greek… Campsite clean, facilities ok. But as already written… The owners of the campsite should think, how to work in tourism… 90% empty and we weren’t able to prolonge a space for 2-3 hours on a different parking space… We simply had to see more of Athens and we didn’t know if we will be back in campsite till strict official check out… We would like to pay also for a parking place / no go…
So cute 😍 and cozy place ! I recommend it .

After my first visit to one of the accommodations, I choose only Pin Homes for my stay now without a second thought!!! Everything is perfect! Cleanliness 💯! Service 💯! Contact 💯! Spaces💯! I recommend it 💯!!!

nice locations ... clean space, comfortable rooms, ideal for families, helpful owner..

We visited this property twice.
On the 3rd floor it was fine...that's why we went back only to stay on the 1st floor...there was a broken sofa with springs outside.. .dirty kitchen and utensils..clogged drain in the bathroom and in the bedroom there was no TV.. .due to the fact that anything can happen in human contexts we did not mention in the comments neither siphons nor the issue of cleanliness but only the broken sofa which was so damaged to the point that we had a nervous laugh.. despite this in the next reservation we made because the location is convenient for us, we asked to stay on the 3rd floor but it wasn't possible and they told us that they don't know which room we will get into until the last moment... and we accepted it. However, because we made these comments for the better service of all of us and no because we had some reason to blame the accommodation, a gentleman called us and aggressively and in a bad tone demanded that we cancel the reservation. when we asked him why he has this unprofessional behavior, he answered because our comments are not valid. so we asked him if he really has saw the sofa and admitted that it was indeed broken and changed. Well, our comment, which I emphasize, was negative, but not unreasonable and in no case aggressive, as other visitors mentioned, and you were the reason why the person in charge took the unprofessional initiative to call us by phone to tell us to cancel the reservation. .
Cozy, clean, and close to everything! very kind owner!! Beautiful balcony you are happy to sit outside even though the street below is very central! we will definitely prefer it again!

This is a hidden gem. We were greeted by the very polite and welcoming host. Showed us the premises and explained to us all the amenities. The place, a newly renovated apartment, was spotless clean. It is in an alley thus is really quiet. A wine welcome was waiting for us on the table plus a tray full of stuff for breakfast. Tea, coffee, juices and bottled water were also available as were all the house appliances, that looked in great working condition. Plenty of towels and bed covers. Good communication prior to arriving and after leaving the apartment. What more is there to ask.
Great place in great location with very nice hosts!

I did not expect to find such a beautiful apartment in Haidari! Renovated, modern, with nice aesthetics, with all the comforts and the most basic of all, with very helpful and kind hosts! Chrysanthi, thank you very much and we promise to come back soon!

He is happy for everyone.
After immediate and perfect communication with the host of the accommodation, due to my emergency business appointment at the place, I was given all the information I needed and the undivided assistance for my access to it.

The apartment complex is very beautiful, in a fairly quiet street. Very good protection of the complex at its entrance.
As for the apartment I booked, it is a very beautiful, clean accommodation with everything necessary for a stay!
Terrific reception with smiling hosts willing for any help and information. One of the best apartments I've stayed in. Unreservedly recommended!

Zero cleanliness. The towels had hair from others, the comforter had a weird smell and the room smelled musty. For €37 it wasn't even worth €15. I booked the room for 4 days and left at 3, I couldn't take it anymore, I couldn't sleep. The only good thing was the scout was very helpful.

The house was very clean and big for a family. Have all necessary and nice view. The owners was very friendly and make us feel like was our house. Have a private-safe parking for a car. Thanks Paul and Anastasia for the hospitality.

My family and I stayed at this accommodation for a total of three weeks over 4 different times.The hosts Anastasia and Pavlo were amazing and went above and beyond for all their guests and made us feel at home and part of their family as the moment we met them. The rooms were clean and spotless and air conditioning was in every room. The room sizing was excellent for my family of 5 and the beds were very comfortable. We highly recommend any one or any family that's looking for accommodation in Athens to stay at this property as it is in an excellent location with transportation all around, as well as restraunts, bars and shops and most importantly they offer a free Carpark for your vehicle. We will deffinantly  be going back to this accommodation when we visit Greece again.

I had the most wonderful experience during my stay at My Home In Greece.

The name of this place, "My Home In Greece," truly lives up to its reputation.

The apartment was nothing short of perfection, and it's evident that the hosts, Pavlos and Anastasia, have meticulously thought of and catered to every detail to ensure the utmost comfort and relaxation for their guests.

Pavlos and Anastasia were not just hosts; they were the epitome of warmth and hospitality. Their availability for any request at any time made our stay even more enjoyable. It's apparent that their dedication to hospitality and guest care is unrivaled, and it was a genuine pleasure to meet them and be their guests.

I can confidently say that whenever I find myself in Athens again, I will undoubtedly choose to stay at My Home In Greece. I hope that day comes soon, and I'm already looking forward to it.

A heartfelt thanks to Pavlos and Anastasia for making our stay so memorable and enjoyable. ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

I stayed here for two weeks. Before I will tell you all about these wonderful people let me just say that the apartment is great, all the listed facilities are at place and in good shape. Now to the main issue - these people are amazing, absolutely angels. They are so kind, always wanting to help in every little thing. They were there for us in so many ways, they took us places by car so we would not take public transportation, they took me personally to a doctor and stayed with me so there would not be any language gaps issues, they gave us the feeling that we are family from the first moment and acted like one through  all our stay and even when we got back home. I really can't find the words to express and describe my gratitude and love. We were very lucky to meet Anastasia an Pablo, we earned friends for life. I hope one day I could help and
host them at least they did us.

This place is truly home in Athens! Pavlos and Anastasia are simply amazing people.
I'll start by saying that the apartment is new, modern, spacious, ventilated, beautiful design, very clean, very well equipped kitchen. The apartment has a washing machine so you can take less clothes from home. All rooms have air conditioning and an air purifier. The location is very quiet, grocery store and restaurants within walking distance and so is the metro.
Pavlos helped us a lot, explained and drove us to get to know the surroundings of the apartment as well as to the city center, he explained about the important places so that it was easy for us to find our way around, on the last day he took us to the car rental agency and showed us other places that we would not have found on our own.
I highly recommend coming to stay with Pavlos and Anastasia, their level of hospitality exceeds all imagination and expectations. We felt like we were on a summer vacation at our good friends house and we are already looking forward to returning to them on our next vacation in Athens!

This is a brand new hostel that has an industrial chic feel to it. The hostel is super clean, spotless. The staff are friendly and helpful. My room was very comfortable and the bathrooms were excellent. I would not hesitate to recommend Athens Hawks Urban to any traveler.

A great value for money hostel. Almost brand new. Very clean and tidy. Very good rates. A little distance to city centre but reasonably quiet at night time. Good standard of breakfast, coffee and bar. Comfortable beds with excellent shower room. If you want no-frills stay well recommended!!

we stayed 5 days. at a very good price.
the room was quite good. the hotel is new, clean, in a quiet and excellent location. just 4-5 minutes on foot from the metro stop. customers respect each other and the lobby looks like a library!
breakfast is also offered, which I would describe as basic with an excellent quality-price ratio.
the staff is simply amazing, kind and always willing to step in to help with any problem or provide any information.

accessible to wheelchair users.

Had to deal with bed bugs instead of enjoying my vacation, the hotel might look clean from the outside but  for the bed bugs, I had to buy spray and cream from the pharmacy and I couldn't sleep because my body was itching the whole night despite the uncomfortable pillow and mattress.
Also, locker, towels and laundry is not for free
I had to spend extra money to clean my "clean" clothes because of the bugs
And on pharmacy
Worst experience and I can't wait to check out and never come back.

Great hotel! Large rooms and modern infrastructure. Our room had AC units in every room, and the apartment was virtually spotless.

The restaurant is a bit hot during day, but quality of food and service easily compensates for that.

There is an X93 bus stop to the airport about 500m from the place, making it a good place to wait for the flight.

We stayed four nights in October at Lak Nirvanas Homes in a two bedroom apartment. The apartment was very nice, clean, and large, with two large balconies with nice views and a large open kitchenette-dining-living area. The kitchen had a refrigerator, stove, coffee press, and basic cookware, dinnerware, and utensils (no microwave). There is an elevator, and a spiral staircase that can be a bit narrow and steep. The building and room felt safe and secure. The attached restaurant (Reception) was very good and served food and coffee all day, which can be delivered to the rooms. The staff was friendly and accommodating.  The only thing that keeps me from giving 5 stars is the location. It is not a bad area, but the hotel is surrounded by gas stations, car washes, and other automotive type businesses, and there is a lot of traffic noise day and night. There is a Lidl grocery store right down the street, and other stores and restaurants a short walk away, but I wouldn't call them super convenient. The nearest Metro stop is approximately a half mile away, but there are several bus routes that stop close by that can get you to the Metro or suburban railway station quickly.

The staffs are so kind and helpful. The room is really clean, modern and has a relaxed ambience. Moreover, the access from city center or airport is good enough(from airport, you can use X93 city bus). I highly recommend this accommodation for your stay in Athens.

The apartments are modern and very comfortable. The reception service is also very nice and the staff is friendly and responsive. We only stayed for one night, but we would gladly return if our travel bring us back to Athens.

July 2016: we were in the apartment at the top of the building; the apartment overlooked a large well-furnished terrace with table and chairs where you can eat outside.
The apartment was clean and modern, with a well-appointed kitchen, two bathrooms and a very large living room.
It is not located in the city center, it takes about 20 minutes to reach the subway and another 15 minutes to the city center.

place_name: Ahamed Greek S M P Co
review_text: I really like this Hotel. I stayed there few times. Very clean rooms, safe and peaceful area to stay. Very reasonable price, free car parking in front the building. Very friendly and helpful staff. Big supermarkets next to the building, just few minutes to city centre. Great location peaceful surrounding atmosphere. I was very pleased with my stay. I would like to be back for a longer visit in the future. ❤❤❤👑👑👑☺️☺️☺️☺️

place_name: Ahamed Greek S M P Co
review_text:
Be careful, this place is a trap. I am pretty much sure those who wrote good reviews for this place are either friends with the owner or are employees faking accounts. No need to write much but enough to know that:
1- rooms are not as in the photos.
2- price is too high, considering this could not fit in any category of a comfortable place in booking.
3- the location is industrial, surrounded by mechanical areas and the place itself is noisy.
4- an employee asked me impolitly not to write this review and he will bring the owner number who is in Dubai. As expected, the employee disappeared.
5- finally, the place fits for a solo traveler spending an overnight willing to pay no more than 30 euros max.

I am not used to harsh criticism, but this place deserves an exception. Just bad!!

place_name: Ahamed Greek S M P Co
review_text:
Tale care with the pictures, this place feels like a work in progress, ill start with the positive: beds are comfy as are the pillows. They did let us do a late check in.

The rooms are very small, and the double bed is a little over a single - not great if travelling in a couple.

We had to request a room change after checking in as our room had no natural light or air flow, the bathroom door had just been painted and the fumes could still be smelt. No curtain on the shower either.

After changing to a room with a small window it was still very tight but bearable.

The area is close to the car mechanics but near the metro to get into the centre.
For a similar price I would recommend getting a flat instead

place_name: Ahamed Greek S M P Co
review_text: We stayed here for one night. The girl at reception desk was nice but unfortunatley our room couldnt be open cuz the lock didnt work. When we came back a bit later a guy a the reception desk who replaced the aboce mentioned female receptionist was very unfriendly and not the kindest. He wanted to get rid of us asap. When we came in the room we were shocked. We booked bedroom 2 people but this was hardly for one. The bed wasnt big enough for 2 adults, there was no space to leave our suitcases since the spaces between the wall and the bed were only for one person to pass through. We literally had to stretch around like spiders to get to the bathroom. In the bathroom...well...there was no warm water so we had to shower with ice cold one and let me just say we came from a ferry and bus trip and we were exhausted and couldnt wait to have a nice shower. Well that didnt happen. Also the pictures on site dont show that some of the rooms dont even have windows which ofc ours didnt have. All in all it was not worth the price. It felt claustrophobic, too small and hardly even for one person not two. It was  clean and new though but i would never go back.

place_name: Ahamed Greek S M P Co
review_text: The best choice we could’ve made! Great location, clean and spacey rooms, quiet neighbourhood. Ahmed was the most considerate, polite and kind host. We enjoyed our stay and will surely come back again!

🌟🌟🌟🌟 4/5

Also a great location - only a short walk to the acropolis & Plaka area or 20 min drive to the beach. Would highly reccomend if you’re staying in the city centre of Athens 🇬🇷

Location is very convenient with multiple stores near by and the metro stop is right there. Hardware in the rooms have some normal wear but overall very nice experience! Loved the big balcony and rolling shutters in the bedroom.

Few years ago I was one of the first guests. It was perfect then.. 5***** and 10 on Booking.com. but after coming back several times I can see there is a lack of maintenance throughout the whole building and the rooms. It s a pity,  because now I have the feeling it has become just a milking cow.  Won t stay there again
Rooms are well designed and equipped. Lovely TVs in each room & showers. But need maintenance and better cleaning.

Everything was just great. The apartment was very comfortable, big, clean and near to the metro.
The apartment was fully equipped with everything you need for a short or even longer stay.
There is a grocery shop around the corner and also some restaurants.
Hosts were very friendly and helpful.

The hotel is very very good, I can't seem to understand some of the bad reviews. The reception was great and friendly the rooms were spacious and quiet. Our room window was across the train station and we could barely hear the trains go by. Amenities were sufficient and the breakfast was really good. The price and the location are excellent only 5 minutes away from the electric station that takes you everywhere in Athens.

This hotel would not even deserve 1 star, because our stay was catastrophic. We had booked in March, a little more than 2 months in advance, to be sure that we would have a room available. When we arrive at our room, we quickly realize that there are several problems in it; Out of the 4 lights in the room, 3 of them didn't work, the light in the bathroom illuminates so little that we had to take our shower with the curtain open, and even then, the light was extremely low. Our air conditioning didn't seem to work, our toilet was clogged without us even using it, we only had one electrical outlet for the whole room and our great view of the city (as mentioned in the booking), was actually a view of the other rooms, inside the hotel. When we expressed our dissatisfaction to the employees at the reception (it didn't look like the description of the room we had booked at all), we were lent a power strip and assured that they would try to find a solution + that they would contact us. For the air conditionner, they did lend us a remote for it, labelled ''Room 612''. It wasn't our room. BUT they did told us that they were overbooked. (It doesn't make any sens as they lend  us something from an other room) The next morning, still no news, we went to the reception for a follow up (our toilet was still clogged, almost a day after our arrival). We told them our dissatisfaction (again) and that we wanted to know what was going on with their "research". The rude gentleman at the reception started by telling us that the view from the room is not automatically on the Acropolis and that there is the city all around the hotel, so that it was not a problem (the problem is that we see the inside of the hotel) He completely denied that it was mentioned "city view" in the room reservation and did not believe us,  despite being shown the booking page. After a heated exchange, this man told us that it was NORMAL to have a room like this, because we had booked it on a third party site, so 50% cheaper! He also said that the hotel is a "TripAdvisor Recommendation" and that it is a 4-star hotel (clearly he doesn't care about reviews). I can't believe that an employee could talk to his customers like that and have such a condescending tone.
*Breakfast wasn't that good, when there are leftovers, they keep them and reheat them the next day (the omelettes and pastries were hard)*
We will never go back to this hotel again and we do not recommend it to anyone.

I would not stay there again.
Elevator / lift  only starts from first floor, after about 18 stairs !! Good luck if you have luggage.
Old property, need a major update.  AC is pretty weak in ALL rooms. Rooms are old, at times smelly  and not well kept at all.  Not a 4 star hotel at all. May be a 2 star level ?

Rooms are OK, but quite basic. AC and wifi work well.
Buffet breakfast was good with a good selection. Also not too much noise from outside or street.
Main advantage of this hotel which is not in a touristic area of Athens, is the location: some 15 min walk to Liosion bus station.
One point that needs improvement: we only found one outlet, to which the fridge is connected …
Anyway a good value for money hotel.

It is a hotel that does not have many advantages except that it is centrally located and has transportation advantages.

The breakfast is not bad, at least there are a few varieties.
The rooms are a bit old and need to be renovated, but the cleanliness is sufficient.
It is suitable for one or two day stays.
Great apartment right next to metro station
Nice, clean and fully equipped apartment with very good internet and smart TV. From the subway Ag. Eleftherios is 2' away and with direct access to EO for Thessaloniki and Corinth. I recommend it!!
Beautiful and fully equipped apartment in a very convenient location (close to the train and next to a main road)

Great apartment! Beautiful, clean and cozy. We stayed there a couple with two kids. The apartment is close to the metro, the transportation is very easy. Free parking is available on the street. Athens is a great place to travel in with kids.

This is a wonderful apartment just 2 minutes from the Metro station, 9 minutes ride to the ancient district, safe area day and nights, a large super-market at the adjacent building, coffees and restaurants all around, and the apartment itself - just paradise, not less !
Nice clean apartment, good facilities. Located in a good area within walking distance to many shops, restaurants and bars. Only 2 minutes walk to the metro and 10 minutes into city centre.

Wonderful apartment!

Highly recommended!

We stayed at the beginning of May for 3 nights. Very good impressions, ideal for couples but also spacious for families. Very clean and the owner very kind and hospitable.
Easy parking outside the apartment building. Access to the center is very easy with the electric car.

It is a fantastic apartment. In a wonderful, new building with access via a pre-sent code. The staff is very friendly, prompt, always ready to help. The house itself is located 350 meters from the metro, a maximum of 5 minutes walk and 5 stops to Monastiraki Square. It is really very charming with beautiful interior, modern design, large bright rooms, 2 balcony, equipped with everything you could need. There is also a gym in the building. With their help, we also booked transfers (one way by metro from the airport to the center costs 9 euros, and our transfer cost us 44 euros in total, which was absolutely acceptable for a group of 4 people).It is possible to leave luggage in lockers. I really recommend this apartment, you will not regret choosing it 🙂🙂❤️

Great apartment at a very reasonable price. Service was extremely fast and efficient.
The facilities are excellent too, especially the gym is better than in many hotels.
I would definitely come back here at any time.

No one was available to assist that evening and promised to have it fixed the next day. Next day I contacted them to have it repaired while we were out and came back to find the Air-conditioning still not fixed. Paying soo much to stay 2 nights without Air-conditioning!! Wouldn't recommend it if they don't know how to deal with emergency situations and resolve customer's complaints. Never again ;(

review_text: Stayed at this Apartment for 3 nights. Very well designed and furnished . Manos was especially caring and responsive. Helped in many ways to make our visit memorable. Had so many cafes , bakeries and supermarkets in walking distance .

review_text: We stayed here for four nights, and would thoroughly recommend H Experience to anyone looking to stay in Athens

place_name: The H Experience Boutique Apartments Athens
review_text: Whether in Greece for business or vacation, The H Experience is one of the best concepts to turn to for your stay. I’ve tried a handful of their apartments and look forward to checking out the rest. Super clean, super design, super service. I highly recommend!

place_name: The H Experience Boutique Apartments Athens
review_text: This is an amazing apartment; we stayed for a month.  It is very nicely decorated and very clean.  The beds are extremely comfortable, and the walk-in shower is amazing! The property only consists of two apartments; and we had the entire top floor to ourselves. The owner and staff were very responsive and provided clean linens weekly.  It is a convenient walk to the metro as well as private, 24-hour guarded parking that is included.  The only downside is the property sits directly next to the metro line.  It is loud if this bothers you.

“I recently stayed at this hotel for two nights and couldn’t be happier with my experience. The hotel itself is beautifully maintained and impeccably clean, with a design that creates a welcoming and elegant atmosphere. Its location is fantastic—just a short walk from the hotel to train station and bus stop Every corner around the hotel offers something to enjoy, from great restaurants to shopping spots, making it an ideal place for both relaxation and exploring.

The staff was incredibly helpful and attentive, making me feel right at home. The food served at the hotel was delicious. My room was spotless, and the bed was exceptionally comfortable, ensuring a restful night’s sleep. Overall, this hotel offers an outstanding blend of convenience, comfort, and quality service. I would highly recommend it to anyone visiting Athens!”

Stayed here for 3 nights. Ideally situated in the middle of athens only a short walk to the train station. The hotel was very clean and all the staff were extremely friendly and helpful at all times. The roof top bar and pool had amazing views of the city and was the ideal place to watch the sunset. Highly recommend the cocktails. A great base for exploring the city. Highly recommend.

Fantastic hotel with amazing staff. The service and attentiveness of the reception staff made our stay perfect. So helpful and courteous at all times. The room was lovely and pristinly clean.
We really enjoyed the pool bar and sun loungers in the evenings, and the cocktails were great.
Highly recommend and hope to return!

Only small downside was the location which was far from city center but has a close metro station (3 minute walk) with 20 minute ride to center. In addition jacuzzi and massage could not be enjoyed by a couple because they were for one person at a time. Nevertheless very recommended and great value for money.

It’s around an-hour bus trip to the places around the National Garden. Glad the bus stop is very close to the hotel.

review_text: A lovely unexpected gem in Athens. The location was very convenient as it was just a few minutes walk to the station. The owners were so kind and accommodating. We really enjoyed our stay!

place_name: Ανεμπόδιστη θέα σε ασφαλή γειτονιά, κοντά στο μετρό
review_text: Excellent service!!!highly recommend!!!keep it up!!
So beautiful apartment I like it
Woooooow ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

I will rate it with 5 stars, although a 4.5* would have worked, but I don't have the possibility to give half-measures, and I don't want to give it 4 :). There are also some minuses mentioned below, but overall the accommodation is very ok, and the price was good.
The apartment is spacious, nicely decorated, new furniture, it looks exactly like in the pictures, that's why I didn't even take pictures inside. The owner is very helpful, he answers any questions immediately, he helps you with information. The kitchen is equipped with everything you need, if you want to cook, what it doesn't have in return is a wine cork :). The bed is very comfortable, the linens are of medium to high quality.
The distance to the metro is about 10 minutes on foot, there are 2 metro stations that are about the same distance, but I recommend better to go in the opposite direction of the metro, in front of the block go up where there is a main street and on the left there is a bus station, from here you can take the bus, so you avoid the route on foot to the subway, which is a bit dubious, the area is quite dirty, full of garbage on the street. Of course it's ok to walk to the subway, but I for one would not go alone, there are many people of different nationalities who were not exactly civilized (noisy, quarreled loudly). I was really looking at how nice the blocks are, with the marble inside the block, it's a pity that it is so dirty and that it is mostly inhabited by quite uncivilized foreigners.
Overall, the accommodation is ok, with a very good quality/price ratio, anyway you don't stay in the apartment all day.

As minuses:
-The apartment smells of sewage as soon as you enter, but after you air it out a bit and turn on the water, that smell goes away, I recommend closing the bathroom door well in the evening, and opening the window in the morning.
- The noise from the stairwell, the apartment is right next to the elevator and it was noisy, but with a little background music you could sleep
- The lack of a corkscrew for opening wine bottles, you can manage without one, but it would be nice to have one.
- The pillows are very hard and big, I noticed that in Greece this is how we find pillows, and in Thassos, Lefkada, Halkidiki, also big pillows, that's why we take pillows from home, but in Athens given that we came by plane without luggage after us, we had no way to take pillows. It is a good and cheap option
- The area where the apartment is located
- The dumpsters in front of the block and the fact that the garbage truck came twice a day and made a lot of noise, those who picked up the garbage were arguing, I didn't understand why and with whom they were arguing.
It has been recommended to me by several people who have been satisfied... Next time I will visit it myself.

One of the many Hospitality Centers in the area.
The building was a half-board hotel before it passed into the hands of the Municipality.
I don't know which of the two the residents would prefer, but from the outside at least it looks like decent accommodation, clean and well-kept, maybe more so than the neighboring apartment buildings!
I believe and wish that inside is just as clean, offering a few hours of peace to visitors.

Apartment in a residential neighborhood, often in the evening there are residents who crowd the playgrounds with children. Very quiet but 2 steps from the Ano Patissia metro. Close to a supermarket and various restaurants and cafes. The apartment is very beautiful and elegant, clean and well furnished, the balcony is the jewel in the crown, wonderful view. Highly recommended
Large and clean apartment. Quiet area, close to the metro and convenient to everything. Splendid view from the terrace. Everything corresponds to the photos.
Very good apartment, quiet area, large, clean rooms, very good contact with the host

Superb accommodation! The owner is welcoming
Public transportation nearby

Bit out of the centre of Athens, metro is about 10 minutes away, parking is possible next door (paid, leave your keys), rooms are  mixed bunch. We stayed here twice during our trip to Greece. The first room we had was reasonably modern, but don’t expect a view. There even was a window into the interior of the hotel. The second room was older, extremely noisy, not enough outlets, smelly and small bathroom. Hope for a renovated room.

We had a good time at the hotel! I dont know about the other rooms, but our room was modern and clean and we even had a balcony. The room service was very nice and cleaned every day. The breakfast is simple but good. We saw two different men who worked at the reception and both of them were very friendly and helped us every time we had a request :)
The breakfast was probably the worst thing about this hotel. Very little variety, and I got a raw egg once, so be careful. The overall experience was okay, but nothing more.

It's a great place if you are on a budget and super close to transit.  About 15 min bus to Plaka and Monastiraki. All rooms have terraces, which is nice and they are generally clean. The bathrooms could use a spruce up and they didn't have a safe in the room for our passports. You can see the Parthenon from the roof.

Good hotel in an area well connected to the center. It is not very close to the touristic heart of Athens, but there are busses and trolleys (super close to the hotel) that take around 15 minutes to Syntagma or around it, as well as 10 minutes walk to the metro connecting the area with the city center. Excellent service! Clean and quiet - with the exception of some cars noise in the night which was OK for us. Basic decent breakfast, but there are various shops and bakeries in the area to eventually supplement that, including a nice coffee shop across the street. The rooms are quite large, several have balconies, and are cleaned every day which is refreshing. The hotel has 24h staff, which is good. Has an elevator, and a small terrace on its rooftop on the 5th floor, which offers a lovely view over Athens.

I recently had the opportunity to stay at Anna Apartments in Athens and I must admit that it was an excellent choice! The apartment is in a great location - Kipseli is a charming district, close to everything. You can quickly reach the most important attractions, such as the Acropolis and Plaka, and there are plenty of shops, cafes and restaurants in the area.

The apartment was clean, stylishly decorated and fully equipped, which made me feel at home. An ideal place for both short and long stays. I really liked how the owner, Anna, took care of all the details and was extremely helpful at all times. Thanks to her, the stay was even more pleasant.

If you are planning a visit to Athens, I highly recommend Anna Apartments - great location, comfort and excellent service! I will definitely come back on my next visit to Greece.

Last minute booking for a quick business trip in Athens, didn't know what to expect from the place, but let me tell you it was fairly priced , brand new with all amenities I could use , cozy clean and downright beautiful , next time in Athens I know where Ian staying .

If you drive, you can find cool cafes and patisseries in less than 5 mins. There are good restaurants around the place and a few supermarkets in the area. I surely will stay here again on my next visit!

review_text: I had an amazing stay at One 360 Skyline Athens. The views were stunning, the design was stylish and spacious, and the amenities were top-notch. The staff were incredibly hospitable and made our stay very comfortable. Highly recommend!

Spacious private Jacuzzi just next to the master-bedroom with breathtaking views of Athens. Many restaurant options nearby. Extremely safe place away from crowded, noisy and polluted areas. Exceeded expectations by far.

It is supposed to offer services to old people but it is worse than a prison. They did not allow me to stay longer than 20 minutes while visiting my grandmother there. Even in prisons there are yards, but there is nothing there.
Its very nice

The care of the elderly by the girls working there is superhuman because the staff is not enough. The owner and manageress are condescending with no good manners and no willingness to listen to your old man's problems. I wouldn't recommend a sane old man to go there and he is self catering there is no activity during the day. The worst of all is that due to a lack of staff and no involvement of the owner in the business, you cannot see your man on Saturday afternoon or all Sunday (which are the most reasonable hours for anyone who works) to have time. Also, the food is catering.
Apparently only for the elderly with dementia or the bedridden!

Unfortunately it has zero rating.
We entrusted my father with dementia and Parkinson's and limited mobility (he was walking with P before entering this miserable structure) to Iasis so that my mother could rest. In total he stayed there for 3 weeks. The 1st time we visited him he had wounds on his wrists and hands ankles from the binding and 1 pantyhose hanging (with this they bound him) from the wheelchair they brought him (which had no footrests),
After we made a fuss the next few times he had bandages so that the wound could not be seen.
On the last visit we went to see him, he had a fever of 38.4, which we understood was not noticed by any of the supposed nurses.
As a result, they told us that he was allowed to be hospitalized and they threw him to us.
My father was dead for 2.30 hours due to severe dehydration, he had one foot in the grave. They didn't even give him water. The owner of the Spatharis center doesn't even answer the phone or call back.
This structure must be closed.
It is inappropriate. I have an opinion from a public doctor about all this and of course videos and photos.
Result
My father passed away in November 4 months after staph and aspiration caused by lying down because he was constantly tied up. The worst part was that 4 months later he still had the scars on his legs and arms and he left with them.
Shame!!!

The manageress was always rude, she opened the door for us and didn't even say good evening.
To make an appointment it was always very difficult, he told us that they were booked. Whenever we went a little earlier or later there was no appointment, we didn't see anyone.
Also the owners were rude and uncooperative.
Luckily we moved our man to another structure and escaped.
Nice cats, but there is a smelly tall man in the house all day.
Good house, don’t like the tenant
Best house in Athens, Greec and the world
10/10 would recommend showing up unannounced
I’m allergic to asparguras and leek
Nice
Terrible place for kids
Very good hotel for families with small children!
dot
Good

Simple but nice and clean. Close to major private hospitals. 20 to 30 minutes drive from the city centre with a taxi. Close to a direct bus line to the city centre. Basic kitchen equipment not for big cooking.

Very close to major hospitals.The room was spacious and comfortable. There is a small  kitchenette adequate equipped. It might need a few more utensils if you have to cook.The room was clean but the bathroom needed a more thorough clean. The whole check in was seem less and the lady owner of the place very polite. We will definitely use Vivo Apartments again.
Fantastic. Modern, clean and tidy, fully equipped, quiet. A perfect choice

It might not look like much, but I stayed there it felt like a mini hotel room. 4 stars because my rooms view wasn't very good, but everything was available and I recommend staying there if you want to stay somewhere with a good location, close to every touristic place in Athens

I've stayed here several times already and it has always been a nice and comfortable stay. For persons interested in self catered accommodation with modern rooms, this is a good option.
In terms of location, it's about 20-30 minutes from Maroussi/Chalandry city center, 5 minutes from the maternity hospital in Athens, and about 35 minutes away from the closest metro station (both M1 and M3). In terms of nearby restaurants, there aren't many options and the closest ones are about 15 minutes away. Because it's close to a hospital, it's close to stores which are open late at night.
I also appreciated the check in system - you basically receive an email with a YouTube video of how to reach your camera and where to find the keys. This is very useful as I usually reach accommodation late in the evening after I finish work.
Looking forward to my next stays.

Great hotel, at a very convenient location!
Rooms are beautifully decorated with attention to detail. Staff is eager and helpful. Room service is impeccable and available 24 hours.
Free parking is an additional value.
Recommended for short stay at the premises ! AAA+++

Nice and comfortable rooms.
Little bit of noise from the street but not bothering too much.
Jacuzzi available in the rooms.
Breakfast is served in the room and it is satisfying.
Good working wifi connection.
Staff is very accommodating and helpful.
Only drawback: the nearest metro station is about 15' minutes walk.

Adults only.
A new hotel, clean and equiped, which major bussines is day use (hence only 4 stars).
Free parking.
Best service.
Recommended.

5/5 -> Clean room, big jacuzzi, great breakfast.
3/5 -> service, landscape, location
2/5 -> Elevator broken for 2 days

Variation for normal lightning would be great option.
The most luxurious room and the most attentive and helpful staff. The best ever stay anywhere
Great room just like in the photos.... I highly recommend it. Very close to the center & easily accessible .
Great to stay! Highly recommend this especially during warm days, having a coffee in the backyard. The host is very friendly and helpful. 🙏 will visit again soon 🎉
Quiet, clean, easy access and parking. Helpful owner

A little paradise in the capital. A fully equipped space that seems to have been created by people who love their work. Their kindness and hospitality overflows. Very reliable in some clarifications we requested for the area. Thank you. We will definitely meet again
Perfect!! clean and very organized house. With a perfect yard full of flowers, with orange and tangerine trees

We visited the hotel for one night but the experience was perfect! It is a new building, in a very quiet area next to many hospitals and malls. The room was fully equipped with anything you could need. The mattress was excellent, the air conditioning was so quiet we couldn’t understand it was working, the bathroom was very convenient and overall the room was extra clean and comfortable. There is a parking for an extra payment but the neighbourhood is quiet so you can find a parking around as well. We will definitely visit again!

The property was pristine, room was very clean, the location was ideal, neighborhood was nice. Let us not forget the delicious breakfast and thoughtful staff . Lastly, the front desk staff was professional and friendly ( with an interesting accent 😉). Thanks so much for your hospitality! 🙂
Beautiful hotel, optimized functionality of the rooms. Friendly staff and incredible vegetarian breakfast buffet❤️. It is hands-down the hotel I’m booking next time I’m in Athens.
Excellent place with stylish modern furniture and amenities makes the whole stay a nice experience. Location is perfect in a very quiet neighbourhood.
Beautiful hotel, gorgeous rooms, very nice and helpful staff.

place_name: ΕΛΛΗΝΙΚΟ ΚΕΝΤΡΟ ΠΡΟΑΓΩΓΗΣ ΚΟΙΝΩΝΙΚΗΣ ΚΑΙ ΨΥΧΙΚΗΣ ΥΓΕΙΑΣ - ΠΟΡΕΙΑ ΑΜΚΕ
review_text: Remarkable people who respect their patients!!!

Lovely flats. Wonderful. Just don't let them call you a taxi because you pay a fee. Call the taxi yourself
You say you have no record of me. That's between you and your manager. I stayed there and when the manager called the taxi, am extra fee was added for him.

Fabulous apartment in a very beautiful, quiet and safe area in Athens, with a great balcony overlooking a park. The decoration of the rooms within the apartment is so beautiful! The apartment is very spacious and clean, with all the amenities needed for a very comfortable stay. I spent ten days with my family for an operation my mother had to undergo. We all felt so well, welcomed and looked after in this beautiful space and during some difficult time away from home. Definitely going back, and recommending it also to all my contacts. Last but not least, a huge Thank You to Tina, who is the most loving and great host I have ever met!!

Me and my family stayed at the apartment. We had a lovely time. The host is one of the nicest people I have met. The interior of the apartment is so stylish that I took some ideas for my house. Thanks for the hospitality. We will definitely come back again. Thanks again. x)
Great location. Close to Ygeia / Mitera hospital .  Safe area.
Very nice and clean appartments. The hosts are very hospitable.

We stayed here for a weekend in early September and it was amazing. Giannis and Toula were exceptional hosts. We felt very important and cared for. Rooms are very modern and really nice. They are clean and the bedroom had working AC.

Our stay in Urban Residence in Athens was wonderful. The rooms were impressive (surpassed our expectations); clean, big and luxurious. But the best of all were the owners of the hotel, Anastasia and her mother. They made us a map with some things we could do and places where we could eat around the neighbourhood. In addition, since the weather conditions were pretty bad last week, they helped us a lot getting in touch with the airport and booking taxis to arrive to the airport on time. Moreover, the owners helped us find a plan B in case we could not flight to our next destination. Overall, I would 100% recommend this hotel!

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Urban Residence Marousi, and I must say it was a truly delightful experience. From the moment I arrived, Mrs. Toula and Mr. John, the owners, welcomed me with warmth and hospitality that made me feel right at home.

Mrs. Toula and Mr. John proved to be not only kind but also exceptionally helpful and knowledgeable about the area. Their recommendations for local attractions and dining options added a personal touch to my stay, making it more memorable.

The room itself was nothing short of amazing. It was not only aesthetically pleasing but also thoughtfully designed with all the amenities one could possibly need. The cleanliness was impeccable, creating a comfortable and inviting atmosphere. The convenience of having everything I needed within reach made my stay all the more enjoyable.

Urban Residence Marousi exceeded my expectations in every aspect. It's a gem that combines the charm of a welcoming atmosphere with the practicality of a well-equipped room. I highly recommend this accommodation to anyone looking for a clean, convenient, and overall great place to stay in Marousi.

I can confidently say that Urban Residence Marousi, with its wonderful owners and excellent facilities, made my visit to the area truly special. I look forward to returning in the future.

I have been staying here for past 1 week. Room is very good and pleasant. Excellent room cleaning, especially she will take care very well and provide us whatever needed.
I would higly recommend here to stay.

Words cannot express how wonderful The Urban Residence is. Great location to some of the best Athenian suburbs with amazing restaurants, shopping malls, Olympic stadium, etc, etc. The apartments are very modern, super clean and equipped with everything you would require.  We were in Greece for a holiday travelling from Australia.   I am writing this on behalf of my husband, George, who suffered a major stroke whilst on a greek island. He was admitted to the Ugeia Hospital, up the road from the Urban, and stayed there for 7 weeks!!!!  My daughter and I took residence at the Urban to be close to the hospital.....we were greeted by the most amazing family, Mrs Toula and Mr John and their lovely daughter, grandchildren, etc.....they treated us like family at a time when we were at our lowest......everything we could possibly need was no problem to the family....we would recommend this accommodation with all our hearts and give it a 'one hundred star' rating.........God Bless them all!!! Connie...,xox
Great Location and excellent service!It's a quiet clean and well maintained hotel! All staff are very polite and helpfull!Close to main hospitals and mall!

Nice room with space, simple design, gentle staff, small simple breakfast, low quality of materials, no receptionist after 22.00 and entrance by code system, some kind of dirt on the walls, they noticed that they can clean the room after asking cause of the COVID-19 precautions, the shower was only for design because was not connected, high price for what you get! 3,5!

Very good and clean family boutique hotel.

Room design feature a nice and modern amenities, bathroom spacious with all toiletries available including bathrobe.

There is available a kettle for tea and instant coffee.

Breakfast is limited but there is plenty of cafes at walking distance.

Staff friendly, smiling and ready to assist.

Great value for money.

The staff went above and beyond, and they were wonderful. They are friendly and helpful.
I needed to be in that location, so it was perfect for me.
The room was perfect for my stay, and it was clean. The whole place is kept very clean. I would definitely stay there again.
Excellent option in Marousi area. Welcoming staff, nice breakfast and adequate rooms in a cozy hotel

Wow amazingly clean and very good person the owner the area is quite and exactly what you need to relax take time of from the busy roads and its nice to know that it near from the mall plus there is a coffee shop near you as well thank you and will visit again
Amazing apartment with very nice decoration near the metro and the center of Chalandrio. Spotlessly clean with very friendly and good tenants.
Great apartment, great owners. It has everything we needed.
Excellent place and excellent service!
Good location and great service
Very good

As a solo woman traveler, this place was very welcoming and I felt super safe walking alone and at night. TripAdvisor and Googlemaps were my friend locating places to see. Chalandri center was an easy 15min walk that had plenty of things to eat and drink and people watch. The free breakfast was wonderful. Very close to hospitals if you’re going for a medical vacation. The bus stop was also very close by to get around.

Really liked this hotel.  Rooms were modern/new and very clean.  Very comfortable, good air conditioning and hot water.  Staff was very gracious/helpful and thankfully, their English was excellent (I do not speak Greek).  A little far from subway.  Nice breakfast to start the day.  Very reasonable price.

Really nice hotel in Chalandri. Extremely nice and very helpful staff. Clean rooms. Nice SPA downstairs. Swimming pool 🏊 saunas and massage. Good location for hospitals across the street. No dedicated parking but can be found around no charge. The only negative is strangely poor breakfast we didn’t use to see in Athens 4 star hotels, but there are lots of good restaurants around. Overall experience very positive.
The room was spacious. Some small parts/accessories in the room were partially unscrewed and/or broken but not a deal breaker
Excellent little boutique style hotel. Great breakfast and service.  My omelet was massive.
Good....

I recently booked a luxury camping experience through this website, and I have to say, it was fantastic! The platform was easy to use, making it simple to find and select the perfect destination for my getaway.

Overall, I highly recommend this website for a seamless luxury camping experience. The user-friendly platform, helpful customer support, and enjoyable accommodations made it a memorable trip. I look forward to booking with them again in the future!

Campsaround introduced me to the wonderful world of glamping, and I'm amazed! As someone who didn't know what glamping was before, I was pleasantly surprised by the luxurious accommodations and incredible experience. The website is user-friendly interface provided seamless navigation and effortless booking. If you're new to glamping like I was, Campsaround is the perfect place to dive into this unique and delightful adventure! I totally recommend it.
Very useful website, easy to use, with a variety of options that can please any taste you might have. Overall, a reliable platform for fans of glamping.
I have already booked two of my vacations from Campsaround. With the quick response that I had from the platform and the camping, I will surely book my summer vacation for a third time !!
Everything went smoothly for my booking. I love the fact that I can book online all camping in Greece! Thanks

We stay here every year. The room we get with a kitchen and 2 rooms in one is fabulous! The balcony is huge. The kitchen is nice and the showers are neat. The AC works very well, and that is key! The service is great but there is nobody there from 9 pm to 9 am, I believe . They leave 4 extra pillows in the room, and the mattresses are the best we have slept on in all of the hotels we have stayed at! There's a full refrigerator with snacks and drinks! They are charged to the room but it's not too expensive.  There is a washing machine in the room as well not sure if it's a 2 in 1 with a drier. Its not loud at night like other parts of Athens where you can't sleep because all the noise. We slept great! Can't wait to be back next year!

Nice rooms, great service! Very friendly!  They were so helpful holding our bags since we came in on a cruise mid morning.  We dropped the bags, and they held them until almost 7pm for us! I would highly recommend!

Update: The breakfast was AMAZING!! It was full of delicious local foods! SOOO amazing! Thank Newel Psychiko for an amazing stay! 👏

Amazing service, beautiful design of the rooms and building, well planned and designed, great breakfast. Calm residential area location in a walking distance to Katehaki metro station. Many thanks to entire crew and especially to Niki, Rena and other folks who helped to make our stay so special.

Absolutely loved this small hotel. Very modern interior with great attention to detail.  Massive rooms and very well equipped.  The staff were very helpful and spoke very good English.  Would definitely stay here again.

Great hotel
Completely new. Very minimalistic and practical.
Not too many rooms - so no noise.
People are super nice.
Breakfast is ok. Enough choices to find something to eat. Good coffee (not filter sh*t) orange juice is freshly made…
The only “less nice” thing is the location.
It’s in the middle of  residential streets - not really in the center. But you have a metro at walking distance - about 15min. - about halfway between the airport (20 min) and center city
Really recommend it.
Extremely friendly staff good location close to Halandri square fully renovated rooms with the basic amenities. Highly recommended if you want to stay at the northern suburbs of Athens
An economy class hotel in a good neighbourhood. Easy access to the airport or travelling to the north. Has a parking of its own which is very helpful. Very clean with a bigger than average bathroom
A small, cozy hotel offering clean rooms and exceptionally friendly staff, with a decent breakfast available.

Euxalisto poli
My French parents were very happy to stay in your hotel. Very quiet, nice sleep. Next to Xalandri main square and Olympic stadium.
The lady host has a very nice smile 😊 and all are very friendly
great experience and super helpful staff. Location is quiet but pretty far to walk to the metro station, you need a taxi or bus. Overall, great experience

Last minute booking at 22:00 o clock and they were helpful and immediate in response.  Clean well equipped room , a ten minute walk from lively Halandri center, close to the hospital which is why i booked it, good price. My third stay
Excellent customer service from receptionist lady named Eva.

This is a brilliant place to stay. It is in a quiet suburb yet very close to a main road to the centre of Athens. The apartments are spacious, mostly with balconies, and the staff are excellent. Being slightly crazy, we often drive to Athens from the UK and so it is always useful to be able to stay a little bit outside the city centre and get free street parking, and have reasonable confidence that the car will still be there in the morning. We have not been there for a while due to covid restrictions but will have no hesitation in booking in the future.

Good
Ideal location for me as it is waking distance from hospital
Quite area
Comfortable bed
Clean and tidy room
Room has mini kitchen facilities with plates, cutlery...ideally for warming fd and making salad etc.
Allowed me to check in early
Hara the breakfast lady was very friendly eventhough I wasn't happy with the breakfast
Bad experience
Very poor basic breakfast.. nothing decent to eat apart from bolied eggs. Filtered coffee is Luke warm and water has strong smell of chlorine. Very disappointed as one of the reason I chose is place is to have breakfast so I can save money from eating out all day but I end up eating out or making my own coffee and breakfast in my room and mostly just their bolied eggs.
Thin wall, can hear everything from other rooms
Eventhough cleaning service is good and the ladies are friendly i had a problem with the cleaning ladies making too much noise chatting loud and constant phone rings, no consideration about the person staying in the room. I happened to stay on second floor where the cleaning storage is so I used to get constant disturb from them on the days I stayed in my room especially when i wanted to sleep after my hospital apt. They use one of the available room on second floor as a base so they tend to hang around the corridors till after lunch.
I also noticed when I used the stairs to go down the cleaning ladies constantly leave their coffee cups, cigarettes on the stairs which is health hazards where I had to tell them to move them so I can use the stairs, also they put the bed cleaning rubbish by the stairs. They need be professional and treat the place as a hotel not personal home.
Poor communication at the reception they failed to give me the new door access code so was locked out but luckily other clients let me in.
Reception closes in the evenings and not around all the time
Far from metro station, not much to do or eat out around the area if you are here for holiday
Strong smell that hits you at the lobby when you enter the hotel with dated furniture. Wasn't a good first impression of the hotel but luckly my room was clean and fresh.
I stayed for 9 days hence my long review

The rooms are well kept and clean.  The people who work at the hotel are both as nice and as helpful as you could hope for.  My wife had emergency surgery in the nearby hospital.  The staff was absolutely great to her.  The breakfast included with room is also very good.  I stayed a bit over two weeks and felt quite at home.

The apartment is clean, comfortable, and well-equipped, offering a relaxing atmosphere. The location is also perfect, with easy access to everything you need. The host is very polite, friendly and helpful.  I highly recommend this hotel and would love to stay here again!
Decent place - clean and tidy. It has anything you might need even for a longer stay. Has a huge balcony. The area is quiet and has a busy stop nearby.
Fortunately there is this accommodation because it is very close to the hospitals. Clean, beautiful, and on a quiet street.
Very comfortable and clean apartment and superfriendly hosts. Value for money. Next time it will be again my first choice.
Great place to stay, lovely apartment. Host is lovely, we will come back.
Very clean modern apartment on the quiet street. close to many hospitals.

We stayed 12 days in the first floor one bedroom apartment!
The house was very clean and comfortable! The kitchen was fully equipped and the electrical appliances perfect and well maintained!
It has a washing machine, dishwasher, iron, ironing board... It's like living in your own home!
The neighborhood is in the green and very quiet!
The owner is very kind and willing to help with anything needed!
It's a 5-minute walk from Hygeia!
Also, 5 minutes walk has a large Sclavenitis, towards Chalandri but not towards Kifissias!
I highly recommend it!!

Dubious - cancellation and payment conditions in the reservation confirmation were not adhered to; the credit card is charged unjustifiably.
The managing director is George Papadopoulos, who gave his company a 5-star rating.
Spacious and clean room, at a great location. Very convenient whether you're continuing your journey by plane or ferry. Welcoming and caring host. Totally recommendable!
Clean, confortable, near the metro station (line Athens Airport - Piraeus). Great host. Very convenient to visit Athens with minimum cost of accommodation
Stayed there for 2 nights and really loved it. You will feel like in home and the location is just perfect, also not so far from the airport. Loved our stay there

Great place to stay. I've been many times. The room is spacious and clean, the bed is very comfortable, the appartment is calm and few minutes walking to the metro and the host is a very nice person that makes you feel like home. Will come back again and again.
I stayed there in October. Clean & cozy place. The owner nice and communicative. Walking distance from the metro station.

What a place and what service! Very grateful to have found this gem. The junior suite we stayed in had everything you could need and was beautifully and tastefully furnished. Everything was quality and so well thought through. The bed was very comfortable with different thicknesses of pillows so you could choose what worked best. The most amazing shower and products - usually I prefer to use my own but the bodywash and shampoo was just too good. Snacks on arrival and room serviced daily. Amazing tech too with a huge TV and high speed WiFi so I could do all my video conferences with ease. I could go on but I just recommend staying here to experience it. Thank you!
We recently stayed at Bond suites 🤩. The owner is very helpful! The rooms are spacious and feature high-end amenities that contribute to a super relaxing stay! Amazing location near OAKA!

Amazing location, near OAKA and many shopping centers and hospitals.. Beautiful neighbourhood and very easily approachable.. The room was spot-clean and very cosy, with a beautiful design and style.. I was positively surprised on the communication part, the responses were instant and very detailed.. Definitely a place to recommend!

Beautiful apartment, tasteful and absolutely spotless.

Great spot for central Athens

One of the most comfortable and pleasant sleeps. Beautiful and spotlessly clean room. Very good soundproofing! All selected with taste. The welcome gift had lots of goodies inside. The only downside (if I have to mention anything) is the balloon in the rear compartments which is small. But you have the reception area and the garden where you can go down and enjoy your coffee or your drink.
Only the best!!! Perfect cleanliness and hospitality!!

place_name: Athens Cholargos metro appartment 1 to 6 persons
review_text: Wait a minute, I'll be right back.

place_name: Athens Cholargos metro appartment 1 to 6 persons
review_text:
The best choice!
Neat, clean, spacious!
I have not slept in a worse accommodation. There is no bed. A person cannot sleep on the existing sofa bed.

We were in the comfort suite with city view. Balcony was large with a nice view. Staff was very helpful. Had an issue with our shower door, and the staff helped resolve the problem immediately with no issues. Parking can be an issue, but you are near so many restaurants and stores within walking distance.

The location of the hotel is far of Athens center if you’re tourist but it’s a nice location for people who don’t want to be in the center and want to have more quiet and local experience. There are good restaurants and bars near. Modern, clean and large rooms- the view is bad, overlooks to the city road. Staff weren’t nice and attentive . The hotel’s breakfast is a voucher with few limited options from a coffee place in front of the hotel.

Modern hotel with very spacious room located in an upscale neighbourhood of Athens. The value for money is excellent. As mentioned by other reviewers the hotel is about 30 minutes from Athens city centre by car (we took Ubers/taxis most days which cost us between Euro 15-17 each way), but the area it is in is lovely with lots of restaurants, bars and shops. Breakfast does get a bit repetitive indeed after a few days, but the bar/restaurant where it is served is a minute's walk from the hotel and is very cosy with great service. Overall highly recommended if you don't mind the drive / underground ride into Athens city centre.

Great place for a few nights, right in the center of Chalandri. If you are having a little break in the area then this spot is ideal, walking distance to shops and amenities. Breakfast is great as well which is served by an all day bar, just across the street! Would suggest it and i would use it again

The hotel staff was very friendly and helpful.  The rooms are spacious and very clean. Cleaning takes place everyday. Location is excellent, all main shops and restaurants within walking distance. Athens city centre 15-20 minutes by car. The Underground (Metro) is around 5-7 min by car. The only negative point is the car parking in the area.

Sunny Room Chalandri
Macedonia Athens

4* Stars

The owner is kind, but the room for this money falls short.
There was no TV, no curtain on the balcony door. The door that closes the room is locked with a latch and when you leave the room it must remain open.
The bathroom has very old items, the bed small.
Good room, kind owner..

I stayed in a Grand Suite, everything in the room was perfect, it has wide space, a large balcony I didn't get to use, the bed is nice and it has everything one could use for a long time travel. Like kitchen, fridge, ironing board, a secure box, bug repellents and much more. In regards of the service, nothing is missing from the bathroom, towels, bathrobes, toothbrushes and soaps. The room is cleaned daily, towels are replaced and they even open the windows for the fresh air. Finally, the location was ideal for my work travel, but also being so close to Kifisia Avenue it is very convenient for commuting back and forth to the center of the city (if not bothered by the traffic jam or driving at night)

Don't ever accept staying in the room at the ground floor. It is soo noisy and you can hear everything in the entrance and stairs! Anyone speaking or opening the door or going down the stairs will feel like he is in the flat! You will never be able to sleep! Never again. However to be fair rooms are quite big and breakfast is ok.

Very friendly, helpful and efficient receptionists. Very comfortable, spacious room with balcony, very clean, perfect shower, nice contemporary decoration, possibility to order lunch/ dinner from a very wide variety of delivery restaurants nearby. We very much enjoyed our stay there and will definitely book there upon our next trip to Athens. The location is perfect for its proximity to many hospitals, businesses and the Golden Hall shopping mall. Last but not least, we felt perfectly safe during our stay, all the Corona-Virus-related measures being very clearly and efficiently implemented, in a friendly manner. Highly recommended.

Warm and spacious. However the hotel extended in different buildings (within walking distance) but nonetheless you need to visit the main building to have your breakfast while rain pouring. Also there was no mini bar in the room. Other than that, staff was helpful and friendly and the room was clean and quiet.

The hotel is located in a business area and is easy to be reached from the airport. The staff was very friendly and helpful and gave us good directions for shopping nearby, which is in a walking distance. They offered us coffee upon arrival, which was good.
The rooms look nice and are very clean and the beds are excellent.
Clean and convenient. I was gladly surprised
Clean, comfortable and very close to train station. Perfect spot for us
A hidden gem in one of the most convenient areas of Athens

Amazing! The appartement is really really nice and the owner also super friendly and helpful.
Was a great stay
It's a good price-quality ratio. Quiet place and very spacious.
Very nice apart-hotel. Professional staff. Very clean and cozy rooms. A bit far away from amenities though
Nice quiet building, new apartments, clean

Relatively easy access. The location is very good, in a quiet neighborhood, close to supermarkets and grills as well as the golden hall.  The rooms are quite good and very clean. The only negative I would say is that there are three different buildings and you can only have breakfast in the main building.  If you are lucky and you stay there, ok, otherwise you have to move because they are not next to each other. I don't have an opinion on the breakfast because we didn't stay in the main building so we didn't even go. Very good service from the staff. Easy to park.

i could say it is one of the cleanest apartments we have stayed in very convenient location in Marousi and Pagrati and only 20' from the airport and with very friendly hospitality with treats and tsipouro we will prefer it again!

While I used to live in the area, I hadn't had the chance to see it and I didn't know about it. Although the conditions under which I stayed were not ideal - provided by my company "OTE" due to a fire in my area, I admit that I was glad to know that it exists this accommodation option quite close to me! Quiet, decent, comfortable, polite staff, my stay was pleasant. Next to Kifissias and the Avenue and Golden Hall shopping centers.
cozy, calm, quiet, clean, we have already visited the studios of the hotel three times and we are extremely satisfied. Thank you!

Smart room management. Modern, trendy with an amazing layout. It was excellent. I only regret the fact that I was left alone one night. A bit livelier if the air conditioner would be the ultimate place to stay. Kudos to the staff for their courteous and attentive service. It is definitely now my choice for accommodation.

Clean, decent, good value for the area, we were very pleased.
Quiet, clean area.
We will definitely go again
Excellent for the price, nice location. Perfect service

place_name: 'Romeo & Juliet' Cozy Apartment With Breathtaking View by Pin Homes
review_text: Great apartment, stylishly furnished and with everything you need for your stay. If you do not want to drive around Athens, it is easily accessible. There is a large terrace with views. On the ground floor of the building you have a grocery store and a bakery next to it. In one block you have a barista coffee shop. Within 5 minutes walk you have a shopping mall with restaurants, and most importantly, plenty of parking space on the street.

place_name: 'Romeo & Juliet' Cozy Apartment With Breathtaking View by Pin Homes
review_text: Very nice appartment.... Big patio with a amazing view over Athens....and a very good bed to sleep in!!!

place_name: 'Romeo & Juliet' Cozy Apartment With Breathtaking View by Pin Homes
review_text: Clean and cozy. Easy parking in front of the building.

place_name: 'Romeo & Juliet' Cozy Apartment With Breathtaking View by Pin Homes
review_text: Very nice house, fully secure and in a quiet neighborhood. 15 minutes walk from metro, next to shops, boulevard and mall. Honestly, the house is overcrowded, it lacks nothing..it has all the comfort and equipment of a normal house. And the owner is wonderful... I couldn't be more satisfied. Thanks for everything!

place_name: 'Romeo & Juliet' Cozy Apartment With Breathtaking View by Pin Homes
review_text:
I had booked 3 weeks.. I called him to check in a few days later than the reservation and he didn't pick up.. when I actually paid normally he canceled my reservation and I didn't stay a day..

I agree sir you did me a favor to put the dates a little later but don't say I'm lying when I called you to ask you to check in a little later (within the dates I had already booked) and you didn't pick up
Brand new apartment with great hosts. Very clean and well equipped. Good access to train station and center of Athens.
Great experience! Convenient location near the center, brand new, spotlessly clean and the hosts are wonderful! I will definitely visit again. VFM

Beautiful apartment, comfortable and very clean.
Immaculately decorated and in a very good location.
Nice clean rooms and lot's of space
Truly professional and most helpful
Recommendation!

We visited in 2018, everything was perfect, the metro was under the windows, the air conditioning was turned on before going outside so that the apartment would be cool later, I advise you, I think we will come here again! Good memories

Unfortunately, we can't recommend it at all. It's an aging building that has already been marked "access prohibited" on the outside by the building authorities. Handing over the keys was very stressful. At 6 p.m. I informed Homm that when we arrived at the apartment (website hidden by Airbnb) someone would bring the key over straight away, was the answer. 30 minutes later I wrote to Homm again because there was still no one there. ... The colleague would park and be there in 2 minutes, the answer. Almost 20 minutes later a young man came with the key. We waited for the key for almost an hour in 30 degree weather, in the outside entrance of the building that was marked with ribbons by the building authorities. We booked the Breathtaking Seaview homm Studio in the building from (Phone number hidden by Airbnb) to (Phone number hidden by Airbnb), we only stayed 1 night. Apartment in great need of renovation. Very loud from outside at night (motorcycles, screaming people...) and in the apartment we unplugged the refrigerator at night because it ran like a tractor. At sunrise the apartment is flooded with light because the blinds are missing or broken. Relaxation -0. The bathroom was small, really very small (my husband, 1.83 tall and 80kg, barely fit in the shower cubicle. I wrote to Homm directly in the morning and informed them that we couldn't stay there and had booked somewhere else. With the request that they I was only supposed to charge me for one night and transfer the money back for the remaining nights. I paid (Phone number hidden by Airbnb) € for this accommodation and got NOTHING back. Because the communication between Homm and me was very difficult and that was also the case If I didn't answer at all, I tried Airbnb support but unfortunately without success. The apartment is described as.... Stunning Homm studio with sea views in Glyfada. I... I would describe the apartment as very uncomfortable and stressful The host Homm is a tourist rip-off and dubious. The only thing that is true and really very nice is the view with a sea view

0 stars
We left our luggage here for 2 days and half our belongings were STOLEN!!!
Sketchy area and sketchy people around it. They said they “locked up” our suitcase and showed me where, so that only means staff was who rummaged through our suitcase and stole my belongings.
They stole my shoes, my hair brush, my clothes, my husbands clothes, our personal items, ALL of our Athens souvenirs. The list goes on and on. The property manager said the cameras do not show where the suitcase was stored and refused a refund through third party and never responded to my whats app request for one. I am disgusted and feel so violated by this. I would never stay here again or recommend some to. To think I’m extorting them for a free stay is insane. I want to warn others to beware.

Faisal was great from making sure we made it to giving tips on where to go and how to get there. The metro is like a 5 minute walk. And the blue line for hop on and off is 1.3 kilometers we walked in 18 minutes with no issues. I forgot to let them know I had rented a vehicle and Faisal message me every day if we could use the space or not since I didn't recerve in advance, but not to worry I was able to park at front safely I spend 4 days in Greece and when I come back I will definitely get back to Alekos to stay.

After initial misunderstanding as to the apartments we reserved and not being able to find our reservations, the host cleared things up with my sister and the owner and let us stay in some other apartments and then transferred us to the apartments we booked, the next day.

Clean apartments that come with a bottle of water in the fridge, a table and chairs, microwave, hot plates to cook, couch,TV, clean towels, and it's air conditioned. It's also in a quiet neighborhood which is good. They empty the trash cans almost every day. The host let us washed our clothes as well which was nice, since my husband didn't being enough clothes.

The reason I am ranking it the way it is, is because the metro is 10 to 20 minutes away, depending on the speed of your party members and not out front like some of the other hotels / apartments. Depending on the taxi person they might not want to come get you from these apartments. We also came during their Easter so when we arrived most everything was closed for two days so we ended up going to Plaka to get food so have no food recommendations
Receptionist very nice. Will advise you on something. Rooms on the 4th/5th/6th floor very large. Rooms below are smaller but also cool. I recommend this place to stay to everyone!
It is in a residential area but near the metro. It has an elevator. The beds are firm but I prefer firm beds especially when traveling. Market and restaurants are within walking distance.
