The bathroom is spacious and the hot shower has a nice shower head. We enjoyed the artwork on the walls as well that was made by the owner's mother, which brings me to the owner...

Vasiliki and her husband Jad were so kind to our family. From the moment we arrived, they did everything they could to make us feel comfortable. If we needed something, they provided it. They never made us feel like we were an inconvenience (and with 4 small kids, we could have been!) and regularly dropped off things for us to help us out. They even brought us some delicious Greek holiday treats!

While the apartment itself is small and it isn't ideally located, it's not far from the Panormou subway station (5-7 minute walk) and from the A5 bus stop which goes to Syntagma Square. There isn't any parking on site but we usually found street parking nearby without any problems. With the birth of our 4th child we quickly outgrew the apartment, but we were grateful for the time we had there. I highly recommend for a family of 4 or 5.

Good location. Iron machine, washing machine hairdryer. Nice room and kitchen and big balcony.
Kitchen stuff maybe needs little more things cutting board, knife wooden spoon. 🙂 But definitely deserve 5 stars.

Comfortable apartment for 1/2 people with literally all amenities and at a very affordable price compared to the competition. Immediate service. I will prefer it again and recommend it to others. Access by OASA to and from the center (Constitution). The only "disadvantage" is the relative "bubble" due to L. Mesogion, which is tolerable. In all other fields, I have nothing to say that is not worthy. 5/5
Great apartment, has everything you need for a comfortable stay. Clean, in a good location next to hospitals. Excellent communication and service. I recommend you to choose it.
Second time we chose Elvita Apartments and we were extremely pleased!
The apartment in Ampelokipis near Errikos Dunan on the top floor very good. Clean, quiet, central and easily accessible from main roads 10✔️

Stayed 2 nights August 14th family of 4
The hotel is situated in a prime location with easy transportation. The staff at the front desk were very friendly and welcoming, and they provided us with all the information we needed for our stay. Room was very spacious, clean and beautifully decorated. By far the most comfortable bed I have slept in.
Fantastic breakfast served in the morning.
Every staff member we interacted with went above and beyond to ensure our stay was enjoyable.
For the price, this hotel offers excellent value for money. The combination of the location, amenities, and service makes it well worth the cost. Overall our stay at the hotel was fantastic. We would highly recommend this hotel to families, couples looking for a romantic getaway or business travellers. Looking forward to staying here again in the future. Also forgot to mention transportation included to the airport.

If you wanna stay at a hotel that has no ac in a 100 degree weather this is your place!!! Had them come look at it first night said it would be fixed the next day. Next night still no ac asked for another room and was told hotel was completely full. Breakfast was slim to nothing. I would not recommend to anyone. Much better hotels around!!!

This was a late booking the night before we left Greece, but I would stay here again with no issue. Nice rooms, easy check-in and the breakfast the next morning was good. One of the best parts about this hotel was that they have their own dedicated parking for an additional 8 Euro (well worth it if you have tried to find adequate parking in Athens).

Not recommended at all!! Ridiculous breakfast. Green light is always on in the room above the bed.. the most stupid thing ever when you're supposed to sleep..
Waste of money. There are much better places for less and better quality.
Don’t be fooled by the pics , hotel is surrounded by old buildings with no view , Athen in general is an overrated and not a beautiful city to visit
They charged me 100% even I have canceled a week before arrival. Complete rip off! Never again
Nice owner, no noise, relaxing apartment. Would suggest. Also isn’t too expensive, great value.
Fantastic, absolutely nothing to complain!

Excellent apartments, clean, bright, organized with many amenities, balcony, internet, smart TV, washing machine, kitchen with many utensils, toaster, microwave, kettle, coffee maker, slippers, towels, nice pillows-mattresses! Easy access to subway and nearby supermarket!
And also a great host! I suggest it!
Exactly 1 minute from the house, the underground parking of the president hotel is available for a fee (the first 2 hours 5 euros each subsequent 0.50 euros)
Large apartment in a central location. The rooms are very good. The second bathroom needs a renovation. The kitchen needs improvements. Otherwise a good experience
Comfortable hospitality, all of them very helpful, thank you very much!

Excellent hostels!
Well done colleagues for the effort
Easy access, cleanliness, large TV, air conditioning, it has nothing to envy from many rental rooms or hotels.
Very admirable effort by SX to create these hostels extremely comfortable, airy, spacious and very clean...if there was access to the Mediterranean through the closed gate, that would be great....
Great rooms
Very nice place to stay!

Very clean and neat house.
I will definitely prefer it again. The owner is kind and very helpful!!!
Very clean place! The owner very friendly. I highly recommend it.

Excellent space, next to everything and spotlessly clean!
Our host served us perfectly.
Clean and convenient. The host is very friendly and helpful

In the room was quite space, bed was comfortable and staff was nice. Now the cons. Quite a lot of mosquitos there, but service has electric device againts them, so no problem. Moreover In the room were little ants and this is quite bad, because sleeping with mind of beeing bitten by this isnt so nice. And finally the placement of the hotel is bad, outside of the hotel was quite ugly and brakfast box definitely doesnt worth the money spent.

Worst hotel experience I have had. The room had recently been smoked in and they refused to move us to another room. The front desk guy was very nice but the manager refused to speak to us. Definitely do not stay here
We booked a non smoking room and when we arrived it smelled so strongly of cigarette smoke. They did not have any other rooms available and wouldn’t refund us. Such a sad experience.

We stayed here for two nights prior to a cruise. The price was very reasonable so we weren’t expecting much. We arrived to the hotel VIA their car service which was amazing! We got to the hotel just to be met with the friendliest staff you could find. We went to our room which we absolutely loved and had everything we needed, along with a great view of the Acropolis. We also used their car service for a 5 hour tour of Athens as well as to get to the ship. It was all worth every penny. The only negative things there were was the breakfast, and possibly the surroundings. Some. May love the breakfast however the offerings just weren’t to my liking. The Surroundings initially make you think you’re in a rough area, however I don’t believe you really are. I felt safe the entire time and even walked 1.9 Kilometers to the center for food and browsing. We plan on staying here The next time we come and would recommend this to anyone. We absolutely loved this place.

Nice enough place, a bit dingey in appearance though. The staff is truly lovely and there's a coffee, wine, spirits bar in the lobby. Sadly not a place for folks with cat allergies, they have a pet cat that lounges on everything in the lobby and there's no enclosure for luggage keeping.
Really a decent place to say, great size rooms just not my ideal.
Value for money!!!!!
A tidy and spotlessly clean apartment in a very convenient location!! You can even see the Acropolis from the balcony!!
Nice staff! Room with a decent kitchen. Everything ok👍

Really nice room, absolutely fitting for 2 people! Everything was clean and nice. The only small things we saw/ noticed were: the air conditioner didn’t work that well, there was a weird smell coming out of the bathroom and the ceiling was cracking (the paint).
The apartment had a really big balcony with clothing lines and given clothespins, really good because we could hang it there and it would dry in no time. The room has 2 balcony doors, which made it easier to ventilate the room.
The way to the apartment is really nice too, we could just use the elevator, which was really necessary because it was way to hot to walk the stairs every time.

It's a hotel that matches the price you pay for it. It's about a 30-minute walk to the city center. The hotel was clean, with a soft bed and towels included. The only drawback was a cigarette smell upon arrival, but it disappeared after airing out the room. The room has air conditioning, a small kitchen, a table, chairs, a TV, a wardrobe (a bit small for two people), a bed, and nightstands. The bathroom also has a washing machine. During our 10-day stay, we had an issue with the electricity once, but it was resolved the same day. Towards the end of our stay, we had a minor issue with a neighbor who played loud music at night, but after reporting it to the host, the problem was immediately resolved. I want to highlight the prompt, quick, and hassle-free communication with the owner, who was always available and responsive to our inquiries. Regarding the location, at first glance, it might not seem very friendly, but we had no safety issues. By the end of our stay, I even started to feel at home.

OVERBOOKING AND LAST MINUTE CANCELATION
Unprofessional, petty owner! I had booked the room for 3 days for a concert that i was attending 4 months in advance. When I called the morning of the reservation to ask on how to get to the room, a very rude man told me that the kichen was set on fire! and I couldn't stay there and when I ask for compensation he said he did nothing wrong and was simply giving me my money back.
However, when I called booking they informed me that the owner claimed an overbooking case and no damage was reported to the premices. Lying unreliable host.
STAY AWAY!
Nice clean apartment with basic equipments. Metro station is in about 15 minutes.

Generally an ok hotel, the bed was covered by 2 sheets that didn't completely fit and had to be resettled if you moved incorrectly. The size was very nice and the kitchen was also pretty good. The location is close to one of the metro stations, and is also a ~15-30 minute walk to whatever you want to see in the downtown area.

place_name: BEAUTIFUL PEOPLE SUITES ATHENS ACROPOLIS VIEW
review_text:
Where to start? It will be obvious to say that the reason why you book this apartment is clear: the hot tub with a view of the acropolis. Well, if you are also interested in these two things, think twice or thrice before booking here. Because the hydromassage doesn't work and the view is not like in the photo. As for the view, you can see for yourself from the attached photos: do you notice any differences? I do. Someone must have had fun with Photoshop.
Regarding the hot tub, we noticed that at a certain point the tub, although THE WATER LEVEL WAS NORMAL AND NOT ON THE MARGIN, the tub was LEAKING and the apartment was flooding. Furthermore, the bubble system only makes noise, but once immersed you realize that it is particularly weak and the water surface remains intact, smooth, like a lake. In short, you don't enjoy the hydromassage, but only a normal bathtub with background noise. What can I say? Once we called the owner, she didn't even try to listen to our complaints for a second, but immediately denied the evidence and treated us with arrogance and rudeness. I underline that I have never and I mean NEVER had problems with structures on booking, despite the fact that I have done dozens upon dozens. This was my worst experience. But obviously the ownership will be ready to deny this review too, I imagine. However, I remain with a clear conscience. Enjoy Athens, a beautiful city, but don't spend the night here, trust me.

place_name: BEAUTIFUL PEOPLE SUITES ATHENS ACROPOLIS VIEW
review_text: We left the same just in the evening. First the photos prove how much Photoshop they used to attract people. We tried to upload them to the booking review as well but once the comment was uploaded, the photos disappeared. water drips and around it a lake was created which we collected ourselves. I must emphasize that we had filled it to the limits that had been set for us and after entering we realized that it was not as strong as a machine. Disappointed, we closed it and stayed in the water to relax. The surface of the water in no way approached the rim of the tub. At one point we heard a sound as if something was dripping and when I turned to look I saw the water below and the curtain was wet (below). The hostess didn't sit down to listen to us and immediately went into defense that we spilled it and that's why the curtain was wet because the water was leaving from above. And now I'm wondering, if the water left from above, wouldn't the curtain be wet starting from the height of the bathroom? Food for thought...But no they tried to make us liars and crazy and of course when we asked for some compensation he refused and continued to blame us. I couldn't understand what was going on and of course we packed up and left the same day.Unfortunately we should have taken the booking at that time but we were so flustered that we were unimaginable.So the owner of course caught up with us to complain against us and now our word against hers. A tip really away from such people.

place_name: BEAUTIFUL PEOPLE SUITES ATHENS ACROPOLIS VIEW
review_text:
Great space, tasteful, warm and friendly.
Cleanliness and freshness in all rooms!
The kitchen was more equipped than we expected, with treats, fruit and a wonderful wine! The bathroom is excellent and very functional! The bed is comfortable and suitable for rest and relaxation. The hot tub... was the icing on the cake as you could create an awesomely romantic atmosphere with all the trimmings (bubble bath candles and music).
The hostess was always friendly and willing to give directions and clarifications.
One of its biggest advantages is the underground parking, with an internal elevator to the rooms.
First time our stay in Athens was so comfortable and relaxing!
We will definitely prefer it again!

The rooms you see are the single rooms in the hotel. That part seemed nice. We rented an apartment and it was really trash. It's a complexe apart from the hotel. Shower head has nothing to hold on to. Hole in the floor where the drain is. Bathroom door couldn't shut and handle was loose. Held by a small 1 inch lock with a hole in the door. Beds were extremely stiff. Exposed wires everywhere. Outlets hanging. Main entry door to the room is secure though. That's the only positive.
€150 x night, plus €7 for the breakfast (breakfast at home is much richer than that), not even an espresso available, only from the machine. The rooms are horrible. Never again!

Great price for what you get. Ariston reception staff were amazing and kind. Friendly and professional. Thanks also for the free bottle of water!

Only constructive feedback would be to please remove the metal object in the shower of room 36 as this cut me whilst showering.

Apart from that, amazing staff and a really good price for the service. Close to the metro also.

Thanks again.

Great Location & very clean and tidy. Would have been a fantastic hotel if only our night would have been nicer. Maybe we were just unlucky with our room, but the AC only worked while we were in the room. Thus when we arrived after a day out in Athens, the room was a cozy 27 Celsius, way too hot to sleep. Cooling it down proved challenging, however, as the AC was directly above the bed and projected its chilly wind of blizzard directly onto our bodies. This plus the noise from the roof top restaurant directly above us and the very hard bed that would have made any monk jealous, made it quite hard to sleep.

Very overpriced for what it was - small basic room, noisy from other guests, basic amenities, not in a great area. Redeeming features - room was very clean, small balcony was nice, and the staff were very kind and helpful.

The apartment was very close to all the “must see” places of Athens and close to transportation. The apartment was extremely clean, spacious and the beds were very comfortable. The hosts were very nice and left us some food, drinks and Greek goodies for our stay! they also provided advice on the best places and restaurants to visit. I would give more starts if I could! Would definitely recommend and would definitely return for a second stay!

My family and I really enjoyed our stay at BMV Apartments. Christos was a great host. He was very accommodating as we landed quite early and he had our rooms ready when we arrived. The complimentary snacks, fresh fruit and water was a great surprise. The location is perfect. As you are in walking distance of all of Athens attractions but also out of the busy city. We will be returning when we next say in Athens.

Chris, host was fantastic he told us how to get to all the local sites. The apartment was spotless and the bowl of fruit with the basket of tasty treats were an excellent surprise. I would recommend these apartments and am definitely going back again next time I am in Athens.

It’s been a long time since I stayed in a condo with such aura and class. Many thanks to the Hosts; both were extremely polite, friendly and helpful. There were also some treats in the apartment on the first day we arrived! I could not recommend BMV Apartments enough! Can’t wait to visit Athens again.

In a great location, in the city center! Very clean and beautiful! The hosts (Christos & Eugenia) so friendly and welcoming... Warm welcome and willing to help us with our every need!
With a big smile we renew our stay there and on our next visit to the city!

Only mins walk to the Larissa Train Station. Rooms are ok except there was persistent smell of cigarette. You can get hot water from the reception at the ground floor. And bonus: they allow you to leave your luggages for storage if you need to get away for a while.

The room was cheap. We payed €65 per night but even this felt too much for what we got. The only good thing about this place is that it’s close to the Athens Central Station.

The walls were paper thin. When I say paper I mean single ply see thru tissue paper. The mattress was the worst possible combination of a concrete slab and a cardboard box. The bathroom was useable but tiny and the provided shampoo and soap were astoundingly bad. The room, bathroom, and hotel infrastructure in general felt very dated.

The only good things I have to say is that the staff was friendly, our room was ready immediately, and the place was relatively clean.

Perhaps worst of all, was the rest of the clientele at the Hotel. We were awoken multiple times between 11:30pm and 1am by doors slamming. Not just closing forcefully, but ridiculously loud and hard slams. One after another after another. Then, at 5:45am, we were awoken by a shouting match between the two guests in the room above us. Obviously this aspect is out of the control of the hotel, but it’s something to keep in mind when considering the price of the room.

Good location, but the bathroom was beyond dirty, the air vents were closed shut with duct tape, later it turned out that there were cockroaches in the room. We asked to get changed into another, cockroach-free room, but that side not happen, we checked out after 2 nights and moved to a different hotel. There was no sorry, no assistance, no refund, nothing. We suspect the receptionists do not speak English, all our inquiries have been ignored. Avoid, if you can.

Extremely clean room. Clean bedsheets , clean towels, the balconies is a plus and bigger plus is the metro in 2 minutes and the huge supermarket opposite. The price also was very reasonable. But that's it. Don't expect something more than this

1. The rooms were very old and even had fungus in the bathrooms
2. We were charged 3 Euros per room per night as Tax (which in all other Hotels across Greece is 3 Euros)
3. There were cockroaches in the room
4. Locality was very deserted after 8PM

Overall for the prices being charged, other Hotels were far better.
Great and spacious apartment in a great location. It has everything you need in a quiet neighborhood. The host is wonderful, he explained everything to us and was there for all our questions.

My family and I had a great stay at this apartment. It was  and equpped with everything we needed. The host was very accommodating and quick to respond to any questions we had. We would definitely stay here again!

Booked this apartment online and the listing states free parking,not true.When I told the owner by email that I could not stay there because I had a rental car I had to park and there were tow away  signs, he sent me an automated email with paid garage instructions and areas in Athens to avoid.Also the area it is in is not the safest looking,people on drugs walking around and such.Then after I contacted my bank the owner called me directly by phone and asked me to get the money back I just disputed because he had bills to pay.
This is an update on this "host" through booking.com,this individual decided he did not like the review I left so decided to slander me on the response,Do Not Book Anything from this person,I won't name names but he has another listing on another booking site.Google has been notified of the harassing behavior.
Comfortable, clean and bright apartment, located next to the metro and train station, with central attractions within walking distance.

Ugly, dirty place.
1. Cockroaches (karaluchy!!!) - if you never leaves at slums it's a good place.
2. Air condition don't work (It was very old making biger noise than cold and installed only in bedroom). At living room was two dirty fans.
3. Kitchen was dirty and has only one spoon.
4. Owner makes many rules wich was send before camig eg. disable hot water because electrisity was broken.
5. Entrance to the building stick and is totally broken.
6. We ask owner to cancel rent after one night because we disgusted cockroaches (karaluchy) but he say apartment is ok and payment policy ... then I say then I write all at comment.

All disadwantages was at other opinion.
Only nice photos! Congratulations to photographer. God job.

The local is good. 10 min to metro station and for 3-4 stops you are in the city center.
The bedrooms are big and clean. There is AC in each one. You can take the keys by yourself and to leave them by the same way.
Be careful with the elevator in the building because it’s old and max 2 people can be in it

Nice hotel and great for the price. Rooms are adequate, clean and with everything you need for a city break. Where this hotel sets it apart is the amazing roof top bar and pool area. Wonderful views to end a busy day of site seeing, with a nice cold glass of wine. 👌

The rooms were clean and sufficiently equipped. The location is a bit far from the acropolis but it does have a great rooftop view of it and is just four stops away on the metro. It's a little farther from the airport (about 45 minutes). The rooftop pool is also nice though small and the surrounding deck gets SUPER hot so wear your flip flops until you step in! The food servers were fantastic but the front desk courtesy was hit or miss. One of the gentlemen who worked it was super friendly and helpful and the other was very aloof.

Stayed here for 2 nights in one room as a family of 4. Honestly this hotel was nothing special - sounds harsh but in our opinion the photos are deceiving. The rooftop and breakfast are the best parts so I’ll start there, the rooftop has friendly and attentive staff when ordering food/drinks and a beautiful view of the Acropolis with ample seating and a small pool. The included breakfast is the best we have ever had at a hotel. Tons of variety with sweets and fresh fruit, breads, eggs, meat, cheese, Greek yogurt, specialty coffee etc. The breakfast is the only reason I didn’t give 2/5. The not so good part - If you’re travelling with small kids who will want to splash and play in a pool - note that this pool is small and other people in the pool will be splashed. The room was very cramped and lacked outlets (no outlet in the washroom) so many of us had to take turns charging our devices. We also had 4 single beds, which we didn’t mind, but they weren’t very comfy. Overall we agreed that this is a “bare minimum” hotel - but the breakfast and rooftop were nice, as well as the location. Very close to the subway which was a plus!!

Nice hotel highlighted by an amazing rooftop bar and pool with a city view including the acropolis - manned by helpful and friendly bar staff. The location is good enough, whilst not central it is close to the efficient metro. Breakfast wasn’t amazing however cannot think of any other negatives for the value of this hotel!

The rooms are not all of the same quality. We had two, and the last one needed some attention.
The location is not great!
Rooftop is pleasant. It has a view of the Acropolis. Unfortunately, the pool is way too small!

Really does feel like home. I enjoyed my stay there. The apartment has everything you need, and even nice living room where to enjoy some movies on Netflix. The location is great too, in a nice and quiet neighborhood that has grocery stores and good restaurants. On Wednesdays there seems to be a local market nearby.

An outstanding apartment, the home owner is very welcome and ready to help at any given time. Netflix,Disney,smart tv are all inclusive, fast internet , A\C, located in the central  area of Athens. Really close to Athens metro and suburban railway, very helpful if u want to roam around Athens. Excellent choice, it will be our first when I visit Athens in the near future.
I really loved the old 50's vibe of this apartment. Everything I needed was here. I felt safe. It was very clean and it was a close walk to the Museum of Archaeology.
Really nice apartment. The landlord and housekeeper are lovely and it's very close to the train station and metro! 100% recommended!

Excellent apartment, clean and in a quiet neighborhood! The host willing to serve us and help us by providing us information about the city. The negative comments are really out of place, they don't correspond to reality. Will definitely be my first choice again when I visit Athens!

Awesome apartment. Super clean, spacious, comfortable and modern. AC in perfect conditions.
Good location, easy to enter. With a huge balcony to chill.
The bed was also really good.
Well taken care by the host.
You can work, rest, and enjoy.
I am coming back for sure to this place.

We preferred the apartments to host a group of foreign partners for a seminar that our company held in Athens.
The rooms were excellent, the service perfect, our guests were completely satisfied!
Thank you very much for everything. We will definitely prefer these rooms again!
Very close to the metro .. very good hospitality, clean space, everything in the apartment was perfect, we will definitely prefer it again!
Very beautiful and comfortable accommodation in an excellent location and very close to the meter. I highly recommend it

I was very pleased with the accommodation.!!
Thanks to the host who was very helpful and kind to us .👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻

I was pleasantly surprised by this hotel. We didn't spend a huge amount of time here, out exploring Athens for the best part of the 2 days. But our room was clean and functional, our bathroom was huge and also clean. The beds weren't super comfy but did the purpose. Once we got the air con working, this was a joy. The hotel is dated but has some great ceiling decorations and character to it. We asked for extra towels and were provided these. The location isn't bad, right near a metro station. It is possible to walk through to the main area of Athens from here also, although you do see some less favourable neighbourhoods. The worst part of this hotel was definitely lugging our luggage up 3 floors on that spiral staircase. It's incredible value for money considering.

You get what you pay for. Old rooms but nice and clean for the most part. Nice warm shower although no hold up top so had to be hand held the whole time, no biggie. Staff were friendly. Location isn’t amazing but only about a 5 minute walk from the metro which takes you anywhere you might wanna see.

Hotel is two-stars, so it doesn’t deserve more than that. Super noisy, both in and outside. Staff doesn’t care about this and keep talking among themselves at high tones. It’s magical but your clothes will smell cigarette smoke, I concur. Bathrooms and toilets are shared. Clean but old. They could be a very very beautiful hotel with high ceilings and antique look of the halls and stairs. But sadly the hotel is not well maintained.

BED BUGS.

My goodness, where to start with this place? First of all, it was infested with bed bugs. We were moved through three separate rooms on two different floors, and each had full-grown bed bugs in them. On top of that the management/desk manager barely spoke English and offered absolutely zero assistance with this issue. They just brushed it off and tried to get more money from us when we had to stay an extra night in order to get our clothes and luggage treated because of this problem. Again, absolutely no help at all. Terrible service in a parasite-infested hotel. Don't go here.

DO NOT GO!!!
Ugly run down filthy hotel nothing like the pictures found stains on the pillows and sheets and smells of cigarettes, showers were tiny and leaking from the faucet which kept flooding the bathroom. Drop ceiling in the room was dipped in the middle almost falling off, Only one power socket in the room and it was juri rigged to the door(not even stuck straight)

Walking in, it's great. Looks spacious and has potential. You have dreams and you have hopes. Then, your world crumbles to the dark abyss.
Too many things are broken or missing.
The light bulbs are nonexistent, something in the bathroom is dripping and there are no plates, forks, spoons, knifes or forks.
Promises were made. They have not been kept (eg missing TV).
The photos are very misleading and we are very disappointed. Our hearts have been crushed into pieces, just like the ceiling will be like in a couple of hours.
Also, the light switch for one bedroom is located in a different bedroom, which is just ridiculous.
The only good thing about the appartement is the big living room/kitchen (since it is empty) because you can have all the dance battles you want.

Do not rent here. This place is not worth €300 for 4 nights.

The pictures look nothing like the place. The apartment is a mess. Everything is either broken or missing. Also there is a lack of privacy since there are no curtains. We have no cutlery and the fridge isn't working either.

We had such an amazing stay here! The apartment is huge (THREE BEDROOMS) with very nice interiors, new modern furniture, state of the art home appliances and sunny. Located in a quiet street, we enjoyed our morning coffee at the terrace that offers a lovely view. Very clean spaces, comfortable beds, tvs with Netflix app and good air-conditioning. The price was a steal! Definitely VALUE FOR MONEY!!! We will visit again for sure!!

Very big, so close to the metro in very good location that had everything around, big super market, restaurants, small shops! Very easy check in procedures, very nice communication with the host that was very kind and helpfull! This big apartment in so cheap price that they offer you everything was super good and ill choose it in the future again!
Very close to the metro and huge super market with 24/7 shops around! Its very big with amazing view at Acropolis! Next time i will book again for sure! Staff very kind

ERASMUS STUDENTS, DO NOT RENT HERE. PAY MORE ELSEWHERE THAN LIVE HERE. IT IS NOT WORTH IT

This place is fine if you don't mind living like in a zoo. If you are a tourist and don't plan to stay for a long time, the apartment is sufficient to spend the night. The wifi is okay at best, but it does not perform very well due to the location. Other living commodities are pretty decent. If you plan to rent the double room, I suggest renting elsewhere for the same price, there are plenty of options. If you plan to rent in the shared bedroom, I suggest you don't. There is usually at least one resident who is ether, like some sort of escaped convict, a very sensitive person, or just a creepy person, so he will get on your nerves. There is no table, no proper storage besides a small locker. Kichen is very small (it's like 4m²) so it can get pretty crowded. The rooms have an ongoing bed bug problem that is not really resolved (it is for all bedrooms). The landlord will tell you that there was a professional cleaning done to remove them, while in reality, it was just his sister and cousin doing just a pretty ordinary cleaning with, I guess little extra steaming. Another thing to note is that the landlord, while being polite and nice, is a bit incompetent. The location is close to the center, so that's a plus. Neibourhood is definitely "real Athens," so you should expect to see dirty streets with crackheads all around.
Overall, not recommended, especially for Erasmus students. Do yourself a favor and pay more for better. This is not worth it.

Aggressive landlord, mold everywhere, bad wifi, camera that can record audio and video in the living room. Forces you to join a WhatsApp group where he puts daily messages, and if you miss your cleaning day he tries to charge 15 euros, and publicly shaming you in the WhatsApp group. also, make sure to like this landlord because you will see his face A LOT. Comes checking in on the apartment and his tenants three times a week at least. Tried to get physically aggressive because he was called a bad name. The roommates were very friendly though, that's the only positive about this place.
Very nice apartment in central Athens, conveniently located near the Metaxourgeio metro. There is everything you need for a pleasant stay, and a well-equipped kitchen for eating in.

Location is great, close to central areas like Omonoia which did feel quite unsafe at night, but accommodation area felt safe. Dorm is okay, can get quite noisy due to doors, beds and common room. Cleaner comes once a day and is friendly. An alright place to stay and easy to get to.

Very nice place to stay for longer and shorter. With bathroom and balony. Ideal rooms for 2 people. Good location in city center. All what musy be see is at your walking distance. If you need go further subeay and tramways are very close. Recommend strongly.

place_name: MYRON ATHENS - COSY AND KING-SIZE BED
review_text: Very kind and helpful hosts, it is perfect for 2 people. I would totally suggest it to anyone who want to explore Athens. It is in a small walking distance from metro station and Athens center. Can't wait to go back!

place_name: MYRON ATHENS - COSY AND KING-SIZE BED
review_text: Very nice design with attention to detail. Cosy and really practical near the city center and commute. Hosts extremely helpful!

place_name: MYRON ATHENS - COSY AND KING-SIZE BED
review_text: The apartment is excellent! Spotlessly clean, fully equipped and right in the center of Athens! Great people and very kind! I highly recommend it!!!

place_name: MYRON ATHENS - COSY AND KING-SIZE BED
review_text: Very nice and clean apartment! In a good location! I highly recommend it!
The people are scammers the room was dirty wretched let alone hot water towels dirty… Broken shutters and windows…

Wonderful!!!
Very clean rooms with everything you need!!
The cleaning lady very good and kind helped us with everything we needed.
The hotel is very nice, the rooms are spotlessly clean and the cleaning lady is very kind and perfect in everything!

Very nice apartment and a very friendly host. For example, the host brings you clean towels if you need some. The apartment is clean and the nearest metro station (Victora) is a 5 minute walk, so the location is also pretty decent.

Better than sleeping out on the streets. But absolutly not recommendable because of different reasons. Loud and annoying traffic all the day (no sleeping). And not the safest part of Athens especially in the evening and night.
It's the best place to stay for a few days. Near downtown. Nice apartment and big. I strongly  recommend you.
Very comfortable place with a lot of benefits like air conditioning and good help if needed, also fully equipped
The apartment isn't bad, otherwise I would never come to Athens again, we were robbed on arrival, we're not the only ones apparently.... Bad experience..

We loved our stay at the apartment. It was clean, comfortable and fully furnished with everything needed. The location is perfect with the metro close by. the area has everything from mini markets to shopping, restaurants... A very big thank you to George and Yuliia, who always made sure we felt at ease and at home and always ready to help us.
We booked very last minute and ended up having great experience. They’re really nice and the apartment was our favorite we stayed in Athens.

The apartment was perfect, very comfortable, and equipped with everything you need. Near a metro station and several bus stops make it easy to move in Athens. Finally, Ted and George were always a message away to answer any question.

Amazing location, with Victoria station only a 5 minutes walk from the apartment.
My Mum was staying at this apartment, and I went to visit her a few times. The apartment is absolutely spotless and fresh.
Next time I'm in Athens, I'll definitely be staying here. 😊

Place was amazing, everything was clean and neat. Location is perfect, its a 5 minute walk to the metro station and about 1 hour away from the airport.

The host is really nice and ✨cozy✨ themselves, really helpful and are there for you whenever you need them!

Loved the place, 100% worth it!

Hello my friends, I spent two days in this hotel. My friend gave me a ride and told me to pay for two days. When I left, they told me that you have to pay 60 euros for a day, knowing that my friend paid for everything and they seized my documents and the documents of my children and my wife, knowing that I am alone. Other than that, the services are very bad and there is a girl working.  There is a lot of racism towards visitors, so why do you work in a place visited by tourists? Hotel management has improved hotel services and no to racism, fraud and deception.

Terrible host!
The apparent was nothing like the photos!
The photos are from a completely different place!
Helpful staff and clean good size rooms in a very mutli cultural area of Athens.
Be careful with this listing it's a scam he's using fake pictures
Warm welcome even in the middle of the night, clean space, vast and very confortable room. Great value for money.
Horrible apartment...
Excellent apartment. Excellent professional approach. Comfortable house
Very beautiful apartments

This is not a smoke-free hotel. Employees and the guests smoke all the time in the hotel. The rooms are old, and the bathrooms and doors always have problems. Staff, as well as Arabic-majority guests, are friendly and nice. The area is Muslim immigrant area, there is no danger and they are nice people. Wifi only covers the reception and TV room, and they are filled with smoke.

Very disappointed with what was here but follows the other reviews.

Beds ARE clean, and it's comfortable to get to sleep but the bathroom is disappoint. I had cold showers both morning and night, and isn't a shower but a shower base and a shower hose head. I found myself in a crouch washing myself in cold water.

Alright for one night but there are many other gems in the city to stay.

I had a nice stay (20 days) in the hôtel. It's cheap, the rooms are confortables.
The personel is very nice, you can ask them to clean your room when you want.
It's well located, near the center of Athens,(10min on foot) and next to the metro.
The neighborhood is quiet, it's not what people think it is.

If you are a student, or a young traveller, the place is very great.

I had my worse experience in hostels in my life there. Im really simple but this hostel is not good at all. The neighbourhood is awful, every time you walk there you fell in danger, the hostel is really old and dirty. The sheets smells as a she#t.

Rooms are not upto mark.  The location of the hotel is good.  It is situated near to the metro station "victoria".  Bathrooms are on very bad condition without bathroom door lock.  Price is cheaper but you can avail better hotel on these price range.

The host was really nice and helpful, unlike others we appreciated that she thought about some breakfast, because it wasn't included.
We stayed for 1 night because our flight got delayed, but I wished we stayed longer. I will trully recommend it, also for the good location in a safe zone.

Had a super supportive hostess Tonia who really cares about her guests.
Apartment is close to Victoria station and in few kilometres from Acropolis. So if walking is ok for you and important a good connection with public transport, can recommend this place for 1-2 persons.
There is small improvised kitchen in corridor, clean and tide bathroom, as well as bedroom.
Take a ear buds to avoid street and neighbours noises and be ready that elevator not working early in the morning. If you have luggage you will carry down 2 floors.
Tonia is very helpful host who make you feel very welcome and give a lot of useful practical advises. ☀️

We’ve never had such warm hospitality! The room was perfect and the so was the breakfast! The elevator made going up and down with luggage easy. Tonia was very communicative when our ferry was late and with recommendations. The bed was very comfortable! We will definitely be back.
Very kind and warm hosting, one of the best stays we've ever had.
Best vacation ever!
Nice and comfy place (lot of space to 10 people). Very good location. Recommend to travelling families

Deceptive company that tries to deceive all its tenants (Erasmus students) and treats them in inhumane ways. I was living in one of their apartments throughout the year and they did not fix some humidity and during the week of July that I stayed in another of their apartments they did not clean it all week and I was living among dirt and garbage. Furthermore, the treatment on their part was despicable, having received threats on the last day of my stay there.
Spacious and clean apartment in a good location and good handling

There’s something special about this place. And the people who work here. It’s without a doubt the best two-star hotel I have ever stayed at.

And for women out there, some of the rooms have the best make-up table there exists in a hotel!

The only improvement I would do would be to change doors / isolate better for hallway noise. But still, at night it’s super quiet. The cleaning personal are the kindest. So are the staff in reception. I love the 70’s art deco vibe in the rooms. I would definitely stay again.

Clean, tidy hotel.
Lovely staff, very helpful and friendly.
Little bit away from main tourist area, 2 - 4 km easy walk depending where you are going.
Felt safe walking around.
Close to all public transport options.
Great food options, all nearby .
Will stay here again.
Room on smaller side, but we were only sleeping there, out most days.
The shower had great water pressure and good hot water.
Housekeeping is great.

Our stay at the Victory inn was very pleasant. Our room was very large with ample space for our luggage. The bed was comfortable but the pillows quite thin. As we only stayed for two nights we made do. The bathroom was a bit on the smaller side but fine for a couple.

Good proximity to public trans, easy places to eat and supermarket. Nice local neighborhood 2 blocks away; restaurants, bars, art etc. Place was very clean, staff extremely acommodating. AC works well, room was comfortable and quiet with all standard amenities and private balcony. Simple and fresh selection of local breakfast options served daily. Perfect for a night or 2 while traveling.
34 room boutique hotel! Smallish rooms but very clean and tidy. Not far (walking distance from most of the major Athens attractions. Good food options nearby!

I had a fantastic stay at Figleaf. The staff was friendly and attentive, and my room was clean, comfortable, and well-equipped. The location was perfect, close to Athens center. Highly recommend for anyone visiting Athens.

hotel is located in downtown athens, well within walking distance from the usual points of interest any tourist should visit. prices are affordable and premises are clean and well equipped.  staff is also very polite and helpfull. all in all a nice experience
Modern and convenient; extremely helpful solution for business trips, including colleagues visiting Athens. Strongly recommended.
Wonderful place in central Athens,  I loved everything; I highly recommend Fig leaf for its clean, cozy rooms. I will come back for sure!
Excellent stay, super clean, well equipped, and friendly staff. Close to downtown attractions.

Quiet hours disturbance all the time by deranged Erasmus students that behave without any respect.

Take your apartments away from buildings that families actually live inside and want to sleep.

I booked this house in december and I red the review only few days before going there. The house was okay there was some mold around but the flat was decent. The house was completly dark but was not the fault of the agency.
But despite the decent condition of the flat the big problem was the agency. When you come they call you to sign up some documents and they tell you that for the bed sheets and the cleaning lady you have to pay. They will remove this money from the deposit. The cleaning lady is mandatory and is a way for the agency to control the tentants and what they are doing. The bed sheets are dirty and they are almost transparent because they washed it thousands times. The agency and the cleaning lady they entered all the time without knocking or ringing the bell, with their own keys. At the end of my staying there they came (with their keys without announcing them) to see for some reparations inside the flat. They checked and they told me that they had to do some reparetion in the empty room of my flatmates. The day after I found them inside my flat and they removed the painting from the ceiling in my bathroom. I was really angry because they didn't tell me anything so I went to the office to talk with them and they told me was my fault because I didn't open the window during the shower. They also said that the cleaning lady took a picture every week and the mold situation was every week worst. They did the reparation in my last three days there and they left a disaster around the house. There was dust all around, smeel of painting and when they finished they didn't clean anything. You have to write to them for the deposit back because they didn't ask for it. So at the end I can say: run away from the agency they are the worst and with the fact that they always enter without asking you will not feel respect and in your space. They will not give you your privacy.

This agency is disgusting. I would not recommend it if you are planning to live in Athens, specially if you are Erasmus. My experience here was awful. At first they are kind because they want to STEAL your money. They obligate you by signing a contract which later they won’t fulfill. My roommates and me paid the deposit they claimed and after our stay they took 100 euros from each person without any valid and legal explanation. Apart from this, we had to ask many times to please DO NOT ENTER to our house with their own set of keys. Also, if you compare it with other agencies or particulars, it is more expensive and the quality of the flat does not accomplish the price-quality.
I am still having a horrible experience with them and I hope they lose their customers.

Be careful with them! (ERasmus Rooms Athens - picture uploaded bellow)...
Writing this as a warning to all my Erasmus colleagues.
They extra charge you for things they don't mention until the signing of the contract (like borrowing/washing towels and linen for 60 euros, cleaning, etc.). Furthermore, you're lucky if you get a fully functioning apartment. Most of them are old, in buildings where neighbours don't really appreciate students and complain/call the police and the apartments themselves are falling apart! This is the biggest issue. They have poorly maintained ours for months, trying to fix the toilets, both of the refrigerators weren't working, it took them almost a month to provide us with wifi and so on.
Don't expect them to refund you for anything, after they kick you out they wont send any word until they give you your deposit back without explanation.

Please be careful, this company is misleading. I was an Erasmus student in Athens, I lived there for 4 months, in Omonia. First I found the company via internet, everything was fine with them. I paid a deposit in the value of 1 month's rent. Upon arrival, they contacted me immediately to come sign the documents. They state uniform accommodation prices everywhere, but upon arrival they start charging meaningless fees, e.g. for bed linen, cleaning lady (she really cleaned), towels, etc. The room was relatively fine, but during my entire stay they weren’t able to fix a toilet bowl (even though I warned them several times afterwards). The bathroom wasn’t in the best condition. At the end of my stay, I was completely surprised that they didn’t send me the deposit within the agreed time. They sent it to me only after I contacted them, of course later than stated in the contract. I didn't even get half of the agreed amount back. Their justification was additional nonsensical charges for linen, towels, bank charges and they even said they had to specially clean my “dirty” room. When I contacted them again for a refund, they didn’t reply me. I definitely don’t recommend this company for accommodation in Athens, it’s not so cheap and u cannot trust hem. My Erasmus colleagues had much nicer accommodation and even much cheaper, where I spent more time. Take care.

Beautiful apartment, clean, in a quiet place for a peaceful stay. Aris and Anna were kind and helpful in everything we needed, they helped us immediately, even with information on how to move to the center of Athens. Very close to the center, even with walking is a nice walk around 35 minutes there.Lykavittos and field of Ares also very close.

An ideal apartment for someone who would like to visit Athens. The means of transport serve to visit all the museums of Athens and of course the historic center of the city where it is very close to you. The owners were very helpful in everething we asked them and their hospitality was wonderfull. The house was very clean too.  I will visit soon Aristotle's studio apartment.
The best Airbnb in the city of Athens! Thank you for your hospitality!

Beautiful small, cute apartment in a quiet place, for a stay of one person as well as a couple. We didn't miss anything, and Aris and Anna were kind and helpful in everything we needed, they helped us immediately, even with information on how to move to the center of Athens. Very close from the center, even on foot it's a nice walk around 35 minutes there. Lycabettus and Areos field also very close.
Quiet neighborhood, beautiful apartment, excellent service!
Excellent condition apparent very close to the metro station,very friendly staff and quick response! Good prices also I recommend for everyone who needs something secure and comfortable to stay.
Amazing apartment, comfortably furnished and carefully decorated! The location is ideal and at an affordable price!
Excellent apartment, excellent hospitality, Mr. Konstantinos
Beautiful apartment with everything you need in a central area!

Lovely apartment easy access to Athens centre. Supplies put in the fridge from katarina the owner as we had a late flight in. She also booked our taxi from the airport for us and gave us loads of helpful tips to get us set for a good stay

Fabulous apartment with all amenities. Very handy for city sights. Taxi from here to central Athens inexpensive but you can also walk to the archaeological museum and get on one of the sightseeing buses or take the local bus service. Great if you want to feel local rather than be a tourist.

We stayed here with our family for 4 days. The apartment is so comfortable, clean and very nice decorated. It has all the amenities you will need and more. Located very close to the city sites. The hosts are the most amazing people, helped us with everything we needed and gave us many useful tips. We left with the best memories and surly will return soon.
Very good apartment. Plenty of space to store his suitcases. Nice staff. The inner city can be reached within minutes by taxi.
It is really really a nice place. The owner is so kind and helpful. It think is the best accomodation in Athens.

Stayed in this beautiful and cozy apartment for a few days while visiting Athens. The hosts were amazing and always present to lend a helping hand while profoundly discreet. Since I work remotely, it was a pleasant surprise to find all the amenities I needed to crunch some numbers during the day while enjoyed the local life during the night. Located in a central quiet neighborhood of downtown Athens in a walking distance from main metro stations. The F&K apartment really made my stay in Athens a trip to remember. Definitely advisable!!!!
Excellent accommodation, comfortable environment, adequately designed.!!!
Very nice apartment clean and neat, in a good area near the center and easy parking!! When I come to Athens again I will definitely stay there again!!
Very nice, comfortable and functional. We were very pleased. When an issue arose our hostess resolved it immediately. We will go again for sure.
It is not clear exactly what services it provides.

Upon entry we thought the decor was lovely,  service was great as well.
However the rooms are average
The walls are thin, found it very noisy from hallway noise.
Access to the pool was blocked by furniture  and you had to look frustrated walking around the restaurant to get outside. Just ridiculous.
We ate at the restaurant and food was good, serving size was on the small side.
The service was terrible. If I didn't get up and go to the bar they would have forgotten our wine order.

The location we found to far from Athens
The view from the roof is not the Acropolis, so don't be fooled. Still a lovely Outlook, but there is much better to be found.

The welcome to the car from the lady responsible should be way better and doesn't reflect the ethos that the hotel tries to give. The bar staff was overwhelmed with ordered and got my first and second drink wrong. Ordering a lovely rum, that I returned and then I got it back right but there was cork residue in the drink. Bar staff where lovely and helpful but it's the little things that matter on that level. Overall...great view...a must if you're visiting Athens and stay in that area.

The room was a good size, clean and comfortable but we had an east facing room that became an oven quickly in the morning and was noisy due to traffic at night. The lifts were a problem especially when everyone was leaving at the same time and we were on the 7th floor. There are 4 lifts but only 2 servicing our floor.  On the last morning they could not fit everyone in the breakfast area as various tours were leaving at the same time so we were shuffled to another area where service was slow and staff disinclined. However all that aside for a short stay it was worth the money and we enjoyed our stay.

Great place, very friendly and helpful staff.
Enjoyed my stay, I'm planning on returning again when I'm either on business or potentially even a short holiday break.

The rooms are large and have very good air conditioning as well (important during the hotter months).

I'd like to thank the staff for a pleasant stay.

Nice and well-maintained hotel with spacious, clean rooms. Staff nice and polite. Beautiful view from the windows of the city panorama. At the very top there is a swimming pool and a bar which I recommend visiting at least once. What more could you want... well, you can... the choice of food for breakfast is modest and above all, terribly disgusting coffee... probably instant and of the worst quality!!! You have to change that (I hope someone from the staff reads this review ;)

An excellent apartment in a phenomenal location, 7 minutes' walk from the M3 metro station, which is two stops from Syntagma Square. The apartment is fully equipped, it has everything you need. Two large bedrooms, two bathrooms, living room, kitchen and terrace. Comfortable beds and pillows. There are towels, toiletries, iron, hair dryer, toaster, microwave... Everything you can think of that you need for a comfortable stay is here... Aleksandra has thought of everything👍 This is definitely the most beautiful and the most equipped apartment I've been in so far, all recommendations from me.

In general, we loved everything about the apartment. It is as spacious as it seems in the photos. It has two bedrooms with a double bed (one of them with a bathroom), another large bathroom, a very complete and very spacious American kitchen, where you can find at your disposal a drip coffee maker, another capsule coffee maker, microwave, dishwasher and all the necessary utensils for cooking, and although it may seem like a minor thing, the fact that you find things as basic as ground coffee, sugar, oil, salt , etc. makes your stay easier if you want to cook, in our case we only had breakfast and dinner, but it was very good for us.
And as a cherry on top of the treatment received from Alexandra, she allowed us to leave our luggage in the apartment before check-in so we could move more freely around Athens and when we arrived at the apartment we found a bottle of very cold water in the refrigerator, You can imagine how grateful we were with temperatures of 40⁰C on the street.
It is without a doubt the best vacation apartment we have ever been in.
Super Apartment with all amenities. Good central location and quiet neighborhood. Supermarket and restaurants nearby.

Enjoyable stay in a very comfortable apartment, spotlessly clean, fully equipped with everything one needs and tastefully decorated. The location was ideal, close to many attractions and with easy access to the metro and other public transport.  The host very friendly, helpful and always willing to help. We really enjoyed every moment here and would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a great stay experience!
The apartment was nice and very clean.The staff was very helpful.  Unfortunately, the location was noise because too close to a big road.

Rooms are pretty nice and the place overall feels like a home instead of a hotel. We came at 8pm although latest check in was at 9pm and nobody opened the door since it was through buzzer. So we had to wait for the owner of the hotel to come and hand us the keys (30 minutes). Other than that it's a good place to take public transportation, walking distance from the metro and many busses run on the road in front of
This place has contacted a broker company that gives fake positive reviews. Do not trust this place
achieved through advertising. they make comments for money
Very good place

Excellent budget hotel. Excellent location. Incredibly easy airport bus access. Front desk was staffed, even at 6am. Great price for a family of five. The family room had a large bed, a twin bed, a sofa made up as a single bed, and a comfortable cot.
Grocery (AB) was next door, and a short walk to amazing souvlaki at Souvlaki Μπαρμπαθωμάς, and desserts at ΖΑΧΑΡΟΠΛΑΣΤΕΙΑ ΚΩΝΣΤΑΝΤΙΝΙΔΗΣ.
The shower was handheld and didn't have a shower curtain.
This hotel is just great I can't tell something else! It has nice service it is very clean big and nice and it is perfect for short days!
The room was clean, there is an elevator. Good hotel for short stays.

I stayed in this hotel for 5 days when I came to Athens for a scientific congress. My room was clean and i had a great balcony. The hotel staff was really friendly, kind and helpful. Great location with easy transportation conditions. The hotel’s area is a very safe. There are many cafes within walking distance. Thanks for everything.  Highly recommended!

Please make sure this hotel is a budget hotel. Considering the price, I'm quite satisfied with this hotel. The elevator is very small, and I can say it is cute^^ It has private parking garage behind the hotel. All the staffs are very kind and warm-hearted. You can feel the Greek-style hospitality.

Haris is an amazing host! He will gladly go out of his way to accommodate you! He will check-in and greet you in person, has immediate  response times and will generally tend to most of your needs.
Goes without saying that the apartments are spotless and newly renovated.
Definitely recommended....hence all the 5-star reviews!!

We chose to stay at Harishouse after searching for an apartment close to the city but needed something more peaceful than the city centre. If you are looking for a clean, beautifully designed modern place to stay, then this is an apartment for you. Much to our surprise was the fully equipped kitchen and living areas. A real value for money, will definitely  be staying here on our next visit to Athens.
Harry is an awesome host, very helpful and kind. The room has literally anything you might need clean and airy. Very close to markets. I fully recommend it.
Excellent location, think Haris is one the most super host there is...for sure ill visi for second time~adv super clean rooms~vfm
Clean and comfortable room in a quiet neighborhood near the children's hospital.  Lord Haris served us as many times as we needed him. Me and my family were very pleased and I highly recommend it!!!
Nice service
Perfect for children.. Fresh air.. Coffe and snacks. Open area
It's a nice place to take your dogs for a walk or hangout with your friends, family, or boyfriend/girlfriend. It's really quiet and clean and I hope that it will remain just the way it is or better

Nice flat Park with paved paths and big green lawn. Family friendly place, good for daily excursions and biking, with a small area equipped with ramps for tricks. Has a cafeteria offering refreshments. Trees offer place for resting from the sun.

Nice big open area with a couple of art venues. There are very few (if any) public facilities available, like toilets. Also, there is no proper walkway for pedestrians to use to reach the park but too many too many cars which isn't very safe especially for children.
Best place in the area to have a walk or use the  outdoors free gympark. Great place for children also.
The best hospitality....

Overpriced products
Clay products at zero cost and god prices
All at the altar of art!!
A wonderful artist and an amazing woman.
Unacceptable!
The worst hotel experience I have ever had. The room wreaked of cigarette smoke and they would not let us move or refund us

Arrived late night, staff was waiting for us. The apartment was a few blocks away from the hotel reception, in fact google maps was taking us to the apartment and not to reception. Luckily the clerk caught us before we walked by. Elevator in the apartment building couldn’t handle both of us and our luggage. Luckily it was set to return to the bottom floor if it had a problem. We walked up the three flights of stairs but sent our luggage in the elevator. The room was comfortable and clean with good AC and a great shower with plenty of hot water. There was a small kitchen with cutlery and dishes. We walked to the M3 in the morning to head to the airport.

Adorable, friendly, extremely accommodating and reasonable. Maria was a sweetheart that greeted and registered us. She's an asset to McQueen and a gracious representation of Greek hospitality.
HIGHLY recommend these apartments/hotel

Not recommend. The area is full with garages. The apartment itself was OK but at the same price we could have something better in a better location. The first room we got was smelly from cigarettes and the AC was not that strong
Very kind and helpful person.

Great rooms, a very good value for money. The people who run the place are generous and kind.
The area has some bars very close and a young vibe. Very recommended!

A great value for money!

Our room was spotlessly clean and offered a good night's sleep thanks to the perfect location—central yet surreptitiously quiet. Shower was great (that coconut soap was a nice bonus!) and we even had a pretty large fridge, extra toilet paper and a hairdryer, although we didn't use them. There's also a 24/7 rooftop area with Acropolis view for the guests at the 4th floor, that we look forward to using next time!

A small tip: our nightstand lamp didn't work due to a burnt out bulb. Checking for malfunctions like this can be a good addition to the maid's checklist. But that wasn't anything serious.

I would like to thank the Navitas team!

Rooms are very nice and clean. Small but very good function. The bed is very comfortable.
There is one contact via WhatsApp. You can ask all what you need and get the Codes for the doors.
The location is direct near to bars. They are loud until 3am. But it’s nice to go out. Drinks and food is near by. Also a mini market.
I would recommend this place and wanna come back, if I stay again in Athen.
Best regards
Sebastian

They were really nice to communicate but the room was really small and noisy, located far from the main tourist attractions. We haven’t got enough toilet paper or basic equipments for apartment (like kettle or cutlery) although we asked. The internet wasn’t good. This is out of season, and you can rent another hotel apartment that will be more value for money.

Hostel personnel is kind and friendly. Rooms are quite good but little tight. Only problem is outside noise from bars that cannot be dampened. You have to wait untill 2 am to be able to sleep. They are really loud outside 🙄. Again, inside, everything is fine.

I vacationed with my family in this "hotel", last year in August. The accommodation itself is very good. However, the reason I gave the lowest rating is that we had a very unpleasant experience with the owner of the "hotel". Namely, although I arranged everything directly with the owner, although I called two days before arrival and received an email that the room would be ready at the agreed time, when we arrived (and we were traveling with a 10-month-old baby), we received a short notice that is our room occupied until the next day and that we can spend the night in accommodation in the immediate vicinity!?! We agreed to it because with a baby in Greece in August, we didn't even want to try to find another accommodation. And maybe I wouldn't even write all this if another group of guests didn't have the same problem during our stay there. At the same time, the owner's attitude about the whole situation was that this often happens because it is the season and there is a lot of interest!?! The owner himself did not find it necessary to formally apologize, let alone anything more... During check-out, when the husband went to settle all the expenses, he had another unpleasant contact with the owner, who shouted that we had no right to be angry, that he has the right to do as he wants, that if we don't like it, we never have to come again, and he didn't even say goodbye when he left. And although I would have more to write, I think I have said enough for some future guests. We have been vacationing in Greece for years, I have always arranged accommodation directly with the owners, and this, unfortunately, was our first negative experience....

place_name: Acropolis Magical View Suite @ Metro Kerameikos
review_text:
Thank you very much for hosting us in your place!

the space is exactly as shown in the photos, with an incredible view of the Acropolis from the living room and from the private rooftop (exterior space)!

Clean and comfortable apartment, very friendly hosts gave us recommendations for the area!

we highly recommend it and will definitely be back!
Very nice place, we had a great time here. Amalia is very helpful, and provided us with a lot of information. You can see Acropolis through the window, straight from your bed!

Very nice, clean, quiet and cozy apartment. Perfect for the couple. Everything as on picture. The owner Amaila is very nice and kind person. She’s in contact with you at all the time. Good speed Wi-Fi. Very close to the nearest super market and bakery. The neighborhood is safe. Location very close to the city center - 10 minutes walk. Beautiful and big balcony - perfect for breakfast and dinner with a bootle of wine. Second balcony is small but very beautiful view on the Acropolis. Elevator inside the building. We are highly recommended.
Good location, beautiful view from the terrace, trouble-free communication with the owner, clean place, recommendable! :)
We had a great time, thank you very much for everything!!!

It was a great, central place to stay, hence why I left a positive review on AirBnB. However, after I checked out, I received a $200 request for a damaged bathroom floor that I did not cause. Wouldn't stay with a dishonest host as a risk of the same thing happening to you.

The best spot  downtown for you. Exploring Athens never was easier due to the unique location of the property. Combines comfort with luxury and a unique private jacuzzi with an amazing viw of Acropolis!
Amazing place with an amazing host!
Modern space with an amazing view!

The air conditioning is noisy and the walls are thin. However, for this price, you get what you are willing to pay for (around $40/night if I remember it correctly). The hotel is near the M3 station, which is a direct line to the center and to the airport as well. However, the neighborhood seems to be deserted (may be due to the period though)
Great value for money. Very basic apartments but clean. Good location in Gazi.
Fair price, clean room. If you’re looking for a cheap, nice, little room it’s just perfect.
Nice rooms and very good location

I received what was in the description. The small room, approx. 20 min walk from the tourist center, but it was decent, clean, ok for the price paid. Ghetto neighborhood, but no one bothered us. Check-in and check-out is done in someone else's presence, without a key, because the entrance to the building and the room is done with a code.

Totally value for money! Cleanliness,Friendly staff, located in the centre of Athens (Metaxourgio) and with private parking (covered) for the guests . Inside has all the necessary stuff such as towels, cotton robe and slippers , soap, shower gel/shampoo and cookies with two bottles of mineral water. I would definitely visit the hotel again! Absolutely recommended for short stay visitors!

Kind and discreet. That's why it is always preferred! The rooms could be more in some "concepts" . The mirrors are super but in a few rooms they could be more convenient in different places. As for the TV it should have more choices. There are 4 channels , but sometimes work 2 or 3 of them. One solution is the USB stick that client could have but in some rooms they are located exactly in front of the wall and you cannot put it.  Another solution is smart TVs could connect to smart phones. But this is only for mentioning. In general, I keep the discreet point that works super with the staff that has the hotel
Racial profiling from a blonde receptionist, we went somewhere else.

The best hotel in the world
There i spend the best second and Moments in my life 👌🏻 peace Greece ❤️
Quite clean, decent rooms very polite and discreet service

The location is nice (Nearby to metro, trian and bus). Best thing is that there are many good restaurant for affordable price nearby this place. I found one local homemade food restaurant just two blocks away. The host was responsive to late check-in. I was the only guest in the dorm room, as it was just the start of the season. It is a great place for those who like quiet place, but party-goers may not like the atmosphere.

Awesome location train stations near, facility was well maintained by the friendly owner couple. Recommend visiting grandmas home made greek restaurant amazing food cash only tho. ATM didnt work for my aussie card. Buses are unreliable never show up on time so stick to the metro. Transport pass, dont buy 3days tourist pass just get single airport bus pass x95 x96 depends on your destinstion and when you get to the metro get 5days pass cheaper. From the airport to city buses are cheaper but on the way back to the airport catch metro its double the price but easier no hassle.
This place is a life hazard. Booked it for a couple of nights. On the first night the hotel wall of room no. 12 fell on me. Barely escaped. I do not recommend staying here. Attached images.
Hostel was incredibly clean and the owner was very accommodating and friendly. The area itself felt safe but some streets surrounding the area seemed unsafe in the evening.
Love it! Only thing I can say is that building is quite old but that just adds to the charm. Chris is lovely and the facilities work great. Really nice price-quality.

Excellent place to stay in a great location. I was very happy with the cleanliness of the room and the friendly stuff. The receptionist also offered me coffee and juice on my arrival for free which I really appreciated!
Great place to stay in the heart of Athens (near metro station).clean place with excellent staff! Highly recommend
Amazing location!100% recommended!!
Very clean and cosy

Excellent location! Special atmosphere, with wonderful decoration in the rooms! It is worth visiting for both semi-stay and stay. The location is very convenient, center and next to the metro! Very clean and neat place! Polite staff that inspires confidence!
Budget hotel in a good part of Athens.  I arrived really late (1am) and the staff was very helpful.  Bed and pillows were okay. Overall, the room was adequate and the cost was very reasonable.

I stayed at this hotel for six nights. For budget travellers just needing a place to sleep, this hotel is perfect. Although the bedsheets were stained and slightly torn, they were changed almost every night. The 24-hour reception is also a huge plus, especially given the less reputable location. They only let you in the building if you ring the bell and they check the security cameras constantly. Thankfully, we didn't encounter any issues during our stay. In short, if hygiene isn't your top priority and you only need a place to sleep, this hotel offers great value for your money.

DO NOT stay at this place. Hotel was in very poor condition. The bedsheets had holes in them, the toilet flush didn’t work and you’d have to raise the tank cover to flush. The main lights in the room didn’t work. The air conditioning was rusty and very old, causing a very unusual smell. There were wires coming out of the walls where the outlets were located and the towels were smelly.

The owner of the hotel was very fussy. We stayed 3 times, using the hotel as a hub to move around. Every time, he asked us to pay a €1,50 fee on top of the reservation and tried to charge us for a night we didn’t book. He woke us up at 6am due to his loud noise on the street. Any other place in Athens would be a better pick.

Absolutely God awful experience. Place reeked of cigarette smoke in the walls and mildew. It was so gross that both I and the friend that I traveled with slept on top of the comforter. We promptly checked out first thing in the morning to find somewhere new to shower and stay.
I travel alone and want a place I can sleep and shower. Not the height of luxury but clean and staff polite and helpful. Would use again.
Stayed recently. Loved it. Very clean and nice sized too for a week long stay! Absolutely stunning view from the balcony too!
Awesome host in a super convenient location.

Apartment consisting of a large bedroom with a large bed. A bathroom, a living room with a small kitchen and a large terrace.
The strong point is this very comfortable terrace. In addition, the apartment is equipped with a washing machine. Which is very useful during long trips.
Finally, its location is perfect, near the metro and in a good area of ​​Athens.
Very nice apartment, the location is close to a subway and you can reach many destinations on foot.

Clean and above all functional apartment (you can cook and eat on site)
Cleaning products are left available
The owner is available when needed

Didn't have good experience with this hotel at all.
Carpet in the room and blankets aren't washed for years. It stinks so bad and there is no air conditioning (it got broken apparently).
Food is fine, I can't say it was bad.

I came during a peak season when all hotels were booked, so I ended up staying at the only available hotel in the area. It lacked amenities like air conditioning and only accepted cash. The night staff were unfriendly and unsmiling, making for an unpleasant experience. However, the morning staff, particularly a cheerful old lady, improved the mood. The hotel itself was outdated. I was relieved my stay was only for one night.

Expect basic accommodations if you book here.

❗️❗️❗️good to know before staying there❗️❗️❗️
- Cockroach-No airconditioning-Weird stuff -

The neighbourhood was disgusting and seemed dangerous, sadly there were a lot of homeless people. We did not feel safe there.
In the whole hotel the airconditioning was not working, although they have provided a fan, it was dirty. Also the stuff was weird they did not not speak so good english although it was an international hotel… there were cockroach on the floor (in the hall and also in the room...)
The experience there was awful, I definitely do not recommend this place to stay in Athens.

1.  Someone broke into my room in middle of night and when I woke up ran away
2 no air conditioner they lie that it's only going to be broken while your staying at hotel                      3   don't take credit card they make up story that there computer is broken and credit card machine is broken.                                                   4. Dangerous area.                              V v
