Someone came into my room almost 440a.m. in the morning was alone thanks God I had my own personal lock so whoever it was wasn't able to open it more than 3 inches and I had an alarm that went off and I woke up what a disgusting creepy way to wake up didn't know what to do so I called my embassy to keep tabs on me to make sure I'm safe and barricaded my room and stayed up the whole night from then didn't know if I should call the front desk cuz thought maybe it's one of the workers of the hotel and wasn't sure if to call police or not then in the morning once I was sure the streets were busy already I left the hotel with all my belongings to go get money from the ATM machine to pay the hotel the worker stopped me why I'm leaving of my luggage and why I can't leave it with him to watch I didn't want to trust him after what happened with this intruder trying to get into my room at night so I declined but he kept on persisting first I thought he was trying to be nice but then he told me he doesn't trust me because I didn't pay it so I told him he could come with me to ATM machine prior to that I didn't want to tell where I'm going cuz I didn't feel comfortable with them knowing I'm going to the time machine if the break in had something to do with them the night before but now I realized that it was actually better because the area is it dangerous area in Athens after that I paid and left and my whole day was basically ruined from going around touring because of the break in since I only slept like two and a half hours just happy to be alive who knows what could have happened if that intruder would have got him before I woke up who knows what he was up to but it's not the only problem this hotel there is no air conditioner the place stinks it doesn't look As good as a pictures and they don't take credit card only cash even though it doesn't say when booking the also a dangerous area

The best part of the holiday and the hostel is the staff and crews! They are the best. They made me feel so welcome and watching them work is amazing. Very interactive, welcoming and comforting with every customer who steps through the door. The crew are so friendly and very experienced.

Ingenious, a place to feel good with a temporary home feeling! The atmosphere is totally relaxed, just like the visitors and the hostel staff. Everyone is very nice, especially Kim, who is funny! :D Overall, the hostel is a bit shabby, but that's part of its flair. Particularly worth mentioning is the elevator, whose light turns off dramatically at the push of a button, but turns on again at the second or third (!) push of the button at the latest. :) There is a roof terrace with a breathtaking view over the whole city and a view of the Acropolis! The surroundings are a bit strange, but full of friendly and helpful people and cheap and good food. So if you're not a bourgeois, don't be stupid and secure a spot at this unique place! :D

Great experience in this hostel. The staff was lovely  and I've enjoyed my journey in Athéna. Comfortable beds clean spaces and of course beautiful view on the rooftop: that's all what I've liked there ❤️

Everything was fine. Clean rooms, nice staff Rebeca, Aslan and George. They were so caring and attentive to me all the time thank you for making my first trip in Greece great. Prices are cheap, you get free lockers, beds are comfortable, many restrooms in the building, rooftop was also nice because of the view. Location is good near to the center. One important point also is that you can do self check in which is so comfortable after long tiring journey you can enter the building and at least be on the rooftop or outdoor area that was real very important for me. Absolutely satisfied with everything

The staff at the hotel were very kind and allowed me to stay even though I arrived very late. I called ahead, and everything went smoothly. Honestly, for the price of the room, which was only 16€, you can’t really expect much. However, it’s true that the rooms are too small to fit so many people. There’s barely any space between the beds.
The bathrooms seemed clean, although there weren’t many options, and they didn’t provide any soap. You also have to make your own bed, as sheets and towels aren’t included.

But the absolute worst part, by far, was that I saw ticks.

The apartment is very nice and modern, in an excellent location only a few minutes away from the metro station. It was spotless clean and the hosts were very pleasant and ready to answer all our questions. I highly recommend it!
Excellent  apartment very clean and tidy .Ienjoyed my stay,highly recommended it .Looking forward  to re booking again  ,thank you Laertis
A wonderful Accommodation In the center of Athens in a wonderful spot on the third floor that offers you the comfort for a wonderful holiday in Athens🙏

Our partner from abroad stayed in this room.
Spotlessly clean, very beautiful, with amenities of a large hotel.
In the city center next to metro buses and suburban train.
Well done to the owner, he has raised the bar very high

The best choice in the city of Athens!!! The hosts are the best I have met, pleasant with a lot of desire to serve the customer!!! I highly recommend it
The best choice in the city of Athens!!! The hosts are the best I've met, pleasant and very willing to serve the customer!!! I highly recommend it!!!

Lovely lovely!!! Employees were so kind and helpful, the hotel is just two stops away from the center so it's less pricey and quieter but not too far at all. The room itself is sweet and I had a nice balcony to sit on and get some fresh air. Very happy with my stay here! :)
The staff was really kind and helpful, the neighbourhood is silent and easily accessible by metro.

The room is very comfortable with excellent water pressure and plenty of hot water.  It would appear that they have just done a remodeling.
I had to check in late, and the desk was very professional and understanding.  He was also helpful in pointing out places of interest in Athens.  The location is on a quiet street and off the beaten path.  I stayed here 4 nights and will would return.

Very clean and nice rooms.
No elevator. Very quiet place.
All the staff of the hotel are very kind and thay give you hot and friendly feelings.
It is very near to the underground train that goes directly to the airport and the city center.

Good service,its close from train station
and all Market,im thankeful 🙏✅

Staff were very nice, the rooms were well-updated, the breakfast quite complete, and the roof-top bar and welcome drink (for Accor members) quite pleasant in the evening.
The only issue is when we decided to walk back from Monastiraki at night, which took us through a couple dodgy streets, but nothing of concern.  Overall the location of the property is average.

overall, it was a mixed experience. The room was spacious, clean, and comfortable, and the service from the staff was excellent. However, the breakfast was a major letdown. The food was not tasty at all, and unfortunately, I even got sick after eating it. Honestly, I would have preferred to skip breakfast altogether. While the hotel is a bit far from the main attractions, the quality of the room and service made the stay pleasant. If you’re not too concerned about breakfast, it’s a solid option.

I had a good stay in this hotel, also because I got upgraded to a suite. This room was slightly outdated, but spacious, clean and the bed was good. The breakfast buffet was very nice with a great choice of products. The view from the rooftop pool and terrace is beautiful, with the Acropolis in the distance. The hotel staff is efficient but not overly friendly. The area around the hotel is somewhat sketchy, so we took taxis to move around (which are rather cheap).

Spent 3 days at the hotel after two weeks in Cyclades. Everything was great. The staff were friendly and knowledgeable. Due to the heatwave, we spent all our time in the hotel and enjoyed our time in the rooftop terrace and pool. A great place to prepare for the journey home.
We will definitely be back!

I had the best experience in Novotel! Everything was great! The stuff was unbelievable good in their jobs!The guys in the pool were really helpful and full of joy! They make the start of my day wonderful and really upgrade the whole experience! I will totally visit again this hotel

I had emergency last min reservation, the lady on the phone was very helpful and knew how to sell ( I do the same job, so I like when people know what they are doing), apartment was clean and pretty big. Comfortable bed, a/c worked perfect. 100% recommend.

A nice apartment that is close to the metro line, all the major attractions are within walking distance. The staff were polite and attentive. The reception area and rooms were clean and nicely furnished, and everything was spotlessly clean. The area the apartment is located in has issues with people abusing drugs. However, we encountered no problems whatsoever, and it is quite sad to see, although it is probably no worse than our city's here.
The area is quite busy traffic wise. There is a decent supermarket close by and an excellent walk up take away pizzeria a few seconds away as well as ample restaurants well within walking distance.
We enjoyed our stay there and wouldn't hesitate to return in the future.

Very nice chamber, with brand new furniture and bathroom, the receptionists were all nice and helpful, they also speak a couples of language such as English/French.
The hotel offer a parking in the street behind it for 6 euros a full day wich is a very decent price for a parking in Athens. The hotel is located at 8mn on walk from the metro station making it easy to travel in the center of Athens. I would recommend this hotel .

A quality hotel that is clean and tidy. Spacious rooms. The location of the hotel is close to all attractions.
The hotel manager Dimitri is nice and friendly, helps and answers questions.
I will definitely return to the hotel on my next stay.
Perfect spot. Reception helpful. Close to Larissa station. Clean. Opposite is a nice restaurant.

A tranquil and comfortable hotel, good-sized rooms, Very fine restaurant  and rooftop bar with nice pool and great views of the city and Parthenon. Quiet,  friendly, and helpful staff. Well sited for all the city's attractions
I love this place..very nice n comfort..the best hospitality ever❤..very central u can easily rich the center n all around places..thanks..
There were bedbucks, a lot!!! I had more than 70 bites, after this I tried to talk with the owner and he didn’t answer me and don’t want to talk about it, very bad treatment!
Very simple accomodation,  but comfortable enough and inexpensive.
Nice place, but there is crime in the neighborhood, because lately there is smuggling and drug trade nearby... But there is police
Excellent apartment. Very close to the metro. Direct access.

Great location right next to Viktoria station, with quick access to centre of town. The room was nice and big, clean and just what we needed for a few nights in Athens. Thank you to the host for being hospitable and welcoming.
Great service. Thank you for helping me with a last minute booking.

5 stars for service is definitely not enough considering how much time Mrs. Iza spent with us. A wonderful woman, knows the city and its history. both ancient and modern. I would definitely recommend it to anyone going to Athens!! :)

We were very pleased to spend two nights at Petaluda House 3. Excellent Comfort and spaciousness of the rooms, unknown to me at this price. I recommend it with a clear conscience.

Ps. Iza, if you are reading this - marry me 💙

This Hostel is nice and cheap. Most important: Beds, toilets and rooms are very clean. They pay much attention to that. Common space is basic but you can socialize if you want. Staff is helpful too. Kitchen is missing many things. As about the location I really like it. You can get cheap food and drinks around. Also the metro station is less than a minute away.
I would definitely come back for all the reasons above.

I don’t think I could have asked for a better experience especially considering the price. The staff are incredible, I felt safe, met the loveliest people and made memories I’ll never forget. The rooms are simple and clean. There’s a communal space downstairs where I worked when needed (and the wifi works perfectly). I walked to Syntagma and Plaka every day with no trouble, while staying vigilant as a woman traveling alone. This is a student area and it’s nice to see them hanging out at cafes and bars close by. Zorbas Hostel has a special place in my heart.

Been in the country for almost 2 months and stayed in 7 different hostels. I can honestly say Zorbas ranks #1 out of all of them. The A/C works wonderfully, the rooms and beds are comfortable, and there’s always a staff member awake if you need anything. They are very kind and helpful. Every other hostel I’ve stayed in has major drawbacks that keep me from feeling totally comfortable but not Zorbas.

Pro tip: spend the extra few euros and upgrade to the 4 person room. Trust me on this. My first stay was in the 6-person room and you share the upstairs bathroom with a lot of other people (there’s more downstairs though) and there’s only one charging strip. The 4 person rooms have charging outlets by the beds, they’re cozier, and have a bathroom.

I like this place. Rooms are clean, bed comfortable and sheets are fresh. People very helpful and sweet. Good price. It is quiet place and I had good sleep. The only issue was shower glass that was only on the one side of shower and it is impossible to shower without making wet everything around.

Great reception desk team, pretty clean place and close to Victoria station. Definitely recommend if you are looking for an affordable hostel in downtown Athens. Just be wary that the area is somewhat considered unsafe, so keeping an eye to your belongings while around isn't a bad idea.
I feeling happy dad please
Nice food that you want to try another dish

place_name: Marina's Luxurious Apartment in Athens, Centre
review_text: Spacious and clean apartment. The host always kind and ready provide anything needed! Looking forward booking again!

place_name: Marina's Luxurious Apartment in Athens, Centre
review_text: Amazing place! A cosy apartment in great location! It had all the amenities needed and it was very clean. Also, the owner was very kind.

place_name: Marina's Luxurious Apartment in Athens, Centre
review_text: Great location. The apartment is very spacios, modern and fully equipped for a long or short stay.

place_name: Marina's Luxurious Apartment in Athens, Centre
review_text: Wonderful apartment🤍 very clean with easy access. Absolutely I'll be visiting it again!!!

place_name: Marina's Luxurious Apartment in Athens, Centre
review_text:
Quiet, clean and comfortable rooms.
Very professional Contact

Hello we have booked a hotel in Athens, the one above send by lien.A our great surprise the owner has changed our apartment.
The latter "imposed" at the last minute, being better said, because very recent, happens to be a cellar transformed into an apartment.
Finishes are not realized.
Our biggest worry is the smell of stubborn cellar moisture.
Breathing problem, scratching eyes and throats.
We had booked the first apartment with the washing machine and TV, service not available in the replacement apartment.
No view to the balcony,tiny w.c and shower(also smells nasty...),unfair deal (booking32€,we pay50,50€!!!),no water for welcoming.first time in my life,happened something like that...never again...
Very cool

Our stay at Vaios Art Suite was a wonderful experience. The location is great with easy access to Kipseli, Victoria metro station and anything downtown Athens for that matter. Despite the central location the apartment itself is an oasis of quiet. The decoration is stylish with great attention to detail. The place is impeccably clean which we appreciated a lot. The beds are very comfortable and everything from furniture and appliances to kitchen utensils oozes quality. Vaios himself is a wonderful host and always reachable. Check-In and Check-Out were without problems.

Excellent customer service. This hotel has the most amazing staff ever. They deal with any issues you may have swiftly, always with a smile and genuine concern for you. I really would like the reception staff, the breakfast staff and the rooftop staff to be congratulated for their professionalism. The rooms are comfortable and the bathrooms are massive. The only negative is the bed which is two small beds pushed together like in most hotels in Europe. I am a big guy so I would always end up in between the two beds :-(  The breakfast was really good and varied. Lots of choices! Location is perfect.

Went there on my birthday and the front staff has upgraded me to a premium room (park view) with free breakfast. The pool, restaurant are great and you are free to use the gym and sauna after checkout. I would say this is definitely a highlight or my birthday trip and the staff was really friendly - also the apple pie in the restaurant was so good!

We loved our stay here, everything was perfect! The rooms are super clean and nice, the hotel is gorgeous, the location fantastic, the rooftop bar amazing, the breakfast is a nice buffet, and the staff is wonderful! Everyone we interacted with was so pleasant! I actually have family in Athens so, whenever I'm back, I'll be staying at this hotel for sure! Everything was lovely!

A good hotel with a beautiful outside rooftop.

The staff is superb, polite and with a sense of humor.

Rooftop restaurant had some nice finger foods and snacks.

The hotel itself is showing its age, though. One of the elevators is not working. The AC in the room is very noisy. The decor in the room is kind of dark and outdated.

Linens and towels were clean.
Good coffee and tea selection.
Great view from our room.

Might not be worth the price for some as it is expensive.

Overall, not a bad hotel but also has areas to be improved.

Nice hotel, very helpful staff and good location opposite the Park.  Had a superior room with a view of the acropolis from the large balcony.  Unfortunately let down by the south facing balcony which was exposed to the sun all day and way too hot to use.  No umbrellas or awnings or any shade whatsoever.  The couch exposed to the sun was severely damaged.  Wouldn't stay in this room again.

Really nice, modern hotel with a great concept. Rooms were beautiful and the balcony big. The service was great! The employees are super nice and for questions etc. you could contact the hotel on Whatsapp and get an immediate reply. They also organize a shuttle for a good price if needed. Everything was clean, only the drain didnt smell good sometimes. All in one I would recommend staying there when in Athens.

Excellent hotel in Athens. The rooms are spacious, stylish and look exactly like the pictures. Service was excellent, prompt and polite. It is a bit far from the attractions but uber was less than €5 and the street is very quiet. Would absolutely recommend this hotel to anyone.
Very good and efficient hotel in the north area of the city. Modern, rooms are neat, clean and comfortable. The decoration is good too. Balconies to share, very good. Staff is very kind too.
Great location. Rooms were very clean. There is a shared balcony that you can enjoy. Staff were kind and helpful.
The staff were very nice, even taught me simple words in greek. Really enjoyed my stay, efcharisto PAME Wild ;)

A Wonderful Weekend Stay in Athens!

I recently stayed in Krs apartment 1 in Athens for the weekend, and I couldn't have asked for a better experience. The location was perfect , which made exploring the historic sites and vibrant neighborhoods incredibly easy. Whether I was wandering around the Acropolis or enjoying a coffee in one of the local cafes, everything was just a short walk away.

The apartment itself was spotless and beautifully decorated, offering a cozy yet modern ambiance. The kitchen was fully equipped, allowing me to prepare meals comfortably, and the bed was extremely comfortable – after a long day of sightseeing, it was the perfect place to relax and recharge.

The host was incredibly friendly and responsive, providing great local recommendations and ensuring that my stay was seamless from check-in to check-out.

Overall, I had an excellent experience and would highly recommend this apartment to anyone looking for a convenient, comfortable, and memorable stay in Athens. I will definitely be coming back on my next visit to the city

Great apartment and great location. Everything was clean and in order. The host was super nice and very responsive. We enjoyed our stay so much. Highly highly recommend booking this apartment if you are visiting Athens!

Comfortable apartment.. parking like in all of Athens is strange ok. The house with comfortable spaces and close to the center and perfect hosts is the best choice for groups or families. We will choose it again for accommodation on our next trip to Athens!

The best stay we have had in Athens. Comfortable for a family and of course spotlessly clean. The guys who run it were there when we needed them. Everything was perfect and we will definitely continue to choose it when we go to Athens. 5+++++++ stars.

Excellent apartment, with large spaces to comfortably accommodate large families and groups. Neat and clean with very kind hosts. Very close to the center and easy to get around by means of transport. Safe area. Very good choice for staying in the city.

I had an incredible stay at the K experience. Artemis went above and beyond, assisting me with transfers and providing fantastic recommendations for local places to explore. Their constant availability, warm smiles, and helpful demeanor truly made a difference. As for the room, it was nothing short of amazing. I thoroughly enjoyed my time there and would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a memorable and comfortable stay in Athens.

The K Experience Athenian Living Stay exceeded all my expectations! From the moment I stepped foot into this charming abode, I knew I was in for something special. The authentic Athenian ambiance and attention to detail in the decor made me feel like I was truly living like a local.

The hostess of this lovely retreat was nothing short of amazing. Her warm hospitality and genuine passion for sharing the beauty of Athens with her guests were evident in every interaction. She greeted me with a friendly smile and a wealth of knowledge about the city's hidden gems and cultural delights.

The accommodation itself was cozy and comfortable, providing a perfect sanctuary to relax after exploring the vibrant streets of Athens.

I had a fantastic stay at this apartment, and the host was one of the best parts of the experience. They were incredibly friendly, helpful, and responsive to all of my needs throughout my stay. From the moment I arrived, they made me feel welcome and comfortable, and they went out of their way to ensure that I had everything I needed. The apartment itself was also fantastic, with all the amenities I needed and more. The location was convenient and central, and the apartment was very clean and well-maintained. Overall, I had a wonderful experience and would highly recommend this apartment and host to anyone looking for a comfortable and enjoyable stay.

I lived here with my family, the place did not meet my expectations at all. The furniture was dirty, there was cobwebs of dust everywhere, one of the double beds had only one piece of clothing on it, it was impossible for two people to hide together. There were 5 of us, and for the fifth person, instead of a bed, there was an uneven, very soft sofa in a noisy room, the windows did not help at all from the noise, you felt like you were lying on the roadway. In the kitchen, all the dishes are either rusty or cracked and everything is very sticky. I definitely don't recommend this place, we left the next morning.

I had a great experience living in this apartment. It was clean, comfortable, and well-maintained. The location was fantastic, with plenty of amenities and entertainment options nearby. The management team was also friendly and responsive. Overall, I highly recommend this apartment to anyone looking for a great place in athens.

Great location- short walk to train, tram and metro. Very clean, well kept, comfortable place and cordial staff.  Cozy coffee lounge at ground floor.. Was upgraded to bigger room, which was actually quite big and very comfortable, although gets faint traffic noise.. was upgraded on room.  Huge beg, Plush bathroom, coffee maker, fridge… very comfortable stay overall.. would definitely recommend..!

Clean, modern rooms with everyday cleaning if You wish to. Hotel reception stuff is friendly and helpful. Great contact with no problems. Location is close to center and main tourist attractions only 30min walk to Acropolis.

We thoroughly enjoyed our 7 night stay in the middle of April. The room was large, clean and comfortable. The staff were friendly and helpful, and the location was pretty much perfect. Close to the metro and within easy walking distance of the city centre, with plenty of restaurants nearby. I would definitely stay again.

The room was very clean a welcoming. So was the guy in the reseption.
The balconi is bigger than the room and is nice to sit in at evening.
Locted a few blocks from the Metro. Many bus stops near by.
Not a walking distance from the akropolis area.

Nice hotel, the lobby area and the room were very clean, the hotel is located relatively close to the center and the metro station is really close, Harris was very kind and welcoming, was available for any question and was always right to help. I will definitely come again.

The apartment was very well located, super clean, we got a surprise how big the rooms were! Super big and comfy bed. AC working well, no problem with anything and good contact with the owner. I'm very happy for our stay.

Nice place. Located in bohemian district with many galleries and workshops around.
In front of cute church. What I like the most is the responsive staff who gave the advices and upgrades the flat for my longer stay.
loud and busy, ugly and overall a terrible choice for staying in Athens
very dirty and loud i dont reccomend

Great location with only 20 mins walk into town. Spacious apartment which gives you a local living experience.

Not noisy and has all the essentials for a comfortable week stay. The service was good and communication over how to turn on hot water was responded to quickly.

Decoration was great and modern with washing machine and dishwasher which made the stay even better.

Only couple things to note is that the apartment was not very clean (lots of dust behind the bed) and floor made my white socks black. Not enough toilet roll, cleaning clothes or kitchen towel.

ATTENTION SCAM! THE PHOTOS ARE NOT THE REALITY! It is a horrible place! SHAME ON YOU!

My mother rented the room for a couple of friends. The photos have nothing to do with the reality. It is constructed illegally in a garage, the closets and the furniture are in a horrible state, it is dirty, the wifi didn't work because they don't have an official connection (since it's not a real place), the electricity didn't work properly and the people managing the place are super rude. The service was horrible.

As you will see from the other comments here but also in the Booking website the owner is more occupied answering the comments (answering with lies), than trying to really correctly manage the place and correct any flaws. The lady who runs the space has a despicable attitude and she only wants to take money from the people that were unlucky renting this room.

As you will understand by the Google comments, the people that made a good review are friends of the owners (since they are all from the same country). It is really a shame taking the money of people like that.

(Don't even try answering my comment!!! You know exactly the scam you have installed!)

-------------------------------------

27/07/24 - In response to your comment dear lady managing the Santorini place : I will tell you that if you read in the first linea of my review you will understand that I'm saying that we rented you place to a couple of friends. THANK GOD I wasn't the one staying there!
Also, to answer your "beautiful" wish (that I didn't quite understand to tell you the truth) about the snakes: if you don't like Greeks and Greece in general you should leave the country.
You work in tourism and you should be ashamed for scamming people like that: tourism is the industry of this country and you are taking great advantage from it. Indeed, it is quite interesting how you treat people and your guests (especially in all of the answers you give to the people that dare give a bad comment or review) and I really hope that everyone can see it here and understand that you only want to take their money.
I am really sorry for you and I will in return wish that God saves your soul!

Awful. Booked for just one night and was unable to access the venue, the host was unresponsive, and is now refusing a refund. The host claimed to have sent an email with check-in instructions, but I never received any email. Then they changed the terms of their policies after the fact to make it look like they were never in the wrong. NEVER book this place it's a SCAM and the hosts are absolute SCUMS.

We spend  5 days in apartment and there was amazing interior,like never saw beafore!
Staff was helpful and always responcible,!
Apartment is exactly like Santorini style.
Its located in hard of Athens,close to all main poinds in historical part!
Highly recomend to all tourists and travelier!

Attention! this is nothing like the fotos! It's a former garage turned into a room. Very small and in a very dangerous area of Athens (Exarchea), with lots of troublemakers and junkies. My family was scammed!
very beautiful place, thank you to the owner for the hospitality, we will visit you again

This place was absolutely amazing, insanely clean even for Canadian standards, spacious, and close to everything. We were a little nervous about the graffiti in the local area but that's everywhere. Like literally everywhere in Athens. The park across the street was a nice place to let our kids run around. They have a really nice breakfast menu you can order food from the night before. They accommodated us with luggage storage and laundry even though we had already checked out. Reception is available to help 24 hours a day with no blackout periods. The cleaning staff was so nice that they even helped us with the laundry machine when they saw us struggling with it. Building, room, storage and amenity access was all provided through our individual code so there wasn't a need to carry around an extra pair of keys. They made us feel like important guests. My only regret is not booking them for the remainder of our trip in Athens. I posted some pictures of the view from the rooftop where you can see the Pantheon. And it's lit up at night unfortunately I didn't take any night pictures.

Amazing room to stay in! The balcony, inside and everything was gorgeous! We got to see the statue of Athena from our view. They are quick to respond when you need something and also great place to stay for 3. The location of it was convenient for us but the outside next doors were pretty ghetto lol. Overall, I loved it.

Rooms are very clean and confortable, you can find everything you need in the kitchen and in the bathroom except slippers:). If they put slippers in the rooms it would be wonderful..We stayed 4 nights, cleaning was made on the second day as they have informed. The place of the hotel is 20 minutes away from the center by foot. We didn't see any people in charge but they instantly reply you when you write them from WhatsApp..we were happy that we stayed there..

Was a bit nervous at first with the surrounding area covered in graffiti, but soon realized that is somewhat standard for this entire area.  Once we were in our room all the nerves went away, very spacious and comfortable layout, with obviously recent upgrades everywhere.  Fully functional kitchen and on-site laundry made this perfect for a family of four, and the A/C was in perfect working condition (we were there during a heatwave).  Even when we had an issue with the plumbing, someone was sent out right away and the problem fixed, exceptional house cleaning services by any standards.  The one thing I would warn someone is be sure to have your door code ready, there is not a front desk.  If we travel back to Athens this will be where we stay again

Hestia is Athens best hotel group. We have stayed here many short stays. We have tested every thing a hotel normally fail on.

Service and flexibility is ON POINT. This bit of Athens nothing is better. Stop looking.

Everything runs smoothly through a WhatsApp concierge service that responds in minutes!!

So friendly and kind.

We will be back!!!
Beautiful and spotlessly clean apartment in a very nice neighborhood in the center of Athens!!!!!!!!
Excellent choice of accommodation in a very beautiful place!!!

While passing through Athens, I stumbled upon this hidden gem by chance. It turned out to be the perfect choice for anyone needing a convenient, short stay during a transfer. The apartment is cozy, clean, and comfortable—everything was just right. Located centrally yet tucked away in the basement of a building, it offers a cool and quiet retreat. The host was incredibly friendly and quick to respond to all my questions. Overall, the service was excellent, and I highly recommend it for anyone looking for a pleasant and hassle-free stay in the heart of the city.

This hidden germ is in walking distance of Athens! Very  clean and comfortable setting and we
will visit again!
Good!

Just got back from a lovely family trip to Athens, where we stayed at the Pinacota suites. We stayed in the 3 bedroom apartment and were blown away when we walked in! So spacious, clean and beautifully decorated. Location was perfect as it was out of the busy central parts, but close enough to walk to any of their public transport options (of which there are many!). The owner was very polite and helpful, providing us with instructions and answering our questions. Wouldn’t hestitate to go back! Thank you for a lovely stay in Athens!

Gorgeous appartments, big, spatious, neat and clean. With washing machine and many amenities. We loved the place, it was so great to come back each day after visiting such a wonderful city and rest in a space that feels so much better than any hotel or tourist appartment. The quality of the suite was superb, and Yannis was more than helpful. Near many bus lines and metro stations. Waking distance from sightseeing buses. And near the most trendy “soho” area filled with amazing bars and restaurants.

A perfect place for a perfect stay in Athens. Great quality apartments, a very friendly and responsive owner and located opposite a very good value bar. And, only a short walk to the Metro.
✨⭐️🌟💫✨

Great location! Near both metro and bus and a walking distance to most of the sights in athens. Easy and secure checkin/checkout. The apartment was cozy, fresh and stylish. It had all you could ask for in facilities, since i stayed for 3 months. Great host with good communication and quick responses to questions. Would love to come back.

Luxurious Home away from home!

I spent a week for work in Athens at the 303 Pinacota Suite!
A luxurious and very well equipped condo with all the amenities that can make your stay memorable. I really felt like home and I even did home working one day,  just to get some time in my beautiful suite.
In the city center but at the same time very calm.
The suite was fully equipped and much bigger than any hotel room. Decoration is amazing but not intimidating.
Personalised service and advice by the owner.
The concierge service is great!

I’ve already booked the two bedroom suite for my next trip to Athens in 2 months!

Looking forward to staying again in these beautiful and lush suites!
Very bad. The photos are not correct and there is no reception or anyone

We had an excellent exprerience in that appartment. Look better than the photos are posted. With all the amenities we needed, and more than that. Is so close to Athens centre, and the communication with the owners was so easy with a friendly approach.  We”ll come back for sure.
Excellent space, comfortable and in a very good location. An excellent choice.
Beautiful house, on Alexandras Avenue. It is fully equipped with everything you need.
The apartment provided me with everything I needed. Excellent choice!!!!

The Athens Zafolia hotel was chosen by my tour group. The hotel is located in the heart of Athens. Very easy to get to all major areas of interest. Dining easy to find, and the staff was very accommodating. We had a few doorman to help with our luggage. When we needed directions, the desk staff was very helpful, and provided a map. The pool was on the roof, and my one complaint was no shade. We stayed during the heatwave in June '24. They even closed the Acropolis, it was THAT hot. I couldn't stand to be even in the water during that time without a place to find some shade. Other than that, the breakfast was great. Good selection, great coffee and juice. Hotel staff were very friendly. The rooms and bathrooms could use some updating. Although, they were very clean. For the time we stayed, it was very nice.

Everything is quite above average except location is off the tourist area. The room is quite spacious which is a plus. However, It will take 20 min taxi (10 Euro) to reach the Plaka area. There's not much shopping or restaurant choices nearby.
...After reading the hotel feedback on my post, I apologize for my wrong perception that the hotel is not in city center.

Close enough to the metro and still close enough to some sites.. customer service was pretty bad. Experienced racism. So, our group of 11 (6 rooms) booked extra days stay after our tour ended.  Our group, along with other members of the tour company arrive early.  All the other members,  who happen to be white got checked in early,  except our group, who are  black ladies were told we could not until 3pm. Despite other groups  coming in after us and also getting checked in. A member of our group went to the desk three times and was refused. They made us wait until exactly 3pm to check us in. Needless to say there was no one else left to be checked in after us. However there was one lady there who helped us with directions to the metro and also called us cabs when we requested.  So sorry I forgot her name. Please keep her there. I would not recommend this hotel to my black friends... my white friends maybe.

40 euros from Airport to this hotel on the outer rim of the city perimeter. No doorman to help with luggage - reception was perfunctory. Room neat enough but dusty floor. Bathroom has issues. 2 old lifts labour bringing a couple with a suitcase each up. Breakfast buffet is as expected in 3 star hotel. Don’t try dinner at the restaurant where waiters sneer at anyone not understanding Greek & joke with those who do. Expensive.  Interesting shopping precinct up 2 blocks. Can’t really recommend this place. Totally understand why Greece is in economic decline. Beware of taxi drivers, restaurants & shop keepers none of whom are grateful all want tips for no service. The pool was closed.

Comfortable, relatively inexpensive, half hour walk from Syntagma Square. Slightly faded/well-worn feel to the place e.g. room key cards  needed replacing 3
times in 48 hours. Pool on top excellent facility. Extremely dull, central casting breakfast buffet - more fuel than delicious!
Great location for the money paid- good value. Clean and well organised for check in. Good AC!
Nice room with private bathroom. Pros: clean, comfortable bed and pillow, spacious bathroom. Cons: inefficient ventilation (high humidity inside the room).
Amazing, clean and tidy👍

Customer service A1 from Jennifer! My sister and I were on vacation for her birthday, and we were greeted by Jennifer. The rooms are small but very clean and comfortable, so if you want something larger, book a larger room or go elsewhere. I absolutely love the decor. Desserts looked delicious. I like that you are able to have a drink of coffee☕️ or alcohol 🍹 before bed.  A suggestion is to book your own transportation through Uber(will save a lot of headaches at the end of the day, and you will know your price upfront).  Whoever was at the front desk at the end of our stay was a little rude in how she spoke to us about the transportation mixup, so minus 1 star. It's all about how things are said. Overall, I would definitely stay again.

I stayed at the Q Hotel for 4 nights and it was a divine experience. The staff was friendly and helpful - the breakfast was nourishing with a wide variety of sweet & savory options and included a fresh made coffee drink every morning (I suggest the freddo cappuccino!) The neighborhood was quiet and charming, with good street art and even better food. The bed was incredibly comfortable, which was a happy change from my stay on the more rustic islands! The rooftop balcony made my entire trip complete, a perfect place to bring dinner back to or enjoy a bottle of wine with friends. At one point there was an accordion player roaming the streets below as I was enjoying the balcony and it felt like the most magical european experience. The Q is close to the metro, but I opted to walk to & from the city center each day, and never once felt unsafe as a solo woman traveling. 10/10 experience, I will be staying here again!

We stayed here twice on our visit to Greece, in between going to Sifnos island. The first stay was top tier - floor 3 I think we were absolutely brilliant. No complaints.
The second stay was not as good, as the room on floor 1 wasn’t as nice, it was a lot smaller and also we could here a couple of people in the room next door who were talking long into the night. I don’t blame the hotel as you do get rude guests every now and then who don’t think about other guests but a shame the walls were thin enough to here. But a cool trendy hotel which is only a 20 min walk into Athens City Centre. Great value as well.

What a great find! This is a fab hotel in a very cool neighbourhood. It is a little walk from a metro, but there are plenty of buses which you can take. It was nice to get out of the tourist areas of athens to a quieter part. The service was great, nothing was too much trouble and the rooms are funky and exactly what's needed for a city break!

I had such a fantastic time at this hotel. Situated in the coolest neighborhood, close to all the sightseeing I wanted to do but also filled with its own history and personality, I can't wait to return and stay here again so I can explore more thoroughly.

I can’t say enough good things about this hotel. Hotel Frida has been one of the best things about our stay in Athens. We booked 6 nights and wouldn’t have minded staying 6 more. The folks who run the hotel are incredibly nice. The hotel is very clean, and a great bang for your buck. You can walk to almost anywhere you need to go, but it is a longer walk. We didn’t mind so much because we saw so much cool stuff, it was a great way to explore the city. Just for reference we spent a lot of time in the hip Exarcheia neighborhood (10 min walk), took a taxi to the Vouliagmeni beach (18 euros) and the Acropolis (10 euros or so) and walked to the Playce board game cafe (30 mins). It’s been a great trip, and having hotel Frida as a home base was a big part of why it’s been so great!

Nice, clean, affordable, silent good place, of you are looking for quite place to sleep after a long journey.
If you looking for socializing, this ain't a place.
Nice and clean hotel near the city center!
Amazin location and service. I had a great experience.
Cheap hotel, 20 minutes walk from the center.
The hotel's and rooms' design is great, location is good. I loved the hill just beside it. Looks like the highest point in the center of Athens. The view from it is spectacular.

More than expected.
Brand new hotel, many shops around.
Bedroom very clean.
Kindness, availability from desk employees  Peter and Fotis.
To be booked for price/quality rate.

The neighbourhood is away from the main tourist track and, if you walk towards the PAOK stadium, it's a bit rough. It's a few kilometres away from the main centre, but people should be aware of that before they press "Book".

Rooms are nice, comfortable bed and a decent bathroom. Balcony overlooked the local open air cinema / theatre, which was entertaining ! Buses are two minutes walk away and the metro's about ten minutes away.

If you want to get away from the tourist honey pots, then it's a good choice, I'd happily return next time I'm in Athens.

Had a lovely stay, room was spotless and had everythjng i needed and a large balcony. I needed a desk to work at and was immeduately moved to a room of my choice. The receptionists were always friendly and helpful,and i was allowed to stay late after checkout as i had a late flight. Only issue is that the rooms are close and if your neighbors are noisy you may hear them. Area is very convenient and has great coffee shops and buses to all required areas. Will be back

Not a 4 star hotel. Hotel is new and pictures look nice. Neighbourhood looks ugly and rooms are very small. Breakfast is poor - fruits from the can, industrial ham, no eggs, juice is a syrup. I just had a black coffee but paid for a full 4-star-hotel breakfast. Breakfast is served only from 7 to 9 a.m. View from our executive room was a broken facade of a building which was 3m away. Not inspiring.
Super
good place
Super

The reception doesn't speak Greek..(only broken English...)
It's more like a hot spot, than a hotel... I don't think I need to say anything else... if you're brave enough to find a room (rare), double-lock it at night, for better or worse... more ghetto than a hotel..
The fact that the reviews are almost all in Arabic... says it all.. shame because it used to be decent...

Previously, it was an ordinary hotel like any hotel, but now the European Union has rented it to refugees only to families who have health problems because the place is close to the hospital, and after completing treatment, they move them to homes.

There is no sign. The name is different than here. There is no location on Google. I had to search for the address for hours and could not reach anyone. It is ok to stay for the price but it is not clean enough. Do not have high expectations. Smoking was done in my room until 4 am and there is no reception to complain to. This is not a facility, it has been turned into an apartment hostel and the man is not around. They did not even look at my passport.

If you know, you know.  Possibly the best place in all of Athens.  The owner is a character and a hard ass, so stay on his good side.  DO NOT BOOK ONLINE.  Just show up and ring the bell, if he has a room and he like you you will have a good time.  Quite possibly the strangest place I have ever stayed, but I met such wonderful people, with incredible stories, so genuine and kind.  The owner is a true sweetheart. I stayed for a week and could have stayed for months.  The balcony is beautiful and wraps around the whole place connecting all the rooms.

I enjoyed staying at Thanasis Place. Andreas, the owner was very nice to me, a good friend. The location is great, just in front of the bus stop that takes you to the city center and main archeological sites.

The place has a good price/quality ratio in my opinion. The owner was nice with me, we even had a couple of beers and talked about life, he has a big personality. I was worried about the comments that mentioned bedbugs, but didnt find any and  didnt get any bites nor did any of the guys that were stying at that time, and found some bags under the bed with pruducts against bedbugs, so i guess they took care of that.

We hadn't read the reviews until we already booked and i was scared BUT we stayed here twice. One night at the start of our trip and one night at the end. Our first stay was smooth and easy, no issues at all. Though other people staying there seemed to have some confusion about changing rooms and one girls stuff was moved rooms without her knowing.
Our second stay was less smooth, we arrived at around 22.00 knowing we had half an hour to check in but we kept pressing the button without being let in. Eventually I contacted the whatsapp number through which I received slow replies asking many questions. We were let in by other guests long before I got any solid answers from anyone as to whether someone was going to check us in. Eventually the manager came and upgraded us to a private room which was nice.
The next morning I was stuck in the room! The doorknob had broken and there was no way to open the door (I don't think that this was anyones fault) I contacted the whatsapp number and a few calls later, threw the keys over the balcony to the manager so he could let me out from the other side of the door.
I had to checkout but kept my bags there for the day and upon returning had to wait an hour again to be let in.
We did not experience any bed bugs and the manager was a little intimidating at first but not unreasonable and once he got a conversation going he was friendly and fine.
Overall not a horrible experience, just inconvenient and disorganised. Nothing special but it does the job. Would not reccommend staying here if you have strict or inconveniant schedules though.
Spacious apartments..highly recommend!
Very nice apartment in a very neat apartment building, also in a very good spot a few meters from the meter, I recommend it without a second thought!!!

place_name: HOMOO Ampelokipoi Apartment- On the metro
review_text: GutaKeba

place_name: Stylish Luxury Apartment at Ampelokipi metro station
review_text: Wonderful service all around from Chris and  co. The apartment was perfect and confortable. Tons of useful information, including a map, was provided. They helped us with our bagage logistics. The shuttle service to and from the airport  was professionnal, and communications were smooth. I highly recommend. They are the best !!! Efkaristo poli !

%100 would recommend this place.
Great location easy transport from airport and all the must see places. Plus it’s in a quiet and safe neighborhood.
Great check in system and really clean and comfy rooms.
The breakfast in their arranged restaurant was really delicious too. I’d recommend you to go to one of the restaurants across the street at night too they have great food and drinks.
The owner/receptionist was a really sweet person, great hospitality and he recommended some great places to eat and visit.

Great location, very comfy bed, clean and modern room. Very helpful and friendly owner. He helped us move the booking to the next day after we missed our flight due to unforeseen circumstances. A real gem in Athens as the name suggests. Breakfast at Everest was good too, very abundant, leaving you enough for a takeaway lunch as well. Very convenient 2 minute walk from a metro stop that brings you either into town or to the airport. Good value for money.

Cosy & friendly!
We really enjoyed our 2 nights stay in ATHENIAN GEM.
Centrally located,  just 40 ( !!!) meters from AMPELOKIPI Metro station...one minute walking distance!
Lots of restaurants & cafes just on the other side of the road .
MEGARON HALL is 5 minutes by foot.
George, the owner , was always ready to walk the 'extra mile ' to help us and give any information needed.
Room was spacious, clean and tidy, with all necessary amenities!
We will be back!!!
Fantastic room with plenty of natural light and spacious balcony. Great quiet and safe location with lots of choices for dining. Thank you for your hospitality.

The location of the hotel is great (next to Ampelokipoi Metro Station), which makes it accessible to/from the port of Piraeus, Athens Int. Airport and to all must-visit places in Athens. Rooms are beautiful, comfortable, sunny and clean. We also experienced an exceptional customer service from the staff,  and we highly recommend it, if planning a business trip or a city break in Athens.

place_name: Gorgeous & Modern Apartment at Ampelokipi Metro Station, Athens, Attica, Greece
review_text: I stayed only one night, coming from Kefalonia, the next day I left very early. The very kind host showed us where to park the car. Clean apartment, equipped with good taste, decorations and good quality appliances, located near the city center

place_name: Gorgeous & Modern Apartment at Ampelokipi Metro Station, Athens, Attica, Greece
review_text: Lovely apartment close to the tube and the city center. Clean and tidy, with comfortable bed and modern equipment. The owners apart from very helpful and polite, they have a good taste in decoration

place_name: Gorgeous & Modern Apartment at Ampelokipi Metro Station, Athens, Attica, Greece
review_text: Very nice apartment, safe, clean, warm, renovated. It has everything anyone needs and is in a very good location right next to the metro. We will prefer it again!

place_name: Gorgeous & Modern Apartment at Ampelokipi Metro Station, Athens, Attica, Greece
review_text: Nice apartment, in a good area near the metro.. it was clean and quiet at night... worth it

place_name: Gorgeous & Modern Apartment at Ampelokipi Metro Station, Athens, Attica, Greece
review_text: Excellent beautiful and warm space. The hosts are very friendly and willing, capable of turning a simple stay into a unique and unforgettable experience...

Just avoid it. The worst thing from the lack of cleanliness, noise, rough construction, non-existent help from the host is his argumentative behavior. Unfortunately, I read her comments and unacceptable answers later

We came under very stressful circumstances and walked around for hours until we finally ended up at the inn, and in the midst of the covid-19 crisis in Athens, it was a small blessing. The kind, friendly staff made our stay in the city infinitely better.

It's small and clean, but I wish that they would secure the beds to the floors somehow, since they slide away from the headboard at the smallest squirm at night. Other than that it was quite cozy and quiet, which was much appreciated after a whole day of traveling.
Nice hotels. Two days stay in Athens, the landlady is very nice, telling us many useful information.
the best
Very nice bless
Good hotel
Excellent space, comfortable apartment and many amenities and in a central location!! Parking is quite difficult in the area!!
Very nice apartment and spotlessly clean.
Grigoris is a wonderful host. Perfect spot and close to everything plus the Metro.
Nice and clean space

Was looking for a cheap but decent room for 4 to crash for one night before travelling on the morning after. Very satisfied in this regard.

Room was serviceable and clean, and the hotel is very conveniently located. Can't ask for more for the price, which was in hostel range. Great value.
Dirty rooms, old furniture and awful bath  The door was broken and also the room had nothing in common with the pictures in booking.

Lovely people around, the costumer service is top notch,  the staffs are nice and always ready to help.

The room was lovely and neatly arranged.
I love it there.  Will surely recommend for my friends when coming to Greece next
Honestly this little hotel saved our butts on a last-minute one night stay with helpful staff, a clean room, and even a tiny balcony. Great value. You can even get late night souvlaki delivered.
Very helpful hosts.  Close to port of Piraeus

Herve was a fantastic host - we stayed for 2 weeks in May 2022 during the Spring season.

The 2 level penthouse apartment is amazing - it’s in a modern new building and has been professionally styled and furnished.

Whilst the kitchen was well stocked and had a huge bench to dine on we hardly ate at home as there are so many amazing food and drink places within a few minutes (we consistently ate out).

The highlight is a massive balcony on Level 7 with an amazing view of the Acropolis and the greater Athens - whilst the pictures showing the place are fantastic - they don’t do it enough justice.  We spent a lot of time having drinks with friends  in the late afternoon and evening and if you like to tan the early morning sun is amazing (it’s private and you can be in your swimmers).

The small Level 8 balcony is perfect for a night time drink and chill session - it has even better views (if that’s possible).

We also found the bedroom light out shutters very useful - as it was already hot in May we lived the siesta life (afternoon nap and late night dinners).

The proximity to the subway is very useful - circa 200m away.  We consistently used the subway to get around (it’s efficient, clean and very effective).  It’s on the Airport line which is a bonus - much easier than dealing with the traffic.

We hope to next time stay in winter at Hervé’s place to experience the winter nightlife which is centred around Gazi and Kerameikos.
Gorgeous

What a gem outside the heart of Athens.  The accommodations were spacious with a kitchen. The apartment was great, but the hospitality was amazing.  Alex gave us directions on how to see all the sites by using the Metro. He recommended cafes to eat at, and he gave us tips on how to travel around the area.  This was a wonderful start to our month long vacation.

We were VERY satisfied with this accommodation. The owner was extremely friendly and helpful both in advance and in the location. The apartment is just a few minutes away by metro from the Acropolis, and you can use the rooftop jacuzzi and sunbeds to watch the Acropolis itself anytime you are "home". That is definitely unrivaled! The area has some bakeries, cafés, restaurants, and a supermarket, so that is great too. Even though a train and traffic come and go by the accommodation, you cannot really hear it; it's very serene inside. The apartment is very clean, spacious, and beautiful. Its only downside is - much like almost everywhere in Greece - that you are not allowed to flush the toilet paper, so it has to go in a bin. But the owners did everything they could to make yourself as comfortable as possible, including a lot of food already in the fridge and on the counters that you can eat for breakfast or whenever. And a very generous amount of toiletries too! 10/10 would go again and I recommend it wholeheartedly!

This place was probably a luxury place as the name claims, couple of years ago but not anymore!
In the apartment everything is old and it creaks, beds and mattresses needs to be changed as you barely can turn yourself during the sleep without waking up everyone in the apartment. The bathroom needs renovation as the water seems to be leaking everywhere. Apart from the fact that you can see Parthenon from the 5th floor of the building and the very nice host Alex, nothing to positively rate for this accommodation! The windows are so dirty you can barely see the tram track outside (ya, nothing else to see).
Definitely not what I was expecting from a 9 plus rating! This a poor 6!
Reviews are for apartment 301.

Amazingly friendly service and an incredible value stay in Athens. It is truly a luxury experience and the staff go above and beyond. Super convenient location as well just short walking distance from many major attractions in the city and just moments from the metro station.

We stayed at 47 Luxury Suites on June 6, 2024.  I was travelling with 3 other women, and we booked a 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom suite for one night before flying to Crete.  The suite had everything we could hope for – air conditioning, lots of room, comfortable beds, high quality linens.  The kitchenette was fully equipped with coffee, coffee maker, cutlery, dishes, fridge, stove, and microwave.  Alex and Sotiris were very helpful and responsive.  They arranged a driver to pick us up at the airport and gave us access to our suite as soon as we arrived.
The rooftop area with a view of the Acropolis was perfect after a great dinner at a restaurant Alex had recommended.  We walked everywhere, including to the Acropolis, and used the nearby train to get to the airport the next day.

Mold, Not Clean, AirCon Not Working, Awful!

This has been one of my worst experiences staying at an apartment.

Problems:  Air Condition
I contacted the property letting them know the AC was not working in bedroom on Sunday at 10:30am. They didn’t get back to me until 5PM letting me know they would try to send someone there. I waited there from 5-8:30pm until they told me they couldn’t.  Monday came and then nothing - they didn’t try to fix it, they didn’t try to call me, they didn’t even call the platform I booked it on.
Kitchen
There was black mold in the refrigerator and the kitchen was not prepared - the utensils were broken and there was no garbage to throw things away.
There was also no paper towels to clean things up with.
The dish sponge was old and disgusting.

Remotes:
The batteries were dead in the remotes and that was a challenge trying to turn things on/off.

Area: The hallway was terrible - the smells as other descriptions said was awful.
Because it is street level you can hear all the noises.
When people were coming and going - you could hear the front door slam shut and it would echo through the apartment.

Wifi
The wifi needs to be reset every 4-5 hours and it was slow. Can not handle media calls.
Very nice apartment.!! With very friendly and always available host.!!
The place is near everything and easy to get to.
Perfect!

Apartment with weaknesses... All the good reviews don't correspond to reality, I'd like to add a few current pictures so everyone can get their own impression.
The location is relatively good, about 300 meters from the metro and the area is otherwise quite busy and pleasant. The apartment itself is relatively dark, the bathroom is almost disgusting but the rest is quite nice. There are 2 air conditioners in the apartment, one in the living room, the other in the bedroom, they work great. The processing and handover of the apartment also went smoothly. I would also like to point out that it wasn't entirely clean; we found hair in the bathroom from previous guests...
Nice place
Excellent apartment, fully equipped and spotlessly clean! It is also ideally located, very close to the metro station. The owner was very kind! I will definitely prefer it again on my next visit!!

Excellent stay in Athens in this beautiful apartment with all the interior amenities, the geographical location close to the main sites and the warm welcome from our host. Thank you very much. Place to recommend
Very beautiful apartment, perfectly decorated, it provides you with everything you need and something more to spend a beautiful vacation in winter and summer!!!! I would go again for sure!!!!
Very good environment. Very clean, comfortable, quiet and easy to find parking... We highly recommend it!!!

place_name: MA MAISON PENTHOUSE LOFT WITH PRIVATE HEATED POOL N°5
review_text: This loft apartment is a unique experience for demanding visitors. Great design and excellent equipment. A nice surprise at the third layer where an outdoor heated private pool exist with view of acropolis/parthenon. 3 min walking form Metaxourgio subway station. Many restaurants and bars in the area.

place_name: MA MAISON PENTHOUSE LOFT WITH PRIVATE HEATED POOL N°5
review_text: Perfect! Stayed there with same friends for a few days..it actually is in the centre of the city! Good places to eat  and have drinks all around and all u need is in walking distances.the loft on the inside  is absolutely amazing .i definitely wanna enjoy the swimming pool in the summer

place_name: MA MAISON PENTHOUSE LOFT WITH PRIVATE HEATED POOL N°5
review_text: The best accommodation experience I’ve ever had! I highly recommend it for travellers who seek quality, luxury and the best view of Athens!

place_name: MA MAISON PENTHOUSE LOFT WITH PRIVATE HEATED POOL N°5
review_text: Space is very nice and the amazing view from the pool

place_name: MA MAISON PENTHOUSE LOFT WITH PRIVATE HEATED POOL N°5
review_text: Extraordinary apartment with the beautiful view of the Acropolis from the private pool!!!!!!!

Do not expect much of a suite, or of luxury for that matter (at least not in the basic room category), as it is rather small and minimalistic. But fair for the price, it's been clean and comfortable, and with modern design. Check-in was easy and convenient.
Strangely, the staircase (although apparently in perfectly fine condition) was closed. Balcony leads to the street which is rather noisy.

New air conditioned room with nice design bathroom. Big comfortable bed and functional kitchen. Nice feature: no keys. Entry by code.
Close to railway, but no noise at night.
Metro station right around the corner - goes directly to city center and airport.
Absolutely great - highly recommended
Beautiful!

Ideal apartment for holidays in Athens. We only stayed 1 night but we would have liked to stay much longer.

The apartment is very well located, in a quiet and safe neighborhood, close to many restaurants, cafes and shops.

Less than 2 minutes walk from the metro (airport-Piraeus blue line), it’s super convenient! 1 stop from Monastiraki and 2 stops from Syntagma. We expected to hear a little noise given the proximity of the metro, but ultimately it was quiet because the metro does not run at night.

We had the standard apartment. The decoration of the apartment is pretty, modern and refined. It’s comfortable and the space is well used. It's big enough for a couple for a few nights.

We enjoyed the private balcony located at the front of the building.

There is no lunch included but there are several markets, grocery stores and cafes nearby.

We did not meet any employees on site because access to the building and the room is granted electronically. You have to download an application and the phone serves as an access card. Very easy to use.

In short, I am satisfied with having chosen this accommodation because I shopped for accommodation in Athens for a long time and my choice fell on this one. He met our needs very well. The big advantage is the very reasonable cost. This apartment will definitely be one of my accommodation options during a future trip to Greece.

place_name: A little Taste of Home Guest House
review_text:
Cosy, the manager was very friendly.
In the kitchen you have coffee and tea, everything is well organised, in the room you have a small private fridge.
A bit annoying is the train passing in front of the room, but only until 8pm if I remember correctly.

place_name: A little Taste of Home Guest House
review_text: Comfortable and beautiful rooms, great location for seeing everything in Athens and a good neighbourhood. Accomodating and friendly hosts. Kitchen had everything you could need and including a great selection of tea and coffee and a pretty garden to drink it in.

place_name: A little Taste of Home Guest House
review_text: I love it here private living shared kitchen with access to washing balcony private or upper view.  Management just à text away. Local neighborhood markets and restaurant.

place_name: A little Taste of Home Guest House
review_text: The furniture and stuff is like from a flea market. It's clean, specious, well equipped, easy check-in.

place_name: A little Taste of Home Guest House
review_text:
Gorgeous accommodation, cozy , clean, really nice decoration and aesthetic! Near the city center and very convenient location for every destination!
As about the staff super friendly and polite ☺️
I highly recommend it!

Great owner (Dimitry),kind, helpful and responsive. His tips made our stay very pleasant.
Rooms are tidy and clean with all the necessary equipment.
Extremely comfortable location , close to the centre without the fass. Metro station 2 minutes walk, as well as buses.
Some nice restaurants and night clubs in close proximity.
Next time in Athens, will definitely stay there again.
Thank you very much, Dimitri!

Everything was great! Dimitry helped us find the right train, and he met us at the station and guided us to the apartment. The apartment was very spacious, and had a good location within walking distance of lot of interesting sights and central, busy citystreets. Dimitry planned a route for us to take to the Acropolis, with a lot if interesting detours, with restaurants and other places, we might not have found otherwise.

Excellent, wonderful!!
Located in the Central District but on a quiet street... And 2 blocks from there is one of the bustling nightlife centers of Athens - the Gazi district- filled with restaurants, bars and nightclubs

And one short two minute metro ride away, is truly the heart of Athens - Monastiraki Square

the apartment itself is very cute, on the first floor and completely equipped with everything you need for your stay.

But the best thing of all in this apartment is the owner himself - Except for maybe sending a Rolls Royce to pick you up ,he is basically a one stop shop A-Z almost concierge  that you normally find in 5-star hotels. Once you make the reservation, he starts streamlining to you important information that can make everything once you land and during your stay much easier, more comfortable and clear...information like what trains to take, Cost of passes, important stores, Restaurants, more and less important attractions and Etc.

And during your stay he's always available for you for any questions, needs and more.

For example, I personally had a logistical problem during my stay Because of my return flight , and he went out of his way to help me solve it.

I highly recommend this place and I will definitely be back here next time i will be in Athens

Everything was absolutely perfect. Dimitris picked us up from the airport and for a very reasonable fee took us to the apartment (we were the first guests in his newly refurbished apartment). Already in the car he gave us a cold bottle of water and in the fridge at the apartment there were some more bottles. The bed was super comfortable, shower great, air conditioning was working and since the bedroom was facing a courtyard (shared with the next door apartment- with a private table and chairs)there was almost no street noise audible. The flat was well equipped (even a hairdryer) and absolutely spotless. Dimitris gave us lots of tips and was very attentive. He went beyond our expectations and even driven us to the train station the next day. Can’t thank him enough for making our one night stay in Athens so memorable. The location is very nice with authentic cafes near by and 1 min to metro station going directly to the airport and 1 stop to all the archeological sites ( Dimitris also send us beautiful walking route to the center-20 min).
Definitely highly recommend Gazi apartments and Dimitris as the most wonderful host! Thank you for all!!!

Fantastic stay in Athen!
We got a appartment which looked a bit different than the fotos but absolutely nice (we loved sitting on the terrace, looking to the Akropolis).
-Great service/availability/informations
-really clean,
-Coffee, Water, Wine and wineglasses in the fridge
-good bed
-fanatastic Communication
-close to Monastiraki Place, Metro 2 minutes,…
Highly recommended looking for someone of a central, low-cost, clean and no-frills accommodation in Athen.
Dimitris is a extraordinary host, we felt really welcome and Mrs Zoe is such a lovely Lady!!! Couldn‘t be any better.
ευχαριστώ!
efcharistó!

Just reading some of the other reviews and I'm a little confused if they stayed in the same place. I don't really do Hostels that much, but in this case my travel arrangements required me to do so. If you come to Athens, I highly recommend this Hostel because...
1. The 3 members of staff that I interacted with were all helpful and supportive.
2. Breakfast is part of the price which takes away a lot of hassle of sorting it out for yourself - you get coffee, tea, orange juice, milk, cereal, bread / toast, cake, honey, ham, cheese, eggs...I mean what more do you want, this is enough.
3. The room I stayed in, the bed was clean and privacy curtains covered the whole cubicle, I stayed for 5 nights and asked for new towels and bedding after  3 nights which they did no problem. The bathrooms are in the room, but there are extra toilets off the common room area.
4. Bag of laundry was 5 Euros and done in 4 hours - brilliant!
5. Location: You are 100 metres from the Metro. Oh yes, you are in an area with a few bars etc, so there will be extra noise at night - but 50% you have been out enjoying yourself anyway, so it doesn't matter.
FINALLY..the whole Hostel had an ambience and positive personality about it. I stayed 5 nights and the common room area is also where the reception is, so you met new people coming in and out all the time and it was easy to start chatting with fellow travellers. Every other person I met seemed happy and contented.
SO, come to Athens and come to ICONIC - you will not be disappointed. 😊😊😊

We had to last minute book accommodation in Athens and were pleasantly pleased with our choice. Iconic is a great choice for the price you pay.

The lady on reception was very helpful with top places to visit around Athens. She was very accommodating and friendly, as were the rest of the staff on through the 24 hour reception

A good spread was put out for breakfast each morning and the terrace was a good vibe. The hostel is located in a cool neighborhood, yes the bars go late but we slept like babies (just remember earplugs)

As for previous reviews about bedbugs, good measures are put in place to prevent/control this issue.

Also a bonus being able to store our bags in storage for the day! I recomend this place for backpackers and anyone on a budget :)

The hostel is run by some really nice people, in the fun Gazi area. However, there are bedbugs. And not a few. Please do something radical about it.
The kitchen could need some improvement, for example two of four stovetop plates and the oven didn't work.
The breakfast is very basic. It ends at 10. I could have used  breakfast until 11, as could other guests. There is no gluten-free bread, although that is also not common in Athens. The closest supermarkets are 15 minutes walk away.
Overall cleanliness was fine.
I would stay there again if I were sure to get a bug-free room.

I know that the rooms are shared, and I was actually looking forward to meet some fun people, but Iconic had other plans for me. As I entered the room, I was dismayed by the bad odor. The room stinked, to put it nicely. A minute later I understood why, as my roomate-to-be entered. His clothes were torn from head to toe, and he had almost no teeth. A homeless, I presumed. As much as it is a sad case, I was not expecting that Iconic Athens Hostel caters to that kind of guests.

The staff was not eager to accomodate a room change for me, and initially told me that they were completely booked, which a visit to Booking.com quick disproved. After a very long wait, I was finally offered a different room. The card was broken, the bedding had punctures in it, and I have had enough of their poor sanitary conditions and rock bottom standards. I left and got a much better accomodation somewhere else.

When I approached the management suggesting that we leave this unfortunate event behind us by them refunding me what I paid and didn't use, and me deleting this review, the rude lady accused me for blackmailing them... They then went ahead and lied to Booking.com that I actually stayed in the property, so that I would not receive any compensation from Booking.com. Of course I've recorded a video of my self check out, so they're out of luck.

I guess I shouldn't have expected acceptable standards of service at a hostel that is this poorly ran.

As promising as it looks online, I do not recoemmend Iconic Athens Hostel for any traveler, even as a last resort accomodation. Even for free. You might as well sleep in the streets for a similar experience. Thanks for reading, and take care.

If you like noise until 6 am, dust and dirt everywhere and a breakfast that's basically toast and butter, then Ikonic should be your first choice. One of my roommates found bedbugs, too. Management seemed rather unconcerned, but considering the overall run down condition of what once must have been a nice Hostel, small wonder. Its saving grace was that it was very cheap.

This is a stunning boutique hotel in a lovely part of Athens.  The rooms are beautifully decorated and have everything you could need; the balcony was spacious and the bed extremely comfortable. The staff were friendly and helpful; nothing was too much trouble. The breakfast was also delicious.  The area is funky with a buzzy, bohemian feel. There are lots of little cafes, bars and tavernas within a very short stroll.  The metro is nearby and makes for easy access around Athens.  I would most definitely recommend this hotel and the lovely neighbourhood.

I thoroughly enjoyed my stay at Loom Athens. It’s a lovely modern hotel, with a nice decor and has clearly been recently refurbished. Everything is nice and new and clean. The staff were really sweet and friendly. The location is also great, within walking distance of the city centre, in a cool young neighbourhood with plenty of nice restaurants and bars. It was also on a nice quiet street which is a plus. Highly recommended!

We have been delighted with our stay at the Loom hotel! We arrived before our rom was ready but we have been taken care of as we stepped in. The hotel is well located in Athens, in a vibrant neighbourhood. We loved the design and the comfort of the room. The breakfast was tasty too. We couldn’t ask for a better experience. Thanks so much!

Great breakfast and friendly staff. The hotel is within walking distance to all main attractions and close to the metro. I even walked back alone during the night and it felt very safe. Only downside is that the doors to the rooms are not very soundproof so you will hear everything that goes on outside your room. Other than that it’s a great hotel, recommend it!

An absolutely lovely hotel, a true gem! Set in a quiet (but very hip) neighbourhood not far from city centre, beautifully and smartly designed and on top of all that, very reasonably priced as well. The breakfasts are served right in the lobby, and have a nice personal touch - when was the last time you had your scrambled eggs done for you on the spot? Could not recommend highly enough!

Congratulations to the owners . It is in a very convenient location . Walking distance to many good restaurants. The apartment was very clean in detail. Nice furniture, very comfortable. You get a lot of value for the money you pay ! I highly recommend.
Congratulations!!! Exceptional apartment, facilities and location! Very clean, perfect bed and shower! Amazing stay!
Excellent location, restaurants nearby, nice balcony and very clean property

Excellent rooms fully equipped! Spotlessly clean! Divine mattress! In the most lively area in the center of Athens! All amenities such as supermarkets, gastronomy and nightlife within walking distance. I highly recommend it.
