"The rooms are small, and the location is in a dirty and unpleasant area. The security guy was disrespectful, and the elevator was unreliable. There’s really nothing good about this place—do yourself a favor and book somewhere else." Homeless around
I got quite impressed with the room once I got inside, it's very luxurious and it has everything you might need during your stay, staff is very helpfull and there's always someone to help you

I am truly impressed by this oasis. The interior is incredible, and the attention to detail can be felt in every corner. I might have worked a bit more on small elements like information signs and directional markers, as it would add to the feeling that the interior is interacting with you. The staff is a real gem of this place - it's been a long time since I've been welcomed so warmly and kindly. The location is very close to the city center, but it turns out it’s not the best in terms of a sense of safety. Hopefully, that will change over time.

I recommend this hostel if you:
1. Love a South Asian style in interior design.
2. Enjoy a warm and friendly atmosphere.
3. Can sleep with earplugs (a must).
4. Don’t feel deep discomfort when you see homeless people or drug users on the street, which is important for solo travelers.

Overall, I recommend this place, but under the conditions mentioned above.

This is a great hostel on the inside. It is very very clean, very well designed, the common area is great to meet people and the bar is a lot of fun. I have ZERO complaints about the hostel itself.

HOWEVER!!! The neighborhood is VERY sketchy. As a solo 20 yr old female traveler I really did not feel comfortable walking outside alone. Even in the day time. The area around the hostel is quite dirty—a lot of trash on all the sidewalks. There are a lot of homeless people, needles on the ground, etc. I am from Los Angeles where there’s a lot of homelessness but even I felt not very safe. Luckily I befriended two great guys in the hostel and ended up spending a majority of my time with them so I only walked alone twice (when I arrived and when I had to go). I think if your are traveling in a group, the location is not ideal but maybe manageable, but if you are a solo female I would not recommend the hostel. Which is really unfortunate because EVERYTHING else about the hostel was wonderful. No hate to the staff or owners, I know they can’t really do anything about the location.

Really cool vibe and beautiful place to stay. The staff was super kind. Rooms and beds were very comfortable, even for me (1.89m tall). The toilets and the kitchen were clean at all times. I’ll definitely come back.

Nice hostel but location is HELL. Super sketchy neighborhood with a lot of homeless people, drug addicts doing heroin on the streets, people screaming etc. Felt really unsafe walking in broad day light and I lived in pretty ghetto places before.

GOOD : the hostel is very stylish, the staff is amazing and really nice, good place to meet people especially at the bar, easy to order food, the WhatsApp group is a really good idea for people to interact with each other, free breakfast.

BAD : THE NEIGHBORHOOD, Walls are extremely thin so you can hear everything going on inside and outside the hostel (which is next to a busy street), the shower and toilet were a bit smelly, no blanket provided (only a bed sheet to cover yourself which isn’t enough)

To summarize if it wasn’t in such a horrible neighborhood it would have been a lovely place but for me I couldn’t get over the bad location. I was too scared to walk the streets alone (I’m a female solo traveler) and it kind of ruined it for me. So because of this I would not recommend this hostel unless you have a high tolerance to stress and don’t mind shady neighborhoods.

I was traveling solo to Athens and the experience at the baloo hostel made it so much better, the staff was extremely kind and helpful, the hotel is clean and light, with outside sitting patio, including a bar for the evenings! The community I found here will stay with me even after i left. Definitely a remarkable hostel that I will recommend with my whole heart! The location is central and it’s walkable to almost anywhere I wanted to get to, while the immediate street area is not the most scenic one, after walking 5-10 mins I was directly in the historical centre. Didn’t have an issue, and the hostel was worth it.

I'll try to describe as fairly as possible.

Hotel staff are friendly. Street is absolutely disgusting. Feels dangerous but most of the druggies outside are too busy in their own world. General location is really great for exploring central Athens. Really close to Omonia Metro station (super dodgy area still, watch your belongings). Really close to the Airport bus stop. 30min walk or so from Acropolis.

As others mentioned, toilet has no door. Not a huge issue but worth mentioning. Also, it is rare to have a quiet night. It's not super noisy, however people are screaming etc at random parts of the night.

Elevator is janky, but works. Room is relatively clean.

All in all, it was a great price and amazing for exploring Athens, but I will never be back aslong as I can help it. Staff were helpful, but it was just too much for me.

Me and my friends booked a room for 3 at this hotel. When we arrived they told to us to go in another one, Lido hotel, under the same company without explainetion. The neighborhood was probably the worst place in Athens: broken streets and buildings and people on the side of the road eating pills.

Worst hotel I‘ve ever been!!! Dirty room. The bed was covered with a plastic. No hot water in the shower. The „showerhead“ where comes the water out, was not really working. The door of the hotelroom has a window and in the night the light on the floor shines in the room. We booked 2 nights and after the first night in the cold room with a thin sheets and a not working AC (and the cold shower) we leaved. Drugpeoples around the hotel.
So think two times about to sleep there.

The location is a drug addicts spot the exact street in particular is dangerous and full of shady characters. Walking out there I felt I could get stabbed any moment so please take my comment seriously YOU DO NOT WALK OUT THERE AT NIGHT.
In terms if the hotel: the towels in our room had blood stains on them mixed with black stains and when we asked for replacements they new towels came with blood stains too. Overal a terrible experience pls stay away !

Good staff very good service all over a nice place to stay but out side I don't think you would even want to go around even day time not that good it's not got to do anything with the hotel that is a problem all over ammonia have a nice stay
Yours
All night we couldnt sleep because of narkoman people who used drags and prostitutes. They are crying loudly and fighting.  I dont know what to do impossible to sleep
All the staffs are friendly. Very affordable. The room is neat. Walking distance from main tourist spots and train station.
Terrible is the word
XXX Hotel but if the night catches you it's a good choice.
Good
Everything was absolutely great! We loved our stay here! Beautiful, comfortable rooms with amazing friendly stuff. What else to ask for?

This place is really nice - very clean and all amenities at your disposal (coffee/thee maker, small fridge, locker, etc.). Communication is spotless! Although they don’t have 24 hour reception they respond very quickly and with modern technology I was able to enter 4am. Finally, lots of good places for food and drinks within walking distance. Again, great place!

I recently stayed at the Exarchia House Project and had a fantastic experience. From the moment I arrived, the staff was incredibly welcoming and helpful, making me feel right at home.

The room itself was spacious, clean, and well-appointed, with all the amenities I needed for a comfortable stay. The bed was comfortable, the linens were soft and clean, and the bathroom was spotless with plenty of fresh towels and toiletries.
Amazing place in the center of Athens. The room was very clean and the people running the hotel were very polite. We will choose it again for our stay.
Very clean rooms, great location in the center of Athens and such a nice hospitality (Charis and Agapi)! Definitely would recommend it 😁

The apartament where we were is pretty nice.
Localisation is the Center of Athens allow to go everywhere you want. Inside of apartment is very clean and fresh. Everything is new and renovated.
I recommend it! :)
Gorgeous rooms once you enter the not so gorgeous building, and they have a fully functional washer that we utilized during our stay. Great host too
Located in Exarchia. It is a nice place to stay, good design. However the water heating is not adequate. Therefore the three stars.
A very fresh and nice business offices hub. Clean and neat, airy, very bright, functional. With toilets and kitchenette. Just fine.
Extremely good reception and the owners are just lovely people that'll tell you everything you need to know. Located in a good place close to stores parks and museums!
Really stinky place, avoid it at all costs

place_name: Zen Elegant Apartment in the Center of Athens
review_text: If you are looking for a spacious, bright and classy apartment in the heart of Athens, you are in the right place. Zen Elegant Apartment is a newly renovated and fully equipped apartment in the city center, just 5 minutes walk from the National Archaeological Museum and Omonia Metro station. This spacious apartment is the ideal place to relax and the perfect starting point for your tours. After a long walk downtown seeing Athens sights, chill out on the comfortable sofa in the living room with a glass of wine, dine in the glass dining table or enjoy your favorite movie on the 55 inch flat screen TV. If you are a couple, the large queen size bed in the bedroom will offer you a dreamy sleep and in case there are three of you, the huge sofa bed in the living room can accommodate the extra person. The kitchen is fully equipped with stove, oven, microwave, coffee maker, kettle, fridge and freezer and in the bathroom you will find a washing machine / tumble dryer to meet your needs for a long stay. Free Wi-Fi is provided with fast internet connection so you can even work remotely or relax with free Νetflix.

Great location in the heart of Athens, close to all major attractions and public transport. The flat was clean, well-equipped, and cozy, perfect for a comfortable stay. The host was very responsive and helpful with local tips. Highly recommended for anyone looking to explore Athens!

"We had an incredible time staying at this Airbnb in Athens. The apartment was absolutely stunning, with breathtaking views of the city and all the amenities we could possibly need for a comfortable stay. The host was exceptionally attentive and went above and beyond to ensure we had a memorable experience. We couldn't have asked for a better home base for our adventures in Athens. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a luxurious and unforgettable stay!"

"We had the most wonderful stay at this Airbnb in Athens. The apartment was not only impeccably clean and well-maintained but also beautifully decorated with modern amenities. The host was incredibly hospitable, providing us with insider tips on how to make the most of our time in Athens. We felt like locals exploring the city's hidden gems thanks to their recommendations. Highly recommend staying here!"

Beautifully designed penthouse apartment with all modern comforts leading out onto a fantastic spacious terrace. Located in the heart of Athens in Exarchia close to restaurants, bars and shops. An ideal apartment for couples or families in an ideal location to see all the the city has to offer.
Really enjoyed the stay at this place. Comfortable, stylish with all the necessities for a great stay. Claire is extra helpful with tips and top places to visit in the city. Will definitely be back.

place_name: Athens antique library penthouse with landmark pergola
review_text: A beautiful apartment in the heart of Athens. With an amazing view, sunny and large terraces with beautiful and aromatic plants. An excellently designed pergola responds to the high aesthetics of the interior spaces which are comfortable and furnished with unique antique furniture. In this space, nothing comes from mass, industrial production, but from talented artisans. Everything neat, clean and tidy. An apartment that inspires...
Cozy apartment in quite area. Room is spacious, clean and tidy.There is nice balcony. Good for a group of 3-4 people.
Top

The apartment is in a neighborhood 1.5 km from the center in a somewhat abandoned area. Around there is a cheaper gastronomic variety but they are all Kebabs. The apartment is quite neglected. When we arrived there was no faucet and it took them 2 days to fix it. When we arrived we had met at 3:00 p.m. and they didn't arrive until 5:30 p.m., leaving us on the street with our luggage. It took the man more than two hours to come from when we called him. The sheets had snot, to say the least... Disgusting. Only one set of towels for the entire stay without the possibility of cleaning them because there is no washing machine. Thank God the elevator worked... But the noise inside the apartment is horrible, thank God it is not used much.
We asked for the possibility of a transfer to the airport and they wanted to steal 15 euros more from us than the taxi drivers...
Excelente local para descasar e praia. Bom restairante e instalações. Os donos de alguns apartamentos são a nódoa. Acham que são fomos de tudo...
The place was spectacular, very comfortable and close to everything, but the host was short on information, which is why I didn't give it five stars.
Spotlessly clean apartment with all amenities, I will visit again for sure.
A house with all the comforts. I will definitely prefer it again.

Excellent location and the neighborhood is a vibe! Really nice to explore the center of Athens from here. Also a great view from the rooftop. The rooms are not excellent quality but honestly more than fine if you’re out the entire day exploring the city.

Located in the heart of the Exarcheia district, this hotel offers basic amenities at a very reasonable price. Our room came with a balcony that provided a nice view of the urban surroundings. We spent a week here without any problems. The room was cleaned daily by the friendly housekeeping staff. While the breakfast provided is quite basic, the area has numerous excellent bakeries if you prefer to grab breakfast on the go.

Perfect location in vibrant and safe area. Good food and drinks everywhere. Room was basic but ok for what we paid. Issue with this hotel - staff in lobby are NOT friendly or welcoming at all. Traveling as a same sex couple - was asked rudely twice upon check in if double bed was ok. He was very surprised when we said ‘yes’. If you’re going to work in a hotel in a large vibrant city, get used to it. Be more friendly and welcoming.

Breakfast was the same every day, not the best options. Discovered bedbugs, there was random holes in the walls in the room, cockroches (I saw them on stairs). The staff was ok, the cleaning was fine. In my room, the refrigerator didn't even work. I liked the location, but I'd be still careful in that neighbourhood.
Rooms very basic, breakfast even more so. However Manager very friendly and approachable. In the center of the city transport links to everything just a few minutes walk away.

Decent rooms. Clean, no bugs. AC works well. Nice assortment of cups and dishes, iron with ironing board, stove with frying pans, kettle for tea and coffee with complimentary water bottles and Nescafé etc. The security box was already locked and I didn’t have access to use it. Talk to the management before your stay to make sure your box is accessible. Rooms could be a little more soundproof ✌️

Apartment was nice but the location is in a rougher part of town if you care about that. We found the location easy to get to and the people watching in the neighbourhood was great. Access to the hotel was easy. The worst part of the room was the air conditioning, we were so hot and could not sleep at all. We kept trying to turn the air conditioning lower and it kept moving back to 28 degrees, like it was auto set by the hotel. We liked how it was clean and the balcony, but would not stay again due to how hot it was trying to sleep.

Room was great. Location was decent. But the door code thing stopped working one night. So we had to stay on the street waiting for someone to open the door with a key. The woman I called took about 35 minutes to get there to let us in. Was really annoying. She was not apologetic at all. Just said she would reset the system and hopefully it worked tomorrow. Would not stay here again just because of that.

Nice hotel, very clean. Room has good washrooms and kitchen was stocked with everything you would need. Check-in was easy enough, just make sure you read the instructions they send after you book.
The area has great restaurants and local food but did feel a little "run down" with lots of graffiti on pretty much every surface.  That is sadly common in some areas of Athens though.

Service was great and location was good enough to travel Athens. Sound was nice and isolated, the balcony was HUUGE, and the room was nice and modern with amenities. There was an elevator to help you bring luggages up and nice system for entering the building with a pin and no contact check-in.

Only thing that turned me off and prevented me from giving 5 stars was cleanliness. I moved the couch because I dropped something underneath and there were crumbs and garbage all underneath the couch (seems like it piled up). Please put importance on that aspect of cleanliness and it will be a perfect stay.

Very fair price and the roof-top terrace for breakfast or a sundowner (BYOB) is defined an asset.

The breakfast is good, particularly local dishes like humus, feta, jams, eggs, bread etc. We only didn’t like the coffee at all, but you find that later in the day in town.

In the shops around you can buy a cool beer to enjoy on the terrace and there are some very nice restaurants and bars outside.
Some nights were quiet, Saturday night definitely not, so you better bring ear plugs.

Stayed here a few weeks ago. The staff were great and very friendly. Got so much vital information on how to get around. Can't thank them enough.

Room service was great and was clean every time we returned. The rooftop terrace has a great view of Athens and the Parthenon - it was a great place to relax, especially at night when the lights were on.

Conveniently located place. Short walk to Omonoia station. Some great cafes and eateries within a 5 minute walk from this place - Cafe Boheme for the pasta and Rizes for the coffee and pastries.

Stayed here for 5 days, very sweet staff, perfect location and very good and comfortable rooms! When we would arrive late at night the staff would walk with us to our room to put on the hallway light so we could find the lock of the door easier, very sweet!

Will stay here again next time for sure

We stayed in a nice room with personal terrace, ac, fridge and bath with (rain)shower, sink and toilet for a good price (roughly 40€ per person per night for a 7 night stay in a double bedroom with a double bed). The door to the terrace and the window in the yoilet alsi had mosquito nets. The terrace has an amazing view over athens and you can access it at all times (also with a really small elevator with 250 kg maximum weight and really small doors) and you can also get breakfast on it from 8 to 11 am for 9€ per person. The personell is very friendly.
The Hotel is located in the quarter Εξαρχεια (Exarcheia), wich is often considered the anarchist quarter of athens. Even so it isn't  dangerous in any way and I never felt unsafe but as a high percentag of inhabitants are university students it can be a bit louder even at later times. Exarcheia is apart from that renown for it's cafés and bars. I can recommend "Mystic Pizza and Pasta", an Italian restaurant with quite some vegetarian options and with optional vegan cream for pasta, vegan cheese and whole grain pizza dough for less gluten and "Black Salami", a sandwich café. You can reach the city center by foot in around 25 minutes.
The hotel is unfortunately not 100% barrier free as the streets leading to it are fairly steep you have to climb a small step to enter the main entrance to building one, where the reception is and where you can then access the elevator wich unfortunately is really small and has small doors (building 2 doesn't have rooms for wich you don't have to climb some steps to reach).

An amazing hotel with great rooftop view and kind receptionists. Everyone was very helpful, the rooms were cleaned every single day and the tasty rooftop breakfast had a great variety of locally sourced foods. Would really recommend to try the breakfast! The hotel felt cozy like home. Rooms were inexpensive but we got a very high standard ones with a nice bathroom. It's in a nice area, surrounded by a park. We loved it! Thank you so much for taking care of us during our stay!

A great apartment, Sofia who manages the building was always available to help us with everything, even in things that are not necessarily related to the apartment itself. Highly recommended!
It is a bit far from the center 15 minutes walk but many good bars and bakeries on the way. I will return for sure

A wonderful city break in a great location. Easy to get around and clear instructions from the get go. The building is very safe (multiple coded doors to enter) and the apartment was much bigger than I expected. Really great price, highly recommend.

The hotel is located in a very nice neighborhood with a lot of bars and restaurants. The flat was truly beautiful and very clean. The kitchen was fully equipped and there is a washing machine. We felt very comfortable and safe there. Thank you very much!

The apartment stands out, located at a hill. The rooftop balcony was amazing. The apartment itself is nice as shown in the photo. 1 bedroom, 1 livingroom with a sofa convertible to bed. The wifi is nice and reach out the roof top.
On Saturday there is fruit market in front of the premise. The location is in a walking distance from the landmarks of Athens. Having a elevator is also a plus.We did not know that the location is at a hill. We did not come by taxi, so we have to climb up the hill. The neighborhood is a bit dirty with a lot of vandalism. I think it is everywhere in Athens. The smart TV is large, but sometimes there is a trouble connecting with Youtube and sometimes the remote control is not perfect.

Really good value for money. The bed is comfortable and the rooms quiet. Since you’re partway up Stefi Hill the veranda affords a very good view of Athens (I was on the fourth floor). The rooftop area an even better one. An exceptional butcher is diagonally opposite the entrance (I would highly recommend the Greek rib-eye). A supermarket is a minute away. 30+ restaurants, cafes, bars etc within 5-10 minutes walk. Kitchen has a very good oven. 12 minutes walk away you have The Clumsies bar and restaurant. Athens is a night city (I swear they run on Duracell) so if you want to see more local life and less tourist life go out after 10pm or later). The Seven Jokers bar is 20 minutes walk away. Balthazar Bar and Restaurant 30 minutes walk. Plaka is 30 minutes walk away. Walking might seem the slower option but wait times are measured differently in Athens compared with say, London and you’ll get to see Athens for what it truly is. A city of contradictions where the locals are well educated, have a better education compared with most countries, are proud of their community and of their culture and are not silent if they perceive a social injustice. Use google lens to read the graffiti and you’ll have a better understanding of what drives young adults. I thoroughly recommend ABR Suites (I’ve stayed at two of their locations) and will keep on returning to them when I’m next in Athens. Also have drinks at Palatine bar around 20 minutes away. The tourists haven’t hit there yet. I find October - February the best months to go to Athens because most tourists walk at the speed of an elephant.

place_name: The Best View Rent Apartment Lycabettus
review_text: Wonderful Apartment with a wonderful balcony at night it is a privilege to enjoy the spacious, comfortable and modern view. A fantastic location that allows you to easily move anywhere in the City of Athens.

place_name: The Best View Rent Apartment Lycabettus
review_text: Spectacular view is a dream especially at night a dream view everything is new a wonderful L-shaped balcony super spacious

place_name: The Best View Rent Apartment Lycabettus
review_text: Nice and comfortable

The rooms were very comfortable and cozy with plenty of space, great bathrooms and comfortable beds installed with a safe for all your important stuff.
The service was pretty good no complaints, the employees were very nice and useful so no problem here.
The location isn't the best it's just the center of Athens so you can't expect much but it might also have just been the room I was in.

Such a wonderful hotel. I'd describe it as comfortable, cool and friendly, and in a great location. The decor is super nice, and the beds are very comfortable. The people working there are lovely, always keen to have a chat and a drink together. The locaiton is great too, in the alternative neighbourhood of Exarchia, which is super friendly and cool with some great restaurants, bars and cafes, and only a short walk from the centre. I would not hesitate to stay there again.

Incredibly kind and nice hosts. The rooms are nice and are cleaned every day. The attitude of the personel is unseen,  really hospitable and helpful.  At first we were a bit concerned about the stories about Exarchia, but when we went there it revealed that this is not the truth. Really nice places to eat. Just be careful late at night otherwise it is great neighbourhood with its own charm.

The staff was super friendly and always responsive with good suggestions where to go and what to visit. Room are big enough and clean,  and there was everyday housekeeping. Reservation is needed to use the parking infront of the hotel.
This place is very good . Ne and my friend stay here and we have a good experience.  The rooms are New and very clear. Really a good hotel in the heart of Athens.  Thanks 😊

place_name: ATTIKI EVANS HOTEL - ΞΕΝΟΔΟΧΕΙΟ ΗΜΙΔΙΑΜΟΝΗΣ ΑΘΗΝΑ
review_text: Very friendly staff. Clean room in general.  But too hot. Had to turn on the ac to save ourselves from hell's gates! The handcuffs where fun, until my hubby started having trouble unlocking them. Overall, it was a fun experience.  The friendly staff deserves all the credits!

place_name: ATTIKI EVANS HOTEL - ΞΕΝΟΔΟΧΕΙΟ ΗΜΙΔΙΑΜΟΝΗΣ ΑΘΗΝΑ
review_text: Love has no limits ... in love in bed and in wine and dish tasting there are no rules simply dream explore choose your own experience and enjoy recommented ❤

place_name: ATTIKI EVANS HOTEL - ΞΕΝΟΔΟΧΕΙΟ ΗΜΙΔΙΑΜΟΝΗΣ ΑΘΗΝΑ
review_text: Hello I want to book my room with my wife and I on February 14 how much room rent one day

place_name: ATTIKI EVANS HOTEL - ΞΕΝΟΔΟΧΕΙΟ ΗΜΙΔΙΑΜΟΝΗΣ ΑΘΗΝΑ
review_text: Too expensive for my taste

place_name: ATTIKI EVANS HOTEL - ΞΕΝΟΔΟΧΕΙΟ ΗΜΙΔΙΑΜΟΝΗΣ ΑΘΗΝΑ
review_text: Super

Amazing convenience with cafes, small stores for our essentials. About 25 minutes walk to the heart of Athens where you can find Flea Markets, big fashion brands, the Acropolis & other Museums.

Good to travel with kids, quite place. Strong WIFI connection. No issues for Uber drivers pick ups!

Though it would be nice to have someone to clear our trash once we place it outside our rooms? Maybe. But overall great experience, good price & nice location, recommended for sure!

Apartments hotel, without a room service or a reception. Airbnb style. Very good and comfortable apartment with an equipped kitchen and with a balcony. A rooftop opened for all guests. The location is good and central with many restaurants and coffee shops. Good value for money in my opinion

I booked it after reading the good reviews, but unfortunately it was a GF bedroom and basement kitchenette and sofa ,
It was a bad experience , floor and walls very dirty as much as the bed covers , doors are not sound proofing especially during the arrive and exit of any guest.

Excellent 5 star stay!  The rooms are clean, well-kept and equipped (kettle, smart TV iron, microwave, air conditioning, heating plate, fridge, hair dryer).  Apartments close to the center, opposite there is a small grocery store, a few steps away there is a large AB store.  There is a terrace on the roof with a beautiful view.  The staff is very nice, understanding and helpful!

Pleasant, light room with basic amenities including kitchenette. Despite my room fronting the road, it was quiet…. even with window kept open.
Plenty of places for coffee and food dotted about the neighbourhood. Smallish supermarket 2 minutes up the hill. Amazing bakery 4mins in one direction for bread/sandwiches and amazing bakery 3 mins in another for delicious croissants +++
The neighbourhood has a lot of character.

The description of the room was misleading; we did not expect to stay on the basement level. On the plus side, the apartment is neat, nicely decorated, and well equipped. Also: there are lots of restaurants in the area and a park nearby. Depending where you want to be in Athens, be aware - this place is a long walk, almost an hour, from Acropolis and Monastiraki.

Very nice place to stay a few days in Athens. A few shops and nice restaurants around, close to bus 230 that takes you to Acropolis in 25’, 12’ walks from the metro line M2, 30’ walk from Panatheaic stadium… so pretty great place. Inside all is great and cosy, very modern and nicely maintained. Air conditioning was a must to have to take some rest! Our host nicely communicated when we had trouble with the automatic key entrance system. Perfect 👌

We stayed with Elliot for 4 days and 3 nights at the end of June and it was a WONDERFUL experience. First off, we arrived in Athens from a cruise ship early in the morning but the check-in time for Elliot was not until 3PM. We were worried that we would have to lug around a considerable amount of luggage for the morning so we reached out to see if there were any options (I.e. early check-in, luggage storage etc). The hotel was very responsive to our request and although they could not do early check-in, they did suggest that we could drop off our luggage at their sister hotel, The Modernist, and someone would tag and watch it for us as the Elliot does not have a concierge. This was a very good option for us and our experience with the staff at The Modernist was excellent (see my review for that hotel as well!!). Once check-in time arrived, it was smooth sailing as we were provided with all the passcodes to enter the building and the unit. The elevator took some getting used to but once we figured that out it was a pretty cool experience as well. The unit itself was well kept and spacious. All amenities were working as expected and the free cappuccino pods were a nice touch. Location of the hotel was excellent with many options around for food, drinks, coffee and most importantly, gelato!! There is also a supermarket nearby so we were able to purchase food and cook a meal or two ourselves, although the eating options nearby are just too good to miss!! This is a self-service hotel so there is no room service, room cleaning or concierge. This was preferable for us but for some this might be a drawback. Lastly, the area the hotel was located in was relatively quiet at night.There is a police station just a few streets away and we suspect that this is why it's so quiet as the officers seem to always be outside the police station, perhaps acting as a visual deterrent for anyone who might be up to no good!! This was a big plus for us as we are a family with young children who prefer quiet when they sleep.  We would definitely stay at the Elliot again if we were to go to Greece. Honestly, nothing bad to say about this place, even the price was very reasonable. Thanks again for your hospitality Elliot :)

I enjoyed my stay at Elliot so much that I extended it by a few nights! The apartment was clean and new with everything I needed for a comfortable stay.

The team is so friendly and helpful and offered some great suggestions for things to do in Athens.

The area has an edgy vibe with lots of great places to go out. I was able to walk to the centre and to sights.

I would be happy to return.

We stayed with my wife and baby two nights at Elliot and it was amazing, they provided everything we needed and more for our stay. Really cool place and perfect neighborhood. Will come back 100% next time we are in Athena.

Amazing hotel in Athens! Very luxurious rooms, rich breakfast, and amazing bathroom with multifunctional shower. Loved the rooftop terrace for breakfast. The neighbourhood has lots of great restaurants and bars to offer. We loved our stay there, highly recommended!

The breakfast was pretty standard, nothing special but decent enough to start the day. The staff were extremely friendly and accommodating, which made the stay more pleasant. I stayed in a ground floor room designed for two people, but I found it a bit cramped. The room was smaller than I expected, so it might be worth asking about room sizes when booking. On the plus side, they have a 24-hour reception, which is really convenient for any late check-ins or early departures.

Stayed 2 nights. Our room was fabulous and spacious with sofas in a separate area from the bedroom. Very well equipped and spotless. Staff were all very helpful and there is 24 hour reception.  Real fast is Ok. 15 minute walk down to the city centre (25 back up hill..) plenty of local bars and a few restaurants nearby. Great little hotel in a mainly residential area.

Great little boutique hotel. Close to city centre (15 minutes walk) and local public transports. The room was perfect for a family of four, with all the amenities you need. The reception staff was very kind and helpfull, giving us precious tips on where to eat and what to see in the surroundings. And the breakfast was very nice too!

Stayed in one of the two bedroom rooms - the hotel is beautiful, with a very nice breakfast service in the terrace. Everything is clean and looks new, and the hospitality from the staff is amazing.
Good location, though I would recommend getting transport from the airport, as the streets surrounding the hotel from the metro station are a bit uneven if you have wheeled suitcases. If you're bringing a backpack, you'll have no problems at all.

Great accommodation in one of the best districts of Athens. Super clean, it has everything you need. Whatever question we had, the owners/administration was replying very quickly. Nice bars, restaurants, coffee places around the area. Very close also to Lykavitos hill for walks and concerts there. Highly recommended!
We stayed for 2 nights and really loved the place. It was very clean, well-designed and in a good location. The check-in and check-out instructions were also clear.
This apartment is very nice, clean and quiet. I'd be happy to recommend it.
Thé apartment is lovely clean and tidy. Great location. Safe neighborhood with many shops, restaurants and coffee shops in walking distance.
Perfect place to stay. Beautiful furnishing with good taste and excellent location nearby the heart of town.

place_name: Urban & Modern Apartment in Exarcheia: City Vibes
review_text:
Great house, spotlessly clean, quiet..
A beautiful nest to rest, in an ideal location in Exarchia, to go out at night and return safe!
Ms. Ioanna we will see each other again soon, you took care of me as if you were family.

place_name: Urban & Modern Apartment in Exarcheia: City Vibes
review_text: Excellent, renovated, quiet, has everything one needs for a comfortable stay. Very friendly service, next to all public transport. I highly recommend it!!!

place_name: Urban & Modern Apartment in Exarcheia: City Vibes
review_text: Renovated apartment in the center of Athens, very clean comfortable for 4 guests near the Metro University, thank you Alexandra for everything!!
Nice surprise in the middle of athens

An extremely clean and new apartment. 2 bedrooms; It has two bathrooms and 2 televisions. It has a balcony. American cuisine is sufficient to meet the need. There is a refrigerator, dishwasher and washing machine. An apartment where you can find the comfort of your home.

The place is excellent, it has everything in very good taste and very well equipped, the place is beautiful, it has a very nice Sum on the roof, so if you must buy everything inherent to daily use, coffee, sugar, tea, etc., there is nearby two supermarket

This place is honestly so cute. Great library. Beautiful vintage furniture. Such friendly special guests and such a charming location.  Don't think, just book.  All hostels should be like this. Such a nice cafe down the road for aperitivo.

Nice location, very cute hostel & amazing staff!
Unfortunately if you are a hot sleeper- look elsewhere. The AC was to be adjusted by staff only and was mostly turned off during my time here, so we had to open a window during the night which let in many mosquitos! You also heard anyone in the courtyard on the phone throughout the night, luckily only one night someone stayed up late talking. Breakfast was small but a good way to start the morning! :)

Very clean accommodation with a big private room that I stayed in. Vintage and quirky decor, but the in the courtyard furniture is old. The armoire in the room had a musky smell. Good stay if you’re not a social solo traveler, everyone minds their own business, even the staff. Breakfast is free which is nice, but don’t expect anything great—it’s no frills. Situated in a neighbourhood where locals live and eat out, which I really liked. Away from the super crowded touristy areas (20 mins walk from Monistiraki and Plaka). A bus stop around the corner or a 13 mins walk to the nearest metro. Surrounded by tons of amenities (I needed a pharmacy and coffee shop). Great local restaurants and street foods all around it.

I was sent text with code while I was in flight so arriving in Athens I had no internet availability. Reservation had been made 2 weeks before. Cleaning lady does a fab job, she makes your bed each day even. Very nice. They have thought of having everything a person needs. About 45 min. Walk to center.

I only stayed here for a night but they let me check in early and assisted me with my bags. The accommodations are simple but very clean and they have a lovely back yard. Breakfast is free and they have complimentary coffee and tea available all day. Each bed had a light and plugs available and my room even had a small balcony! All the staff is kind and helpful and it was easy to walk to some great restaurants and tavernas nearby. Absolutely charming and I would stay here again.
Would totally recommend!

The apartment is exactly as in the photos, and better I would say. Its premises are spotlessly clean and it is new. The view from the balconies is excellent. Perfect choice for a couple, as it meets all the requirements for a romantic evening! I highly recommend it!
Immaculate home and hospitality. Recently renovated with lovely balconies and goddesses.Ideal for couples.Highly recommend.
Very nice apartment. Spotlessly clean, recently renovated and with awesome goddesses. I recommend it
Great apartment with a fantastic view! ❤️
Absolutely amazing and outstanding property. The property owners are very friendly and cooperative. Wonderful experience so far.
Excellent rooms with exceptionally warm and helpful hosts! 100% recommended!!
Best apartments and best hosts in town
Nice place but foos not really good, would not return again
Clean, cosy in a great position!

Location is very safe as it is very near the US Embassy in Athens, Greece. There's a grocery store, nice restaurants and walking distance to the main road where tour picks ups are done.  It is very safe to walk at night and early morning. The service is excellent as the gorgeous owner attended to all our needs. She was very helpful in everything. We were a family of four and our room was big enough for us 4. Place is very clean; room was cleaned everyday. Towels and toiletries are well provided for. I highly recommend this place because of its great location, excellent service and cleanliness. I will stay here again if I have another chance to visit Athens. I miss this place already.

Truly a gem of a hotel located near the U.S. Embassy in Athens. Hard to beat the value of this little boutique hotel and the amazing Valeriya who will assist you with anything you need. Rooms are clean, nicely appointed and are serviced as often as daily - your choice (many apartment hotels at this price point will only clean your room 1X per wk). Just a couple blocks from the metro and two metro stops from the center you are close enough to enjoy downtown, but far enough away for a break - which makes the Andromeda perfect for longer stays. While there isn’t laundry in the room, there is an excellent laundry mat about five blocks away and you can also have the hotel take care of it for an exceedingly reasonable price. Lots of cafes, bakeries and restaurants in the neighborhood - as well and several grocery stores. Again - you really can’t beat the value. Highly recommend!

Very cute place, large suite, very quiet and safe area. The apartment are quite nice decorated, it’s not a 5 Star award winning design, but for the budget absolutely fair and much better taste that I have seen in aother places in Greece. Very friendly stuff and excellent little fish restaurant around the corner. Good location

The stay was lovely, loved the breakfast and their fantastic staff (Valeria is the most gorgeous manager I ve met) . The place was  clean and beautiful!   Just 3 minutes walk to the subway. The hotel is surrounded by many good restaurants and bars! We really enjoyed the stay. Highly recommended!

The best place I've stopped in Athens ,nice apartment and comfort location. But the best thing about this hotel is the service. Valeria's general manager is always ready to resolve any issues and help.

Room is very spacious. Bed is a problem: if if you lean against the wall, the bed slides and creates gap at the back and youbcan fall. The wooden flooring was making too much noise. Staff was very helpful though. Not close to popular places. Taxi takes quite some time to reach.

I only stayed here for one night, but it was fine.

Pros:
- clean
- extremely kind front desk staff. I never encountered one that was less than accommodating!
- shower was warm and water pressure good
- rooms kept cool
- good, quiet breakfast. The selection was small, but enough!
- elevator. Small but I’m glad there was one!

Cons:
- beds not so comfortable. The sheets were horrible.
- not super close to much (walkably)
- no complimentary waters in the room
- phones don’t work, so I had to walk down to the front each time I needed something or asked a question

Overall, it was a fine experience, but I may try something new next time!

This is a real gem - the rooms are a good size, we had a room with a balcony and enjoyed watching the street scene below. The breakfast is great - the seating is a bit limited so you can sit at sofas in the lobby if there is no space. The wait staff clean tables quickly. The elevator is pretty small - if you are claustrophobic it would be hard to use the elevator. The front desk staff are incredible. They are so professional and helpful and resourceful. We were travelling with touring bicycles and they helped us organize a van shuttle to pick us up at the airport with our oversized bike bags. They also helped organize a van shuttle to get us out of Athens on start our bike tour on quieter roads. Everyone was great and we must mention Christine/Kristina for her exceptional care of us right from when we made our reservations to when we arrived.
Hotel is close to the city center.  There are restaurants in walking distance.  The front desk staff, Charles and Demetris was so helpful and pleasant to talk to.

I visit Embassy Hotel with my family,  at Christmas time, the location is perfect,  the breakfast tasteful and my children loved the cakes and pancakes.  Excellent and always smiling staff.  The hotel has beautiful view to the Lycabetus hill and Athens city. Nice restaurants at the area and the metro station only 3 minutes away. Quite and safe location.
Parking space available !!!!!
See you very soon ....Dimitri, John, Christina, Spiro, Anastasia..... and all the mates thank you for the wonderful services 😀

Rooms are very modern and the suite is very big and clean. Can’t fault any of this! One of the lights over the bath flickered. Balcony was large and great view over the city. Well stocked kitchen. However, if on the balcony the main road is busy and it’s still a 15-20 minute bus/taxi to central parts (eg Plaka/Acropolis/Zeus Statue etc)

We spent 1 night there and there are some areas to improve: 1) The sound proofing doesn’t work too well during the night so it’s a bit noisy with the traffic nearby (I think it’s a main road with quite many vehicles). 2) The bed sheet and towels had stains on it even though they were newly changed. Probably some persistent stains that were hard to wash off by laundry. It will be good if the cleaning staff can check this more carefully beforehand. 3) There is no reception which can be good and bad at the same time. One saves time for checking in and out. But on the other hand, it’s hard to get service during night. We couldn’t manage to get new towels and bed sheet in our case.

Some good points: 1) The location is good. You can find subway, cafes, supermarkets, etc quite nearby (walking distance). 2) The room is new and modern. Equipments are in mint conditions. 3) There is a chat service via which you can get immediate responses from the host.

Enjoyed staying here.

Super nice interior and beautiful view. Good communication with the host.

Nice location near the metro and restaurants.
Very nice and clean room. Great experience in the heart of Athens
It is a very nice place and very pleasant, very friendly and clean, I will definitely come again

Olive Villa Rentals was great from the first message I sent. Very quick to respond and very helpful in planning our journey. Also the ongoing support during our stay was fantastic and greatly appreciated. Highly professional and great experience.

The villa was amazing (Villa Bliss) and everything we hoped for with beautiful accommodation, well maintained property, sensational views and great amenities.

We rent a villa in Spetses every year, and villa Calisti is by far the best villa we have ever stayed on the island.

We spent a few days in July, and the villa is brand new, with amazing views and a big swimming pool (a rare find for Spetses).

The location is only a 5 min walk from Dapia, and the villa was super clean and spacious for our group (group of 10).

We made the booking through Olive Villa Rentals, and the service provided was outstanding.

I had the pleasure of staying at the wonderful Villa Marelia on the island of Spetses, and it was truly a great experience. The house is beautifully furnished and offers a fantastic seaview. The rooms are spacious, the beds are comfortable, and there’s air conditioning throughout the house, which was very refreshing given the warm temperatures.

On relaxing days, we spent a lot of time by the large pool, which had plenty of space for all my friends and me to lounge comfortably. The kitchen and living room are also tastefully designed, and cooking together was a lot of fun.

The host was extremely friendly and accommodating, and communication with her was smooth and easy.
From friends i know about an existing waterproblem on the island of Spetses, which made me worrying a bit. Nonethless i found out the the villa has a water tank for these circumstances. After all the water in the house worked flawlessly at all times.

The beaches on the island are stunning, with crystal-clear water perfect for swimming and relaxing. The culinary experiences on Spetses were also excellent. Overall, it was a fantastic holiday that I highly recommend and i can recommend everybody a stay at the Marelia villa. I will come again.

I recommend Olive Rentals without any reservation !  They were very present and effective at all stages: before, during and after our stay.  very very responsive, always.  Dimitris and Nantia did everything to make us happy and it was a perfect success. Great holidays in a very beautiful villa. I will deal again with Olive rentals !

Villa Delia near Panormos Bay was absolutely beautiful.  The terrace with seaviews all around was the highlight of our trip to Greece.  The house was in terrific shape and the owner was so friendly and welcoming, helping us whenever we needed it.  All the rooms have a sea view.  We loved being able to walk to Panormos for dinner.  Pyrgos, also close by, was our favorite town on Tinos.  The villa is very private and allows for plenty of relaxation if you want to enjoy the pool and outdoors. We would love to use Oliva Villa Rentals again.  Tinos was our favorite place during our recent trip to Greece.

To date I have communicated by phone 3 times with the team of Booking partners and especially Mr. George, Mrs. Melpomeni and a little while ago with Mr. Lefteris.
EXCELLENTLY TRAINED, SWEET, FRIENDLY, and most importantly willing to help as they did 100%.
Thanks guys, keep up the good work. I enjoyed every minute we talked. Have health.

Last month my daughter and I stayed at the hotel twice. In the first instance the room was small and had a foul smell on entering.
The next time we were put up in a better room. The staff at the reception was very helpful.
The break fast was excellent. Wonder why we need reservation for the pool even when no guests were in. Ofcourse the pool was very small.
Overall our stay was very good so thanks to the team. Appreciated eco-friendly water dispenser.

Located in a quiet neighborhood, this is a good, low-tier hotel. Rooms were clean and nicely decorated, but they did not appear 4-star. Right next to the hotel are a few shabby buildings that spoil the view. The staff were very warm and hospitable. However, the food needs improvement.

The front desk employees are phenomenal. Both men were very helpful & polite. Our family stayed there for 2 nights last week. The rooftop is beautiful! We were able to reserve the cabana and were treated like stars. The food and drinks were great. The rooms are comfortable but I don’t think we stayed in the updated rooms that are featured but we also checked in earlier and were accommodated. The linens for the bunk sofa bed were questionable. Overall, we were happy with our stay & our girls enjoyed their pool.

Stayed here for 4 nights and it was an enjoyable stay. Location was a little bit out from the main hub of Athens (about 3 stops on the very east to use subway). A day ticket was 4.10euros so pretty cheap to get around so didn’t really mind the location. Not a huge amount to see around the hotel although there are some very nice restaurants and a fantastic cake and ice cream shop close by which is open 24 hours!!

Room was pleasant and had recently been refurbished. Air con was good thankfully. I have read a few comments about the amazing breakfasts which I think was overstating it a little. Don’t get me wrong, the breakfast was good with a good variety but I’m not sure I would say it was amazing so don’t get too excited.

A great feature of this hotel was the rooftop bar which has a small pool and a beach theme with loungers, cabanas and actual sand. It was great to have a day off from walking the city and relax. Again, I have read a couple of negative comments about having to pay for the use which isn’t quite correct. You are requested to spend a minimum amount at the pool bar which starts at 25euros which I don’t think is unreasonable.

The staff were all excellent and very welcoming. If I was staying in Athens again, I would definitely stay here again.

Quality breakfast and nice breakfast area, great rooftop pool although a bit unclear whether hotel guests can freely use it because its based on "reservations" while nobody turns up for them. Friendly staff. Value for money, book direct from hotel site, it was cheaper. Felt like a safe area and quiet location, 10 min walk from subway stations.

Lovely house and staff! The atmosphere is quiet and out of the way of the centre (45 min walk or 15 min bus ride). The place is clean and modern. The kitchen & common room is in the basement and you can reach it by elevator, floor -1!

The concert hall and national gallery are close by. The staff can be reached by texting, calling and email didn’t work so well. It could be clearer that it’s a self-check in without reception. The bathrooms are nice and clean, but we could use more hooks to hang towels and clothes. The AC was very cold because a guest changed it so a good solution would be that the hostel controls the AC and takes the remote, maybe.

The hostel is new but it was a nice stay, if they make their description clearer and add a few more things to the bathrooms it will be very good.

We were a group of 14 people and had the pleasure of staying at Hostel Hostelista. I can say with great enthusiasm that this hostel is also perfect for large groups!

The homely atmosphere of the hostel created a warm and welcoming environment where each one of us felt immediately comfortable. Stella, the warm-hearted manager of the hostel, personally took care of us and made sure that our needs and concerns were well taken care of.

The accommodations were spacious, clean, and comfortable, which was crucial for a group of our size. There was a fantastic common area where we all gathered, chatted, and cooked together.

Hostelista was definitely the perfect starting point to explore Athens. Its location was central and well-connected, making it easy for us to reach the major sights and attractions.

Our group had an unforgettable time at Hostel Hostelista, and we owe it all to Stella and her dedicated team. We can't wait to come back and experience another amazing time.

Thank you, Hostelista, for making our stay so special! We highly recommend you to everyone traveling to Athens, especially larger groups looking for a warm and inviting environment. You are simply the best!

This hostel was such a refreshing stay during our euro travels. Stelios, the guy who seems to be in charge, does a great job in giving this place a welcoming friendly vibe. everything we could have picked a problem about was fixed before our eyes or has people scheduled to instal things - as i believe this is a relatively new or newly renovated place. location is 10/10 we caught the bus from the airport to the main street not even a 5 min walk away. The best place for pitas right across the road and anything else you need almost at your doorstep. i would definitely say don’t hesitate to book this place!

This hostel made me change my mind about this type of establishments.

Nice and clean, with a great location in one of the safest areas in Athens due to its proximity to American embassy.

The hostel is located in a stylish mid-century Athenian building nicely and accurately restored!

Both the owners and the staff are so friendly and helpful and make you feel ease and comfortable.
I had a great stay and Stella who is managing the place is the best host ever!

Pros: great, safe location. Easy to walk to metro stations, local grocery stores, and a million restaurants and bars. Quiet, even at night on a weekend. Safe. Had laundry service. Had bottled water for purchase (.50), and tap was cold and safe too. Hostel manager very responsive. Housekeeping was very kind. Clean rooms, bathrooms, common areas, and fridge. Wifi was good and consistent. Easy entry with codes instead of keys or cards.

Cons: No community vibes. No consistent hot water for showers. Was walked in on private room.

I have use this hotel many times for business.

Old fashioned rooms, quite small.
Toilet has always a bad smell from drains and there is absolutely no soundproofing. You hear the lift working and your neighbours, coughing, speaking and whatever. Even window panes has no soundproof so the big road which is in front of hotel, is behind your ear, waking you up if you sleep like a bird.

I’m looking forward not to staying here again

The hotel is pretty spacious, very very lovely and friendly and efficient staff. Food is very good even though hotel food is not always good. The rooms are good , bathrooms big and clean. It was very pleased to stay here for two weeks. Definitely a 10/10

This was my first time at this hotel and the front desk was very helpful. The service for the gentleman and for the lady who worked at noon was particularly worthwhile. Food very amazing and very tasteful the lady there was very kind and also for the room service also breakfast was amazing, A little bit that bothers me to put 4 stars because you can hear the wall next to you when the other person is talking and put some music and loud tv.

Nice hotel placed in a good area. The room was ok, a small bathroom with a small shower cabin. The main problem is the very thin walls. I heard the neighbors snoring, using the bathroom, talking on the phone. Breakfast was very good. The employees are nice to guests.

The week that we stayed there has left great memories. Spoke fluent English which was a bonus for us. Magnificent breakfasts with specialty dishes. Very positive staff who were always happy and helpful.

I went to Athens for a work event with colleagues, 6 adults and one teenager. Even though we had prepaid our rooms for 5 days, from the start they didn’t want to give us the rooms we paid for (2 rooms and one apartment), they blatantly told us that 4 people will need to share one (normal sized) bed. We managed to sort this out (?! We had already paid for everything!) after more calls. After 2 days the maid barged in over my colleague, staying at c2, at 9 in the morning, when she was getting out of the shower in a towel! She started shouting to leave the room in that instant, obviously my colleague refused, then 2 more guys come screaming to get out now. They gave her 5 minutes to gather her things and then asked her to wait until 3 pm to get another room to move in… of course she tried to argue, but they were acting like she was the problem. Very nasty experience. Rooms are small, one toilet was wobbly, one apartment smelled like mold, staff is rude. Breakfast is not worth paying for.

We had a great experience. For our first time in Greece. The first day (Friday), we met the ladies. They were so helpful with food suggestions as we had a long flight and needed something quick. The breakfast we received was rolls, pastry, coffee, juice, and boiled eggs. We did not expect an American breakfast as we weren't in America.  The next day, we met Demetri, and he is exactly as described in other reviews. He helped us plan our day in the city and help us with the train. The location has plenty of really good places to eat if you're willing to walk 6-10 mins. Or stick close and go to the spot on the corner (pictures) they have excellent gyros, salads, and platters. Will be staying again.

Our stay at the hotel was terrible. The blackout curtain was broken and held up by tape. When my wife tried to pull it, it fell and almost hit her. We asked to move to another room, but the staff said they were fully booked. Instead, she just tried to prop it up and promised it would be fixed the next day – though that didn’t matter since we were only staying one night. To make things worse, she even asked us to leave a good review!

The shower was also leaking from the top, and the shower gel dispenser didn’t work, forcing us to use shampoo instead. The bed made annoying noises, and the air conditioner was directed right at the bed, blasting cold air in our faces. Turning it off made the room unbearably hot. Overall, it was a very unpleasant experience.

The apartment was cleaned sloppily, and even the covers of the couch were not cleaned. The apartment needs renovation. Most importantly, the photos on Booking.com did not accurately represent the apartment. The business owner should upload realistic photos of each room. We were expecting something different from what we found. The only positive aspect was the location/neighborhood. Otherwise, it was very disappointing.

Great modern boutique hotel on good bus and metro routes. Handy for shops,  restaurants, bars and cafes. It was recommended by my cousin. Room was lovely, clean and comfortable. He can order any food in. It is fairly close to the centre if you like walking. We were only there for 2 nights and as it was reasonably priced and had everything we needed, we would go back again.
Clean and spacious apartment, with all amenities.

The accommodation is perfect, I visited it with my family and we were completely satisfied.
Fairly clean space and with all amenities.
Also the owners are absolutely friendly and easy to understand.
I highly recommend it!!

A nice place for a short stay un Athens. The manager is very friendly, the location is close to The Athena Towers. It is obvious that the owner is doing every thing to make you feel comfortable: tea, cofee and sugar is offered from the house. After I made the booking the manager emailed me and he was at the agreed time at the location to hand me the keys. Very eager to see us pleased with our stay.
Good location! The apartment you can find everything like home. Fully equipped kitchen. Very kind host. Sure we will visit again.
Just perfect... great
Great

A doll house with all the comforts, very clean and neat, everything you need to relax and rest in a very good location. We felt like our home ... also the owner is extremely kind and discreet ... of course we would go again!!!!
Great place to stay

The house is very comfortable, spotlessly clean and renovated. Organized, everything you need was there, from electrical appliances to towels. Would definitely recommend!!
The only negative I could say is that you can't find parking easily. However, I was very satisfied and would definitely prefer it again.
Excellent service, spotlessly clean apartment with all amenities. Ok, the floor creaked a bit, but given the area, no big deal. I would prefer it again without a second thought.

Everything perfect! Thank you
Comfortable, even though we were a family of 5, spotlessly clean, tastefully renovated. Very good quality clothing.
Everything is fine! We will recommend it but we will also come again.
Some detail that would improve the stay would be some wall hangers or monks to hang clothes and jackets

Our experience at the venue exceeded our expectations
It covered our needs for the People's Hospital
And the Children's next door
Welcoming, clean, comfortable, functional, bright
I would also choose it for a multi-day stay

I strongly recommend this real estate agency with a professional team who, with their knowledge of the market, offer in a friendly environment their valuable informations and guidance to obtain the goal every customer is willing to reach.

Theodoris is very efficient, professional and gives great advice. He responds to queries promptly and with great care given to detail. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend Buy2Greece to anyone,as it offers excellent services and has such knowledgeable and reliable members of staff.
Giannis and Thodoris were great! I found my apartment fast and they help me out with everything. They are highly recommend.

A truly professional team that go above and beyond the call of duty to make each transaction problem free and successful.
Thank You Theodoris and Team

We used Buy2Greece to lease a house. The service was super quick, everyone was beyond nice and explained every question we had in english. They even helped us settle the electricity documents. We are very happy with them and we will use their services again.
very beautiful, with very friendly and helpful staff!

place_name: M & M in the city Athens- boutique apartments
review_text: I had an amazing stay at this apartment! The location was perfect, close to everything I needed, and the neighborhood was quiet and safe. The apartment itself was spotless, well-decorated, and had all the amenities I could ask for. The host was incredibly responsive and helpful throughout my stay. The comfortable bed and beautiful view were definite highlights. I would absolutely stay here again and recommend it to anyone looking for a fantastic place to stay!

place_name: M & M in the city Athens- boutique apartments
review_text: I had an amazing stay at this beautiful apartment on Alkimynis 111! The space was spotless, stylish, and had all the amenities I needed for a comfortable stay. The location was fantastic—close enough to the main attractions but still in a quiet and charming neighborhood. The host was incredibly helpful and responsive, making sure I had everything I needed. I truly felt at home and would definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting Athens. Can’t wait to come back!

place_name: M & M in the city Athens- boutique apartments
review_text:
Took my gf to a once in her life time experience in Greece with me. I avoided the cheesy big hotels and this was exactly what I was looking for:
Attentive and knowledgeable staff. Location was brilliant. Apartment standards were high
And I doubt you can get a similar exclusivity level for the price bracket.
All in all we had a marvellous time, highly recommended!

place_name: M & M in the city Athens- boutique apartments
review_text:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at this wonderful apartment just steps away from the beach, and it was truly an unforgettable experience. The location is unbeatable — you are literally a stone's throw from the sand, which made it incredibly convenient to enjoy the beach whenever we wanted.
The area around the apartment is filled with beautiful cafes, perfect for enjoying a morning coffee or evening meal.

place_name: M & M in the city Athens- boutique apartments
review_text:
I visited Athens and had such a wonderful time. To complete my perfect visit was the stay at M & M. The perfect place, walking distance from all the major attractions or just one or two stations by the near by Metro station.
The pleasant room is well equipped and the hot tub on the roof is just amazing.
Highly recommended.

I needed a one night stay.  Booked hotel and was able to get room.  Thought new hotel would be great.  However the room was so hot and humid and still struggling to cool it down after an hour.  The worst part was when you pull back the sheets and two very large COCKROACHES jump out!   Checked in at 8 and left by 11:30! Contacted management and he refused to give a refund.  He just wanted to give a different room.  That was not acceptable.  They denied they have a bug problem, but if this was on the 3rd floor, I can only imagine what was on the lower floors!  If you don’t mind COCKROACHES, then it’s the place for you!

This place was cute and accommodated our group well. They are definitely new -- no breakfast provided yet, and there was a weird moment where the concierge wasn't sure they'd have an extra pillow for me (they did end up having them!) but it was fine. The area is on the edge of sketchy area - min a 15-20 min walk from the area where you'd probably go for dinner or from any of the sights. It wasn't bad for us but if you're hoping to be in the middle of everything, then try another spot.

a fairly new and quite modern 'hotel' or guest house, located about 50 minutes (by cab) from the airport, but being close to the metro line (4 min to Kerameikos station) makes it a convenient location to stay at.

rooms are spacious (we had the superior double with balcony & city view), bed comfortable, and the bathroom well equipped. there's no safe in the room unfortunately, and just an open wardrobe area.

maintenance and cleaning is ok, although we had some issues with clogging of the drains under the shower which caused some flooding.

the open shower concept is absolutely nonsensical as there's water everywhere, leading to unnecessary waste of towels.

overall, a decent option for 2-3 night stay.

Upon arrival we were greeted by a friendly staff member who explained everything to us. The suites are very spacious and nicely designed with a good eye for color, they feel bright, modern and livable. The hotel is very new, so there is a little but of construction going on, but it’s not noticeable in the room. Everything is perfectly clean, and the room has all equipment one expects. Good bars and restaurants as well as the train station are just within walking distance, you can see the Acropolis from the side streets. Just a perfectly pleasant location. Will come back next time!

The rooms are really modern and are equipped with all requirements one needs. The AC unit is really good and behind the apartments one can find the metro station. Also there is no issue with food as there are quite a few restaurants around, there is also a shop that is open all through the night selling food. I arrived at 1am and it was not an issue they gave me access to the door which I really liked and it was really easy to use.

Very convenient location.
Even you can find free parking around.
Apartment is very modern, clean and well maintained, equipped with small kitchen.
Downside there is no microwave owen, which would be nice to have, and if your windows are looking backside, clubs sound might be disturb you.
Acropolis is 30-40 min by walk.
Metro is 2 minutes.

I recently stayed at Athenian Spirit in Gazi, Athens, right next to the metro station and it was absolutely amazing! The minimalist design and chic style impressed me from the moment I arrived. Everything was spotlessly clean and the sense of hospitality was exceptional. The service from the reception was outstanding, always ready to assist with a smile. The views from the terrace were stunning, adding an extra touch of magic to my stay.

Athenian Spirit feels like a small house, complete with a kitchen, dishes and a sink, making it perfect for longer stays. The rates are great and you have access to everything, with the metro just 32 seconds away on foot. This hotel is the perfect choice for anyone visiting Athens and looking to enjoy their stay in a modern and convenient location. I highly recommend it to everyone!
Perfect location. The room was spacious and very clean. The staff very helpful. There are a lot of coffee shops,bars and restaurants around and the metro station is a 4 min walk from there.
Great place to stay, and yes whilst the nightclubs are loud on normal nights it is very quiet. Close to the station which makes getting around very easy, highly recommend
Very nice room, clean. Cleaning only once every three days. Had to ask for clean towels and coffee. Location is nice close to restaurants and metro-station
Friendly stuff, beautiful rooms and all new. There is one thing, during weekends it’s difficult to sleep, because of the bars and clubs nearby. Earplugs helps me.

Excellent apartment in a modern and secure residence. Rarely seen such a well-equipped apartment. Very clean and functional, close to the metro, 15-20 minutes walk from places of interest in the city center. Very friendly owner/manager. In short, great experience, I highly recommend for your stay in Athens.

Amazing apartment!. With everything in it really. Well maintained, brand new, spotless. The hosts are welcoming and kind.
I recommend it without a second thought!

Fantastic place, absolutely loved it here, it's spotless and you have everything you need (toiletries, hair dryer, iron, ear plugs, towelling robes etc......).  I would definitely recommend the place for anyone that wants to visit Greece.  It's very central to everything, and a direct line from the airport.  Fabulous place to stay.

We spent an awesome time in Athens at the Iris Management Penthouse Condo.  It's located in an excellent location,  with restaurants and bars nearby as is the metro - just two blocks away.  The condo is a beautifully furnished penthouse with a view of the Acropolis from the balcony.  The condo owners are very helpful, informative and were a great source for recommendations.  We will definitely stay here again on our next visit to Athens.  Thank you Iris Management!!!

A perfect place.  Close to metro  and easy to get to all the tourist spots.  In a safe neighbourhood and close to great restaurants.  Place was very clean and beautiful.  Outdoor space was great to relax and enjoy a drink in the evening.  The hosts were great,  very responsive prior to and during our stay.

We had an absolutely amazing stay at the Iris House. The hosts were especially proactive and helped us nicely navigate what was our first visit to Greece. We had a few challenges with flight delays and having such attentive hosts to promptly answer any questions and offer guidance helped make our stay wonderful and most memorable. We will certainly be back again.

Do not book.

Jeff is unethical and will accuse you of causing damages to the Airbnb.

Do not ruin your vacation by booking this Airbnb.

Edit: please see below the “damage” we were falsely accused of. Again, do not book.

I had an amazing stay at Plexi Space in Athens! From the moment I arrived, the staff was super friendly and welcoming. Big thanks to Helena and everyone else who made my stay so great.

The hotel’s rooftop is awesome, with a nice pool and views. My room was just the perfect size, really comfy, and quiet, with modern decor that made it feel nice and cozy. The bed and pillows were so comfy too!

Location-wise, it’s perfect. All the main attractions are super close, whether you're into exploring the history or just soaking in the local vibes. Lots of cafes and restaurants. Everything is just a short walk or drive away.

Honestly, I had such a great time staying here and would totally recommend it to anyone visiting Athens. If you're looking for comfort, modern touches, and killer views, this is the spot!

Absolutely loved Plexi Space! So clean and modern and beautiful. The rooftop pool was stunning. Views and sunset of there were great, and even a tiny view of the Acropolis.
Host was gracious enough to check us in late (1900) and in the morning helped up schedule a very early morning taxi for the next day.
Comfortable bed, beautiful furnishings, and decor. I'll definitely be back when in Athens next!

We had a fabulous time staying here for my wife's 60th birthday trip. Fantastic room with walk through shower, comfortable bed and spotlessly clean.
Elena the Manageress was wonderful and us a real Gem. Pool on the roof is a godsend when it roasting outside. Highly recommended!!
Thanks Elena for making our stay so wonderful. Mark and Jo x

I stayed 5 nights at this Plexi space from 24 may to 28 May 2024! This is one of the best accomodations i have ever stayed in Europe! Great value for money, the building amd art deco is very tastefully done. The room is 5 star quality, place smells great from the moment you enter. The ceilings are high and its super spacious and so new! Never disapoints. Everything about this accomodation is fantastic. The hosts take great care of you, especially Elena Natsiopoulou, she is amazing and so is George. They checked in with me, and asked if i needed anything at all for my stay. Very family like, and so caring amd kind. I arrived early but they managed to get me the room by noon, room was spic and span! It was like W hotel! I was so happy i made this choice to stay here! Fantastic hosts, fantastic stay and i will always choose Plexispace if i go back to Athens! Thank you so so much ❤️🙏🏼
Great hotel, free parking, pool that you can do lapse in and extremely quiet place. Right behind it a great square with a lot of action.

LUXURY, at a great value & locally centralized to the entire dining and nightlife that Athens hast to offer!
They rolled out the red carpet for me; airport pickup, dining & nightlife recommendations, Takis (my new friend) greeted me, helped w luggage, and walked me through the high end details of this gorgeous penthouse!

Panoramic views, retractable sky dome and a terrace like you wouldn’t believe 🤩

This is one of those MUST stay places in Athens.
Extremely friendly and professional, I highly recommend them. (Treated me like familia)

i would like to share the poor experience i had with owner of this prpertie, i was supose to visit athens in nov 19 due to locjkdowns , had to postpone and owner insist on cancelation payment, i postponed and again face lockdown, this time when i postponed from januar to february 2020 , owner demanded suplement as high season, i was eager to come to athens and i will do it soon, finally i canceled the reservation owner charged me 50% almost 200 euros, in this times this is not a way to behave.

Excellent!
I would highly recommend it!

Gazi Hostel was one of the best hostels I’ve ever stayed at. George, the owner, really helped me feel at home and well looked after!
Conveniently located a 6 min walk from the train station with heaps of food places around. Very central.
There are 11 beds spread out over the whole space and I felt like I had heaps of room and it was very quiet.

The place was immaculately clean, beautiful modern bathroom with beautiful tiles. Little kitchenette and outside area made it feel cosy and a lovely quiet environment to come back to after a long day of sightseeing. I definitely can’t wait to come back to Athens and will be booking my stay at Gazi if I can!

Gazi hostel was very good. The owners and worker is very laid back. It's a nice place to meet other travellers. And the water is hot, wifi is good and there's free coffee every morning . Also the bed is comfortable. It's in a great location next to good restaurants, and the metro station. I walked to the Acropolis from there
Definitely worth the stay. Thanks guys
The staff is very friendly and smiling.

+ I really appreciate the pro and friendly support of the staff, moreover they were always prompt to answer my questions.
+ the flat itself is outstanding, most of all the studio with yellow bricks.
+ very well equipped flat with any kind of electronic appliance.

- this area is very quiet by day, almost "dead quiet", but people start to hang around at 8pm, and in the weekends their are still around till 6am! There are a couple of bars downstair with drunk guys shouting loudly, "gentlemen" that need to make noise with their car / motorbike to get noticed, others that are content to blast "music" very loud with car or portable speakers. Forget to sleep even with ear-plugs.
- internet speed is barely enough for video conferences.
Good value for money and good size apartment. There area is quite loud at night. A lot of clubs in the area.

A very nice apartment in the heart of Athens. A great welcome from Elena who knows how to receive and give you all the information. Nice location next to Gazi and metro station. The only small downside is occasionally the noise from the street.
Nice apartment. Well located. The welcome is perfect. Impeccably clean. I recommend. Thank you 🙏
