Realizing my mistake right after we had hung up, I sent them a message saying I‘ll actually arrive around midnight (I didn‘t see that check-in time was until 11pm according to booking, but then again I actually expected a reception because I filtered by hotels on the app and the place clearly has the word hotel in its name). No answer the entire day. I wrote another message in the evening, no answer. When I arrived at the place shortly before midnight and there was nobody there, I called 12 (!) times without any answer. After a couple of minutes, I received a message saying I should look for another accommodation because this one is cancelled since I arrived outside check-in times. They ignored me the entire day knowing that I said I would arrive outside check-in time and cancelled my stay once I arrived - this is not how you treat your guests, my friends.

We had a bad experience at K8 Athens. The place itself is meager in terms of amenities. Not  clean. Doesn't look like pictures on listing. We had some of belonging stolen and the property made no effort to reimburse us. Look elsewhere if you are staying in Athens. Would never, ever stay here again.

place_name: Renovated 2BD house close to Pireus port
review_text:
Our experience of this particular apartment and its overall picture has been posted on Booking:

https://www.booking.com/hotel/gr/renovated-2bd-house-close-to-pireus-port.el.html?sid=bac64b74e525d375beb5cbdfd4b8b815&room1=A%2CA&sb_price_type=total&dist=0&aid=397594&type=total&logged_out=1&label= gog235jc-1DCAEoggI46AdIM1gDaHGIAQGYAQi4ARfIAQzYAQPoAQGIAgGoAgO4AvGIlJ8GwAIB0gIkOThlYTk2ODYtNjI4Yy00ZmY3LWEyMzEtZGYxZjA4Yjc2NjRj2AIE4AIB#tab-mai

# Something important: All reviews, positive and negative, must be welcomed and taken into account, with respect to each person, aiming at self-improvement! You want the guest-customer on your side and not against you.
In closing, a general advice for all of us: Pay attention to 'what' we write and 'how' we write it because even the written word proves our real identity!

place_name: Renovated 2BD house close to Pireus port
review_text:
Very good school.. excellent teachers
Mrs. Litsa and Mrs. Alexandra in the nursery are excellent!!!

place_name: Renovated 2BD house close to Pireus port
review_text: Very good and beautiful apartment. It's perfect.

place_name: Renovated 2BD house close to Pireus port
review_text: The best B&B in the area
Superb majestic but above all It is its history that induces the feeling of owe!
One of the best places to live in Athens!!
Strategic location, next to two ISAP stations...Hospitable residents!!
Imposing Mansion with a rich history!
An excellent option to stay in Athens with a central location which is quiet and also not far from the main touristic area. And Efi the landlady is such a darling and very helpful and reliable.

We got here for our honeymoon!🌹

Do not miss the breakfast  here!
The Greek breakfast platters by Helen are outstanding! It has a homemade touch to it.
The rooms are beautiful cozy and with automatic curtains and light controls.
Really unique stay!
The staff are really sweet and friendly
And helpful.Great vibes!!

They also have some cute free tea samples and sweets by the bar counter.
The pool was right outside our room however to cold to take the plunge, but very tempting.
🥂

Amazing.

Well surpassed my expectations. I was a bit skeptical due to other reviews complaining about the location. It ended up being the perfect oasis to go escape after busy day exploring the city.

The metro station is steps away and you are only one stop from the Monastiraki neighborhood.

The staff were beyond hospitable and everyone was so nice and accommodating. One day we were heading out early to The Acropolis so since we were going to miss breakfast they made us delicious sandwiches to go! The next day we did get to try the breakfast and it was amazing. Beautiful platter and eggs to order.

The courtyard is dreamy and the pool refreshing.

The rooms are amazing and well stocked with water, coffee and craft soaps.

Thank you NOT! Made our stay unforgivable.

We a great stay at Not Hotel Athen!

Perfect for a short stay to visit the city, close to everything, great atmosphere and the rooms are amazing. The hotel itself has been renovated with great industrial vibes while respecting the initial structure.

Rooms are large, with everything you need (fresh water being setup every day).

Staff is very friendly - maybe too much for the bar staff- and always happy to help. We had a small issue with our bathroom at the beginning of the stay, they fixed it in few minutes. Very proactive and professional staff.

Small disappointment regarding the bar/restaurant menu, it is quite expensive given what can be found around (glass of wine 10€ and coke 4,5€). Regarding breakfast, it’s very good if you stay for two days, then it lacks of diversity and we did not even take the last one after 5 days.

Very surprised at the negative comments regarding the location, it’s outside of the craziness of Athens, while being short walking distance.

5* well deserved.

I recently stayed at Not Hotel in Athens, and we were blown away by the experience. Every single detail of the hotel felt so authentic, giving it a unique charm that you don't find often.

The staff were incredibly kind and helpful, always there with a warm smile and ready to assist with anything we needed. Their hospitality made our stay even more enjoyable.

Our suite was absolutely wonderful – cozy, elegant, and just perfect for relaxing after a day of exploring Athens. We had a balcony that overlooked the pool, providing a serene and picturesque view that we loved. The authenticity of the hotel is evident in every aspect: the stone and wood used throughout, the well-thought-out amenities, the structure of the buildings, the charming windows, the stylish refrigerators, and the comfortable beds. It's not an ordinary hotel; it's something special. During our stay, we and other guests we didn’t know felt like one big family, which added a warm and welcoming touch to the experience.

The food at Not Hotel was another highlight. Every meal was a delightful journey through authentic local flavors, making our stay even more memorable.

Additionally, the hotel is located in a safe area and is within walking distance (15 minutes) of many key attractions, making it a convenient base for exploring the city.

We highly recommend this hotel to anyone who appreciates an authentic hotel experience.

Amazing hotel full of unique and thoughtful details. The hotel is in a great location and it's easy to walk to many places in the centre of Athens, yet the courtyard offers a luxurious and peaceful oasis away from the hustle and bustle. The room was comfortable and felt like it was individually designed for us. The food was also lovely and they offer fantastic vegan options.

All of the staff are friendly and attentive, and went the extra mile for us to make sure we had the perfect experience (thanks again for helping us make our flight to Kefalonia!).

The apartment is located at the famous area of Gkazi with many restaurants and bars. 10 min walking from acropolis/parthenon and 3 min walking from Metaxourgio subway station. Very vice design, very clean and the owner is very friendly.

This apartment is perfect for a solo traveler. The place gets almost completely blackout dark, even during the day. It's perfect for someone who needs to reset their jetlag.
It's in a busy area full of bars, so be ready for noises all night, but it's a part of its charm.
The hosts are amazing!
Amazing loft! Great experience and superb hosts. 10/10!
Modern flat, close to city center, clean, with all the utilities. This apartment has everything necessary to make your stay as comfortable as posibile. I recommend this place.
Very, very nice and convenient And always fantastic service, recommend it! I’m back again in April!!! Excellent 😎

Be aware, this is not a regular hotel, it is aimed at a particular clientele, if you want to sleep in a strip club or a brothel (literally) this is for you. It is not an adult “themed” hotel for a bit of a uniqueness or difference, it’s exactly for the purpose it appears. Just so you know.

Excellent hotel. Highly recommend for any couples who want to relax in a cozy place. There's very nice air conditioning, wonderful staff, and the room was very good, with an excellent breakfast every single day.

We have requested prior to booking that the room be deep cleaned, as the hotel allows smoking at the rooms. They've done an excellent job and we have not noticed any foul smell. Our room was honestly more than what we wanted, and it was excellent.

The view of the city from our floor was also very nice, and we enjoyed the landscape.

Only gripe I have is that not all the staff understand English to the fullest extent, which can lead to some awkward interactions and miscommunications. While not a big deal for the most part, try speaking clearly and with separated words for the best experience (in English).

Location is excellent and a 6 minute walk from the metro station. Only issue I personally had is that in Athens pedestrians are not the priority, so exercise caution crossing the road to the metro.
Great stay! The service from the staff was fantastic, always checking in to make sure everything was fine and aiming to make sure the stay was fantastic.
Nice hotel at the center of Athens!! Perfect for private times and amazing themed rooms!! 100% recommend.

Clean and cosy rooms, staff really nice and helpful . Great hotel for not exeggerated price.
Location also wonderful, nearby you can find good cafeteria and restaurants with delicious food. City square is located about 1.5 km on foot from this place.

Great apartment, spotlessly clean, great host!
Recommended!

It was the best hostel I've ever stayed at. Although there are still some parts of the building that need to be fixed, but I liked the design and the lovely-style building. The dome where I stayed was completely private and comfortable. The owner and staff are very kind and helpful. I was very happy to stay there :)
thanks a lot!!

I booked a double room through Booking.com, but the experience was extremely disappointing. The room was incredibly small, with barely enough space to move around. We had two backpacks, and the only place to put them was on the floor as there was no other available storage. The soundproofing was terrible—you could clearly hear conversations from the room next door, which made it difficult to rest. The kitchen wasn’t even in the same building; we had to walk over to a neighboring hotel just to use it. To make matters worse, the provided hairdryer was broken. The hotel itself was hard to recognize from the outside, as the exterior didn’t look like a typical hotel at all, and the surrounding area felt desolate, with people asking for money nearby.

After leaving a negative review on Booking.com, the hotel falsely claimed we didn’t show up for our reservation and charged us a no-show fee. This is highly dishonest, and I wouldn’t recommend staying here to anyone.

This was an amazing place to stay for my son and his friend in the last two nights of their inter rail tour across Europe. Everything was perfect and the staff were exceptional. The place is so well done and the facilities are closer to a boutique hotel than a hostel. Highly recommend and hope they will be back next summer!🙌
Best Value for Money hostel in Athens. Stylish and cozy. Friendly staff and great location. Easy 10/10!

Best experience !
The staff was lovely and the manager of the hostel was very professional 😌

A very stylish hostel in Athens. The spacious kitchen and terrace with a jacuzzi were amazing. It's within walking distance to the main tourist sites. Good air conditioned, quiet and perfect for resting during the day as Athens gets very hot in the summer. I had a very comfortable stay. I appreciate the kindly & friendly staff !!

This is one of the worst hostel experiences i have ever been part of. Do not get into the Hot Tub, whirlpool, jacuzzi here. It is so gross. I put some videos of the hot tub here after the owner cleaned the hot tub the previous day. There was no way i would ever get into this tub look how gross it is. The 2 guys that run this operation have the worst customer service i have ever seen. They will accuse you of things you didn’t do. The best decision i made was leaving this place it’s a dump.

i enjoyed my stay at pink mango, the hosts are very friendly and welcoming. They are always helpful if you have any concerns or wishes.
Both hosts are communicative and try to connect you with other guests, especially if you’re traveling alone. Together we went out partying and i grew really close with them even over just a few days.
The area around the hostel might not considered one of the best, but it has lots of potential since there are lots of hidden gems around such as vegan restaurants and great cafes. All sightseeing spots are in walking distance. Overall a great experience. 10/10 would recommend!

An amazing stay! I can fully recommend staying at Pink Mango – it is a small hostel with three floors and a rooftop terrace. It’s very conveniently located in walking distance from the centre of Athens. The best part were the people. The guests and the hosts were very nice and welcoming. I feel like there couldn’t have been a better place for me to stay! I have the best memories and I miss Athens and all the people I met there 🥹🤲🥭💖

The host team is super generous, responsible, professional, and easygoing. Modern facilities, stable WiFi, well-equipped kitchen, rooftop jacuzzi, warm and friendly environment, and cool people. The host team try their best to create a safe and relaxing atmosphere for guests, especially for girls. I made many friends in the hostel. When I have to leave, I feel sad as I want to stay longer. Because of this lovely hostel, I had wonderful memories of Athens.

My partner and I stayed 3 nights at the hotel and took a standard room.  The room was large and the bathroom was spacious.  The room and the hotel are very clean.  The hotel is in an excellent location, a 10-minute walk to Monstraki Square.  The breakfast is good, provides exactly what is needed.  There is also a restaurant on the roof of the hotel but we did not eat there.  The service of the hotel employees is simply amazing.  From the very beginning when we arrived how they welcomed us and took our things to the room, and during the days they gave recommendations.  Really amazing and wholehearted service.  Amazing hotel at a very affordable price.

Amazing hotel, great service they helped us with everything we needed to know about the city, they took our bags and gave us great wine, u feel more then just welcomed when you enter the hotel and the guys in the reception where the nicest i’ve seen in a hotel ever. the rooms are amazing with huge bed and bathroom, great breakfast. Worth the price for 100% amazing price for what we got and we will come back here for sure!
Thank u guys for making our trip in Greece amazing and remembered keep the great job u guys are amazing!

The person who helped us bring in our bags and retrieve our bags from luggage storage was amazing. He works harder than everyone else here and definitely deserves a raise. Made our experience 110% views were great too!

I stayed in a couple hotels while in Athens and this was not my favorite. Located by China Town, it is located in a very rundown part of the city.

The staff is super nice, the breakfast was small but had something for everyone, and the air conditioning worked great in the room.

The room was nice. The bathroom however had a tub with shower (but no door/barrier to block the water) and a toilet inside with another shower that if you used, would make the floor around the toilet all wet.

The Best. Everyone was great, helpful, respectful, and willing to accommodate. The hotel is located close to the majority of  everything. The restaurant food was superb and these 2 ladies are the best. Also, the breakfast on the bottom floor to die for and the  ladie that takes care of it ...wow. The best I ever have. Clean, and a big variety of food. I am glad we picked the room with breakfast included. Btw, elevator and fitness room and a quiet seating room by the garden.

We had an excellent stay at this hotel apartment.  The place was spotless, modern, and located in a very convenient area, making it easy to explore Athens. The value for money was outstanding. What really stood out was the staff—they were incredibly friendly, helpful, and quick to respond to any requests. They even went the extra mile to store our luggage after check-out, which was a huge help. I will definitely stay here again when I visit Athens in the future. Highly recommended! 10 atars!

Great apparent to stay in Athens. 10 minute walk to some of the best bars and restaurants in town or (as we found out a little too late), turn left out of the apartment and you have a square full of bars and restaurants which are great at night.
20 minute walk to the acropolis. Metros are ample and from the airport is around 40 minutes and costs €1.20.
Very clean apartment with a luxurious bathroom and a large TV with Netflix.

Very nice apartment from 15 minutes from the city centre and major attractions. Interestingly a lot of Chinese shops and restaurants around. The bed was a little too soft for my taste. Thank you for the Greek wine in the room as a gift.

The room is so beautiful, spacious, and clean! Most comfortable hotel I've stayed in for quite some time. Great location as well. The hosts are very responsive and arranged our taxi for the airport. I'd definitely stay here again and the price is an absolute steal for everything you get!

Beautiful apartment, lovely decor, spacious bathroom and great shower! So clean and cosy, great balcony with black out roller electronic blinds, couldn’t hear a thing from the street. Great air con in the hot summer months and a lovely bottle of wine as a complimentary touch, would most definitely stay again! 10 mins walk to all attractions

This Airbnb in Athens is one of my favorites after staying in over 15 different accommodations across European cities. The apartment is extremely clean, modern, and in a perfect location. The booking process was seamless and the communication with the owner was excellent. I highly recommend this apartment to anyone visiting Athens!!

Great apartment. Fully equipped, in a good location and close to the Acropolis. Very nice owners, helpful, explained everything in advance (directions and access to the apartment). I recommend it and see you soon.

We had splendid time at ethos apartment! Cozy place and just a step away from the most beautiful part of Athens!
Excellent help and guidance from the owner and we were much pleased to spend time with our children at this very well organised and clean apartment!
We will definitely choose our accommodation again at ethos and we suggest the visit 100%!!

A Perfect place for accommodation. My wife, kids and I were there 2 weeks ago. The hospitality from the owners and their small delicious traditional desserts to welcome us, was the first step to fall in love with this place. It is located direct in the city Center 800m away from Parthenon- Akropolis. Surrounded from numerous cafes and taverns ( colourful and famous Plaka neighbourhood). Urban stations, taxis and buses in 200m away from
The apartment, transport you in any destination. Bakery services fresh bread direkt beside the building. I definitely suggest this place to everyone, single or not, with kids or any kids. Thank you Thomas for your pleasant hospitality. 🫡👌🏼.

4 days
4 persons
100% CLEAN
100% Top Location
100% super Host

The owners of the apartment contacted us as soon as we confirmed the booking and offered additional information and how to check in before our arrival . As it was our first time in Athens , we were not so sure about the neighbourhood at the beginning- but it turned out to be THE PERFECT location if you're visiting Athens for leisure and sightseeing . The apartment is located 5-10 minute walk from the Old Town and all the main attractions are within walking distance .

There are small markets and restaurants nearby within 2 minute walk from the location . We parked our car to an adjacent street and it was perfectly fine too .

The check in was very smooth and all the instructions were clear and written down for us . The apartment has all the amenities mentioned in the booking - AC , TV , small kitchen area , bed , covers , bathroom etc. Everything was clean and worked perfectly.

Finally , the owners were really nice and helpful and looking at the price and location of the apartment- it is a hidden gem ! We can highly and wholeheartedly recommend this stay .

Great location, really close to everything, around 10-15 minutes to city center, 5 mins to city market, 20 to Akropol. Very close to metro stations. Cleaning every second day. Equiped mitchen and big frigde. Really happy from the stay here.

Ok what I can say, very good location only 11min walk from all attractions, very welcoming management,
Clean, have WiFi, Netflix, TV channels, the area is look from outside old but very cozy appartment, also have elevator,
Price was very good, you don't need to rent a car, just walk to everywhere.
Thanks me and the kids enjoy the place, we will come back again
Very close to underground and restaurants quarter. 20 minutes by feet to Akropol.
Appartements are closeby the city center and are equiped with everything you need for a short stay.
Good central location but the place is pretty awful
Friendly hosts, good location, nice amenities and they gave us a free bottle of wine! See you next time!
Perfect, 5 min walk from the bars and restaurants. 10 min walk from metro and Monisteraki. Everything New and clean. Enough room to the four of us.  Nice owners good information. Thanks

The apartment is good. The neighborhood, a bit regular, in the perpendicular streets you find people getting punctured, a horror. The environment is very degraded, but it is very well located. As for the kitchenware, a bit fair. For example, there is no coffee maker or toaster. We had to search for the toilet paper, since there was only one roll. When we arrived there was not even a bottle of cold water in the refrigerator. I think this should be taken care of, since it costs little. We told the owner that the air in the living room does not work and, honestly, he has not responded. Otherwise good

The apartment is fine, it could improve with something like a coffee maker and toaster, but it is fine and comfortable. The problem is the neighborhood, although it is central and close to everything (Monastiraki, Plaka...), at night there is no light on the street, and on the perpendicular the number of people taking drugs at 5 in the afternoon is horrendous. (to give an example) the neighborhood is not the best by any means, it's scary to go home after dinner. I do not recommend it for families with children.
It's correct. The neighborhood full of graffiti that is scary when you arrive.
Very nice room, completely new and very well equipped. High comfort and great balcony. Neighbourhood is not the nicest but 10 minutes walking distance from the city center.

Had a good 4 night stay. Clean room, with kettle, fridge and microwave. Always someone at the front desk to give security and a welcome. The walk from the city centre is not great,  but various options, so choose one that feels more secure at night. But it's just 10 minutes away. The only slight negative would be we could hear every sound made in the room next to us. Good light and sound proofing from outside.

The apartment was just spotless clean! The receptionist was soooo helpful i really enjoyed my short stay in the penthouse apartment. Would recommend anytime. I also really liked the pillows. So comfortable. AC works like a charm too cooled down the room in minutes. Very nice if you travel alone or even for two.

Amazing location to explore Athenes. Literally 500m walk to all major attractions. It's a China Town district with surroundings that may seem somewhat dirty. But that is of no concern. The environment is safe and friendly. The street itself is somewhat busy, can hear noises during the night. Otherwise, fantastic value for money.

Very bad experience in this hotel.
- First time in Grece I felt unsecure in a neighbourhood (I saw 2 people with SYRINGE on my way from the metro...).
- I got bitten by BEDBUGD.
- The hotel manager, beside being just cordial, refuse to acknowledge any wrong, even with multiple pictures and receipt for products as proof.
You cannot  find a worst, most stressful return home
I would recommand this hotel to nobody.

Mohamad was the guy who welcomed me. Amazing guy. Very kind.
The hotel is great too.
Cleaning staff are friendly.
Even at checkout the girl at the front was amazing.
Definitely recommend it to anyone.
Oh, the view is great.

Excellent everything, with the exception of the “fitness center.” It’s just a treadmill and like seven dumbbells. Hence only 4 stars. Otherwise excellent location, staff, amenities, cleanliness, etc. Definitely would stay here again.

Pretty new hotel, located close Akropilis and Plaka, with very polite and nice people working there. But this is the end of positive things.
Room I got was small, no enough room. For suitcase. A sink instead of in a toilet was located in a room, lifts are that small that there can fit only 1 person with laguage. Breakfast poor, instant coffee at the breakfast.
It is in standard of ibis budget... max 1 star, not 3 or 4 stars Hotel.
Amazing location. 5 min walk to monstariki. Top levels have view of acropolis. Great service and rooms are extremely comfortable and clean

Rooms are clean but very small. Staff are friendly.
It is around 5 minutes walk to busy areas. Has a variety of good restaurants close by.

Really recommend!!!   The host was super kind and response very quickly.  I have stayed a lot of this kind of apartments but this is one of the best one!!!   I have never stayed such a comfortable place.  Everything was perfect.  Very Clean, enough equipment, respectful to guests., great hospitality.  I will definitely choose this place again.
I definitively recommend this place! The location is great and you can walk everywhere. We had two rooms and even two bathrooms and felt so comfortable! Thank you!

Staying here as I write this review. We couldnt wish for a nicer accommodation for the price. The room space is enough, even has a small kitchen area. Everything was nice and clean. The hosts were nice and provided us with a bottle of wine, a few small chocolates and some coffee capsules. The bed is really comfortable and the AC works well. While the location is not the most central but nice bars and restaurants, as well as Monastiraki can be reached in 5-10 minutes on foot.
Very nice apartments, I was really satisfied. Very close to Psyri and Monastiraki. From the roof terrace you have a nice view to the Acropolis

Splendid view from the private rooftop terrace. Very convenient and cheap transfer from the airport. Very clean and comfortable apartment. Very good contact with the landlord over Whatsapp. 5 min walk from lively center with lots of nice restaurants, still in a calm place.

I recently stayed at the newly opened Okupa Hotel in Athens, and it was a fantastic experience. The hotel’s design is a perfect blend of modern aesthetics with an industrial edge, creating a cool, urban vibe. My room was incredibly comfortable, with thoughtful touches like a projector, turning movie nights into a cinematic experience. The communal spaces were equally impressive, buzzing with energy but still relaxed. The staff made me feel right at home—friendly, helpful, and always up for a chat. Definitely a great spot if you’re in Athens!

Loved every bit of this amazing hotel in Athens. The food is great, and the ambiance is on point! The roof is very chill especially the pool on the roof! In terms in architecture, you’ll be in awe of how perfect the structure looks!
It’s a must visit!

Okupa Hotel is an absolute gem in Athens! The design is modern and stylish, creating a fantastic vibe from the moment you walk in. The staff is super friendly and always ready to help, making the stay even more enjoyable. The rooms are incredibly comfortable, with everything you need for a relaxing stay. Plus, the location is perfect for exploring the city. Highly recommend for anyone visiting Athens!

I really enjoyed my stay at Okupa!
Stayed two nights, room was comfortable, I had a nice terrace. Great location. The breakfast was great. What I enjoyed the most was the friendliness of the staff always ready to help. The first day I arrived late for breakfast, but they arrange a delicious plate for me! Great service Okupa team! Looking forward to coming back!

My husband and I recently stayed at Okupa as part of celebrating our Babymoon and I could not have been more pleased with the experience! Particularly the staff who was incredibly warm, helpful and hospitable in also recommending gems around Athens to check out during our stay. The rooms were very clean and well kept, I especially loved the modern design of the hotel and the overall vibe truly contributed to the relaxing feel of the trip! Would definitely stay here again on our next visit to Athens!

Zero customer service. Maintenance man is gone after 4pm, so if you need something after that, you're out of luck and the owner will be very rude to you for asking. She says to let her know if you need anything, but then when you do you're asked to take care of it on your own, as if you would know how to get in touch with her maintenance worker... Zero help, zero follow-up to ensure you received what you needed. Very strange experience... Great AC though! Curious facts: No TV in the room and small window with no views.

Between 29.03.24-02.04.24 me and my wife stayed 3 night this lovely place.

Nepheli was welcomed us and give details about hotel. She was very kind from first reservation time till to end. She helped us about transportation, things to do, even some reservations.

Our room was Kladi. You can access by code.
It’s in first floor and very comfortable. Minibar was fulled with some snacks and soft drinks even fridge for open space was full with soft drinks. You can get your coffee and eat drink whatever you get from outside.

Room was very clean and bed is so comfortable. Bathromm was equipped with whatever you need.

Location of hotel is also very good 6 min to M3 line and 10 min by walk to Monastiraki Square and M1 line. No problem we had about security.

We were very appreciated about hospitality of this hotel and definitely recommended everyone who is searching a cozy, well designed, overthinking hotel.
Wonderfully renovated neoclassical building at the heart of Athens. Perfect to walk around from Thiseio all the way to Acropolis.
Wonderful, perfectly decorated and well-kept space!
Simply in one word amazing!!

There are many scammers out there, but this hotel is not one of them. The hotel lady is very nice and very helpful. The rooms are very hygienic and nothing to complain about. You have a great location for shopping and experiencing Greece

Good budget hotel. Several cafes nearby. So also convenience stores to buy water n stuff. City Tour and outstation tour bus pick up & drop off point is very nearby walking distance. Some dark alleys around(not very near) after 9pm are avoidable being taken over by drug addicts. Great vfm hotel. Quiet rooms. Small rooms.

It’s a good value for the money. You can find more expensive options on rheumatoid arthritis same street like Brown hotel but if you will be gone all day to visit Athens , this is a better option for your wallet.

That’s a terrible place to stay.
The conditions don’t match the photos, and the room is too small for two people.
The wi-fi doesn’t work,
and the administration is completely unhelpful. They refused to let us cancel our booking, and warned that we wouldn’t receive a refund, even though we had booked for a week.
I had a great experience staying at this hotel. Great location and nice breakfast. Staff was wonderful. The room are beautiful and clean. I would definitely return and recommend to friends and family

What a joyous stay for our time in Athens! The staff were exceptionally friendly, knowledgeable, and eager to make our stay as comfortable as possible. The room was spacious and cozy. I'd love to know the mattress they had set up in the room because it was some of the best sleep my husband and I had in years! We were in awe of the view of the Parthenon from their rooftop terrace where we had breakfast each morning, and their options for breakfast were quite delicious! This is a top tier choice for a place to stay that puts you in the heart of all the sights to see and great access to all the shopping, restaurants, and historical landmarks you could desire. Thank you for everything!

My husband and I spent 3 nights in the hotel and we are so happy we did so. The room itself is spacious, clean and trendy. Breakfast on the rooftop was an amazing way to start the day.
On top of that, all the staff members were extremely friendly and helpful. We would definitely come back here in the future.

I CAN NOT say enough about this hotel.
The technicalities: the lobby area, bar, and 'garden area' were adorable.  The room was spacious, the shower large, and the bed was so comfortable.  We didn't utilize it, but the workout area (in our room!) was great.  The rooftop terrace and pool with an amazing view of the Acropolis was incredible.   The hotel was a quick 10 minute walk to the center of downtown and Monasteraki Square.
THE STAFF:  We were welcomed so warmly by Irina, and even though we were early, she expedited the cleaning process so we could check in after a long night of travel. She was so sweet, gave us amazing restaurant recommendations, and is definitely an asset to your staff.
Zoey was so kind and helpful the next couple of days in bringing our breakfast, once up at to the pool and the next day to our room.
I could go on and on and on about how great our visit was, but the long and short of it is STAY HERE.  I wish we had been able to stay longer than 2 nights and will 100000% stay again when we return.  Thank you thank you thank you!

Our family stay at Alkimii Athens Hotel last weekend was absolutely wonderful! The rooms were comfortable, the location was perfect, and the breakfast were excellent. However, what truly made our experience special was the outstanding customer service by the staff. They were incredibly welcoming, attentive, and went above and beyond to ensure we had a memorable stay. We felt genuinely cared for throughout our visit. We highly recommend Alkimii Athens Hotel and look forward to returning!

During my recent visit to Athens, I had the pleasure of staying at the charming Hotel Alkima, nestled in the vibrant Psirri neighborhood. This boutique hotel, though small, boasts an elegant decor that provides a warm and inviting atmosphere. The location is exceptionally convenient, surrounded by an eclectic mix of bars, restaurants, and cafes, yet it retains a peaceful ambiance as it is situated on a quiet side street.

One of the highlights of Hotel Alkima is its exceptional hospitality. The service here is nothing short of wonderful, with staff going above and beyond to ensure guests feel welcome and cared for. The attention to detail and the personal touch in their service truly made my stay memorable.

Adding to the allure of Hotel Alkima is the rooftop area, which features a quaint pool and offers stunning views of the Acropolis. It's the perfect spot to unwind after a day of exploring the city.

In summary, Hotel Alkima is highly recommended for anyone looking for a comfortable, serene, and beautifully appointed accommodation in Athens, combined with top-notch service and an ideal location. Whether you’re in town for leisure or business, Hotel Alkima promises a delightful stay.

I enjoyed my stay at the Apollo Palm. I was there in October, so the rooftop area was closed. However, the bartender offered to take me up so I could see the view of the Acropolis, which was really lovely. The staff was attentive and friendly; although, the front desk staff was not always available. The location was perfect for my visit, a short walk to the historical sites and shopping centers. Breakfast was really good. My room was nice and quiet with everything I might need. Housekeeping took good care of keeping it clean and stocked. I would definitely stay there again.
Special thanks to Roxanne!

I loved this hotel! I really wasn't sure where to stay and came across this place and it was better than I expected. The hotel itself was super unique and the room was perfect.  The area was super quiet but just 2 blocked away there are ships and restaurants so it's not as secluded as it might first appear. I walked everywhere including to the acropolis (which was like 25 mins but doable) and walked to restaurants and shops. It was really easy to get around. The hotel staff were super friendly and helpful. But the hotel rooftop bar! That is where it's at! You have to experience it especially at night. That was the cherry on top of my stay. I could have hung out there all night every night but ended up being so exhausted from the long travel days. Thanks for making my Athens trip so special.

Be cautious on what kind of room you get. We booked a junior suite because it was more spacious. However, the room is a handicap accessible room, roll in shower with no water lip, water was all over, even got the main area carpet wet when bathroom door was closed. There are no shelves in room, no drawers in room, no chairs in room, no space to set a suitcase other than on the floor, no counter space in bathroom, the bathroom walls are all mirrors from waste height up. We dscussed with front desk, their comment was, we are fully booked. Would have a smaller room available tomorrow. I will credit them with an ok breakfast, rooftop bar area is real nice, their outdoor seating area is nice, close to some nice restaurants. This does appear to be a sketchy part of town. Just be aware of the what you could get. We've stayed in many places and this place is not what we expected at all. I'm very disappointed.
Good hotel close to shops and sights in Plaka.  Helpful staff who are there to make your stay comfortable.  Great spot to stay in the heart of Athens

Great location
Clean rooms, fully set up fridge, a/c, etc..
Really nice staff and atmosphere.
Roof top bar provides perfect view on the Acropolis.
Will return, top hotel.

NEVER book this place! We booked an apartment 5 months prior to our arrival and paid for it in advance. ON THE DAY of our flight, while we're waiting at the airport with 3 kids, we get a cancellation from the place. When I called him to tell him we're already in the airport, he said that they double booked the room, and the guests that got there the day before, got our room. He said that Booking will find us an alternative solution... Don't book from someone you cannot trust. If they did it to us, they can do this to you... We had to book a place that is located 10km fron where we planned with all additional costs, and it seems that the owner care more about the reviews... You can see in the comments below that we were not the firat ones. NEVER book this place. Don't ruin your vacation.

The location is amazing!
Service was good but we couldn't open the door for a while and had to wait outside, it seems this was an error out of the owners control but instructions were unclear.
Rooms are nice, we stayed at 0B. A bit of mold in the bathroom, otherwise good. Noise is a big issue, creepy door from the bedroon opens to a basement, we could hear bats and every toilet flush in the complex.

Despite its central location, this apartment rental fell short due to misleading photos, management obsessive with written guidelines, subpar renovations, and a lackluster neighborhood ambiance. Choosing this space turned out to be a regrettable decision.

Excellent central location.  Renovated apartment clean new furniture , Bed and sheets clean.  Excellent air conditioners - we were on cold days and we had a warm and cozy apartment.  The apartment is in a beautiful building.  There are more apartments in the building we were on the first floor - it is very comfortable with luggage.  For Jewish travelers, Beit habd  is really close by, 3 minutes on foot.  The advantage of the location is that it is in the center but it is a very quiet street.  The owner is an amazing person, kind and caring.  Every problem we had he was available and dealt with quickly.  I also forgot an expensive object in the apartment and he made every effort to make sure it came back to me.  In conclusion .  Highly recommend staying in these apartments.
Beautiful house, amazing people, I had a great time here.

Very nice and helpful staff, rooms are small but very clean and neat (in the end we are here to explore the city, not the hotel room). The location is extremely convenient in a short walking distance to all the main sights, restaurants and nightlife.
There is also luggage storage so we were able to leave our bags after the check out since we had a later flight (for free).
The most beautiful thing about this place is the rooftop terrace and the view over the city and Acropolis. Just wooow!
If ever again in Athens, for sure I'd stay here! Thank you so much!

Great location near Monastiraki metro station. Friendly staff, clean rooms, and a wonderful view from the roof garden. We were offered a free upgrade and enjoyed breakfast with a view of the Acropolis. We'll definitely come back!
We had a great view of the Acropolis from our balcony. The breakfast was simple but good and there is a large selection of awesome restaurants just around the corner.

Nice hotel with potential. The beds were comfortabel, we had a balcony to the street, good airco, and showers were good. Rooms are rather old fashioned, in general the hotel could use a renovation though everything still functional. Breakfast was ok, provided all the essentials, and the view from the rooftop terrace was amazing! Enjoy a drink up there. Only some music and more cozy furniture is missing there. All in all good choice for a hotel in Athens!

Really great hotel if you’re looking for something simple (with air conditioning) that is close to everything and has a spectacular view of acropolis. The service was the best, I had to checkout really early at 4am and they had a bag of breakfast for me. It made my day. I would absolutely recommend this hotel and would go back.

Comfy and well-equipped rooms, for a fair price. The decor might be a bit over the top for some (especially if one is used in Greece to the white-washed minimalism of the Cycladic isles). The hotel as such looks brand-new, with some areas (such as the rooftop) apparently still under development.

Staff was super friendly, and we enjoyed the rich breakfast buffet.

The street in which the hotel is located is not the nicest, but just round the corner you'll have the exciting and colourful quarter of Psyrri.
Excellent hotel everything looks like new. Very large room with full kitchen. Location is nearby all touristic place walking no more then 15min.

Extremely overpriced. Paid for 5 nights but left after 1. Bed very uncomfortable. Not even any shower gel. Walls and windows as thin as paper can hear every word from people in adjacent rooms, the stairs, and even outside 2 floors down as though they’re in the room with you even with windows closed (sounds like they’re open).  Shop around - I stayed in the centre of Psyrri in a completely soundproofed gorgeous room with a balcony for £25 less per night! And for £10 more you can stay in a 4* hotel! This place is a total rip off and low quality
Rooms are just way to small but other than that it was ok for a two day trip but way to expensive that is why we give only 3 starts. Location is perfect tho

I took the executive suite for 4 days the room is amazing however there some small things can be better.  The balcony is very small and there is no chair or a table.  I took a chair from the room and put it outside every time I wanted to stay on the balcony.  The bathroom is small compared to the main room. The shower was amazing! The bad was very comfortable the same for the sofa . The workers was very nice and helpful in everything I asked.. however they did not find glasses for wine or wine.  So I hade to buy them in the city .location was good so many restaurants and spa nearby. Overall it's a very good place to stay

Great hotel, located right in the historical center of Athens. Stylish, unique and well maintained rooms. Solid sound proofing. There is a bar next door and we could hardly here anything from inside. Staff is kind and very helpful. Excellent breakfast brought into the room. We could not have asked for more.

Amazing location, short walk to lots of streets filled with restaurants. Also easy to walk to Plaka and the Acropolis from here. Reception staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming. Breakfast was a big selection and beautiful location to be able to eat on the outdoor rooftop. We stayed in L2 and B0, both rooms were beautifully designed. Loved the unique touches. Would definitely recommend based on the hotel design, location, staff and food available here.

The rooms are really special and totally different in a great location with an amazing team on support who are incredible helpful. The approach to breakfast is excellent from the deli across the road. The rooms have everything you need and as an added benefit the rooftop area is a fabulous sanctuary.

The team are exceptional. Very friendly and informative. And it has a great rooftop bar which has a lovely garden and fresh pizza and delicious wines. In a great position and the breakfasts are outstanding. Delivered to your room and can have in room or on the roof. Room was quiet and bed comfortable.

Great room. Proper suit, with large sitting area and kitchen. Complementary coffee and wine. Clean. Very comfy beds. No tv in the room (positive for me). Location is very central. Staff very helpful and smiling all the time. There is a nice roof top bar.

place_name: Brown Spices, a member of Brown Hotels
review_text: Top!! 😍

We spent 3 days in Athens for fist time!
We love the room, was very quiet and stylish!! All the staff is top, always smiling and helping us book table in  restaurants.
Relaxing by the pool was such a paradise exactly in the center of Athens!!
It is totally new brand!! Thank you for taking care all our needs!!

The location and the swimming pool are great! The rooms however... close to no natural light and it was so poorly lit that good luck doing your make-up 🤡 The shower is open so the whole bathroom floor gets wet and that then transfers to the room unless you are very careful. My biggest issue though and the reason there's no way I can stay here again is the air-freshener in the rooms. It felt like the hotel was trying to fumigate the guests. I had difficulty breathing and a horrible headache because of it, I opened the small window at the end of the room to get some air, though the window is internal so not much changed. And then the staff that was checking off the breakfast list had a non-stop conversation that was echoing in the building and it was even more impossible to sleep. The air-freshener was so strong that we could even taste it on the glasses that we drunk the complimentary Prosecco. Other than that, the breakfast buffet is good (though impossible to eat in the dedicated room due to the air freshener 🤢), but I think it's not worth the 18 euros per person.

Fantastic boutique hotel in the heart of Athens! Stylish rooms, rich breakfast, and an excellent rooftop with a pool. The friendly staff and the unique scent of the new hotel (opened in August 2024) make it stand out. Definitely worth it! ♿️

one of the best hotels in my stay in greece. the location was perfect, just outside a busy area walkable to restaurants and the acropolis and things to do. the room was modern and cozy, and the AC worked well.

I would be very careful in this hotel! We checked in (for one night) very late and very tired after the trip. The blonde woman at the front desk charged us an extra 7 euros (instead of 1.53) and copied my credit card as a "deposit". It was the first time I encountered such a practice. A week after my return, there were attempts at unauthorized payments with the card and I had to block it.
Rooms small but nice, industrial design. Good location.

I absolutely loved staying here. The apartment was so large, with two large beds, a salon, a kitchen, and bathroom. There was a cute balcony, two AC units. It was easy to communicate with the management, access the keys and enter the apartment. I felt safe. I slept well. I loved cooking my own food but being close enough to all the cafes.
Also, the decor was antique and cute.

A super safe and super affordable hotel in Athens. I stayed here to be near the Painted Porch (it was under excavation oops), but found this hotel to be a 10-20m walk to all the ancient historical sites.

The front desk person was super nice, it was in a great and safe neighborhood, and I’d absolutely stay there again!

The free breakfast was a little limited but an awesome perk. The AC and wifi was a little hit or miss though

This hotel is only 5 minutes walk to the main square. The staff in the hotel seem really nice. There is a stand in the reception that has a number of leaflets that give a lot of information on Athens, which I thought was a nice touch. The room was very basic, but clean and warm. There is a rooftop terrace which serves breakfast and offers views of the Acropolis. The breakfast was nice enough I have to say. There is a lovely 24 hour bakery 2 minutes down the road which offers lovely home made sandwiches, cakes, break, juices and coffee. 5 minutes walk and you are at the main square which offers a lot in terms of restaurants, entertainment and bars. A really nice atmosphere. As I was only staying here for 1 day, this hotel was perfect and I would definitely recommend this for a basic, nice, clean and safe hotel.

This hotel is amazing. When we first entered our rooms were ready over 2 hours early and very clean, The staff was very kind constantly asking if we needed any replacements or services. On our final day at the hotel we had a flight and the hotel called us a van for the airport and packed us bagged breakfast. Very nice hotel would definitely recommend.

Hotel is ok for a 3 star. Breakfast was good. However in the amenities in their website they clearly list Parking and there is no parking. There is a private parking nearby, where they overcharge you 20 eur per day.
Great breakfast on roof overlooking acropolis, service was good and about a 5/10 minute walk from main square. Rooms were adequate but all a family would need.

We stayed here in June  2024. The staff was exceptional!! Shoutout to Melissa who took care of us from day one. She was very kind, sweet and attentive to our needs during our stay. A true gem.

We celebrated our Anniversary and were greeted with cake and  sparkling wine in our room. Breakfast was very nice on the
roof top terrace. The location was perfect. Honestly the most caring staff in Athens, highly recommend this Hotel

Words can not describe how wonderful this establishment is. From the service, to the rooms, to the locations everything is done above and beyond. For all of my family and friends this is the only recommendation given to stay during their travels to Athens. My only complaint is that my trip wasn't long enough. My next visit will include more days in Athens just to enjoy the family atmosphere, care, and comfort of the A.P. Acropolis View Apartments.

We landed in Athens and were greeted by our driver. Upon arriving the hotel manager walked us through the sites as well as the amenities in the room. We were amazed at the quick help we received whenever we ran into any difficulties. He also scheduled spa services for us and breakfast was delivered in our room every morning. The best stay we have had so far. Thank you!

This hotel was a home run for our 30th wedding anniversary trip! The room was phenomal with a biew of the Acropolis, a hot tub, spacious balcony and enormous bathroom. What really set our experience apart was the superb service of our concierge, Adrianna. Her suggestions, attention to every last detail and commitment to service was next level. I highly recommend.

Blown away by the wonderful hospitality at Acropolis View apartments! Lovely, clean rooms; sweet little spa area you can book for private use which curbed the jet lag; beautiful view of the Acropolis from the quaint rooftop patio; located in the Psirri quarter so close to everything yet just outside the touristy areas (15 min walk from Acropolis/Parthenon and Capitol, Plaka). We are surrounded by locals restaurants with good prices and great food. Everything you want to do in Athens within walking distance. Family friendly and safe for the kids. So happy with our stay!

I visited the hotel for two nights.
The staff was kind and helped us with everything we needed.
The space is clean and neat.
It is located in the center of Athens and is a very good choice for anyone who wants to visit the city.
It seems that the owners love their job from the way they take care of the hotel.
I highly recommend.
On my next visit to Athens I will definitely choose this hotel.
Amazing neoclassical building...In the heart of the most popular sightseeing

Really nice location for two days in Athens. Good service, perfect breakfast, good rooms. Only negative thing is the noise during the night, but that's what you get in the vibrant city center surrounded by bars and nice restaurants.

I had a great time staying at this place. The room I was staying was clean and had everything I needed and they also gave me a complimentary Greek wine. Location wise it’s close to most places you’d like to visit in Athens and close to Monastiraki station which can take you straight to the airport. The breakfast included is not something you’d like to skip as they serve different kind of freshly baked pastries, having a sweet tooth I wouldn’t miss this for the world. To add more, worth noting are their staff who have been so accommodating since my arrival kudos to everyone special mention to Lydia. The entire staff has been helpful as  I had a lot of queries getting around the city, as a solo traveler this was a great deal to me.

I didn't stay here but  was walking past and trying to have a quiet breakfast and  some coffee.
The local ladies were so kind to let me in even though it wasn't  quite  opened yet.
The food was amazing at a very reasonable price.
I had a really quality breakfast.

The stay was overall wonderful. They have lots of different delights for breakfast. The staff and management was extremely welcoming, helpful and everyone was very friendly throughout our stay. As the hotel is family-run, it was very nice meeting Alex and Sam. The room had just enough space for 2 people, the hallway was sometimes loud and there isn't much sunlight from the windows, but in Athens you should not spend much time in the room anyways. The area Psyrri has lots of classic Greek Taverns and restaurants to visit, and it is in walking distance to all main attractions of Athens, we barely needed public transport to reach anything. Also for shopping in the narrow streets, this area is much cheaper than the more famous Plaka. We would definitely stay here again.

Great hotel, close to metro, Acropolis and the best bars and restaurants. Although nightlife is around the corner, the streets around are quiet during the night. The owners are very friendly and will help with anything. The highlight is the breakfast buffet, prepared fresh every day: savory and sweet Greek pies, cakes, salads, etc. The best European breakfast you will ever have.

Breakfast: 10
Service: 10
Amount of different pies every morning: 10

Location was perfect! Located in a really nice, safe and cosy area in Athens with lots to do and a lot of places to eat/drink. Also pretty close to 'Monastiraki' metro station (easy to go to the airport & other places from there)! We also really loved our room and would book this stay again just for the room only, the bed was really nice/soft! Room was decorated very lovely. I found out our plane lost my suitcase when I arrived in Athens airport (the plane left a lot of suitcases on the island we left from due to weight problems) & our hotel host did absolutely everything to help us out! He helped calling & contacting the airport and kept us up to date, which made us feel a lot less stressed about the whole situation! Would absolutely recommend this place!

We stayed at Urban Tales for three nights and overall had a lovely stay in Suite 3. The room felt spacious and recently renovated, the hosts were extremely responsive and helpful, and the location is fantastic - close to everything.

Not obvious to us before we booked, but this is closer to an AirBnB than to a hotel. There's no housekeeping (if you want your trash taken out, you do it yourself), very limited amenities, and reception is rarely staffed.

We also ran into a few issues during our stay. The hosts were very responsive to our issues, but they were pretty disruptive issues.
- The thermostat cannot maintain a 16 degree temperature. We had set it that way and it spent four hours one morning (from 3:30-7:30am) loudly resetting itself over and over.
- Our room developed an ant problem on the last night.
- The doors are all opened via app (Radefy). This app was extremely slow and buggy - it probably took us 2-5 minutes to get in every time.
- The area is VERY loud. We are deep sleepers, but it was still almost too loud for us.

Absolutely lovely apartment with double height ceiling and really nicely finished. Location was spot on for Plaka. Tasso was super friendly and accomodating.

Top marks!

We had a lovely stay at Urban Tales. The building looks newly renovated so everything is very modern. The room was super clean and the bed was very comfortable. It's located in a very vibrant neighbourhood of Athens, with loads of bars around, and restaurants with quality food that locals also frequent.
Tassos and his wife are very friendly and accommodating. We were overall very pleased with our stay and we would definitely choose to stay here again next time we visit Athens.

This apartment is wonderful.
The ubication is very good near from syntagma square, monartiraki square.
It is very clean, it has a little kitchen with all the necessary.
The bed is very comfortly.
I recomend it 100%.

Our family of 4 stayed in a family room for 3 nights before a cruise.  We planned to to be out touring all day and we just needed a clean, reasonably priced place to sleep in Athens.
Positives -
- The room was larger than expected  - one section had a queen or a king bed, while the other section of the room had 2 twin beds.  We had plenty of room.  The room was not fancy but it was clean and more than met our needs.  The cost of the room was very reasonable during the high summer season.  We struggled to find rooms that would accommodate 4 people, so we we were very happy to find this one.
- The bath was split - one room had the shower, while the other room had the toilet which was convenient with 4 people getting ready.
- the air conditioning was very good.  We visited during August and it was extremely hot outside.  We all slept great in the room.
- there was a filter water tap for refilling water bottles which was convenient.
- the location was excellent- we walked everywhere.  Metro station was close by. There were grocery stores within a 15 minute walk.  The area came alive at night and there were lots of restaurants within walking distance.
- there is a kitchen and a fridge to store food.  Food must be labelled.  We placed some leftovers in the fridge one night and the next day, the box remained but it was empty- someone had eaten the leftovers. I can’t blame the hostel for the action of their guests.
- reception was very nice and always willing to answer questions.
Overall, we were very happy with our stay here! The hostel was everything it advertised itself to be.

The best hostel I’ve stayed at so far! The location is excellent—right in the city center and in a pretty safe neighborhood, so you can enjoy a night out and return to the hostel without any stress (a big plus as a female solo traveler). The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful. The rooms were clean and comfortable, with daily cleaning and very cozy beds. The common area was stylish and welcoming, and they offer plenty of activities, tours, and food options.
Would definitely recommend this hostel !

Ps : there is also a sweet little kitty living next door. He’s super friendly so if you could give him some pets that would be awesome ! He doesn’t have teeth so can’t eat solid food but he would  absolutely love soft cat wet food ❤️

It's a safe and friendly place! It's also very clean! The location is perfect! I only have one complaint with my room door, the lock was a bit noisy, but it can be quickly fixed with a little adjustment.

Fantastic place to stay for a couple of nights. Your own room with a private bathroom and shower, fresh sheets everyday if you want them, the reception was very nice and helpful, you can even keep your bags there if you are checked out but exploring the city. Communal living area and kitchen were a great perk and more amenities than we expected. Location is fantastic.

“My stay at City Circus was made unforgettable thanks to the wonderful Greek receptionist. From the moment I walked in, they greeted me with a warm smile and made me feel right at home. They were incredibly helpful, offering great tips on local attractions and ensuring I had everything I needed throughout my stay. Their friendly and welcoming attitude truly enhanced my experience, and I would definitely stay here again because of the exceptional service. Highly recommended!"
Had a fantastic stay the location is superb and also safe. Ellia our host was super nice. Just recommend earplugs which I always carry.

The room did not meet our expectations. Broken shower head which was not fixed during our 3 night stay. Very misleading pictures of so called "suites". No spa and no terrace. Trash was left in our room from previous guests and our room was not cleaned nor was our garbage disposed of. We would not recommend.

The accommodation was excellent. Spacious rooms, clean, view from the room to the Acropolis unique and the most important easy parking. Hosts very friendly and helpful in whatever we asked of them. It will definitely be our first choice when we come back to Athens.

Excellent location in the heart of Athens and great hosts!
The Penthouse has spacious rooms and a lovely terrace with Acropolis view.
Big plus the free parking in such an area ++

We stayed at Apeiron during our visit in Athens. The host, Sotiris was beyond helpful, the room was clean and well decorated - including the Acropolis view of course!
Easy accessible parking, at the heart of Athens.
Definitely recommend it !

place_name: Psiri Vibes Rooms & Suites in Athens
review_text:
Very large rooms! Beautiful, modern, new and clean, there was everything you need in the room. Excellent location, 3 minutes walk to all the taverns and cafes in Psiri.
There was no reception, there was George who was the contact person who was available 24/7 and always answered everything. We arrived at 3 in the morning to the room after the flight and he was available to us for everything we needed and even ordered a taxi for us at 3 in the morning. He let us check out at a later time because our flight was delayed. Made the experience and stay for us!

place_name: Psiri Vibes Rooms & Suites in Athens
review_text:
Loved everything about this concept of rooms and suites. Location was perfect for all that Psiri has to offer. Loved the security of coded entry and key safe on individual room doors.
Room was clean, comfortable and shower good. We like the location of room 101 as it was quiet and next to outside terrace and kitchen for milk for my coffee.
Art work and modern twist was perfect for us.
Host was extra helpful and was on hand if we needed it by what's app.
Breakfast at The Brunchers was fun and food perfect.
We even had a swim on the Athens Riviera as it was too hot to sight see. Tram from Syntagma was easy to navigate.
Will  stay at Psiri vibes again in the future. Thankyou.

place_name: Psiri Vibes Rooms & Suites in Athens
review_text: We booked the triple panoramic suite which has a kitchen area.  Like another reviewer when we arrived we were a bit taken aback by the surroundings and the outside but there was no need to worry at all, the foyer was tidy and there were two small lifts or the stairs were fine too - the big thing is that these apartments are in a great position - close to everything you need, the closest metro station takes you directly to the port and to the airport. There is a small supermarket not too far, a mini mart across the road, pharmacy is close and restaurants galore.  We recommend Zampano (air conditioned) for delicious modern Greek just one block away and The Frogs (guesthouse) for an air conditioned drink three minutes walk.  There are numerous other 'tavernas' but we found the food less than impressive in the most touristy bits and learnt to go to places a little more hidden.  Be aware this is not a quiet area, there is a bar downstairs, that was open on only one of the 4 nights we stayed, and there is plenty of activity in the street.  If you need silence this might not be your place but if you are not worried about a bit of noise then we would recommend it highly. in the apartment we were very comfortable, the bed was good with 2 pillows per person, the water pressure in the shower was excellent and the kitchen was great to have.  George the manager was very responsive, remote access to the property was easy and the cleaners came every day.

place_name: Psiri Vibes Rooms & Suites in Athens
review_text:
This place was a shock, we had this booked by a travel agent, and got a little worried whilst arriving.

How wrong we was, unbelievable location (can’t recommend enough) extremely comfortable rooms, although not typical hotel! Think vibes!

There is a night noise, from surrounding bars etc, but the location and the apartments carry the noise into the vibe.

Truely, this place was great, walking distance the every location we planned on visiting, (all the top spots on your list) and easy for Ubers.

Very highly recommended.

place_name: Psiri Vibes Rooms & Suites in Athens
review_text: Room was basic and small, location made up for this, perfectly located next to the walking only nightlife area with restaurants and bars

Perfect stay.
We had the lovely surprise to be upgraded to a suite room and had a welcome present.
The rooms are very well decorated, very spacious and modern. The beds are really comfy.
Our breakfast was served on the rooftop with a superb view on the parthenon.
We haven't used the pool. Yet, please note it is an inside pool located on the ground floor.
I strongly recommend this place!

Conveniently located across the street from a bus stop that takes you to all major areas in Athens city centre, or a 10-15 min walk down the road to Monasteraki. We felt very safe staying here, even walking late at night.

We took our breakfasts on the roof which had a direct view of the Acropolis. The rooms are unfortunately not soundproof, but we always bring our own earplugs.

No rooftop pool, which we didn't feel was necessary for our stay anyway. We loved the rooftop patio feel. There is a cute little pool on the main floor, perfect for soaking in after a hot day outside.

Finally, the best showers we've ever used!

This is a recently renovated property. Beautiful renovation except that they didn't include any storage. No drawers or shelves, so we had to live out of our suitcase. The staff was great. We needed a taxi at 5am, and they handled it flawlessly. The breakfast was lovely because I found it hard to believe I was starting my mornings watching the acropolis. The location was walking distance from everywhere we wanted to go.

The hotel is in the perfect location for the ancient city centre. The service was great, and the room/amenities were first class in the Experience Suite. Everyone was very friendly. The rooftop was spectacular at breakfast time with the view of the Acropolis.

The 5th star is lost for three reasons: firstly, the marketing of the pool is misleading. It is very small and actually within the reception area, and so it would feel very uncomfortable swimming in it. Secondly, none of the stairways between floors have handrails, which felt very dangerous, as it was all of metal construction. Lastly, not only having to preorder breakfast each day, but also specify a time, was not conducive to relaxation while on holiday - this felt too regimented, and one does not necessarily know what one will fancy for breakfast the afternoon before.

Despite the above, we would definitely stay at the Asomaton if we returned to Athens.

By far the best hotel I think I’ve ever been to. The staff was amazing, breakfast was AMAZING. The room took my breath away with all the old concrete in with all the new decor. It’s so close to everything and so quiet. The roof top is amazing, we highly recommend!

What can I say about this hotel other than it’s absolutely brilliant!

Service is exceptional, rooms well sized and great value for money. Newly refurbished and all details incorporated into the finishing touches. Double double glazed windows and doors makes the rooms very quiet and blockout shutters darkens the rooms for an amazing nights sleep. Exceptional location in one of the most vibrant locations in Athens.

An absolute must when visiting athens.

Wonderful accommodation! Walking distance to the acropolis and bars restaurants cafes
Clean comfortable and BIG rooms!
Vivian is amazing she looked after me so well I booked again!
10/10 full marks!
Great service (especially with Vivian that reception). Rooms were modern and spacious. Great location, central to Athens. A little noisy on the street outside, but Vivian was able to help with this.

Modern chic, clean, and conveniently located. The  surrounding neighborhood appears to be in need of some revitalization, with noticeable graffiti and several businesses that seem to have seen better days. Nonetheless, the hotel itself is pristine, the staff and service simply amazing, and all the tourist attractions just steps away.

Great hotel next to the city attractions and acropolis view. The hotel is new with big rooms. Vivian from the reception helped us with great recommendations and provided perfect service..,.thank you Vivian.
great location you can reach to the most of tourist attractions by foot.
Excellent location, nice appartement, and great view of the acropolis! The organizers were flexible, but the system felt a bit impersonal.

It’s a beautiful apartment.
We really loved the view and it’s very spacious.

Best part of the apartment was the location as it’s right on the lively street.
Beautiful view of acropolis from balcony. Many restaurants along the street. Good location

Location super central; Check-in uncomplicated and accommodating; very good, comfortable facilities; quiet bedroom, but on the large balcony there is a nice atmosphere with music from the street below; View of the Acropolis is a dream!
Acropolis view! Very nice design! Spacious, comfortable, spotlessly clean! I highly recommend it.

place_name: Raise Boutique rooms in the center of Athens
review_text:
I had a terrible experience in this place with bed bugs on the first night. They returned my money but they gave me no assistance considering this is a serious problem. I had to wait in the room until 8 am to go out and find a new hotel to stay by myself.
The hotel tried to blame me, saying it could be mosquitoes or I had brought bed bugs with me when It not even exists in my country!!! I had no support additional from my refund, Terrible experience!

place_name: Raise Boutique rooms in the center of Athens
review_text:
Rooms were with very almost level of sickness humidity. Air conditioner were pre set to be 23 degrees so it didn't remove humidity or didn't keep room temperature low enough.

We stayed 7 days, didnt meet any staff, so we end up after first night without toilet paper, without clean towels, bed sheets were wet from humidity and our sweat.

Toilet didn't work out, shower water comes to toilet area etc.

When finally met , staff was angry and couldn't and didn't want to understand English.

Also we tried before and during the trip extend our staying for "late checkout" either for 1h or to evening, none of those didn't work out as planned/agreed and we ended up waking up for anger cleaner coming in yelling for us. And then speaking with her boss on phone who couldn't help either except asking 60e for 1h late checkout.

Depends what you like but here you can have something for everyone, for us it was only the location to give 1 star, all other areas without.
Loud rooms, traffic comes inside,  and other rooms noise stays in our room.

NO HOT WATER!!!!

Read from that and make your decision.

place_name: Raise Boutique rooms in the center of Athens
review_text: small and simple rooms, but clean and easy to reach, bathroom clean with good shower, silent place, with fridge - can recommend

place_name: Raise Boutique rooms in the center of Athens
review_text: Only 10 minutes away from the busy center, these apartments can offer the cozy and quiet experience you need and the same time not far away from the heart of Athens. The apartments themselves were spacious and had plenty of natural light. The location was also convenient, with a park very close and the most amazing coffee place right opposite. The self check In System was something that super impressed me also, because it was so easy and safe at the same time. 5/5 ✌🏼

place_name: Raise Boutique rooms in the center of Athens
review_text: Very bad experience overall! We found bed bugs on our pillows and on the bed which forced us to find a last minute hotel in the midlle of the night.  We barelly received any support by the host with contradictory indications: first they told us to find another hotel but after we did it they told us they had a room available. We had to spent a lot of money for a last minute booking and,  with that short notice, we could not cancel it when they informed us on their available room. In addition to that it is in a very noisy street: many people eating and drinking outside in the street all night long.

place_name: Triple A - Apartments Accommodation athens (in Psirri)
review_text:
We are super happy with the whole experience.
It was a spontaneous booking. But we are so glad about that decision.
We are definitely planing to come back and to book it again.
The area was perfect. Very close to everything we needed. Also the service was very nice. The team was friendly and always happy to help.
The apartment was clean and had some nice supplies prepared. You really felt welcomed.
I highly recommend this apartment. 🥰

place_name: Triple A - Apartments Accommodation athens (in Psirri)
review_text: Lovely and comfortable apartment where all you need is provided. The host really takes care of details. The location was perfect, in a lovely neighbourhood full of restaurants, beautiful streets and safe at night. Also walking distance from most places to visit in Athens. The host also arrange transfers from and to the airport what was very convenient for me. I definitely recommend and will come back. Thank you very much for such a wonderful stay at triple A apartments. The pics I posted are of the restaurant just out of the door and the  street where the apartment is located. Despite being next to restaurants there was no noise from the outside.

place_name: Triple A - Apartments Accommodation athens (in Psirri)
review_text:
We absolutely loved our stay at Triple A - Apartments. It was very centrally located by the shopping area and the restaurants.
The one bedroom that we booked was spacious and had everything that we needed. Even though it's a serviced apartment, the towels are changed and the room is made up, as required. Great service! Will definitely recommend it.

place_name: Triple A - Apartments Accommodation athens (in Psirri)
review_text: Wow. What a beautiful Partment. Clean and neat. All amenities... close to the market ... and amazing service  ... we asked fir a airport transfer at 9pm and the response time was excellent and we had an excellent driver.....  The name says it all AAA. I RATE THIS A SOLID 10

place_name: Triple A - Apartments Accommodation athens (in Psirri)
review_text: I enjoyed my stay at Triple A. The rooms were really comfortable, clean, and well-arranged for an extended stay. I would have loved to stay for a longer period to make use of the ensuite kitchen. This was by far the best stocked kitchen and bathroom I have had the pleasure to use. There is prompt communication with the staff via WhatsApp. The location is excellent for doing touristy things. There are a range of options for breakfasts and they're all great.

A solid, secluded hotel close to all of the sights in Athens. We had the comfort room which had very high windows which gave a very secure feel and was quiet.

Convience store across the road, and there is a rooftop with sunlounges and chairs.

Wonderful hotel that has a elegant charm to it. We really loved the colors in the bathroom. The location is absolutely perfect. Front desk men and women were extremely accommodating and friendly and made sure we were comfortable. I would stay here again on my next trip to Athens!

Very nice hotel, close to eveything in the center. The manager and the others were .
very kind and helpful.

George was one of the best hotel managers I have worked with. My family and I stayed at his hotel for 3 days/2 nights. He was so accommodating and even gave us a map with a run down on things to do, places to see, restaurants, etc. I highly recommend staying here whenever you come to Athens. It is right around the corner from the cutest little street with many restaurants and live music, etc. The room is quiet and spacious. I will definitely return if I ever get a chance to go back to Greece
Nice hotel, spacious room, with the possibility of being partitioned, equipped with everything you need, daily cleaning, friendly staff.

My stay at Sparta Team Hotel in Athens was a terrible experience. The room I stayed in had a shared washroom, which wasn’t mentioned clearly beforehand. The air conditioning barely worked, making the room uncomfortable. The worst part was the bed bugs – large and all over the place. It was impossible to get a decent night’s sleep with them crawling around. The hygiene and overall conditions were far below standard. I would not recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a decent stay in Athens.

BED BUGS

Got to say personal was super kind, helpful, they were amazing

Even if it doesn't seems new, might need some work on it but first room was nice had no issue.
