The second room we were assigned we just stayed there one night, when I was at the airport I found bedbugs in my fathers jacket. They were 4 in total.

I love the people that works there but bed bugs is one of the very few things I can't stand. 🥺

I had a terrible experience with Sparta Team Hotel. My booking was canceled simply because I was 1.5 hours late after the check-in time. What made this even worse was that the hotel never informed me in advance about any strict no-show policy. This lack of communication is completely unacceptable.

Additionally, the state of the rooms and beds was far from satisfactory. The accommodations are in dire need of renovation, with the outdated facilities falling well below what any guest should reasonably expect.

Overall, I strongly discourage anyone from booking their stay here. There are plenty of better options in the area where your booking and comfort will be respected.

The room is full of bedbugs especially under the bed and crawling to the walls, unclean pillow cases which can be justified that you do not thoroughly clean and sanitize every room, the aircon is not working well, the room smells smoke from cigarette even none of us smoke. Cheap price yes but not even worth it to stay even to the cheapest room they offered. Don't Waste you money to this hotel.
I booked a single room at the Hotel, the room was clean, no bed bugs! Staffs were very friendly. I was happy staying at Sparta team hotel!

So great! My friend and I stayed here and the room was spacious enough for two girls to get ready simultaneously. Great area, close to so many fun places and things! We felt safe the entire time.  George was great - very attentive and quick to respond. He also had many recommendations for the area, which was so helpful! I would definitely recommend staying here.

Amazing experience, lovely staff and incredible help with everything. They gave us so many great recommendations for the area and even gave us information for local services like laundry and pharmacy’s and made our stay so easy and relaxing. Rooms were beautiful and very comfortable with great amenities. Staff went out of their way to help us with all our needs and even came at 5:30am when we checked out to help us with our luggage. Would HIGHLY recommend and would stay here 100 times again. Couldn’t fault them at all!!

Loved staying here!! Ιωάννης was the best host and took great care of us. We never felt unsafe or unhappy. A great location in Psiri-- we were close to the archaeological sites, good food, and lots of entertainment. The disco across the street was loud on Friday and Saturday but the loft had earplugs. Otherwise it was a wonderful stay and a great location!!

A quaint apartment centrally located in a vibrant neighborhood just steps away from all kinds of restaurants. Our room had a balcony and everything needed was there. A/C worked, beddings were clean, bottled water in the fridge. The host greeted us and was very friendly, gave clear instructions and showed us how everything worked from the keys to wifi to recommendations on nearby restaurants. We stayed for one night only on transit. There’s a disco across the street so there was a tiny bit of noise but not a problem for us at all!
John was amazing, really went above and beyond to make our stay comfortable, the apartment itself, no elevator,  bathroom is a wetroom so water goes everywhere when you shower,
I didn’t stay here but I spent a whole day in one of the rooms. My friend stayed here and I was instantly jealous. Great location, clean room, spacious. I will say here next time I come
Extremely noisy bars play loud music till the early morning. Impossible to sleep. Ok if you want to party till 3 am, terrible if you want to get some rest.
spent a few nights at play in athens and really loved the hotel, great vibes, very friendly staff, great location would/will definitely book this hotel again!

Amazing service from the staff, VIP feel, continuous communication over WhatsApp, clean room with Nordic design, huge room. The hotel is located in a great area, everything is walk by Quick check in and checkout
Increadible service. Amazing staff. Thank you so much

Best choice we made won't be disappointed. Just very practical with everything you need. Clean rooms good staffs close to sight seeing spots and good price. Outside neighbors a bit run down but hotel itself good, did not bother us. Staff even packed us breakfast for our early departure, so very nice.

Oct 27-Oct 30/24
This was the best hotel for the price. It was less than CA$100 a night for two people (including tax). It also included free breakfast and free cancellation. I have never found one hotel, with this quality and price in any big cities. The most important thing was its location. This hotel is located within walking distances from all major world class attractions, such as museums and the Acropolis. Hundreds of restsurants and bakery shops. If you can walk, you don't even have to take any transportations. For me, the service was good and friendly. The room was clean and tidy. The breakfast was good enough for me.
This hotel was my top choice if I travel to Athens again.

We stay one night at this hotel and it did its job. We use it only to sleep as we were out and about all day.
The staff is friendly, the location is great and it includes breakfast (continental breakfast), with mostly anything that you need (nothing wow, but it was good).
The shower was tiny and it didn’t feel clean :(
The room is a bit outdated and so is the building, but I guess that’s why it’s no pricey for the location!

I spent a week here and I am very satisfied. This hotel serves as a perfect haven for active tourists. Convenient location, air conditioning, private toilets, new towels every day, friendly and helpful staff, good breakfasts - it's all there, and it comes at a pretty good price.

Great value for money.
Hotel is old but VERY CLEAN. Location is perfect, just few hundred meters from Monastiraki square like 5 minutes walk . The staffs are very friendly and helpful. 24hrs receptionist.
Breakfast is good too!! It’s been such a pleasure experience . I will definetly book
again whenever I come back to Athens .

Good value for money mainly because of location and basic but decent room.

Only notable disappointment was that I was charged extra 10 EUR for early (only 2hrs) check in.  I didn’t request for an early check in prior to my arrival, i just arrived early at the hotel which had my room available already.  Based on my experience travelling around, hotels allow early check in without additional cost if the room just happens to be available as there is no particular effort/duty on the hotel required.  So I was disappointed that I was charged a fee just to get into my room for a couple of hours earlier.  For a customer staying 3 nights, I think the hotel should have just given a small favour to make my stay more satisfying.

This hotel was really great, fantastic central location and staff where really helpful. Our flight back was late at night and they happily looked after our luggage during the day and when I felt unwell due to the heat they were happy with me spending time in the reception to cool down. Can easily walk to all the big landmarks from here and lots of nearby places to eat too. Short walk to the metro which takes you directly to the airport too. Only slight downside is walls are quite thin so you can hear others leaving etc. But this didn't bother us. Room was clean, spacious, well air conditioned and with a smart TV - all you really need! Complimentary bottled water would have been lovely but you can buy a big bottle in reception for a euro so not a big deal.

Such great value for money! I went on a cheap hol to Athens and we weren't too bothered about where we stayed, but this was amazing. It's clean & modern inside and has perfect air conditioning everywhere and our room was cleaned daily, and you can buy water and any other drinks you need
in the lobby. The staff are super friendly and welcoming and are there 24/7 so if you have any questions or need help there's always someone available. The location is fab as well, so easy to get into Monastiriki and central Athens, and a cute neighbourhood with places to eat is only a 5 mins walk away. I would happily reccommend to anyone, we went as a couple and it was great! Some review say about location, but really I wouldn't worry because it doesn't feel unsafe at all, the street just isn't visually the most beautiful but that really doesn't matter.
Rooms were a little small but very clean! The staff were all super nice and helpful! In a great spot in Athens to be able to access everything. Would definitely go back!

Pros:
+ Location
+ Good Price
+ Clean Rooms
Cons:
- You have to give back your card to reception everytime you leave hotel which is weird
- Too loudy in the night, low sound isolation
- No slippers in the room

A budget-friendly and worthwhile place to stay. Highly recommended. While there's no common area for socializing or a shared kitchen, it's a great spot just for sleeping and conveniently close to the city center.

I was traveling alone. The reception staff were super friendly and always available. I needed to extend my reservation by one day and it was easy. I was in a shared room with 3 other women, so there were two bunk beds and a sink. I felt safe, the door has an electronic lock and you can leave your bags on the second floor. I recommend :)

Not worth the price, can find cheaper, better equipped places.
The terrace on the top looks worse than in the pictures, it's inhospitable, boasts some unusable remnants of a kitchen which this places doesn't have, can't see anything from there. The rooms are very bare, not even a coat hanger there.
A definite upside is that they have very nice bathrooms, clean and modern, with sufficiently but not totally opaque glass between them giving a taste of a kinky atmosphere. They have a spacious locker room for the luggage.

The location was the only good thing about this place but even that can't save it. The upstairs reeked of sewage and mildew. The hallways and bathroom looked like they've never been deep-cleaned a day in their life. Let alone a daily clean. We checked in and checked out within an hour because we couldn't stand the thought of sleeping there.

Not that good, but it matches the one-star classification.
Service is kind, 24 hours available.
Location is pretty central.
Rooms are small and with not good conditions.
Toilets are bad.
Good enough for one day if you are just stopping by.

Stayed here for 3 days 2 nights. I love that I can do my laundry because washing machine is provided. However, marble floors. During winter the house can get so chill hence bring a comfy slipper to wear inside. Place was huge although seems a bit old the furniture. Smart TV with Netflix 👌

Beautifully renovated and newly decorated flats located in the heart of Athens. Great service very good hospitality. All problems immediately solved. Fantastic stay for families with kids and couples. Highly recommend it.

Really pleasant and comfortable apartments. Nicely decorated with everything you might need included. Clean. The only "funny" thing are blurred windows to the other apartments which brings light occasionally to yours. And the balcony view is... Typically Athens. At least from where I've been. You might like that or not. Depends.

Overall a nice apartment at a central location. The building is quite old, which adds to the charm of the apartment, but on the other hand it has some drawbacks: there was a smell in the apartment from the old pipes, and there were some noise from the upper floor which is being renovated, which affected my sleep throughout the night. Not a positive experience overall.
A lovely, smart, apartment,  very impressed, well equipped, very clean, great location for the centre, hostess is very communicative. Will not hesitate to stay here again .

Rooms were clean and comfortable - and large by European standards. Food and service at rooftop restaurant were fantastic. Front desk staff - in particular Rolland, but other staff as well - frequently went above and beyond to provide exceptional service. It is clear to see that this is a very well-managed hotel. The location is not the best, but it's not bad - and there is a stop for the "hop on, hop off" bus just outside.

Our stay at the Fresh Hotel was a delightful surprise. Arriving with high expectations, we were initially disappointed with our room, which lacked comfort despite the balcony. However, the hotel's willingness to accommodate our needs was exceptional. Upgrading to a "chill room" with an outdoor shower was an absolute game-changer. The new room was stylish, refreshing, and truly elevated our experience.
The breakfast spread was impressive, offering a wide variety of delicious options to start the day right. But what truly sets this hotel apart is its exceptional service. The staff was friendly, attentive, and went above and beyond to ensure our comfort.
The pool area was an oasis in the city, providing a welcome escape from the heat. The ability to order drinks poolside added to the relaxation factor.
The hotel's location is convenient, with the city center just a short walk away. While the surrounding neighborhood in the opposite direction leaves something to be desired, the hotel itself is a sanctuary.
Overall, we highly recommend the Fresh Hotel and would undoubtedly return on our next visit to Adams. It's a place where you can truly unwind and enjoy your stay.

Great experience in chill out room with the shower on the balcony and the view to Acropolis. Astonishing furniture, spacious. Very good breakfast, fresh orange juice, good coffee.
Good rooftop bar. Swimming pool small and cold but still good to have it. Great service. Walking distance to main attractions. We are very very satisfied.

Great location. Noisy at times from the streets but your in downtown Athens. From the states and first time in Athens. VERY good breakfast. Fresh juices, honeycomb. The works. Pool is small, but the rooftop has a great bar with a view and great drinks/food. Friendly helpful staff. Would stay again.

We were really impressed with this hotel!  It had everything you could imagine for a downtown location. Good gym, sauna and lovely clean and fresh facilities. Furnishings were gorgeous and well thought out designs. We had a suite and found it through the Marriott site as we are members. Truly unexpected value!

Excellent location in the heart of Athens, close to the archaeological sites, shops, restaurants and transportation (although almost everything can be done on foot). Excellent service, always attentive and willing to meet your needs. They communicate via WhatsApp, which is very convenient for asking questions, and they respond very quickly. The hotel has a terrace with a spectacular view of the Acropolis. It does not have a dining room, but it has an agreement with a nearby restaurant that serves a very good breakfast. I highly recommend it.

We stayed here the first 2 nights of our Greece vacation and loved it! The front desk staff were very nice and accommodating. Our room was clean and upscale. And a wonderful view of the Acropolis (I’ve attached the daytime and nighttime views!)

Newly rehabbed hotel in the heart of Athens steps from Monistariki and 15 minute walk to the Acropolis. Modern amenities, and beautiful views from the balconies. The rooftop bar w/DJ on posted nights was fun and the music, drinks and view are spectacular. There are a couple of really good restaurants at the base and a few others just a couple blocks away. It is also located around the corner & down the street from them modern vegetable & meat open market agoras. I would definitely stay there again! Highly recommended.

My second stay in the hotel. Overall the rooms are well maintained. The room door has no lock.
No breakfast facilities. The elevator is slow. No good soundproofing. Loud noise from the fridge during the night. The staff were very friendly nevertheless. Way overpriced. THe area around the hotel is a bit sketchy, but there's no safety issue.

Hotel worked great for me - nice staff, clean and comfy rooms, central location… but one big thing that needs work…

The breakfast is held at a partner cafe 5 mins walk away.

I waited for 30 mins, no food arrived, I queried this and got a terrible attitude back, basically saying that a 30 minute wait for breakfast is normal and implying I was in the wrong. They also said they’re quite busy today, although the restaurant was half full… furthermore, if you partner with a hotel, you must be able to handle the requirements of such. I upped and left, thoroughly disgruntled by their arrogance

Would suggest Play finds another partner to handle their breakfasts as this is completely unacceptable

place_name: Eva’s apartments Athens Greece( pnoe d Athens )
review_text: My stay in Eva's comfortable apartment was a wonderful experience. I found what I was looking for, I felt security, peace and quiet. Air conditioners in all rooms. Comfortable spotless beds. Gracious hostess. Close to attractions, archaeological sites and entertainment. Thanks for everything.

place_name: Eva’s apartments Athens Greece( pnoe d Athens )
review_text: Amazing central spotlessly clean excellently decorated apartment. Overlooking the old town hall in Kotzia square. 170 meters from the suburban metro. Excellent communication with the kind and always present hostess. Thanks for everything I will be back. Oh, I forgot high-speed internet and a big elevator.

place_name: Eva’s apartments Athens Greece( pnoe d Athens )
review_text:
Very valuable apartment, excellent decoration, the price and service ratio is very good. Excellent service.
If I visit Athens again I will definitely prefer it.

place_name: Eva’s apartments Athens Greece( pnoe d Athens )
review_text: Excellent apartment with a nice view. Friendly service, very close to various attractions. I highly recommend it

Good value hotel with excellent service (thanks Maria) good buffet breakfast, and convenient location.  Comfy bed and rooms well cleaned daily.  Stunning view of Acropolis from rooftop cafe and some rooms.  Immediate area looks downtrodden but is quite vibrant with the market and restaurants/shops nearby.  Easy walk to sites and metro to airport.

The hotel it great, with very clean rooms and comfortable beds. Breakfast is also very nice, with gluten-free options such as biscuits or bread available and well packaged to avoid cross-contamination (celiac disease). The hotel is very recommended.

Location is also very nice, less than 10 minutes away from the city center. However, there are a few streets (one or two) that need to be crossed walking from the city center that are a bit dark and where you experience "strange" people/atmosphere.

I would repeat this hotel anyway, because the services are great and it is practically in the city center.

Loved the location near the central market and great restaurants and nightlife. Much preferred this area to the tourist clogged Plaka. Hotel room was clean and the staff were truly exceptional, they were so helpful with anything we needed. And we had the best view from our room! I would gladly stay here again.

I'm happy that I stayed at this hotel, because its central location, close to everywhere, is in the Munistiraki area. close to the metro.
The hotel is very clean, rooms at an excellent level of maintenance. good breakfast.
excellent service from all the employees and especially many thanks to the smiling and sympathetic Angela from the reception office.

Once you get passed the food market in front of the hotel it's pretty okay. Rooms are clean worth the price. The lady servicing drinks on the roof top was really personaliabe and nice. The views from roof top are breathtaking. We stayed one night before our cruise.

It's my first time staying in a share room and I was hesitant. I don't know about other share rooms but I recommend this one. It's clean and I didn't feel unsafe not event a momment. Only negative when you shower and someone else comes to the next shower it mess up the water. But hey it's share house with random people get over it or pay more to a hotel to have your own bathroom. The location is at the centre of Athens so it's perfect for me. The experience is positive and I will visit again for sure. Big surprise that you have kitchen with everything you need to cook. I didn't cook as I am holidays and eat junk street food but it's good to have that option for longer stays.
The place is Good and prices are good.
The best Hostels in Omonia
IS GOOD

The location is quite good: in the center of the district, near the stops of all types of transport. It takes 15-20 minutes to walk to the center. There is a supermarket nearby.
There is no administrator at all, it is possible to contact him only through booking. The settlement process takes place independently. A well-thought-out system of locks.
It was quite chilly in winter, but the room had an air conditioner that could be used to warm the air.
Common areas are cleaned every day, clean enough.
There are enough showers and toilets.
I lived in December, there were few people, so I rarely met other visitors. He lived in the room by himself, which was very comfortable.
There were shampoos, gels, soap in the showers.
There are lockers in the room and they work. Towels are provided.
There was mosquito repellent in the rooms.

The right vote would be 3,5 stars. Flawless suite deluxe like in photos, brand new place and good communication by e-mail. Unfortunately, the street is just awful, specially for female travellers at night. Taxi driver told us "this area is bad". Very central, but very bad

Amazing place! We stayed 5 nights and the rooms are completely 5star !
The team was awesome and help us a lot with everything we needed.
Very clean and at the heart of Athens.
Definitely we will stay again in our next visit in Athens ! ✈️

If you want a relatively cheap appartement to discover Athens from. This is it! Rooms are very nice and very clean. The location looks a bit sketchy but totally isn't (spoiler alert everything in athens is like this).

Unfortunately I ended up cancelling my reservation because for a few weeks I tried to contact them to add a day to my stay and they never gave me an answer. They read my messages and said they would check, then I asked for an update a few days later, they letft me on "Seen" and never replied... after 16 days I asked them again and even told them that I was concerned with the lack of communication... and they read my messages and didnt give me an answer again. For that reason I cancelled because it created a lot of mistrust... I am not sure f the day that I arrive, they will be available to ask for directions, how to arrive, if there is any issue in the apartment... seems very strange they do this, ZERO CUSTOMER SERVICE. Seems suspicious, if they exist at all...
It's very suspicious that it is almost impossible to contact them. Didn't reply for weeks and leave me on 'seen' on WhatsApp.

I booked 5 months upfront and now you cancel my booking 2 days before check in!!!!!!!!!!!
And you say you are overbooked without any compensation! We have to pay more than double for another place to stay!!! You are so unprofessional!!!!!

It's really very beautiful, the location is just great. The room is very modern and super clean. There were enough towels and there was also some tea and water in the room. All in all a very good suite. But I deducted a star because the surrounding area is quite run down and houses everywhere are empty or falling apart. In addition, the district suffers from a garbage problem due to the poor infrastructure, but this seems to be the case everywhere in Athens. If that bothers you, you're generally in the wrong part of Athens.

Very good point.
Everything is close and very good facilities.

Bedbugs in apartment number 1
To flee

I had a great stay there, first had a tiny room - be aware that when you open the window you won’t see the exterior; but slept very well. I then moved to another bigger and brighter room on the last floor and it was perfect. The receptionists are amazingly friendly, the breakfast was delicious and I could spent my days working on the rooftop. Very central location.

My wife and me stayed in this hotel for 3 nights. The location is very good, it is near to a subway station. Our room was good, although it was small, but it was comfortable. The best thing was the staff: thanks to both Georges (K. and D.) and two other young guys whose names I can't recall (sorry about that). They were super friendly and helpful, I wish them the best!

We had an absolutely wonderful stay at Athens Market Portrait. Every aspect of our experience was exceptional, from the beautifully appointed rooms to the delicious breakfast and the incredibly helpful team.

The location of the hotel was ideal, offering easy access to nearby activities and attractions. Whether it was exploring cultural sites, shopping, or dining out, everything was within convenient reach.

The room was perfectly clean and the amenities were top-notch, ensuring we had everything we needed for a relaxing stay, After a day of exploring, returning to our room and sinking into such a comfortable bed and mattress was a highlight of each evening.

The Breakfast was a highlight of each morning. The selection was diverse and delicious, catering to different preferences with fresh, high-quality ingredients. It was the perfect way to start our days.
The kindness and excellent service of the two ladies who served breakfast were outstanding and deserve recognition,

The team at the hotel went above and beyond to make us feel welcomed and valued throughout our stay. Their kindness and generosity were evident in every interaction, making our experience truly memorable.

A special mention goes to Mr. Georges Kehoudakis, whose attentiveness and dedication to guest satisfaction were remarkable. His recommendations for local experiences and dining were spot-on, enhancing our overall enjoyment of the stay.

Overall, my friend and I thoroughly enjoyed our time at Athens Market Portrait and would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a memorable and comfortable stay in Athens.

Thank you to the entire team for making our stay truly exceptional. We look forward to returning and experiencing your hospitality again.

The staff is very friendly and helpful. Great breakfast, I recommend French toasts. Rooms are well thoughts however a bit tight. Location is close to the center and convenient, although the area itself is rundown (abandoned buildings, etc)

Very neat and tidy rooms. Great location that's a short walk to most places you would want to visit(Akropolis, Agora, 20 min walk to the archeology museum). Lots of restaurants and night life close by(

After our original hotel closed down, we found ourselves with no accommodation in Athens! How lucky we were to find ELA 5 residences. It has clean, modern, bright and big apartments that are perfect after a busy day exploring Athens. Great value, so you should have no doubts about booking here!

On the middle of quite an interesting area.
But the apartment was lovely. New, quiet, and clean. With a huge balcony, it was a cool view.
Great place! Clean and bright venue! Location is a quick Uber or taxi to all major locations. Also close to train and public transportation.
Excellent apartments! They are modern, clean, and well-appointed. The electronic keys are a fantastic feature. Highly recommended. I stayed with my family: two adults and two children.

Sure, here's a review for the hotel on Google Maps:

---

We booked this hotel last minute as our previous reservation fell through. The staff was very friendly and helpful, allowing us to check in early. The location near Omonia metro station is excellent, with a nice local restaurant and a market offering perfect halva nearby. The kitchenette was well-equipped, making it easy to prepare meals. Highly recommended!

Great attentive and helpful staff, amazing breakfast included. Rooms are very urban as well as location. It's an easy walk to the main areas but one thing I wish we had known was that just a side street off the plaza across the street is a more charming walk into the best areas towards Plaka. We walked the rather dirty & congested main road up & down many times before realizing there are incredible streets and restaurants, cafes along the way.

Feeling at home from arrival to departure. The best choice in Athens; I was very satisfied with their kindness and professionalism. The customer is showered with attention. Upon my arrival, they informed me that they were offering me a free room upgrade, assigning me the suite. The room was perfect, clean, spacious, and equipped with all the comforts—we couldn't have asked for anything better. The staff were always attentive, smiling, and kind. The hotel's location is excellent; you can reach all points of interest on foot without needing public transport. It also has a secure and monitored parking lot. We will definitely return

Very attentive and friendly staff. When we requested anything, it arrived to our room within minutes. Walkable to the Acropolis and many famous landmarks in Athens.

Air conditioning works better than many other hotels we’ve stayed in Europe. The only negative was the doors close pretty loudly so it can wake you up in the room when someone else closes their door, but we would still recommend this hotel to others staying in Athens!

Very disappointing stay!
Hotel is old and the room feels very used. 200 years old thin supper used towels...
We booked a suite from Agoda on arrival received standard room, they didn't want to provide us what we paid for in the beginning..Make sure you get what you booked because it feels like a trick..

Over priced.
Low value for money.
Not recommended

Wonderful stay. The staff at the hotel reminds you what great, friendly service feels like.
Restaurant is wonderful and the breakfast was amazing. Location is perfect with easy walk to everywhere.
Would 100% recommend.
Air conditioning didn't work. Location was good but not family appropriate
Best time ever - we will come back !

Amazing location. Right where the heart of the city beats. Very close interesting reference points town hall, market, Monastiraki, Acropolis! Host very informative in his information.Thank you very much!
Very dirty floor... My paws turned black very quickly... I find it unacceptable... Also the sofa was full of stains! The sink in the bathroom was out of place... In general, it was nothing special...

The apartment is centrally located in Athens. Short walking distance to most things.

The apartment seems clean, modern and functional. Large terrace that gives a nice view over part of Athens.

The host responded immediately via Whatsapp and solved any problems or questions we had during our stay.

Normal height of the railing, but it is far down from the terrace, so with regard to small children, there may be a little extra to watch out for.

The neighborhood looks rough with graffiti everywhere and hectic narrow streets with lots of people, cars and mopeds. We weren't out very late, so I can't say anything about how the security is in the evening and at night. But, during the day it felt as "safe" as the rest of Athens.

We were only given a key that was attached to a chip that must be in the apartment for the electricity to be on. This offered some logistics if some were to leave early and others to sleep. We also did not request another key, so it is possible that this could also have been resolved.

There are a number of specialty shops in the immediate vicinity that sell spices, meat, cold cuts and cheese. There is also a fruit and vegetable market and a fish and meat market a few meters from the front door.

Recommends the apartment for families, couples and friends.

this place is clean with great terrace and beautifully decorated, located in the best spot of athens. my only feedback is not about the apartment/room itself rather than the building; the entrance needs some cleaning and the elevator is a bit scary ngl.
Very good quality for that price  . Very convenient location .  Really good place to stay in Athens

Although the appearance of the portal worried us when we saw it, the apartment is impeccable. The decoration with taste. The quality windows insulate perfectly from noise. We were surprised by the intelligent energy saving system: when you open a window, if the A/C is running in that room it stops automatically.
All perfect!!!!

Everything was perfect during our stay, the house is new and very tastefully done, perfect view from the balcony and excellent communication with the owners during our reservation and check-in.
It was spotlessly clean and had everything we needed for our stay, we will definitely visit next time.

My friend and I arrived late at night. The check in was quick and easy and the staff was super friendly and helpful. We received our key card and went into the room. Upstairs we realised, that one of the beds had some blood stains and also the pillow. We just stayed for the night and left the next day.

When we told the receptionist, he was really friendly and took our reports seriously. We failed to ask for another bed during the night, which we would have gotten.

The breakfast is cheap and simple, 5€ for toast, egg and cheese. That’s a pretty fair rate for the area.

Service top, shower & bathroom top, price top, location top, but check your bed before going to sleep. Overall definitely one of the most friendly and clean hostels I’ve been so far.

Wasn't sure what to expect when we arrived as the street it's on isn't the best.
But what a great room,  we had a private double room with a bathroom.
It was clean spacious, and the bed was comfortable, fresh towels every day and bed made.
We received a welcome shot at the rooftop bar when we arrived.
The view of the acropolis from the bar at night is fantastic!! Especially if seeing it for the first time.
The welcome from George at reception was most welcome after a long day.
If I had to find fault, it would be peoples lack of regard for others staying at the hostel, aka noise when coming to and from the bar after midnight.
But all in all, it's a great stay.

The hostel was amazing with the rooftop bar offering great views and good vibes. The rooms were clean and the reception was very helpful. The location was a bit dodgy it was fine during the day just walking home and night. Overall I would definitely stay here again!

My friend and I stayed 3 nights in a 8 bed female dorm and it was very good! The beds were comfortable and clean and the room was very spacious. The rooftop bar is nice and has a great view. The hostel is 10 mins away from the main square (by walking), which was very convenient for us. The area is dirty and not beautiful but we did not feel unsafe, everything was fine.10/10 recommend!

The hostel was absolutely incredible! The rooms were clean and spacious. Staff were all very friendly and helpful and the rooftop bar was a wonderful experience with an incredible view of the city and the acropolis. We ended up getting food there one night and ate it on the rooftop and the food was delicious and very well priced. All in all we’d love to come back

For this price, there isn't much else. It's al Okay just not great. Staff/cleaning was very friendly and let us stay an hour after checkout because we looked so tired. Location is good, only the beds kept falling apart.

You have to reach last floor, which is not comfortable od you have a lot of luggage.
You share bathrooms and kitchen. Doors arę locked on a video, no keys. There is free Wi-Fi for guests and in case owner responds quickly if you try to contact them.

I booked a room from Urban Rooms for 3 nights and paid in advance before my stay. But after my first night, hotel have canceled my reservation while i was in the room. There was nobody around to communicate, so i took photos of the room as evidence to show that i stayed, then i left the place and find another place to stay. I booked room on Booking.com and the hotel refuse to pay for 2 night that i didn’t stay. I can not get a proper solution from Booking.com, they say they can not reach to hotel. It was on June and it’s been 4 months!
Do not stay in this place, the owner was rude when texting with me also. Place smells really bad, there is no elevator, view is a burnt house kinda creepy, the bathrooms are very dirty and they are not private.
Constantly felt like I was being watched. Bathroom dirty people in the corridors until 4:00 didn’t stay my second booked night. Stains on bed of an unknown liquid and used tissue left in room.

After staying in hostels for a few nights, this was a lovely change for just a few more dollars!
Dimitri was very welcoming upon check in and gave great tips on hidden gems in Athens.
Room felt very clean, although lots street noise. Can't complain given the price and location though.
Also be prepared for 3 flights of stairs as there aren't elevators in the building!

great hotel with super friendly staff, all touristic sites are in walking distance. superb water pressure in the shower. breakfast buffet is large. maybe one little thing they can do is to place a ashtray outside for the smokers. great place to stay when you are in athens

The free breakfast is a joke. It’s disgusting. I will never come here again. This hotel cost too much per day. The food is horrible as far as the breakfast in the morning. too many people and it appears they have never eaten before, but it’s not Greek traditional food very a lot of bread products. The hard boiled eggs are over cooked as an example, very disappointed. I do not blame the help, They were overwhelmed and did the best they could with restocking and turning over tables. The rooftop upstairs bar great place. The views are amazing..

Great location  near to metro but average room quality for the price.
Has many rooms and kept clean.
The roof too has a distant view of the Acropolis. Many restaurants and tavernas nearby also the market is walking distance.

I really didn't like the room I was in, mostly because it didn't even remotely resemble what was advertised on the hotel's website. I was given a very poor room.
Apart from that, sheets were stained, I saw blood and who knows what else on those. The bottom sheet had little holes in it. I'd recommend changing sheets when they're no longer fit for use.
The carpet was full of hair and dirty.
The shower temperature would constantly change, which didn't add to the experience.
Pillows were uncomfortable.
Around 8.30 in the morning, the cleaning staff simply entered my room, like that.

Now, the staff is the only positive note on an otherwise very substandard stay. Staff was polite and helpful throughout the experience and I am very grateful for them.
One note: the rooftop restaurant is beautiful.

The rooms was tiny! Not what you expected regarding the pictures.
The carpet wasn't clean, there were clumps of hair in it. There was a pubic hair still on the toilet.
The bathroom was maybe 1.5m2 big. The shower was tiny tiny corner in a triangle shape to save space. So when you showered you touched that dirty shower curtain and I wished that I could take a shower all over again, but I would touch it again because it was so small (less than 0.5m2).

The breakfast was ok, which gives them 2 stars instead of 1.

place_name: Onar Hotels | Luxury Hotels & Villas in Greece
review_text:
We stayed in Paros at Senia Hotel, and in Santorini at Onar Villas.
Both hotels are members of Onar Hotels and they offer different experience but the same quality, as advertised.
Highly recommended !

place_name: Onar Hotels | Luxury Hotels & Villas in Greece
review_text: We stayed in Onar Villas in Santorini. Delicious breakfast, and the view of volcano was to die for. Recommended!

place_name: Onar Hotels | Luxury Hotels & Villas in Greece
review_text: Stunning one of their hotels in Paros. Two infinity pools, the most delicious breakfast and few steps from Naoussa.

place_name: Onar Hotels | Luxury Hotels & Villas in Greece
review_text: Amazing hotels. We stayed once in Paros and once in Santorini during our island hopping!

It is okay for the price. Though I preferred better quality bathroom, the facilities looked a bit rundown. Overall, it was okay. The AC worked but it dripped down water that splashed everywhere, unless a towel was placed directly under the dripping location to prevent splashing. The balcony door was broken. The bedsheets had stains.

The rooms may be a little old but i loved this hotel. Great location with a 10 mins walk to montisiraki square. The staff were friendly and helped me navigate the area. The price is very good compared to location. I recommend for budget travelers.

Fine for short stays. Good price, okay location. You get towels, shampoo, bar soap. You have to hold the shower head but it's good water pressure. Rooms seem a little antiquated with scent of cigarettes. Beds are comfortable. AC and wifi worked fine.

Terrible people, will say anything they need to avoid working and still get paid. However, if you wanna party with large groups of 16 years olds in the hallways all night this place is for you. The hotel will let you go on no matter what you do and apparently knows that their night shift employee is hesitant to deal with this type of situation. If you'd rather have it quiet and stay at an actual hotel I recommend going to Ares Athens in the same street, which is where myself and a couple of other guests had to go because of Elite's service.

Very good location, and the guy at the reception was nice. However, the hotel is not like in the pictures at all.
It is very old; the beds are old, not clean, and absolutely not comfortable. I was so tired the entire stay because of that.

You need to review your cleaning methods and change the beds.

place_name: Dorian Inn, Sure Hotel Collection by Best Western
review_text: Had a great stay in the hotel. Service was great.  People at the reception are super friendly. The view of the acropolis from the rooftop is mind blowing. Also the swimming pool on the rooftop is equally amazing. Just some minor not-so-great points-> Swimming pool is open from 10 am to 7 pm. Not possible to use the swimming pool early morning or late evening which would be the best time for a tourist to use the swimming pool (especially on very warm days). Also hotel's elevator(there are 2 of them) are really tiny, Max 3 adults can get in. The area behind the hotel is a bit untidy but nothing to worry. Summary is, we had a great stay, wonderful service, lovely people

place_name: Dorian Inn, Sure Hotel Collection by Best Western
review_text: The room is not at all like what you see in pictures. It is outdated and desperately needs renovation. Water started leaking from the bathroom. We mentioned to the reception. I was looking for a room chnage/update as the room was very far apart from what i had expected from the pictures but it was made as a big hassel by the recption and it di not suit us to wait while we had to make the beat of our vacation. The leak was fixed after 2 days. the only positive thing is the roff top pool and view. It being central as pros and cons. Just a walk to the metro but adjacant bakstreet is filthy with paan stains done by migrants who we found just roaming in the streets. I advise to just stick to the main street to avoid stares.

place_name: Dorian Inn, Sure Hotel Collection by Best Western
review_text:
Friendly staff, nice and clean room. Located near metro station. Nice rooftop restaurant/bar, with swimming pool.
Some noice from the road outside, but it is a hotel located in busy Athens.

Nice wiew from room balcony and roof top.

Would stay again.

place_name: Dorian Inn, Sure Hotel Collection by Best Western
review_text:
I have to say that this hotel is very valuable, the service is perfect, rooms are clean and luxury, they have a pool and bar on the roof top that it’s one of the best with a great view.
The only disadvantage is the location, it’s close to the canter 5 minutes walk but the neighbourhood a bit dangerous around (a lot of refugees).
I really recommend every one 4.4/5 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We paid: 520€ for 2 persons 5 nights at May✅

place_name: Dorian Inn, Sure Hotel Collection by Best Western
review_text: Nice hotel, not too far away from the centre. In the room you find everything you need but it’s not good soundproof. Recommend for 1/2 nights. Good quality price!
Very good 👍thanks
Stayed there between 9-11.09.2024 .Friendly staff welcomes you. Rooms ate clean and tidy, free wifi you can use. Close to Monastraki and metro station. Very very good breakfast.

Tiny rooms but clean and tidy.
Good breakfast and friendly staff.
Great location near omonia metro
Lots of food options and shops .

This hotel was absolutely beautiful, clean and very comfortable beds . Maid service was 100% front of desk friendly and very accommodating and on our last day allowed us to keep our luggage at hotel and return just before our flight . It can be very noisy as it is on Main Street but all of hotels are mainly on Main Street . Close to all site seeing if that’s what you are going to see . 100% would return that’s for sure 💜 comes with balcony if requested x
Stayed here for four nights during a tour and found the place to be nice.  Friendly staff and the breakfast buffet is nicely stocked.  I would stay here again most certainly.
Great hotel, nice rooms excellent service, a bonus we arrived at 9:30 am and were allowed to chechin right away. Good location close to main sites , recommended

Hotel's location is good, close to the city center, but it's also situated in a shady neighbourhood where heroin and crack addicts reside (got this info from a tour guide). This being said, I had no problems with anyone, even when arriving late at night. Room prices are really cheap but the hotel could use some improvements (light bulb in the room was busted and had to replace it myself, also had to buy my own toilet paper and the window was broken & couldn't be opened). If you're not fussy about things you'll be okay here. If you expect top service and comfort better stay elsewhere.

This little hotel is cheap and,a bit run down but safe, clean enough and bed was excellent. Staff was friendly. Only the bathroom lets it down. Just one on the second floor shared by 12 rooms. The shower is hot but gets the floor wet. Door wouldnt lock because door frame broke. Toilet paper disappears. Best to bring your own.

This is the worst hotel i have ever been in, in my entire life. I arrived there 11am and had to wait outside with my luggage for over 30 minutes before someone turned up to work and opened the door for me. The lady kept yelling at me and saying she doesn’t have my reservation even after I have showed here the confirmations on my email. She doesn’t understand a single word of english but is at the reception. She eventually gave me a room that is at the door way. With no heating. There was a mini heater and she took it away. Toilet was upstairs while i was on the ground floor.  Room was very tacky, never been in such a situation in my life. I would advise anyone i know never to book here. Rather sleep at the airport.

I was there for 3 nights and if u expect comfort, please search for another hotel. The only time i saw the receptionist was when i checked in. The room was small but ok. You will have no own bathroom but that was ok because it seemed i was the only person in the hotel the whole time. The neighbourhood was the most awkward thing: it was dirty, loud and full of men from the Middle East and Pakistan/India. The walls are full of ugly graffiti and the hotel is hard to find without navigation. If you look for a small base where you can just sleep, it is ok but if you want a real hotel with real service, search for another place.

We stayed at this hotel for 3 nights and granted it is fairly cheap and located somewhere near the Center of town... But that is literally ALL it has going for it! We would NEVER stay here again!! And I would never wish this hotel on my worst enemy! I have been backpacking alot and I have seen some bad places, but this is worse than any hostel i have been at. (you might think im exaggerating, but honestly this is not a good place).

The neighborhood it is in is horrible, there are drunk people and homeless everywhere along with it being a slum.

The hosts very not accomodating at all, they actually seemed annoyed at the fact that we stayed there..

The toilet/bathroom was continously without toilet paper and filthy!

The room was insanely small and the lamps etc. on the walls looked like they were all about to fall down!

I have more but to round off, we had to ring the bell at the reception, ring the doorbell, knock on the hosts appartement door and call the hotel to check out.. And even with all this we still didn't find anyone to check out with.. So we just left the key!

Seriously consider staying somewhere else during your time in Athens!

place_name: Athens The L7 Str - Luxury Boutique Collection Hotel
review_text:
Hotel is so clean, staff are super friendly and helpful.
Cozy and super romantic, breakfast is sweet and simple. So simple but in a way that you will love it and deserve trying it. Again, staff are very very friendly and super clean and elegant. If I visit Athens again I will stay in the hotel.
Note: the elevator is for 3 people maximum and few steps to take before reaching the elevator.

place_name: Athens The L7 Str - Luxury Boutique Collection Hotel
review_text:
Our experience from the moment we arrived was nothing short of exceptional. From the outset, we were met with efficiency and professionalism—the room was meticulously prepared on time, and the check-in process was seamless, ensuring we could begin our stay without any delays. The accommodations exceeded our expectations, with rooms that were thoughtfully designed, soundproofed for maximum comfort, and maintained to the highest standards of cleanliness.

What truly set this hotel apart, however, was the remarkable service we received throughout our stay. Every member of the staff was not only attentive and helpful but also genuinely welcoming, consistently offering service with a smile. Their warmth and dedication created a positive and memorable atmosphere that made us feel truly valued as guests.

While the L7 offers numerous qualities worth recommending, including its prime location, excellent amenities, and attention to detail, it is the exceptional service provided by the team that truly distinguishes it. Their commitment to hospitality is the main reason we would wholeheartedly recommend this hotel to others.

place_name: Athens The L7 Str - Luxury Boutique Collection Hotel
review_text:
Our stay at Athens The L7 Str - Luxury Boutique Collection Hotel has been nothing short of exceptional. From the moment we arrived, we felt like we were in a 5-star establishment. The service has been impeccable, and our room is beautifully appointed and stocked with everything we could need.

A special mention goes to Leila at the reception. On our first night, jet lag had us up at 3 AM and feeling hungry. Not knowing what to do, we called the reception, and Leila went above and beyond to assist us. She personally used her own account to order food delivery for us, ensuring we had a delicious meal in the middle of the night. This kind of service is rare and speaks volumes about the care and dedication of the staff here.

If you’re looking for a hotel in Athens where the service truly stands out, I can’t recommend this place enough. Leila and the entire team made our stay unforgettable!

place_name: Athens The L7 Str - Luxury Boutique Collection Hotel
review_text: I recently stayed in Athens and found this hotel to be a poor choice. There are definitely better options available. The hotel is old and not well-maintained, with cleanliness being a major issue—my room felt dirty and uninviting. Overall, I wouldn’t recommend this place to anyone looking for a comfortable and enjoyable stay.

place_name: Athens The L7 Str - Luxury Boutique Collection Hotel
review_text: Highly recommend this fabulous well appointed hotel. The staff were amazing, helped with recommendations for restaurants , ordered our taxi to and from the airport, greeted us with a smile every day. Nothing was too much trouble. The breakfast was lovely, a great selection, freshly made orange juice, eggs cooked to order. The bar is a great addition.  We would definitely stay here again if in Athens.

First of all the location is incorrect if you using phone maps it takes you somewhere else and we really struggled getting there. We searched for Eurobank which was next door and that let us reach there finally…
The service was very basic (we were charged a tourist tax fee of 1.50 euro which is ok but I never been charged that before anywhere else).
The bedrooms were fairly clean but chairs had stains and mattresses had also (please check the underside) our mattress looked really dirty almost like someone did pee or similar things on it. We left 2 days ago and when we reach home now we had some bugs coming out of our bags and clothes 😢 myself and my daughter are covered in spots not sure what is this I’m hoping from the bottom of my heart that it is not bed bugs 😢 I’m terrified and now washing everything in 90C plus taking everything to tumble dry.
I would not visit again sorry.

Would not stay here again. The hotel is quite rundown and while I am not one to complain normally, the shower did not have hot water the first 2 days of my stay and would go from hot to freezing when it did finally work. I have also never slept on such an uncomfortable bed (even hostels have been better). Lastly, THIS AREA IS NOT SAFE. I did not realize when booking, but this is the worst neighbourhood in Athens to stay in and you will not feel safe walking around. Please be careful and book at a better place

This hotel is fantastic. I had an amazing sleep. The room and bed are comfortable. Great AC. There were no bed bugs as I read in other reviews. The area is close to the city centre. Hondos centre has a great breakfast area with views of the Acropolis. Just 100 metres up the road. I would come back again

Extremely loud place. Noise from the street I could live with but the noise made by everyone was unbelievable. Slammed doors, thin walls, hearing people through the vents. Every door in this building was designed to be slammed. The location was ok, 25 min to the acropolis. Also pictures look very nice on the site but they are not showing the truth.
Spartan facility at cost effective price. Clean. Cordial staff. Great location. Good wifi. Refrigerator in room. Would stay here again while touring Athens.
Perfect apartment!

Great location!
Very clean!
Excellent ratio: price/quality!
My rating is 5+
Amazing place. Spotlessly clean, comfortable, fully equipped and always my first choice.
Good
Ok
Very beautiful

Excellent budget hotel near Athens port. Spotlessly clean with a selection of Olive tree products in the bathroom as well as complimentary toothbrushes and slippers . After a long day travelling and getting to the hotel late it was a bonus to find the room fridge stocked with beer, wine and nuts. Great place for an overnight stop before sailing away around the Mediterranean

Hotel was able to accommodate a fragrance free room due to perfume allergy. However, staff was not willing to accommodate for perfume allergy in the common areas where they were heavily perfumed to the extent that one could smell the perfume outside down the sidewalk.  Room was relatively clean, but shower floor need to be scrubbed and was a slip hazard. The breakfast was good, but the dining room was filled with perfume causing respiratory/allergic reactions.

Had a pleasant stay at this hotel. Staffs were kind and helpful. We were lucky enough to get a room that faced the back alley as it was very quiet. Did not eat breakfast as it wasn't included and relatively expensive. Hotel is near the bus stop which has buses that take you to the airport bus stop. Can be difficult to stop the car to unload luggage as the hotel faces the main road. Has paid parking but managed to find free parking on one of the one-way busy side road.

The Alva Hotel is really great - very welcoming atmosphere. The staff throughout the hotel was very professional and friendly. They always greeted us and smiled at us. The 24 hour front desk is extremely helpful. The breakfast (à la carte) was tasty. The location of the hotel is great, just a few minutes walking distance to the main spots. The room was cosy, comfortable and clean. I recommend this hotel without hesitation to all tourists who want to travel to Athens.

24hour check in was super helpful for us as we landed after midnight. Hotel was easily accessible by taxi. New and clean hotel. One star off due to noisy street and there’s no shower curtain or anything to block off the water from getting everywhere on the bathroom floor (slip hazard). Otherwise, it was a great stay with great staff!

Perfect neighborhood, amazing views and beautiful apartment. Perfect for our family. Easy walking distance to major sites in a lively neighborhood that we felt safe even late at night. Would never stay anywhere else after finding this gem!! Can’t recommend enough. Booked directly, had zero issues and they even set up transportation from airport that was great. My only suggestion is larger trash cans and get a small microwave. We had so much food we always had left overs and a small microwave would have been perfect but not having one wasn’t that big a deal either.

Do not book with these!
After them promising me a refund i needed written confirmation of this agreement sent to booking.com. Days went by and they did not send anything, nor did they reply to many messages i sent. (see evidence from booking.com chat) They lack communication skills which has therefore given me the need to leave this review.
Communication should be essential if you are to run a business professionally! Ignoring customers is not good!
I cannot travel to Greece due to border closures in Australia.
DO NOT pay them any money upfront or you will not get your money back if you cannot get to this destination due to covid restrictions. Only book through sites that offer free cancellations.

After posting this review i got a reply from the hotel owner shortly afterwards. It just proves that they can communicate when it comes to things like a negative review.  It should not have to resort to this!

Central location. New and modern apartment, you have everything you need like fridge, kettle, coffee, tea and sugar, comfortable bed, big space and big bathroom with toiletries. It is not hard to find the apartment, number 14, black door next to a shop. When you arrive you call the property and if you get lost you just ask around and anyone can help you. Katerina welcomed us in a warm way and she was always available if we needed anything.

Great apartments hotel.
Good service for the hotel management!
No soundproofing, host not responsive, not recommended

What a hidden gem! One of our top global hotel experiences, in this unassuming location in the middle of the city--just a tranquil oasis to retreat to after a busy day around Athens. Surprisingly quiet from city noises, delicious breakfast. We loved our rooftop hot tub view of the Parthenon, the church bells next door, and the well-appointed room and lobby. The staff was so friendly and warm. Be warned it's about 75 stairs up to that top room (a great workout each time), but the staff helps with luggage. Enjoy Tamara's yogurt around the corner, we miss it already!

Our family of four stayed at the Monument last month and we have never stayed anywhere more hospitable. Our luggage was lost after a very long flight and the staff took us under their wing and gave us everything we needed to get through the first few days. AND THEN. . . one of the staff members went way above and beyond and called the airport to try to track down our luggage AND THEN went to the airport with my husband to help retrieve it. Simply amazing.

All the staff was 100% attentive and provided excellent service around the clock. The hotel manager also went out of her way to help me with our meal plans, activities and sight seeing. She even sent us home with a delicious jar of Greek jam as a thank you.

The hotel is gorgeous, very luxurious feeling with an amazing breakfast served by the kindest soul you've ever met.

The location is very convenient to everything you need. If I could give this hotel 10 stars I would. Do not hesitate to stay here, you will be pampered and feel so welcome and comfortable.

I’ve traveled the world. Stayed in hundreds of very fine hotels. I have never been more welcomed and served in such a kind way- this little hotel is spectacular, quiet, wonderful, classy. Christina from service, and all other staff, went above and beyond with a smile every time. Truly! We stayed in the top room with the hot tub on the balcony, it was very pleasant quite and clean.

My wife and I stayed here for the beginning of our honeymoon and could not have been happier. The staff was super friendly and knowledgeable. The decor and vibe in general is just awesome. Our rooftop room had a beautiful view of the acropolis and we really enjoyed the hot tub in the evenings. We also enjoyed the sauna, steam room, and massages. On top of that, the hotel has a great location; it's close to everything without being right in the middle of the super touristy spots. Highly recommend!

Our stay at The Monument Hotel in Athens was incredible.  From the moment we booked our stay several weeks ahead of our visit to Athens, the staff was so accommodating.  They assisted us in arranging transfer from  and back to the airport, they helped us identify multiple local restaurants to try, and were a wealth of knowledge.  Every single person on staff that we came in contact with were so kind and accommodating.  The hotel itself is also very nice.  It is an old residence that was designed/built by a famous architect and the historical/architectural aspects were fascinating and beautiful.  There are only 9 rooms, but this allows for the remarkably high service levels.  We had breakfast on our terrace each morning we were there and enjoyed and impromptu massage in the spa that the staff helped us coordinate at the last minute when we had a free afternoon.  Check out The Monument Hotel in Athens.  You’ll be glad that you did.

The apartment is cozy, clean, well equipped, located on a street that seems safe, is close to the taverns from psyri, but away enough so you won't hear any music when you sleep. We had no problem with the neighbours.
The apartment has 2 AC units so you can sleep well during summer days.
The bathroom has everything you need, soap, shampoo, shower gel, towels, hair dryer.
The kitchen have a microwave, a small fridge, a sandwich maker, plates and utensils. There is no electric stove but with so many taverns around you won't need to cook at home.
Also is good to bring your own iron for clothes, maybe if we had asked, the host would have offered it to us, but on the website wasn't specified anything about the iron, so we prepared.
The host is helpful and polite, I have only good words about our interaction.
I'll recommend this place to my friends and when I'll come back to Athens I'll check the availability of Filia place.

Great place to stay when in Athens! We even got quite sick and had to stay in bed for a full day and they were accommodating, the space was really good and it was nice having access to Netflix and YouTube (as we don't understand the Greek TV unfortunately).

Only negatives was we found small amounts of dried blood on the sheets from previous people but we were left with new sheets very promptly when asked. And the view wasn't much for our room because of  the side of the building we were on (facing the allyway and these abandoned looking spooky apartments)

Honestly had a really good stay here and don’t usually rate places 5/5! But for the price we paid the room was fabulous 2 bathrooms with a shower each and toilet each! 2 TV’s an extremely comfy bed and very clean room! It is very much newly renovated so modern and clean.

Only downfall is the entrance and way up to the rooms does look quite dodgy and probably not safe for women at night… but the location is central 5 mins walk to the best spots!
A really nice place to stay right in the heart of Athens

The location is perfect, and the room itself was worth the price. A lot of noise in the morning comong from car alarms and staff working in the next room at 8:30 AM, plus a not very comfortable bed and shower were the most obvious inconvinients. Choose this apartment if you are not gonna spend a lot of time in there, you want to be close to the center and not pay a lot of money.

We had such an amazing stay at the Philia! After arriving in Athens on night one of our two night stay there, we quickly realized that our initial hotel was not up to our standards. We checked out the next morning and headed to the Philia, and it was a complete 180 from our initial hotel! The entire staff went above and beyond to make sure that we enjoyed our stay, and the location of the hotel was perfect for exploring Athens. Our suite was incredible with a view of the Acropolis, and we had an incredible breakfast (included with our stay) brought to our room the next morning before we headed to the airport. I can't recommend staying here enough - from the hospitality, to the cleanliness to the rooms, to the location, everything was perfect!

If you’re looking for a boutique hotel with charm, location and service look no further. We spent two nights at Philia Boutique Hotel before boarding our Mediterranean cruise. The room was tastefully decorated, comfortable and well maintained. The area around the hotel was quiet, but steps away from the sites, restaurants and nightlife.

We were most impressed by the exceptional and personalized service. Air France lost our luggage. Their abysmal communication system wasn’t helpful. Maria, the hotel clerk, took the initiative to phone lost and found at the Athens airport to assist in the navigation of a frustrating situation.

No breakfast buffet here! We were able to select our breakfast from a list of options as well as the time for it to be served in the inviting dining room/bar or your room.

Would definitely stay here on our next holiday in Athens. Gratitude to all of the staff that made for a delightful experience.

We spent one night here post cruise. The grounds and rooms were beautiful and clean but the thing that puts this hotel over the top is the girls working the reception desk. They were so friendly, responsive and helpful. The room came with breakfast that we weren’t going to be able to partake in due to having a early flight but they made us a lovely breakfast box with a very nice hand written note wishing us safe travels. In all of our travels, we’ve never seen service like these ladies provided.

Even though we only were able to stay at this hotel one night, it was an exceptional experience. The reception staff were so friendly and welcoming. They prepared an excellent breakfast that we could bring with us in the morning when we had a very early ferry departure. The room was beautiful, clean, and comfortable. Worked great for our family of 4.

Perfect location. Walk to all the attractions in Athens, plenty of dining options from one to fifteen minutes away, but the hotel is located on a narrow one-way street so not much noise. It’s really more of a quaint B&B than a hotel by American standards, but it’s the place we will always stay when visiting Athens. The included breakfast was plenty, delicious, and healthy. It’s a family run establishment, so the service is excellent. For Americans familiar with European hotels: they have AC that actually cools, top bed sheets, and washcloths!

The private terrace and view of the acropolis is unbeatable.
The apartment is just like the pictures and super clean.The host was amazing and very helpfull, she anwsered very quickly on everything i asked and made sure i had a great stay.
Check-in and check-out was super easy, and the apartment is in a fantastic location.
One of the best places we’ve ever stayed.
Fabulous Apartment with views to die for. Apartment has been refurbished to a very high standard would definitely book again Ian&Anne
Amazing stay!!! View of the Acropolis is breathtaking and place is super clean and well located. Highly recommend!
Wowww!!!! What a view!!!! Absolutely amazing. The apartment is great with a spacious veranda

Amazing accommodation! In one of the best spots in the center of Athens.
Spotlessly clean apartment with a beautiful view of the holy rock of the Acropolis.
Vangelis and Iro always willing to help with anything we needed. I highly recommend it.

What a lovely hotel! The Artist has so many wonderful details, from a hearty and delicious breakfast to a well-appointed room. And I was thrilled to have a view of the Acropolis. The Artist is a great value for any traveler.

Absolutely amazing service. Beyond compare. Transfers arranged in seconds, a freshly prepared breakfast, and when they realized we were leaving very early in the morning they offered to prepare us a breakfast to go. Great rooms, excellent location of course but it’s the service that makes The Artist outstanding! Will be recommending to everyone I know traveling to Athens. Thank you!

An absolutely lovely stay, staff were very helpful, accomodating and considerate. The room was exactly what we needed and had a gorgeous view of the Acropolis. The rooftop restaurant also has a great view of the Acropolis and delicious food/cocktails. Could not recommend The Artist Athens more! Will be recommending them to friends and family travelling to Athens! Thank you very much :)

The staff was super friendly and accommodating! Any questions I had about the area they were more than happy to help me with. The rooftop restaurant had some of the best food I ate in Athens! It also has an amazing view of the acropolis. The hotel is located literally around the corner from dope bars and restaurants. Couldn’t be happier with this hotel!

The staff is very welcoming and genuinely interested in making your stay the best it could be. The breakfasts ordered off a diverse menu were excellent! Hotel was very clean!  Great location in the city center.

This hotel is great if you are staying a couple of nights in Athens. The beds are comfy, the cleaning is great and everyone is super friendly. They will hold your bags if you have a later flight in the evening. The location is sensational to all the laneways which are full of restaurants and shops the atmosphere at night is buzzing. The view from the their rooftop is pretty spectacular too, we grabbed a beer and watch the sunset. Also walking distance to the acropolis.

Excellent Location for visiting Athens. Breakfast was just a delight. Our Room was very comfortable and had a great view from our room over Athens. The added bonus of the Roof Terrace was a wonderful area to relax after a busy day site seeing. The view of the Acropolis in the Evening is just wonderful.

We ended up booking the last available room at this hotel at the last minute after our first hotel was a bad experience, and it was a great decision! Our room had a balcony with an incredible view of the Akropolis and the bed was comfortable. The room was a bit tight, but manageable. There was some noise from the rooftop above and people moving around in the hall, but nothing too bad. The staff was incredibly kind and helpful and the location is convenient to the city center without being too busy. Loved this hotel!

Great hotel, perfect Location, amazing views to the Partenón from the rooms and great service. Anastasia and Anano from the kitchen serve delicious greek breakfast witth an amazingly kind and warm attitude. Only thing to improve is the air conditioning in the breakfast room. It was too warm there, but it should be easy to fix. All other aspects of the hotel are perfect, people in the reception also very kind . Great hotel in a great place !

We stayed at Arion the end of May.  While the room was a little small the bed was very comfortable and the staff was nice and helpful .  The breakfast was great and Anastasia was so accommodating in getting anything you asked for. You cannot beat the location.  Walkable to shopping and eating.  We would definitely stay here again!

Amazing place to stay in Athens. Super spacious and comfortable. Washing machine available as well as fruit and water provided daily. The host is so kind and welcoming. The location is perfect for exploring the city. Loved it!

Absolutely loved my stay at this room! The cleanliness was top-notch and the amenities provided exceeded my expectations...The location was convenient, with easy access to nearby attractions and public transportation (Omonia metro station). The host was incredibly responsive and accommodating, making check-in and check-out seamless. Would highly recommend this cozy retreat to anyone visiting Athens!!!
A friendly and conscientious host, a wonderful flat and an amazing location. If I could give more than 5 stars I would!

My stay at this place was absolutely fantastic! The location couldn't have been more perfect - just a stone's throw away from downtown and incredibly close to the subway (Metro), making it incredibly convenient to explore the city.

The room itself was spacious and beautifully decorated, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere. I loved the attention to detail in the decor - it truly made the space feel like a home away from home.

Additionally, the host was incredibly accommodating and made sure that I had everything I needed for a comfortable stay. Their hospitality truly went above and beyond my expectations.

Overall, I had a wonderful experience and would highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a convenient and comfortable place to stay in the heart of the city. I will definitely be returning on my next visit!
Great place and amazing host!
A house fully equipped with everything you need, in the center of Athens, a breath away from all the attractions.
Loved our stay in this apartment and area. Very clean, comfortable and with a great terrace with view of Pnix and Areopagus Hills. Would definitely recommend.

The loft looks exactly like the photos and the view is amazing.The sunsets are breathtaking from the balcony. Hosts were very accommodating and communicating through whatsApp goes really smooth, with quick replies.
I would definitely recommend the loft to my friends. My stay was fantastic!

Perfect location , Cozy , super clean , beautiful view with Acropolis in front our eyes 🤩 big surprise on my 3rd stay 💙Host did a gorgeous upgrade on the building 👌 also added a Washer  /Dryer which was a plus 👍 I highly recommended this place is on a perfect spot near all caffès n pastry stores , restaurants & Rooftop is right there mins walking no need car to see the main point Center of Athens
Thank you for always welcome us at your beautiful penthouse & the new room was perfect for my boy
It feels like home to us
Love you  Greece 🇬🇷
See you soon 🙏💙💫✨
Erika & Carmine ❤️
Great modern apartment with a lovely terrace! Location excellent also.

Apartment ideally located with a pleasant terrace for sunny days. ☀️
We spent a week in Athens and the apartment won us over with its decoration, comfort and location.

The team gives us a warm and complete welcome. We recommend this apartment.

This hotel is amazing! Beautiful, resort quality rooms at an amazing price. The service is top tier; we were greeted before we even entered the door and had our luggage (3 big suitcases) handled immediately. The room itself was beautiful, bed was extremely comfortable, and the room had great amenities like extra shaving supplies, sewing kit, mini fridge,  etc. We unfortunately had our room change from the original booking, but the hotel management compensated with a complementary bottle of wine and dinner at their restaurant (which was amazing). I'd especially like to thank Becky,  our server at the restaurant, who made our dinner super enjoyable and fun. Also, all the doormen were so kind and friendly. They really made our stay feel special. 10/10 recommend and will definitely have to visit again!

Absolutely amazing staff.  They took care of us so well and were all so kind and thoughtful.  One of the best hotel experiences I've had in a while.  Breakfast was also massive and delicious.  Would very much recommend the additional cost.

I recently stayed at the Luwian hotel and it beyond exceeded our expectations. Everyone at the front desk were friendly and helped with anything we needed,  especially Lemonia. The rooms were amazing.  Everything brand new and top quality. They were a perfect size and clean. Bathrooms were actually large, nothing like some of the other hotels I’ve been at. The restaurant on the top floor had amazing staff, very friendly,  with delicious food. Anywhere from the breakfast to dinner.  I especially loved the tomato salad that a feta spread that was to die for. And you must try  their cocktails 🍹,  they pride themselves on making everything so tasty and beautiful .  We definitely will stay here every time we come to Greece, which is every year.  If there was a way for me to give more stars I would. Highly recommend.

Great value for money.

Everything was new, the hotel looked great, and they were very hospitable.

Location is a bit iffy but very close to all the attractions and trendy areas.

The staff were AMAZING.

This hotel offers exceptional comfort right in the heart of Athens. The staff goes above and beyond, providing service that far exceeds the standard as compared with other hotels. My room was modern and clean. Breakfast was both delicious and diverse. Another advantage is that it is served in the restaurant on the top floor of the building (with a nice view of the area), which allows you to be well tuned for the next day from the very morning. In the same restaurant, I enjoyed a delicious dinner one evening, with the lamb chops being the best I’ve ever tasted. If I visit Athens again, and I certainly hope to, I will definitely choose to stay here.

This penthouse was gorgeous with the most incredible view of the Acropolis!!  Location is perfect and walkable to everything!  Apartment is super clean and modern.   Vangelis is the best host!!!  His response time is so quick and he was very helpful with providing valuable information on Athens.  I highly recommend this place for a fantastic stay in Athens!!  Thank you Vangelis!

I’m so glad I picked this place! Dreamy indeed! Thank you for everything Vangelis and for arranging the rides for me as well! Communication is excellent and everything was smooth. Great location and Acropolis view! 🙏 Highly recommend this place!

This apartment was just as described. It was very clean and spacious with a fantastic balcony and AMAZING view. The hosts were quick to respond to any questions. I would definitely recommend this property to others!

The definition of a value for money stay.
