Great spot, next to all sights and tons of restaurants/bar and mass transportation at the doorstep, a very friendly and helpful host, great facilities (everything in the apartments is brand new) and above all a breathtaking view of the Acropolis day and (especially) night.

place_name: Superb industrial style lodge heart of Athens
review_text: Clean place in the center of the town. Of course noisy, we are on the center. Easy access, close to everything.

place_name: Superb industrial style lodge heart of Athens
review_text: Lovely place in the center of Athens. Amazing view! Would totally revisit!

place_name: Superb industrial style lodge heart of Athens
review_text: Nice industrial appartement in a middle of neibourhood full of bars and restaurants

place_name: Superb industrial style lodge heart of Athens
review_text: Awesome

We booked a 60m2 apartment with Amazing Apartments for just one night. The communication was extremely good. Access is easy using codes, everything is very relaxed. The price in October was a bargain!

The small apartment is modern and stylishly furnished. The bed is large and comfortable. Everything you need is there. Coffee and tea are free. There is a booster button to ensure there is enough hot water when showering.

The apartment was on the sixth floor, so the noise from the street was ok. considering that you are in the center of a city of millions. But with the windows open it gets rather violent. You can reach the old town via the pedestrian zone in just a few minutes. There are tons of restaurants and shops there.
We loved our stay at this hotel! The staff is very welcoming, the room is comfy and clean, has a luxury feel and even the towels smelled nice. I would recommend this hotel to anyone!

My whole hotel experience was excellent! Its location is unique, in the heart of Athens, in Omonia square and in a perfectly safe central part of it, right next to the metro stop and within walking distance of the most important attractions of the city. The room was comfortable, spacious, high-ceilinged, luxurious, with high aesthetic decoration and fully equipped. The hotel staff was very kind and helpful, especially its excellent General Manager, Giorgos Kanellopoulos, who was very willing to help with impeccable professionalism, positive energy and courtesy in anything I needed, while providing me with all the necessary information about the city. The hotel was perfect, excellent value for money, I will definitely visit again and highly recommend it!

We stayed at the hotel for 1 night, family of 5. The rooms are new and modern, big and convenient. The location is good. The beds were a little soft (but were convenient, maybe not to those with back pains), but big enough.
The communication with the receptionist was by mail only, which worked ok, but was not immediately. Better to do it by text message.
The only thing disturbing was the load noise from the hallways.

Philosofia has moved completely to online checking-in and customer service so all interaction with staff was via email. Despite no in-person individual, hotel staff were extremely helpful in ensuring that our stay and check-in were as smooth as possible, which they were. The unit itself was beautiful and very spacious! I will say a must stay if you are in Athens. Attractions and city center are a short walk or taxi ride away so great location to be close by.

For the second stay in Athens at the Philosophia Suites, everything was perfect, as expected. Great location (central, close to metro station, and 10-minute walking distance to Monastiraki) and exceptional room (cleanliness, facilities). Perfect place to stay in Athens for a family with children.
Cockroaches in the room! Good location & helpful staff.
I will just stay here again for the price and location, the room is okay but noticed some leaks from the shower to the room, and the internet was really slow so I had to use my data all the time.

This apartment exceeded our expectations! It’s spacious, very clean, and in a quiet area but still close to all the action. The balcony was a great spot to relax after a day of sightseeing. The host was helpful and provided all the information we needed for our trip.

We stayed in a comfortable and tidy apartment, suitable for families. The location was excellent - close to restaurants and public transportation, which made the trip easier. The apartment was clean, and the owners were available and kind.
Highly recommended for those looking for a simple and comfortable place for a vacation.

A new, clean, well-maintained place
Amazing service, we arrived in the middle of the night and they waited for us
The rooms are cleaned every day
The owner of the place is always available for any question or request for help
Without a doubt, a place we will return to
Highly recommended rating 10/10

Mixed feelings about this place.  As many people before me have said the view is great, you can see the Parthenon, really nice at night. The room is nice good size for two, well equipped, with nespresso machines and coffee, cookies, various condiments, as well as soap and shampoo. The room description mentions a safe, but as you will see in the photos it’s bolted to a shelf that you can walk away with. As for the surrounding outside, they say it’s safe, maybe .  The are many homeless people living in the park across the street, many shooting drugs. Before leaving we went and gave them a pair of shoes and a shirt. They were happy but seemed to be in bad shape, very sad. This is just a heads up for those who may not want to see this.

We love this place! Very well located, in the center of the city, very safe zone. The apartment is very clean, nice and cozy. We arrived later than we expected and the host waited us to give us the keys, so nice! We will definitely go back to Athens and we will stay here again.

Very nice furnished Appartments. It’s nice to sit outside at roof terrace with view to Akropolis.
Very friendly owner. Reasonable prices. Uncomplicated and relatable booking.
For us always our perfect stay.
Very nice and spacious apartment in the center of the city equipped with all mod cons.  The view from the balcony is great. You can even see the Parthenon while you enjoy your coffee or your drink.
Very clean, with a great location. The host had printed out information for us and has lockers for your bags after checkout incase you want to explore the city.

Simply perfect!

Our apartment was beautiful. Large and modern with a spacious bathroom, comfortable bed and lounge and even complimentary biscuits, coffee and drinks in the fridge we couldn't believe our luck at finding these apartments. There was also a lift and even a smart TV!

The central location also makes this apartment great for sightseeing being very close to attractions such as Acropolis.

Thanks for making our stay in Athens just that extra bit more special!
Excellent apartments very clean and tidy, great location too, very convenient for moving around Athens center. Great experience overall and highly recommended.
It has the comfort of real home,complete kitchen(helps me save travel expenses as I could cook in this apartment),fully furnished all for a great affordable price.
Modern, clean, close to all cental tourist attractions. Highly recommended!
Great everything was just great

Really nice hotel with modern and spacious rooms. Front desk service leaves a lot to be desired. When we arrived at the hotel from our flight (about 2am), there was a large unorganized group of about 20 people checking in.

We had already pre-checked in and just had to verify our passports to get the room key. Instead of letting us quickly check in so we could get into our room, we had to wait an hour for the large group to get their information together and check into their rooms in groups of 2.

Besides the service, the hotel is excellent and in a good location. The top floor restaurant/bar has an amazing view.

Recently stayed at NYX Esperia in Athens. Will say definitely up there as one of the best 5 star hotels I have stayed at. The room and amenities were fantastic. Morning buffet breakfast was great and obviously can't go past the view of the Acropolis in the morning over breakfast or drinks late at night at the roof bar. Would definitely recommend staying here. Location was great central to everything in town.

We loved our stay here. The hotel is gorgeous and so modern. Our room was comfortable and well-designed, the breakfast was fantastic, and staff was so friendly.  We felt safe walking around the area and loved the pool and the Acropolis view. We did book our sun beds in advance which I recommend doing if you know your schedule for your stay.

Great location, nice rooms, beware of bathrooms with no privacy.

Overall I loved this hotel but had to take off one star because of the horrible bathroom setup. The shower has clear glass and can be seen from the hallway when the front door is open. The toilet has a frosted glass door and you can hear a pin drop from outside. The toilet sprays dirty water on the floor when you flush.

Other perks: Our balcony had a wonderful view of the Parthenon. The pool was very nice with good service and a great view. The breakfast buffet is one of the best I have ever had, with a variety of Greek dishes.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at NYX Esperia Hotel in Athens, and I can't say enough good things about my experience. From the moment I arrived, I was greeted with warm smiles and genuine hospitality. The staff at this hotel are truly exceptional – they are not only professional but also incredibly kind and attentive, always going above and beyond to ensure that my stay was comfortable and enjoyable.

The hotel itself is beautifully maintained, with modern amenities and a cozy atmosphere that made me feel right at home. My room was clean, spacious, and well-equipped, providing the perfect place to relax after a day of exploring the city.

What truly sets NYX Esperia Hotel apart, however, is the people who work there. Their kindness and willingness to assist with any request made my stay truly memorable. Whether it was offering recommendations for local attractions or ensuring that my needs were met, the staff made me feel like a valued guest throughout my stay.

I highly recommend NYX Esperia Hotel to anyone visiting Athens. It’s a wonderful place with amazing people who genuinely care about their guests. I will definitely be returning on my next trip to the city!

The property managers are FABULOUS!! They gave us great recommendations and were so accommodating to our every need. The location was great and was in walking distance to Vari which had three great choices for restaurants as well as the beach restaurant that is next to the property. We were in a 2-bedroom suite that was too big for the two of us but so  comfortable and gave us room to spread out. The kitchen was nice to have for breakfasts and snacks. The terrace was very big and nice to sit out on to have a coffee or a glass of wine with a perfect view to the bay.  There is no dryer but there is a clothes drying rack. Parking is in a garage with an automatic door opener/closer --  very nice. Common for all the islands but we were unaware--you cannot flush toilet paper so there is a covered wastebasket in in each bathroom. We found a car very helpful as we wanted to tour all the beaches and hike but there is a bus stop right in front of the property.

place_name: The Gem Society Boutique Hotel & Spa
review_text:
The room was lovely and the beds were very comfortable. Staff was kind and helpful and the cafe had really tasty food. The location is right next to the Acropolis and all other major tourist attractions, which is really convenient.

However, there is a night club right next to the hotel, and it's absolutely impossible to sleep when they're having a party, since the windows aren't soundproofed at all. I would've given this place 5 stars otherwise.

place_name: The Gem Society Boutique Hotel & Spa
review_text: Relatively small hotel located in the middle of Athens city. The entrance is small and I almost missed it walking down the street. But I really enjoyed the stay here. The system of the hotel was not so sophisticated (or systematic) as we usually see at American brand hotels, but the staffs guided me in a polite manner and the atmosphere of the entrance was warm and welcoming. The staffs were also very kind. In spite of the small premises, the room was reasonably spacious and comfortable. I feel this hotel is a very boutique hotel as it is supposed to be, and I really like it!

place_name: The Gem Society Boutique Hotel & Spa
review_text: Greatly enjoyed this boutique hotel. Great location,  great service.  Our room was near service elevator,  a bit noisy late at night. A little trouble with room safe and door key card that were promptly resolved. They arranged a car service to pick us up at airport, very helpful with directions,  GREAT attitudes.  We had prepaid breakfast which was excellent and very filling,  we often skipped lunch.  Restaurant/bar open late. Will definitely stay here again when back in Athens.

place_name: The Gem Society Boutique Hotel & Spa
review_text: Overall the hotel itself is great. The problem is that they have a club next door, and the noise is intense. Every weekend night until 3:30am you hear the music and the bass is booming. The hotel itself is good. The staff is great, but the club next door is a giant problem.

place_name: The Gem Society Boutique Hotel & Spa
review_text: I have been here for only a couple of hours and this hotel’s service in immaculate. Miss Nisa at the reception is an amazing person and great asset to this property. The rooms are large and very comfortable with all quality amenities you’d need. I would genuinely highly recommend this hotel already!

Luxury Greece is absolutely amazing and great service. They respond with an itinerary almost immediately. Lydia holds all the knowledge of Ancient Greece and she is the best tour guide we have been with.

I cannot recommend Luxury Greece anymore. You have to book with them :)

Luxury Greece DMC is an outstanding travel partner for Greece. I am so happy to collaborate with them for Greece.  Each step of the process, they provide superior knowledge and support for all that is Greece.
Nice

This accommodation has very large rooms, pretty new and nicely decorated, just as shown in the pictures. Staff was kind in every interaction, providing hints about Athens.
Located just a street away from the Central Market, Museums etc
Also provided storage for the luggage before check-in.
The only downside is the need to carry luggage in the stairs to get to the elevators
Very good price for money.

Wonderful, well-situated hotel.  Feels like living in your own immaculate, stylish apartment in an area of Athens with authentic food within 10 minutes walk.  The staff were welcoming and helpful.  Highly recommend!
Really liked this hotel! Great location (very busy area, if you are a light sleeper might not be the correct hotel) rooms were large, clean and soundproof from other guests. Staff was great

I very much enjoyed spending four days at this establishment! I made a booking at the last minute and got one of their deluxe apartments with city view, which I found very spacious, well decorated with warm, earthy colors and clean.

As someone who values privacy, I appreciate the fact that, unless you ask, they will service the rooms every other day (I believe?).

Shout out to Spiros at the front desk, who I had great conversations with about boxing, football and many other things. Shout out as well to Sara!

Demba.

This place is awesome! The location is very good, and the rooms are clean, modern and spacious. The staff was super friendly and helpful, especially Nikoleta. She was very responsive and went out of her way to make our stay amazing. We're definitely coming back here again!

Inspired by the 12 ancient Greek Gods, this cozy apartment in the city center is the smart alternative for those who do NOT waste their money on unnecessary luxuries. The apartment is in a perfect LOCATION, close to all points of interest. It is spotlessly clean, the host is kind. Simply put, be smart and skip the expensive hotels for an apartment that is value for money.

I would recommend the Olympus Gods apartment without hesitation not only for the very beautiful decoration and the unique experience it offered us with the cloudy sky and the LED lights above the bed but also because it was a very clean apartment with everything we needed. In addition, the owner was very friendly, answered all our questions and offered us free breakfast from a cafe near the apartment.

Easy access to public transport! Close to all archaeological sites, spotlessly clean and comfortable living room. The highlight was the room with the beautiful clouds that reminded me of the time of ancient Greece where you could see the sky while you were sleeping!
Very welcoming environment. Beautiful decoration, spotlessly clean space with many facilities. Ideal for couples
A beautiful apartment, clean and with all services are need. Spacious, lighting, silent.

Just finished our stay in the Arcade hotel and can’t say enough how wonderful our experience was. We booked the terrace suite and it was a huge room with a view of Acropolis. Everything was perfect! From comfy beds to a roomy bathroom with an excellent shower.

Near everything in Athens, all walkable distances. Nice breakfast, great value, nice staff. The street it is located in is sketchy, dark and lonely, so it’s hard to find and scary at night but in the end location is good. Also, the bathroom door is fully see through so it’s kind of inconvenient and not private at all.

A small hotel (around 20 rooms) in a quiet area. It’s a small pedestrian square.  No noise.
The staff is friendly and helpful. Efcharistoume.
Small breakfast room but enough as there aren’t many guests. Variety and quality are Ok with some Greek food, too.
The bed is comfortable and the sofa extremely comfy mattress.
The only topic I would suggest is to check how to install some glass door in the shower as you spill water in the rest of the bathroom.
And finally : price was really competitive compared to others!

A Stellar Stay at Arcade Hotel, Athens

From the moment I arrived at the Arcade Hotel in Athens, I knew I was in for a special experience. The warmth and professionalism of Alex and his staff were evident, setting the tone for an exceptional stay.

The highlight of the mornings was undoubtedly the breakfast. A delectable spread of local and international cuisine greeted us each day, offering a perfect start to our explorations in Athens. The variety and quality of the food were exceptional, with each dish prepared to perfection.

But what truly sets the Arcade Hotel apart is its customer service. Under Alex's leadership, the staff went above and beyond to ensure our comfort and satisfaction. Their attentiveness, knowledge of the local area, and willingness to assist with every request made our stay not just comfortable, but truly memorable.

Every interaction with the team was marked by a genuine desire to make our stay as enjoyable as possible. This level of service, combined with the hotel's excellent facilities and prime location, makes it a standout choice in Athens.

I highly recommend the Arcade Hotel to anyone visiting Athens. Thanks to Alex and his wonderful team, our stay was not just a trip, but an experience we will cherish.

Maurice

I really enjoyed my stay, big smart tvs in room, working ACs, good breakfast (not many choices but good quality, confortable bed and good shower. Not expensive for what it is, our room was quiet but the window didnt block the sound properly that was the only negative.
Very good hotel with an incredible view

This was a great place to stay. We were able to walk to the Acropolis and other great areas from here.
The staff was great. The bar in the lobby was fun. Our room was great. It was clean and quiet.
The rooftop bar was great. The service was quick, and the bartender was very nice.

We have been at the bar and the restaurant of the hotel; excellent cocktails, food and service. The only negative aspect is that pets are not allowed. We found this really inappropriate for the standards of such a hotel and given the fact that we live in the 21st century.. the management of the hotel should do something about it.

My stay at this hotel was exceptional, thanks largely to the outstanding service at the front desk, especially from Manolo. From the moment I walked in, I was welcomed with a warm smile and a delicious house drink, which immediately set the tone for a fantastic stay. Manolo was incredibly quick and efficient with check-in, but what really stood out was how he made personal connections and genuinely made me feel right at home. He didn’t just go through the motions—he went above and beyond to ensure I felt important and well taken care of. It’s rare to find such a combination of efficiency and warmth, and it truly made my stay memorable. I can’t recommend this hotel enough, thanks to Manolo

It’s a lovely hotel in a great area with delicious restaurants. The downside is that my room was very dark, with a sliver of a window, and not enough lighting to do zoom calls at night. But there is really no other well lit place in the hotel at night if you have to do midnight work in another time zone. And oddly, the internal security locks have been removed from the doors (see photo), and twice someone tried to enter my room but I had my luggage in front of the door to stop it. So if you’re not a solo traveler wanting an internal door lock, and not trying to work across time zones, it’s a very nice place.

Rooms have a lot of street noise.
Tiny tiny tiny rooms (sub 200 ft2/20 m2)

(Good side is modern hotel and clean)

Charged for four nights when stayed two due to a family death.  Offered to pay for three nights but they had no flexibility despite getting lots of notice, me being kind, offering to pay 3 of 4 nights (despite staying 2) and  me waiting hours to discuss this then finally leaving to make flight.  Horrible customer service.  I really tried here and staff was extremely dishonest in verbal vs email.

Google everything here is totally honest. Happy to provide emails and videos. Please don’t delete this review because the hotel pays you. A relative of mine died and they got E2k by reselling the room. This is what happened and I’m happy to prove it. Sick of you removing any honest negative review from payoff from hotel.

Stayed 6 nights at Evripidou Suites. Hotel has a good location, comfortable, clean and well equipped room. It was close to major sightseeing locations. Could be a little noisy due to bars and restaurants in the vicinity which is also convenient. Personally, didn't have trouble sleeping. The staff is very friendly, helpful and provided useful tips during our stay. Breakfast is available for 15 euros. It is taken on the top floor. The hotel offered 2 complementary breakfast which is very nice !
Comfortable spacious room with a decent shower room, and the staff are lovely and very helpful (shout out to Nadia!) Walking distance to the Acropolis site and plenty of quality shops and restaurants

The rooms were large and comfortable, but the cleanliness was not satisfactory.There was long hair on the towels and bed.There was no duvet in the room in January. There was a bedspread on the sheet. However, it is not hygienic to sleep with the bedspread that everyone uses and does not change. Location was good but little loud.

The staff were beyond helpful. Great suggestions and advice. Room was excellent. Location brilliant for sights, restaurants cafes and bars. The meat and fish market is worth a visit, not for the squeamish...

Very comfortable, great location and very attentive staff.

The hotel was very accommodating and helpful to us allowing us to check in very early (9am) as well as permitting a late check out the following day (1pm).

The suite was perfectly adequate and comfortable. Would stay again!

This is a great option to stay in Athens. Walking distance to different points of interest. The places were clean, neat, and with everything you need. The communication with the reception in person or by text was excellent. They have some lockers to store the luggage. 100% recommended!
Nice and clean place. 10 mins walk to city central.

Lovely place right in the center of Athens city, in a building on the 4th floor elevator available. The owner is very friendly very helpful and gave alot of informations. The place was super clean and neat. The apartments have no views which is normal when u are in the narrow city center streets. Complimentary biscuits chocolates and many things were available such as coffee, tea, water, juice etc.. they even added baby utensils when they knew we had a baby. The beds are comfortable toilets are big and lots of many sizes towels are available. The kitchen is very well equipped. Waher and dryer are available in a small room outside of the apartments. Will definitely do it again when back to Athens.

This apartment gets 5 starts plus plus... Not only was the apartment clean, beautiful, and well located, but the staff too was incredible and helpful from beginning to end.  They are they definition of initiative and customer service!
Cosy and family friendly apartment suite! I was pretty much satisfied! Really close to the centre road Ermou and Syntagma landmark!

This was absolutely the best place for us to stay! I was impressed by the comfort and clean rooms I finally chose to stay in Athens after so long. This apartment is located in the heart literally of Athens making very easy the movement around the town and anywhere.
The best part for me was the balcony on top that gave me the opportunity to relax and enjoy the view and the era of Athens.
Excellent and polite service!
Thank you for everything guys! We are absolutely coming again xx

My stay at Athens Glance Apartments was absolutely wonderful! This centrally located gem was not only super clean but also incredibly comfortable. I'll definitely choose Athens Glance Apartments again for sure. Highly recommended!
Amazing apartment! Very clean, everything is new and well maintained. Totally recommend this place. It's in the best location in Athens! also the host is very kind and helpful. Seriously perfect!
Amazing location with stunning view! The host is very welcoming and friendly. Recommended

Location was great and the place was very clean and nicely furnished. Lots of restaurants and shopping nearby. Close to metro station. Everything in the apartment was new and in very good condition. Bathroom was  super clean and the hosts were very helpful. Check in and check out was also very easy, would highly recommend and come back!

Our overall experience was one of gratitude for having chosen the Bohemian Suites for the 2 nights we had in Athens. From the very minute we walked in (4 1/2 hrs before check-in) was very helpful, friendly and even insisted on helping with our luggage. Could we have stayed elsewhere for less? Absolutely! But we wanted to have a more luxurious stay.  The suite was spacious, elegant and had a smart TV that allows you to use your streaming services and screen share from your phone, which most chain hotels don't have. Our balcony overlooked the garden/courtyard area which is where breakfast is served from an extensive ala carte menu.

After dropping our bags with them, we toured the city for several hours and the room was ready on time.

We absolutely loved our morning breakfasts in the secret garden. Everything was either nice and hot (omelette, eggs on toast) or good and cold (yogurt, milk, fresh jam) as it should be and very tasty. Nice portions and too much bread (although awesome). Loved the fresh home and "Greek bread."

When we were checking out, the owner and wonderful lady at Reception (how rude that we didn't ask your name) insisted on helping again with our luggage. The customer service was great at every turn and the bed was made and room cleaned daily.

We would not hesitate to stay here again if in Athens.

Amazing stay.  Best boutique hotel we've experienced, and we've traveled the world.  I'm not typically a person to write reviews, but this one stands out as such a great stay - we stayed here in 2021 for several nights.  Our suite was upgraded at no cost, because they happened to have a larger suite available.  Little things like that really make an impression from the start.  It was clean, quiet, and the a/c worked great.  Such kind staff.  Huge, delicious breakfast.  I will stay here again if we return to Athens.  Highly recommend.

Small boutique hotel with unbelievable service and charm! The manager Vaso was very gracious and offered excellent recommendations for restaurants in the local area. Our room was beautiful- stunning actually.  And the location is very walkable. Would definately stay again.

A very comfortable stay at this beautiful and unique accommodation.
They completely catered to my vegan diet for breakfast. There was ample choice of delicious goodness on the tray that arrived!
The staff are very friendly yet discreet. Good advice available on local attractions.
The area is a little less busy than  others but very safe.
The staff also organised a very efficient and pleasant transfer from the port to the hotel.
No complaints!
Great hotel, Good service, everything was awesome. Really great way to end off our honeymoon adventure.  Very much recommend this hotel for an overall classy experience.

I don't write reviews often, but I feel compelled to do so for this hotel. A week before our trip I read some recent reviews of the hotel and was very worried that we'd made the wrong choice. We looked into changing hotels, but due to the short notice, we didn't have many options so decided to stick with our booking. After reading the reviews, we really were expecting the worst, but this hotel was far from it! Firstly, the staff couldn't have been more accommodating, secondly, the rooms were spacious and extremely comfortable. The bathroom wasn't amazing, but neither was it disgusting, and we did't experience any mold. The noise from the street didn't bother us once. Staying in the centre of a city, you expect to be amongst the hustle and bustle, but even so, the rooms were quiet and we all slept brilliantly every night.

We arrived to the hotel at 12:00 morning and  were told that the room is not ready, so we ask the reception to save our luggage. They say that they will inform us when it will be ready. That never happened. We came back at evening and got our room which was bigger than the normal. The room did not have even a bottle of water. The bed was without proper blanket, just white sheets and cover. The breakfast was poor. The entrance is inconvenient, stairways from street and reception in second floor, no one helped with luggage. This hotel is really not valued for money
I was really disappointed

Don't let the reviews deceive you. It is the worst hotel in Athens, they say "Luxury" when clearly is an average hotel $ 300/night is not worth it. The rooms extremely noisy, it is 3:20am and my husband and I haven't gotten any sleep due to the noise coming from the Street, elevators and stairs. We requested change of room to a quieter area, they said not "availability" when we saw 3 guest checking out while we were there. Also we found mold in the shower, so Disgusting 🤢 we mentioned this matter to the receptionist named Yanes IF that's his real name, and they didn't do anything. They are very unhelpful and not honest. Don't waste your time and your money.

This is a total Scam and here’s why:

The website makes this place seem like it’s the best but it’s completely the opposite. It’s way too expensive for what you actually get.

1) They claim to offer “everything that is necessary in order to ensure a comfortable and satisfying stay” - the room were extremely loud, they have ear buds due to the noise of everyone coming up and down the stairs, YOU WILL NOT SLEEP AT NIGHT. If you dare to ask to change room to “ensure comfort” as advertised they will tell you no availability.

2) City view - I have attached a picture of what city view looks like a trash building with trash graphite all over your “city view”

3) MOLD, all the bathroom walls have mold accumulated, it’s a safety concern.

Currently this hotel is under investigation from the ministry of tourism is looking into closing or shutting down this hotel due to health concerns for multiple tourist complaints. No one should be worried about their health being a hazardous high risk hotel.

IF YOU BOOK WITH THEM AND THE MINISTRY OF TOURISM SHUT DOWN THE HOTEL. THE HOTEL WILL NOT REFUND YOU BACK!

We stayed at this hotel and the only “luxury” it has is in the name. Nothing in the rooms are luxury, there is ear buds to use for the extreme loud noise. Thin walls, old windows, feels like you are sitting on the street. There were ROACHES in our room! I tried to get another room and they refused, they said they don’t have availability, even though while I was at the reception 3 people checkout of their rooms. Go figure.. I booked this hotel which was very expensive considering other options that were available far nicer and cheaper. the description and pictures they use are far from what you actually get. Other options are cheaper and much better. Do not waist your money here, you won’t be able to sleep, beds are not comfortable and showers are disgusting and COCKROACHS IN ROOMS!

place_name: Raise Comfy studios in the heart of Athens
review_text:
Update to the owner: No, shame on you. Everyone, just look at how they treat their guests by looking at their language below, rather then being apologetic, they are saying "shame on you" to their own guests. Shame on them. Anyone with families, please don't go to their establishment. They false advertise to lure respectable families and then treat them like dirt, shame on them!!!!

**Location:**
This was the worst experience of our lives. The hotel is not accessible by cab or taxi; you have to be dropped off and navigate through narrow streets with shady people around.

**Check-in Process:**
The check-in process was terrible. They require you to upload personal information and then send you a code to open a key box on the day of arrival. If you don't receive the code, you're out of luck. There are no staff to assist you; everything is handled through a chat bot.

**The Property:**
The rooms were extremely dirty, and the elevators shook and rattled while going up. If they break down, you won't find help anytime soon in that part of the city.

**The Room:**
These were the dirtiest rooms I have ever seen. The towels had an awful smell, the sheets were stained, and the room had a bad odor. It was unclear when it was last cleaned; the bathrooms were dirty and smelly.

We could hardly stay an hour before booking another hotel and leaving. We pleaded for a refund, but the property manager was rude. I beg you to explore better options. This hotel is like something out of a horror movie. The property manager was extremely unhelpful, electricity went out at night making the room unbearable. Please look elsewhere.

place_name: Raise Comfy studios in the heart of Athens
review_text:
Excellent! Amazing place with nice decoration and everything you need for a comfortable stay.

The only possible negative remarks are some mosquitoes (that can be avoided by letting the windows closed) and some noise coming from the streets that can be heard from the balcony, but it's really no problem at all.

Plus!!!: we forgot to grab the key located in the key locker by the entrance of the building and were locked inside the building on a Sunday night (we were advised to do so, it was our fault), but the person in charge of the apartment came late in the night to help us. It was very kind of him.

place_name: Raise Comfy studios in the heart of Athens
review_text: Nice location

place_name: Raise Comfy studios in the heart of Athens
review_text: Exactly what it says. In the heart of Athens. Next to everything. Beautiful space.

place_name: Raise Comfy studios in the heart of Athens
review_text:
Wonderful apartments, fully correspond to the description.
There were no problems with hot water at the end of October.

Beautiful lobby, hidden gem. Rooms are nicely sized. Some of the extra beds are simply convertible sofas. The music of neighboring bars at street level did go on until about 1 or 2 AM, but that was to be expected as the trade off for such an amazing location. 15 minute walk to the Acropolis through amazing streets with hundreds of options for food and shops.

Very good apartment hotel near the central area. Good breakfast served to the room like your choice. The owner is very nice and welcoming every day 😊
Sure we will back again

If you want air conditioning in your room during the hot summer months DO NOT go to the Vault Hotel in Athens .There’s no receptionist to talk to if you have a problem  and WIFI was not provided. If I can get a refund I would. I can handle everything but no air that’s bull! Also if you want to sleep good luck there’s a nightclub across from the hotel  it’s not quiet at all. The pictures look nothing like the room as advertised.

The place is situated perfectly in the heart of Athens yet away from the hustle and bustle of the crowd.

5-10 min walk to anywhere.

The rooms are clean but too small, the good thing is that the bathrooms are big and so are the showers.

There is minimal service. Nothing worth mentioning. We did get false information about the train trip price from the city to the airport. we were told its 1.5 euro, turned out to be 9 euros when we arrived to the station.

A great hotel located in amazing location, clean rooms, very helpful team, and overall everything you could want in a hotel. I have to offer a warning that if you stay in a street facing hotel room on the 1st, 2nd or 3rd floors be prepared that the bar across the street is extremely loud, making it difficult to sleep. If you plan to stay out late or come early in the week, you’ll have no problem and the team was so nice but we struggled to sleep each night. They mention they have noise proof windows but unfortunately this is not the case.

We loved our stay at Oniro City. The staff were kind, thoughtful and helpful. Our room was spacious and comfortable. The shower was large and felt very luxurious. Breakfast each morning was delightful, with both buffet and menu options as well as GREAT coffee. And finally, the location was convenient but tucked away just enough that we were removed from the noisy hustle and bustle of the city. We walked to shopping, coffee and restaurants easily. Overall we loved our stay and look forward to returning next time we are in Athens!

We stayed in the king suite and definitely felt like royalty! Sophia at the breakfast bar is a treasure - Jerry and his staff took personal care of us, accommodating last minute changes and requests, always with a friendly smile. Highly recommended!

This is a wonderful boutique hotel. I love their clean rooms and I have a balcony too. The view is just the neighborhood, not super amazing but pleasant too. The breakfast here is so healthy and tasty! I wish I could eat like that everyday! The staff is amazing. They are always happy to help you with booking a taxi, a tour, etc. I took a taxi from the airport to get there, it was £46. I didn't have much luggage, so when I left for the airport, I just walked to the nearby Metro station at Syntagma square and paid £9 to the airport. Going to the hotel is an uphill climb, so it is a bit of work at the end of sightseeing.  Otherwise, it is about a 12-15 minute walk to the nearby sights and metro station. A great experience overall!

We have been staying at this hotel for three summers in a row, we really like everything, the staff is very friendly and always courteous, the breakfast is excellent, the location is good, it’s clean.
We will happily stay again if the opportunity arises.
I express my deep gratitude for the warm welcome.🙏
Dzmitryj and Aliesia

On the bright side, it’s nicely designed and the location is good. On the other side, the room was very noisy - another guest or a staff member was playing videos on their phone out loud at 3am and I couldn’t sleep for two hours - and the breakfast was underwhelming - specifically the French toast.

We had the most incredible few nights at Shila. Great location and beautiful, clean, spacious rooms. But the thing that really made our stay so special was the staff - genuinely nothing was too much trouble. Dora is a real asset always willing to help and go above and beyond to make our time in Greece as easy and effortless as possible. She and Era were both so kind, helpful and just brilliant at their jobs (as was the girl who helped prepare our lovely breakfast each morning but whose name we didn’t know). Wonderful time, wonderful people and wonderful city!

We had the most wonderful stay at Shila Athens to start our honeymoon and can’t recommend it highly enough! What a beautifully decorated, romantic, cozy, and unique room down to every thoughtful detail. The staff were all so nice and helpful throughout our stay, and provided great local dining recommendations. The rooftop terrace and breakfast in our private garden were among the highlights. The breakfast featured the most wonderful array of local baked goods, honey, marmalade, and yogurt- I know we will be dreaming of this breakfast for some time! Thank you Shila!!

Absolutely incredible hotel and service, our new favorite from our travels! Era, Dora and Adelia were so helpful as we made our plans each day, with every detail taken care of. From Shila it was easy to walk everywhere we wanted to go in Athens. Also the design of the rooms is truly stunning and a very luxurious experience. We will be back!

Such wonderful and attentive staff. They left no stone unturned to assist and advise us. They really made us feel at home. When we asked, they recommended very good restaurants. They were always genuinely concerned re our room comfort. Breakfast was served on request in our own private yard adjacent to our room and it was excellent in every sense both in quality and quantity. The hotel had an excellent location in a small pedestrian street in the Kolonaki district that enabled easy access to different destinations and was not disneyfied. Can’t help but recommend this hotel anytime.

We loved our stay. Our only regret was not staying longer. We stayed in the first floor garden suite with the private courtyard, and every detail was so beautifully crafted. The staff were welcoming and breakfast was abundant. Loved the neighborhood too- the street was peaceful but there were tons of great restaurants and sites nearby.
Excellent place!!!highly recomended!!!

Really good place. Close to center, 10 minutes walk to Syntagma (all trains, buses go there to Airport). Perfect little kitchenette, good size bathroom. You need to turn on the boiler 20 min before you take shower. Good value for money. There is lift also. As a welcome you get one bottle of water, beer and orange juice. There is iron and dryer.
Clean: 10
Room size: 10
Service: 10
Cons: windows are looking in a wall. And the apartment is inside in another apartment which is divided in three bedrooms with bathrooms and kitchens. You can hear the neighbors from other apartments. So if you want total silence, I wouldn’t recommend it.
But the cars are not bothering.
Lovely and best airbnb house in Athens. Really recommended
Great location, clean and tidy! Great welcome package and friendly service.
Super!!!
Perfect suite even better than the photos, very good location and helpful and kind Laura!!! We will definitely prefer it again!!!

A well-equipped apartment in an excellent location with a helpful and discreet host. We had a great time and thank you for all your help. We will absolutely recommend it to our Hungarian friends if they are planning a trip abroad.

Great apartment, very good location and incredibly central!
Great view!!!
Great view, cleanliness.

It comes from the future and makes our life easier. The main advantage of the software is the absolute security it provides us.
It has been operating successfully in France for many years, I hope to see it in Greece very soon

place_name: Kolonaki Boutique Apartments by Olala Homes
review_text:
Check-in was supposed to be at 3pm, we asked to enter earlier because we flew in with lots of luggage. They offered to give us a coupon for 1 bag (we had 9) for storage somewhere else not convenient and didn't allow us to enter the room till after 3:30pm in the end. As compensation allowed us to check-and out at 12 instead of 11am. 🤔
Not satisfied with their customer service👎👎

place_name: Kolonaki Boutique Apartments by Olala Homes
review_text: We had a great time at (Olala Kolonaki) place. The communication was super easy and quick and the place looks even better than it does on the pictures. The neighborhood is very conveniently located and close to good restaurants, bars and Athens beautiful historical  sites. Would absolutely recommend to stay there!

place_name: Kolonaki Boutique Apartments by Olala Homes
review_text: We stayed for 3 nights, 3 couples. The apartment is very modern decorated, very clean, full kitchen, very nice living area, 2 bathrooms and 3 bedrooms. My boyfriend and I got ‘lucky’ to stay in the smallest bedroom, really tiny, the size of the double bed (placed from wall to wall, feet to head) and with a small window to an interior 3x3m courtyard. It was impossible to air de room by window because of the bad smell from outside and also not ok to air it by door to the rest of the apartment because there were mosquitos. We kept the air conditioning on, but there was a light smell of cigarette, maybe from a long time ago. As a reccomendation, the host could leave more mosquito pills for the electric devices that were in the outlet and some window nets, at least in the small room, to open at least 30’ at day. All in all a good stay.

place_name: Kolonaki Boutique Apartments by Olala Homes
review_text: Disgraceful management, the water stopped working, and no resolution was provided. I’ve stayed in many places in Athens; this is not worth the risk.

place_name: Kolonaki Boutique Apartments by Olala Homes
review_text: Great apartment in a terrific neighborhood. Everything I needed was very close, and the place was very convenient. Highly recommended.

The  hotel in a good place in athens, however, if you are looking for a confortable stay, or you are looking for a hotel for a work trip, this is not the best option that you can pick.
The hotel has no reception, that means that if you have to request something, it will be via e-mail, with a huge delays to respond, im writing this comment while i have requested an invoice for my stay period in the hotel, they took 1 week to give me an incorrect invoice, after requesting a correct one they gave me another incorrect invoice (they did it twice) , no they are not responding to my emails.
This was a simple request that most of 3 stars hotels does it automatically so you can imagine if you will have a problem in the room or something else.

We got a semi basement room and it was good. Very clean, great location. The only one downside was that the Internet was not the best in our room particularly. My friend stayed in other rooms and the internet was good. Beside that they respond very quick to any query you have on Wats app.

A 10min walk to the centre and great restaurants around. Clean and comfortable room. Perfect little mini kitchen was helpful w 1 year old. They also provided us with a crib for our daughter. Would definitely stay again!

Beautiful rooms. The complimentary wine and breakfast snacks were a lovely touch. A little traffic noise in our room from the street but that did not bother us much as our room was lovely prepared with everything we wanted. The location is so good with so many nice restaurants nearby and great shopping

Convenient accommodation for easy access to all the major archaeological sites, restaurants, nightlife ..and transport links. It takes 40mins via metro from the airport to the Syntagma stop then a brief 10min uphill walk to the property (or a short cab ride from the taxi rank at Synagma if you prefer).

The rooms are spread over three floors accessed via lifts or stairs and are nicely decorated, clean and well appointed.  The tvs have Netflix and, when we arrived, there was a bottle of wine waiting and a few other essentials.

During our stay I needed some help from the staff (who are not on site) via email. They proved to be extremely responsive, efficient and courteous..  excellent work guys!

All in all I would wholehearted recommend the Solonus suites to anyone looking for a no-nonsense short stay in Athens.

place_name: Cheery Apartment in the Center of Athens
review_text: Bathroom & shower area is very small. Location is very nice, walking distance to all places

place_name: Cheery Apartment in the Center of Athens
review_text: Great hosts, quiet, clean, nice restaurants and bars in the area.

place_name: Cheery Apartment in the Center of Athens
review_text: Clean, very good choice for anyone who wants an apartment in the center, very nice staff

Beautiful apartment placed in on of the best neighborhoods in Athens, kolonaki, near syntagma square. It's very stylish, clean, decorated with famous paintings and modern furniture. George, the host, was always warm and helpful, giving us tips about Athens. 100% recommended.

place_name: Lindy V Luxury apartment Kolonaki Athens
review_text: Very stylish place with nice touches, clean and the location is great!

place_name: Lindy V Luxury apartment Kolonaki Athens
review_text: Perfect place to stay in Athens !!! I recommend it !

place_name: Lindy V Luxury apartment Kolonaki Athens
Lindy V Luxury apartment Kolonaki Athens
review_text:
Apartment furnished with taste and functionality, located in the very quiet Kolonaki district, a five-minute walk from Syntagma Square and at the foot of Lycabettus Hill. Very kind and caring owner.
Just some initial problems with the management of the boiler for the production of hot water, resolved positively with a bit of practice (the switch with indicator light must be turned to yellow/orange light twenty minutes before taking a shower, even if it already shows the green light).
The separation of bathroom and shower into separate rooms is very functional, allowing simultaneous use.

place_name: Lindy V Luxury apartment Kolonaki Athens
review_text: Clean and great place

Excellent appartment.
Clean, quiet, the terrasse is awesome
Perfect location. Very organized household.

Recomendo calorosamente o Hotel St. George Lycabettus Lifestyle Hotel a qualquer viajante que queira experimentar o melhor que Atenas tem a oferecer. Tenho certeza de que você não ficará desapontado. Mal posso esperar para retornar a este oásis de elegância e hospitalidade na minha próxima viagem a Atenas

Water 6 euros seems crazy to me..
We are not in Piazza San Marco in Venice!!!

place_name: The Social Athens Hotel, a member of Radisson Individuals
review_text:
Right in the middle of Athens, a couple of streets behind Benaki Museum, this is a small jewel of a hotel. It is modernly decorated with very pleasing to the eye hints of Art Deco design.
Our Social Suite was large and comfortable. Large bed (with a mattress a bit too soft for our liking), excellent bathroom and quiet and efficient air conditioning system.
Very good breakfast.
Most of all, we enjoyed the friendly, professional service – thanks Janina, and all your other smiling colleagues for your warm hosting.

place_name: The Social Athens Hotel, a member of Radisson Individuals
review_text: My Family and I had a great stay at The Social Athens. The staff are amazing, the rooms are very clean, the location is great, and breakfast is decent. A special thanks to ALL the staff from the reception to house keeping, everyone was welcoming, extremely helpful and professional. Efcharisto!

place_name: The Social Athens Hotel, a member of Radisson Individuals
review_text: ¡Durísimo! The Social Athens Hotel is fire 🔥. Staff treat you like royalty, and the vibes are top-notch. Rooms are spotless and comfy, and the whole place just hits different. Best spot in Athens, for real. Highly recommend, ya tú sabes!

place_name: The Social Athens Hotel, a member of Radisson Individuals
review_text: 4-star felt like a 5 star! Great location, walking distance to acropolis/parthenon. Amazing view on the rooftop. Excellent services and staff, the bed is very comfortable (I’m a picky sleeper due to chronic back pain and slept soundly on this bed) As poc, the staff is very friendly and accommodating. Recommend! Wish we can stay longer.

place_name: The Social Athens Hotel, a member of Radisson Individuals
review_text: This is our second stay in this hotel , its 4 stars but better than 5 stars hotel , located in the middle of the city, heart of Athens, everything is walking distance away , safest neighborhood, next to the luxurious shops . Amazing , helpful and friendly staff , will definitely come back here every time i come to athens ❤️

The Helios is the most amazing hotel with the most amazing staff. I especially want to thank ANGELES on reception who was outstanding our whole stay.  She was so professional and smiled every time we walked through the hotel.  Her assistance was always amazing. and she made our stayed so memorable. Thank you Helios for mooring such wonderful team members.
My best
Shane Hamill UK
Excellent apartment in a beautiful neighborhood!

Dear sir/ madam
I'm trying to reach you but unfortunately you don't answer my texts in WhatsApp
As you know and discussed with my sister on the phone we has a very vey bad time at your property and had to leave 48h after check in
We didn't use the house for entire time and ypu must refund the money as soon as it possible I didn't want to put a review and please do not make me feel i must do it
I'm waiting for the answer
Very good apartment! Easy check-in. Good location! I recommend it!
all wonderful ,I have stayed 4 times I recommend it!

Catastrophic. We rented the apartment in April and found it very dirty. Mold in the bathroom, filthy fridge, dilapidated kitchen. No table and chairs for eating. Fridge placed in the room. 80 square meters advertised, totally misleading. The owner agreed to refund us and after we booked elsewhere he changed his mind and no longer answers our calls. Scam, avoid.
Very comfortable apartment and absolutely helpful and friendly host!!
Apartment super well located.  Very bright, a real pleasure.

What an incredible hotel! My favorite place to stay in Athens. Nothing better than having a meal or a drink and enjoying this gorgeous view. The rooms are so nice, the pool is incredible, and the staff is so helpful and accomidating. We've already stayed there 2 times and we'll be coming back asap!

Amazon invited us to this hotel for a networking dinner. It was great. The food was tasty, the view was breathtaking, and the staff was very kind. The location is difficult, but as you can see in my photos, you can see as far as Piraeus to the sea.

We would like to give a special thank you to Panagiota, lady at the swimming pool. Such a nice and helpful lady speaking fluently in English.

Also thanks to the lady who cleaned every day our room. We don’t know her name, she was very friendly.

Regret we had a very poor experience from beginning to end.  There was no welcoming hospitality from staff and deputy manager during check in.

We booked 8 rooms and all of our rooms were at back side of hotel, next to air condition units and were very noisy. At midnight, there was a electricity cut and we woke up with huge generator noise. (By the way, generator was only for main hotel places but not for the rooms.) We had no power and air condition for few hours in our rooms. None of us could sleep during the night.

In the morning they didn’t even come to us and apologies for the inconvenience or offered any complimentary for an excuse. Besides they just made our check outs like nothing happened also charged for coffees we had during check out process.

Overall they don’t deserve 5 star  and don’t act like that at all for sure.

Don’t suggest anyone to have this bad experience. There are way better hotels in Athens which you can get what you paid for.

Hotel was great and in a cool location. The rooftop pool is amazing and we spent a lot of time up there. Unfortunately the service at the rooftop bar was pretty bad. They didn't have a lot of cold options, our drinks were not always made well, etc.

In June of 2024, we stayed for a week at the Periscope Hotel in the  Kolonaki section of  Athens, Greece. The Hotel  is in a great location just a few blocks from a Metro Station, in a quite area with lots of shops and restaurants within walking distance.   It is a boutique style hotel so it is small but very clean and beautiful. They have a wonderful breakfast buffet that converts to a 24 hour complementary snack bar which was a fantastic bonus.  Our room was very nice, clean and had a sliding glass door that gave the room lots of natural light.  Nikos is the manager and was always concerned that everything was perfect for our stay.  The the hotel staff includes Anastasia, Nelli and Diana.  They are a very profession staff, yet they were also very nice, friendly and helpful.  Whether we needed directions, restaurant suggestions or just a quick question, they were always happy to assist. They will go out of their way to make sure that you are comfortable and that you have a memorable stay in Athens.  I highly recommend this hotel for anyone planning a stay in Athens Greece.

I spent two nights at this sharp hotel in the Kolonaki neighborhood and I enjoyed my time very much. It is small, only about twenty rooms, but nicely designed and in a great location near to many upscale shops and restaurants, but yet still a quiet neighborhood feel. In fact, it feels as if you might be staying at the apartment of a friend (who happens to be a designer). The staff is so gentle and personable - so much so that I looked forward to seeing them each day. All smiles. I think this place is a little gem. Very cool. Thank you!

We truly enjoyed our recent stay at the Periscope Hotel in Athens. Everything was top-notch: the location, the staff, the room and amenities and the breakfast. We not only highly recommend this property, we plan to come again!

The service at Periscope Hotel is probably the best that we have had during our trips in Greece. All the staff members are amazing, always nice, keen to help and assist.
We even got upgraded on our second night there, after returning from the islands.
We will definitely stay back here when we come back to Athens.
In addition, the hotel is nicely decorated, clean, tidy and within walking distance to Plaka and the Acropolis.
There are also lots of nice restaurants around.
Best place to stay when you are visiting Athens!

Staff here is amazing, welcoming, and so helpful.  After long flight delays and lost luggage, they helped us settle in, got us directions to various stores and pharmacies to purchase needed items.  They constantly checked in on us to ensure we had everything we needed.  The staff at Periscope are a great testament to the kindness and generosity of the Greek people.  That, and the rooms were super comfortable, clean, and beds/shower were amazing

The hotel is very well located (30 min walk to the Acropolis) in the beautiful neighborhood of Kolonaki, full of dining options and a handful of bakeries, among other stores. Rooms are very comfortable, fully equipped, and very clean. The breakfast is fantastic, everything is fresh and locally sourced, even the honey. They prepare eggs to your liking on demand, and offer to squeeze a fresh glass of orange juice. All the food we tried was incredibly tasty, and to top it all, the service is exceptional: everyone is super kind, always willing to help with a smile on their faces. They even arranged for us to check in very early (11AM), AND offered us the chance to enjoy the breakfast service while we waited, free of charge. Truly amazing experience, highly recommended.

Amazing top to bottom.  Every single person working at Coco Mat clearly know that their job is caring for their guests.  It has been remarkable!!!  Clean and tidy room, fresh linens every day.  Friendly and completely professional staff.  Beautiful hotel in a lovely and bustling, pretty neighborhood full of good restaurants and nice shops. It has been remarkable.  Delicious, fresh breakfasts with fresh squeezed juice and eggs made to order with plenty of staff on hand to get whatever else you might need.   Amazing value.  Hotels in the US could take a lesson from this chain. Loving every minute here.

Excellent hotel in nice area of Athens with some nearby restaurants. Lovely rooftop for views including the acropolis and taking meals ordered via an app. Staff really helpful and polite. V comfortable and well designed room. Highly recommend.

We stayed at this rather nondescript establishment in Summer 2024. The hotel was somewhat difficult to find because of missing/ confusing signage.

Besides this little hiccup, the experience was great. We were early but the front desk staff quickly corralled our luggage and sent us on a quick excursion to the national gallery which was a few blocks away. In less than an hour, we were informed that our room was ready.

Our room was a larger corner suite to accommodate our family. The beds were comfortable. The decor was very modern and minimalist. The layout of the bathroom/ WC was a bit strange but workable.

When we were away, the rooms were restocked and cleaned promptly.

The free breakfast was quaint but adequate.

The location was great. Situated in a leafy, residential neighborhood with good restaurants. It was sufficiently far away from the tourist attractions to be quiet but close enough to get to them without difficulty.

The service was very friendly. We felt genuinely welcomed and attended to. They made sure to reserve a cab at 2 am for our departure. They took the trouble to prepare breakfast boxes for our travels.

We were pleasantly surprised. Would consider staying there again.

I loved my stay at the Coco-Mat. The whole staff was friendly, helpful, and hard working. I stayed there for 3 weeks because my mother was in the nearby hospital and they made me feel so welcome and they helped me through that tough time in so many ways I will be forever grateful. The breakfast is wonderful, the roof space is amazing and I would watch the sun go down with a view of the Acropolis. Rooms are clean, spacious, and beds are very comfortable. Easy to walk to so many places. Highly recommend.

place_name: Studio posh with garden in Colonaki
review_text: Very humid basement apartment with insufficient aircon and a temperamental host. Not flexible in terms of check in time. Apartment locks you out if you forget your keys. On the plus a terrace in a small chimney annex, great location. Overall, not recommended unless it's very cheap and you are on a tight budget.

place_name: Studio posh with garden in Colonaki
review_text: Ideal place for a holiday in Athens during a heatwave. Passio for peaceful meals.

place_name: Studio posh with garden in Colonaki
review_text:
Small apartment although in the semi-basement.
The plus side of the room is the small groove in the back with a large umbrella for shading and plenty of plants as well as pebbles between them...
Plus, it's next to the Evangelismos station... and the Evangelismos hospital...
We were also impressed by the price

I stayed there for four nights. The design of the rooms is very odd with half side on one side and hand basin in middle. It also needs some upgradation especially the flushing system which was the common problem of the other rooms as mentioned by other residents. The noise at night coming from night club next door makes it questionable.  Though the staff is really friendly and welcoming

A gem of a hotel which is located on the quiet back streets behind the main shopping district. It's a small and intimate hotel, all the staff was very friendly and welcoming. The hotel is for adults only which is great for couples just wanting a nice peaceful stay within the noise of any screaming kids! The breakfast selection was great, there is so much of it that you won't go hungry. All in all a very peaceful and pleasant stay.

Let me start by saying that this was the BEST customer service I’ve ever had. The staff’s hospitality was fantastic and they go above and beyond to make sure you’re ok. The location is in a very nice area, lots of stuff to do locally. The hotel is also so beautiful. I highly recommend this place. Probably my best experience in a hotel ever.
Very nice staff. But rooms are good looking but not functional (lights, toilet flushing time). Also during the night there is loud music coming from the club nearby. I will not go there again.

A really lovely boutique hotel (just outside) the heart of Athens. Well within walking distance. Very modern, clean stylish rooms.

The breakfast is fantastic and so much food we couldn't eat it all, toast, yoghurt and granola, cooked breakfast (ish) and pastries, with coffee and juice.

The employee on the front (Soteria?) is absolutely fantastic, very friendly, will do anything for you and is a credit to the business.

My only criticism was on arrival we had a small stain on our sheets. It was quite noticeable. BUT they changed immediately and couldn't apologise enough

All in I would definitely recommend.
Great location. Amazing view from the terrace. Fairly priced.
Very good hotel, clean and comfortable rooms and we have been very well attended and very very good location

The best of the best. I have stayed there lots of times, the rooms are all fully equipped, the area is fantastic and Andy, responsible for all the communication via Hellas Elements has been extremely helpful throughout each of my stays. I will be back soon!

The apartment is situated in safe, modern neighborhood with a lot of restaurants and shops nearby. The building is located at a small street, it is clean and tidy, however a little loud at night.
Our room was situated at the 4th floor with quite big balcony and amazing view for the city. The room itself was quite spacious. Kitchen was equipped with all you need for a small meal including cutlery, plates, cups and pots.
The whole apartment was very clean and well-prepared for the stay. Air conditioner was working very well maintaining the required temperature as set.
The only thing I would recommend would be to provide more soap and shower gel than just one little bottle.
Thank you for such a lovely stay!
Without a doubt, the most memorable stay in the heart of Athens. The host was really helpful providing us with info and tips to enjoy our visit. Would definitely recommend it

Modern, comfortable, clean and perfectly located apartments, in the heart of Athens! Everything you want to see or need all within walking distance! The staff is very friendly and helpful!
Will definitely visit again!
No hesitate for the next time. Thanks.

What a wonderful place to call home during a vacation to Athens. Location close to most important sites, stores, groceries, restaurants, transportation. Exceptionally clean and modern, well appointed, roomy and comfortable even with 6 people sharing the rooms. Konstantinos was there to meet us and gave a thorough walk through and explanation of the apartments features with offers of help for anything that we may need during our stay
We had a wonderful stay at your lovely apartment! Thank you!
Everything was perfect

The apartment is located in an excellent area, fully equipped and clean, Debbie welcomed us with lots of explanations and information. She was available for any question or request.
Very highly recommended apartment.
The location is exceptional. Everything you need is available in the apartment.

location make it an excellent choice for anyone looking to stay within walking distance of central attractions. Boasting ample space that can easily accommodate up to three couples or a large family, this home provides a comfortable and inviting atmosphere that is perfect for relaxation and entertaining. Key pickup is a breeze, and the landlord is always available to answer any questions or concerns. All in all, this is an ideal choice for anyone seeking a peaceful and hassle-free stay in a prime location.
The host was really pleasant and quite helpful. It directly hits you with the cozyness of a friendly lad's apartment where you can chill and enjoy small talk. Would definitely recommend it.

Canceled the booking claiming a "system error".

System error or not we have had to find something on the spot because of that.

EDIT:
I did not know till the next day. I was on sea around Sporades and the cellular range there is quite intermittent.
Michalis is da man ... Location and comfort canot get any better .. 11 outa 10 ....
Perfect!
Only 5*. You will find out the rest when you stay.

It is located in perhaps the best part of Parga. Close to everything with the municipal parking opposite and without the hustle and bustle that prevails a little further down. The rooms are spacious, fully equipped and quite clean. The reception and service was very good. I highly recommend it and will prefer it on my next visit to Parga.
Big room and quite clean. In a very central spot so you don't have to move the car.

This apartment is in a great location: with a metro station a few steps away & in easy walking distance from many must visit locations in Athens ... including museums & a variety of good restaurants & cafés.
The apartment is spacious, with 2 bedrooms and all the necessary amenities to make your stay comfortable.
The owner is also very friendly and helpful and ready to give you good suggestions to make your stay in Athens ... a pleasant one!
Although very good clean dance equipped full house is worth....
Comfortable house with direct access to the metro and center
Large 3 bedroom apartment well located and quiet
This is a one bedroom apartment located in central Athens. Nicely furnished. Good mattress. Very clean. Elevator.
Comfortable, clean, spacious and positive atmosphere. Nice suite with comfortable beds, complete kitchen, tv and even a massage chair. Great Place, I would definitely choose it again!

I had a terrible experience with 'Supreme Suite with balcony by Cloudkeys.' Despite confirming my arrival time and already having a prepaid booking, the staff suddenly refused to allow check-in after 9:00 p.m., demanding an extra fee and then canceling my reservation. This left me and my family, including a young child, stranded late at night. The complete lack of professionalism and hospitality was appalling. I strongly advise against booking with this property if you value reliable service.

My stay at the Athens Flower Apartment started with a warm welcome by Maria, the landlady. Although I arrived very late in Athens, she drove late that evening to the apartment to show me how everything worked and even to recommend me places to visit in the city, where to still have dinner at that time, etc.
The apartment was very clean and comfortable. I felt like I was home.
Maria sent me several messages throughout the week to check if everything was fine. I could not ever imagine a better stay in Greece. Ευχαριστώ!

Stayed for two nights.

Apartment in a strategic position, near the Megaro Mousikis stop of the M3 which leads directly to both the airport and Syntagma and Monastiraki. Very quiet one-way street. The apartment is equipped with air conditioning in the bedroom, the bed is comfortable; in the main room there is a well-equipped kitchen with kettle, coffee machine, dishes and induction plate. The bathroom is small but well kept and functional.
Above all, Maria was very kind even from a distance! Not being able to welcome us personally, he sent us all the instructions for entering, as well as information on restaurants in the centre, in the surrounding area and on means of transport.

(If I really have to find some small flaw, I would say: the shower curtain is just too short, so if you are distracted there is the risk of wetting the floor a little, and lack of a soap dish in the shower).
The decoration, cleanliness, treatment of the owner, and the location, it was close to all means of transport, the bus and metro from the airport one minute away.

Staff were very friendly. Our room was upgraded which was very much appreciated.
The room was clean and very thought out. Bathroom was great with thoughtful amenities. The roof top was amazing at night. Quiet with a beautiful view of the Acropolis. The location was convenient to nice restaurants and shops.

If this is modern, then I'm definitely NOT a modernist. It's the sort of place that would have seemed cutting edge 30 years ago back when The Royalton was all the rage. This imitation is done on the cheap, with low slung and uncomfortable lobby furniture which is a few years past its prime and blackout drapery which is too short to actually serve its function and worn enough that strands hanging from it. I ? other examples include avoiding closets by having exposed clothes racks, and further cheapening the experience by use of those anti-theft coat hangers so well known in 1970s motels. Shower with non-functioning drain and poorly functioning controls required extra banging to get the right nozzle to work. Most amazing,and I think unique in my experiences of hotels, was a bedside lamp unreachable from the bedside. When I commented on this to the front desk attendant, he was quite aware of the situation and even offered the reason-- "it's the size of the bed. It's different from what the room was made for." Given that this issue is so commonly known that the staff have what they see as a reasonable answer for it, I'm curious about ownership not spending €30 for a functional bedside lamp.
On the plus side, the team that works here is terrific without exception. The breakfast provided is more than generous and the rooftop terrace is a real find.

A good hotel convenient and nice location near a park and a subway station. The staff are friendly the breakfast and bar are also very nice. The rooms are very well designed and functional yet there is no storage space whatsoever for clothes! Just one hanging rail with 4 hangers no wardrobe no draws.

An incredible experience. The rooms are excellent, featuring an aesthetic yet warm design that's highly functional. Two aspects stand out as truly exceptional: the staff and the breakfast.
The staff sets an otherworldly standard of hospitality. You feel incredibly well cared for, and there's an authentic sense that everyone is genuinely invested in your comfort and satisfaction. From the smallest details to the most significant aspects of your stay, you're treated with exceptional consideration.
As for the breakfast, I was pleasantly surprised by how elaborate and abundant it was, especially for a boutique hotel.
In my opinion, it sets the bar for all other hotels - I'd give it 6 out of 5 stars if I could.
Last but not least, the hotel is ideally situated. It's away from the hustle and bustle of the city center (which I wouldn't recommend staying in), yet still close to the main attractions. The Kolonaki district where it's located is an exclusive and friendly neighborhood.
Overall, this hotel is a reference point for excellence in hospitality. It truly goes above and beyond expectations.

This was an outstanding stay at a fantastic hotel. All staff were fantastic and could not have been more helpful. Check-in was easy; the room was excellent; the atmosphere the staff created was lovely. We had a late flight the day we departed and they very kindly let us return later after check-out to have a shower and freshen up. When we are in Athens next I will not hesitate to book here. They made a wonderful trip even better.
A great place to stay in the center of Athens.The house is modern,cozy and clean.Definitely 5 out of 5 stars

Clean, efficient, cute & cosy, well serviced and above all, nice people !
Thanks for all!
Great location, cool and functional apartment!
Amazing studios strongly recommend

Very nice experience and perfect hospitality in the place from the owners! very good communication from the beginning of the reservation until the end when we left. Friendly and cozy room and most importantly cool with a comfortable sleep. We had everything we needed from shops nearby. We highly recommend it 😊 😊

place_name: Elegant Home in Quiet Street by CloudKeys
review_text: Excellent experience!!!!!!

We stayed the Holiday Suites for 5 nights and were very pleasantly surprised at how nice it was! When checking in, we were offered and shown multiple rooms and choose a basement room with a small covered courtyard area. The room was extremely spacious and the AC worked well which was nice since Athens was in the middle of a hot streak. The staff was friendly and very accommodating. Would definitely stay again!
Wonderful rooms and great ac. Not a ton of hotels got cool enough for us, but this one was amazing!

Well, there are much better hotels in this area in the same price category. The rooms are okay, but little things like no drinking water available or hot water/air conditioning not working or working poorly ruins the stay a little. The food is not great, room service dinner arrived cold, the breakfasts were not included in our reservation, we tried it the first day and did not like it, but at the check out still got charged for all days for breakfasts we did not have 🤷🏻‍♀️ also tried to book the conference room, the staff is very polite but not so helpful for resolving the issues.

Room is clean and comfortable. Kitchen is with all the amenities in order to prepare something.
Breakfast is very good. Position is fantastic, very close to metro and to the city centre.
Gym organization is not comfortable because it is not present in the hotel and a closer hotel's Gym should be used.
Absolute wonderful place to stay. Would recommend to anyone. Looking forward to coming back

Amazing apartment. Stylish, clean, spacious and with a nice balcony aswell. All the amenities you need and good service. They are helpful and quick to respond.

Best apartment I have rented for a long long time. Highly recommended.

Excellent property- we stayed there on three occasions, which is a testament to how we liked it the first time. We had the Penthouse apartment that had an amazing setup. The staff were very accommodating and extremely helpful in setting up transportation and special requests. Mary was amazing!
Dr Amesur

Pros:
- huge space, modern design. We took the executive suite.
- great toiletries set
- they changed our towels after 2 days (we stayed for 4 days)
- location is safe and good. A lot of restaurants and mini markets nearby. You can still walk in the late evenings

Cons:
- hispeed wifi is not hispeed wifi at all. We planned to work but couldnt since the internet connection was too slow.

Came across this hotel by chance and what a great choice it was! The room is brand new, made to the highest level, all details taken care of, and there's even a small parking garage that you can book in advance.
