The room is spacious, clean, comfortable and the A/C is strong. The shower was great, Just a really really good room in a quiet and nice street. I will definitely stay there again next time I'm in Athens.

Spotless and spacious apartment in a beautiful location, close to the metro (2 min from Megaro Moussikis) and within walking distance of several good restaurants (eg Agora Select). Roof terrace with views of Lycabettus Hill. Breakfast not provided, but excellent baker at the metro entrance (Megaro Moussikis) serving all kinds of pastries, coffee and juice. Eat in or take away.
These apartments are "luxury apartments" - we stayed in 105, which was obviously a wheelchair accessible apartment. There were unfortunately a number of things we didn't like; the bathroom was actually a "wet room" - nowhere to put anything so everything (toothpaste, razor brush, creams, etc.) stayed on the desk section of the main room. The shower was a hand held shower with a manual mixer tap - so freezing/hot if anyone else flushed the toilet. Why they didn't invest a little more in a column with a thermostatic valve I don't understand. Water went  everywhere and we had to use a towel to stop it from coming out under the door. You will get your feet wet every time you go to the toilet if someone has used the shower. (maybe put a squeegee in the bathroom). In the main room, someone thought it was a good idea to hang a large TV screen from the ceiling at head height (there was already a TV in the living area!) so you bang your head every time you walk anywhere in the room. (stupid and unnecessary furnishings); at night you will need a face mask - the thermostat is right next to the bed and glows all the time - we couldn't find a way to turn it off.  In the corner of room the fuse box flashes blue and white and you feel like you're  next to a Christmas tree. Inside the wardrobe there is a safe for your personal items - but again, unlike other apartments we have rented, the safe is a small version and not big enough for a laptop.  Choose carefully the room and you'll be ok.

place_name: The Golden Age Hotel of Athens
review_text:
Its location is its best part. If you take the 2 bedroom, you would find it quite small and cramped, more like a business hotel. Their suites are great, much roomier and with a great view.

We stayed there for 1 night, took a suite and 2 bedroom. Coffee was great, since they had provided a brewing machine in the suite. They only provided basic toiletries, breakfast was just average. I also didn’t found the breakfast area staff quite unfriendly.

Overall, just good for 1 night.

place_name: The Golden Age Hotel of Athens
review_text: Very clean and modern hotel. Great customer service. Convenient location to the metro and only a few stops from the Acropolis and other major sights. Great continental breakfast included and they hold your bags after checkout if you have a later flight.

place_name: The Golden Age Hotel of Athens
review_text:
We recently had the pleasure of staying at Golden Age Hotel . From the moment we stepped into the lobby, we was impressed by the modern, elegant, welcoming decor and the friendly staff.
Overall, we had a wonderful experience at Golden Age Hotel & we would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a comfortable and convenient place to stay in Athens.

place_name: The Golden Age Hotel of Athens
review_text: Centrally located hotel in Athens, rooms are clean and well appointed. Shower was fantastic and breakfast was really good. Great value and definitely on the list for the next trip to Athens.

place_name: The Golden Age Hotel of Athens
review_text: This hotel was fabulous.  So tastefully decorated.  Food was delicious.  Bed very comfy.       Couldn't fault a thing.  Highly recommend
It was one of the best apartments I have ever stayed! Great location, and the studio was clean and stylish!
I loved this studio ❤️ It was really cozy and quiet with a big bathroom.  Easy to find!
Excellent apartment. Nice and clean place with a kitchen and a fridge.
Fantastic apartment would highly recommend to anyone
Place of excellent aesthetics in a very central location. Perfect communication with the owners!
Very nice apartment in good and safe location. Only drawback that there were construction works and it was loud in the morning

Friendly and helpful owner.  The apartment is in an excellent location, nicely furnished and comfortable for 3 to 4 people.  It is extremely clean, has a large terrace and everything necessary for a stay, as well as 2 air conditioners.  The owner provided us with a parking space in the garage, which is 50 m from the apartment.  There are 2 metro stations and a bus stop nearby.  You can reach Syntagma on foot in 20 minutes.  Excellent location and accommodation, highly recommended.

When we first stumbled upon this flat on AirBnB, it seemed almost too good to be true. There must be a catch! But everything was as perfect as it seemed online. Yiannis is the most thoughtful, gracious host.

He provided us with all the information we needed and showed us around. The flat is just perfect! Kitchen is compact and contains everything one needs.

The bed is comfortable, bathroom and terrace are excellent. Location is incredible,close to the center of Athens and 2 sub stations.

Yiannis had excellent restaurant recommendations (Rakkan Athens with the finest sushi i tried, Signor Ventriti  where i loved theis pizza , and Agora Select with Mediterranean cuisine, where we ate on our last night) . He went way beyond to make our long-weekend comfortable and memorable.

Thanks Yiannis and Ventiri Suites for the wonderful hosting!

We will be back
Excelent! Great location, helpful host..everything is o.k..we will back again.
The place is great in a great location and hosts are very nice and extremely helpful people. Thank you!

Was put up here by an airline after a cancelled flight, so can’t really complain since I didn’t pay for this. But comfortable rooms, good facilities, and their version of room service is a great idea - a selection of local eateries offering some of their popular dishes available for delivery, with the reception calling you when it’s down there ready for pickup. Unfortunately, only down side is the walls are paper thin, so sounds from hallways and neighbouring rooms are clear as day. Good selection for (inclusive) breakfast, however mini bar options were pretty poor.

Highly recommend this hotel. Fantastic room, spotlessly clean, great staff and a lovely breakfast. Free mini bar and drink voucher for bar. Close to local amenities. Will be re booking next time we are in Athens

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Ilisia Hotel. From start to finish, my experience was exceptional. The staff was friendly, attentive and always ready to assist, the rooms were very comfortable and tastefully decorated, the location is conveniently located at the heart of downtown. I recommend it, it’s a hidden gem that combines comfort, convenience, and outstanding service.

Fantastic location, good rooms and big balcony’s with a table and chairs. My room was very cosy with lots of wardrobe space, tv, desk with usb plugs. This hotel impressed me the most because the staff were absolutely lovely and couldn’t do enough for you.

The staff are very caring and attentive.

Great breakfasts.

Stocked complimentary minibar is a nice touch.

Single rooms are a bit small, and rooms immediately next to the marble stairwell are a bit noisy.

place_name: Crowne Plaza Athens - City Centre, an IHG Hotel
review_text: Old style hotel, it has a bidet. Eating breakfast with a nice view of the city (not Acropolis) is the highlight. Located far from Acropolis next to the busy street, not in the tourist area, so you don't get the traditional Athens romantic feel. Gym is in the lower floor, creepy. Overall good full service hotel in the area where most hotels in Athens are locally run with limited amenity. Service is great.

place_name: Crowne Plaza Athens - City Centre, an IHG Hotel
review_text:
Great location (connected to transportation and walkable).

Check-in experience was tremendous (Nikos and Harry were the best we've ever encountered - their recommendations made our trip phenomenal and we would have missed out without their advice)!

Don't miss their amazing breakfast - one of the best experiences for delicious food, ambiance, and view!

HIGHLY RECOMMEND!

place_name: Crowne Plaza Athens - City Centre, an IHG Hotel
review_text:
Great hotel in the heart of Athens, close to Syntagma square and the prestigious area of Kolonaki.
Rooms were recently renovated and sparling clean.
Outstanding Service especially by Alexandros at Front Desk.
Breakfast buffet was delicious offering a wide variety of local and international foods. Terrace had a beautiful view.

place_name: Crowne Plaza Athens - City Centre, an IHG Hotel
review_text: The hotel was great, the service was nice, even when we arrived at 3 am. The shower was a bit weirdly placed and cramped in the corner of the bathroom. The breakfast on the rooftop was nice but not extraordinarily good. The location is great with a short walk to the metro station.

place_name: Crowne Plaza Athens - City Centre, an IHG Hotel
review_text: Great Hotel in a good location. Only 5 minute walk to Metro. Staff was great, especially Nikos who helped me with directions and we chatted a bit about basketball.

place_name: Urban Melodies Apartment - My Greek Vacations
review_text: We stayed in this marvellous apartment for a period of two weeks. This apartment is truly luxurious. The apartment is so tastefully decorated and thought has been given to every single detail. The bedrooms are so comfortable, crisp linen and towels, a large very modern and equipped kitchen. We could have stayed here forever. A true definition for a home away from home. Esmerelda is a very attentive and kind hostess. In the area you find a bakery, a supermarket and everything you need. I cannot recommend this place enough. We will be back for sure.

place_name: Urban Melodies Apartment - My Greek Vacations
review_text:
Amazing apartment with great accessibility to the metro. The neighbor also offers good choice of local cafes and restaurants.
The apartment itself is very spacious and comfy.

place_name: Urban Melodies Apartment - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Fantastic apartment in the heart of Athens. Walking distance to the Metro train station.  Local shops bars and tavernas.  Would highly recommend this place to anyone travelling to Greece

place_name: Urban Melodies Apartment - My Greek Vacations
review_text:
Great location. Great apartment. Fabulous hospitality!

We had an amazing time and we'll definitely book again next time we're in Athens

place_name: Urban Melodies Apartment - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Apartment very good and very comfortable, spacious. Transportation is nearby, convenient for visiting. Guests are listening. I recommend this accommodation
We loved our stay at this property!Everything was perfect! Georgia our host was very helpful from the minute we made the booking till our check out.We will come again soon.
Very cozy and beautiful place!

I had a pleasure staying at La Residence for a few days, which is a true gem in Athens. The apartment I booked was beautifully furnished and very well-appointed, giving a sense of cosiness and comfort from the moment I entered it. Panagiotis was an amazing host, readily answering any of my queries, including post-stay (and going as far as purchasing a cervical pillow for us on his own initiative!). I couldn't recommend La Residence more!

1) Flat is located two stations from the city centre. Very quiet and safe area. 5-7 minutes walk to the metro station. About 40 minutes walk to the Acropolis. There are several bakeries in the area where you can have breakfast and a few shops and pubs.
2) Cleanliness - The apartment was very clean and fully equipped with cosmetics and cleaning products. Also slippers, bathrobes, towels.
3) Standard of the apartment - very high - newly renovated. Manual air conditioning in each room. Washing machine, dishwasher, hairdryer, iron available. Fully equipped kitchen.
4) Host - I have never met a host like this. Panos gave us lots of tips about Athens. He even helped us find a real Greek restaurant with Greek music late at night during our trip. We felt very well looked after. He was totally helpful with a great sense of humour. If you are looking for specific attraction (as concert, sports game, restaurant etc) in Athens, he will definitely help you.
Best regards and we will come back for sure!
Great place! Everything was perfect! Highly recommended!! Panagiotis also makes the difference with his professional and kind service!
I would highly recommend La Residence to anyone looking for a comfortable, stylish, and convenient place to stay in Athens. It truly exceeded my expectations. Five stars all around!

Good strategic location to cover all the important tourists attractions; very clean, spacious and modern apartment, very nice host willing to give you all necessary information regarding public transportation, restaurants and tourists attractions.

Great apartment, well equipped only 7 minute walk to tube station and 2 stops to centre but we also enjoyed walking in.  Loved walking down to Iguaza in morning for a coffee, 3 mins.  Shop only 1 minute away.  Is a side street but feel as if staying in Athens not a tourist building experiencing local life.  Really close to lots of embassies so feel really safe walking around at night.  Owner really helpful and responsive.  Great value for money.

Dont be decieved by the pictures, although the rooms are very clean and look modern and good, the location is quite bad. Yes its our own mistake for choosing and we should have looked into it better, but the surrounding area is purely for the residents of Athens. It is very crowded by buildings and has almost no attractions or multicultural/ touristic restaurants. It is not bad for a person looking to stay a couple of nights as the location is safe (although being crowded and dull) but wouldnt recommend if looking for a special experience.

I stayed in the penthouse apartment for one night on a solo trip. The staff was extremely kind and accommodating. The apartment was large, super clean and I felt very safe and comfortable while traveling alone. It’s about a 7 minute walk from the train station and only 45 minutes total for the airport. I can’t recommend this place enough. Thanks to the lovely staff I got to chat with! You guys are awesome!

very nice apartments, lovely minimal decoration and quiet rooms, we had a good time and easy communication with the person in charge. Now we booked for the second time this apartment for my mother who is staying in Athens and their price was again the most compaetitive in the area. Thank you for the good service:)

Beautiful room decoration with well organized furniture. In the kitchen, all needed utensils are available. Also has a nice big balcony. We total 23 students  went from Germany and had great fun there.

I have not encountered more inhuman behavior and treatment, rudeness and unprofessionalism from people! who manage these apartments.
I apologize for the rambling. First let me say that after 9 p.m. an additional 10 euro charge applies for check-in. So far one can say ok, even if this is not written anywhere.
I have been informing since noon that we are arriving late due to a change in the boat's schedule (it left 5 hours later than the schedule) at the last minute and while at first the person in charge does not inform me, later and when I was half an hour from the apartment at 10:30 p.m. she tells me verbatim " take a taxi because from 23:00 the check-in fee is 30 euros". We arrive at the apartment at 23:03, exhausted from a 13-hour journey, and a bodyguard at the entrance simply dismissively, mockingly and rudely closes the entrance and leaves us on the street.
In the end, they canceled our reservation themselves and simply left us on the street, took our money and simply ran away with lies.
Excellent experience.

place_name: Κέντρο Άθλησης Αναψυχής και Περιπάτου Καισαριανής
review_text: Maybe the best place for all ages, especially for kids. 3 different big playgrounds, two caffe . The only disadvantage is no public wc but only to the cafeterias

place_name: Κέντρο Άθλησης Αναψυχής και Περιπάτου Καισαριανής
review_text: The best!

place_name: Κέντρο Άθλησης Αναψυχής και Περιπάτου Καισαριανής
review_text: Nice garden for coffee

place_name: Κέντρο Άθλησης Αναψυχής και Περιπάτου Καισαριανής
review_text: Excellent surroundings!

place_name: Κέντρο Άθλησης Αναψυχής και Περιπάτου Καισαριανής
review_text:
A green lung in Athens.  Worth it or visit, playground, soccer field, cafe and walk.
A little care from the Municipality and it will be wonderful.

This is a house worth recommending. I like their simple design and family style very much. The sun shines very well and the light is very good. The bright and spacious house is easy to find. They carefully prepared drinks for me and patiently introduced me to the surrounding facilities. It is a good place to stay. Very nice holiday.
Mr. Makris is an excellent doctor and person who I felt gave me the attention I needed for my problem with great attention to detail and a really humane approach.

A very good scientist but above all
man, tries to make the patient's life as bearable as possible
I thank him from the bottom of my heart
Beside me from the first moment in a very difficult situation! Excellent doctor amazing person! Direct, understanding and polite! Mr. Fotis, thank you very much for everything!

Excellent doctor and person above all with absolute calmness with absolute kindness and courtesy to explain to you on a daily basis about the problem you have A big thank you from the heart may God bless you always🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻 🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻
It's a relationship of about 30 years. I have no words since then until today I have not met so responsible, in his work and so humane.
Very clean, nicely decorated and equipped with everything you need. The owner is very kind

Wow. It's just like home. Apartment decorated with care, impeccable cleanliness and absolute comfort. The geographical location, close to a metro station and the lively neighborhood, make it a perfect base for discovering the city.

place_name: Eos Residence Athens - My Greek Vacations
review_text: This was a great stay. Apartment is clean, neighborhood safe and friendly (solo female traveler), close to Metro, lots of places to eat, snack and shop. Host was very responsive. Will definitely stay and recommend.

place_name: Eos Residence Athens - My Greek Vacations
review_text: It's a beautiful apartment and great location but there were massive roaches, giant not one but multiple crawling all over the bedroom and living room. The place looked so clean I would've never expected it to have roaches

place_name: Eos Residence Athens - My Greek Vacations
review_text: I absolutely love it here! Centrally located 8 min walk to the train. The best gyros right on the same corner. Market also around the corner larger one and smaller one. Everything needed for our holiday!

place_name: Eos Residence Athens - My Greek Vacations
review_text:
I booked this from Expedia thinking that’s a hotel but it’s not. It is an apartment building.
Check in was so easy, they messaged us few days before check in with all the instructions.
Our room was clean but very small. 3 of us were bumping to each other lol. Our friends , just a couple, were also staying in the same place but they had a two bedroom apartment. Same price. I did my booking through TD Expedia and they did through Expedia so I am not sure if that makes a difference.
The toilet seat was broken, however it was our fault for not reporting it right away otherwise they would have fixed it for us.
We had laundry facilities in our apartment which was great.
Location also was great, 10 min walk to the subway station and two stops to Plaka area.
There is a great restaurant with decent prices right beside the apartment.
Forgot to mention, very close to a supermarket , also you have stove and sink if you prepare to cook.

place_name: Eos Residence Athens - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Great place to hang out in the city for a few days! Perfect location. Clean. Nicely appointed and decorated. I'd stay here again
Perfect stay
Don't book, you'll have to change plans as soon as you reach the place
Location is great, facilities are good in compactness, easy communication with owner so no hesitation.
The best service

The room very small and very DIRTY. The sheets full of hair as well as the bathroom sink. When we took a bath, the water did not enter the siphon, it left the bathroom and flowed into the room. The central door of the entrance, which is located in the street as the room is semi-basement, is made of warehouse-type iron and does not provide any security. Unacceptable situation!

The room is very small, it's hard for two people to pass each other in the aisle, and there is still a small fridge there. The rooms are located in the basement, on a quite busy street, which generates a lot of noise and vibrations. The bed is not very comfortable, the spring mattress digs into the body when lying down. The room equipment is very poor. No space to store things. There are deficiencies in cleaning. Self-check-in, specific instructions from the owner via Whatsapp.

place_name: Central 5 boutique apartments with common garden next to metro
review_text:
I stayed with a friend at the The Apartment With Garden View, at the upper floor. A beautiful, spacious apartment, with hardwood floor, vey neat and spotless clean. The apartment is located in a great neighbourhood, one minute walk from the metro, and 2 stops by metro to the center of the city. It's also a 25 minutes nice walk to the center. It's a quiet neighbourhood, with great cafes and restaurants. The apartment is very quiet too. The host was very nice and helped in any question we had.
In short, it's a perfect place to stay when coming to visit Athens. We highly recommend it and we'll definitely be back.

place_name: Central 5 boutique apartments with common garden next to metro
review_text:
Good price and out of our expectations !
The location is just around metro station.Only 2 stop to Athens central.
Bedroom is very clean.private kitchen make us feel surprise .

place_name: Central 5 boutique apartments with common garden next to metro
review_text:
We stayed at Apartment 2 which is close to the garden. Very comfortable and the garden is nice. It has radiators so we were feeling very relaxed in the house as we visited during winter time.
Highly recommended!

place_name: Central 5 boutique apartments with common garden next to metro
review_text: Best Airbnb to slay in Athens. 🇬🇷🏛️Amazing place with great vibes. We stayed for a week and had a great time.

place_name: Central 5 boutique apartments with common garden next to metro
review_text: I was here with my friends for a week easy to reach with the metro close to the center and nice area very quiet the apartment was comfortable and nice looking with a good kitchen and facility the host was on spot and very welcoming very recommended 🇬🇷💚
Perfect host ! Highly recommended 100%

Excellent
THE APARTMENT WAS NEW, CLEAN, IN A VERY CONVENIENT LOCATION, THE OWNER SERVED US WITH WHAT WE NEEDED. EVERYTHING IS PERFECT .
Beautiful, cozy and clean. 2 bedrooms, full equipped kitchen. Super fast wifi.
Very beautiful and warm house!!! For a family like us it was ideal! Spotlessly clean and very close to all our activities, right next to the station! I highly recommend it.

Newly renovated apartment, right off the metro line. Bright, spacious common area. The bedrooms are a bit tight but not too bad. Nice kitchen with new appliances. Be aware that it’s on the 4th floor and we couldn’t get the elevator to come, so it’s a hike with luggage. Other than that it was quite nice!

The apartment is really beautiful and the location is more than great. Everything you need is just around the corner - restaurants, pubs, shops. Would be 5 stars, but due to the lack of hot water during almost the whole of our stay, I sadly had to drastically decrease my opinion. No help, no refund, that's really not customer service I'd expect. Otherwise, everything was perfect.

Very nice modern and clean apartment in good location. Easy and flexible check-in - keys were waiting for us in safe box. Metro station is next to the building, but we decided to walk to Acropolis (less than 2 km).
Apartment is very well equipped - kitchen tools, air conditioning, 3 bathrooms, comfortable beds and balcony with morning sun. We stayed there with 10 people group and there was was enough space for everyone.
There are many groceries and a lot of restaurants and cafeterias in 2-5 minutes walking distance.
We really enjoyed our stay in this apartment, it made our Athens trip perfect!

This apartment delivered on its promise. It was comfortable, luxurious and cozy. Everything was top notch.The host was very gracious and responded quickly to every question or request we had. She was very helpful. We enjoyed our stay tremendously. The metro nearby was useful to roam around this beautiful city.We'd definitely return if we happen to visit Athens again.Thank you, Athen's life.

A tastefully decorated flat painted in white - a color Greeks are obsessed with. The flat was extremely comfortable for our group of 8. The most convenient feature of the flat is 3.5 bathroom and the facility of washing machine not to speak of the balcony all around the flat. It is ideally located having super market, restaurant and metro stations all within 5 minutes of walking. The locality is a quiet residential area
Linens , crockery and thoughtfully the detergents for washing Machine provided were adequate and of good quality .
The only thing missing was a welcome bottle of Greek wine. Jokes apart we had a wonderful stay Esmeralda. Thank you for hosting us

Stayed two nights in May. Very comfortable and spacious room. The entire premises was very clean and well maintained. Lift to all floors which was very handy considering the weight of our bags. Room had a small kitchenette with everything we needed and more. Shower was excellent.
Staff were very helpful and in contact all the time.
The room over looks the railway lines. I thought this may be noisy but after a couple of trains, I never noticed it.
Would definitely stay again as there are a lot of restaurants nearby and we walked to the Parthenon.

Very clean and comfortable. Ideally located near Petralona metro. I was traveling solo and there's several key/code locked entrances that made me feel safe.

Team were very accommodating and were able to arrange a late check out for me.

Neighborhood is vibrant with lots of good eateries and a variety of cuisine.

I really enjoyed my stay at Pallineon House. Elias and Efi were amazing and sincere hosts.  The rooms were clean and have a beautiful interior design. The size of the rooms is perfect with enough space available in every room. The location is perfect and there are plenty of local cuisines that serve amazing food. The only downside is that the rooms are noisy. However considering the price value it’s hard to compete with. If you bring ear plugs or buy them at the local pharmacy it’s noise is not an issue. Thank you very much Elias and Efi! Regards Alex

A wonderful place, with beautiful design. The apartment is clean and well-kept. the apartment is equipped with necessary things; towels, cosmetics, dishes, iron, air conditioning.
The area is safe and beautiful. When we come back to Athens, we will only stay here :)
This might just be one of the nicest places I've stayed in a long while

We stayed in the Cretan bull apartment perfect for the two of us.  Compact but had everything we needed plus comfort and cleanliness.  A perfect 10/15 walk into the hub being greeted by the awesome sight of the Acropolis.  Eva was a fantastic host with clear instructions and information we couldn’t wish for better other than the wish to stay longer than 3 nights.  Athens was everything and more thank you 🙏 x

We were very impressed with our accommodation at Hercules Residences. It was spacious, modern, immaculately clean, and conveniently located. The staff were proactive and helpful.The apartment was well resourced with a laundry in the building. A mini mart was about 2 minutes walk away. We were able to walk to Monestraki and The Acropolis. Will definitely stay there again. Thank you Eva and team.

Great spot in Athens! Clean, comfy place. AC worked great - saved us from the heat! Loved chilling on the balcony. Having a gym was awesome for keeping up workouts. Best part? It didn't break the bank. Definitely recommend for anyone hitting up Athens! Not the nicest neighbourhood in town but fairly close to the subway and Downtown

My family of 4 stayed in this lovely apartment for 3 nights.  It is very spacious and clean and is perfect to have two toilets.  We also used the gym room once.  We rarely walked to main areas but called taxi using Freenow app as it was super hot during our visit in Aug.  There is a convenience store very close to the apartment which is fantastic.  Eva is super nice and helpful. Highly recommend.

Was there for a week and absolutely loved it. The host, Eva, was very friendly and checking in via text and making sure everything was alright. The apartment was nice and bright. I have no complaints at all.

We loved our stay in the apartment! the balcony is very nice and we were quite lucky to experience nice weather and enjoy it. the apartement was very clean, the bed was nice to sleep on and the kitchen fully equipped. the host was always available and made some great suggestions about dinner, moving around the city etc. Thank you very much!
great apartment right in the city center! very clean and tidy and amazing terrace! the host is attentive and quick to help!

The location is close to the metro-train, 5 m on foot. Easy to understand with the metro map. All shops 2 minutes away in the next street. A small neighborhood with bars and very good little restaurants nearby. The apartment is clean and new. There is air conditioning. The bed is very comfortable as well as the sofa.
Everything works very well. You must follow the host's instructions. Too bad we never saw anyone. Contact with WhatsApp works very well and the advice is welcome. Viewpoint of the Acropolis 15 minutes away on foot (sunset Panoramic lookout).....It's a bit of a climb but it's definitely worth the look!
I recommend

Excellent spot to visit the major attractions in Greece. Top notch breakfast and a very pleasant courtyard to relax after the day sightseeing. Good pastry and restaurants within an easy walk. A directory of local places gets you to some real authentic experiences.

My husband and I arrived around 8 am, and we were allowed to drop off our luggage. We were given the best warm welcome by Stathis who offered us breakfast and showed us on a map where we could take in the local history and views until it was check in time. His mother Eleftheria owns the place, and is very kind and helpful to help with booking a taxi for us to and from the airport. Rena prepared delicious breakfasts and Anna kept everything clean for a wonderful stay. Thank you all for making Athens feel like home!
Very clean and modern styled hotel room. It was only for 1 night stop over between the ferry and airplane however it was one of the accomodation highlights of my recent trip to Athens
Nice apartment, clean, walking distance to Plaka and very Nice staff. I will for sure stay here again om my next visit to Athens.
We like the location of apartment and apratment it self. It was quite, windows turning to the inner yard.

The apartment itself is spotless and well-maintained, which immediately made me feel comfortable and at home. The tasteful furnishings and thoughtful decor add a touch of elegance, making the space not only beautiful but incredibly relaxing.

One of the standout features of this apartment is the sense of calm it provides. Despite being centrally located, the surrounding area is very peaceful, allowing for restful nights and stress-free mornings. It's the perfect blend of city convenience and suburban tranquility.

The location is ideal—everything I needed was within walking distance, yet the neighborhood was refreshingly quiet. It’s hard to find a spot that offers both such central proximity and a serene atmosphere, but this apartment manages to do exactly that.

The host was fantastic, always polite, and willing to assist with any questions or requests I had. Their responsiveness and kindness made the stay even more enjoyable.

Considering the quality of the apartment and the exceptional service, this place is an excellent value for money. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a cozy, stylish, and peaceful place to stay in the city!

amazing new apartments, with everything one could ask for!  it feels like you are getting pampered from the moment you step your foot inside the building. great central location close to all tourist attractions, but preserving the neighborhood vibe of Athens. tastful decoration, extremely clean and bright spaces. comfortable beds and sofa, large balconies. easy check-in and wonderfully friendly host. I would go back anytime!

Loved my stay at the Somon Suite! The mix of 70s Athens architecture with modern elements was impressive, and the space was fully renovated, super clean, and very comfortable. The location is fantastic—just minutes from the blue and green metro lines, and a 10-minute walk to Apostolou Pavlou with stunning Acropolis views. There’s a 7/7 mini market right across the street and plenty of great cafes and restaurants nearby.

The small herb-filled balcony added a nice touch, and the host was incredibly helpful and kind. The only minor drawback was that smoking wasn’t allowed inside the apartment, but it was allowed on the balcony. Great value for money, I’ll definitely stay again!
A lovely apartment in a great location! Clean, cozy, and equipped with everything we needed. The host was very helpful and responsive. We had a wonderful stay and would definitely recommend it!
Nice apartment for my business trip! Recommend 🙏

place_name: Thisio Luxury apartment. 10 mins walk to Acropolis
user_name: Strike a Pose Flyers Academy Greece
review_text: Zacks place was brilliant, great value for money and a perfect location. Great Welcome with a bottle of sparkling wine.Apartment so stylish with amazing minimal decor and very modern. Two big Amazingly beds with most comfortable mattresses. Two lovely hot showers where body soap shampoo and conditioner were inclusive. Had a great time. We Definitely recommend this apartment if you’re planning a trip to Athens.We are definitely visiting again. Thank you

place_name: Thisio Luxury apartment. 10 mins walk to Acropolis
review_text:
A beautifully amazing and very different designed apartment in a very desirable location. In the center of wherever you would want to go.
This is the kind of fine living-space I associate with the good life in a capital city.
The whole experience was superlative,  I highly recommend it ! We really enjoyed staying in the apartment. We would definitely come back. Thank you.

place_name: Thisio Luxury apartment. 10 mins walk to Acropolis
review_text: This is a great place, in the best location, and the host Konstandina was amazing with many recommendations. The space was spotless and amazing as advertised Lovely décor incredible design. Not only was it a pleasure to stay in, but it was ideally located, literally a few steps  from everything,

place_name: Suite Tic by Be My Guest
review_text:
Near all important tourist attractions- if you really like sightseeing its a good choice. In the neighborhood you will find bar,bakery,restaurants,everything you need;)
About the flat: there is even an iron and tv!

place_name: Suite Tic by Be My Guest
review_text: Well stocked, found every commodity we could need on a 2 day trip!
A beautiful place...to stay  ...in the heart of Athens..❣️

I loved it, the room was clean and well equipped (wifi, air conditioning, hair dryer, coffee maker, microwave and dishes)! The hotel is located between two metro stations (30 minutes walk maximum) and it is located behind Sunset Hill with a view of the Acropolis. I really liked the stay! Looking forward to coming back!
Clean rooms but without windows and soundproofing. We heard speeches at all hours from everywhere.

The apartment is in a very convenient area, easy to get in all the fun and interesting spots. The host was extremely helpful, providing lots of recommendations for restaurants, museums and things to do. He left cookies and jams for us; in general the apartment had all we needed and it was very comfortable. Only flaw, the lighting. Being at ground floor the place had little natural light. Noise was minimal , overall the experience was a very good one! I recommend 100% if you are looking for an affordable and well located place. Super host!

A nice little flat within walking distance from the Acropolis. Full of amenities and the host is super kind and gave us lots of information and made sure he was there when we arrived even though we were caught up at Athens airport for over 3 hours because of Ryanair. Absolutely 100% recommend staying here if you can. Lots of restaurants cafes and supermarkets close by as well.
The host is super kind and the apartment is near Kerameikos and monastheraki, literally near everything. Very easy to arrive there with M3 from the airport

We had wonderful time.
The apartment is cosy and comfortable. Gregory was very kind all the time and he offered as wellcome arrival very lovely cookies and mermalade made by his mom. So sweet!
It is near the metro and close to town. There are cafeterias and supermarkets nearby.
Gregory also recommended some nice restaurants and terraces to go.

Thank you Gregory for making our stay very nice.

This flat is very sweet, very modern, tastefully furnished, very comfortable and very clean.
Wonderful modern kitchen

The owner is very polite, kindful and very interested in the comfort for his guests.
Very nice remembrance i have for the delicious handmade biscuits of the  owners Mom.
Everything was so uncomplicated.
Thank you Gregory!!!!!!!

Two things are just to mention;
1.
The flat has no balcony, but at least not necessary because you are staying "in the heart" of Athens. In the very next nearness is the wonderful Thiseio Park and the Acropolis and you will spend your time for sure outside.

2.
To find a parking place is really a problem. But at least you don't need a car, because the metro station is very near and so if you don't want to walk so much, you can take the Metro.
Athens transport network is well done!!!!!!

Last but not least:
I have this flat in a very good memory :-))))))))
Thank you again Gregory!!!!!!!

Very spacious, modern, clean and well equiped apartment.
The street is very quiet and the building in a good condition.
The hostess was super friendly and helpful.
Overall, it was a great choice for our family.

We made a first reservation in this hotel. The place was ok but very poorly located. Just downstairs there is a bar with loud music until 3-4am. Impossible to sleep!!!! Just a horror!!!!. We made a 2nd reservation with free cancellation. We were charged the amount well before the end of the possible cancellation. Unable to recover the money despite the cancellation. 2 contacts with the establishment but they tell lies saying that they are late in reimbursements. Fortunately, booking did what was necessary for us. Thanks to booking and never again book with them!!!

Great new rooms and service. They provide all you need: washer, dryer, hair dryer, coffee machine.Mini kitchen. Nice terrace with tables on top of the building. Area is very quiet. Walkable distance to Acropolis. Highly recommend. It is possible to book directly using their website.

Incredible!
I felt in love with this place 💘
So kind, friendly and very helpful owner! When we came he guided us about what to see in Greece and how to get their, gave his recommendations about the restraints and cafes.
Room was so comfy, nice and very clean.
The location is incredible 🤩 everything is close. I would like to came back again 😍

One of our favourite apartments we have ever stayed in! The owners were super friendly and the rooms are lovely and clean. Plus upon arrival we were notified that there is a rooftop terrace which was an amazing bonus! Cannot recommend this place enough!

My trip to Athens was only two nights with a small group of girlfriends. Accommodations were perfect for us, everyone got a bed, we felt safe and were within walking distance of many notable sites, including the acropolis. Our apartment also had a kitchen which had we stayed longer would have been helpful to heat up delicious leftovers or to make our own frappes! The owners were incredibly helpful, setting up our transportation to and from the airport. They also gave us a quick overview of the city marking some places of interest on a map for us to take with us. And even gave us their cell phone number if we got lost or needed help, I can’t recommend this location enough and if I’m back in Athens, I will absolutely stay there again.

Beautiful accommodation in the heart of Thisseio. Friendly host Nikolaos, who offers six modernly furnished apartments. Very well equipped, well thought out concept. Washing machine and dryer are available and very practical. Good starting point to explore the historic city center of Athens. With the windows closed it was pleasantly quiet and we slept well. Parking for our rental car was also available. One front of the house is on a busy street, the other part is in a quiet dead end road. Café 6 is just around the corner, great for breakfast. WLAN worked. Heating was also very reliable. Roof terrace is great, lovely city view, but not of the Acropolis. We recommend the accommodation for a stay in Athens.

Great host, really helpful, cozy apartament, amazing communication, many shops in the neigbourghood and very close to the city center, for that price it is everything that you need. We enjoyed our stay very much. I recommend.

We had an outstanding experience staying in the Armoniko apartment! It was a short 5-days vacation for two in Greece. The Armoniko apartment is located within a 10-12 minutes walk distance from the ancient center, Parthenon, in a calm and very authentic district of Athens, with grocery stores, great restaurants, both modern and authentic Greek cuisines, and the major park areas close by. If you are into historical site-seeing, actually almost all the most important museums and historical places are located rather close. It is a nice, tidy, cozy, and a very romantic apartment for two, with all the necessary modern appliances and accessories included. Simone himself is a super Host! He is very friendly, helpful, and always keen on giving some great recommendations regarding places to go and sites to see in Athens. He made our stay indeed unforgettable and I can recommend him and the Armoniko apartment with no hesitation! We, my wife and I, will be happy to stay there next time we are in Athens.

I had a very warm welcome and a restful stay at Armoniko. The host Simone treated me like a family friend and helped me out with so many logistics. He really made my time in Athens run smoothly. He is a host that takes great pride in his work. The apartment had everything I needed - the bed was super comfy and the apartment was quiet and cosy. Highly recommended.

We were an extended family of 6 people, we stayed at some spectacular places in Greece - but staying at Simone's place was like coming home after a long day of sightseeing (Oh the hot showers were the best). The apartment is just walking distance from the Acropolis and Monastiraki. It is a also a very safe residential area (My brother looked like he wanted to settle down there).
The apartment is furnished with every amenity we would need and is a very cozy place.
More then anything else. Simone has such a nice personal touch - he is like Santa, you think of something you want, he gets it for you. Hand map of Athens - GRANTED.  Adaptor for our phones - GRANTED.  He even helped us out with cab bookings a week after we checked out. Rare to find such good-hearted folks these days.

Armoniko apartments it's the best place you can book for your stay in Atene! Close to the heart of the city, the apartment it's fantastic in every way: modern, very confortable and fully equipped! Simone is the best host ever, always smiling and ready to help! hightly recommend ;) I looking forward to come back soon!
Perfect !!

Terrible location just 10 minutes by foot from Thisio.. Very nice neighborhood with lots of shops in the surrounding streets..
Renovated and fully functional and warm house...

Completely renovated accommodation with excellent equipment for any need.
Spacious and suitable for a family.
In an ideal location in the center of Athens very close to Thisio.
The hosts are very hospitable.
We will definitely use it again in the future.

We visited Grecian Residences last week. The experience was excellent on all levels. Nice decoration, cleanliness, spacious for a family and great convenience in parking. An ideal spot since it combines entertainment (Gazi) and ease of transportation with the Metro line which is 10 minutes away by foot (Kerameikos Station) I believe it was the best choice we could make.

Great stay in the center of Athens.
Very clean and spacious accommodation in a very quiet neighborhood just a few minutes from Thisio.
Very helpful hosts.

We spent 3 nights here, and the location of the hotel is great - it's in a quiet and safe neighborhood not far away from city center. The rooms are indeed smaller, but they are renovated and nice (including the bathroom, which has a walk-in shower). Just a heads up - the outdoor lights on the balcony turn on automatically in the evening and can't be turned off manually. You have to go to the reception or wait until the next day for housekeeping. Unfortunately for us, the receptionists forgot about us.
The receptionists were quite okay, but I would have expected a bit more proactivity or attention when there are sick people sitting at breakfast or when someone is loudly on the phone. The breakfast was good, although the selection wasn't that large.

Great location! Very close walking distance to basically everything. Service very polite.
We had an apartment with two rooms. Well, not the cleanest one I am afraid..
Electric stove was not working. Kitchen poorly equipped. Not a proper pan in sight, not to mention other stuff. Hard to prepare a meal. Fortunately many good restaurants nearby. I think I would not be back again. Pictures better than the reality.

The staff was the absolute best part from our shuttle drivers to the front desk. So welcoming. Great, clean and comfortable room and walking distance to all the best sites. Unique style for the decorations and the included breakfast was fantastic.

Extremely wonderful experience with this hotel. The AC was out in part of the room I was staying in with my parents. They put me in my own room for the rest of our stay with no additional charge. Staff was extremely kind and went above and beyond to help. Would highly recommend!
Perfect location! Clean and safe neighborhood! Good size and very clean room and bathroom! Rooftop deck
Nice neat space in the heart of the Historic Center It is decorated with a view And positive energy !!!
Great place!!!

A very pleasant surprise. A wonderful apartment very clean and spacious. Set in a quiet location just a short walk from the metro. Good service local like a bakery a supermarket and some great restaurants close too. With the world going crazy with covid our apartment was our little sanctuary. Will definitely stay here again in the future.
Near all places to visit, easy to access, great communication
Spacious apartment in the basement of the house, a short distance from the hotel where we had breakfast.

place_name: Live in Athens, Our first love #01
review_text: As a foreigner traveling for work i found the apartment to be gorgeously designed with thoughtful touches and special comforts for guests such a high quality blue tooth speaker, nespresso machine, shampoo, body wash etc. Such a pleasant check in and kind staff and owners from the first contact. Every corner is so clean. I feel at home. 10/10.

place_name: Live in Athens, Our first love #01
review_text: My partner called it small. I called it cozy . Stayed on the ground floor. It a small home in a building. Would recommend them . The location is the best . Close to  attractions, public transport and restaurants.

place_name: Live in Athens, Our first love #01
review_text:
Super friendly staff, amazing location, incredible view, comfort, and very good tips to visit the city!
Vassilis welcomed us with the nicest smile and was super relaxed despite our late arrival. Great experience, definitely recommended!

place_name: Live in Athens, Our first love #01
review_text: Uphill and really tiring, but quiet and sweet.

place_name: Live in Athens, Our first love #01
review_text: Superb location for visiting the city

Absolutely amazing stay with a lot of character for the place! The location is TOP NOTCH - Acropolis is only 5 minute walk away. And the host Antonis is a very friendly lad, so he'll make sure that you have a great, comfortable stay!

We had a 5 days stay in this beautiful apartment in the heart of Athens! Our host Antonis was responsive and gave us great tips so we could make the most of our experience. Also lunch or brunch is included in their nearby restaurant in Thissio so we absolutely loved it! We will stay here for sure when we are back to Athens!

Absolutely magnificent apartment! Very conveniently placed next to acropolis and the local market! Restaurants and coffee shops at a walking distance!
Not to mention Antonis’s hospitality! It was truly a pleasure meeting him!!

We had an awesome stay here with my family! Location is really central (Acropolis is 5 mins walk). Antonis gave us discounts also to cafes and restaurants in the neighborhood! We will definitely stay here again!

Great location with all the important points of interest no more than 10 min by foot, distance. The house was big enough for our needs and super clean. The host, Antonis, gave us a small tour around the area upon the arrival and mention us things we shouldn 't  miss around the city. i usually don't leave comments on internet but guys like Antonis totally worth 5 mins of my time. Thanks for everything man!

The house is in a great location. In the center of Athens and very close to all major attractions, but also markets, entertainment shops and means of transport. We found parking very easily, very close to the house, without any charge. Inside is an amazing, large and comfortable space with all the necessary - and non- amenities. It can accommodate up to 6 people, since it has 1 double bed and two sofas that become beds next to each other. In fact, one sofa is located in the "loft" and is visually isolated from the rest of the apartment. The owners are very helpful and discreet. We will definitely prefer it again!
Very nice house and very clean. In a quiet location and very close to everything.

A phenomenal location, with a terrace and a 10-point view, 10-point cleanliness, the welcome was like coming home and being greeted with fresh flowers on the table, coffee, fruit and a bottle of wine!
In conclusion: A PERFECT CHOICE!

Amazing apartment close to historic sites in Athens. Quiet location within walking distance to Acropolis. Apartment has everything you could possibly need and good air conditioning. Extremely clean and a lovely outside courtyard. Fabulous coffee maker with lots of coffee pods and a well stocked fridge.
Host is very welcoming and speaks perfect English. Her local knowledge is valuable and she is so helpful!
I would definitely stay here again when visiting Athens next.

Amazing host, very kind and always there for you. You feel like you're staying at a friend's place. All the food and drinks in the place are free to take and consume, but most of all, the place itself is AMAZING! It is a nice safe haven to recover from the walks in or around Athens, and you are super close to the Akropolis and centre, but not too close to cause any noise!
Loved this House and enjoyed talking to the landlord:) once back to Athens,  stay here again!
The best Airbnb we have stayed at. Fabulous and generous host Kleio. Look no further.
Seriously the best airbnb host E.V.E.R. love the host, the space and the location!

The perfect place to stay in Athens city. The apartment was very clean and modern furnished with a perfect terrace having a view to Acropolis. The staff were incredible, very friendly and helpful in everything needed.
Highly recommended!

The hotel is exceptional and very close to the center.
Very clean , spacious and modern apartments with a perfect view to Acropolis from the terrace.
The staff was very helpful and kind in whatever we needed. We will return for sure for a future stay!
Good job guys!

Location of this apartment hotel is outstanding, steps from restaurants and bars and a 15 min walk to the Acropolis entrance.  Very clean rooms with kitchens/living space and access to the buliding rooftop which has views of the Acropolis and city.

Recently we had a wonderful stay at this hotel in Thissio, Athens. The location is fantastic, just a short walk from the Acropolis and Monastiraki. The room was very clean, comfortable, and well-equipped with a stylish modern decoration. The rooftop terrace provided an amazing view of the Acropolis, especially at night. The staff were exceptionally kind and friendly, offering great local tips for restaurants and things to do.
Highly recommended for anyone visiting Athens!

Great location. Modern furniture and nice deco.
Mattress comfort average. Only 1 cup for 3 people in the kitchen. Hair in the bathroom floor. No shower door which makes it impossible to shower without flooding the entire small bathroom.

place_name: Athens History Apartment - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Location, location, location ...Right next to the Acropolis, a quiet area but in the center. The host is very responsive and helpful. The apartment is very large, spacious and was suitable for our needs.

place_name: Athens History Apartment - My Greek Vacations
review_text: We are a large group of 8 and this was perfect. Everyone had their privacy under one roof. Location was a 10/10. Would definitely stay here again. Thank you Marina.

place_name: Athens History Apartment - My Greek Vacations
review_text: I stayed at this lovely apartment with my four adult daughters and my mother. We had plenty of space for all of us, and the washing machine was a nice bonus. The location is fantastic, in easy waking distance to restaurants, shops, and the Acropolis. There is a small park outside the apartment which makes for a quiet stay. The apartment is on the second floor, so you do have to bring your luggage up a steep flight of steps. Keep that in mind if traveling with people who struggle with stairs. The apartment has great air conditioning in the bedrooms, which was appreciated since we were visiting during a heat wave! The hosts kindly arranged transportation for our arrival, which was also appreciated!

place_name: Athens History Apartment - My Greek Vacations
review_text: We were with a group of 7 people and stayed at this apartment for 6 nights. The stay was very enjoyable! The beds are very comfortable, there are enough seating opportunities for large groups, and every closet has a safe (I believe). The Fridge was very clean and spacious, and so was the freezer; there were even ice cubes still in there. The dish washer was very easy to use, and the air conditioning units were quite powerful and did a good job in cooling the whole place down fairly quickly. There are multiple outlets very close to the bedside table, in a perfect location for charging your phone or power bank while you're sleeping. There was a set of towels provided for everyone, and they were quite nice as well. The location of this place is just amazing, it's right in front of a park and right next to the Metro Station Theseio, from which one can take the metro to Monastiraki and then switch to other lines. Alternatively, one can also walk to Monastiraki, in which case one walks through a street lined with nice restaurants and touristy shops. An Acropolis entrance is within walking distance (12 minutes). There is also a supermarket (Market In) very close buy, and a bakery (Dimou Bakery) even closer. The balcony of the apartment is also in a good location, it is almost always shaded, either by the house itself or by the trees that line the pedestrian street the house is on. It is also wide enough to be able to put a chair on it in order to read. Lastly, the host Mary is very nice and always reachable! We had a problem with the washing machine, that is the washing machine broke with someone's clothes in it, and within one day there was a technician that got the clothes out, and one day after that a brand new up to date washing machine was delivered and connected, which works like a charm. Also regarding any other questions we had, for example regarding the Wifi or the garbage, she was super quick to help. There is however one small detail that I did not like so much, and that is the speed of the wifi. Since this place is quite big, there are always many people logged into the wifi network, and it is not really equipped to handle that. It was usually quite slow for all of us, so I recommend having some mobile data in case you need to do something important on the wifi.

place_name: Athens History Apartment - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Incredible place to stay! It is in the heart of Athens and has the real Greek spirit - neoclassical house that kept the authentic charm but at the same time is nicely renovated. All you need is a walk out of the door it is at the very centre and you can find whatever very close.

Nileos House was a great experience. We stood there for 3 nights and had an amazing time. The apartment was very clean, the Interieur was in very good taste and the location amazing to reach the traditional sights on one side and nice bars, going out spots and quarters on the other side. We would definitely recommend the place for a visit of Athens, even for longer trips.

Spacious, clean, very comfortable and minutes from the heart of the ancient heart of Athens and all other amenities close by...

highly recommend.
Top quality hosts , rooms ,design.
Perfect apartmant for your stay in Athens. It's well stocked and the hosts are gracious. Highly recommended if your planning to stay in Athens for 3+ days.
An amazing place right in the center of Athens next to the Parthenon and all the best sights and also a quiet and easy going place. Check the cinema Thisio and Kafeneio tou Rizou close by.

We stayed recently as a work group & booked 10 rooms at this property & couldn't have been happier. Each room was wonderful & unique. Mine had a private balcony with view of the Acropolis. Staff is absolutely lovely & helpful. Location is great for easy, walkable access to everything. Really loved everything about this property & can't wait to go back.

Wow! Stayed here for our honeymoon and can’t say enough good things about this place and the staff. Great location, so walkable. Staff as genuine and helpful as can be. Rooms were beautiful and elegant, loved the brick accent walls and furnishings, everything was brand new

We have stayed for 7 days in this hotel. It was a very pleasant and joyful stay. I have met the whole team and their Project Manager Mr. Alexandros. I understood that it is in its initial phase of expansion and focusing on different modifications which caused certain inconveniences for us. We look forward to come again and find all the promises achieved with flying colors.

My wife and I stayed at this wonderful hotel and received a welcome email about a week before check-in to ensure we had all the necessary details, including directions to the property. Upon arrival, we were warmly greeted and treated to fresh lemonade and homemade cherry juice. Our hotel room was immaculate and luxurious, but the highlight of our stay was the exceptional customer service.

I had a package scheduled for delivery to the hotel, which they assured me they could hold until my arrival. Unfortunately, the package didn’t arrive on time, but Dimitris at the front desk went above and beyond to assist me. Our stay at La Divina was the first night of our trip to Greece, where we planned to island-hop before returning to Athens. Dimitris kept in touch with me throughout my trip, and even arranged for a cab to deliver the package to Athens airport on my return journey.

This was the best service I’ve ever experienced, and I’m incredibly grateful for the care and attention from the hotel staff. I couldn’t recommend this hotel more!

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Hotel La Divina during my trip to Athens, and it was an absolutely fantastic experience!

Firstly, the location is unbeatable. The hotel is conveniently located right across the street from the metro station, making it incredibly easy to explore the city. Not to mention, the central location puts you in close proximity to many top attractions, which is perfect for travelers looking to make the most of their time in Athens.

One of the highlights of my stay was the stunning views of the Acropolis that some rooms offer, although slightly obstructed. It's a unique and memorable experience to catch glimpses of such an iconic landmark right from your room.

Speaking of rooms, they are simply outstanding. The rooms are not only spacious but also beautifully designed with high ceilings and top-notch decor. Every detail is thoughtfully curated, creating a luxurious and comfortable ambiance that makes you feel right at home.

The staff at Hotel La Divina are another standout feature. From the moment I arrived, I was greeted with warmth and hospitality. The team goes above and beyond to ensure that guests have a pleasant stay, offering assistance and recommendations with genuine care.

Overall, Hotel La Divina is hands down one of the best hotels I've ever had the pleasure of staying in. From its prime location and breathtaking views to its beautifully appointed rooms and exceptional staff, it's an experience that exceeds expectations in every way.

Highly recommended for anyone visiting Athens!
Great space... comfortable bed and furniture.  The balcony area was private, and the entire place was extremely clean.
George was very helpful! Nice attached restaurant and bar. Room was very nice and comfortable. Acropolis was just a short walk up the hill. Lots of shops all over! would definitely stay here again!

Great location directly in the centre, BUT it is very (!) loud, as it is next to a big street. It feels like you sleep directly on the road. Earplugs are a must. Also the flat is not very well isolated. You hear people talking. Otherwise the apartments are very well decorated and modern. The aircon makes strange noises from time to time.
The perfect place to stay in the heart of Athens. Amazing interior. Outstanding staff that is always there for you. Highly recommended.

Located in the historical center of Athens is a great choice if you want to be in walking distance from all the sites of interest ,
these are the only lofts in the area and they are really spacious ( around 50 m2 ) which make it a perfect option if you are bored of the classic hotel rooms
Finally , everything in the rooms are of finest quality and really clean , which is not common in this kind of Appartment’s

I would love to recommend this hotel for your stay in Athens!! The location was excellent with many of great restaurants, bakery, coffee shops, and markets. The train station was across the street, and bus stop at the front door. The staff was courteous and very helpful. It made our first experience in Greece the best ever! We give it 2 thumps up!!!
Tim

This place is very good. The price maybe not so much, but you do get what you paid for.
The staff were extremely friendly, almost too friendly. The room was spacious. The interior had a nice vibe to it.
They have a pool but it's very small. It's more like a hot tub plus sized, around 1.5m x 2.5m.
The Thissio station was about 1 minute walk. We can see it from our room.

A bit of a hidden gem, in a neighborhood that may have seen better days. From the outside it doesn't look like much, but the place was remodeled some 3 years ago, and the rooms are impeccable, clean, comfy, good new mattresses, very pleasant experience.
Right by the Acropolis, Plaka and 2 major metro stations, location is pretty much perfect.

The staff running the apartments is very helpful and kind. They will give tips on where to go, what to do and give you a tour to the facilities. The room was big and comfortable, the bed was ridiculously comfortable! The only con I can find was the amount of light in the room at night.

Andromeda was OUTSTANDING!!! The hospitality and friendliness of the staff was second to none. The hotel is very clean, comfortable, modern and in a great location. It’s everything you could want in a hotel. There is also a locked entry door that you need a code to enter so it’s not like just anybody can walk in, which made us feel safe. They also have a very nice roof terrace with a pool. I can’t say enough great things about Andromeda. If you get the chance, stay here.

I'm a little torn.  Room was relarivelt convenient and inexpensive given the location.   This is not a traditional hotel, more of an Air bnb, but bed and AC worked - and it was clean.  But it was loud until about 3:00 am.  And there are no views of acropolis from the room or balcony.

Watch out!

If the owner will get the feeling that you will give a bad review on Booking.com, she will mark your booking as "NO SHOW", so you won't be able to leave a review, and you will lose all the money you paid.

On July 8th 2022 we checked in at around 2 pm and we felt a very strange toxic smell (bug spray most probably), we called the owner to ask her to come checking and she refused.

We decided to give it a try and open the windows while we go out for a 5 few hours.
When we got back, it smelled even worse and we contacted again the owner, but she refused again to come and see what the issue is.
So, we decided to leave and better sleep in the airport.

She marked our booking as "No show" so we won't be able to give a bad review.

I also see another review mentioning toxic smell and this is from 2023. So they clearly have a bug problem
https://goo.gl/maps/hee5UqY7GSjWdGsd9
Really good location and amazing view. The room was nice but the shower in the bathroom is bad. The entrance as well was dirty.

Beautiful Apartment with a pretty ambiente and big terrace & Bathroom. The service is georgeous. We accidently booked the wrong month and got the room anyways, when we were standing in front and realized that. That's  so amazing. We definitely come again here and HIGHLY RECOMMEND you. Not just because you saved our "lives". Also because the place is so pretty. Also the Area is perfect. It's in the heart of Athens and almost beside Akropolis. Free Coffee and tea is offered in the room as  well. Couldn't be any better ❤️ Thank you very much

Nice place for a good price. Not the fanciest but definitely a very good place to stay in. At the center of the most popular attractions, everything is available by foot. Definitely recommend it.

There is an Ice cream shop right at the next door and over the corner a souvlaky...all the essentials.
They are not the only ones to serve at lunch, but they are the best
Very good apartment. Simple but neat and very clean. The location is also very good. The owner is very helpful and kind.  Will me again for sure.
Amazing place to stay in a fantastic location in central Athens. Stylish design, comfortable, city luxury at its best with added bonus the outdoor jacuzzi. Highly recommended.

Really beautiful apartment. It's like a luxury hotel suite with all the amenities you'd expect to find and much more. Very thoughtful hosts who couldn't have been more accommodating.

Thoroughly recommend.

Absolutely the place to stay when visiting Athens. Literally in the heart of Athens. Everything yku need to see as a turist is around the corner as well as many options in bars and restaurants, all in walking distance from the house. Highly recomended!!

This hotel couldn’t be better.
1. It’s in a perfect location for the best food, drink, shopping and still accessibility to historic sites.

2. The staff are incredibly welcoming and knowledgeable. They made us feel at home right away.

3. It’s so safe, the area feels safe on its own but their extra care of locking the floors and the front made the peace of mind even better.

4. The breakfast and bar. Couldn’t find a better view of the acropolis - and we tried. Drinks were delicious, food was impeccable.

5. The beds were soooo comfy and the bathrooms were very well equipped with a phenomenal shower.

We loved every minute here!

This is one of the most beautifully appointed hotels we've ever stayed at. The hotel staff were top-notch and ensured you had a most comfortable and luxurious stay. Since it's a boutique hotel with maybe only seven rooms, they provide personalized concierge services in ultra posh surroundings and decor. If we ever go back to Athens, we will definitely stay here again!

We received the warmest welcome when checking into this hotel. They were lovely and gracious. The dinner at the rooftop restaurant with the Acropolis view was magnificent and breakfast was superb on the rooftop.
Best hotel stay of my life. Just perfect. Service deserves six stars! Good food, and the BEST location.

We loved our stay here! Helen was very kind and welcoming from the moment we walked in. She was extremely helpful with everything during our stay! The rooms were clean with simply modern decor. We really wanted a place with a balcony and this had the perfect little balcony to enjoy a beverage with a view. The location was excellent within a minute walking distance to restaurants, shopping and not much longer up to the Acropolis. It is also very close to the metro! The breakfast spread at the rooftop restaurant was amazing! We really enjoyed our stay here and would recommend to anyone. We plan to come back Everytime we visit Greece. Thank you!

We stayed here for the first leg of our honeymoon in Greece, and we had a wonderful time at the Moon and Stars hotel. The staff couldn’t have been more accommodating, the breakfasts are delicious, and the rooms are well appointed and comfortable. It’s also extremely well priced and its small size creates a feeling of luxury for all of the guests staying there. We had breakfast alone on the rooftop bar every morning and enjoyed the rooftop garden to ourselves for an incredible sunset. A great Acropolis view and a highly recommended place to stay in Athens.

We loved our stay here! The staff is so warm and friendly and answered all our questions. They also gave us great restaurant recommendations- we tried almost all of them. The ballerina room was comfy and had AC. And you can see the acropolis from the beautiful terrace which also has a hot tub. We didn’t get to use it but maybe next time! I love that they bring breakfast to your room too.

The hotels location could not be more convenient. Steps away are tons of restaurants, but the hotel itself is not on a noisy crowded street. You can get to the acropolis on foot in 25 minutes. It’s a nice walk.

Nicely furnished hotel, staff is great. We loved the breakfast on the rooftop with Akropolis view. Location is also super.

Thing we didn’t like is the noise from the busy streets (traffic, motorbikes, etc.). The noise comes into the room at night.

Moon and Stars hotel is a lovely little boutique hotel. The staff are all super friendly and welcoming. I stayed for 3 nights in the Bird of Happiness room, and again for 1 night before travelling home in the Ballerina room. I recommend taking the Bird of Happiness room if you can get it, it was a much nicer room with a balcony, lots of natural light and better air conditioning. The design of the rooms is stylish, and I loved the showers. There is a reasonably priced mini bar and free water supplied. The breakfast was also good, especially the Greek yoghurt and fresh fruit salad. I left at 5am on my last stay, and they packed up some fruit, cookies and a cereal bar for me. There is no lift, so keep this in mind if you struggle with stairs or have heavy luggage. The location was brilliant, close to many bars, restaurants, shops and just by the ancient Agora.

There is a gorgeous rooftop area to lounge on, however due to the heat I didn't really use it, it would be gorgeous in slightly cooler weather!

I would love to come back again and explore Athens in Spring, as it was extremely hot during my stay!

The service here was fantastic! The staff were all so friendly and helpful! The breakfast wasn’t anything too special, but it was delicious! You can select what you want for breakfast the evening before, and they bring you a tray in the morning! I stayed in the ballerina room. It was very nice and a decent size. The only downsides were the air conditioning only went down to 22C, and you could hear some road noise, but overall, it was fantastic! You could see the acropolis from the rooftop which is a community area for guests of the hotel.
Amazing apartment, sparkling clean and the most nice view of all the monuments. Also very professional hostess

place_name: Thission Luxury Homes & SPA by K&K
review_text: Great apartments. The design, the maintenance, the location both near the metro and in the fun Psyri neighborhood. as well as the surprise; roof with the view to the Acropolis.  And above all Paul  that gives such a good feeling.  We keep Shabbat and Paul brought us a regular key to the building and everything was sensitive and pleasant.  Highly recommended.  We'll be back

place_name: Thission Luxury Homes & SPA by K&K
review_text: We are so excited to stay here, so luxurious and stylish.The rooms are big and clean. The atmosphere is fantastic. Beautiful back yard. Beds are very comfortable. And the shower is soo relaxing.Everything is very close the Metro, Manastiraki, Ermou str... PAUL is very helpful and friendly. We can't wait to go back again! Highly recomented!

place_name: Thission Luxury Homes & SPA by K&K
review_text:
Very nice  and clean place
Great location
And perfect service 👑

place_name: Thission Luxury Homes & SPA by K&K
review_text: A great hotel with lots of space for our family of 5. Beautiful, clean, spacious. The location was perfect! At the foot of the Acropolis with amazing views and great options for food. I would highly recommend staying here.

place_name: Thission Luxury Homes & SPA by K&K
review_text:
Wow... I had such an amazing pamper session here! Please do get yourself booked in for a treatment!.. I booked in for a shellac manicure & pedicure before going on a cruise. This is one if THE best experiences i've had getting these treatments done... my beautician was so friendly and had such attention to detail.
We chatted like we were old friends, I had a great time.
I've had a few hammam baths which is just down the street but this is my 1st time at their beauty house... absolutely loved my treatments, the prices were really reasonable too and can't wait to go back! I think I will try a massage on my next visit.
A stunning airy feel to the reception area with the treatment rooms downstairs.

I really loved how great the treatments and service was, please do book yourself in for some serious pampering

We had a great stay. Funky location, loads of bars and restaurants nearby (Fairytale across the road is a MUST). The apartment was exactly as described, the rooftop terrace and the hot tub were amazing. Theo was a perfect host, friendly and helpful, responding very quickly to any messages.

user_name: M GROUP CHALET Val D isere
review_text:
A amazing team, ready and happy to help you during your stay.
Location it’s perfect, could be noisy during the night.
I recommend

I stayed in the sleep box. It's certainly compact. But it has everything you need and it's clean. Kettle, tea, coffee, toastie machine, egg poacher, fold out table, food in the fridge, towels, dressing gown, flip flops, shower gel, first aid box.
I had a private toilet and shower. Again, very compact. But everything you need.
I'd definitely recommend it and stay here again. My room was good for a solo person.

Magnificent!

I have been fortunate to have experienced this beautiful accommodation a few times & what keeps me coming back is the great hospitality!

The attention to detail, the cleanliness and the magnificent location....it is in the middle of everything!  Everything is in walking distance but if you wish to catch the metro it is only minutes away & makes it so easy to catch to & from the airport also!

I highly recommend staying here you will not regret your decision on selecting this accommodation!

Thank you very much appreciated for the opportunity to stay! 🙂

On at least 3 occasions that I have been to Athens I have used Unspoilt Athens services for accomadation.
On every occasion I have found Theo and his staff to go beyond what is required with their service and professionalism.
Centrally located to everything in Athens,clean and always an enjoyable stay.
I highly recommend Unspoilt Athens.

Perfect location to walk to the Acropolis as well as other amazing restaurants and shops! Little Kook is just a block away and is a must do!! Staff was very pleasant, rooms were spacious and clean, morning breakfast was fantastic! Would definitely stay here again the next time we are in Athens!

Really enjoyed our stay at this hotel. Friendly, relaxed staff, best hotel breakfast I’ve ever had, and the room was quite nice.
Also the location is within walking distance to the Acropolis, the flea market, parliament, and many wonderful restaurants. The general area felt safe and was tourist friendly
Would highly recommend this hotel.

The staff was excellent,  friendly & so attentive for their guest needs. 24 hours service is amazing,  the receptionist is lovely and always happy to gave advice where best to go and eat in Athens. Buffet breakfast lots of selections. The hotel is just walking distance from flea markets,  restaurants, shop and train station. Our room is the family Grand and we didn't heard any noise during our stay despite the hotel is located in a busy street. Room is big for family of 4 the only issues TV in our room is not working and the WiFi is quite slow.

I wish we had better things to say because we had read the reviews on here and booked the hotel based on those. The rooms are basic, which we could deal with. But the smell of our room was truly disgusting. It reeked of cigarettes and the smell of cleaning products used to cover up the smoke and mold. We got in late so we slept for about 5 hours and immediately found another hotel in the morning rather than spend a second night.
