I called to inquire about a refund for the second night and was told the manager would follow up and never heard back. We travel all over Europe. This is definitely NOT a 4 star hotel.

Overall this hotel was adequate,  but it had some noteworthy issues.  The room appaerd nice at first glance,  and was very clean. The toilet however wobbled when I sat down on it, as if it wasn't fully secured to the floor.  The plumbing in the back of the toilet was also leaking,  and had water dripping from it. I was only here for one night so I just dealt with it, but if I was staying for longer I would have insisted on being moved to a different room. I did let reception know after checkout,  however.  On a positive note however,  the shower was absolutely huge,  biggest of any hotel I've ever stayed at.  The breakfast buffet was just ok, and the location of the hotel was in a sketchy looking back-ally. It was very close to the archeological sites, however.

In the center of the historical triangle of Athens this accommodation is perfect for anyone that wants to experience the urban culture that the city has to offer.Near many caffès and restaurants.
Next to the train station of Thission and a few minutes walk to the metro station of Monastiraki.
Spotlessly clean , with all the amenities you need for a stay.
A great common terrace for your morning coffee with a nice view.
Konstantinos ( host ) is always available for anything you need to make your stay a great one.
Highly recommend it.

Wonderful place with vintage style.
Very clean with all facilities you need for a stay.
Nice location near to the metro station in the heart of the city of athens.
Great view to acropolis and near to all the archaeological spots
Great view to Acropolis, amazing decoration and best hospitality. And the most important....at Athens heart and very close to all "a must to see" spots
Wonderful place. Excellent location and amazing view of acropolis. I would definitely preferred it again. I am really very excited for the days i stayed there.

In the heart of old Athens opened its doors to a new era, offering an impressive terrace with panoramic views of the Acropolis and the Attic landscape ... The renovated patio transports you from the first glance to an era of substance and authentic nobility ... And All this thanks to Kostas, the creator and inspirer of the whole argument ... Visit it, the stay in combination with the historical center will be unforgettable ...!
Wonderful experience, splotlessly clean apartment, very well organised and in a great location - everything within walking distance!

Unique stay experience!!! The apartment is amazing, comfortable with great design and decoration. Its location in the center of historic Athens is wonderful and everything you want is really close by on foot.

Great location for tourists visiting Athens as very near the Acropolis. My wife and 3 kids, during our 1-week August stay, found the place relatively quiet considering its central location. The place is impressively efficiently run with food in the fridge (milk, break, butter, cereals, eggs, etc) when you arrive and it's too late or your exhausted for shopping (very thoughtful). Check-in and check-out are with codes (you won't have a key to lose/forget) and a tablet inside the flat. The guys running the place are serious professionals. Someone cleans your place once a week. You can cook in the place (fully equiped kitchen) and there is a TV with an HDMI cable (again impressive thoughtfulness) already available on which you can plug your laptop. The only thing I would add is a washing machine inside the flat. Everything else is perfect.

I stayed in the 1 person Sleepbox t is an absolutely unique place in the best possible way.
- The concept of a small space for solo travellers at an affordable price but combined with the enormous outdoor shared space is just a brilliant idea in the climate that Athens offer.
- The hosts' attention to detail to make guests feel good is just exceptional. They are always there for you to answer any questions you might have and they are extremely friendly.
- The equipment of the room makes you feel at home and welcome from the moment you walk in. There was a basket of foodstuffs waiting for me there, along with some water and juice which is exactly what a tired traveller needs upon their arrival - what a great surprise! I personally appreciated the sports equipment - the dumbbells and a TRX set on the rooftop terrace to do your workout routine outdoors.
- The option to use the jacuzzi at an extra cost is brilliant too - if you are up for a little bit of luxury :)
- The idea of trying to remain as eco as possible while travelling is very dear to me so I very much appreciated the solar panels and the fact that the building is sustainable.
Sadly, I did not manage to use the complimentary bike due to the lack of time, but again - what a magnifcent idea! If only I travel again to Athens as a solo traveller, I won't even think twice - I will stay at the Sleepbox again and hopefully experience cycling in the Athens traffic this time :)

I stayed in "Factory Living". This place is exceptional. A lot of individual touches that really let you know a lot of thought has gone in to hosting you. All the amenities and extras you need for a short stay in Athens.

Attentive staff, quick response times, spotlessly clean. Professional hosters, offering a few different really cool loft spaces.

Nice place ! Relaxing Confortable.
The most perfect sweet and soft mattress of my Life 👍🏻
Perfect for discovering the city.
Easy to find, very near from Monastiraki and Blue subway line direct to airport.
Well placed near the flea market.
A little bit noisy but you r at the center of a crowded living city. So never mind.
Attentive staff, quick response times upon AirBnB. Cool host, friendly. He fixed our broken curtain in the hour 👌🏻.
Wonderful apartment right in the center of Athens!

This is an absolutely unique place in the best possible way.
- The concept of a small space for solo travellers at an affordable price but combined with the enormous outdoor shared space is just a brilliant idea in the climate that Athens offer.
- The hosts' attention to detail to make guests feel good is just exceptional. They are always there for you to answer any questions you might have and they are extremely friendly.
- The equipment of the room makes you feel at home and welcome from the moment you walk in. There was a basket of foodstuffs waiting for me there, along with some water and juice which is exactly what a tired traveller needs upon their arrival - what a great surprise! I personally appreciated the sports equipment - the dumbbells and a TRX set on the rooftop terrace to do your workout routine outdoors.
- The option to use the jacuzzi at an extra cost is brilliant too - if you are up for a little bit of luxury :)
- The idea of trying to remain as eco as possible while travelling is very dear to me so I very much appreciated the solar panels and the fact that the building is sustainable.
Sadly, I did not manage to use the complimentary bike due to the lack of time, but again - what a magnifcent idea! If only I travel again to Athens as a solo traveller, I won't even think twice - I will stay at the Sleepbox again and hopefully experience cycling in the Athens traffic this time :)

Very comfortable stay.  Ingenious how they have set up the place.  Loved that they had decorated it for Christmas.

Only downside was having to go outside for the bathroom.  The shower and toilet are in one room, so is a bit tricky.

Better suited for a shorter stay, and for those used to traveling.  But for the type of accommodation it is they've done an excellent job.

Easy access to the airport train and walkable to the Acropolis

Great place to stay if you are visiting Athens. The location and views are the best you can have! The room is very comfortable and contains all the amenities to make you feel at home. Theo, the owner, is a really friendly guy and the perfect host! Staying at this place made my trip to Athens even more enjoyable. I absolutely reccommend it.

Stay here in Feb'23
Nice and clean room, facilities in good conditions, close to all good restaurants and attractions,  less than 5-10 min walking to Monastiraki station for airport connection, feel safe walking around at night

The ramp outside the room is quite slippery, esp after raining, so please beware of that

External private toilet/shower is on a different floor so it is better to bring flip flop to walk inside the building.
Quiet (super quiet), perfect location, cleanliness, rooftop, accessibility, Minimalist, perfect.

place_name: Downtown in the vibrant center of Athens
review_text: Mostly tourists trap but ok.

place_name: Downtown in the vibrant center of Athens
review_text: Better than the regular center. Some of the kiosks are overpriced. Please be careful in these places, as some beggars have a mada card that does not work in most places. Use visa and cash.

We recently had an excellent 2-night stay at the Ancient Agora Apartments. The location is incredible for sightseeing and walking around the downtown core. Super close to a convenient and easy to use metro station, and when you walk out your door you have an awesome view of the Acropolis. The rooms were clean and quaint, and we felt incredibly safe. The host we easy to communicate with for check-in and check-out procedure. I have seen a few reviews about noise- which is true that it can be a loud area to stay, but I don't feel that is a knock on the property at all. If you are staying downtown there is probably a decent amount of noise anywhere you go, so why not stay here? Would recommend.

I recently had the pleasure of staying in this wonderful apartment during my vacation, and I can confidently say that it deserves every bit of its 5-star rating. From the moment I stepped inside, I was greeted with a warm and inviting ambiance that set the tone for an unforgettable stay.

The apartment's location is nothing short of ideal for tourists. Situated in the heart of the city, it provided easy access to all the major attractions, restaurants, and shops. I could explore the vibrant local culture with ease, thanks to the central location. It's a true gem for travelers who want to experience the best a city has to offer.

Upon entering the apartment, I was struck by its impeccable cleanliness and modern design. The interior was tastefully decorated, with a perfect blend of comfort and style. The attention to detail was evident in every corner, from the plush furnishings to the well-equipped kitchen. It truly felt like a home away from home.

One of the standout features of this apartment is the breathtaking view from the balcony. I could sip my morning coffee while watching the sunrise over the cityscape or enjoy a glass of wine in the evening as the lights of the city came to life. The view alone is worth the stay. The bedroom was cozy and the bed, oh-so-comfortable – ensuring I had a restful night's sleep after a day of exploring.

The host was incredibly accommodating and responsive. From the moment I inquired about booking to my check-out, they were readily available to answer any questions and provide helpful recommendations for local experiences. Their hospitality truly enhanced my stay.

In summary, this apartment is a 5/5 haven for tourists. Whether you're traveling solo, as a couple, or with friends and family, it offers everything you need for an unforgettable stay. It exceeded my expectations in every way, and I wouldn't hesitate to stay here again on my next visit. If you're looking for a perfect oasis in the city, this is the place to book!

Room and location were outstanding and truly unbeatable. The cleaner/porter was also fantastic - friendly and good at his job. The reason for the low review is that we had money taken from us while out for drinks. We paid 90 Euro extra for additional beds. We had placed 100 Euro on the kitchen counter so we wouldn’t forget to pay at the end of the trip. When we returned from drinks, there was 10 Euro on the counter. We assumed that the owner or his dad had come to get the money and left us change. Afterall, who would take money and leave the exact change? That was a little unexpected as they entered the apartment while we were gone. The owner then called us the day of checkout and asked for the 90 Euro. We explained the situation. He was blaming his staff who clearly didn’t take the money. But then again, who came in and took the money and left us change? In the end, we paid double as we didn’t want to see the staff get blamed. It was all so weird. Someone entered the apartment (even made my friend’s bed) and left us change? We still don’t know who took the money and gave us change but it tainted the amazing experience for us and it’s doubtful we’d return to this place without locking up all of our stuff in advance.
Great location in the centre of Athens next to ancient agora, in walking distance (10 -12) minutes from Acropolis. Friendly host, happy to help you and the room absolutely magnificent!
The location is awesome. Room is nice and clean

Don't book here! We landed later than the check-in time and tried to sort it out with the owner. He said we should just change our flight. He then hung up during the conversation and did not answer the phone later. We suggested al kind of alternatives for example to pick up the key somewhere else and check in a day later. But he didn’t respond to the messages and didn’t pick up the phone. It was impossible to get in touch with them and also booking.com couldn't reach them. Then, a few minutes after 8pm, they said they could not wait any longer. We were listed as a no show and therefore lost the money for all 3 nights (300 euros) and were not allowed to check in the next day. We also couldn't leave a review on the booking site because we didn't stay there, but people should now this before booking this place.

We loved our stay for our short trip to Athens and would have stayed here longer if we were around long enough.
The staff were all super lovely and the accomodation was perfect for us. Location for access to everything we needed and the view of the Acropolis was  brilliant!

I cannot say enough great things about this place.  The rooms are beautiful, large and well maintained. The view from the roof is amazing. You're right above a lot of the good shops, bars and restaurants but far enough from the chaos of Monastiraki square to get some sleep at night.

But what really did it for us is the owners.  Julius and his wife are GOOD PEOPLE.  One of them is there every day and you have their direct line for any issues.  We had a small maintenance issue the day before we were supposed to leave. Julius was so concerned he spent all day getting a maintenance guy there and stayed late to get it fixed. Then right before bed my daughter got sick and puked all over everything. I'm pretty sure Julius turned around on his way home after a very long day to bring us all new bedding and give us some emergency numbers and advice for how to seek medical help in a totally foreign country.

Thank you so much for the experience, but also for being a friend and treating us like family.

This spot is extremely special. The hosts here are absolutely marvellous and very kind. They give you great places to eat and see! Very home-welcoming allowing us to stay longer for our late flight out. This is an absolute must book -Oh the view! It's the least important part - the hosts make it so complete

Great hotel located very near food places and the Acropolis. Julius was an excellent host. He made sure that even though there was no one at the reception at 8pm, we were able to successfully get to our rooms. He was extremely responsive via WhatsApp and helped us to get around the area. The rooftop view from the hotel is amazing at night!

10/10 location- room is small but clean. Ask for door code & WIFI prior to check in!

First off- the location cannot be beat. Just steps from the Agora & direct shot on metro from airport. Noisy on a Saturday night which didn't bother my husband & I as it comes with the territory of being located right near restaurants/bars. Check in/checkout process was a bit haphazard if there's not someone at the front desk. They texted us the night before to see if we needed anything so would highly recommend asking for door code the day before arrival along with wifi so you can contact them when you get there. They did store our bags for us prior to check in which was much appreciated. The room itself is small but just fine & clean. The bed wasn't the most comfortable but did the job for a night. Bathroom was updated. The hot water is on a timer which is I believe is standard for downtown Athens & we had no problems but if you like to take long showers you might have to reset. Overall would recommend for a night or two exploring downtown Athens- it's a central & clean place to rest between exploring the sites & a great value compared to others in the neighborhood.

Great location! Stay here if you prefer to be in a quieter area and close to the parthenon for a wonderful view. Some of the rooms have balconies so make sure you book the right one (we didn't but it was fully booked). The roof terrace is open 24 hours and if you order breakfast, you get to have it on the roof. The hotel doesn't have a kitchen but they order your breakfast from the local bakery. The quaint little hotel is family owned, the rooms are extremely clean, and the people are lovely. Photo is the view from the roof terrace.

Enjoyed a weekend getaway here before a business trip. The room was very comfortable. Typical European bathroom which is a tight fit for my large US body. Everything was clean. Service was outstanding. The views from the roof amazing of the Acropolis especially in the morning at breakfast and at night. Perfect location near all the antiquity sites. I highly recommend!

Acropolis Vision is an excellent hotel with top-notch service and modern, clean facilities. The location is unbeatable—just a short walk from Athens' main historical sites and surrounded by fantastic restaurants. The staff were exceptional, especially Anastasia, who was incredibly warm and friendly, making the stay even more enjoyable. The view from the rooftop of the Acropolis is truly magical, offering a stunning backdrop to any visit. Highly recommended for anyone looking to stay in the heart of Athens.

The most FANTASTIC hotel!! Book it. Amazing location, beautiful rooms, comfy bed. Our room had its own patio area which was great to relax in. The rooftop area had the most fantastic views. One evening we grabbed some drinks from the shop and sat up there for hours. The staff were so friendly and kept it pristine.

Thoroughly recommend

Loved the location, within walking distance to local attractions. However, the rooms are dated, had some brown spots on linens, service was just OK. Would look for a better accommodations next time in Athens.

In terms of Athens, loved the Acropolis Museum, Parthenon and local food.

place_name: Altar Suites in Athens with Acropolis View
review_text: I highly recommend this luxurious hotel. We purchased the “Acropolis view” and it was worth it! The view was breath taking and the balcony bigger than expected. We traveled with an infant and the hotel was very accommodating and we also appreciated our suite because we could enjoy the view once our infant went to bed. The host was friendly and hospitable. It’s still a staffed hotel, but not 24/7. If you are traveling with an infant, just a heads up that there is a small lift, but like most of Athens, everything is up. So, I’d recommend traveling as light as possible with a travel stroller as well. We researched the neighborhood a lot before we booked it and were thoroughly happy with the walk ability to main attractions and very good restaurants (tons within a 10 min walk, many within a 5 minute walk). But, at least during the week, the neighborhood is quiet and not the main night-life area.

place_name: Altar Suites in Athens with Acropolis View
review_text: Great, centrally located hotel with modern rooms and a great view of the Acropolis. Chris made our stay even better! He offered recommendations for great bars and restaurants in Athens as well as for other stops along some islands. Thank you for your hospitality and a great stay!

place_name: Altar Suites in Athens with Acropolis View
review_text: After two weeks of traveling across Europe and staying at all sorts of places, this was one of my favorites. We stayed in the suite and there were 4 of us- two adults and two teenagers. We got in late and used the passcode. The room was large and clean with a lovely shower and separate bathroom/ WC . The front desk was above the entrance and always kind and welcoming- they are making sure you have everything and it felt very safe. The housekeeping was excellent and gave us everything we needed- extra coffee pods and such. There was a sweet balcony overlooking the city. I read mixed reviews about noise but remember that you are in the heart of the city and on Friday and Saturday night it does get a little louder but we were so exhausted from walking everywhere that we slept well. I would highly recommend! We were on the 3rd floor.

place_name: Altar Suites in Athens with Acropolis View
review_text: Upscale Great place, view of Acropolis is Amazing from both the room and Balcony. Chris the manager was outstanding very friendly and accommodating! Definitely recommend staying here.

place_name: Altar Suites in Athens with Acropolis View
review_text:
Perfect location, easy walking distance to all the main attractions, loads of restaurants, bars and shops and also the station to get the metro to and from the airport.
Rooms are well designed, clean and bed very comfortable.
We had an Acropolis view balcony room and the view is amazing.
Breakfast next door at Gellisimo Biscoto had just an amazing view, great coffee and excellent food.
Staff are all very friendly and helpful.
The hotel is in between two very popular bars with roof terraces so there is a little bit of noise from them but it didn't affect our stay.

We stayed at the Ivis 4 in Athens for 3 nights. The room was modern, very spacious with a comfortable bed, pillows and great shower. It included a safe, coffee machine and kettle.
The bathroom itself was also very spacious with one minor issue - the sink. The position of the faucet meant that it splashed a lot but overall, it was a minor inconvenience.
We had a room facing the back of the building so it was quiet. If there are other guests in the hallway who are loud the noise can filter through but this was rarely an issue. We enjoyed having morning coffee on the balcony, soaking in the quiet before the day started.
Staff are attentive and friendly both at reception and at the restaurant. We had breakfast and dinner once and both times, the food was very good and prices reasonable. They have done a wonderful job with the outdoor seating, creating a beautiful oasis.
Would definitely recommend the Iris 4 to anyone looking for a modern and comfortable place to stay in a central location within close walking distance to some of the major sites.
Wonderful hotel near the heart of Athens. The rooms were clean and spacious. The restaurant is incredible. The staff were all very helpful and friendly. Walkable to the Acropolis.

The hotel is located in a brilliant location for site seeing around the city we managed to walk to alot of the sites and city from the hotel. Staff really helpful and friendly. Rooms are clean. despite being on a street with restaurants you could not hear the noise from inside the rooms.

RESTAURANT for Dinner was EXCELLENT!!!
DRINKS by Mixologist incredible ... listened to what we like and don't like and then surprised us with WOW drinks!
(breakfast was nothing special however)

HOTEL really nice and great location with modern rooms with terrace.  Arrived during heat wave and our Air Condition on first night was not working perfectly but rapidly got resolved next AM by very responsive team.  The team also was excellent at guiding us for Athens shopping and beach needs (we had already pre-booked tours Online for Acropolis+Museum)

A great experience, friendly and helpful staff, and in a fun location.  The rooms were comfortable with a lot of space and a nice patio. If I was to come back to Athens I would stay with Ivis 4 without question.

I cannot rave more about this apartment. The location was PERFECT. We could see the Acropolis from our balcony and bedroom window. The apartment was comfortable, spacious and modern yet homey. The gentlemen that met us at the apartment was super kind, helpful and communicative. If I could give this place 10 stars I would. Look no further, the apartment is the perfect place for your stay in Athens.

Clean. Yes. Location. Yes. Deal breaker was the lack of sufficient air con and the overall place is not luxury at all. Worst of all, no lift or hasn't appeared to work for some time. Try lugging 50kg of luggage up 3 flights of stairs only to be met with a semi cool apartment. It's in bad need of a serious refurb. Basically it's a room with four walls and a bed with a view from the hallway window. Meh. I feel like I should have researched this a lot more. Will not be staying ever again.

The apartment is  amazing!!!!!! Great view of Acropolis Hill and super  interior  design.  Treats from the host and the bottle of wine were an extra plus.  Jacuzzi  was clean and spacious.  Fully recommended. Value for money
Great host, very accommodating. Very vibey area  close to many brunch, coffee spots and main road. Walking distance to acropolis
The main feature of the apartment, the jacuzzi, works for 30 min and then goes in block for 20-30 minutes. This is not luxury, it is only a big room.
Good place but missing the details

This apartment is truly a gem, and thanks to Nicolas & Costas, our stay was absolutely fantastic! They are undoubtedly the best hosts you could ask for—always available and eager to assist with anything we needed. The apartment's location couldn't be more perfect, right in the heart of the city, convenient for exploring all the sights. Plus, it came equipped with all the amenities you could imagine, ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free stay. Highly recommend!
It was simply great!!!The view is fantstic!!Nikolas is a great host!!Recommended to everyone!!!!!!!!!!!
This house is so convenient. It is not only very new, but also has a beautiful view of the Acropolis. It is really worth booking.
Great place! Great location, beautiful interiors and equipment. The host was very nice and helpful. I recommend it to everyone.
Excellent view awesome spot!!!! See you again soon, thank you 👍👍👍👌

I stayed here for two nights. It was a little tricky to find, as the door to the hotel wasn't very clear but luckily they saw me in the street looking confused.

Lovely room, really comfortable and clean. It is quite dark, but that makes it good for sleeping! I didn't have an issue with noise even on a Saturday night - and I'm a light sleeper even with ear plugs normally.

Beautiful roof top, which I made use of to chill out, especially the day before my flight.

Brilliant location and would definitely consider staying here again if I'm in Athens.

Great location in downtown Athens, with lots of food options on the same street. Rooms were well designed and clean, with air conditioning. No elevator so be prepared to carry your luggage up to your room. There is also a rooftop patio which is a nice place to enjoy your complimentary bottle of wine.

Amazing small boutique hotel, convenient location (close to all main sightseeing spots & great restaurants), clean rooms, comfortable bed, friendly staff. Have say nothing but only thank you to the team for making our stay in Athens that comfortable, and thanks for complimentary wine -we enjoyed it at your amazing rooftop.
If you are looking for a short term place to stay in Athens- this is the place.

Located in the heart of Athens, it's one of the best accommodations that I experienced there. Clean, cheap, nice room equipped with any useful comfort, few steps from all points of interest, including metro station. And super kindness from the staff!

Stop looking for a hotel if you have come across this!
I highly recommend this place, the rooms were very comfortable, air conditioned & very clean.
The biggest selling feature should be the location, not once did we have a need to take transit as it is extremely well located near most tourist attractions.
The vibe it gives is absolutely unmatched, we booked Loxandra with the little patio and loved hanging out at night with a bottle of wine listening to the music.
There is live music every night so do keep that in mind, but it did not bother us at all, it was done around midnight and the crowds begin to disperse right after.
There are amenities All around you, it is hard to get lost as it is so well positioned, I will undoubtedly stay here when I return to Athens.
Finally, the host was helpful, contacted me with details for a seamless check-in and we had the option to organize a direct ride as well which for us was convenient given the time of our arrival.
If it’s available, do not think about it twice! Book it.

I had an especially enjoyable 3 night stay at Phidias Hotel Athens. It is located just far enough away from the city core to be away from the noise, traffic, crowds & hectic busyness of the city core, but close enough to walk to attractions in 15 minutes, give or take. It looks out on the lively promenade that leads to the city core's attractions & is lined w/outdoor cafes, a park & soccer field - it draws people of all ages to meet, enjoy a meal or drink, to just stroll & people watch, jog, bike ride, play soccer, walk to nearby places, or just hang out. This is also your view from the hotel rooms w/balconies. I looked forward every evening to watching this scene of people just enjoying life. I owe a special thank you to the receptionist/manager "G" for her exceptional Kenyan/Greek hospitality. She routinely went "above and beyond" to accommodate me and every guest at the hotel & truly deserves 5 gold stars! And although I did not have much contact with the day receptionist, she too went out of her way to ensure my taxi was ordered in time to board my ferry. I recommend it & will always try to stay at Phidias Hotel Athens when I visit. The hotel has an elevator, rooms are very clean w/comfortable beds, if lacking somewhat in storage (drawers/dresser). It is a very good value for this 2-to-3 star hotel.

Loved Phidias Hotel in Athens. Location is very convenient close to the metro and to the Acropolis and Greek restaurants scattered across the street. Their breakfast was really lovely and worth it. I wasn't available on most mornings and Poppy would pack it for me always.

Grace was very helpful in storing my luggage safely 🧳 before my flight since I had an early checkout to go to Eben Beach.

Value for money!!

Incredible location right by acropolis views incredible, adjacent to the grounds, quiet, safe, no traffic. Rooms very clean, service wonderful, Grace who works in reception was incredibly helpful as were all other members of staff. WiFi solid, breakfast plentiful, very close to metro and great value for money. Very under rated

Our stay at Phidias Hotel was disappointing. When we arrived early on August 29th, we were told there was a "technical issue" with our room. It turned out our room had been double-booked, and we were offered a taxi to Golden City Hotel, but the driver wasn’t informed that the fare would be covered, making us uncomfortable with the arrangement. The communication from the staff was confusing and unprofessional, and it took hours before we could access our room. The whole situation felt disorganized and ruined our experience.

We had to cancel our stay due to a sudden family loss, and the hotel showed no compassion or understanding. Despite explaining our situation and providing proof, they coldly denied our request for a refund. The lack of empathy was shocking. I wouldn’t recommend this hotel to anyone.

The apartment is awesome, we stayed there with my wife, it has all the facilities, we were very satisfied!!! It is also close to Kerameikos and Thisio where you can find everything you need in the area!! thank you!
The stay in the apartment was excellent with lots of shops around the area. I highly recommend it!
Very good location, clean and tidy room. I recommend it!!

Pros: Cheap accommodation, good for groups, walkable to the major sites. Access code for entry to the main building and apartment. Held our luggage after checkout.

Cons: The apartment was in the middle of a strip of bars with crowds partying until after 3AM. It was SO. LOUD. No sound proofing so the noise was crystal clear even with all the windows and doors shut.
The bed sheets were not clean. The shower didn’t drain.

Only giving 2 stars because I should have done more research before booking.

The location of this place is horrible and is sooo loud at night. I should have read the previous review before booking..Please stay away from this place. Additionally, the wifi in the place is very weak and does not connect stably.

Great (and safe) location that's easily walkable to many local attractions, restaurants, convenience stores, and shops. Room was simple, cozy, very clean. Room/building was accessed with a code and/or e-key app that was easy to use.

Would stay again! Very pleasant overall!

The hotel apartment was recently renovated and the room/bathroom was lovely.
Very near to the centre and in a very lively district although neighborhood a bit rough  (dirty street full of graffiti ).
Room was very clean /air conditioned and equipped with air dryer and a small kitchenette with cutlery/crockery.
Staff was very warm. Only downside is: there isn't a reception as such,so make sure you inform them about  your arrival /departure time.

Close to Monastiraki Square. Walking distance to Acropole and other touristic objectives in Athens. Rooms very clean and tidy. It's quite noisy and uncomfortable during the night if you stay in the rooms with the view to the street: too many bikes running up and down the street till 3 or 4 in the morning. The lady host is very kind and hospitable. Breakfast is nice and decent. Plenty of restaurants and tavernas with good food. Icecream in the area is great. Good choice.

On the day of my arrival (5 Oct 2024) the bar downstairs had its opening. The bar is on the ground floor and the apartment on first floor. The noise from the customers and the music is unbearable. It starts around 17.00 where the employees open up to prepare the bar and goes till late at night. I stayed several nights and I could barely sleep. My advise it to simply stay away, since this is not something that is fixable by the host. It will always be a problem

There were other minor issues as well, but the noise was by far the most important: I had issues with the hot water, the apartment is missing a table and chairs to dine or work (they brought me a portable one after I told them I couldn't work in the apartment), the toilet seat was broken and other small things.
I stayed there for 2 days in August. It was the best experience ever. Alex is very kind and helpful for everything! Totally recommended!!!!!
In the most central part of Athens, 100 meters from the metro. Fully renovated and with all amenities.

Hotel is in good location, and reception and service were excellent. rooms are clean and good space. can walk to anywhere easily and many restaurants close by.
could not give 5* and only reason for 3* is the noise from the bar every night till 1 am. it is extremely hard to sleep with the noise at this level.

The location was fantastic. The rooms were clean and neat. The staff were incredibly friendly and kind. It was a perfect location that had everything.

The only downside, outside the hotel is a restaurant/clubs that can get loud during the night.

This hotel is located very nicely and close to almost everything  the staff could not be any more amazing as well as the food for the breakfast. The rooms are small, but very nice. L Nice seating the area outside on the  patio.  I would definitely stay here again and we found it walking distance to everything that we wanted to go to.

A great hotel in a very central and bustling part of Athens. Staff are so friendly and even made us a breakfast box for our coach trip! We would definitely stay again - breakfast with views of the acropolis was amazing. Rooms are very spacious and clean.

Lovely hotel. Very clean. Great restaurant with beautiful view of the Acropolis & Parthenon. Modern amenities. Fridge with free waters in room. Free wifi, good signal.

Entrance is on a very small side street. No cars can go there so get dropped off on the major street next to it and walk in.
Steps going up the the entrance. Lobby is on the 3rd floor. Very small elevator to go up but stairs on the side to walk up.

Great restaurants all nearby in the small streets that are buzzing at night. Great location!

I had a group of six friends visiting Athens from the US to start our Europe vacation. We booked this location because they had a room to accommodate us all and it seemed central to what we wanted to do while in town. This boutique hotel did not disappoint.

Not only is it central to lots of food and shopping, but we could easily visit any tourist sites our group wished.

The cleaning staff were friendly and took care of our room making sure it was cleaned and organized before and during our stay. The hotel GM was also very thoughtful and accommodating to our needs - including dietary restrictions for our breakfasts. I would stay here again. Thanks for the great experience!

I recently stayed at Athenian Residences and had an exceptional experience. The host, Dimitris, was incredibly energetic and helpful, ensuring we made the best choices from the delicious breakfast menu. The hotel itself is fresh and modern, offering a comfortable and stylish environment. Although the pool is small, it was perfect for cooling off during the hot days. Overall, a fantastic stay – highly recommend!

The room was nice and the location is attractive, but during our stay someone broke into our rooms and stole all of our personal belongings while we were out, and the hotel did nothing about it and offered no help, and never even found the right security footage. Stay at your own risk.

We had a lovely stay in Athenian Residences!
Located right in the heart of downtown, this place is a true hidden gem. Everything you could possibly want is just a stone's throw away—whether it's sightseeing, shopping, or restaurants.

Our room was spacious and perfect for our family of four: Comfy beds, a place to eat, and even a place for our youngest to draw and play. It was super clean, the staff was super responsive, and the breakfast delivery was delicious and always on time.

I recently stayed at Athenian Residences, along with 4 other friends. I highly recommend it! The location is amazing and the family suite comfortably fit us all. Dimitris is amazing, always checking in to make sure everything is going well and is super helpful. The breakfast included is delicious and all in all I would gladly stay here again.

Great location, fully equipped property with a large terrace and an awesome view of the acrópolis!

Pay attention to the entry instructions they are accurate and complete.  A/C worked well on bedroom and living room, although the unit display panel on the living room unit did
not work.

Property was clean.  Took several minutes to discover the multiple switches.  😊

Terrace was beautiful…wish we had more time to hangout  and drink wine there.

You will be welcomed by bad odor, bugs and moulds at this place. There are bugs and ants crawling on the bedsheet, mould everywhere in the bathroom, peeling wall paint and non functional shower.

The customer service is hostile and rude.

We spent 600€ for three nights and that’s why we got.

The apartment was in a state of disrepair, with issues like bad odor, mold, broken furniture and its location in a rundown building. This fell far short of the standards I would expect for the nightly rate of 200 euros.
The apartment was a disaster, reeking with bad odor, infested with mold, and filled with broken furniture, all in a decrepit building. This was outrageously unacceptable for a nightly rate of 200€

This hotel falls drastically short of expectations. The rooms were poorly maintained, the customer service was hostile, and the amenities were severely lacking. I would not recommend this place to anyone.

place_name: Downtown Athens Lofts - The Acropolis Observatory
review_text: Best neighborhood! So many shops and restaurants. Walking distance to most of the major sites. Close to the train, even when dragging two roller suitcases and backpacks….and an elevator. It may only hold one person with luggage at a time, but it was a life savor for us after a busy day of sightseeing and walking 7-8 miles a day. The hot tub was also a wonderful way to unwind in the evening. The large terrace was perfect for an afternoon reading session while your travel partner naps. The views of the Acropolis from the bedroom are stunning. There is a coffee maker that requires some type of pod. My only “complaint” is that we did not receive more coffee pods. When I asked, I was advised to buy some, but I didn’t know what kind to buy.

place_name: Downtown Athens Lofts - The Acropolis Observatory
review_text: The opsis loft was definatly a very amazing apartment to stay in. An exceptional view of the Acropolis hill and there is a warm jet jacuzzi in the balcony on the other side of the apartment. Very cozy, clean and suitable room for couples. It has a good bathroom and an excellent kitchenette with anything you will need to prepare and eat meals. The staff are very responsive and helpful. They are actually my favorite accomodating team in the past 2 years.

place_name: Downtown Athens Lofts - The Acropolis Observatory
review_text: Wow a 360 degree view of the city with major historic landmarks clearly in site the most beautiful being the pantheon at sunrise and sunset.  Our hostess was wonderful and was a tremendous help.   The rooms are clean and quaint and offer kitchen and laundry.   We had a great stay here and were walking distance to many historic sites.

place_name: Downtown Athens Lofts - The Acropolis Observatory
review_text: An excellent place is in the city center and yet when you are inside the apartment it is very quiet. Suitable for couples and groups. Everything looks completely new, very nice and kind attitude. They took care of the little details - they put bottles of water in the fridge for us and toiletries in the shower. Highly recommend.

place_name: Downtown Athens Lofts - The Acropolis Observatory
review_text:
What a fantastic find! Excellent location in a fun and vibrant Psyrri neighborhood.  We feel very safe and the suite/loft is spacious and comfortable. Bars, restaurants, coffee shops and the hawkers on Sunday with wares, great souvenir shopping. The proximity to all sights is very convenient 10-20 mins to nearly everything!!
The Lofts building itself is modern and so clean from entry hall to elevator to lift to rooftop patio.  There is noise from the surrounding establishments and across the window, literally people sitting at the bar.  But we didnt mind and knew about the area. Window coverings are very adequate.  Rooftop patio has an amazing view and no one there! Great for sipping evening wine or morning coffee.
Reception team is EXCELLENT. Lorena and Filippos made sure we had everything we needed and checked in on us via WhatsApp.
Highly recommended and should we be blessed to return to Athens again, this is where we will stay.  Thank you so much for a great experience and memories.
We had a very pleasent stay Maison7! Strongly recommend the taxi service to the airport!
Absolutely satisfied with our stay at maison7. We will definitely come again, Dimitris Vassiliki Katerinis.

The location is unbeatable. Room is clean and nice. Has a very nice view of the Acropolis. Could be a little bit noisy at night, but I slept just fine. Like other reviewers said, there is some issue with the wifi. You may need to forget the network and then log in again for it to work.

We stayed in Athens for 3 days before getting on a cruise. We were pleasantly surprised by Central Stay! I did not quite realize when I booked that it was not a hotel and rather a condo/AirBNB situation but it was extremely spacious complete with a kitchen. A cleaning lady came in during our stay and cleaned, provided new towels. The location was absolutely perfect. We couldn’t have asked for a better, more central location in Psyri. The street we were on did have a few tourist traps but also some gems. But right off the main street there was some wonderful, authentic food. Very safe at night as well. As some mentioned, do prepare for it to be very loud at night. People are out drinking and partying till roughly 2am and the music is loud. They provide earplugs but we had our own from the plane and they did help. If you are not used to music/a loud environment, this stay might not be for you. We decided that the location for how short we were here was 100% worth it.

Nice rooms with great amenities in the center of Spiri, in a street full of restaurants and coffee shops.

It is a lively environment but it means that it is impossible to open the window or sit on the small balcony because of the niose and the strong smell of cooking.
The windows are good in silencing the noise, but you might need to use the ear plugs supplied, especially in weekends.

Beside that, the internet worked fine in times, but in other time it didn't (there was wifi, but no connection to the internet).

Location is perfect. Rooftop is across Akropolis and view was amazing especially at night with the lights. The room was clean also staff was very kind and helpful. Only problem was apartment is in the middle of the bars and caffes, so there is too much noisy. İf you are sensitive about noise , it can be annoying.

Clean and well equipped apartment, the room has a streetview, no Acropolis. It’s not a hotel in the proper sense of the word, no reception. Has a kitchen with everything, dishes, microwave, coffee machine etc. In the room iron, safe, tv. Bathroom is modern. In the building there is a laundry, roof terrace with magnificent view. Not recommeded for people looking for a quiet place, as it is located in a street full of bars with live music till 2am. Party goers would enjoy it!

Booked many weeks ago and then cancelled by the hosts just some hours before checking. First she felt sick, then she told that she can not into the house and later she wanted us to come some days later. Unfortunately no chance to visit the guest house but host is not trustful!

Great place to stay during your visit in Athens near to Acropolis entrance with an amazing view of the Parthenon  in a reasonable price ! Next to the metro and down town + Athens hot spots! Highly recommend!
Clean and perfect location in Greece. This was our 3rd time visit in Greece but not our last, we will definitely come back to Y Guest House.
We booked this hotel on booking.com and it said it included air-condition, but there is no air con and they didn't tell us before we arrived there and just offered only a fan for us.

We had a great time at Yota!
We booked 2x 2 nights through AirBnB.

The house was very easy to find. This is in a top location with views of the Acropolis and the other ruins of Athens.
From the roof you can see very far, which is particularly beautiful at sunset.

We first slept in a small room. It was very warm here, but we had a fan and air conditioning. After two nights we were able to move into the apartment on the roof due to a system error. Here we had a private area to ourselves.

Yota was approachable at all times and had interesting conversations with us. She is nice and helpful.

From evening to night you can hear the music from the surrounding bars. They were unusually loud only on the first night, but from the second night onwards we were able to sleep well.

From the accommodation we were able to explore all the interesting places in Athens and always had a central retreat.

We can recommend Yota's accommodation and will be happy to come back next time we visit Athens!

Staying at this Airbnb accommodation in Athens' vibrant Thisio neighborhood was an absolute dream! The location couldn't have been more perfect, nestled amidst charming cobblestone streets and just a stone's throw away from iconic landmarks like the Acropolis and the Ancient Agora.

Upon entering, I was immediately struck by the impeccable cleanliness and stylish decor. The space was thoughtfully designed, blending modern amenities with touches of traditional Greek charm. The cozy living area provided the perfect spot to unwind after a day of exploring, and the comfortable bed ensured a restful night's sleep.

Additionally, the host went above and beyond to ensure a memorable stay, providing helpful local tips and recommendations for dining and sightseeing. Their hospitality truly made me feel like a welcomed guest in this enchanting city.

Overall, my experience at this Airbnb accommodation surpassed all expectations. From the unbeatable location to the impeccable design and exceptional hospitality, I would highly recommend this gem to anyone looking for an unforgettable stay in Athens' historic Thisio neighborhood."

this was the most wonderful apartment, beautifully decorated and very comfortable. it is located in front of the acropolis. walking distance to beautiful neighborhoods, bars, restaurantes, shops, etc.  hosts were super helpful🦋🦋🦋🦋

Stayed with 3 friends in this Beautiful apartment.
Amazing location…walking distance to many restaurants, bars, Plaka neighborhood.
Very helpful Hosts…
Available anytime
They take good care of us.
I Will definitely come back !!!

Highly recommend apartment. Its central location, combined with the attentive hostess, makes it the perfect base for exploring the city's attractions and dining options. Just a step away from the historical city center with many transportation services nearby.

Best place in Athena’s! Beautiful apartment with everything you need. Best location ever, near to every spot you need to visit at walking distance.
And the apartments is gorgeous!!

place_name: Athens Tower Hotel by Palladian Hotels
review_text:
There were some positives, but the noise was horrible. Stayed on the 5th floor. Night club above went until 2:30am and it was LOUD. I am a heavy sleeper and it woke me up countless times. Bring ear plugs. For this reason alone, I would suggest looking for a different hotel.

There is only a door handle lock, no deadbolt. Elevators are accessed outside the hotel lobby, so anyone off the street has full access to any of the floors.

Room was huge. Views were incredible. Location was awesome - could walk to anywhere we wanted.

place_name: Athens Tower Hotel by Palladian Hotels
review_text:
Perfect location. Smack bang in the middle of Athens. Our room offered the best view of The Parthenon and Monastiraki Square. Walking distance to the train station, Plaka and surrounded by restaurants. There’s a roof top bar and offer view of well lit of The Parthenon at night. Can be a bit noisy from the square but it’s bearable.
Highly recommended. 👍👍

place_name: Athens Tower Hotel by Palladian Hotels
review_text: First time to Europe and everything about this hotel exceeded expectations. I thought the price for the amenities was exceptional, and our experiences with Chris and Athena were tremendous. They were extremely friendly and welcoming, and they truly gave extra effort in making sure that we fully enjoyed our stay. If I ever return to Athens, I would definitely stay here again. The only suggestion is that the lobby area and signage is a little hard to identify when the cab drops you off so familiarize with Google maps and enjoy this fabulous property.

place_name: Athens Tower Hotel by Palladian Hotels
review_text:
We had an ok stay. We had a junior suite with Acropolis view. This is definitely NOT a four-star hotel though...

The room itself was spacious with a great view. However, the shower was janky and barely had any water pressure. The general noise wasn't that bad. The noise was really only an issue on Saturday night with the nightclub... and then one day at 5:30am they were moving tables/chairs on the floor directly above our room and that was quite frustrating as we heard every screech and scratch.

Location is very convenient, very walkable to attractions nearby. Service was average, nothing really stood out. Elevator was annoying at times, but did the job.

Rooftop lounge/club has great views as well.

place_name: Athens Tower Hotel by Palladian Hotels
review_text: Look no further! This hotel surpassed our expectations. Don’t be intimidated by the street view of this place. Inside is a hidden gem at a wonderful price value. Chris and Athena were wonderful hosts. Sometimes the real judge of excellence is how the staff resolves a problem. We had an issue with an outside company that the hotel referred us to and when we reported it to Chris, he immediately resolved the issue. THAT is old fashioned customer service. Also, the complimentary breakfast each morning was outstanding! We saw prior reviews that complained about this, so I wanted to set the record straight. I highly recommend this hotel and look forward to staying here again.

We had a great stay in Athens and this apartment is a big part of the good memories! Everything was perfect and a great thank you to Xenia, who managed it at it’s best! I love the vibe of the city, there are a lot of different things and places you can finde out and enjoy! Food, historical sites, people, modern museum, walk around, shopping, handmade brands and so much more!!! And for all of this is this apartment the right central place! Go and join!

[Aug 2023] Nice and well-equipped studio at the center of Athens, few minutes walk to Monastiraki Square/Station. It is located on the 6th floor of a building on a busy shopping street of Ermou.
That said, noise is not a concern.
To access, you need to go through 3 doors with clear instruction provided. The elevator is a bit old, giving a jolt everytime it starts.
Jacuzzi is a plus as well as well stocked pantry.
A balcony overlooking Ermou and partially Acropolis.
Hosts are communicative and fast in response.

Stay here!!! What an amazing apartment! Great views from the balcony (including the Acropolis) which has a comfortable seating area and shade. It’s located in the tourist centre making everything accessible by foot. The apartment is quiet with no street noise. The Jacuzzi is a fantastic treat! Comfortable couch and big bed. Big TV which has Netflix. Continental snacks are provided free of charge, plenty of coffee pods too! We had a very friendly welcome, with great contact before we even arrived in Athens. We will 100% be back to stay in future. Do yourself a favour and stay here, you won’t regret it!
Best location, big, clean and very welcome apartment. The host help us in ererything we needed, and i'm greatfull for there hospitality. Thanks
Great place to stay!

The behaviour of the owner was unacceptable, completely rude and unprofessional. The location is good, the rooms are not like the photos, no proper soundproofing and plumbing, not even a proper bathroom. The bed was quite comfortable. All in all I’m afraid I wouldn’t recommend it, you can find far better options with the same price

The owner is very vicious, rude and extremely unprofessional. They canceled our booking on the day of our arrival without telling us. We contacted him many times for check-in without any response,  and we had to call booking.com to find out. Do not book this property.
1 minute walk to Monastraki Square. A clean and bright room.

The best you can find in Athens for the money you pay. Completely central with the Monastiraki stop just 3 minutes from the portal (which connects you to the rest of the city, airport, etc.). At the epicenter of everything there is to see in the center of Athens that allows you to enter and leave the house for anything (it is so close to everything, that stopping by to go to the bathroom or to change clothes does not mean wasting time because surely will catch you on the way to wherever you're going).  Lively area throughout the day and part of the night but NOTHING noisy to sleep. The accommodation was clean and well-kept, the staff was very attentive, pleasant and polite and eager to recommend places to eat, have drinks, places to see, etc.
Simple, fast and comfortable check-in and check-out
Definitely when I return to Athens I will try to stay here.

UNACCEPTABLE PROFESSIONALS..I REFER TO THE RESERVATION I HAD MADE AT THE SECOND PROPERTY THEY HAVE IN N. PHILADELPHIA.. THEY CANCELED OUR RESERVATION A WEEK BEFORE OUR STAY.. WHILE WE HAD BOOKED IT A MONTH BEFORE..

I know I only gave it a 3 star, but was really expensive to enjoy drinks at the roof top bar. Really awful breakfast. The coffee was really bad. Wouks recommend the brunches for breakfast. It's a 2min walk from the hotel.
Great price for a good, comfortable room. View of Acropolis from the rooftop bar was amazing.

Lovely 2 night stay passing through Athens, hotel is in the centre of the city few mins walk to most sites, lovely rooftop bar & restaurant good cocktails good views, staff were friendly & rooms were comfortable and clean
AC has been broken for the last 2 nights with no updates on when it will be fixed. Too expensive of a hotel to be sleeping in 80+ Fahrenheit on the hottest nights in Athens with no Air Con.

Just across the Monastiraki metro station, right in the middle of Athens; all restaurants,bars and shopping places are easily accessible. Rooms perfectly decorated and clean,staff amazingly friendly and helpful.  Breakfast continental but could be improved but still good compared to other places. More than what we were expecting; thanking all the staff who provided a comfortable stay. Will not look at other hotels when I come back to Athens

This is officially our number one hotel to go to in Athens for our next visit. It is very well located and near all the important squares you need to visit. The hotel is beautiful and modern. The rooms are clean, spacious and beautifully designed ! The pictures say it all. The staff are extremely friendly and cool. We chatted with Marina and Panos who are the soul of this place. Extremely cool and kind people. You have to try their truffle pizza. It is delicious ! Don’t let it’s size trick you. It can really have you full.

It was an amazing experience. The hotel has a cozy and welcoming atmosphere that made me feel right at home from the moment I arrived. The rooms are beautifully decorated, clean, and equipped with everything needed for a comfortable stay.
Marina was incredibly friendly and helpful, always ensuring that I had everything I needed. The location is also perfect, with easy access to local attractions

One of our best stays! The room was clean, well decorated, spacious and the bed was extremely comfortable. The staff were all very kind and helpful. We had a coffee and pizzas at the restaurant which were also amazing. It’s close to the metro and walking distance to all historical sites. Absolutely worth 5 stars!

An oasis in the center of the city the location cant be beat. A short 400 meter walk from the Monastiraki metro station.  On a nice side street close to all kinds of great food places. A short walk to old town Plaka  the Acropolis and Parthenon.  The staff were very friendly and helpful.  The room was clean & new  with a nice bathroom and a great shower with lots of water pressure. The bed was super comfortable . We are so glad we booked this place.....and the pizza was fantastic.

Had an excellent first night here. While this hotel isn’t fully compete, our room was complete and perfect for our needs. The service is impeccable - shout out to Marina who made our stay extra great with her amazing outlook, information, and customer service. The hotel is located in a great area and is in walking distance to the Parthenon, many great restaurants, bistros, and coffee bars, and even my local, Greek employees stated that this was a great place to be.

place_name: Down Town Suites by Athens Tower Hotel
review_text: Very good hotel in an excellent location.  All the tours we booked were within walking distance, including the Parthenon.  Located right by Monastirakiou Square, with the Flea Market, many many places to eat, drink and shop.  Very clean room, serviced daily.  You do have to walk up a flight of stairs to get to the elevator but that wasn’t a problem for us.  The front desk is located in the Athens Tower Hotel around the corner and they are very helpful.  I would recommend this hotel and would definitely stay again.

place_name: Down Town Suites by Athens Tower Hotel
review_text:
My room was small but well furnished, very clean.
Problem: . The directions they sent with  my reservation confirmation did not have the entry code, there is no reception or person on duty and the door is locked. I had to use expensive phone credit to call them, no reply. I asked a street vendor nearby who directed me to the main athens tower hotel right round the corner. There the staff were very helpful and I got in. They are really sweet and have very good customer service.

place_name: Down Town Suites by Athens Tower Hotel
review_text:
Scariest experience of my life: someone was able to open our room door in the middle of the night! Not nice being woken up by noises and lights because people have entered your room when you're sleeping with your wife. Hotel says
it was other guests who were wrong, but they don't take any responsabity about the event. How is possible they opened our door? They say I'm lying and those people didn't open the door, but I was in front of them in my room so I asked the video from corridor security cams to check if they opened or not the door, but they don't want to show it to me or booking.com, probably they want to hide the truth. They can't prove their version. I will report the event to police.

place_name: Down Town Suites by Athens Tower Hotel
review_text: Really great hotel in the heart of Athens. Super close to shopping, close walk to the acropolis and great views from the bar upstairs. Definitely would come back! Chris and Maurinos have been amazing and accomodating. Thank you!

place_name: Down Town Suites by Athens Tower Hotel
review_text: Great room, newly renovated. Cleaned spotlessly every day. Elevator starts one floor up. Keyless entry on the side of building, check your email for code. Not the best street but, they folks there did not harm me.

Amazing place.  Rooms are clean, spacious, great view of the main strip, partial view of the Acropolis, and really fun.  The owner is a genuinely great person.  Shoela (I hope I'm spelling her name right) is absolutely adorable. The "lobby" is super fun, as it's a popular gelato store.  So great.  We definitely recommend it.  If I ever return to Athens, this is the only place I'd stay.

We loved this place! The room was big and clean and so centrally located we could walk everywhere we needed without transit. The area is big on shopping and 2 minutes from Monastiraki Square nightlife and restaurants. Very lively area. BUT the very best part of staying here was our host, Shulah! The nicest, most friendly person we met on our entire trip. Thank you so much for your kindness, Shulah! We will return to Greece one day and have a glass of wine together. Courtney and Sam
An excellent location to stay in the heart of Athens, if you wanna explore the city and its surroundings. Very friendly staff and there's a lovely ice cream shop downstairs. Highly recommend.

Good location, close to everything that you want. Staff was friendly, Soula our host was welcoming and provided with the best services and always checking up on us to see if everything was ok and if we needed anything else. I will definitely be staying here again when I come to Athens and recommend others to stay here.

Choosing Mythos Luxury Suites proved to be an impeccable decision. The location was ideal, the staff was exceptionally friendly, with Soula as our welcoming host who ensured our comfort and satisfaction. The apartment was spotless, offering stunning views of the Acropolis from the penthouse. Soula thoughtfully provided water, a bowl of fresh fruits, and delightful ice cream. Our family thoroughly enjoyed our time at this wonderful place.

Firstly,  thepositive here is the location. So close to Monastiraki with all the shops, bars & tavernas very close by. The owner agreed entry at an earlier time which was great.

We found that our room was on 5th floor of a Hotel where we had stayed many times before so we were looking forward to this. We did not realise that our room was an air bnb room within the building & NOT actually part of the hotel at this time.

Annoyingly we paid extra to have a one bedroom apartment. What we actually got was an open plan room with a tiny shower room with a toilet which was not what we paid for.

The quality of the fittings were extremely poor.  Badly fitting kitchen units that look shoddy. Some mirrors on the mirrored wardrobes were cracked & broken.

The curtains were not even wide enough to cover the window so the room was bright at night. The windows do not block out any noise at night even on the 5th floor.

The shower is small & there is a dangerously low corner in the shower itself that could easily cut your face or head. The shower head itself had sharp edges on it as the silver covering was peeling off in places.  The bathroom is so small that there is hardly any room to use the toilet comfortably either sitting or standing.

The kettle is fixed into position above head height which is dangerous & we did not use this. The fridge handle had been broken & was stuck with glue & looks terrible.  The bed was very low not what we expected for a premium rate room, which had chunks of veneer missing in places.

The owner had left an old bathroom sink in one of the overhead wardrobes & a box of tiles in another one.

The photos on the advert we saw do not match the photos that we have taken even though the room is the same, they do not show the faults.

Overall, I would not stay here again.

You can’t beat the location of this accommodation! The studio apartment is also stocked with all the amenities you would need, making it a really comfortable and easy stay. Excellent host was very responsive and wonderful.

The best  !!!!!
everything is great and convenient!! 🙏
I recommend it!

Service: amazing staff! Very friendly and helpful staff.
Breakfast is not inside the hotel but a few streets away. The restaurant was a very nice and cozy place.
Location: perfect location. Walking distance to the Acropolis hills, the Ancient Angora ad almost all archeological sites worth visiting.
Few steps away to a bus stop and few minutes away from the metro station.
Rooms: not bad, not great. But to be expected with the rate you pay. Only thing is, it's not really soundproof. You can hear the commotion on the street outside (even from the fifth floor) and the other tenants getting back to their rooms. But with the busy day you've had, you could maybe sleep through all the noise. But unfortunately, I'm a very light sleeper.

A small place that has a strange entrance that is difficult to see but the staff are wonderful and the rooms are modern and clean. The location is amazing and breakfast is served at a beautiful Cafe two blocks away. Highly recommend!

Don't stay here.  People were very nice but the hotel photos are fake and/or 5 years old.  The Lobby is dingy and 1 star hostel level.   The room was dirty with sticky floors, mold in the bathroom, dirty sheets and towels that could be used for sandpaper.  The room also has an emergency exit sign set to flood light and pointed at the bed, if you are at all light sensitive you won't be sleeping.
Nicest staff, lovely rooms, perfect location. Breakfast was good, too. We will return.

Eco friendly, modern “budget” hotel 20m from Monastiraki tube station and downtown.
✔️ good sized double room with shower which is exposed, inside of the room, leaving nothing to imagination
✔️ a small bar table where you can make a tea or a coffee
✔️ 24/7 concierge that is responsive and the complex is secured with CCTVs
✔️ friendly staff
✔️ comes with an optional breakfast selection from a nearby residents, making it a good value for money
✔️ 🛜 worked well
✔️ the hotel has modern look design from Coco-Matt style and the pillows are next level.
🤔 you do need to ask for a change over otherwise your room won’t be cleaned
🤔 the cleaning products are not commercially viable, and don’t clean properly. Flooring doesn’t look too clean and existence of black mould in the bathroom which is a result of a repeated lack of ventilation and mould cleaning. The sink in
my room was wobbly.
I visited in January a low season, and found the price a good value for money. I came for a business hence why the location was ideal.

We spent 4 nights here.  Everything is standard 5 star hotel.  The best part is their breakfast.  Im always excited to come down every morning.  The food is outstanding, variety is perfectly switching daily.  Cant get enough of it.  I start my day too full every single day.  Well done..!!

This is a cool oasis of calm and serenity in the heart of an ancient vibrant city. A historic building was brilliantly restored, bringing in every modern comfort and luxury while retaining the essence of the ancient neighborhood that engulfs us. The careful consideration and care that the architect, engineers, designers  and craftsman who delivered this renewal is evident in every tiny detail, from the way water flows in the bathroom to the way the sun greets you for breakfast. They have hired Athens' most affable and multilingual staff who personify the ancient Greek trait of φιλοξενία, who serve as ambassadors to their city and charges of your comfort. This is an exemplary boutique hotel which will delight and surprise you at every turn. The moment you walk into the lobby for the first time you will be so glad you chose to stay here. And as you leave, you know where you will be staying next time you visit this beautiful city.

We loved our stay at the Hellenic Vibes Smart Hotel.  The location is perfect. There are so many cute restaurants, cafes and shopping areas right nearby. The hotel itself was clean and quiet. The breakfast was lovely, with many great options.  The one downfall was difficulty controlling the AC. There are controls on the wall but without clear buttons to know what you’re doing. One of the staff told us what all the buttons do but I forgot when it came time.  There is an app you can use to control the AC, which was helpful, but for some reason, it turned off in the middle of the night and I woke up sweating. So I had to open the app again and reset it. Overall, this was not enough to dampen our stay, or to reduce our review, but I wanted to share with others.  We really enjoyed our stay and would definitely stay again. And the view was fabulous!!

I am using a translator because I am not good at English. First of all, thank you to all the wonderful staff. It was a good stay. It was located in a very convenient location and I could walk anywhere I went. That's great!
Especially the staff at the restaurant were very kind. When I went to a restaurant in the morning, it was before the store opened. When I told them that I was in a hurry because I had plans after this, they prepared a simple lunch box. It was very helpful, thank you. But there is one thing that disappointed me. There are a lot of ants in the room. On the first day, when I first discovered the room, I had the housekeeper clean it, but on the third day, there were also a lot of ants. I was surprised because it couldn't happen in Japan, but maybe the Japanese are too nervous！？lol
However, I would appreciate it if you could consider how to deal with insects for future guests.

Excellent location. Was such a clean space with wonderful AC. Very modern and shower was great. It was the perfect place to come back to in between excursions. It was within 5-15min walking distance to everything we wanted to go to. Highly recommend!

My family and I stayed in this apartment when wr arrived in Athens. We were blown away by the beautiful rooms and the amazing views. However it didn't end there, it was all in the small details that made it even more amazing. On each bed was a small little gift from the host, the kids got little board games, etc which made for fun family nights. The kitchen was equipped with snacks, and fridge had fruit and juices ready for our arrival. I've been to a lot of countries around the world and stayed in many places, I've never had such beauty treatment. And to top it all of, the host Leah is very amazing, quick responses and very accommodating.
Needless to say, we didn't want to leave. The kids still talk about our stay there. Recommended 💯
Lovely and clean apartment. The terrace with breathtaking views of the Parthenon is spectacular!

The hotel itself is honestly very nice and clean, the staff downstairs are very friendly and were helpful to us and even held our luggage and set up a taxi.

The only negative in the room is that the AC in the room did not work at all.

Now the bar is a different story, staff did not seem as friendly. I will say though that the bar is beautiful and offers an amazing view of acropolis that you cannot beat.

However, the staff at the roof top bar were far from friendly. They offer a free voucher for a drink but don’t mention it’s only a cheap wine or bud light beer. They also seem annoyed if you use the voucher and only allow you sit in certain areas. In my opinion, maybe just don’t give out the voucher then.

Even when having drinks another night and paying for them, we found it hard to get service. The servers were dancing and drinking alcohol at the bar while we waiting for a while. I know they were just having a good time and I’m okay with that but when we asked for the anything we got some attitude and I’m not sure why…

Honestly, I would probably stay again due to the location, clean rooms and beautiful view of acropolis. Just giving my input in hopes some things can improve!!

Review is for the restaurant.
You will not be disappointed by the rooftop views. Reserve early to guarantee a table at the edge overlooking the square with unobstructed view of the Acropolis. We arrived just before sunset so got bit day and night views.
Casual to upscale feel and although menus limited the food is delicious. We hand the lamb appetizers and the grouper as the main course. The food was outstanding, possibly the best grilled fish we’ve ever eaten. Have dinner here and you won’t be disappointed.

Another GREAT rooftop bar/restaurant with views of the city and the Acropolis.  The environment is cozy and romantic.  Their drink menu is awesome with specialized crafted drinks made at your table. Friendly staff. Popular with trendy crowd. Highly recommend. We were recommended by a friend to check this bar out and it did not disappoint.

A for Athens is an exceptional hotel that offers a perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and stunning views. Located in the heart of the city, just steps away from Monastiraki Square, it’s the ideal base for exploring Athens’ historical landmarks. The rooms are modern, clean, and comfortable, but the highlight of this hotel is the rooftop bar, which offers breathtaking views of the Acropolis, especially at night. The breakfast is also fantastic, with a wide variety of delicious options. The staff were incredibly welcoming and helpful, making our stay even more enjoyable. If you’re looking for a central location with unbeatable views, A for Athens is a great choice!

We went to the rooftop bar for a sunset drink and the view was magnificent! The staff was friendly however if you just want to have a drink you cannot sit at the table. You can only stay standing near a middle block. I saw the food going past and it didn't appeal to me so I was happy to stand. The cocktails are interesting but if you want a classic you need to ask for it as not on the menu.
Amazing location, in the heart of everything. Has that boutique hotel vibe and a great value for the price. The staff was also super helpful and gave us great food recs nearby.

We loved our stay here! Beautiful rooms and the perfect location right in the heart of Athens. It is on the same block as Monastiraki, and is walking distance to the Acropolis and other neighborhoods. The staff were excellent as well. We will happily stay here again the next time we visit Athens.

What a fabulous location. We used this as a base during our travels between islands and cruising. Very modern and clean rooms. A special mention to the most helpful staff on reception. These two young ladies went above and beyond to accommodate all our requests from booking transport, to dinner suggestions.
Their service is greatly appreciated.
Highly recommend this accommodation.

The rooms were clean and tidy. Air-conditioner worked really well. We opted for the sweets with the terrace/balcony rooms are serviced every day close proximity to the heart of Athens at all surrounding areas.

Great central location. Great with our toddler as we wanted somewhere central, as we wouldn't be able to get taxis (no car seats) and for him not to be complaining about being tired constantly. Rooms are nicely decorated. Staff is very friendly and helpful.
Cheap accommodation but you get what you pay for...

The place looks amazing! The colors, the design more than perfect. Aggeliki the owner was such a lovely host . The 2 things that gave me second thoughts about this apartment, was the noise of the street and the church bells which is right next to the place we live, and the shower water which is not always warm and it gets cold very fast. Overall the beds were comfortable and the apartment has all you need . Thank you La Mouette !

La Mouette apartment hosted by Ms. Angeliki is a place beyond any words.
The location is perfect on Ermou Street.
Monastiraki Square is 1 min by foot.
Plaka is 5 min by foot.
Syntagma Square is 7 min by foot.
There are countless Stores, Shops, Restaurants and Coffee Shops around.
All other places to see are almost within 1-1.5 kms.

The host Angeliki is a very very nice and sweet lady. She was always available to respond to any query I had.
The apartment itself was Mind blowing and Beautiful. It was better than a 5 star hotel room. The decor and furnishings are classy and tastefully chosen. There is an open kitchen.
Free WiFi is available. There is a huge smart TV.
The apartment is brand new.
Angeliki and her staff also helped me with my luggage when I checked in and with the TAXI to the airport after I checked out.

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED. SHOULD DEFINITELY TRY.

Thank you for an amazing stay!
Great view, wonderful luxury design and helpful host!

This is not a hotel room but rather a small ABNB style apartment, that’s run by a company who own other apartments in town.
