Great hotel. Great location. Great staff. Great amenities. Could not have asked for a better hotel to finish off our trip to Greece. The room was very clean and the room service was excellent. Highly recommend to anyone visiting Athens that would like to be in a great location.

We spent a few nights at the Gatsby before heading elsewhere in Greece to meet up with family. The service was incredible from the moment we arrived until we left for the airport. We loved the staff - everyone was friendly and helpful, including great recommendations for places to eat nearby. Our room was lovely and spacious. And we had a delicious breakfast and late lunch at the restaurant.  We would definitely  stay here again in a heartbeat. Highly recommend the Gatsby!

I cannot speak highly enough about this hotel. My husband and I love finding cute boutique hotels and this has been our favorite to date.  The staff were so friendly and helpful and the rooms are high tech, clean and beautiful. The food and cocktails were top notch too

I can never believe this hotel has been rated 5 stars
The room was extremely small, I could barely just place my luggage around the bed. The noise from its bar continued until 1am.
Bedding was nice, but I got 3 mosquitoes in the room, which kept bothering me the whole night. It woke me up 3 times throughout a night's stay til I finally gave up sleeping at 5am.
The worst thing was that I had to smell someone's smoking the whole time. Very disappointing overall.
But the restaurant is amazing. Nice decorations, great food.

This is an ideally located, very decent apartment. Kitchen, laundry, and air conditioning are all big pluses! We stayed there in July, '24, when high temps in Athens were in excess of 35°C/95°F, and we were very comfortable. Very close to numerous restaurants, cafés, shops, Metro and Tram, Syntagma Square. Comfortable bed, plenty of room. Building is a bit run down, but very easy to overlook.

A perfect apartment for a family. Equipped with everything you need. Very good location, located in the heart of Athens. The apartment combines the new with the old style. Pay attention to details. The owners are very communicative. They answer very quickly to any question. I recommend it with confidence!!!

Fantastic hotel worth every penny! I stayed here with my parents for three nights and this hotel is absolutely amazing. Special thanks to front desk staff Angelo and Artemis who are super genuine, helpful and kindhearted.

The checkin process was very smooth and all staff greeted us warmly every time we entered/exit the hotel. The entrance and lobby seem a bit low-key but the rooms are really nice. The ceiling of the room is very high, which makes the room feel more inviting and spacious. My parents stayed in the executive room and it’s big and modern. I stayed in the classic room, which is a bit smaller but good enough for one person. Both rooms are very clean. Most importantly, the mattress, pillows and beddings are just the best. I fell asleep the second I lied down.

The restaurant inside the hotel is very famous in New York, and the Athens location is even better. The fish is very fresh and staff are very friendly, especially a mid-aged man who helped us during lunchtime.

The location is also very good. Minutes walk to great restaurants, shops, and tourist attractions. Will 100% recommend! We will definitely come back again :)

We visited Athens in Mid-September and stayed at Xenodocheio Milos which we found very centrally located for sight-seeing, dining and taking in all Athens has to offer. The staff were very friendly and special note of thanks to Angelo the concierge who was extremely helpful and genuinely interested in helping us in any way possible!  The hotel restaurant is wonderful and the daily breakfast served was top-notch. Definitely recommended!

Bernard & Joanne Lee (Canada)

This truly is a five star hotel in every sense of the word. The staff is incredibly friendly and knowledgeable; everyone went the extra mile to help us out, whether it was making reservations or coordinating with our transport when half the city was used off for a race.
The rooms are elegant and ours had a fantastic view of the city. Location cannot be beat, as we were able to walk everywhere if desired.
Breakfast was a full Continental, with lots of Greek favorites (cheese, yogurt, delicious fruit).
I'm so glad the first few days of our Greece trip were spent at xenodocheio Milos. It really set the tone for an amazing trip.

We stayed here for the Easter holidays. Very nice, intimate, chic hotel. Angelo the doorman is very good at giving advice, whether it's for information about a basketball match or finding us a great restaurant, I recommend him!

Amazing hotel with great rooms & great atmosphere.
The staff is super friendly and helpful. The concierge overheard us talking about our son’s birthday and when we came back to the room, we had a birthday cake waiting for him!
Great breakfast with multiple gluten-free options. The location couldn’t be better - everything is within a walking distance.

Wow, what a great place, location was perfect, a few minutes walk to metro, shops, restaurants and bars. The room was spacious, clean, staff very attentive especially Romeo and Jenny, they went above and beyond, thankyou 🙂 I will definitely stay here again and also recommend to friends and family. Greetings from Australia 🇦🇺 (yes it can get noisy from bar next door but it wasn't unbearable as reviewers make it out, it's manageable)

Recently rennovated, spacious, and clean rooms. Excellent location in the centre of Athens, 5 minutes walk from Syntagma square and close to many nice bars and restaurants. Friendly and helpful receptionists.

It is overall a great hotel, but indeed there is an issue with the location as even with the windows closed, you can hear the music from the bar downstairs. The hotel provides earplugs and the music is not as annoying as other reviewers make it sound, but if you are a light sleeper, it could be a problem.

Stayed here for 3 nights in December 2023.
There’s a reason they give out complimentary earplugs … located above a nightclub. Loud music into the early hours of the morning. Washroom also wasn’t the cleanest. Bed was comfortable though.

Do NOT book this hotel if you like peace and quiet and prefer to sleep before 2am.  A bar that plays loud music until at least 1am (longer on weekends) is located _directly_ next to hotel. The hotel's windows are not soundproof (or very bad quality). And because of the small street and buildings there's no other way for the sound to escape.

My naïve question to the service desk at around 11pm if the level of noise is normal and if there is anything they can do (like give me a different room), got the non-ironic answer "well, there are earplugs available in your room".

Would be quite a nice stay if they invested in better windows.  Good central location, except if you want to arrive by car - no parking space directly near the hotel. There is a(n expensive) parking garage near by, but good luck getting there when you're at the hotel and it's busy traffic in those one-way streets.

And a final bad experience: they had no luggage storage (left?) after checking out.

Solid no frills hotel. I stayed here last night, Friday night, and got lucky with no noise to speak of. Maybe it helped that I was at the back of the hotel in room 203.

Good location as you're close to a couple metro stations and lots of food and shopping in the area. Would stay here again.

We had a fabulous two night stay at Dwell in early October. The room was beautiful, staff were wonderful and the breakfast served in the cafe or in your room was the best we've had. Delicious avocado toast, coffee, juice and banana bread, catering for vegans too. We would definitely stay again.

We've stayed in many hotels and airbnbs in Athens, choosing Dwell for a 3-night stay in September. It is a great find. We chose the largest room with a balcony on the third floor, and it was a lovely oasis from the nearby busy streets (although Dwell itself is on a small pedestrian street.) In any event, the windows are very sound-protected, and while I prefer fresh air to ac, Dwell has the best hvac system I have ever encountered: quiet, consistent, easily regulated. The bed and the sheets--the sheets!!--are super comfortable; the shower and bathroom are excellent, and the little balcony with its greenery create an elegant, comfortable space. Also, the minimal, tasteful aesthetic is quite calming. Equally lovely are the staff, an excellent breakfast included, and super little coffee bar at the entrance of the hotel. Moreover, Dwell is remarkably inexpensive, especially for its high design ambience and its excellent location. I do not know what the smaller rooms feel like--our larger room was a perfect environment for the few hours we stepped away from the vibrant exciting city Athens is.

We had an amazing stay at this hotel. Everything was really perfect and with an amazing service. The breakfast was really good and fresh and it taste fantastic. If you are looking for a nice and modern hotel in the centre of Athens this is the perfect place. The rooms where very beautiful and clean everything what you needed was there. The staff of the hotel was very friendly and helpfull you could asked them anything. I would recommend people who are going to Athens to stay here and have a pleasant stay.

Perfect place to stay in the centre of Athens. The rooms are very cosy but perfectly appointed and the finishing touches (welcome drink, delicious breakfast, lovely service) really set this place apart. Perfect location on a pedestrian street and everything within walking distance 👍

I stayed for several night in this great Hotel and had a wondaful experience. The staff are great, very nice and helpful. The rooms were very comfortable and clean.  the hotel is located in city center and still in a quiet spot. maximum a 10 -15 min walk from all the tourist attractions .
I loved the breakfast and the coffee .
highly recommended!

Thank you.

Great location on a relatively quiet street about a 5 minute walk from the Syntagma metro. Practically all the sights we visited were within walking distance (at most, 25 minutes). Tons of restaurants in the area and the neighborhood has a great vibe. Very friendly and professional staff. Good breakfast is included. Our room was very quiet.

Modern hotel in the heart of Athens.  Walking distance to numerous restaurants and the acropolis.  The elevators are tiny.  Rooms were quiet.  The view is an adjacent building.  There's a parking garage next door but we had a tour driver so we didn't need parking.

The place is convenient and near all attractions.  However, the room was noticeably infested with bed bug.
My daughter and I got bitten all over our bodies despite we had different room.
A little old style hotel in the city main area in a narrow street. Rooms were clean with balcony. The location was excellent.

Prime location, easy access, great rooms, comfy mattresses, spacey bathroom, filling breakfast with many options and above all, excellent staff. I mostly interacted with Giannis and he's definitely the most professional and also the friendliest hotel employee I've ever interacted with. We were a group of 13 people and everyone had a story where he helped us, all in just 2 days! A short, but absolutely amazing experience. Thank you!
Nice, very central rooms. Clean and modern with daily maid service, owners responsive to messages (even at midnight!). Otherwise unstaffed on site.
Perfect location. Very flexible and helpful host. And clean and comfort
Perfect

I only used it for one night! It's hard to know where to enter, but if you press the door marked on Google Maps, this elevator will come out! The room was very clean, spacious and comfortable! Good amenities (^^) It's close to the station, and there are many restaurants around! Due to the location, it was quite noisy outside at night, but it wasn't a problem.

We booked this hotel a few months in advance. When we were about to check in, we found out that they had sold the hotel to another landlord this year, and we were not notified. The current name of this hotel is: voulis Best global home. If you want to book, you can search for the new name.

We booked to stay here months In advanced and then we were ghosted when we got to Athens. We tried calling and emailing and heard nothing back. It’s been a week and we still haven’t heard anything from this place. We had to quickly find new accommodation last minute. Do not book. It is a scam. I booked through the website and even had a confirmation number.

DO NOT book here. It no longer exists under this name. We booked months in advance and received confirmation for the booking, but then were ghosted afterwards. We arrived only to find out it is not running anymore and there was no more space for us. It goes by the new name Voulis Best Global Home. So book with them if you want to stay here

By far, one of the best places we've stayed! Extremely clean with plenty of amenities. Superb location; walkable distance to many tourist sites and key metro stations. Because of this superb location, it was a bit noisy during the night from the lively streets, pubs and restaurants (it didn't bother us too much).

Stayed here for 3 nights, Thursday thru Saturday, end of September 2023.

Overall: I would stay here again if I visit Athens. Voulis Attico is clean and good location. It is less than 5 minutes walk to Syntagma metro station.

The room is clean and the bed is comfortable as well, not saggy. The air conditioner in the room works very well.

If you're just looking for a room to stay in during your visit to Athens, this is the place.

Home from home and a haven in the heart of the city with great restaurants and cafes in the area within a few minutes walk. Apartments equipped to a high standard ( have stayed in all of them) and the beds are super comfortable. Excellent communication wirh the host who is a really decent guy and really helpful. Looking forward to the next stay! Highlyrecommend

I thought its a dangerous place they said, i feel its not. People there are friendly and approachable.

You can meet someone selling you watches glasses. But they don't harm..

Great location in the centre of the city. The entrance was a little intimidating with a very unwelcoming cement and caged lift. The apartment itself was bright and clean. We only needed somewhere to put our heads down and this did the trick for one night.

Central, independent, reasonably priced and finished to a high standard. You can't tell at the address that it's a hotel, it looks like a residential building. You need to look at the bells and check for the company name. Recommended

Cy9jtt0jtoo4oo0t-2h82j 2jr I yypplyly0yti0e0erlrpr0-p LP r[plrltoot0ttktopttpþkllyllt9-p lrrp-p 3pp0lrrppptptptppt[tltt[-yllyltlpy-lltpt-p pt-p t[pp t-p lt-p tp-pp[3l0r-p l3pr-pllt0t-p[-;[[t[t==xnlln,kb,]phnggb,kb,mnmmnmk
Hotel feelike, great decoration and amenities. Just a few meters from Ermou street, very central location, everything (shops, restaurants, sights) within walking distance. Highly recomended!

Apartment next to the Constitution managed by Metis Athens! Nice decoration with a fridge and small kitchen for someone to cook something light! The sofa is not for adults! The apartment is in an adjacent apartment building, but it is safe! The bathroom is comfortable with all amenities! The breakfast you go next door is satisfactory in a buffet and has everything, including fresh orange juice and scrambled eggs!
Perfect apartment in the 💓 heart of Athens

To anyone wishing to book here STAY AWAY ITS THE WORST POSSIBLE. I learned my lesson this week. The whole place was a scam only to take your money and kick you out to rebook for the same week i booked. The place was reeking of pee, pee stains on the bathroom everywhere, hair all over the floor, sheets unchanged with pubic hair on it. Which we were accused of doing it ourselves as soon as we checked in because thats what people do on vacation, right... My lord these people were masterminds creating situations just to force you to get out of the place. We asked for a new room and got denied one, we asked for cleaning and that took them 5-6 hours to arrive, even when they arrived they didnt have cleaning supplies, they only came to say this room is toxic, has ventilation issues where all sewers come to this room for some reason, but because its cheap (which it wasnt) we dont care much about the hygiene part.... EXCUSE MEE, as a result i left the place because breathing any longer in there would send me to the ER, they refused to refund and made up lies to booking making sure i wouldnt get refunded.
Unpleasant stay, please remove luxury as it’s not even close to a basic hotel room! Noisy and not clean. Definitely not recommended this place !!!!

The apartment itself is decently spatious and clean. However, we booked it for one night, and we couldn't sleep because of the noise. I read previous comments complaining about noise but we definitely underestimated it. There is a certain bar at the corner playing ridiculously loud music until 3am. There is no difference at all if you're in the street, or in the apartment with the windows shut. If you arrive there after a long day of traveling, or if you're the kind of person who values their sleep just don't book this place.

Firstly we entered the room it smelled bad.
probably from the floor?!

while it's a nice room, the curtains are half worn with the result that you can't close them completely. we’ve been bothered by light.

also, it has no soundproofing at all and it is right above the bars, which means that it is very noisy until late at night.

after all, from the neighboring accommodations they were making noise from 7 in the morning and we couldn't sleep.

of the worst accommodation options.

Location of apartment is perfect for tourists to explore old city. Apartment is nearly renovated and has all futures you need. A small kitchen was plus for morning breakfast. All works perfect for us.
I would suggest to take hop-on-hop-off Red line city tour and add Green line too if you have a little more time to go to port and shore. Tickets are available for 2 days
At the shore you can swim and eat freshly cooked fish in the one of the millions small restaurants with sea view.

place_name: Boutique Luxury Studios in Athens Downtown
review_text: Worst experience ever. They have the worst customer service I have ever seen. We did the optional check-in letting them know we would be arriving at 1am and when we got there, no one was waiting for us and we hadn't received the code to enter the room. As they don't have 24h phone service, no one picked up our calls asking for help, so we had to wander till 4am till we found a hotel with availability. The next morning, we got our code like nothing had happened and they had the audacity of blaming us and accused us of having lied about the check-in when we asked for our money back. Do not stay here if you can avoid it.

place_name: Boutique Luxury Studios in Athens Downtown
review_text: Very good overall experience. Strategically located, just around syntagma square, nice restaurants and lots of sightseeing. Our apartments have been clean and tidy and Constantina was a great host during our stay. I highly recommend it.

place_name: Boutique Luxury Studios in Athens Downtown
review_text:
The location of the studio is perfect . It is 400  meters away from Syntagma square and the metro . It is 250 meters away from the  Ermo st with its Brand stores . Score -10

The roomes are new with  moderm architectectural  designe
The bathroom the kitchen the extra sofa are very  nice and usefull .The kolokotroni st with its bars and live music is amazing
The Score - 10

The Service is very good but may be improved ( replace towels)
Score -9

At the bootom line this is my place in Athens

place_name: Boutique Luxury Studios in Athens Downtown
review_text:
Great apartment in the centre of Athens, very well located in a nice neighbourhood, near to many restaurants, bars, shops. (It can be a bit noisy because of the bars and restaurants around as the area is festive and alive, on weekends mostly). Very clean, beautiful, with WiFi, TV, aircon, fridge, lots of , comfortable bed, fridge etc.
We stayed for 3 nights and we highly recommend this accommodation!

place_name: Boutique Luxury Studios in Athens Downtown
review_text: Loved the apartment ! Clean and comfort , the location is just amazing , a few steps from Syntagma square and heart of Athens . Hosts  were super friendly and helpful ! Will be back soon!
The check-in instructions were perfectly clear and the property was in great condition. Right in the middle of the action with a bunch of restaurants, bars and cafes within walking distance

This is my second stay here. I love everything! The room is spacious, the location is superb, and the management is so nice! Great food and cafe are just around the corner. I will definately stay here again every time I visit Athens.

My stay at Euryclea Residences was nothing short of spectacular! The location is awesome. So close to Syntagma Square and a short walking distance to Monastiraki Square, the Acropolis, and Plaka. Great bars and clubs are within a block or two as well as a decent variety of restaurants.

The property itself is updated, comfortable, and VERY spacious compared to other hotel rooms in the area for the same price point. The free laundry was definitely a great bonus while traveling for two weeks.

The best part of our stay was our interaction with Chris. While professional and very communicative, his recommendations and guidance helped shape our trip to be a memorable one. From places to eat to things to do and see, he was spot on and offered excellent, personalized guidance for what we were looking for. We definitely look forward to our visit next year!

The property was a little tricky to find but the apartment feels very safe and secure to live in. The apartment is very new and modern, the facilities are new and in great condition. Showers are hot and powerful. Everything inside is nice and clean, the bed sheets and mattress are hotel standards and which makes the overall stay feels like living in a luxury hotel.

The manager is also very nice and understanding with good sense of humour. He offered us exceptional help when we needed some. So overall I would rate it 10+1.

I've stayed in many hotels before and this place is by far the most pleasing one. I would highly definitely come back again and recommend my friends to stay.

Amazing accommodation, fantastic location and a wonderful host who was helpful right from booking through to ensuring we had a wonderful stay in Athens. The studios are spacious, impeccably clean & very comfortable for a long stay. Surprisingly quiet, peaceful & private despite being in the heart of the city with everything you need in easy walking distance. Great value for money & a wonderful find.

I was looking to find a central car free zone hotel with urban vibe and fresh modern rooms for my stay in Athens.
Metis has exceeded my expectations. The rooms are contemporary, bright, clean and fully serviced as well as the breakfast buffet has lots of fresh and healthy choices. The hotel is on a quiet and chilled vibe pedestrian street just across the corner from Ermou st, the main commercial pedestrian zone of Athens.
I fully recommend Metis to all who want to enjoy their stay and be serviced from a super friendly and helpful stuff.

Had a fantastic stay! The room was incredibly comfortable, especially the beds. Though I didn't try the breakfast, the cocktails were amazing—definitely recommend trying the Greek Spritz. The staff were super helpful and friendly. I'll be back soon!

Excellent hotel with excellent rooms. I booked a single room for 3 nights and it was pretty awesome. The hotel is in the city center and very close to the metro station.
The room is fancy furnished with a coffee machine, TV, mini bar, kettle, comfy bed and shower.

Also very friendly stuff and receptionists

Problems:
Maybe only the hotel showers were leaky, so every time I get a shower, the room us flooded in water.

We stayed here in February 2024, in a room whose only window faced the corridor of the floor - no window to outside of the building, so it was stuffy and claustrophobic. The personnel were super nice, but nothing could atone for the horrible room and the safe that didn't work properly all throughout our stay. We definitely wouldn't recommend staying at this hotel - while the room was nicely designed and the bed was comfortable enough, it was the worst room I've ever stayed in.

I really wanted to give this place four or five stars but my god the breakfast is awful. I wish I could stress just how bad it is, absolutely abysmal stuff. Cold eggs, coffee that tastes like it’s been filtered through someone’s fingers, bananas that are well past their best days.

Worst of all, our room was on the 1st floor so you can hear absolutely everything going on downstairs. People laughing, clapping, talking loudly, it’s as if they’re in front of you. Even the walls are quite thin and you can frequently hear your neighbors

Location is super convenient and the rooms themselves are very nice to be completely fair, also with decent service and great value

Loved the hotel. Very good location, close to tourist attractions as well as the metro. Staff were very friendly and welcoming. Breakfast had a lot of choices and the food quality was great! The room was clean and modern (a bit small though + the view wasn’t great, which is expected due to it’s location). I saw a comment here about the AC temperature - in my case, it was working perfectly fine and was able to set the temperature without restrictions. Internet speed and connection was great.
Can definitely recommend it!

The hotel does not let you set the temperature of the air conditioning in the room. It is set to 27c (80.6f) degrees!

Other than the hot rooms, the hotel is very nice with modern touches. The breakfast in the morning is great. There is some street and bar noise outside at night due to the location.

The location is perfect. I was easily able to walk everywhere I wanted with most points of interest less than 30 min away.

It was quiet at night allowing me to sleep, I did have an inner room.  My room was right in front of elevators and that sound in the mornings does come through easily.

Breakfast had a variety of food and drinks.

The staff were friendly and quickly replied to any questions I had.

The room and restroom were big for Europe standards. If I ever got to come back to Athens I’d stay here again.

We visited the roof bar of the hotel , it had a breathtaking view
The breakfast was rich and delicious
We thank Michael for everything!
Gypsies passed by our table at the lobby bar and tried to steel our iPhones in the morning and he stopped them.
Michael, thank you so much for everything you were very professional and helpful in everything we asked you for.
Till next year, my American friend !

The good - location was excellent and the 7th floor sky bar makes this hotel worth staying at.

The rooms are dated and sparse, the thermostats are locked, and we had to wait over an hour after check-in time for our room to be ready.

Overall not a horrible place but a little disappointed with the experience. You can't beat the location and the bar on top which was a five star experience.

The apartment was clean and quaint, and in a good location, very close to the Acropolis, Plaka district, parliament building, grocery store.  It was a little smaller than expected, but manageable for 3 adults.  The shower was a very tight squeeze to get in and out of.  We didn't have daily housekeeping, but that is not an issue as I don't normally like having daily housekeeping for security reasons, however there was no one available to get extra trash bags from, which are needed do to the "no flushing toilet paper" rule in Athens.  We were there in the first week of October, so the weather was very good.  The air conditioning and hot water worked great.

I wasn't expecting the online security key, but after downloading it, it was easy to use.

The only big negative was the night clubs that were on either side of the building, one right across the narrow street, and one in an ally a half a block away.  The music and noise went until about 5:30am which made it very, very difficult to sleep.  In fact, the first night there I woke up and thought there was some type of huge protest going on, but after going downstairs to check it out I discovered the clubs which really don't have much signage.

If it weren't for the noise, I'd give it a solid 4 star.

Updated and tidy apartments available at a reasonable price.  Secure entry and impressive door deadbolts. All the essentials in the apartment for fixing a meal or simply enjoying a coffee.  My week was worry free and the location made all the sites around Athens walkable, without needing to stay in the busier area at the base of the Acropolis. The view from the window is the street, so if you are looking for a scenic view from your apartment, go elsewhere- or simply walk outside!

We stayed for 3 adults.

On Wednesday early morning the nightclub nearby partied and from maybe 2-5am I can hear beats while sleeping on the sofa bed next to the window facing the street. It’s not super loud with windows closed but enough to be noticeable. I am a light sleeper so I basically drifted in and out of sleep during that time. It was annoying. If it wasn’t for this I would have given 5 star for the room.

The kitchen appliances were nice. I really liked the xiaomi water kettle which is all metal inside and is super large capacity. The induction stove was good, although the nonstick pan did not work with the stove so making scrambled eggs was completely impossible. The hair dryer is the higher quality kind that doesn’t overheat. Internet didn’t sputter or stop working during my stay. I wish they provided more coffee pods and tea bags. There were only 2 pods and 2 teabags when we checked in with 3 people for 3 nights, but strangely a lot of sugar sticks.

I also liked the sofa bed. Compared to all the sofa beds I slept on, this one can sleep 2 ppl!  I slept on sofa beds before that were so narrow I could barely turn. Here I can stretch out and turn all I want! And the pad is quite firm so back support is good. In fact I felt it was a bit too firm.

The lift is tiny typical of European hotels. Can barely fit 3 adults with backpacks imo only good for hauling heavy luggage up. We just walked up stairs. The number pad on front door lock was annoying to use, you have to touch it to activate and sometimes that is treated as a number entry. I also never was able to get the downstairs door to open using the pad, end up using website all the time.

A lot smaller than expected, not suited for 5 adults and a baby. Would have been better for just 3 adults. No high chair for baby, zero kitchen surface area for preparing even the tiniest meal. Sound of the lift was very noisy and can hear all day in all the rooms.
Clean, well equipped kitchen, easy check in, balconies are amazing, great location.
There's an extremely loud night club literally 10 meters from the place. Absolutely no way to get sleep at night.

Nice and clean apartment, but unfortunately there was extremely loud clubbing and party people in other rooms. It was it impossible for us to sleep. You can you can hear everything through these walls! Also host attitude could be better.

Nice and clean apartment with responsive hosts, but unfortunately there was extremely loud clubbing music coming from outside which lasted almost all night, and this made it impossible for us to sleep. The nice amenities couldn't make up for the lack of sleep :(

This is a superb airbnb/apartments. So conveniently located for exploring the city. The owners are super helpful with recommendations and tips on where to eat, drink, shop, etc. The facilities at the apartment are great and we found everything we needed. The design of the apartment and the interior furnishings is neat and inviting. We felt at home while staying here and it made our Athens visit an absolute delight. Also, the view out the window was a massive highlight.

We stayed 5 nights with our two children, 10 & 13.  It was perfect for us!  The location is ideal for everything in the heart of Athens as well as to the public transportation to venture outside of it.  The room had everything we needed to make Athens our home.  Clean, quiet, friendly, and spacious.  A perfect place to rest in the afternoon, prepare our own simple meals (which saved us money!), and feel Greek!  Thank you!

Absolutely our favourite place to stay in Athens from now on!! Wonderful spacious apartments, so tastefully decorated, in an exceptional location right in the centre of Athens, sparkling clean, reasonably priced, quiet, just perfect. They are not serviced, but for 3 nights we didn't mind. Owners and staff are wonderful people!!!

Terrible stay. Avoid this place. We were suffocating in that room because the AC doesn't work well. My family barely slept 1 or 2 hours on each of the 2 nights. The answer of the owner was "we should keep low expectation because we're only paying 160 euros per day"

STAY FAR AWAY FROM ANY PLACE CALLED Syntagma Sweet House 1/2/3/4/5/6/7/8 The staff is very disrespectful. They asked my family to sleep in the streets after a disagreement. What a disaster!  Do not plan a vacation with this company. Stay away. They canceled my booking and didn’t refund me.
Super cool

SCAM! STAY AWAY!!

I took it to inform them that I might delay my arrival at the accommodation due to a breakdown in my car. They informed me that they cannot serve me beyond their opening hours, i.e. after 20.00. I called them, as did my sister, repeatedly from 18.30 and they canceled our call. The sister attended the accommodation on time at 19.30. They informed her that there is no room and I have to cancel. That is, they sold the room I had prepaid to someone else and wanted me to cancel so that I would be charged even though they left me without accommodation .please serve me immediately because I will lose my money.

Thieves!!! They take money and cancel a reservation, they don't want to talk, hang up on the booking representatives in their faces, rude, don't book at this place!!! They stole 1900 NIS, I was with a girl and got my hair cut in the street, I booked another hotel for the same dates and I didn't get any refund! !!!

A very exquisite one bedroom, one living room and one bathroom. The location is great and easy to find. As long as you inform the flight or train time in advance, the boss will wait downstairs and introduce the equipment in the room in detail. It's just for those who are afraid of the sun or the noise. , it is best to prepare eye masks and earplugs, because the room is facing the shopping street, and the curtains are not blackout cloth, but it must be said that the flaws are not covered up.
Nice apartment clean with nice decoration. Mrs. Xara, the owner, is very kind
A very nice centrally located apartment
VERY GOOD
Nice hotels, good service
Good
Beautiful room everything you need for a few days very clean small but lovely and so close to everywhere and very safe will definitely come again thank you all xxxxxx
Great location! Room was very clean and everything went perfect!! Definitely I will recommend it!!
Excellent BnB with low prices and a very central location. But it is very small for two people because it is 25m2.
Clean, welcoming room, convenient to the center of Athens, next to Ermou, the shopping street. From the bathroom you can see the Parthenon. Excellent value for money.
Friendly, close to everything and yet quiet. The lift is a little sharp but overall it's excellent value for money

Dimitra is the best!
Very nice,helpful,
Clean in the main street
Must come
And very recommend 🩷🩷🩷
Excellent brand new apartment, central location, modern furniture and equipment, excellent communication with the managers .. We have found the sure accommodation for whenever we go to Athens..

Perfect position to visit Athens, 2 minutes walking from Syntagma square and 10 walking, through beautiful (and carless) ermou street, from monastiraki.
Rooms are modern and cool.

Α very safe, quiet and pleasant place to stay, right in the heart of downtown Athens. Ermoo is one of the largest commercial streets in Greece and everything you might possibly need, including a  variety of some of the best restaurants, cafes, bars etc (there is a very updated and useful list in the room) are literally at your doorstep or just around the corner.
I especially appreciated the big, comfortable bed and pillows and the spacious bathroom.
The owner was also very polite and helpful. Well done!

I visit Athens very often either for short professional trips or weekend breaks ! My experience in Ermoo8 rooms was amazing since they are centrally located and tastefully decorated and clean! Next time i visit Athens i will definetely try to stay there again!

Stayed early October 2022. Great location in the absolute center of everything in Athens. Well constructed room, with many amenities (nespresso machine/capsules, iron, big tv, netflix, even a sewing kit etc).  The owner was always available on telephone with information and solutions and very polite and professional. Highly recommended.

AMAZING PLACE VERY CLEAN AND MINIMALISTIC.
INSTRUCTIONS WERE VERY CLEAR.
SHE WAS AVAILABLE THRU WHATSAPP FOR ANY QUESTIONS.
LOCATIONS AAAMAAAAAAZING
CLEAN BUILDING
100000/10 Waw

Stayed here for a few night in Athens. Had the room with the hot tub. Great location right on Ermou. Walking distance to popular locations. The staff were very friendly and accommodating and the room was clean. The only thing that can be improved is the Wi-Fi. It was a little iffy at times. Overall, enjoyed my time there and will visit again.

Luxurious hotel in the center of Athens. The location is unbeatable with major attractions just a few meters away. The room was so clean, modern stylish with an indoor jacuzzi as we chose the Junior Suite. The girls in the reception are always friendly and ready to help. Thank you for the hospitality!

Loved our stay at Nur Hotel, the staff are so sweet and very helpful.
I gave 4 stars for the room because the curtains are smaller than the window so light comes in and we told them about it. So I recommend you bring eye mask if you are sensitive to light.

Overall I highly recommend the hotel, my friends would like to give more than 5 stars for the staff especially Evita.

Everything about our stay was wonderful! The hotel is perfectly clean, the amenities are excellent and the bed is sooo comfortable. The location is truly the best location out there for a visit of Athens. Everytime we were tired and wanted to head back to the hotel, I would insert it on Google maps and it would be a few minutes away. It's a perfect location that is very well connected to public transport and to the airport.

Staff were so kind and friendly and very helpful. Bathrooms are equipped with everything you need and in a very generous amount (dental kits, shampoo, conditioner, body wash and body lotion, loofah, slippers and bath robes etc). Also loved the espresso and water provided daily. They provided us with early check in as well which was delightful.

The security at this hotel is worth mentioning. Ermou is a very busy street at night. However, we felt super safe at Nur Aparthotel. There is a code to enter the main building and use the elevator, and there's another code only for your room. I saw some reviews mentioning the codes as a negative, but for us it was a huge plus. The system was so smooth and easy to use. The room doors lock on their own if you forget to lock them! And you don't have to worry about a room key!

Thank you Nur Aparthotel for making our stay in Athens so memorable.

Fabulous location right in the city centre close to attractions, shops and transport. Our  room was clean bright and a good size. The staff were super friendly and helpful. We would definitely stay here again❤️

Great place to stay in the shopping district of Athens.  Walking distance to most sites! In a very vibrant area of Athens but the rooms are quiet and private.  Staff is very communicative and we received excellent service! Tried to extend our stay but they were booked up (because they are that good)! Definitely will be coming back!

I was worried coming to Athens for the first time and didn’t know what to expect. Ethereal was lovely! Our room was amazing to fit 2 adults and 2 children. Christiana was absolutely amazing and super helpful. Everything was clean and beautiful. The shower , much needed after long flight. This was last minute booking, would love to stay in one of the bigger view rooms. Safe and close to everything you’d need in Athens. Love it!!

Great apartment for our 2 nights in Athens. The location is amazing, right on a main shopping street with lots of restaurants and bars nearby. For such a great price, I would highly recommend Ethereal!

We stayed 3 nights in this apartment and had great time. Room is clean and comfortable. Attractions are within walking distance.  Lots of choice for food and cafe. Highly recommend the Salon De Message deluxe on 2nd floor in the same building. Price very reasonable, range euro 35-50 for 60min. My therapist Sudi was so good. I’d say better than most of the 5 star hotel spa I’ve visited around the world. Great dinner from Athena’s Cook which is 5min walk from the location.

The location of these apartments is just perfect. Houser literally on the Main Street. It’s lively till almost 1 am super safe and accessible by metro just within 3/4 minutes walk.
One slight issue is only 1 room as hot tub but booking websites don’t make it clear that with apartments they have various suites and even after upgrade we couldn’t get a good view or hot tub.Roof is accessible and you can have majestic Parthenons night view from their though.
Overall a good experience.

Excellent location with spacious and beautiful view in the apartment. We spent 2 nights in there and the price was reasonable. The host is very helpful and responsible.
I highly recommend living in here and it really deserves a five-star feedback.

Best location ever in Athens. Amazing view and very clean room. We were 2 couples, and we rented  2 suits for 3  nights.  We were there the week between Christmas 2023 and New Year's Eve. Everything was smelling fresh..!
Very very clean and  quiet, decorated with style, but the view is what makes this place truly special.
Outstanding value and location.

Location: super central on Ermu Street, a shopping street par excellence and next to Syntagma Square. The door is inside a small shopping arcade, and at night it is closed (you have a key to open and close); In the morning before leaving we had to go down, open the door and go up to leave the keys in the apartment.

Apartment: very cool loft, with spectacular views, the lights near the bed are dimmable but they make a lot of noise and it is better to turn them off. Something poor about the cleanliness in the bathroom, it did not invite you to take a shower; It was hot, I don't recommend it for summer, it is an attic and even if you leave the air in it will surely be hot.

What we didn't like was that when we complained to the person who checked us in about the bathroom (we sent him some photos) he said it was correct; For us it was not just the issue of cleanliness (somewhat deficient but nothing worrying), it was also the finishes, which were not at all in line with what they were selling.

The location is surrounded by lots of bars.
It is impossible for you to sleep and take a rest as rock n roll musics and disco musics are being played loudly at night until the restaurants and bars were closed (around 2:00 am or 3:00 am).
Spacious apartment in the middle of Athens. Below it, there is a cafeteria where you can have a good and cheap breakfast.

Absolutely disappointing experience! I would never have booked this place if I had read the reviews properly.

Edit Added 27/09/2024 - following reply from owner I can confirm that NO contact was made from the owner. The AC definitely did not get cold AND the windows were completely closed. This was Thursday night and the music was certainly loud enough to feel it and hear it all night.

Firstly, the noise is unbearable. There’s a club right across the street, and the party spills out onto the road after dark with loud music playing all night long. Despite several attempts to contact the apartment owner for advice, we received no response and ended up having to find alternative accommodation.

The air conditioning is also a major issue; it doesn’t get cold and just blows out room-temperature air no matter what setting it’s on.

Another inconvenience is the keys being soldered onto a key ring, so you can’t go out separately if you’re staying with others. Additionally, the towels had a horrible smell, like they’d been left wet for days—definitely not pleasant to use.

Overall, this was one of the worst places we’ve stayed. It’s definitely not a “family” apartment as advertised on WebJet. I would strongly advise against staying here unless you’re looking to party all night and sleep in an overheated, uncomfortable apartment.

Don’t come here- if you are over 25 and want to sleep at night!!!
I didn’t sleep all nights I stayed here. During weekdays it was until 2-3am and Friday - Saturday until 5am. It is as if the bar in front of the building is right in your bedroom 😫 I told the owner and she said they know but cannot change as it is everywhere in the city center the same. And that they called the police twice. She then suggested see cancel the reservation and she gives me the money back without cuts. What she did. But still it is no place to stay. Even if it is perfectly located but to “lively” for me. If you wanna party, you have the right spot for up to 5 people ( plus the 300 outside)  🥴

We are in an apartment in Athens and we just suffer every moment, we have a night club under the room, it is now five in the morning and they just don't stop all night, we talked to the owner of the place who called the police and it just doesn't help. We have 2 small children who don't stop crying and can't sleep all night !!! Just a nightmare!

We had A very bad time here. Two consecutive nights we couldn’t sleep. A disco club works in the street till 5 a lock in the morning. Also they haven’t change towels and the air condition stops every time we open a door.

Very clean and well located (walking distance to everything) perfect for families or groups. Nice bakery at the entrance, a food court in one corner a taproom on the other and a nice bar for a late beer next door. No complaints at all.

This is really excellent accommodation in the Centre of Athens. Finished to a really high standard, these apartments are very spacious and spotless. They have ticked every box you could imagine and we were absolutely delighted with the Size, Standard and Location of the property. The rooftop area is very pleasant to bring a bottle of wine or your favorite tipple and relax before heading out to dinner.
Highly recommend if travelling to Athens

We stayed at the loft. The apartment was excellent renovated. Modern, beautiful, spacious, I was quite surprised The whole building looked as if it has just been renovated. With every detail, everything perfect. The location is also great, in the centre of Athens, the road is also full of life, shops, snack cafes etc. On Friday and Saturday night there was noise from the night cafes and pubs but the brand new windows of the very big balcony doors managed to lower that noise to the minimum. For those who like to sit on the veranta the veranta of the apartment was extremely big and again renovated with a great view. The only problem is that there was a water leak next to the toilet in the corner most probable from the toilet itself, something that we did not mention during our stay. I will definitely stay here next time I visit Athens and I have already recommended it to friends. The price was good and I hope it stays like this in the future

Great apartment!!! Very clean and beautiful interior. Good location and close to everything.  Only thing is that the housekeeping was done without our knowledge which we were a bit uncomfortable with..

Late review:
I had booked the loft with hamam for 2 days and made an extension with one extra day.
Other than the hamam itself and the terrace that was huge and had partially ok views,there was nothing special about the experience.
It was quite a small room for my liking and when i checked in it was extremely dusty.
I happen to see the housekeeper on the terrace and asked to refresh the room and pick the cigarette butts outside.
She dusted off the 2nd day and did not even pick the garbage so i wasn't really happy with the cleaning service.
The same applies to the management.
They barely replied to any messages.Never seen more disconnected managers than Hestia's.Totally oblivious to their customer's needs.
Keep in mind as well that there are construction works going on in the adjacent building and as of the noise of the road wasn't enough,you wake up in panic 7.30 on a sunday by the sound of drilling.

Hestia at Kolokotroni 23 is the prefect stay for central Athens at any given time, as it is centrally located, a 5 min metro walk that gets you there directly form Athens Venizelos Airport in 40 minutes. It is freshly renovated with a hamam for you to relax after a long walk.  The apartment is big enough to fit 3 people there is a very comfy sofa in the hall that can accommodate one person. Moreover it is fully equipped in the kitchen, with cutlery, water/wine glasses, mugs for coffee, a lovely Nespresso machine as well as a coffee maker. Painter Maximos is giving his  own personal touch with his lovely work on the walls. Hestia 23 is a minute walk from Drunk Sinatra, the pub and a 5 minute walk from Tan Popo for ramen. Vukurestiou for lux shopping is only 7 minutes away....dance at Juan Rordiguez and return for the best nights sleep at Hestia 23-we loved it!

Best view in Athens! 🫶
The apartment is extremely clean, has everything a person needs, the bed is absolutely so comfy you don’t want to get up ☺️ and the balcony with Acropoli view is just hitting a different level. The host was super nice and very friendly! Definitely every time I’m in Athens I will stay at Acropolis Suite.
Super recommended 🔝👌🙌🏻♥️
The best place you can stay in Athens if you want to wake up with the Acropolis view every day, and all of this at a great price. It’s definitely my first choice when staying in Athens.
Amazing stay, best view of Acropolis. Fresh and super clean place. Near everything, walking distance. Both of the managers very sweet and polite
Best Place To Be In The Heart Of Athens Center’! Easy Access To Restaurants-Bars-Shops-Clubs-Museums-Public Transport!Enjoy Your Stay ! 🤗
Wonderful host & an amazing view! Only a stones throw away from the main shopping street and restaurants.
Best in town!!

Our stay in Athens was fantastic, thanks to Real City Suites! The room was spotless, super comfortable, and perfect for our short visit. The location couldn't be better—just steps from Syntagma metro station and right in the heart of the city. Pavlos, our host, was incredibly helpful and kind, making our experience even more enjoyable. Highly recommend!

The room was clean and the location is very nice. It is a bit cumbersome to enter the room :) First of all, there is no signboard in a clearly visible part of the building, so it is a little difficult to understand whether you have come to the right place at first. Then, there is a shutter at the entrance of the building, which you open with the remote control, and the floor where the room is also has a key lock on the door, which you open and access the floor. Then, when you open the door of the room, you have to go through a three-stage system. But it is preferred for location and cleanliness👌🏻

The room was very small but clean. The bathroom had modern equipment.
You got to the floor and room with key codes. The roller shutter could be opened with a remote control.
Air conditioning in the room.
The price-performance ratio was good.
OK for 1-2 nights Too narrow for longer stays. Right in the center between Syntagma and Monastiraki. Perfect.
Excellent location and clean room. I had a small problem with remote check in but the host responded and helped me quickly. Highly recommended!
Perfect. Clean, close to the center, good price performance, I recommend it

We booked an accommodation in Aegina managed by Phaedrus living. What started as a carefree and relaxing weekend has turned into a terrible experience full of stress and anxiety trying to manage the house slowly breaking down and the various pest issues. The situation was totally mismanaged by the company, and therefore, it's highly recommended to AVOID BOOKING WITH THEM. Here is a brief account of the events that transpired. We arrived at the villa quite late on Friday night. To start with, the photos on the website are so polished that it felt like we arrived at a different house. The Villa smelled like it hasn’t been opened for a while, we found stained towels, no batteries in any of the AC remotes except one, a bed with broken slats and most disturbing of all a number of cockroaches dead and alive! The 2 lower levels of the villa hadn't been cleaned. We could even see ants eating the dead cockroaches inside the house. On Saturday, we contacted the company to try and resolve it. There was no option to change accommodation, and they only offered to come and refresh the Villa. In practice, only towels were changed, and no attempt to clean/refresh the house was made. Since then, we haven’t managed to reach them again in the provided phone number. DISAPPOINTING CUSTOMER SERVICE

PL was initially my preferred property manager when in Athens despite many flaws i discovered and experienced during my stays.
Have been staying at at least 4 PL managed properties and have encountered problems such as delayed check ins with the cleaning company still being in the apt past 16:00,dirty & smelly apt & kitchenware(Kleomenous 12& Koukaki partially),extremely noisy with zero insulation apt from hell(Kalliope apt) etc.  but the last straw was when the staff offended me as per my last booking event which literally will be the last booking i have with the company in question.
I was shouted at for extending a stay the same day while the listings are active all day long and anyone can make a booking until late evening and i already was in the apt with a confirmation ready prior to 11o'clock but this was not visible to PL yet.
They complicated the issue with the pretext that the housekeeping company(obs:their own cleaning company) was outside waiting and could not proceed with the cleaning.
They treated me in the most horrendous and shameful way, like i was a beggar and not a returning customer that have overlooked a lot of issues and spent thousands of euros in their faulty premises.
I will review them separately one by one.
I'm extremely offended and disappointed mostly at my myself for giving way too many chances cause this was not the first time the Athens team displayed an arrogant attitude towards myself.

I had the pleasure of staying in one of their Athens’s flats and I must say, the customer service was amazing! The level of promptness and professionalism they showed was truly outstanding. The flat itself was absolutely stunning, with luxurious amenities and stylish decor. I highly recommend their flats for anyone seeking an amazing stay in Athens

Beautiful and fully equipped apartment, with excellent taste and decoration, extremely clean, well cared for, and professionally run. I was impressed with the quality of service we received throughout our accomodation. We will return without hesitation!
Excellent room! Impeccable cleanliness, outstanding customer service, and perfect central location! Will definitely come back!

Perfect location, it is close walking distance to everything!  Very spacious and clean!  The property manager was very kind and accommodating- anything we needed was provided.  The air conditioning was perfect and worked very well.  There are bars across the street so make sure you read the warning before you go to book. For the younger crowds, or those who like the Athens night life- this is the place for you!

WE LOVED IT!! Doron was SO accommodating, very communicative about check in and any information about the place and surrounding area. Idk why people complain about the noise, it’s prefaced in the booking profile and he tells you that it’s right in front of the pubs/bars so it will be loud Fridays and Saturdays. We loved it as younger adults because he also gave us buy one get one free drink coupons for them. It’s a BLAST on this street at night. If you are old and want absolute quiet, dont book here book outside of center of Athens. The area is a little harsh, be careful and be aware of your surroundings but that goes for all areas of Athens… i am SO excited to stay here again!! So close to everything i.e. restaurants, bars, coffee shops, etc.

We stayed here for one night to get from Piraeus to the airport and enjoy a bit of sightseeing. Very clean and well maintained flat. The modern style is warm. The location is ideal and relatively quiet. There is air conditioning, which enabled us to sleep comfortably. They send you all the information by email with lots of recommendations of places to stay.

Very well kept and presented apartments. Ac works great.
Very central which means great access to the city centre and all the attractions, but also means it can be noisy at night time, hosts do provide ear plugs though which is considerate.
They provided lots of useful information and suggestions before arrival.
Netflix access was a treat.

THIS HOTEL HAS LEFT ME SLEEPING ON THE STREET FOR ONE NIGHT
I was so excited to sleep in this apartment complex. When I arrived, the code wasn’t working, so I contacted them. After an hour trying to get to them, they answered me. They said they couldn’t do anything, and left me in the street without even caring about where I was going to sleep.
When I told them I had a terrible night and that, with great pity, I would have to cancel the reservation and write a bad review, they laughed at me and sent me an ironic message. That is very sad from a human being, and unacceptable from a business.
I can’t write about the hotel installations and conditions, which I am sure that are correct and beautiful -that’s why I chose this hotel-, but I can write that I felt completely ignored and alone at a foreign country.
What was even sadder, is the way they laughed at me after knowing that, as a young girl in another country, I couldn’t fins any options as to where to sleep, and spend a whole night in the streets.

We enjoyed our 2-night stay at the Lekka Hotel. The hotel boasts a wonderful rooftop view of the Acropolis, with buffet breakfast to enjoy there. Rooms are cramped (to the point where the end of our bed is 1m from the door), and the ambience feels more a hostel. The room and hotel was however very clean with a nice bathroom in the room.

The Lekka was amazing! The location was perfect and we were able to explore so many areas on foot. The rooftop bar also had incredible views of the Acropolis and was great for morning breakfast and sunset drinks.

PROS: Excellent location to the local sights, restaurants and public transport and view of Acropolis from rooftop is a real feature of the hotel. Stylish and funky design features throughout.
CONS: Lukewarm service from staff, at best.  Spa was closed during our stay. Noise from downstairs bars carried up to our room on level 6. No view from room. Guest rooms are small, which we found challenging for two people (and two suitcases). Bathroom needed a deep clean and more than one body wash for a two night stay.
Only stayed here 2 nights but really enjoyed it. Fantastic location right in the heart of Athens. Breakfast was great, with an amazing view of the Acropolis. Highly recommended

While I didn't stay at the Lekka Hotel, my good friend did, and she was having her Birthday there after what had been a rough year.  The Hotel kindly arranged a bottle of wine for her and promised to make her stay as special as they could, which they did.  That's amazing service and I thank them from the bottom of my heart for making her day so special!

Prior to booking, I checked the reviews to Electra and found many unsatisfactory reviews. After having stayed there for 6 nights, I can leave this review and say that this hotel deserves 5 stars!
The staff were accommodating and friendly from beginning to end, helping me and my family navigate the city and even offering us complimentary to-go breakfast on our last day because out flight left earlier than the breakfast time.
Speaking of breakfast, it was divine!!! I looked forward to it every single morning, the coffee bar was great and the staff was wonderful.
The location of the hotel could not be any better, and overall, I will definitely stay here and recommend it to anyone that asks.

Absolutely delightful.  The whole team was friendly and helpful. The room was small but very comfortable and the air conditioning was top notch. The bathroom was spotlessly clean, and the free water a very nice touch. The views from the top floor bar are exceptional.  All in all a fantastic stay.

Great location for walking, good food, beautiful view of the acropolis from the restaurant. Spacious suite, comfortable bed, and good air conditioning. The only thing to keep in mind, is it is on a busy street, so there is a lot of noise, especially on the weekends. But would stay again.

definitely not a 4 star hotel by any means. unfriendly front desk service with outdated tiny rooms and low water pressure in the bathroom. booked a double room with 1 pax but got charged $20 more per day as my wife joined me at the last minute, even though the double room had a max occupancy of 2 pax. i showed screenshots to the front desk that there is no price difference for 1 pax or 2 pax in a double room online but the front desk mentioned that this is the normal practice. however, this additional charge is not mentioned anywhere on the booking sites. anyway, the room is outdated, and the shower head pressure is incredibly low. wouldn't recommend this hotel for the price. skip this, there're better options.

Small, but clean and quiet room. Helpful desk staff, Good breakfast with a great view of acropolis.
Less than 5 minute walk to metro station. Easy access to hop on, hop off busses.
Plenty of dining and shopping options in area.

Great stay
very central
one of my favourite places for sure
Excellent accommodation!
I had a great experience in the center of ATHENS.Clean cozy spacious apartment.Close to many bars,restaurants and museums.Only 10 minutes to ACROPOLIS.Friendly and communicative host.
Very clean house very close to the center perfect service

Very good location, everything is within walking distance
Very clean space
I will definitely prefer it again 🩷
Very good location, welcoming environment and spotlessly clean!! Perfect experience

Amazing hotel! Clean and accommodating rooms and very nice staff.

Perfect location for shops and transport and the Acropolis being no more than 10 mins away walking.

10/10 recommend

Absolutely wonderful hotel! Small boutique hotel in the centre of Athens with a lot of shops, fantastic restaurants around the area! Lovely personalised service from the owners; they meant it to be a cozy like home hotel and it is indeed. Well-done Titika and Katie 👏👏👏
Highly recommended. Our suite was very spacious, modern with everyday nice home-made breakfast.
The owners never hesitate to give us advices and recommendations on where to go/eat so this was a plus plus. Thank you guys!

What a beautiful gem in the center of Athens. I only had a few days in Athens so commuting was not the option. Once you open the front door you got everything ( restaurants, bars, shops, things to see) right there. The hotel is new so everything looks fresh and clean. I highly recommend this hotel to everyone. Will definitely be back.

Ps: I also met the owners Titika and Charalabis. They were very helpful and kind. Great job guys!
Great hotel! Everything nearby, clean, nice people.

Very nice little place to stay. Excellent staff that couldn't help more, stayed late to welcome us from a later flight. Amazing breakfast and very big/clean accommodation. Perfectly placed for sightseeing athens

We had booked a room there through a popular 3rd party site with confirmation. We arrived around 6.30 pm and no one was there to check us in. Agora Athens Suites never sent us the instructions to self- check in.  There was an emergency phone number on the door and we called and left messages but no one answered.  So we had to scramble at the last minute to find a different hotel nearby and spend hours later trying to get a refund which we did.  So we obviously cannot recommend this hotel. Big waste time and caused a lot of frustration and also diminished the time we had to enjoy our last night in Athens.

This hotel was so beautiful to stay in.

The room was light, airy and modern with plenty of space. It was also spotlessly clean and quiet in the room.

It was really easy to access the building, and the cleaning staff that we met im the lobby during our stay were so lovely and accomodating.

The hotel is slightly outside of the main shopping area but it is easily walkable to get to any shops/attractions and there are a number of restaurants and food options in the area.
Clean rooms ,Nice location ,best value to what we paid in Greece .

Excellent accommodation in the heart of Athens! A neoclassical building with modern and neat rooms! I've stayed there 3 times and never had a problem. Excellent communication, clean space, great location and the rooms are exactly as shown in the photos. The staff was always available and responded promptly to my every request. I highly recommend it!

It was a very clean and nice room!
I am grateful to the female employee who kindly responded to my request even though she could not speak much English.
thank you very much.

I stayed for 1 month at 8 Kolonaki as I was redoing my house! ! It was perfect stay at a perfect location. Whatever I needed I just sent a WhatsApp to the team and they were very polite and very accommodating. What a great team.  The apartments are very clean and very nicely done. Very comfortable. The only issue is the shower pressure was very low and this should be improved. There is not enough cupboard space for 1 month stay so I did have to buy extra railings. Also the bathroom need more cabinets and storage for all the toiletries and make up etc. Thank you for such a great stay!

Highly recommend! The staff was very helpful, from early check-in to restaurant recommendations and car service. Nice location -close enough to walk to tourist destinations but quiet at night in a neighborhood of upscale shops and restaurants. Our suite was perfect for a family of 4. Incredibly clean and cleaned regularly. Very nice amenities -we loved having the kitchen and dining table. The small balcony was a treat!

Superb place to stay while visiting Athens for it's tourist attractions. Quite spacious , very clean, very close to all the major attractions and super friendly host. The host was very thoughtful and helpful.

Nice, spacious and comfortable appartments in the heart of Athens. I felt like in a 4 stars hotel. I really appreciated the service too: some cakes and water bottles awaited for me when I arrived and the cleaning was done after my first night. I highly recommend!
Great appartement, very beautiful, super clean, spacious, quiet and very well located.
A lovely room in which everything is thought about the small details. Close to everything in a quiet area. warmly recommended.
Excellent, worth the money
Nice for morning walk weekend
Lack of parking, lack of signs, extremely narrow and crowded streets.

The studio apartment has been meticulously designed with high-quality wood and modern materials, resulting in a stylish and minimalist interior. Located on the 6th floor of a contemporary building with an elevator from the ground floor, this apartment combines comfort with elegance.

Equipped with a powerful and silent air conditioning unit for heating and cooling, the apartment ensures a pleasant stay year-round. Additional amenities include a washing machine, an iron, and an ironing board. Towels and bedsheets are provided, with the option for frequent changes during your stay for an additional fee (please contact us for pricing).

The fully equipped kitchen features a refrigerator, microwave oven, ceramic stove, and a Nespresso coffee machine, perfect for all your cooking needs. The bedroom area boasts a king-size bed with an ELITE STROM mattress, SEALY pillows, cotton bedsheets, a closet, and a safe box.

The modern bathroom includes a separate shower, with towels, shower gel, and shampoo provided. For entertainment, the smart flat-screen TV comes with a NETFLIX subscription, ensuring you can enjoy your favorite shows and movies during your stay.

This apartment offers a perfect blend of comfort and modern design, making it an ideal choice for your stay.

The property has been tastefully finished to the highest standard with no expense spared, featuring stylish, clean, and minimalist interiors and lighting. Upon entering during the day, you are greeted by an abundance of natural light reflecting off the elegant ambiance.

Located on the 6th floor of a contemporary building, the apartment offers convenience with two lifts available from the ground floor. It is equipped with two silent and powerful air conditioning units for both heating and cooling, ensuring a comfortable stay year-round. Additional amenities include a washing machine, an iron, and an ironing board. Towels and bedsheets are provided and can be changed as frequently as you wish during your stay for an extra charge.

The living room is beautifully designed, elegantly decorated, impeccably clean, and filled with natural light. It features a smart TV, built-in loudspeakers, and a roller blind for privacy.

The fully equipped kitchen includes a refrigerator, oven, ceramic stove, Nespresso coffee machine, American coffee maker, toaster, kettle, and dishwasher, making it ideal for all your cooking needs.

The bedroom boasts a king-size bed with a COCO-MAT mattress featuring elastic foam and antibacterial fabric, four pillows, cotton bedsheets, a large closet, and a safe box. The en-suite bathroom has a modern shower, with towels, shower gel, and shampoo provided.

Additionally, a separate WC is located at the entrance hall of the apartment. This property combines luxury, comfort, and modern living, making it an exceptional choice for your stay.

The apartment has been tastefully finished and furnished to the highest standards, featuring stylish, clean, and modern interiors and illumination. Located on the 5th floor of a contemporary building with an elevator from the ground floor, it combines elegance with convenience.

Equipped with three silent and powerful air conditioning units for both heating and cooling, the apartment ensures a comfortable stay in any season. Additional amenities include a washing machine, an iron, and an ironing board. Towels and bedsheets are provided and can be changed as frequently as you wish during your stay for an extra charge (please contact us for pricing).

The living/dining room is spacious, beautifully designed, artfully decorated, impeccably clean, and filled with natural light. It features a 55” smart TV, a Bluetooth sound system, and seamless connection to the second bedroom, which can be configured to extend the living area.

The fully equipped kitchen includes a refrigerator, ceramic stove, microwave oven, Nespresso coffee machine, American coffee maker, toaster, and kettle. There is also a seating/dining area for two.

The master bedroom offers a king-size bed, cotton bedsheets, a closet, and a safe box. The guest bedroom has two separate beds that can be joined with a king-size mattress or separated into two 90x200cm beds to accommodate various sleeping arrangements.

The apartment has two modern bathrooms with showers, with towels, shower gel, and shampoo provided. This beautifully designed apartment offers the perfect blend of comfort and modern living, ensuring an exceptional stay.

We had an amazing experience at this hotel. Our flight arrived very early in the morning and they offered us complimentary breakfast right when we arrived. Our room was also ready by 9:30 am! They were incredibly accommodating and had great recommendations. The hotel is located on a beautiful street and is very central. We will definitely be back.

This hotel is a gem!  It's beautiful, quiet, the rooms are lovely, it's in a great location, and every member of the staff is so helpful and friendly.  The breakfast and coffee were delicious.  I would stay here again in a heartbbeat, and I would highly recommend it to anyone coming to Athens.  And a special thank you to Marietta, for taking such good care of us.

We spent 4 nights at the Lozenge Hotel Athens before joining a cruise - it was the perfect place for our short stay. The hotel is located in a small mostly pedestrian street within walking distance of Syntagma Square and the metro. Our room was a very decent size with a lovely bathroom. The service was exceptional - Vasia, Marietta and the whole team were extremely friendly and helpful. We really enjoyed our stay there and can highly recommend it!

Awesome place.
Close to everything centre of Athens
Front desk lady Yota was awesome.
Restaurant staff very attentive.
Would definitely stay there again.

Our recent stay at Hotel Lozenge was nothing short of exceptional. The moment we walked through the doors, we were greeted by a warm and inviting atmosphere that instantly made me feel at home. The attention to detail in every aspect of the hotel, from the beautifully decorated rooms to the impeccable service, was truly remarkable. The staff esp. Jenny at the restaurant and Marietta at the front desk were incredibly attentive, helpful and warm. They went out of their way to ensure that our every need was met. The hotel's central location made it convenient for exploring the city. Overall, our experience at Hotel Lozenge was unforgettable, and I can't wait to return for another incredible stay.

place_name: Athens Capital Center Hotel - MGallery Collection
place_address: Syntagma Square, 4 Eleftheriou Venizelou Avenue and, Kriezotou 2, Athina
review_text: We had a fantastic stay at this hotel, perfectly located in the heart of Athens. The dinner and food were excellent, but the true highlight of our vacation was the incredible staff. Everyone was so welcoming and kind, making us feel right at home. A special shout-out to George at breakfast, his expertise and outstanding service made every morning feel extra special. This hotel truly has a team that goes above and beyond!

place_name: Athens Capital Center Hotel - MGallery Collection
place_address: Syntagma Square, 4 Eleftheriou Venizelou Avenue and, Kriezotou 2, Athina
review_text: Stayed here with my family of 8 adults and one 5 month old baby for 4 nights. It was such an amazing stay. The staff was so kind, welcoming, and helpful. The complimentary breakfast was so amazing and had such a variety of foods and was in such a stunning dinning room. The pool and gym were also lovely. The restaurant (on the top floor next to the pool with an amazing view) was delicious and affordable. Our rooms were lovely, we never once heard our neighbors and our AC worked perfectly. Such a good start to our stay in Athens!

place_name: Athens Capital Center Hotel - MGallery Collection
place_address: Syntagma Square, 4 Eleftheriou Venizelou Avenue and, Kriezotou 2, Athina
review_text: We loved our night at the Athens Capital Center Hotel. It was a short taxi to the main areas and walkable if you like (we walked!). The rooftop pool had a great view of the city and Acropolis. The room was very clean, new, and comfortable. I’d recommend this for any length of stay in Athens. The entire staff at the hotel made our stay comfortable. If we are back in Athens we will definitely stay here again!

place_name: Athens Capital Center Hotel - MGallery Collection
place_address: Syntagma Square, 4 Eleftheriou Venizelou Avenue and, Kriezotou 2, Athina
review_text:
A really wonderful stay at the Athens Capital hotel. It reminds me of an Autograph collection level hotel at Marriott. Rooms seem new, lovely rain shower, comfy beds.

Centrally located, shopping is incredible right outside the hotel. We walked from the National Archives museum and it took about 25 minutes. We dined at the hotel for breakfast which was a typical buffet, nothing too memorable but had all the things you’d want to see.
Bellman grabbed us taxis a few times and helped with luggage, all with a smile.
We also had a casual dinner on the rooftop bar which was exceptional. Sushi rolls, pasta,  a very wide variety. Wine was excellent. Prices are high, seemingly catering to American tourists but at least the quality is high!
Our server at dinner Antonis was wonderful- he suggested wine pairings based on dishes, was attentive without being intrusive. A wonderful stay!

place_name: Athens Capital Center Hotel - MGallery Collection
place_address: Syntagma Square, 4 Eleftheriou Venizelou Avenue and, Kriezotou 2, Athina
review_text: My stay at the Athens Capital Center Hotel was by far one of the hotel experiences I’ve had. From the superb service, to the location, room appointment and cleanliness. It was all impeccable and the breakfast was a wonderful surprise.  Make sure you visit the rooftop pool and restaurant. Especially at sunset. Overall my experience was amazing. I felt welcomed and appreciated as customer. This definitely a hotel you want to visit.

Whole stay felt like home! You dont have to interact with anyone which i really like…They really paid attention on details of comfort. Fully equipped kitchen and wash machine were great bonus.
Breakfast was also super tasty and healthy delivered to our door in a cute wooden box without hustle and noise.
Fantastic apartments at the heart of the city ! Elegant and stylish ! At the most upscale neighbourhood!
Amazing location, wonderful apartment with very good actions, rea!!!

place_name: Hotel Grande Bretagne, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Athens
place_address: 1 Vasileos Georgiou A, Syntagma Square Str, Athina
review_text: It can’t get any better than this. The view alone is worth staying here. Add to that elegant rooms and common areas, attentive staff and delicious food and you have the perfect mix. It is close to everything. Rooms are immaculate. The gym is small but, from what I can see, the hotel doesn’t target that clientele so it’s ok .. I would definitely recommend and come back here!

place_name: Hotel Grande Bretagne, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Athens
place_address: 1 Vasileos Georgiou A, Syntagma Square Str, Athina
