review_text: Everything is extraordinary about this historic hotel in the heart of Athens, near Syntagma Square, just opposite the Greek Parliament. Even if you don’t (choose to) stay there, you should visit the Spa, which offers wonderful treatments in a calm, cosy, yet luxurious atmosphere. A brunch or an afternoon tea at the Winter Lounge complete the pleasurable experience. And of course there is the Roof Garden restaurant with a breathtaking view.

place_name: Hotel Grande Bretagne, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Athens
place_address: 1 Vasileos Georgiou A, Syntagma Square Str, Athina
review_text:
Beautiful hotel with nice facilities and spa area. My gripes are:
(1) the service wasn’t as refined as I would hope for a hotel of this class. Not much greeting or going out of their way for guests.
(2) my wife’s spa experience was sub standard. Her back was bruised and sensitive for days after a massage, and her hair blowout didn’t turn out great compared to spas back home.

place_name: Hotel Grande Bretagne, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Athens
place_address: 1 Vasileos Georgiou A, Syntagma Square Str, Athina
review_text:
I rarely write reviews, but felt compelled to as the front desk staff really need to up their game. My partner and I stayed for a night recently and upon arrival the first question the receptionist asked was what time we were checking out the next day. I was slightly thrown by this but didn't take offence though am increasingly irritated that high end hotels expect an 11am check out, and not midday. But more on this later.

Our flight had been delayed so we arrived at the hotel at about 3pm hungry for lunch. We asked the receptionist where we might eat and she said that the restaurant on the 8th floor was full. We said OK, but can we maybe get a snack at the pool bar. She also said that wasn't possible. Rather puzzled we went to our room and then decided to explore. Upon entering the pool area we saw an operational kitchen and were greeted by friendly staff and duly had a pleasant bite to eat, confused that the receptionist had tried to put us off going!

The next morning at 10.30am as we were getting ready to leave our room there was a ring on the doorbell obviously to chivy us along. But not only that a few minutes later the phone also rang (with nobody at the other end when I picked up). I could understand it if it was after 11am but I really take issue with this sort of behaviour in any hotel let alone one that is notionally the best in Athens.

As a hotel it's OK, nothing particularly special. We moved onto the Four Seasons on the coast which is in a completely different league and I would thoroughly recommend.

place_name: Hotel Grande Bretagne, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Athens
place_address: 1 Vasileos Georgiou A, Syntagma Square Str, Athina
review_text: Old world elegance with modern luxury service. The guest rooms have maintained their old school appointments, but the upstairs lounge and bar are very much updated with modern decor. The rooftop bar/restaurant is definitely the highlight, although evening cocktails are 24 euro, so you're paying for the view and ambiance.  The breakfast is 5 star in every way; we booked a rate that included breakfast and it was definitely worth it.

place_name: King George, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Athens
place_address: 3 Vasileos Georgiou A, Platia Sintagmatos Str, Athina
review_text: The hotel boasts a fantastic location and has recently undergone renovations. While the rooms may be smaller compared to other establishments in the same price range and area, the staff and service team are exceptionally friendly and accommodating. I would recommend this hotel for short stays, such as one or two nights.

place_name: King George, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Athens
place_address: 3 Vasileos Georgiou A, Platia Sintagmatos Str, Athina
review_text:
While the hotel has been renovated the suite we had was comprised of several small rooms with a gigantic and essentially useless dressing/closet area.  The light switches were incredibly  confusing and I'm a 30 year construction person.

The bar next door had great views although the bartender  thought a martini meant martini & rossi

place_name: King George, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Athens
place_address: 3 Vasileos Georgiou A, Platia Sintagmatos Str, Athina
review_text:
We stayed here before and after a Ritz Carlton Cruise. The location is absolutely fantastic. Book a balcony room for sure. The changing of the guard at the Palace captured our attention every single time we were in the room and the views of the Acropolis are magnificent. The location is also quite convenient for sightseeing, shopping, and dining options.

The 3 stars comes from the less than impressed experience we had with one very pompous maitre d, George. We returned from a day of sightseeing and shopping and stopped at the front desk to ask where we might get a glass of wine. They directed us to the (only) bar in the hotel that happens to be the Michelin starred restaurant. We went up to the bar only to be given the once-over by George and turned away because my husband was wearing shorts- now keep in mind, it was July and temperature reached the upper 90’s if not over 100 degrees Fahrenheit. We went back to our room; he changed into long pants and we returned. We sat at the bar and finally enjoyed the glasses of wine. We watched other couples arrive. Apparently baseball caps, tshirts, and jeans are appropriate dress whereas khaki shorts and a collared shirt are not. I think the whole experience was compounded by the fact that the front desk saw our attire and directed us to the bar- as well as the fact that George could have handled the whole situation with a lot more tact and a lot less arrogance.

place_name: King George, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Athens
place_address: 3 Vasileos Georgiou A, Platia Sintagmatos Str, Athina
review_text: The best experience I’ve ever had in a hotel. Between the King George and their sister property next door, my wife and I were able to explore all the amenities- spa, pool, sauna, steam rooms, both gyms, and more. Everything was top quality and exceptional. We said multiple times that this hotel greatly exceeded our expectations in every way. When we booked it we knew it was nice, but the feeling of grandeur, the amenities, and the staff made it perfect. Every single person we interacted with was incredibly kind and willing to help with any question or request. Lastly, we ate at Tudor Hall one night (Michelin star restaurant on 7th floor of hotel)  and it was some of the best food I’ve ever had. Can’t recommend this hotel and its people any more highly.

place_name: King George, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Athens
place_address: 3 Vasileos Georgiou A, Platia Sintagmatos Str, Athina
review_text: We had late flight out of Athens and our plan was to site see all day but it ended up being 100 degrees Fahrenheit that day. They even close the acropolis. We called to see if we could get a day use room and they were completely booked. The staff and manage can't say NO. The service found a way to provide us with a room until 5pm and we were so grateful. Best staff and great rooms. Really really good location and the restaurant has an amazing view of the city.
Excellent place. Amazing staff and great location. Highly recommended

My wife and I have just returned from Greece and stayed at this magnificent hotel on the first few nights and again on the last night. We could not have been happier! The rooms were clean and spacious with large comfortable beds, bathrooms were spotless and had thick towels, nice slippers and robes to enjoy. More importantly, I need to mention the kindness and professionalism of the staff!  Every one of them. Congratulations to the management for excellent training. Upon check in I was greeted by Dora who made me feel comfortable and welcome from the start. We asked her for dinner location suggestions and she offered many outstanding choices. She worked long hours. The bell staff was always willing to go out of their way to help. The breakfast was more than anyone could eat, and an extravagant display of so many items! Our rooms had balcony's and a great view of the city landscape. I enjoyed standing on them and watching the changing of the guards!  And finally on the last day Manio was so kind with our checkout. Sad to leave, but with fond memories of an enjoyable stay!

We actually checked in on the day after we were supposed to. My travel agents fault. No problem, they moved the day of check in and off we went. Took all of 5 minutes to correct and we were given a beautiful room with a view of the Acropolis. Rarely will you stay at such a clean, friendly and generous place. And even the bed was incredible. Would definitely stay again. Thank you.

A nice hotel with excellent service. The location is close to everything you would want to see in Athens! Rooms were pretty clean but they are a little dated. The breakfast had a good selection of items from bacon, sausage, eggs, fruit and pastries. The only comment on the breakfast would be the coffee and cappuccinos didn't taste great. Overall a nice hotel if you're visiting Athens!

The rooms are large! Rooms are clean! The staff is very accommodating. We enjoyed a breakfast buffet. There is a bar open in the evening on the mezzanine level.  There is a restaurant in the lobby.  Be aware that this hotel does not have a pool. This hotel was picked as part of our tour. Overall this hotel is a good choice.

Probably the noisiest hotel I have ever stayed at. The bedroom doors are very thin and you can hear housekeepings every move knock and bang, even the noise of plastic bags rustling. I’m sure another room or floor may have been different but even 6 floors up no peace! I leave my room impeccable and do not use all the towels and clutter available, so how about some mutual respect in the morning, smashing vacuum cleaners against the wall is war! Very clean room on arrival.

I loved staying at this hotel! It was in such a nice location- close to the action but tucked away enough to have some peace and quiet. It was also a safer and cleaner part of the city. The staff were phenomenal- friendly, attentive, helpful and knowledgeable about local recommendations for food and fun. The hotel was quaint, cozy, clean, peaceful and very unique. The breakfast on the Terrace was one of my favorites! Robust and delicious. The room was great- super comfy bed and amazing
Shower and clean! Loved the glass bottles of water too. I would stay there again. Walking distance (25 min) to acropolis. Thank you!
A nice stay at a very good location. Everything was good, although the room not too spacious was. Very friendly service, good breakfast and a pleasant roof terrace to have a drink.

Lovely little hotel, cozy and quiet. Being there feels like a treat ❤️ the coco-mat is very comfy and the breakfast is delicious. Staff is kind and attentive and the location is just perfect! The ice on the cake was the amazing massage I got from Dimitra, her deep tissue massage was at the same time relaxing and re-energising. Highly recommended!

Loved everything about this hotel. Comfortable, quaint, friendly service with a very decent breakfast. Beds are very comfortable and spacious area is well kept. The only small disappointment was a malfunctioning steam room that had no steam. Pool is ok despite being in a basement. Overall a great stay in athens

Overall, good stay.
Staff was helpful and friendly.

It's a small detail, but the room lacks drawers or something to store clothes out of your luggage. There is a hanger, though.

Bed is comfortable.

Restaurant is ok, nice option if you don't want to dine out.

Location wise, it's pretty close to the centre, close to interesting museums
The host cancelled our reservation 10 days before our stay due to double booking although we have made the reservation 2 months in advance. The host didn’t even apologized for the inconvenience.

Amaizing place at Athens... Have been there for a week..
Very clean place, nice organized,  kitchen and even coffee machine.
Nice lady, Julia, that helped as a lot by advising great restaurants and beautiful places to visit.
I give my 5 stars.  just go and enjoy 😀

Great place to stay !
The stuff are amazing,
The apartments are new and well equipped, even for long period staying.
The area is great very quiet and close to the metro and the center.
Highly recommended!!!

Came to visit Athens for four days stayed in the apartment of Bentzi
clean rooms comfortable bed everything is new the apartment located in the center walking distance to all the sites and coffee shops❤️
Amazing... great location... safe and calm neighborhood, Supreme service by Mrs Youla... rooms are cozy and comfortable...

Very clean and nice place. Its fresh and you have everything you need in the apartment-and it all works as it should 😃 The building is nice, clean beautiful entrance 👍 near to everything- restaurants, historical places, metro station. Would definitely stay there again. Highly recommended. Thank you for making our stay in Athens so nice 👌

Close to the busy Evangelismos Metro (with excellent access to the city centre and easy to reach from the airport), this apartment on the ground floor was off the main road, so it was very quiet and peaceful. The rooms were large, the beds comfortable and the bathroom very nice. We were met by the host, who gave us a short tour of the apartment. We would definitely choose this apartment again if we planned to have a longer stay in Athens.

What a gem in the center of Athens!  The room was very comfortable, beautifully decorated and clean.  The subway (metro) was very close which was very convenient and only a couple of stops from the Acropolis and Syntagma square.

Our host Greg was very pleasant and responsive and speaks fluent English. We will definitely be back the next time we’re in Athens.  Thank you!

Excellent location, walking distance to Evangelismo metro station, mini market and good restaurants.
Family friendly property.
15min easy walk to downtown Athens and all the main tourist attractions.
Highly recommended place for staying in Athens.
Parking available for small car, not minivan.

One of the best places to stay in Athens.
Huge apartments, elegantly furnished, with all required comforts.
Wide rooms
Very fast wifi
Some plusses like complimentary wine, juice, all toiletries, possibility to use kitchen and laundry.
Easy staff
Moderate prices.
Many places for breakfast and dinner around.
Easily reached with the metro.
Only drawback: no parking and narrow streets around.
9

Excellent place to stay in Athens. Very clean and fully equipped. The hosts are kind and always willing to help. Also an ideal location as it is close to the center of Athens, the metro (Evangelismos Station), the art gallery and Kolonaki.
Beautiful and clean apartment with comfortable spaces in the center of Athens. The hosts were kind and willing to help with anything we needed. The best choice!
I hosted friends and they gave me left impressions TO the point that I wanted to leave Penteli and stay in the center
Excellent, modern and renovated space in an excellent location very close to the center of Athens. Very kind hosts. Excellent cleanliness. I will definitely choose it again.
Amazing hotel, clean rooms, kind staff! I highly recommend it!

For the price, this place is fine. But be warned that check in is not seamless and if you need anything during your stay, expect a wait. You have to WhatsApp the owner to give you instructions to be let in and it’s just all a bit frustrating/time consuming. The rooms are just the necessities and the AC had a very strange odor. The location is fine but would stay closer to city center if I were to choose again. Also this place said it came with shampoo and conditioner, and there wasn’t any.

Unfortunately, Expedia made a mistake in our booking and booked us into a double room despite us being three people. The hotel was very accommodating and immediately made sure to get us an additional bed free of charge. The room is clean and the rooms are large. We had a couple of problems during our stay (none of them caused by the hotel) and could always contact somebody from Athen‘s Gem to help us out, even late in the evening.
It borders on a nice area of the city to the west, but the city centre is a bit of a walk away, so if you don‘t like using public transportation, you should either be prepared to call a taxi or strap on your hiking boots!

This hotel is not good! The facility itself is basic but fine but the way it is run leaves much to be desired. Seeing all the positive reviews makes me think that they must have changed management recently and the new management is not very professional.

I had significant problems checking in (there is no regular front desk and the building itself is locked) and I was not able to get info from management on the day of my check in about how I would be able to get into the building and into my room, despite confirming with them earlier that they would be in touch with the info that day, and despite my having reached out by email, texts, and calls on my check-in day. In the end I was able to get in okay, after booking it to arrive during the one-hour window that a staff member was supposed to be present and some awkward waiting around with them while they also had trouble getting the internal details from management about my reservation. (Someone who seemed to be a random neighbor who lived there was the one who was able to get a hold of the management in the end.) However, I was worried the whole time during my stay that I might accidentally lock myself out of my room (the door locks automatically if it closes) because I had no idea how I would get a hold of someone to let me back in.

Another totally sketchy thing is that, after I checked out, the hotel  changed my reservation on Expedia (where I had booked) to say that I had cancelled my reservation. I think they did this because they knew I had problems during my stay and this was how they could block me from leaving a bad review on the site! Yikes.

Amateur hour...You're better off staying in a proper hotel.

Management is very unresponsive and there is only staff available to let you into your room for one hour every day. Management said they would send information for getting into a key box the day of my reservation but did not. They had given two phone numbers to call anytime with problems; one was not answered when I called multiple times during the one hour staff were supposed to be available, the other number was disconnected. I raced to check in before the one hour window ended and when I arrived the staff needed me to supply the room number for my reservation, which I had never been given. I eventually got into a room but if I hadn’t arrived during the one hour of staffing, I might have been out of luck. Would NOT recommend.
Small rooms and bathrooms, but good service and excellent location next to Metro.

Great room and the air con was a life saver. The lady let us in quite late as our flight was delayed and we weren't made to feel like a hassle. The room is med size but was perfect for a couple of day stay. I liked that the shower was run off solar and the shampoo and conditioner was great. We also got given water and coffee which was a nice touch 😊 there was a lift to the room is no lugging around suitcases. Around the corner is a restaurant called Oroscopo which was delicious and I highly recommend.

The room I stayed in was fairly small, with really small beds. Room was air conditioned, but not well-ventilated. The staff is friendly and speaks some English, but there isn't always someone at the front desk to assist. The room was quite clean. The hotel is located in a safe area in city, and close to some good restaurants.
Considering the low price in comparison to other hotels in the area, it was a pretty good deal.

We came to this hotel for the amazing reviews, and to our surprise it was anything but amazing. First of all, there was no one to greet us when we first arrived. We waited in the lobby for a long time before someone came down to greet us and check us in. Not to mention the smell of the Lobby and halls was unbearable. Second of all, the bed mattress had springs poppping out and there was only a sheet for a cover. We also saw small bugs crawling on the beds and bathroom, and woke up with bites on outback legs. Thirdly, we booked a one bedroom apartment and that was suppose to have a living area because we traveled in a group and were given a regular room for the price of an apartment. Lastly, the last day on our stay we had NO hot water. After a day of swimming at the beach and driving around the coast, I was forced to take a freezing cold shower. I even waited till the morning we left to try to see if there was warm water, but there was not. I will say though, that the room was very spacious and the view was nice. Other than that, I would not recommend this place to stay in Athens.

A block of flars nicely transformed into separate rooms, next to Hilton Athens. There is no reception coming in or going out, although there are staff available. No breakfast but there is a high variety around from classy restaurants to Starbucks and Goody's. Do not exoect anything more than a hotel room but even this is offered very nicely, clean & modern, with very nice views. The rooms are bigger and nicer than the usual standard hotel rooms. I will visit again.
Amazing room plus the hotel is about 5 min walk to the marathon pick up point and a short walk from the finish line :)

Very nicely located hotel. We had an apartment and double room. Both spotless clean. An apartment with a view, cozy and spacious rooms. There was no washing up liquid, a sponge or a cloth in the kitchen. That would be nice to have when you stay only for a short period of time. Only thing I did not like was breakfast. Eatable but not the best one.

Ideal for families that have 4-6members, decent breakfast with green dishes, close to the most posh area in Athens - near Kolonaki- , metro 5min walk.
I recommend as best option for those also that they like the ‘70-80s- decoration which gives a sense of quality and simplicity!!!
Fair price compared to other hotels around 🤓

Staying at Delice apartments was very pleasant, the apartments were very spacious with everything that you would need. They were cleaned well every day. The location was also excellent, very close to the Evangelismo metro station and only a stop or two to the centre of the city. Would definitely recommend!

Good hotel for a short stay near the metro in Athens.
Rooms are neat although very simple.
The breakfast is good but would need a few improvement touches to make it even better.
Overall the experience was very good although I would expect from a 4* hotel more amenities and a wider variety of products available for breakfast.

Best bedroom mattress I've EVER slept on! Staff were extremely nice!! They got us a taxi when we needed one and the taxi showed up on time! Room was huge! Very happy with Delice and if I'm ever in that neighborhood, I will definitely stay there again!!!

The hotel staff were all incredibly friendly and welcoming, especially this lovely lady Miss Xenia who helped me split my day tour into two days according to my flight schedule. She even allowed me to check out later, so I didn't have to rush for the flight. I could come back, take a nice shower, rest, and pack. The breakfast and room service food were delicious, and the rooftop pool offered an amazing view. There were also many great restaurants nearby. Staying here for a week felt just as comfortable as being at home.

We arrived after our early morning flight and the bellman were very polite and took our baggage straight to storage but the front desk was quite rude to us about how early we arrived - I didn’t ask to check in and didn’t expect to, so there was no need to be rude.  We only had 1 day in Athens so being well located to the main sites was important.  This hotel was walkable to everything including the Parthenon.  After a long day of exploring we came back to the hotel for check in and were surprised with an upgrade to a large suite and a welcome drink.  We had to wait in line for quite a while because the front desk decided to let a group of over 10 flight attendants check in before us despite us having been in line before them
And for a long time.  The only good customer service we got was the woman who checked us in.  She was polite, accommodating and apologetic for the wait.

Our upgraded room huge!  Most importantly, it’s clean and comfortable. One thing that bothered me about the room and service though was that while we were out to dinner the cleaning staff came in and made our beds and left waters on our pillows.  We thought that was such a nice gesture.  Upon checkout we learned that the waters were 10 euro each . I was quite annoyed by this and noted to the front desk they should have been at the mini bar or a note included with the price.  I wouldn’t have drank otherwise.  All our other hotels provided complimentary water so we assumed this was the same.  She was very rude about it but ultimately did not charge us for which I was appreciative.

Also, the rooftop view of the city is wonderful!

Terrible experience. This is a 2 star hotel, at best. Let me take you on this stay with us. We arrived 4 hours before check in time and did not expect to be able to get into the room until 3.   Upon arrival the front desk told us they could make that work and it would only take an hour, which was music to our ears after a multiple day travel with no sleep. We headed up to the incredibly mediocre pool to wait for the room. An hour went past and we headed back downstairs to check if our room was ready, we were turned away again with a promise of 30 minutes. Repeat that process another 5 times until our check in time. If they would have told us from the beginning, “no so sorry can’t check in until 3” we wouldn’t have had a problem with that but being lied to for 4 hours straight was not great. On top of that, when we went down to check in at 3 the line was incredibly long and filled with grumpy people with the same issue and the issue of not being able to check in even after 3. Once we finally got into our room the beds were as hard as a rock. In terms of room it was decent. This was just a 2 night stop of our trip, but if the room is booked for 3 people maybe include more than 1 towel? Also perhaps replace the 1 towel when you clean the room? Feels obvious. I was then harassed multiple times by a employee that thought he left his phone in the room. He was aggressive and very creepy. I’m a young woman and he would wait until I was along in the room to knock on the door to ask if I had found a phone. The service workers in the restaurant were decent, until our buffet interaction. The man at the front was working with maybe 1 brain cell. I told him multiple times it was 3 people and he charged for 2. When my boyfriend joined us he was accused of “stealing” because there was a miscommunication. But ya know, obviously we should panic first and be rude to guests and accuse them of stealing gross food while literally sitting at the table. Glad to be leaving.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Divani Caravel hotel during a business trip, and I wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude for the exceptional service I received.

I would like to extend a special thank you to your concierge, Xenia, who was incredibly helpful with every question and request. Her professionalism and attentiveness truly enhanced my stay.

Additionally, I want to give my sincere thanks to Dimitra, who was the kindest receptionist I have ever encountered. Her warmth and friendliness made a lasting impression.

Thank you once again for making my stay so pleasant.

Excellent experience!  Flight cancelled and sent to Devini Caravel. Gorgeous reception and beautiful room. Greek people so friendly and kind. Took very well care for us. Perfect setting in safe area. View from the pool of Acropolis and St George church. Food and service plentiful and diverse.  Would come back to this hotel over and over.

Wonderful apartment! I stayed there once, but definitely plan to come back. Cozy, nice atmosphere, equipped with all necessary for the perfect stay. Nice team are serving the appt, happy to help with any request.
Totally recommend!
Though small, the apartment is clean and has a simple kitchen, making it perfect for a short stay. The small terrace was a nice touch for a change of scenery.

Location is very convenient but definitely the worst service I 've received. Rooms were ok I guess. We booked via EXPEDIA and we had no instructions on how to enter and the lock's code. We called the property and they were annoyed (!).

We remained approx. 30 min outside the property till they decided we could have the code to go to our room. By the way the behavior during the phone calls was at least disrespectful.

The room was ok I would say, however there are blinds in all windows and the natural lighting is poor. Would not stay again and do not recommend.

Totally recommend! Nice apartment, only a few minutes by walk from Evaggelismos metro station.
The team was happy to help with any request.

I love the place! The neighbor is very safe and also it's very comfortable. Only issue may be about duvets. Although the weather is good, the duvet was so slender and the first night was cold. They could add additional duvet under the bed base.

But I definitely suggest everyone to stay Bright Eco Studios
Very clean room. Immediate service. Family friendly. Good area. Overall a good environment for someone traveling to Athens. And room rates you won't find anywhere else. I highly recommend it.
Excellent accommodation and helpful owner!

I had an amazing stay at Modita Boutique Apartments in Athens! The place was spotless and beautifully designed. I loved how close it was to the city center while still being quiet. The metro made getting to and from the airport a breeze. The staff were welcoming and shared great local recommendations, including the best kebab I’ve ever had! I definitely recommend this place for anyone visiting Athens!

What an apartment!
If you come to Athens that’s certainly the best place to stay.
The apartment is sooo nice, cozy, with amazing rooftop. Location is walking distance to literally everywhere.
Would highly recommend and can’t wait to come again!
Too bad we had such good time we didn’t have time to take photos😅

We had a wonderful time at modita boutique hotel.  We enjoyed the luxury of the beautifully designed room  in which every detail was thoughts of. We enjoyed the spotless cleanes, the good coffee that waited to be used in the coffee machine the wonderful location and all the useful information that was given to
.us about anything we needed in Athens

We spent a few days in Modita Boutique apartment Athens last month and we enjoyed much our staying there. A Cool and comfortable apartment with nice space, pleasant sleeping room and living room, well equipped kitchen and agreeable and functional bathroom, and a terrasse. A lots of day light in the place.
The location is at some way from the Plaka and the center, in a quiet neighborhood with a lot of restaurants, bars and mini markets all around. Thanks to the location, we had some nice walk up to the touristic areas which allow us to discover and feel the vibes of the city, by foot.
We highly recommend the place for your staying in Athens :-)

We had an amazing experience at Modita. The location is great (only 7 min. walk from the metro, in very calm and safe eara, with lots of really good caffes and local restureants), the facilities and atmosphere of the place is inspiring. We were a group of 12, and we took the whole building. The students had their time to work, cook togehter, relax...and work on their papers. Simply WONDERFUL.

Very nice room, comfortably accommodates a family. Very nice decoration. Rest bed as well as pillows. Great decoration that makes you feel at home. The bedroom is on the inside and does not disturb the street. Easy parking in the area.

Don’t bother.

They attempted to charge us an additional €219.50 at the property by pushing a piece of paper across the reception with the figure written on it, even though we had paid in full. When we refused and showed we had paid in full, suddenly we were informed the lift was broken.

Rooms are tiny and not as described. Cupboards couldn’t even be opened because the room is so small. The heater had a plastic bag holding it together. Someone’s hotdogs were in the fridge. The key to the room is an old style key and it was difficult to use it in the lock.

We left after less than an hour and they refused to refund any portion of our week long booking after giving us the runaround for 4 days claiming they needed manager approval.

If I could give no stars, I would.

bathroom: shower is very uncomfortable, for hot water need wait up to 10 min when tap is opened.
in a shower stick out electrical cables.
Very cold, (January) Air conditioner working is very loud.
balcony door is not locking, very difficult to slide. Main door is very bad secured. No fire alarm. Furniture is very old. WiFi is not available in some floors.
That hotel star rating between 1 to 2 star.

Room was very dirty at checking and also hotel smells so bad really stinks
Toilet leaking and absolute waste of money … I only stay two days as a nightmare…..rude stuff and don’t speak English ….never recommend to any one
Not respecting GPDR, very bad experience and full of insects
Very good

Very clean ... And above all cool house
Very helpful Mr. Giorgos
And of course I will go again at some point

place_name: The Art Of Living next to the metro
review_text: A true diamond💎. Close to public transportation,  and the market. Ideal for those arranging sightseeing in Athens. Owners are very kind and supportive. It is fully suggested!

place_name: The Art Of Living next to the metro
review_text: I had a great experience living in this house. Location is great, near everything you will need and close to the metro. Also the owner an absolute pro!

place_name: The Art Of Living next to the metro
review_text: good experience but most important, awesome memories

place_name: The Art Of Living next to the metro
review_text: Very nice space, ideal spot, clean the perfect place to stay in Athens!!!

place_name: The Art Of Living next to the metro
review_text: Very beautiful space good location very clean would highly recommend

Great place, my stay was in room number 1, spacious, very clean!
The helpful owner explained to me exactly how to get to the accommodation which ended up being only 20m from Tavros power station!
I will prefer you again soon!!
It’s very close to the Tauro’s station.. Very comfy room and quiet place!! The place was so clean and people was so useful.. I’ll stay there when I visit Athens again
I went with my wife for 7 days, the place was very nice.  The point where he was and very important. Everything was spotless.    I recommend it guys I stayed in room 1
Very nice space and in a very good spot. Next to the train really. Brand new accommodation. Well done and the host very friendly
perfect place to stay for several days as it is located 20 meters from the electricity
Lovely place!

The prices are very good and the mattresses together with the pillows are great (cocomat), as is the air conditioning. But the toilet is shared and the people hosted there are not always ideal, and this is a problem since there is no soundproofing and the other person may be drunk. Also, even though the staff is polite, you don't feel particularly safe and the toilet runs. Average price €20 per person

Very nice guy , it is like coming home.
Nice place to sleep, close to all you need. Direct connection to metro.
Decent prices.
I would recommend this place 👌

I called up late, there was one room available, so I get there and the door is locked, but luckily some other poor sods had been waiting and the owner came on a bike as soon as I showed up.
The room was very spacious, working A/C and nice bathroom.
Great location right next to the metro line and busses, but I could barely hear any noise at all, it was very quiet at night. And dark, curtains were great.
I do have one complaint and that is that the towels provided smelled like old washing machine, you know the smell you get when the lid is closed all the time. My body had that same odor after drying for about an hour, not so pleasant. The sheets, pillows etc, were perfectly fine, so maybe a different washing machine...
The duvet was nice and thick and a soft and hard pillow was provided, including complimentary food items.

Room was good and the shower was the biggest we had in Greece. Air conditioner and Nesspresso were awesome. We didn't get back to our  room till around midnight, so we didn't notice that there was only one blanket for the two beds.It was too late to call anyone. We looked everywhere but there were no extra blankets or sheets, so I used one of the towels as a blanket. Would suggest the keys be labeled, as we needed 3 different keys to get to our room.
Door Was locked and lights off when we showed up for our stay. Called and the number was not in service. Do not book here.

Lovely place. Have stayed in two of the rooms now and had a comfortable night on both occasions. Extreemely convenient for the metro to the city and airport. €5-8 taxi to long distance bus station. Some great local restaurant 5-10 minutes walk away.
Great apartment. Huge, clean, have everything you need. Walking distance to Monastiriki, if you like to walk. All recommendations.
Super car wash solution for your car 🤝

We stayed in this apartment with another couple friend for a few nights in Athens. The apartment was very clean, got plenty of light and had all the necessary household items. The unit has an AC in every room and there is a washer in the unit which is a life saver. It’s also 2 blocks away from the metro station. Overall a great stay.

Very clean and comfortable, there are 2 rooms including double beds. There is all kitchen items, all house items. We like very much, we feel like at home. Ancient area is very close. Historical places, restaurants... are around 30 min walking distance.
There is turkish coffee at kitchen (here they say greek coffee but no matter :) this is a perfect and nice idea for Turkish guests, especially for the addicted ones like me :)
We asked to extend check out till 14.00 PM and they accept, many thanks.

We advise eveybody.

The space is great, letting us have a comfortable stay in Athens. The employee was very helpful and even explained to us where the closest stores were, as well as recommendations for tourist attractions. Spacious kitchen area, good beds. Our family was content with the space. We had a great stay.

Good people. Everything in order and they provide in paper a lot of info about the area sites. I found it very difficult to find parking as there is only available to park at the street. At the shower, hot water no pressure.
Nice apartament, clean, well equipped, big surface, near metro station
Very cool apartament! Im very happy that I was there :)
Fine accommodation in the heart of Athens.
Good view and location. Friendly host. Good value for money.
Worth recommending 👍👍👍

Easy check in and check out.
Good location near a metro , many restaurants and a few supermarket . It is 25 minutes walk to tourist sites. There is a park on hill  nearby (15 mins walk )for sunset view.

Perfect place to stay while exploring Athens.
Great location, less than 5 minutes walk to the Metro, walking distance to all main attractions. many restaurants add coffee shops.
Great spacious clean and designed rooms.
Excellent staff and cool rooftop.
Highly recommended

Nestled amidst the charming streets of Athens' Petralona neighborhood, the Blue House on Dimofontos Street 112 is a true gem waiting to be discovered. From the moment we stepped inside, we were enchanted by its welcoming atmosphere and unique character.

Upon arrival, we were warmly greeted by our gracious host, who ensured that every aspect of our stay was nothing short of exceptional. The Blue House exudes a sense of tranquility and relaxation, providing a much-needed sanctuary in the bustling city of Athens.

The interior decor of the Blue House is a delightful blend of modern comfort and traditional Greek charm. The vibrant blue accents throughout the house add a touch of whimsy, while the cozy furnishings invite you to unwind and make yourself at home. The attention to detail is evident in every corner, from the carefully curated artwork to the thoughtful amenities provided for guests.

One of the highlights of our stay was the spacious terrace, where we enjoyed sipping our morning coffee while soaking in the panoramic views of the neighborhood. It was the perfect spot to start our day, surrounded by the sights and sounds of Athens waking up.

Location-wise, the Blue House couldn't be better situated. Petralona is a vibrant and eclectic neighborhood, filled with charming cafes, local restaurants, and picturesque streets to explore. With the Acropolis just a short walk away, we found ourselves perfectly positioned to experience the rich history and culture of Athens.

But perhaps the most memorable aspect of our stay was the hospitality of our host. Their genuine warmth and hospitality made us feel like we were staying with friends rather than strangers. From providing insider tips on the best places to eat to ensuring that we had everything we needed for a comfortable stay, they went above and beyond to make our time at the Blue House truly unforgettable.

In conclusion, our stay at the Blue House in Petralona was nothing short of magical. From its charming ambiance to its unbeatable location, it exceeded all of our expectations and left us longing to return. If you're looking for a unique and unforgettable experience in Athens, look no further than the Blue House on Dimofontos Street 112.
Amazing stay, amazing apartment triple A service!
Stayed at the Blue House for two nights and highly recommend it. Good, quiet location and very clean, large rooms. Arriving earlier wasn't a problem either. Perfect for a city trip.
Bugs!!!!!
Very good apartment, in a very good area and price
Well located, but the apartment is rudimentary, especially in terms of kitchen. Bad bedding. And the company of thumb-sized cockroaches.

Great location, close to the center and the Acropolis.
Clean but modest
No kettle.
Great apartment, close to everything.

Exceptional and remarkable experience in everything in this amazing guest house in Athens! The hospitality was amazing, providing an excellent service in everything I needed for my stay. The location was very convenient, located right in the heart of Athens in a beautiful and quiet area, but at the same time right by all the busy parts of the city. The guest house’s architecture and aesthetics is amazing, art work, unique furniture and all the equipment to make my stay very comfortable and pleasurable! My stay was unforgettable! Truly recommended and looking forward to returning very soon. Thank you very much Stratos and Antiopi for making my stay unforgettable and providing this exceptional hospitality and experience for my stay in Athens.
Nice little accommodation inexpensive, was just nice, not far to the train, restaurants all around, good location, always happy, highly recommended
Super well appointed studio.  The owner is very friendly and available. Calm neighborhood.

Booked to stay here very last minute, and couldn’t be happier with the service that we received! Jannis was very helpful and accommodating, sending local recommendations for food and places to visit! The house was clean and welcoming, and in a very friendly area. As two younger girls travelling alone, we felt safe and comfortable during our stay here. 10/10 would recommend and would happily stay here again! :))

Excellent experience! The location is unbeatable—situated in a vibrant, hip neighborhood that truly captures the spirit of the city. The street is filled with great cafes, bars and restaurants that offer a taste of the local culture. Whether you're looking for a cozy spot to enjoy coffee or a trendy place to have dinner, everything is just a short walk away.
Had a lovely stay, would definitely recommend! Easily accessible, in a convenient location, and good food around. Clean space, and hosts made sure our experience was great!

Great overall experience at Troon of Athens Apartments. Simple, clean, and tidy. The bed was very comfortable. The hot shower was amazing. The neighbourhood is great (relatively quiet with good food options close by). Wifi connection and speed was not that great and could be improved. Some loud neighbours in the early a.m. Nevertheless, we give it 5 stars. We stayed 4 nights (May 2024) and will certainly stay again on our next visit to Athens. - S & J

Well located in a beautiful area with many restaurants and bars nearby. The building is well maintained, the apartments are clean and provide everything we needed for a comfortable stay. Everything was as expected and there were no unpleasant surprises. This is our place of choice for our trips in Athens and we keep on coming back.

We had an amazing stay at the Traditional Thiseio Home. The location was perfect, with easy access to local attractions and the nearby train station. The home felt safe for our kids, and they loved playing in the small garden. Toula was very helpful throughout our stay, ensuring we had everything we needed. We highly recommend this place for families!

Great location in an area populated by locals, quiet and well connected with city centre - about 20 minutes walk. Nymphs hill located in immediate proximity allows great views onto the Acropolis and the Athens in general - a nightime visit is recommended! Two metro stations in a walking distance. The area doesn't feel touristy at all and is surrounded by great restaurants frequented by locals. The house is equipped with an AC both in the living area and in the bedroom. There was a basic set of bathroom liquids (except the toothpaste) and a complimentary water bottle cooled down in the fridge - it was a very nice touch! The space was tidy and generally clean but the couch was a bit beaten up. Our host, Tula, was very nice, gave great recommendations for the first-time Athens visit and was all the time available if we needed help. We recommend and would definitely book again!
Beautiful clean apartment to rest in whilst on holiday in Athens. Very comfortable and bright. The outside sitting area is such a bonus as well. Tula was very welcoming and hospitable.
An excellent hospitality, very clean, quiet location, very well equipped! Definitely recommend it!

A very nice apartment, I can only recommend it. Everything was very clean. the facilities were great. The personal care and help from the landlady was also good. The apartment has a cute well-kept front garden. It is located on a very quiet side street.
There is air conditioning and a well-equipped kitchen that was very clean.
The bathroom was also new and very clean and you immediately felt comfortable.

place_name: Queen's stone legend, royal living by Acropolis
review_text: Amazing place very close to the best places in Athens.

place_name: Queen's stone legend, royal living by Acropolis
review_text: We stayed 3 days in this splendid apartment. Everything perfect. Impeccable cleanliness. Friendly and helpful host. Excellent location. We hope to be able to return soon.

place_name: Queen's stone legend, royal living by Acropolis
review_text: Amazing house, on the sea! Fully equipped and the owners are very helpful and kind!

First of all Miranda is a wonderfull warm woman. She waited for us upon arrival. The apartment is well equipped in a nice neighbourhood. Good airconditioning, silent at night en looks way better than in the pictures. Definitely recommend apartment!!! Book direct via mail.

Miranda’s apartment is cosy, comfortable and very well located. It’s walking distance to shops and restaurants. Miranda is the perfect host, she has thought of everything to ensure you have a comfortable stay. The apartment is well-equipped with every little thing you could need. Highly recommend and would definitely stay again!

The apartment is perfectly  cleaned, sheets and towels were smelling great  and is spacious ! mrs Miranda is the best host we have ever  met! Upon arrival we realized that the apartment had a welcome pack that was fabulous! Thank you so much !! We will be back for sure ! Value for money ! Absolutely we do recommend it ! 🙏🙏🙏
Lovely apartment in the heart of Athens. Extremely clean and well equipped. We really like it!
Excellent location, quiet building and neighbourhood, very clean and well equipped.
The place to be!!in the center of Everything! Nice view to acropolis hill also well taken care apartments and very friendly hostess.i recommend it!!!

What you see isn't what you get. We paid 798€ for 3 nights , which is quite a lot of money. In the pictures, the place looked nice and clean, it really wasn't so nice, the photos were taken years ago, today the apartment needs painting, plus the smell of damp in 2 bedrooms and bathrooms, not recommended if you suffer from asthmaThe price is much too high for the place. I told them I was very disappointed, but had no answer from them. I think they don't care...

What an absolutely beautiful property! The apartments were modern, clean, spacious, perfect location and beautiful! It was absolutely perfect for our group of 10. Everything we wanted to visit and see was in walking distance. We were actually on the Acropolis sidewalk, but our location gave us peace from the busyness on the streets outside. We were a 5 minute walk to a great breakfast spot and street vendors. We were a 10-15 minute walk to Monastraski Square. Our host was amazing and accommodating. We had everything that we needed and could use WhatsApp to communicate if we needed anything (including recommendations on where to find delicious Loukamades)! ALA is part of the reason why our stay in Athens was absolutely amazing.

The apartments look exactly like the online pictures. There are 4 floors. The top floor bedroom host an outside deck that looks out over Athens and a patio on the Acropolis side with a hot tub. Beautiful! One wish was that the seating on the patio was clean and set up. We could say out with a glass of wine and admired the beauty of Athens. We did pay 110€ for airport transportation for a group of 10. It was worth it for us. The airport is about 45 minutes away.
Nice apartment. Friendly owner. Great view of the Acropolis from the terrace. Very central for the Acropolis and Plaka .
Lovely location. Nice apartment. Only too many levels.
Great service , views and extremely clean
It is absolutely worth the price for the location and the acropolis of Athens views you get from the terrace.

What a beautiful place to stay!!! Superb location near to Acropolis, metro and in close proximity to all main attractions of the city.
Lots of cafes and restaurants in the neighborhood.
On arrival, the host Katerina, was friendly helpful and very welcoming. The apartment was comfortable, tastefully decorated and super clean. The best surprise was the rooftop. It offers breathtaking views of the Acropolis and across Athens.
Everything was great!
Would definitely recommend it and will visit again soon!!!

My stay at Theseum Hill has been an extremely positive  experience. Honestly, where to start? The hosts, Evan & Katerina are lovely people and most welcoming and helpful. They made the stay ever more comfortable. In addition to that, the apartment was very beautiful and squeaky clean. The decoration has a very nice aesthetic and cozy vibes. However, the terrace of the building was the biggest WOW factor for me! Acropolis, Lycabettus and Cine Thisio are all visible from the rooftop and you can actually even catch a free movie from the open air cinema! It's even better than the pictures!!!
All in all, if you're looking for a cute, cozy & comfy place to stay while visiting Athens, Theseum Hill is your best bet!!! Looking forward my next visit!

Great location, right in the center of Athens! A few meters from Acropolis hill (on foot) with wondeful view (from the terrace) to the Parthenon. The appartments are spacious, bright and clean. The owner is very helpful and kind. Totally recommend it!
Great place to stay, very good accommodation. And beutifull view to Acropolis from roof teras. Also from there you can watch movie from open cinema nex door

It is a nice and clean hotel not far from the Acropolis. Our hotel room had a view of the Parthenon. The bathroom was clean and had enough towels, but the shower was quite small. The bed was smaller than usual (narrower and shorter) and it would have been more comfortable for me if it was softer, but the pillows were soft. The hotel is located in an area where there are many restaurants. The staff was pleasant and helpful. Breakfast was tasty and the meals from the breakfast menu can be ordered in the restaurant in front of the hotel, and this is also a significant problem for the hotel, because on the first day we waited about 20 minutes for the preparation of sunny side up eggs after ordering. On the second day, we waited for the preparation of sunny side up eggs for over 30 minutes, and on the third day, we waited for the preparation of the fruit plate (two sliced ​​apples, five sliced ​​strawberries, one sliced ​​banana and six grapes) for over 45 minutes, so speed is a big weakness in the hotel. We were missing a tissue box in the room. The walls were very thin and we could hear the neighbors next to us and other guests in the hallway. Last night I heard my neighbor through the wall snoring 😳. The noise was even through the windows (which were well closed).  The floor creaked in places. So staying at the hotel for a price of over 150 Euros per night was very disappointing.  Everything cannot be excused or to say that we paid a higher price for the view. We came to the hotel looking for quality services, which we did not receive.
Their rooftop dining was a beautiful experience. Food and drink we made perfectly, staff was friendly and efficient, and the view!!! It is a moderate walk from the Acropolis museum.

We loved our stay at this little hotel with a big heart. Great view of the Acropolis. Quiet at night. Walking distance to restaurants, shopping and everything you want to see. Terry and the rest of the staff were so welcoming and jumped at the chance to help us with anything we needed. It felt like staying with family (in a good way) We would definitely stay again.
The staff were very friendly and helpful. Great view of the Acropolis! We only stayed 2 nights but would have been happy to stay more. Very clean and comfortable room to accommodate the 4 of us.

We were a family of 3 Adults and stayed in the Family room. The accommodation was very clean and comfortable and our balcony off the main bedroom gave an interrupted view of the Acropolis. Staff were very helpful, especially Terry, who went out of his way to accommodate our needs. Breakfast was very generous in its quality and choice. The Hotel is located with restaurants and bars in very close proximity.  Thank you to all the staff from 3 happy Aussie travellers..

We have spent a few days in one of Athens Elegant Apartments and the experience has been lovely. The apartment was very nice and really well located (at a few minutes walk from Acropolis, Monastiraki, Plaka, and most of the other touristic spots in the city). In addition to that it was very clean and the person in charge of us (Nikos) has been very kind and responsive to our needs. We will, no doubt, repeat with them if we travel again to Athens.

Stayed at the Acropolis View for 3 nights before heading off to the Greek Islands. The hotel was clean, breakfast was good, and the rooftop views were excellent. The front desk staff were great, provided good insights into the city and answered any questions we had. The room was small but the bed was comfortable. The hotel is about a 10-15 min walk to all the hot spots, which we did a few times per day! We walked back to our hotel at 2AM one night and felt quite safe.

The BEST location for easy access to the Acropolis and museum in a quiet setting.  Great and extremely helpful staff.  Low traffic making for lower noise setting.
Rooftop dining and seating area offers a beautiful view of the Acropolis and city

Exceptional views of The Acropolis. The rooms were modern, very clean, the rooftop facilities (viewing The Acropolis and breakfast) were airy and bright. The staff, particularly on reception, were exceptional. We stayed there on 30 Sept/1 Oct 2024 and would be our first pick again when staying in Athens.

Absolutely fantastic stay. Staff was very helpful and hospitable. They provided a map and restaurant recommendations. 24hr bar is a plus. The view of the acropolis at night is spectacular. They even made us breakfast boxes and cappuccinos at 6am since we had to leave for the airport early. Thank you!

Stayed here for 4 nights while in Athens. Rooms are small but very comfortable. Beds are VERY comfortable. Our room had a queen size and twin bed with a patio facing the back. When making reservations make sure your room has a balcony. Not all rooms have a view of the Acropolis. Staff is incredible - welcoming, attentive, answer all your questions and take care of any need. Location is perfect…just a few minutes walking distance to the Acropolis, Plaka, and other choice locations.  Price is worth it and very reasonable. Roof-top patio has an incredible view of the Acropolis. Breakfast buffet is awesome. I would definitely stay here again on my next trip to Athens. Thank you!

place_name: Beautiful City Suites, Hotels Athens, Rooms Athens, Bed and Bath Athens
review_text: Perfect location, comfortable rooms, and nice little rooftop. They helped arrange a taxi for us as we had to leave in the morning at 3:30am to the airport. Be aware it is right above restaurants that play music till 1am. Can make it challenging to sleep if you are leaving for the airport at 3am lol 🥴 but the place was great, and we would stay there again

place_name: Beautiful City Suites, Hotels Athens, Rooms Athens, Bed and Bath Athens
review_text: Probably one of the best stays in Athens. Fantastic rooms with views of the Acropolis from the terrace.

place_name: Beautiful City Suites, Hotels Athens, Rooms Athens, Bed and Bath Athens
review_text: Very good location for all city tours. Unfortunately, the apartments are located right next to the church bells, so you can't sleep or relax much here. In addition, the smell of the restaurant, which is located on the ground floor, enters the windows.

place_name: Beautiful City Suites, Hotels Athens, Rooms Athens, Bed and Bath Athens
review_text: Very happy with our stay here! Lovely clean room, easy check in, good price. The location is INCREDIBLE! So easy to walk to the Acropolis. By the way the hotel is behind the green door, the restaurant to the left manages the rooms so if no one comes you can ask at the restaurant. The photos posted are of room #3 (there are 3 rooms total). There is also a cute upstairs balcony!

place_name: Beautiful City Suites, Hotels Athens, Rooms Athens, Bed and Bath Athens
review_text:
Great place in an amazing location. The rooms are very clean, the mattresses are very comfortable, toiletries are provided and the decoration is lovely.
It's located in the heart of Monastiraki, close to the Acropolis and other ancient sightseeing. The location is great, surrounded by many shops, restaurants and the metro is very close to  the hotel.
I stayed there with my son after an unfortunate situation at other place I had booked to stay. They managed to give us two amazing rooms. Mine was at the terrace and had a great view. My sons room was on the floor below, he was very happy with his room and I must say he is very picky.
The owner and stuff are very polite and friendly.  They did everything in their power to make us feel comfortable. They even booked us a taxi to take us to the airport at 3 o'clock in the morning!
The hotel is above an amazing restaurant with great food and live music that alters every day. We had a blast there!
If you are looking for a nice, clean hotel in a great location this is it!!! We will be visiting again the next time we are in town!
Beautiful Suites thank you for the hospitality!!!

Everything I would want and could say has already been said before. Whether it’s the location of the residence next to the Acropolis or its setting in a safe and quiet neighborhood. The decor of the apartment and its beauty, the comfortable beds, the jacuzzi. Every detail has been thought out to make it comfortable for the guests. What certainly stands out is the attention our host Andreas had for us. From the informative check-in, where our children were also wonderfully involved, to the helpfulness with questions. The recommendations for culture and dining were very welcome and we were well-prepared, yet still pleasantly surprised. What sticks with me the most is the consistency in his hospitality. I have read through the other reviews and all the aforementioned points consistently come up. I could go back six years in the reviews. I sincerely hope, Andreas, that in the coming years you will continue to welcome your guests in the natural, cheerful, and human manner you did for us last week. A week in which we felt at home. πολλα ευχαριστα

The residence has a perfect location, absolutely clean, comfortable and well designed:
Andreas is a wonderful host, thought of every single detail.
The hot tub is wonderful!
We will definitely come back

Feels like home! This is our second time in two weeks to stay at this gorgeous apartment and as I walked in the second time I said out loud “This feels like home!” It’s such a comfortable and well furnished apartment from the bottle of wine, beer, & coffee to the hot tub and cute seating area outside! The beds and bedding were super comfortable!

Location! Location! Location! This great apartment is just a couple blocks from the base of the Acropolis and just a few blocks from dozens of restaurants and stores. Andreas has suggested many wonderful places for breakfast, coffee, and dinner. Sadly, we only had 4 nights in Athens which wasn’t enough time to try them all. Andreas was also always available with suggestions, recommendations, ideas, etc any time we asked.

Bottom line: We would definitely stay here again when visiting Athens the next time!
We absolutely loved the place and we are sure you will too :) Location is perfect, set up perfect and the welcome and help from Andreas is exceptional! We would be very glad to come back in future

Our stay at SV Acropolis Residence, hosted by Andreas, was absolutely phenomenal! From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed with genuine warmth and hospitality that made us feel right at home.

The apartment itself was nothing short of stunning. Its design and impeccable cleanliness left a lasting impression. The spacious layout provided more than enough room for our family of four, allowing us to unwind comfortably after long days of exploring the city.

The highlight of the residence was undoubtedly the breathtaking view of the Acropolis right outside our doorstep.

Andreas, our host, was simply outstanding. His attention to detail and dedication to ensuring our stay was perfect was evident in every interaction we had with him. He provided us with valuable recommendations for local attractions and restaurants, helping us make the most of our time in Athens.

The location of the residence was ideal, situated close to major landmarks the Acropolis and Monestiraki (Plaka). This convenience allowed us to effortlessly explore the historical wonders and vibrant culture of Athens.

Furthermore, the apartment's amenities were top-notch, including a fully equipped kitchen, airconditioning in all bedrooms and living toom, reliable Wi-Fi, and a hot tub, making our stay even more comfortable and enjoyable.

In summary, SV Acropolis Residence and our host Andreas exceeded all expectations, making our three-night stay in July an unforgettable experience for our family. If you're planning a trip to Athens, this is undoubtedly the place to stay. Thank you, Andreas, for your exceptional hospitality and for creating lasting memories for our family! We can't wait to return.
It takes you somewhere else
Cozy and fully equipped at the Center of Athens! 🏛️
Great apartment. Neat, clean, everything you need is in it. Nice decor. No transport required, perfect for getting to everything.

The cleanest apartment we've been in Greece. Directly in the middle of the Flea Market and 1 minute from the Square and minutes from Plaka but soundproof when you close the doors. Owner set us up with taxis and answered all questions on WhatsApp within minutes. I can't say anything bad about our place.

The room was very clean and tidy. The apartments are only 350m from Theseio Metro station. Centrally located with the Acropolis, Plaka Market, Syntagma Square, Monastiraki flea market and other major attractions within walking distance. Being a busy area, there's no view from the rooms. However, Acropolis is visible from the common terrace of the building. The staff there is very friendly, polite and helpful. Excellent property for the price of the apartment.

It's very clean, newly renovated, in a really good location - amazing view from the rooftop. And it's quiet despite the neighborhood being very loud. Our kitchenette was equipped with everything we needed, the owner gave us nice tips, all in all it was a great choice 😊
Amazing place in Athens - clean, well decorated, a near all the best eateries. Nikos is a top level host - we had zero worries throughout

This apartment was by far the best accommodation this trip, we rate this 11 out of 10, it was the cleanest, most comfortable, and stocked with all essential's.
Thank you to Εφιγενεια, Βασιλις, Νικος Χριστος, and other staff.
For going above and beyond with service and help.
Beautiful and close to everything! The perfect place to stay in city centre. In walking distances from everything
Perfect location for a short break in Athens. You can reach the main sights on foot and the apartment has everything you need for a short stay. If I visit Athens again I would stay there again.

The best place I have ever visited. Breathtaking views of Acropolis and the Athenian skyline. Traditional Greek quiet neighborhood in the center of Athens. The glass floors revealing the Acropolis outer walls are just magnificent. A wonderful experience overall. Highly recommended.
This location can’t be beat. The view of Athens from jacuzzi area is amazing.
Magnificent place to stay. 5 stars are not enough. Stay here and you’ll not be disappointed. It is worth every penny.

Wonderful House with a perfect location in central Athens.
10/10

Amazing place built over the ancient ruins!!!
Very close to the acropolis entrance
Great place

Simply the best choice we made regarding our stay in Athens. We only had 5 days left and we wanted a place in the center so we could roam around easily. The rooms were super clean, as well as the common areas. Ioanna (the owner)  helped us find the best spots to eat and drink and she also helped us with our transportation to areas further away. The morning coffee and the late night wine  at the balcony, admiring the Acropolis was totally worth it. 100% would recommend it without hesitation!
See you again next year!

Terrible experience at the Theasis Athenes!!!

- the bedsheets were stained, which doesn’t made us comfortable at all
- The heat was terrible and the AC WAS NOT WORKING properly. It woke us up at 3 AM with a terrible noise and was leaking which was very scary and could have been very dangerous
- when we contacted the property for the AC as we couldn’t sleep, they said they would refund at least 1 night as that was the least they could do, and in the end they didn’t refund ANYTHING, claiming it was a “miss usage of the AC” from our side.
Amazing hotel in a central location with Acropolis views. Comfortable and clean with self check in. Highly recommend

The property has 4 rooms, a shared kitchen and a very nice rooftop  terrace with a great view of the Acropolis. It was a pleasure to enjoy some Greek wine on the terrace in the evenings during our stay. The building is in the middle of Monastiraki Flea Market, 3 minutes from Monastiraki Metro Station. All points of interest are located nearby (Agora, Acropolis, Plaka, Psiri). You don't have to use any public transport, just walk around. The room was very clean and the bed was very comfortable. There is an AC in the room so you can accommodate the temperature you want. We travelled in early December when it was a bit chilly so we had to use the AC to heat the room. There are some steep stairs to climb, so be careful if you have a lot of luggage. Check-in and check-out is done on your own and is very easy. All the ingredients for breakfast are kept in the fridge located in the common kitchen and you have to prepare the breakfast yourself. The only downside to this accommodation is the street noise at night, but that's part of the location.

You enter a code to get into the small doorway hidden amongst the tourist streets, pretty cute, very close to the subway exit Monastricki.

The Shower was solid, the internet however repeatedly cut out, trying to watch TV, or just browse the internet. You have a third floor balcony kitchen with a cute little overlooking which you can see acropolis.

The breakfast is make your own, with ingredients in a shared fridge is in a shared space for all rooms, and is not refilled each day (At least for our two night stay). There was promise of a complimentary bottle of wine which was not there, but we whatsapped them about it and they brought the bottle that evening

Value is very good, a solid price for a pretty in-the mix location. Room was clean and the one warning I would have is that there is loud music nearby in businesses if you are an early sleeper, and the stairs are not accessible for anyone handicapped, though was perfectly fine for us.

Overall no complaints.

Stayed here for two nights and we had a great experience. You cannot beat the location and the rooms were spacious. Gigi was extremely helpful and was very dedicated to ensuring we had everything we needed for our stay.

The hotel is in the heart of Monastriaki Square so it does get loud at night. That’s probably the only “con” we experienced, nothing a Melatonin dose can’t fix!

Location is prime, great rooms, modern, clean and spacious. Right next to the flea market and subway station so getting to Muse from the airport was seamless. Highly recommend if you enjoy being in the Center of the city, noise is expected but surprisingly quiet once inside.

We had an amazing time at the apartment!!!
The best location in town (everything was 3-5 minutes walk, the train station was 2 minutes away). We got the apartment with a view to the Acropoli and it was so beautiful
The apartment is big enough for 4 people it was so nice and comfortable. Even though it’s in the middle of everything it was so quiet and there was no noice at all!!
Highly recommend!!! We will come back for sure❤️
Fantastic apartment suites located in the absolutely most convenient spot in Athens.  Highly recommend.  We are a family of 5 and went with two rooms.  Super affordable and an overall awesome stay.

We loved our stay at muse urban suites. Gigi was very friendly and helpful. She upgraded us to the Acropolis view at no extra cost. The location was perfect, walking distance to all attractions, shopping, food. The room was very clean. Would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Athens.
Great, chic and comfortable home for a rental stay in the Plaka.  Super location, excellent hosts.

Amazing, beautiful and clean house. My boyfriend and I stayed twice this year. We spent Easter and it was great. The location is excellent. The house is spacious with very nice decoration and has a wonderful large terrace with a unique view. Mrs. Elena who welcomed us and who we were in contact with for anything we needed was very helpful and kind. It is an excellent choice!
Amazing view, central point, in the most picturesque location of Athens under the Acropolis!!! All the areas of the house are neat, with modern decoration and excellent energy...!!!

The Pasmina Home Athens holiday apartment is a wonderful oasis right in the heart of Athens. The two-story apartment is incredibly beautifully decorated, with lots of style and attention to detail. Our highlight, however, was the huge roof terrace with a view of the Acropolis! As guests, we felt at home from the first second. In addition to a fully equipped large kitchen, there are several sleeping, living and dining areas, so we also had the opportunity to retreat. We particularly enjoyed this after a day full of sightseeing. The apartment is located right in the center of Athens, in the Plaka district, with many bars, cafes and restaurants. In addition, historical and tourist attractions in Athens, including the Acropolis, the Roman Agora, and the Acropolis Museum, are all within a few minutes' walk. We felt very comfortable in Pasmina Home and will definitely come back :)
A wonderful house in the center of Athens under the Acropolis. The rooms are incredible and very clean. I have nothing negative to say!!

We just left after 3 wonderful nights in this gorgeous hotel. Right in the middle of Plaka, so close to everything. Fabulous with children as we get out early and need to come back for a quick break before heading back out for dinner and it was amazing for this. The service was second to none, it was like staying with family, with how attentive and helpful they were. Nothing was too much to ask. Definitely recommend this place to anyone who will listen. Thanks xx

The hotel was absolutely amazing and perfect for us. We had the best room in the place with the view of the city and a lot of space. The staff were kind and very helpful, giving us great restaurant recommendations and helping us book taxis to and from the airport. Its location is so close to everything, a 5-15min walk for all of the historical sites near the Acropolis or to the subway. We spent about half of our evenings on their terraced courtyard/patio space, which also has a great view of the city. We would definitely recommend this place!

Loved this place. Very spacious room, cozy bed, big shower and quiet room despite the fact being right in Plaka. Best location for getting to know Athens. Our host gave us very useful and good recommendations. We especially loved the Yiasemi restaurant around the corner. Thanks for the great weekend we had in beautiful Athens

Booked through Booking.com, the check in process was flawless with someone attending and guiding the check in on-site.

The rooms are spacious and clean. The shower has good pressure and the bed is firm and comfortable. We stayed in the front room (with the balcony), which has a lot of light, and great views. However this comes with a lot of noise (NYC style) till approx. 2.30 AM at night - just be aware of this. I think other rooms might not have this.

The location is great when walking and visiting sites as it's really central, but problematic for taxi drop offs and pick ups. The small streets make it almost impossible for taxis to navigate, and some taxis refuse to go there.

Near the top of Plaka so plenty of stairs to climb, but its worth it. Right under the Acropolis. The room was neat, tidy with a good bathroom. Perfect size for carry-on cases, a bit squeezy for a 6 week traveller. Coffee pod machine, wine glasses, corkscrew all provided. Up three levels outside is a small terrace with glorious views. Half a dozen restaurants within a stone's throw

place_name: In the shadow of Acropolis Ε.Ε
review_text:
In the Shadow of the Acropolis was even more fantastic than my husband and I could have anticipated.! Rania, the host was always accessible for any question, and she was charming. The home was immaculate, and the location was absolutely perfect!

Great neighborhood in Plaka and easily navigable to other neighborhoods. The rooftop terrace was the perfect place for a glass of wine and some hors d’oeuvres or dessert. Treat yourself if you’re looking for a stay in Athens.

place_name: In the shadow of Acropolis Ε.Ε
review_text: Great house , great location with the best view in Athens. Very clean and Rania is ready to give the best info of the city! And the terrace, just awesome

place_name: In the shadow of Acropolis Ε.Ε
review_text: Very nice

place_name: In the shadow of Acropolis Ε.Ε
review_text: An exclusive private home for short rent /vacations.

Athens Muses Suites exceeded every expectation we had for our stay in Athens. From the moment we stepped through the door, it was clear that this place was special. Everything was flawless, but what truly set this hotel apart were the people. Evie, in particular, was an absolute treasure—her kindness, attentiveness, and genuine concern for our comfort made us feel instantly at home.
The location is unbeatable, nestled right in the heart of Athens with easy access to all the essentials. Despite being in a lively area, our room was a sanctuary of peace and privacy, with its entrance opening directly onto the street, offering us the perfect blend of seclusion and convenience.
One of the standout features was the breakfast—delicious and diverse, it kept us satisfied throughout the day. The design of the hotel is thoughtful, and every detail has been carefully considered to ensure a comfortable and enjoyable stay.
I wholeheartedly recommend Athens Muses Suites to anyone visiting the city, whether for a brief stop or an extended stay. This hotel is a true hidden gem, with impeccable service and hospitality that go above and beyond. I couldn't find a single fault during our stay, and I can't wait to return on my next trip to Athens!

Perfect Plakas location! Close enough to Acropolis, restaurants, and shopping to walk. Far enough away to get a quiet night's rest. Clean, comfortable and convenient room. The hostess provided excellent customer service! They were friendly, knowledgeable and communicative. Thank you 🙏🏼 Videos not the best but gives a good view of outside. Hotel pictures are true to posting.
Best view and location, clean and modern room, Evi ist the best! Quite, few minutes to Acropolis, we loved everything! We highly recommend this place!
Truly an amazing experience; thoughtly details that makes staying here really comfortable and peaceful and the best location to be in as a tourist.
Very clean, very good location, very good service, amazing view.

Amazing vila with a modern design that doesn't feel like a place for rent. An amazing location right beneath the acropolis although most taxis can't / won't reach all the way to the house.
Beautiful quite neighborhood just above Plaka.

Amazing Home ! About 12 places to sleep !!! Design and really good taste with decoration. I enjoyed this beautifull modern Duplex House. Lot of lights and a lovely courtyard.  Such a central area. I was sad to leave ...
It can get more authentic and stylish below the Acropolis !
