All very very clean and within walking distance of attractions. The hosts are perfect. We had a great time and the house helped a lot with that!

Lovely apartment in the heart of the city! Yet, in the best and safest neighborhood. The apartment was very clean and comfortable but what I loved the most was that I could almost do all my visiting walking! Totally recommended!
Lovely apartment, nice and clean, all in all highly recommend.
Perfect staying in the very heart of Athens. Everything is nearby. The room clean, cozy and Luxury and value for money indeed! The Host so helpful! I would strongly recommend!

The house is adorable in the most superb location! The view of the Parthenon is outstanding. The host, is so lovely and friendly, he made our holidays in Athens memorable!! Me and my partner recommended Elia apartment to all of our friends and family.

Awesome place to stay with a view of the acropolis really close to lots of great restaurants and shops in Plaka price was reasonable. Very clean super nice owner and family they leave a few drinks and snacks for you in the refrigerator. ACs work great so good on those hot summer days. Nice balcony. I would go back there again

My husband and I came here for our honeymoon and were pleasantly welcomed by the owner of the hotel. The rooms were clean, neat, and a perfect location for the inner city of Athens. Staff was polite, professional, and helpful with any questions that we had. What a wonderful stay we had, we wish we could have stayed longer!

My wife and I were traveling with our three young boys (ages 10, 7, and 2) to Europe this summer, and were planning to stay in Athens for two nights both at the beginning and end of our trip.  This was our first trip overseas with our boys, and we were looking to find a place to stay that had a bit more room to spread out than your typical hotel room.  We booked the suite at 2Mazi through Expedia, and we could not have been more delighted with our experience.   First, the location was ideal - a five minute walk to many of the highlights of Athens, including the Acropolis (and its museum), shopping and dining in the Plaka area, the Temple of Zeus, and the Panathenaic stadium.  The entire area of the Plaka is very walkable, and has many dining and shopping options.  Second, the suite itself is gorgeous, and is even bigger than the pictures suggest.  With two large bedrooms, a sitting area, and an oversized bathroom, our family had more than enough room.  The property looked recently renovated, with impeccable finishings and modern fixtures.  The bathroom, in particular, was spotlessly clean and well-appointed.  Third, the service was exceptional.  Rania, Leo, Vasilli, and the owner himself all went above and beyond to make sure our stay was comfortable and memorable.  They even procured a pack-and-play for our 2-year-old to sleep in!  Finally, if you stay here you must have dinner one night at the 2Mazi restaurant next door - their Greek salad is the best in Athens.

We had a pleasant stay in 2 mazi suites. In the heart of the historical city center of Athens, Plaka, the suites offer an excellent and luxurious accommodation. The interior of the suits was fantastic with their detailed ornament ceilings and large windows with a garden view.  A few minutes walk from Acropolis and the new museum, bars & restaurants of Athens is a very well located accommodation. The restaurant on the ground floor of the suits was a pleasant surprise. We had an unforgettable breakfast every morning and gastronomical dishes to close our day. We could not be more satisfied with our staying at 2 mazi suites!

What a gem!  This hotel lives up to its ratings and pictures (I literally don’t need to post pics). This is our second time in Athens and I absolutely love the presidential suite at 2Maz!! If you appreciate the architecture of homes that are 100+years old with  modern decor then this is the place for you! It is impeccably kept, roomy, and conveniently located near cool restaurants, shops and major attractions. We are a family of four and 2Mazi was more than perfect for us! This suite can accommodate way more than four people. Leo (manager) is so great! He and all of the staff are friendly and helpful. Bottom line it’s a 10/10 for me. I highly recommend 2Mazi Presidential Suite if you are looking to have a small group or family vacation in central Athens!

We recently reserved a suite in this hotel through Booking.com and paid the total amount at the time of reservation. When we arrived, the place was completely empty, and no one received us even though we had prearranged an arrival time. We received physical keys to 3 different doors, which did not allow us to leave and return without the help of another person.

The hotel was full of dust and neglected, and we had to leave after an hour and a half. The manager admitted that they only clean the curtains once every six months. The air conditioners were not clean, and the air was full of dust. The dust affected us immediately. The host refused to cancel our reservation and charged us the total amount.
Cosy apartment at 9 min of monastiraki square

A very beautiful apartment in a special location in the middle of the Plaka neighborhood that can accommodate four people. It contains a master bedroom with a double bed, a bedroom with two beds, a large hall with a dining table for four people, and a small kitchen open to the hall. On the upper floor there is a very large patio overlooking the entire neighborhood.
Smoking is not allowed inside the apartment.
The apartment key is located in a small box at the entrance to the apartment, which is opened with a secret number and the number changes after each guest
Great, perfect, right in the center

The room was clean, great location! We walked 10 minutes to the acropolis and museum. The rooftop bar has center view of the acropolis and spectacular at night! The breakfast was good. The front desk was very helpful booking transportation for us for the airport. Restaurants are all close by as well no car needed. The price was very reasonable.

The Hotel Adonis Athens was recommended to me by a friend and It was just fabulous. It is in a quiet street just two minutes walk from beautiful restaurants and shopping and walking distance to the Acropolis and other attractions.   From the moment we arrived we were made to feel so welcome and the staff were all amazing and so helpful, even organising our taxis for us.  The room we booked was wonderful with a large balcony and view of the Acropolis. It was spotless clean and lovely bathroom.  There is a lovely bar open in the evening overlooking the Acropolis which is lovely and the breakfast had a good selection of food, served in the same area overlooking the Acropolis.  I would most definitely come back to this hotel again and recommend it.

we enjoyed our stay at this hotel, as the location was excellent, and the room was comfortable and had everything we needed. The air conditioning was very effective.  Quite a bit of sound is transmitted through the hallway and open stairs, but we generally slept relatively well, except when someone had an early flight.  Breakfast from the roof terrace was outstanding.
The staff were great and the location is very near shops, food, and the Acropolis, which the hotel roof dining area provided a great view. The hotel worked out perfectly! Rooms are small but clean.

Very clean hotel located in Plaka situated close  to attractions and great restaurants.  The breakfast was great and the staff, very polite and helpful. Our room was small, but all we needed, very quiet  with comfortable bed. Oh!  And the view  of the Acropolis, from the roof, where breakfast was served, was amazing! I’d  stay here again and recommend it to others! Thanks, Rick Steves,  for the recommendation!
excellent view, spacious & fully equipped apartments, very clean, quiet, no need to check for other........
Gorgeous apartment. Incredible location. Highly recommended

Host is amazing! Responsive, helpful and generous. He left us water and fresh fruit in the fridge, snacks and coffee pods on the counter. The apartment is located in the main area of Plaka, clean and spacious with a balcony and view of the Acropolis
Great apartment, newly renovated and v clean. Fantastic location and service. Only lament is there is a washer but no dryer
Great place, nice people

Mega nice accommodation in the center (Plaka). 3 bedrooms each with a bathroom and toilet, so no waiting in front of the bathroom. Huge large kitchen-living room with couch, dining area,... very quiet in the evenings, just perfect
Our apartment was very clean and modernly decorated. Everything we needed was available. The location was very good. It was within walking distance to everywhere.
Great location. Spacious, there is a balcony. Clean and comfortable. There is everything you need (only slippers are missing) Friendly staff.

place_name: UPSTREET Central Cozy Apartments in Plaka
review_text: The location of Nikis 33 was nice but that's it. We got robbed in our apartment, made to feel that we didn't know how to close the door. One afternoon coming back to the place, we felt that someone had gone through our belongings. The fridge was turned off, that was our clue. The apartment was dusty, little cockroaches would appear in kitchen. The light fixture was thick with dust. Not even cleaned up for the next traveller.  The word cozy is not what I would describe it as. Lots of people hang around the main front door (on street level) The company didn't care about our robbery. We did inform the police, took statements. The email communication was generic sort of like robot generated. Did inform our neighbours to watch their belongings and surroundings.  Not a nice experience.

place_name: UPSTREET Central Cozy Apartments in Plaka
review_text: Would not recommend this place as an vacation rental/airbnb. We stayed in room ATH001 (4th floor, D1). It was dirty, dark and pretty sure there was black mold in the bathroom. The pictures are not an accurate representation. I appreciated the location as it is within walking distance to shops and restaurants and having a washer/dryer was very convenient, but it does not make up for the poor condition of the room.

place_name: UPSTREET Central Cozy Apartments in Plaka
review_text: A perfect location, sunny, spacious apartment. Owners flexible as for checkin or checkout time, if possible. Good VFM.

place_name: UPSTREET Central Cozy Apartments in Plaka
review_text: We had an excellent experience in the apartment with all the necessary amenities and of course in the center of Athens! 😊

place_name: UPSTREET Central Cozy Apartments in Plaka
review_text: Excellent service and wonderful apartments, highly recommend!

Fantastic location, close to the Acropolis and other Athens sites.
Breakfast was OK, the same each day but we only had 3 so no problem. Our room was 301 with no view, just a wall 3 metres away and next to the lift, although that didn't seem to be used much so no noise issues.
Staff were friendly and assisted with ordering a taxi for our transfer to the port
Would recommend for a cheap stay in a great location

Just the place. If you are looking for a hotel close to all the history and places to eat.
Staff were friendly and helpful.
Found out it was our anniversary and gave us a bottle of nice vine to enjoy.
Can not say enough nice things about them.

This hotel is great all around it near the acropolis it has great food and it’s very very clean.i liked the stuff there they where very nice and helpful also the view is nice for there.i would definitely recommend this hotel if you are looking of a nice and affordable place to stay in Greece 10/10

If you're looking for a clean and affordable place to stay close to the Acropolis, I think this is the hotel for you. It is clean, close to everything and covers all your needs at an affordable price.
Location is great, near to Acropolis. The price is quite price as for 2 star hotel, but the staff is very friendly and helpful.
Stayed for 5 nights first part of our holiday in Athens. Going back.  Third time we have stayed here in 26yrs.3rd generation owner friendly staff.  Great breakfast and very clean comfy rooms.

The Acropolis House is very well located, with shops, supermarkets and tourist attractions only a few meters away. Its staff is very welcoming, the breakfast was very good too. The family room ok for a couple of nights!

Very old and not renovated at all. Didn't even have a bottle of water in the room and very noisy at night and also in the morning since floor is wooden and it makes noise when you walk. Great location though.
Great staff and great location. Loved our stay. Very clean otherwise.  Rooms could be a bit bigger but understandable since it's an old building. Loved the antique feeling inside.
Location is amazing, next to everything, the service is very friendly and the rooms are okay :) we can’t ask more

Our family of four stayed here only for one night before heading back to NY. We wish we could’ve stayed for at least two nights as the city of Athens had much to offer. This hotel was in a great location in Plaka, within walking distance to major center city attractions. While it doesn’t have the grand lobby of other chain hotels, it was very comfortable, modern, and accessible. We stayed in a two bedroom family room, which was perfect. Rooms were clean, spacious enough, and we had two bathrooms, which is always key. I was pleasantly surprised and would stay here again. Staff was wonderful and check in was a cinch. Highly recommended and would have rated this higher than a 3 star hotel considering we were coming from two 5 star hotels.

We had an amazing stay at Urban Frame in Plaka. We arrived super early but Eleutheria at the front desk did an incredible job making us comfortable before our room was ready. Immediately, we knew it was going to be a wonderful, homey environment. Can’t beat the location, rooms were a bit small but was perfectly fine for a few nights. We stayed in two different rooms as we stayed two nights in the beginning of our trip, then one at the end, the first was front facing with a balcony and we loved it (just wished it had some chairs outside as the room next door did but we didn’t) but the second one was in the back of the building and was hot as some other comments mentioned. We let it be as it was only one night and air flow was less on that side of the building versus the other. Overall, we loved it here, we actually got engaged in this hotel so it’s super special and we will definitely be returning next time we’re in Athens :)

We stayed here recently. The hotel is in a fantastic location and is easy to walk to nearly everything we needed to do. The hotel was also clean and the bathrooms were modern. The service was excellent - hotel staff were friendly.

The negatives here is that it’s so noisy outside that it’s nearly impossible to sleep. For a hotel that really is just meant to be a place to sleep and shower, this was a huge drawback. The hotel could have thicker windows or white noise machines. Also, our main blanket had a big stain on it so we slept with only sheets the first night until we asked for a new blanket. Lastly, the breakfast wasn’t the best. It felt a bit off to me that milk and Greek yogurt were left out at room temperature with nothing to keep them cold.

Overall, not a bad place to stay on a budget and in walking distance but expect to bring earbuds, walk to find breakfast, and check your blankets.

Rooms are great,  clean  very nicely appointed..
Good bath room.  The  street site is  noisy.
Breakfast could be better.  The big coffee not good.

Lovely little motel located in the Plaka area of Athens.   Rooms comfortable but only place to sit is on bed - no room for a chair.  But bedwas quite comfortable.   Only complaint is the small elevator and how close the stairs are to the elevator.   The landing by the elevator is quite small with the stairs right there.  Not a lot of room to maneuver luggage safely.   But would stay there again.   Central location to a lot of things.

Our stay at the property was exceptional in every way. The attention to detail and outstanding service provided by Ioanna truly elevated our experience. From the beautifully appointed rooms to the top-notch amenities, every aspect of our stay was flawless.

We had a great stay in the Rodi Boutique Apartment. Was an excellent spot as we transited through Athens heading to one of the islands. We enjoyed walking around the local area. Nikos, our host, was welcoming and friendly. He was incredibly helpful, organising all of our transfers to/from the port and airport. It helped make the trip easy and straightforward. Would definitely recommend a stay here.

Great, clean and comfortable accommodation. Excellent location for restaurants and walking accessibility to tourist sights. Easy walking distance to public transport. Great host who gave us maps and recommended places to visit. He also organised airport taxis and tided us over with tea and coffee and milk and water.

The room was large, clean, beautifully decorated and comfortable.  Location was great, it was in a quiet spot but just a short walk away from the busier areas of Plaka, and walking distance to all the major sites. This place was a great value, we would highly recommend staying here.  The staff was friendly and very helpful.

Really beautiful suites that are impeccably clean. We had the basement apartment and although it was in the basement, it didn’t feel like it. Super nice owners (Chris) and the location is superb!
Only thing might be that you cannot really leave the windows open at night because there is too much noise and light outside. But once you close them, it’s super quiet!

Absolutely horrific and revolting hotel - they falsely advertise a range of room amenities that are not provided including washing machine, bathroom facilities, soundproofing and more. The television did not work, there are no views, it is extremely noisy at night well past midnight so you have no business of sleeping. Beds are like concrete, the rooms smell and are not cleaned well.
Worst of all are the staff - they are aggressive, rude and refuse to acknowledge problems with the hotel.
PLEASE don't stay here.

Not the type to leave reviews good or bad. But I felt compelled to leave one on this establishment after I booked a room for my mother and her husband months ago. Fast forward to today. They traveled 10+ hrs from the US. The hotel canceled their reservation without any notice. Blamed it on expedia(which was a lie). They never offered a refund or a different room. Instead their solution was to leave my mom stranded on the streets of a foreign country. Thankfully expedia was able to book them a different hotel and covered the cost.

Do not book here, it is a scam. Hotel denied our reservation and turned us away stating they were overbooked even though I booked this hotel 4 months in advance of our trip. They blamed Expedia and stated that they cancelled our reservation on Expedia and we should have known, they did not, and I was still charged 2 nights for this place and still had to find a different hotel that same day.

Nice place to stay in Athens, in the center and next to all touristic sites. Near a place with lots of restaurants but however, was still quiet and no issue with noise during our stay (it is in the center of a Capital! normal to have people ^^). The room is really modern and clean, with all commodities.
Staff is really nice and great ! Help us to bring our - very heavy ! - suitcases in the room. Breakfast very good in the restaurant just next to the room. A bottle of wine and bottles of water were waiting for us too in the room.
We will be happy to come back here if we ever visit Athens again.

Perfect location, nice staff and very clean and new room. Ours had a weird window that seemed shared with other room. But seems to be the only one.
Airco was strong enough. A bottle of wine and two bottles of water were waiting for us too.
The breakfast is very good, you can choose between 4 great dishes that come with coffee/tea and is served at the restaurant in the square.
Bed might be too hard for some, depending on personal taste but you can choose between harder and softer pillows.
All toiletries are there as well as a couple of towels and slippers per person.

Good value for money

Lovely little place in the heart of Athens.. I booked really late on the evening, but the host was really accommodating. she even helped me plan my next days trip to Delphi.

Self service breakfast was included in the extremely low price.. at the end of a few weeks traveling money is tight and this was such a lucky find 🙌
Was in Athens after a Mediterranean cruise and needed a place to stay for the night. It was perfect for a large group. There were nice beds, great courtyard, and a view of the Acropolis. I recommend.

The hostel is conveniently located in the center, it was reasonably clean.
The rooms were pretty small for 4 people. We actually booked a 3 person bedroom, which looked a lot more appealing, but we were given another dorm without notice or anyone to talk too, since staff was only there for check-out. Hostelworld and Google Maps Website says there is a possibility for luggage storage, but it was not available during our stay.
Doors in our dorm were very squeaky and loud, waking everyone up in the room as soon as someone enters or leaves. This was very annoying, since it seams easy to fix. Same can be said about the wooden bunk beds. They are very sketchy and shaky, seam to be for kids and are extremely noisy when making the slightest move. Not to mention the real fear of having the bed collapse during sleep (Im below 80kg ...).
Bathrooms were acceptably clean, but the only shower on our floor that you could lock was missing a curtain, so everything was constantly flooded. Its annoying and easily fixable issues like these that left a below average impression.

Good place to stay ata Athens. Very close to tourist place & public transport. Reasonable price with good facility. Receptionist also very nice & helpful, kuddos to Alex(one of staff here, very nice person & helpful). Will stay here again next time

thoroughly regrettable stay from start to end. Nadia at front desk was actively hostile, aggressive and racist. Took 5 minutes and tow calls just to open the front door, another 30 minutes and two more phone, several rounds of back and forth to complete check-in. At one point she tried to take the keys away from me. room did not feel safe, no personal locker in room, no fire extinguisher. Bathroom and shower, which is shared by the whole floor, are an afterthought: behind one locked door there is one toilet without a sink so can't even wash hands, and behind another locked door two connected showering cubicals which means only one can be used at a time. All sound - footsteps, chatting, doors - reverberate freely in the entire building. Beds do not have curtains for privacy. Did not bother with breakfast and promptly left the premise next morning.

Great hotel in the best tourist district of Athens- Plaka. Near the square with a lot of restaurants, tavernas, and coffee shops. There is also live music in the evening. The rooms are smaller than my expectations. The place is very clean. There are 3 floors without an elevator, in fact, there is, but service one. The staff is very helpful and friendly. I can't tell anything for the breakfast, because we don't go, even with the big time frame from 8 till 11. As you maybe know, Athens is a great party destination with a lot of drinks... Try it, you will like it!

I don’t understand  the negative reviews here. The hotel had a great value, the room was good, the location was excellent.acropolis metro station is 6 minutes far. The only slight issue was with getting in, where noone picked up when I called. Make sure to go to the ROH Restaurant nearby for help to get in

Don’t let the charming decor of the rooms and the great location fool you. You will undoubtedly receive better service elsewhere. Be prepared before you arrive and expect to wait around with your bags for several hours. We arrived at 7am with bags in tow and could not figure out where the front door of the hotel was. The hotel has a detached restaurant with the same name, and neither are very obviously a hotel entrance. The actual entrance is down the alley, with the green door. But this door is only accessible with a code, and there is no actual reception area, so don’t bother knocking. The “reception” is at the restaurant (I guess), but even though they say reception opens at 8am, the manager didn’t show up until after 10am. Thankfully, the restaurant opened at 8am and one of the waiters begrudgingly attempted to call the manager, who didn’t bother to answer. The waiter was also kind enough to store our bags in the restaurant basement for us, albeit with a sour look on his face at having to interrupt his morning work routine for us and another girl in the same predicament. I don’t blame him; I’d be pissed off too if the hotel manager left me to deal with his tired, confused and annoyed guests. After we finally were able to check in, the manager carried our bags up four flights of stairs for us, since there is no elevator. The room itself is great, spacious and decorated very cute with cheaply made furniture that gives it a falsely fancy feeling. The only downside to the room is that the mattress is hard as a rock. The room comes with a complimentary bottle of wine, free breakfast from 8-11, and 30% off other meals at their restaurant, although I never saw anyone else eat there during my stay. My final complaint is that they have three large goldfish sitting in a vase that is appallingly too small for the species, with no filter or enrichment. I would urge the management to do some research on proper goldfish care and upgrade these poor fish’s environment, as this is outright animal abuse and negligence. I would not return to this hotel for the goldfish alone.

The hotel tries to be fancier than it is with tacky decorations. Upon closer inspection, the shower leaked everywhere and didn’t drain properly, and the decor is weird and mismatched. We got the balcony room which was lovely, as is the location. The staff was nice enough but they overbooked for the second stay so we had to find another place last minute. This was extremely stressful and avoidable on the hotels part.

Absolutely horrific and revolting hotel - they falsely advertise a range of room amenities that are not provided including washing machine, bathroom facilities, soundproofing and more. The television did not work, there are no views, it is extremely noisy at night well past midnight so you have no business of sleeping. Beds are like concrete, the rooms smell and are not cleaned well.
Worst of all are the staff - they are aggressive, rude and refuse to acknowledge problems with the hotel.
PLEASE don't stay here.

We were in Athens for a few days and needed a conveniently located room near the great landmarks, airport and port. This worked out great and we did miles of walking to the Acropolis, many great restaurants and through miles of quaint, windy streets. Perfect spot!  The room was clean and comfortable, may not have been fancy but suited our needs. We would come back again!  We thank you and we very much enjoyed your city!
Modern pristine apartment in a quiet side street close to the Acropolis and good restaurants. Nice balcony, good wifi and lovely host - definite five stars.

I was very surprised at how easy it was to find and even better how close everything was
10/10. Highly recommend

great LOCATION
restaurants 30 meters from the apartment
Plaka district top of the top
10 minutes walk from the Acropolis!!!!
Nice apartment with air conditioning
Large apartment, very clean and equipped with every comfort. Excellent location within walking distance of the acropolis and the metro. Very kind staff

Great hotel! We really enjoyed our time here. Our room was large and the balcony was also a good size - it included 2 chairs and a table. The air conditioning worked well, thankfully, as it was very hot when we were there. The location was very convenient - plenty of nearby restaurants. We loved having a nice cocktail at the rooftop bar - beautiful views! Hotel staff were welcoming and very helpful. I highly recommend staying here!

We stayed 3 nights at New Hotel as we explored the city of Athens. It was a wonderful experience. The staff was friendly and helpful. The rooms were beautiful and very clean. I loved the decor of the hotel, the use of found pieces of furniture, cabinetry and wood on the walls was something that I had never seen before and it was so interesting and really pretty. The breakfast was wonderful and we had drinks on the rooftop bar overlooking the acropolis, a truly special experience. The location of the hotel was great for seeing the sights as well.

We have stayed at the New Hotel the last several years when we have been in Athens.  Convenient location with clean and comfortable rooms.  The staff is extremely friendly and accommodating.  We always sample the rooftop bar and they always have interesting concoctions.  Plan to come back next year

Fantastic experience at the best location walking distance to everything in Athens at a much better price point than the bougier options closer to Parliament. Staff was beyond accommodating - we stayed at beginning and end of our Greek trip, leaving some bags with the hotel, they were great with local info (needed a haircut and some car service to the airport - they came through with both on short notice), and the rooftop bar restaurant craft cocktails and food were great. Highly recommend!

I loved the design of this hotel. Our room had a great view and balcony. The breakfast was also very delicious. It’s very close to the acropolis and the surrounding area is very beautiful and fun to walk around. We had a great time!

Hotel is located in a quaint and quiet area of Athens within walking distance of the Acropolis and much more. There are many restaurants close by. We arrived before our rooms were ready, but they had a secure area that we could store our luggage so we could go and explore. Hotel itself was secure as well as you had to have a code to enter. Rooms were clean and spacious. Only complaint was in one of our rooms there was no hot water in the shower and one of their front desk personnel wasn't very friendly. Overall though, we would stay again.

The location is nice- in Plaka beside the acropolis and flea market. However, we had a bad experience, would not stay here again and would not recommend it. There are plenty of other decent 2/3 star hotels in the area
First, upon check in, we were told we would have to change rooms. We got 4 different explanations including there was something wrong with your current room, this is not the room you wanted, we are doing you a favour etc. When I sent a formal email to the hotel, I was told that someone at the hotel made a “mistake” and gave our “original” room to someone else and now we were just returning to it but had to wait for them to check out.
When we got to our “new room”, there was a bad smell like sewage from the bathroom. I told the gentleman at the helpdesk who just said “sorry” and I emailed management again- no reply this time. The smell was brutal before we ever used the bathroom and unbearable. Made it difficult to stay in the room.
We asked for a taxi pickup from the hotel to the airport at 3:20am. When we came down to check out, the gentleman at the desk said his colleague made a note of the request but didn’t actually do it! We ended up having to drag our bags out on the street at 3:30am (with my mother) to flag a taxi. Too many screw ups for a hotel that we paid decent money for.

Exactly as we expected. Location was perfect - close to everything we planned to visit. Children loved the National Garden which were really close.
Breakfast is small but also did the job before we went out to explore.
A trip to the terrace in the evening was a nice way to wind down.

On 23/05 we made a reservation through Booking, but we did not observe the date. At the same time we saw the error, we contacted Booking, as well as the person responsible for the hotel, informing them of what had happened.
To our surprise, the hotel charged us practically the daily rate, even though we explained the mistake, including offering to change it to the correct date, which was not possible.
It's a shame for a hotel that doesn't show solidarity with the customer and ends up getting paid twice if there was another reservation.
We even understand that a fine could be applied, but it is unreasonable for it to be a daily rate.
Due to the lack of understanding, as the person in charge informed us that we requested a late cancellation, which was not true, I do not recommend the hotel.
Lack of empathy, understanding and common sense on the part of the hotel.

EXCELLENT LOCATION!!! My husband and I have stayed at the Adam's Hotel twice. We arrived early in the morning. We were able to set the luggage aside until the room was ready. Staff we polite. Rooms are small yet comfortable with a balcony (keep in mind it is a historic area). The terrace view is beautiful, especially at night of the Acropolis. Location is a quick short walk to many shops and restaurants. They sell hop-on hop-off bus tour tickets, which take a full tour of Greece main attractions. Highly recommended staying at the Adam's Hotel it was a hidden gem!!

place_name: Plaka, Center of all Greek Legends
review_text: Located right at the foot of the Acropolis hill in Athens, the charming neighborhood of Pláka is a must-visit. It’s a great place to find souvenirs, even though the prices can be quite high. The narrow alleys are lined with many cozy eateries. The pastel-colored walls of the houses and the play of light and shadow offer plenty of photo opportunities.

place_name: Plaka, Center of all Greek Legends
review_text: A must visit when in Athene, a beautiful old neighborhood with a lot of ancient flair. The small restaurants and souvenir shops are cute and people are overall very friendly. Highly recommend going

place_name: Plaka, Center of all Greek Legends
review_text: Plaka in Athens is such a lovely place. The charming streets, vibrant atmosphere, and historic surroundings make it a delightful area to explore. With its picturesque alleys, traditional tavernas, and unique shops, Plaka captures the essence of old Athens and offers a memorable experience. The live music added to the ambiance, enhancing the overall experience with its enchanting melodies.

place_name: Plaka, Center of all Greek Legends
review_text: It's one of the best places you can visit in Greece! You can feel the energy the good energy all around. There are so many places you can buy souvenirs and other things whatever you need there are plenty of places to go for coffee and drink and to have a nice dinner. Plaka has it all! Must visit one of the rooftop coffee shops and bars! The view is amazing and breathtaking!

place_name: Plaka, Center of all Greek Legends
review_text:
Súper tourist place! Full of restaurants and places to buy souvenirs
Very clean

My three-week stay at Waylink Apartments in Athens was amazing. From the moment I arrived, I knew I had chosen the perfect place. The location couldn't have been more convenient, with easy access to all the major tourist attractions and some of the best restaurants in the city. As soon as I stepped into the apartment, I was greeted by a sense of warmth and cleanliness that immediately made me feel at home. I can't wait to return to this vibrant city, and when I do, there's no doubt in my mind that I'll be staying at Waylink Apartments again.

Exceptional Service in Real Estate Management! Their team consistently went above and beyond, providing personalized and efficient service. Their attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction was evident in every interaction. Truly a top-notch experience for anyone needing professional property management!

Our stay here was amazing, the staff is incredible (Greek Hospitality is no myth!), the sights were amazing! From the time we landed to the time we left, Waylink did not miss a beat with any of our touch-points.
Had an amazing stay and got to experience so much of Athens! Will be back

The rooms are super clean and renovated! Everything you need for your stay is available! Housekeeping comes everyday.
The stuff is extremely helpful and polite, they arrange everything you need. The location is 10/10, in the center of Athens and everything you need is a few minutes away. We had a lovely stay, we’re definitely staying here again. Strongly recommend !

Amazing cozy hotel for the first leg of our honeymoon! Perfect location centrally located to historical and cultural activities; we stayed for two nights and walked everywhere. Staff was incredibly friendly and helpful - if we find ourselves in Athens again we will come back for sure! We were so pleasantly surprised by the spacious balcony, it was perfect for sipping espresso!

Niki Athens was a wonderful introduction to Greece for me and my husband’s honeymoon. The front desk attendants are very nice and gave us all the details we needed for our stay at their hotel. The price point is great, we stayed in a typical room with a king bed and it was much more affordable than those on the nearby islands. The room is equipped with vegan toiletries and we even had a tray of pound cakes waiting for us when we arrived. The rooms are very cozy but felt perfect for just the two of us.
The hotel is cozy all around, it feels personal with a turn key and much smaller number of rooms than a traditional American hotel.
We chose this hotel specifically because we wanted to have the safety net of a vegan restaurant attached to the hotel. Unfortunately, the restaurant is not open on Mondays and Tuesdays, which was a majority of our stay, but we were delighted that next door is a vegan bakery, and across the street there is a vegetarian restaurant next door to a health food store, which offered food security (although we didn’t need it! Athens has soooo many vegan options! I was never worried about finding my next meal!)
Not only is food easily walkable, but we felt very lucky to have chosen a hotel so close to literally everything we wanted to see! The acropolis museum was maybe a 20 minute walk, restaurants we were interested in trying were never more than 15 minutes away by foot, and a taxi is always close by for the longer excursions.
When we finally got to try the restaurant, it was delicious!!!
The housekeeping staff is very pleasant and detail oriented, our room was perfect every afternoon when we came back from exploring.
Niki Athens was extremely good to us when we asked for anything. We are happy with our stay and will absolutely stay again when we come back!

This hotel was a treasure.  We booked the family loft on floors 5 and 6.  The second floor balcony had a beautiful view of the Acropolis.  The air conditioning was great and cooled the room well.  One oddity compared to US hotels: the elevator was very small and hot, but not a reason to pick a different hotel.  The location was a few blocks from restaurants and shops.  I would stay here again.

We stayed for 4 days.
The place needs a serious renovation.
Room furniture and floor full of dust.
The floor was never cleaned during our stay.
The bathroom was ok in terms hygiene and cleaning. The bed was comfortable.
The location is very good, close to Syntagma Square and the city center.
Not a hotel i would visit again though.

I had the pleasure of staying at the Electra Palace Hotel in Athens for nearly a week, and I can’t recommend it enough! The hotel’s location is absolutely fantastic – both from my room and the rooftop restaurant, I had breathtaking views of the Acropolis, making every morning and evening unforgettable.

I was particularly impressed with the outstanding service. The staff were always friendly, professional, and incredibly attentive, which made the stay even more enjoyable. A special thanks to the concierge, who provided excellent tips and was always helpful in making sure I experienced the best of the city.

For those driving, the parking in the city center is a huge advantage. In Athens, this is not something you find easily, and the hotel made it super convenient to explore the city without any hassle.

Overall, it was a wonderful stay at an excellent hotel – I’ll definitely be back!”

I stayed at this property two different times for my trip.  The first time we found the rooms to not be very clean but we were exhausted and only here one night so we opted to just not make a big deal about it.  After traveling around the islands we came back for our last night.  The rooms were the same. NASTY! This time we complained.  The front desk acted like they didn't believe me.  I offered to go up and show them what I was talking about but no one seemed to care.  Instead they send housekeeping up to look around.  They also told me they arranged a transfer to the airport in the morning.  When we got down to check out no one arranged anything.  Pitiful customer service.  Would never stay here again.  I would however come eat at the rooftop restaurant. It is good. One last note. Since the ac only runs with the room key it took until 1am for the room to be cool.

Great place to go for a late night after drink. After having dinner downtown, we decided to walk up to the rooftop bar and check it out. The view was so awesome. We decided to stay for a nightcap. My wife had the port and I had the Blantons old-fashioned. Beautiful evening nice breeze great company. Highly recommend if you have a chance to go by.

This hotel has excellent location in the down town of Athens, close to all the shopping areas, historic places and restaurants. It has a beautiful roof top restaurant with views to Acropolis and very good quality food. I highly recommend this hotel for your stay in Athens.

We had dinner at the roof restaurant of the hotel. The food was exceptional the service was impecable and most importantly Lazaros our server was the best! Always with a smile he was so patient and suggested the best food and wine. Really made our evening!!! Thank you. We will definitely come back.

Stay away!
Beside the good location, everything is bad.
The room is only suitable for a couple.  Pay attention in the pictures, we got beds that even in a summer camp children gets better. Of course it was never mentinoned. We all have back pain.  Moreover,  the shower isnt clean and old.
We did not receive sheets for the baby bed.  The owner of the place is really not nice!
I would never recommend this place.

Please pay attention to the CHECK-IN time!!!I arrived at the apartment after 12 am, rang the doorbell no response, phone is useless, I guess it is not working hours. So on the first night in Athens, with nowhere to go, I emailed and learned that the apartment refused to cancel the reservation. A very sad and disappointing trip to Greece. On the side of the road very scared, but also by the passing car people water, really terrible😱😱😱😱 Unfortunately I lost 155 euros and felt hopeless on the streets of Athens in the middle of the night, an experience I will never forget😭

Very spacious appartment . Biggest room possible.
The owner was very accomodating
Great large room for 5. Walk to Acropolis. Good prices
Fantastic location!!!

Rooms are very spacious, comfortable, and well designed.  We had a courtyard facing room and it was really quiet.  Staff are super friendly and the breakfast offers a broad arrange of choices and everything I tried was delicious!  Location is central and a short walk to all the attractions.

It was a big impressive that the staff came out and helped my luggage when I was off from taxi. It was pretty late -around 10:00pm and he was very gentle guy.

We”ve got the ground room which is 1st floor technically but I felt the room was located in the basement.  I could not sleep until 4:00 am due to the bright light from outside.

The staff who helped our printing was very knowledgeable and outstanding around 11:00pm.

The staff for serving breakfast was very superior. The guy explained very well with smile and served the perfect coffee in the morning.

What a great hotel! I’ve stayed twice before in Athens (including at one of the “best” hotels in the city) and INNATHENS has both of those hotels beat on service, modern style, location, and all around experience. The staff here is very well trained. They are very friendly and have an innate understanding of the needs of travelers. I was met immediately at check in with a glass of water and a delicious chocolate brownie. The hotel is modern and a unique approach to using a historic building to maximum effect. There’s a good balance between quality and efficiency. The included breakfast was very good and easy. The room was modern and nicely appointed without being fancy. The location is excellent. Very easily walkable to everything in the heart while being out of the way of the hustle and bustle. There’s a reason this hotel gets great reviews. It’s just that good! Now I’m just afraid it’s going to be so popular that I won’t be able to get a room the next time I come to Athens. A gem!

The Inn Hotel was the best way to end our European Vacation.
We had a party of 8 in two different rooms and the hotel staff was so amazing to us. Please see the names of each and every staff member that made our vacation unforgettable with their kindness, service and help to answer all of our questions and requests.
We were first greeted by a lovely smile by Mary at the front desk. And then as we were taken to our room in the late morning by George, the bell boy. Alex, who was also wonderful, was another bell boy that helped us with our bags when we were leaving at the end of our stay.
After being greeted by Mary and George showing us to our room, we passed the bar/grill and were also welcomed by Joanna & Eleni, the waitresses. They also served us every morning with such bright smiles and happiness. We were having difficulty with the AC in our room, and Ilias, the very helpful Manager, immediately explained to me the way to use the AC and also inquired if I wanted a room change the next day if we weren't comfortable.
In the evening time, after a day of exploring and touring the city of Athens, we would come back to the hotel exhausted and we were welcomed with a big smile by Christina, the waitress at the bar and grill, who would also be working as our server for a fantastic dinner prepared by the chef (I didn't get the name).
This entire hotel is a hidden gem and my entire family loved the stay and were so comfortable and thrilled to have stayed. We look forward to visit again!!

This is an adorable hotel in a wonderful location. Super easy to get to from the train from the airport, took just a few minutes of walking, and central to walk on foot about town as well. We had an extra early ferry and the hotel boxed up breakfast baggies for us to take when we checked out since we would miss the provided breakfast. Staff was friendly and helpful and the wine bar looked lovely attached. Room was clean and comfortable!
Comfortable and clean space with beautiful decoration!!! The location is incredible!!! In 1 minute walking you are on Ermou Street and the Acropolis!!!

Would definitely recommend this apartment as not only was it spotlessly clean and with a beautiful modern aesthetic to it, but it’s location couldn’t be better. A breath away from Syntagma square and station which connects all of Athens without having to change lines any lines. We also enjoyed the buzz worthy neighbourhood filled with great restaurants, whether local or international cuisine and the most unique little stores
Hot water and clean towels

Good location, spacious apartment and all the comforts of a home. Near Syntagma metro.

They let us enter earlier (be careful, there is no place to leave suitcases if you arrive early, it's lucky. In this case, 2 blocks away there is a place to leave your suitcases)

The bed is not in good condition… we slept poorly and in fact it seemed like there was a broken spring, it hurt my wife all night.

There was no bedding for 4 people… in fact, 2 people must sleep on the couch that is not a couch bed. Anyway, my children indicated that they slept well.

It has a capsule coffee machine, refrigerator and other amenities in the kitchen.

A comfortable and very well located apartment. You can quickly reach the most beautiful places in the city.
Easy to access near Syntagma..

place_name: Super Stylish Apartments in Syntagma Square!
review_text: It exceeded all my expectations. First and foremost, the location of the apartment was superb. Situated in the heart of Athens, walking distance to Acropolis, Plaka. Airport bus stop is just 3 min walk. The apartment itself was nothing short of fantastic. Sleek design, clean, spacious bathroom, kitchen equipped with everything we need. We were early when we arrived, the host quickly cleaned up the apartment (as someone just checked out) and let us check in early. Additionally I'd like to highlight the extraordinary assistance provided by the host, Elena. I absentmindedly left behind my pouch (containing ID, bank cards, $100 British pound) in the apartment upon check out. She diligently packaged it and arranged for courier delivery to Singapore, my current location. The host's swift action, coupled with their willingness to assist even after my departure, truly impressed me. I am immensely grateful for their efforts and cannot recommend this apartment highly enough.

place_name: Super Stylish Apartments in Syntagma Square!
review_text: The apartment is more than amazing, with a thought in every single detail. It's sparkling clean, cozy, fully equipped and really stylish. The location is more than perfect - close to everything. The owner Elena is really nice and helpful, gives advice how to spend time in Athens, recommends restaurants, bars and beaches. She helped us with everything that she could and we are very thankful to this wonderful person. Thank you very much for everything Elena! We spent amazing week and we recommend Super Stylish Apartments in Syntagma Square as a perfect place to stay in the heart of Athens.

place_name: Super Stylish Apartments in Syntagma Square!
review_text: We recently spent a week in the Super Stylish Apartments in Syntagma Square, Athens. The lodging was excellent. Very clean, comfortable, kitchenette, spotless bathroom. The location was perfect and the staff was extraordinarily kind and helpful. Highly recommended!

place_name: Super Stylish Apartments in Syntagma Square!
review_text:
A real gem!
SSA ticks all the boxes.
The apartment is clean, practical, quiet, very reasonably priced and its location could not be more central. Walking distance to most of Athens's landmarks and surrounded by an amazing array of restaurants and bars.
The host is welcoming and very helpful.

place_name: Super Stylish Apartments in Syntagma Square!
review_text: We had a fantastic weekend in this lovely, confortable and tidy apartment 2 years ago and now we are here again! We have another room and we comfirm the previous experience. Very close to the city centre, easy connection with the airport. Elena is the best owner you could find!
Best city hotel in Athens! Great rooftop with acropolis view and a great atrium space on the ground floor to enjoy your coffee! Highly recommended

This was a great place to stay and the location is unbeatable! They were able to set up an airport departure transfer as well who was right on time. I highly recommend staying here if you’re in need of a convenient and affordable spot for your visit!

Rooms tend to be on the low side. Basic accommodation (depends also what room you booked). The location is perfect, near Pagrati, in walking distance for all tavernas and attractions in Athens. The street is very quiet, no noise from the main avenue. I think the rooms and the beds might need a refresh but in the end is not a bid deal breaker

We stayed 4days and 3nights on Pi Athens they were very kindfull and interested with us. Sokratis helped us for shuttle he adviced some good restaurants and gave us maps of athens etc. They have pretty basic breakfast. Rooms very clean and usefull not too big but enough for tourists. Hotel near to everywhere we visited all archeological sites by walking we are impressed and leave very happy thank you for everything from Cyprus.
Poor  hotel, from the room on 1st floor there wasn´t any direct daylight. Breakfast was in the basement and  very simpel. One thing was top and that's the location.

Great location, near shopping and touristic areas. The service is exceptional, professional and efficient. We found the room to be a bit small but it was comfortable, quiet and modern. The roof top restaurant with a view on the acropolis was excellent. They accommodated to our needs and the staff was very helpful. This helps relax and take in the atmosphere of Athens.

We are currently staying at the Amalia Hotel in Athens Greece. This hotel is wonderful. All the staff have been so helpful and nice. Location is in the Plaka neighborhood. So close to the best shopping area and historic sites. The Whisper rooftop restaurant bar has great prices, view of the Acropolis and staff. Air conditioned, clean room and mini fridge. Great price! Don’t over look this one!

Perfect spot. Everything is close enough to walk to and if you need to spend some time in the evening and don’t know what to do the park right across the street is so nice.
The dinner here is so good, and the service as well.

Showers are very small🫠🫣

3 stars, definitely not 4.
I don't know if they have renovated rooms but mine was extremely outdated with old, stained carpets. Bed was a little worn down but not HORRIBLE.
Very convenient location to shops and restaurants. Right across a nice park

Such warm hospitality! One of the best experiences I’ve had with a hotel EVER. The location is very much central and the crew is initiative, friendly and caring. If you see Andreas you know you’re in good hands!
Great location!!!

They suggested it to me and I went. Flawless.  To be honest, I played with the house a bit because it's smart and I've never had such an experience before. Excellent location to do your business in Athens. Brand new, very clean with great taste.  Five stars from me because it doesn't have six.  I will definitely go again.

Awesome location!!!
Fantastic apartment!!!
Regarding the apartment, 5 stars is a bit much!!!
Unique smart functions!!!
Comfortable, clean, easy to use next to the historic Kallimarmaro (you can see it from the balcony of the house).
Just 3 minutes from the national garden and not even 8 minutes from Syntagma Square and the heart of Athens.
We will definitely visit again!

The best there is in Athens. It was recommended by my friend and the stay is a pleasure. All new with great taste. Comfortable for a couple even with a child. We loved it very much. I've been to quite a few on business and I'm not going anywhere else.  The smart functions are an unprecedented experience...unbelievable.  Highly recommended

Fantastic stay in an excellent 5 star apartment! It is located in the heart of Athens next to Kallimarmaro! Extremely comfortable for a couple with a child! Spotlessly clean, tasteful, decorated in a minimal line and without any shortage!! Bonus its smart function that loosens your hands!!
Great place to stay. Walking distance to Acropolis, major museums, and Plaka, with lots of restaurants and entertainment. Host very friendly and wants to make your stay enjoyable.

I have stayed with my wife for couple nights it was very nice and clean and very friendly and helpful stuff . The apartment is located in a convenient location with easy access to visit all the city attraction. Definitely recommend. :)
Great Place, wondertull neigborhood
Good, comfortable apartment in a very central location. Nice neighborhood, pedestrian streets, small restaurants, bars.

Very nice, clean and helpful staff.
I was looking for room on Booking but couldn’t find it so i didn’t know if it’s possible to get the room after 12am.
Try to change it please

Very cool hotel. We had a wonderful and sexy time. Use this hotel for what it is meant for, a sexy time with your partner, and you won't be disappointed. They have many theme rooms you can rent by a block of hours. The staff was very nice and helped us pick a room. We didn't do any sleeping here, but our time here was well spent and the atmosphere they create is delightful.

The Priamos Hotel is in easy walking distance to Kolonaki Square, several museums, Aristotle's Lyceum, and Syntagma.  Best of all is the quiet local charm away from the maddening crowd. The multilingual staff is friendly and helpful.  The lavish 70's Vegas Lounge decor grows on you and the pricing is unbeatable.
Crazy fun place to stay, don’t pick a room too close to the elevator if you want to stay the whole night. Room 69 is a blast and well equipped.

Very unique rooms. Staff is very friendly and always offers cold bottles of water. Free breakfast is very plentiful and really tasty. Rooms are very clean, my only complaint is the are a bit run down.

We were in Athens for 3 days.
Good things: The room is modern with good amount of space, small kitchen and sofa. The bed was very comfortable with enough pillows and bed sheet. The outside noise was negligible considering it is so close to square. Location at syntagma square was the best part (also few steps from X95 bus stop: see my review of X95 bus, if interested). The host was very responsive to messages.
Things that can be better: More detailed instructions (including pic of locker for outside key). Missing iron and locker. The corridor outside door was quite dark at night (lights not working). The lock where the outside door key is stored is located in very uncomfortable location (assumed that all are 6+ feet tall). It is hard to see the numbers at night (had to leave the key in room when checking out for this reason). It would have been great if they had helped with request (shared few days before) to check in by 12-1 (due to flight plans from US). There is no room service.

We spend 2 nights at Derouse suite and was extremely quiet at night. The room is exuded luxury. Big jacuzzi inside the room with bathbombs was nice experience. Also the apartment is at the center of Athens that means you don’t need to use taxi or underground metro, everything is near. Recommend it !!!

My fiancé and I had a wonderful stay. This room is situated in the best location right next to syntagma square. The room was brand new with all the amenities you need and best of all a jacuzzi. I would highly recommend staying here. The host Vasilis was a very good, genuine man and was available via phone whenever we needed.
Best experience with big jacuzzi inside the room. Near locations by the foot. Also minimalist and very clean room.  Quite at night. I recommend it for sure!!

We were very pleased with everything. The location of what you need for a three-day or more in the center of Athens, everything is at your feet. The room is spotlessly clean and fully renovated. As it is in the photos, so it is in reality (and even better) its price matches the services and quality!!! I definitely recommend it!!!!!

Is modern apartment is really nice and a great place to stay. They were able to give us the room early at noon instead of 3:00 p.m. And we're willing to hold on to our luggage and offered a late checkout at noon. The reception staff were incredibly friendly, attentive and helpful and even booked a taxi for us. This place is in a central location and very reasonably priced.

I would stay here again

Excellent in every way - highly recommend.
Location was great within easy walking distance of all main attractions.
Apartment was clean and spacious with an amazing terrace.
Amenities were good - shower was excellent but the kitchen lacked normal sized mugs.

I have taken one star off as when i asked for a transfer was quotes Eur 100 each way. I understand this may be beyond their control but as hosts, they could have told me it was a fixes taxy rate of Eur 40 from the taxi stand at the airport.

The rooms were pretty well maintained with adequate amenities for tourists who prefer to cook their own meals. The location of the apartment is absolutely in the city centre and at a short distance from the Acropolis. The area has a plethora of restaurants and Eating joints, all in the vicinity and within walking distance.
Everything about this place is perfection. Service, rooms and location. Modern and clean and the team there went beyond and above to accommodate our needs. Definitely coming back.

Modern. Clean. A comfortable apartment with a good balcony and a good view. Equipped with Kitchen items. Awesome shower. Near the center of Athens. Super close to the metro station and the tram. With stores, restaurants and cafes all around.
The service is remote and it's good. No service needed.
We were here with 2 kids and it's ok, but it's actually awesome for 1-2 people.
This apartment makes me want to stay much longer.
It's a nice area to visit only 40' distance from downtown

Loved this little hotel in the wall!! Don't expect luxury, but expect comfort, warm service, and the perfect location to explore Athens! All the kitties outside loved our leftover sardines, and the staff was so helpful with keeping our luggage safe while we ventured out before our next check-in! Definitely recommend ☺️

A small hotel in a very central location but still totally quiet as the street in front of the hotel is a pedestrian zone. The recepion personnel is extremely friendly and helpful. A breakfast is offered for 7€ which I can fully recommend - it must be ordered the day before.

Very friendly staff, 24hr reception and security cameras so felt very safe.  Rooms are basic but have AC. excellent value for money given the great location to the Stadium, the trolley bus stop is only 5 minutes walk and only 15 mins walk to downtown Athens.

The location and service was excellent. Especially the service! They were so kind and friendly.

Their policy for the rooms is that they hold the room keys when you are out of your room.

Unfortunately, the room we had was not very good... As shown in the pictures, their was no way to lock the door securely for it automatically locked when you closed it. Also the fridge nob had to be kept at a certain position, otherwise the freezer part leaked everywhere. The shower had no place to hold the shower head up high so you had to hold the shower head while washing yourself. And lastly, our AC unit leaked. We turned it on and an hour later while we were watching tv, it leaked, almost like water pouring out of a faucet, onto one of the beds. We went down to the desk asking about it and they had no idea why it was like that, and it was too late for a repairman, so they gave us a bucket for the night. They were very apologetic.

Even though the room was so bad, the service was so so nice. This was a difficult review to write.

Friendliness of the staff, always very open to help, excellent location, very safe, I was not afraid to walk at night as it is surrounded by many restaurants and embassies, 100% recommended, thank you very much for your attention, the only thing I would say is that the showers were very small and it was a little difficult to take a bath.

I stayed at this property for 3 days. It is a spotless modern aesthetic space in the center of Athens. I didn't even need a car for any of my commuting, which made it particularly convenient.  Would definitely visit again!!

The accommodation was excellent in many ways. First of all, it is very conveniently located and you don't need any means to reach your destination
Also, it was spotlessly clean and gave you a warmth and the service was amazing!!! I would definitely go again and I highly recommend it!!!!

place_name: LETO TRAVEL SERVICE - TΑΞΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΠΡΑΚΤΟΡΕΙΟ ΑΘΗΝΑ
review_text: Excellent staff and service! Definitely recommend

place_name: LETO TRAVEL SERVICE - TΑΞΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΠΡΑΚΤΟΡΕΙΟ ΑΘΗΝΑ
review_text: There is no zero to put. Unfortunately I confirm the comments about rude employees. I wish I had read them before I went to the trouble of visiting them. In fact, there are so many tourist agencies around here. If you don't want to spoil your mood, stay away

place_name: LETO TRAVEL SERVICE - TΑΞΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΠΡΑΚΤΟΡΕΙΟ ΑΘΗΝΑ
review_text:
Very professional and helpful.
I highly recommend them!

place_name: LETO TRAVEL SERVICE - TΑΞΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΠΡΑΚΤΟΡΕΙΟ ΑΘΗΝΑ
review_text: unfortunately there are no zero stars that the system allows me to put. rudest staff i have ever come across. the employee sitting in the background says the following top line: do you want me to come and take you by the hand to serve you? while I patiently waited my turn. i wanted to get a zero ticket fast ferries directed me to go to one of their partner agencies and one of them was LETO. in rudeness and irony and the "lady" sitting in the background says, "I'm listening", "will you talk" "or should I know for myself where you're going?", while the lady sitting in front appeared to be a normal person, then he started yelling and saying that they are doing me a favor by serving me, because they don't earn anything from the zero ticket and only when they make a profit do they serve customers. and not to step on my foot again. I am truly sorry for the staff you have chosen. they hurt you. and the Easter that I had gone before the lady in the background spoke to me again in a bad way and I chose yesterday not to go alone to witness the awful behavior. frankly shame.

place_name: LETO TRAVEL SERVICE - TΑΞΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΠΡΑΚΤΟΡΕΙΟ ΑΘΗΝΑ
review_text: Talk about incredible rudeness, I had to leave, while everyone else inside looked down in shame. If I hadn't had such a good time the night before I would have cursed the blonde who "worked" in there. Some people are better off not working with people.

Great spacious apartment on the 6th floor. Came with a small fridge, stove and sink. Modern and perfect location close to the Acropolis, hop on and off buses, shops, dining, flea market and metro station that goes directly to the airport. Two issues: we kept getting bitten by mosquitoes or something. My 6 year old had bites all over his face and hands. My husband and I were constantly itchy at night. Didn’t see bed bugs but not sure what was biting us. There were like a ton of gnats in the shower. Second, the bed was just a box spring with a sheet over it. It was very difficult for me to get comfortable on that bed especially being pregnant. I had to sleep on the couch with my son.

Perfect localisation, close to everywhere, metro to airport, most important buses. I would say it's best spot in Athens for vacation. However, WiFi was crap (max 90-100kbps), i tried to reconnect to another router (on front door), same result. Another drawback was noise from street even when closed window. Rest was fantastic. Great shower, a/c, exceptionally nice staff, some kitechware, wine glasses, corkscrew etc. We might come back in the future, this location was unbeatable:)

Perfect appartments with everything you need. Very quiet. And comfortable. The airconditions of some rooms need to be replaced as very old.but that was not a problem as when you set it to the lower speed you cannot hear them. Very friendly staff and secure. The building outside seems old as the entrance but when you get to the rooms you totally forgot your exterior. I recommend this place. I stayed there 2 times till now.

Absolutely, here's the revised feedback:

"We appreciated the convenient arrangement of collecting the apartment key at a nearby coffee shop. It made our check-in process seamless and allowed us to start our stay promptly. The apartment itself was clean and well-maintained, and its proximity to attractions, train stations, and restaurants made exploring the city incredibly convenient. The bathroom facilities also met our expectations. Overall, a comfortable and hassle-free experience."

The room was great and very clean. There was plenty of space for my husband and I and the hotel staff was so nice. They held our luggage since we arrived early and made sure we had everything we need. The location is set back on a street but once you figure out your way, you realize its close to everything. We really enjoyed our stay!

Astikon Xenofontos Suites was the home base of our Greece Travels. We stayed in Athens for a couple nights before traveling to the other islands and were pleased on returning to Astikon for our last night before traveling home. The rooms were simple, clean, and the location of the hotel was in walking distance to Plaka, Monstiraki, the Acropolis, Ancient Agora, Syntagma Square, etc. In addition, communicating with our host was super easy and our host was friendly and accommodating. It is a suite set-up so there is no traditional front desk; however, we were greeted warmly by our host upon arrival and were able to keep in touch with our host through messaging, as needed. Our host also provided us recommendations of places to go throughout the city. I could not be more pleased of our stay. Astikon was welcoming, clean, and conveniently located!

We stayed there for 4 nights and had a great time. The location is excellent, close to the pedestrian street, shops, plenty of cafes and restaurants, the Acropolis, Plaka and more. The rooms are modern, clean and pleasant, there are accessories such as a coffee machine, iron, safe and hair dryer, there is an available answer to every request we asked for, whether related to hospitality or not, we asked for help in places of entertainment, or transportation and we always received a quick answer and help. We will happily return again.

Super host super location near Acropolis.  I return next year for a next good visit in Atene. Room Nice and clean. Wi-Fi top. Indication through whatsapp  for the stay fast and precise. My english no good but i know ever.

Our stay at Astikon was great, very easily accessible from the metro.  It was about a 5-7 minute walk from the Syntagma square.  The room was very clean and very aesthetically pleasing. The amenities were great, we had basically everything we needed.  The only complaint would be the fold out couch the mattress was a bit thin and not exactly super comfortable, realistically I would say the room is better suited for 2 people instead of 3.  Our host was very welcoming and helpful, she provided us with lots of great recommendations.  I would definitely recommend Astikon for a 2 person stay

This exceeded my expectations, from the very first time you walk in the staff was very friendly and welcoming. The rooms are nice and clean. If you are looking for a place to stay in Athens that is central enough and good value, I would recommend checking it out!
Stellar location and view! Great local eats nearby, easy to walk to the major attractions (like Plaka area). Recieved great and very detailed recommendations from Paula/Billy! Would highly recommend.

Wow, wow, wow. What a VIEW. 😍 We stayed for four nights at Billy & Paula’s, the perfect base for exploring beautiful Athens. From the moment we booked we had proactive communication, Billy and Paula provided all the information we could ever need and were always on hand throughout the trip if we needed to know anything. The apartment was exactly as described, easy to get to and into, it is tiny but had absolutely everything we needed for our stay, we couldn’t have asked for anything better. It’s about 20-30 minute walk to the Acropolis, similar to Lycabettus (busy but beautiful for a sunset) and we even walked up to Kaisariani Monastery and further up to Taxiarchon Monastery from the apartment (perfect sunset view for those that like hiking from the lookout tower Pyrophylákio) but the balcony provided an equally as magnificent view. Watching the sun rise over the acropolis from the bed, what a privilege. Thank you for letting us stay and for being the bestest hosts! ✌️ ❤️
Paula is the best host I ever met. The view over Athens is incredible. The apartment was clean and the location is perfect.

The perfect spot to fall in love again in Athens!

The place is a unique spot in Athens, possibly the most unbelievable view you will ever have from the Parthenon and the sunset falling behind it. Small that’s a fact, but there is nothing else you need if you are looking forward to have an epic time in the city. All amenities are there for you to use, from place to cool to a tv for the movie nights. I would say the best in fact is the view from its unique balcony, the best spot to collect your thought, have an epic brunch with someone you love or just enjoy the landscape while having a hearing music.

Definitely will be back soon!

The best apartment to live in short term. Amazing view of Parthenon and really connected as it is located in the heart of Athens. I spent there a month doing home office in the balcony enjoying this view. Definitely i will be back soon.
Last but not least excellent hospitality!!!
Great location, highly recommended.
Clean and comfortable apartment, in a quiet area of ​​Athens. Close to Syntagma, Kallimarmaro and Evangelismos. I highly recommend it.
Tasteful, central, quiet, spotlessly clean!

Worst hotel we stayed in Greece! They don't care about cleaning at all. There was a lot of long dark hair in the drain of the shower, the sheets contained some yellow and orange spots, some things were broken and untidy. Awful!

Contactless entry at all times. You receive by email in the hours beforehand instructions on how to access the place. Clean room, clean shared kitchen (although we didn't use it)

The only downside is that there was a lot of noise in the room from the outside, it seems that the windows did not isolate the outside noise too much
Good

I stayed there for one night.
I wasn’t happy at all with the “automatic” check in which wasn’t automatic at all, since I had to call them 3 times to ask them to send me all the links so I could pay the 1.5 euro tax and to get the codes. It was very annoying and probably the worst self check in service I encountered so far.
But this was sorted relatively fast.
What wasn’t sorted at all was the AC in my room.
Although it worked, it didn’t have any real effect and couldn’t cool the room.
This is the last thing you want in late August in Athens. The room was very hot until 9pm and the AC was completely useless.
This is something that needs to be checked and fixed before guests check in, but no one bothered.
Luckily at night the room cooled down a bit, otherwise I would’ve asked for a refund.
I don’t recommend this place, mostly due to the low service level.

I stayed here for one night. the room was basic with horrible sewage smell, no facilities at all- even not a toilet paper. view was awful.  Location is very convenient, close to Syntagma square, Ermou street and Monastiraki- all of them are on walking distance.  also, easy check-in without keys and etc.

The room was perfectly clean. The mattress should be changed. The black out curtain was broken and I'd asked them to repair which was promised and not done. Hair-dryer was not working and the bathroom door could only be opened 90° degrees. Kitchen and common areas were very nice.
great location, clean room - even thou wasnt like on the pictures. we slept terribly due to the street noise and the window not closing properly, plus moskito bites!

The location is perfect, 5 min from metro that brings you to the airport in 45 min.

Also ease of access as you get in with a code so you can get in whenever you want without having to meet someone in between.

However important to know that the room we were in, the windows were completely ducked, and we could basically hear things people down the road. If you're sensitive to noise, you better not choose this (though it is slightly mitigated by the fact that it is not located on the central road but a side street.)

Owners, changing your Windows is a must please.

Overall great choice, would choose again, especially since the price was one of the lowest when we picked it up
Perfect location in the center of the town. Every year I stay here. Nice breakfast including also salmon. Clean rooms, friendly staff.
A bit small room. The staff at the reception was very slow and finally as soon as you enter the building it says that there is free WiFi but in the end it needs a code!!!
The best value for money accommodation in the center of Athens. The location is ideal, the rooms are spotlessly clean and there is very good soundproofing.

place_name: Cozy and comfortable apartment in Athens Center
review_text: Very well located on a quiet area. We’re a family of five with older kids (16+) and walked to all main sights in Athens. Check in with Maria was good and didn’t need to call her for anything. Everything was in good order and as per the booking. I’ll stay here again when in Athens.

place_name: Cozy and comfortable apartment in Athens Center
review_text: The place is really great. The host is very accommodating. The location is its main selling point. 10min walk from the metro. Walking distance from all the important places to visit in athens. And very good local restaurants nearby

place_name: Cozy and comfortable apartment in Athens Center
review_text: Nice place close to the city center. Really friendly owners.

place_name: Cozy and comfortable apartment in Athens Center
review_text: Excellent stay near the center of Athens. Excellent cleanliness!!

place_name: Cozy and comfortable apartment in Athens Center
review_text: Central clean and functional apartment!!! Communicative polite and trustworthy hosts!!!

place_name: Art In Athens - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Spacy and wonderfull apartment next to all you need for a lovely vacation in Athen. We‘ve been for a four day trip in this apartment with two families - seven person. Totally recommendation.

place_name: Art In Athens - My Greek Vacations
review_text: A beautiful apartment, well maintained, spacious and clean.

place_name: Art In Athens - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Great place for big familly or group od friends 20 minutes from downtown. We was here (5 adults 2 teenagers 1 Chile) for 3 nights and have everething to live.

place_name: Art In Athens - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Best place to stay. Clean and beautiful

The apartment was in a great location. Beautifully decorated with everything I needed. The building is clean with a great gym.  Eva was the best! She helped with arrangements to all the sites I wanted to visit and recommended a few I didn’t know about. She is very responsive and great to talk to. I will definitely stay here again on my next trip to Athens.

I have been to Athens twice and have stayed in the apartments both times and have loved it! It is walking accessible to so many places and great amenities. The host is very attentive to any needs that may arise. I will definitely be staying here every time I visit Athens!

We had a wonderful stay at the apartment in Athens. We are very grateful to our host, Eva, for her attention, the cleanliness of the apartment, and her warmth.
