The place had everything we needed and is in a perfect location, with everything close by. I will definitely stay here again next time I’m in Athens!

This review is for those travelers who are looking for a home-like stay in Athens then this is the place to be in. It's clean, peaceful, spacious, comfortable, safe and the best part about this place is the amazingly quick & kind responses from the host, Eva. We have also been sending so many of explorers to this place and all of them recommended it. This is how the service should be when you're visiting an unknown destination but you are welcomed as family by the host here. I would like to take this opportunity to thank Eva for her approachable attitude and for always being so careful and helpful with our people. Much love & respect to the entire team of Olympus Residence, especially Eva and thank you for being so amazing! Cheers!

Excellent location for a few days in Athens.  The apartment is in a residential area, and therefore is very quiet.  There are grocery stores and restaurants within 10 minutes' walk.  The apartment is spacious, the air conditioning works well, and the beds are comfortable.  Check in was an easy experience.

place_name: Top ground floor in Cozy Mets
review_text: Fully equipped, really comfy and clean apartment. Central yet quiet location. Loved it!

place_name: Top ground floor in Cozy Mets
review_text: Cozy and clean, near city center!

place_name: Top ground floor in Cozy Mets
review_text: Comfortable and clean house close to transport with easy access to the center. The host is kind and helpful. I highly recommend it for one or more stays!

place_name: Top ground floor in Cozy Mets
review_text: Wonderful space and above all CLEAN in a beautiful location of Athens. Thank you very much for your very good service.!!

place_name: Top ground floor in Cozy Mets
review_text: The best comfortable clean convenient location near center and transport very kind and helpful host
Thanks for the hospitality!!! We will visit you again soon. Extremely neat space, clean and a step away from all our jobs we had in Athens.

I want to share with you the wonderful experience and hospitality I had at your place, the room, which is as clean as it is comfortable, priceless, it is worth visiting more than anything. Keep up the good work.
The best I have visited in Athens. Lucia very willing and helpful. I highly recommend it!

Perhaps one of the most beautiful locations in the heart of Athens.
Clean, kind people and above all affordable prices. I highly recommend it 👌
Excellent accommodation, you have everything you need! Will visit again for sure!
Good position near restaurants and main street

This short term rental flat in Athens was perfect for our stay for two people. The location was fantastic, right in the heart of the city with easy access to all the major attractions. The flat was clean, cozy, and had everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The host was very responsive and provided us with great recommendations for restaurants and things to do in the area. Overall, we had a wonderful experience and would highly recommend this Airbnb flat to anyone looking for a convenient and charming place to stay in Athens.

Beautiful, colourful and spacious apartment decorated with fun little details. It is equipped with high quality appliances. The host was very accommodating and responsive. Pangrati is a lively neighborhood full of nice cafes, bars and restaurants very close to the center.
Amazing apartment conveniently located and fully refurbished. Super accommodating and helpful host.

The apartment is located on the 0th floor and is relatively dark. There are daily necessities and spare towels, complete household appliances, and the surrounding transportation and life are very convenient.

A tricky one this.... we stayed in the ground floor, rear flat, the cheapest one. We were after value, as the plan was to spend most of the day out sightseeing.

First, the things the flat does well:
Immaculately clean.
Comfortable bed.
Air-con works well.
Secure.
Shower works well.

The down-side is:
Immediate location is unsuitable for anyone with any mobility issues (steps in all directions), and is a bit run down.
The flat has one window in the bedroom, none in the bathroom, kitchen or second room. There is nothing the owner can really do about this, but it meant the place felt a bit dark at times.
Dodgy wiring and plumbing - everything worked, but there were plenty of weird looking botch jobs in strange places.

It served its purpose, but I cannot help but think that if I had to spend more than a few hours awake in it, it would quickly become unpleasant.

Just had an awesome stay in Athens! The apartment was super cozy and clean.

Loved the convenient location – it was close to everything, making it easy to explore the city.
Host was great and ready with helpful tips about the area. The communication was a breeze, and he was quick to respond to any questions I had.

Overall, a top-notch experience that made my business trip to Athens even more memorable.

Highly recommend it!
Thanks, Andreas!

Very cosy apartment, perfect for two couples. The only thing it can be improved is the bathroom (curtain, towel holders etc)
It’s 15-20minutes from the shopping streets , 30 minutes to the Acropolis and 5 minutes to the Olympic Stadium. The Access is with stairs. We liked this apartment. I recommend it.

UNACCEPTABLE!They cancelled my booking 3 hours before check in without any contact!they confirmed normally from the day before our reservation and we  didn't even spoked to them (to ask smth)so they have no excuses!we was already on the go so we forced to find a new accommodation last min and more expensive.also we paid for the booking and had to find extra 150€ for the new apartment because the money needs days to return to your account!
*My reply to your reply is:
- I made the reservation the day before arrival,you confirmed it and you canceled 3 hours before check in time!
-if your rooms are available in Booking.com for reservation it doesn't matter when the customer will book,so stop saying this
-because you didn't like my comment you threaten me through DM on Booking.com
-you never contact me to ask me for a late check in to have time for your maintenance so imagine how we felt when Booking.com inform us that our reservation was cancelled when we already was on the way to Athens!
Very beautiful, clean and new apartment, great spaces with luxury interior design. Ideal location with walking distance to city centre's attractions. Highly recommend it.

Amazing place to stay while you enjoy Athens.  Very friendly helpful owners (2 brothers) who went out of their way to ensure that all of our needs were met.  Room was large, very clean, and more than spectacular.  Location was great and all the uber rides to get around were less than 10Euros.  excellent food found with 10 minutes walk in most directions.

The room was spacious and very close to the stadium. The only thing is that no clear instructions were given prior checking in with  no reception desk. The apartment is locked and had to ring before getting all information on how to get in which is quite frustrating coming from a long tiring flight. Also, no housekeeping in case staying for longer days.

Lovely apartments in the heart of Athens with everything you need for a short stay in the city. The apartments are located in a quiet inner courtyard, and the place is run by friendly people. I would definitely come back here!

Athens green apartments is run by 2 brothers (very nice men) who are artists themselves. In addition to the fact that the entire building is rented out to artists who can also give their own specific touch to the building, there are about 6 top-furnished rooms in various sizes. Beautiful building and definitely recommended! Good area that is becoming more and more trendy and closer to everything you must see in Athens.

The rooms are very lovely they was clean when we arrived. We was given loads of information on the area by the friendly staff I would highly recommend staying here the location is perfect just outside the busy area so it's not to loud in the evening
very beautiful apart,i love how it was funished,beautiful view from the balcony of acropolis,very nice area..just love it .thanks fortini and eva for everything

GP Shelter is a budget apartment located close to the center of Athens. The apartment is within walking distance from the city’s main attractions, but also just around the corner from the best Athenian gyro place, TAVERN - GRILL MANDRAKI, located  4 minutes away.
The apartment is equipped with very good and pretty new facilities and is very clean and quiet. However, I found that there weren’t enough towels, no kitchen towel at all, no place to dry the washed dishes, and no wine glasses. But these are minor issues
Excellent accommodation! It was spotlessly clean and fully equipped. I had a very pleasant stay and would definitely choose it again!
I had a very nice stay, I highly recommend it! Very beautiful place!!
A beautiful, cozy city with antiquities and nice shopping streets and lovely terraces.

We stayed here for our two nights for the beginning of our trip to explore Greece and its islands.
This space was perfect for our family with three children.
We are used to walking and to get to the city centre to visit the sites was easy to navigate and only took about 25mins.
The cafe right downstairs was a plus!

Chris was amazing through the entire process, preparing us before, assisting with arrangements for a driver to pick us up from the airport and back.
He also provided great tips for the area and was able to accommodate an earlier check in based on their availability.
We would definitely choose to stay here again if we are ever able to make our way back.
The apartments are very well equipped and well located. They are beautiful. I had a very pleasant stay there. I highly recommend them.

An absolute gem this apartment! The stay was perfect with great preparation and communication leading up to the stay. The apartment is located in a wonderful area of Athens with everything easily accessible. The amenities were outstanding and everything very clean with the best hospitality. Thank you!!
We stayed for 3 nights and it was very comfortable, Chris was very helpful with our needs. I would stay again.
Great selection of coffee and breakfast. The staff is super nice and friendly. Would come again :-)

Great location, centre of Athens near all touristic places.
Amazing great helpfull host, all in place, feeling immediately welcome ! We will go back !
Cosy apartment in a very nice spot in the city! Very friendly hosts,helped us with the check in process and everything we needed. Great value for money!
🤣 Perfect 🤣

Super comfy bed, spacious and extremely quiet room with everything that you may need and really nice owner that gave us plenty of info! You can easily walk your way to the center and leave the car parked along the road, totally safe.
Even if the view of the acropolis has been blocked by recent construction, the huge balcony is still super enjoyable and provides an amazing experience: we could even see Venus while laying in bed!

**Title: A Jewel in the Athenian Sky: Athens View Loft**

From the moment I arrived at Athens View Loft, I was enveloped in a world of unparalleled charm and comfort. The loft paints a perfect picture of Athenian elegance, with its breathtaking skyline vistas that are more than just photographs—they are a promise of the serenity and beauty that await every guest.

The terrace, a sprawling space adorned with comfortable, high-quality furniture, invites you to unwind and dine under the sky, with a convenient kitchen station that becomes a haven for barbecue enthusiasts in the spring and summer months. It's not just a place; it's an experience, where the vibrancy of Athens meets the tranquillity of a personal oasis.

Stepping inside the loft, you find yourself in a space that redefines cosy. It's intimate, making it ideal for couples or small families. The thoughtful inclusion of a full-service kitchen is a delightful surprise, catering to every culinary need, whether you're a seasoned chef or someone who enjoys the occasional home-cooked meal.

The location of Athens View Loft is nothing short of fantastic. Nestled next to Pagrati, you are at the heart of it all, with a magnificent park and myriad attractions just a stone's throw away. The loft's pet-friendly nature makes it a haven for animal lovers, ensuring that every member of the family, furry ones included, feels right at home.

Above all, the warmth and dedication of the host, Cryssa, add an invaluable dimension to the stay. Her willingness to assist with anything and everything makes you feel not just welcomed but truly cared for.

In summary, Athens View Loft isn't just a place to stay; it's a memory waiting to be cherished, a slice of Athens that you'll carry in your heart forever. Whether you're seeking a peaceful retreat or a base to explore the vibrant surroundings, this loft is a choice you'll not just appreciate, but applaud. A stay here is not just good; it's an embodiment of everything splendid about Athens, wrapped up in the cosy, comforting embrace of a place you can call home.

Very nice place, very clean and well furnished. The host is absolutely professional and very helpful to guide you through the city and recommend best places. The bed is huge ans the terrasse also with a a Fan-Tas-Tic view.
was okay for a quick coffee and a cold beer but too expensive for what it offered, service was decent!

I highly recommend this place, it’s really pretty, in great location, very good restaurants around, the owner is great, she’s really nice, gave us a lift to the center even tho we didn’t ask, it’s clean, calm and quiet, about breakfast - it’s not that they make you breakfast everyday, you just have juice, marmalade, honey, coffee and bread in the apartment when you arrive ☺️ Taxi to the center is really cheap from here, just 5€, if you stay for longer than 3days they offer you cleaning ☺️

A very beautiful and clean appartment, near the city center. Bus station is in front of the house and within 10minutes walk you have access to metro station. Fully equipped with anything you may need. Something very important for me is the bed and these mattresses were the comfiest. I would chose it again if needed. Highly recommended!!!

Ideal apartment to relax and enjoy your vacation. It can accommodate 2 couples or a family of 4. Brand new apartment that doesn't lack anything and has all the comforts. Easy check in-check out without the presence of the owner.

Beautiful apartment, spotlessly clean, perfect beds. It comfortably accommodates 6 people. Next to the center of Athens. There is a super market & cafe 2 minutes away. The space inside the apartment is beautiful and tasteful.
Perfect choice in the city center, clean with kind owner who helped us with everything we needed! I will visit again!

A wonderful house to stay in! We stayed with my family, four people and everything was spotlessly clean and very neat! It had everything I needed and more!!
All very tasty!

Clean and comfortable.
We have booked it many times and are happy.
Beautiful and convenient apartment very close to the market of Neos Faliros, and close to the ISAP and tram station, ideal for holidays in Athens

This is clearly not a 3 star, it is 1 star. Low budget hotel, rooms reek of smoke, bathroom fans squeal, in need of serious maintenance, AC leaked directly into room, obvious water damage in bathroom, shower noozle works like a game of twister.  Good for backpackers.
Its pretty far from everything. We stayed in a 10 people bedroom. Would recommend other places!
Perfect for an overnight stay on the way to or from the airport or ferry port.

This by far was the worst hotel I have EVER stayed at. RIDICULOUS!!!!!
THE FEMALE MANAGER there was also a rude and an argumentative female!

Air Canada will have to revisit their agreement with this Hotel as it cost us alot more in addition to what we had already paid.

Photos attached of reservations.  It clearly states that the shuttle to and from the airport is included.
IT WAS NOT AND WE HAD TO PAY 70 EUROS EACH WAY after walking around for an hour looking for their shuttle.

Upon arrival, this Female Manager denied shuttle service and looked at me as though I was lying.

Coffee was only available between 8 to 10 AM. We had it once and upon check out, she demanded 4 euros claiming coffee was not free.

Again the shuttle issue was raised and she pretty much raised her voice claiming it was not included.

The water in the bathroom leaked, there was no wifi most of the times.

I don't know who put her in charge but honestly, she is the reason people like me will never return and or recommend this hotel.

UNACCEPTABLE AND DEFINITELY NOT APPRECIATED.

The night receptionist sent me to withdraw money in 2:00 at night cause he said that he cannot use pos. I said OK he gave me directions and he said that it's close. But he gave me wrong directions and the bank was 10 minutes from hotel. Because of night I lost my route and I reach hotel after 2 hours and an adventure. The only notable is the nice taverna I accidentally found in which the people helped me to find the hotel and bought me a beer.

I recently stayed at this apartment and had a fantastic experience. The apartment was exceptionally clean and well-maintained. It had all the amenities one might need for a comfortable stay, and the welcome gifts were a delightful touch. It's evident that the owners put a lot of effort into making this apartment a wonderful place to stay, with thoughtful details and excellent facilities throughout. I fully appreciated every aspect of my stay and highly recommend this apartment to others.

Neat and large spaces, very nicely decorated and equipped.
Easy check in and direct communication with the manager.
Spotlessly clean sheets/towels and comfortable mattress.
The apartment building has a very large elevator for both floors of the maisonette for your belongings and the apartment has its own parking.

The staff is very nice, especially the blonde haired lady at the reception. Rooms and common spaces are very clean, but there are lot of mirrors in the rooms, smells like cigarettes and there are not enough electricity pockets to charge your phone, etc plus there are huge cockroaches in the bathroom, we had to change room due to this. The hotel is old, but its okay if you are looking for a cheap stay close to Athens. There are supermarkets, pharmacies and restaurants nearby.

For the price it was great. Quiet, close to metro and team to go to Beach's or the heart of Athens. Lots of restaurants and grocery stores close by. Easy to walk to the park then out to the boardwalk along the sea with many fancy restaurants.

The day I arrived the Taxis I the city were on strike and I arrived hours later than intended but the person behind the desk was friendly and very accommodating even at 1 am in the morning!
The room was clean, the AC works wonders and the bathroom works just fine, albeit small but for the price I paid for 3 nights it was more than worth it.
If you're traveling alone or with one other person, this hotel is a great place to stay as it's also near the metro, bus stations and the interstate.

We had a very difficult time finding this Hotel. No parking but what else is new in Greece! The rooms felt unclean and the overall feeling was the 70's. Toilet would not flush. Bedding felt unclean as well. My advice sleep in your car if you have to, I would not go to this hotel again.

Our room was on the 1st floor, which is actually the 2nd floor. It was pretty dated. For the price of the room, I was hoping for better and a bigger bathroom. If you are a fluffy person, like me, don't plan on using the shower. Overall the room served its purpose. And there is a cute Cafe right there. It's a mom and pop shop.
really nice!

A spectacular place, Idea to enjoy the city of Athens and the surrounding area, including the Stavros Niarchos Foundation Cultural Center.
The decoration is really cozy and we were more than comfortable with our friends (total 4 adults) during our stay.
We will really visit it again and it will be our spot every time we will visit Athens,for business or pleasure.
Thank you for the hospitality Alex and Christina.
Great place with good atmosphere at the perfect location, love it!!

place_name: Thisean Modern Suites by Athens Stay
review_text:
We had a reservation for September 2023. We paid approximately 400 Euros in advance. 2 days before the travel date, I went to the hospital due to an urgent illness, and a decision was made for emergency surgery. I reached the hotel and explained the situation clearly. I guaranteed that I would send all reports and documents if necessary. I requested a postponement or refund of the reservation. However, they said in a very rude and arrogant way that this would not happen. They took all the money and it was not refunded. A new date was not offered.
Money is not everything in life. Sometimes you need to show your human side. I never liked the zero understanding approach to an important issue like illness. People and companies with this understanding should not survive. Therefore, you should definitely avoid establishing a commercial relationship with this hotel.

place_name: Thisean Modern Suites by Athens Stay
review_text:
First, ignore most of not all of the one stars. They are locals unhappy that this place is sometimes used for parties.

We stayed in the terrace on top floor. It gave an incredible view of surrounding area including Acropolis. There are stairs that go to the roof that allow for a 360 degree view of the city. The hot water seems to be a common thing at AirBnBs and other booking places in Athens. Wasn't that much of a hassle. Hot tub gave great relaxation after a full day of walking. Metro was maybe a ten minute walk. Bus came right outside of apartment.

place_name: Thisean Modern Suites by Athens Stay
review_text:
Very nice apartment to stay for a weekend in Athens! It is exactly close to supermarket, 15-20’ minutes walk to the Train Station of Kallithea and close to cafés, etc…
Moreover, the apartment was somehow clean and easy to access from the road which there is a lift outside (it takes ages to go up to the last floor!!!😂)!
Some ants 🐜 in the kitchen but overall OK! One thing was the shower water was all over the bathroom because of no fence/wall to cover it.
Nice veranda, sofa, living room etc.
At last, you pay what you get for!

place_name: Thisean Modern Suites by Athens Stay
review_text:
The location is far from the main attractions. Metro is 20 minutes walk. By metro  the way to center takes about 30 minutes. The bus is nearby it takes about 30 minutes to the center. Taxi one way costs 10-15 euros. So its better to choose other place to stay if  the main goal in Athens is to visit main attractions.
Hot water  is not convenient. Every time before taking a hot shower, you need to turn on the water heater, after 20 minutes the water will be ready (it will turn off later automatically). When you return tired to the apartment, you won’t be able to immediately take a shower.
There is no administration in the building. Communication is remotely, via messengers. The administration do not always answer sometimes for 6 hours of waiting or ignore you and  have to ask twice.
Probably due to the lack of supervision, apartments are often rented for parties. And in the apartments for two guests, stay companies for 10-15 people. There is no soundproofing and it is not possible to sleep in neighboring apartments course of loud music and drunken screams until 6 am.
Good for night parties, bad for usual stay.

place_name: Thisean Modern Suites by Athens Stay
review_text: We had a very good experience! Kallithea area is amazing and the position of the apartment is really comfortable for everything. Our apartment was very big, full equipped, with a comfortable bed and beautiful toilet (that is not so common in Athens). I appreciate the big refrigerator and the quietness of the internal apartment. VERY GOOD, I’LL BE BACK SOON

Terrible experience with the owner of this apartment. They confirmed a check in time at 2 pm. We arrived at 5 pm and the apartment wasn’t ready, the cleaning ladies had just arrived. After having travelled for so many kilometers from Romania, we just wanted to get some rest and the owner was really unprofessional, after confirming a check in time and not having the apartment ready even 3 hours after that time.

We left immediately and booked another apartment in Athens (LUX&EASY Athens downtown apartments)  that turned out to be an amazing one and even cheaper that this one.
They assured us that if we cancel, we would get a full refund, but we only got 50€ from 214€ and of course, the owner stopped responding to our messages. The booking had been paid a month in advance.
We are really disappointed and we don’t recommend this apartment at all. Very unprofessional owner. They just wanted our money and that was it.

AVOID this accommodation.
Exceptional hospitality! Very clean, cosy and great spot!

The small suite 2 was just perfect! Clean, nicely decorated, and fully equipped with everything we needed. The bed was very comfortable, while the location was quiet and close to everything needed. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and would choose it again without a second thought!

5 stars is not enough!!
Thank you very much for the wonderful hospitality. Cleanliness and style dominated every corner of the house. The response to any of our questions or requests was immediate. Your professionalism made us want to choose the same apartment again for our next stay.
Great place to stay! The spaces are spotlessly clean and beautiful! All new and in a central spot to have access to whatever you need.....

Fantastic space with high aesthetics, clean and comfortable.
Very close to the center of Athens.
The host is very helpful. The first Unreservedly.
Fully equipped, spotlessly clean with very nice decoration! You will feel like your home. The location is very quiet and safe!
Wonderful choice for a calm, comfortable and pleasant stay .... Close access to means of transport ...I chose it again and I highly recommend it!!!
Thank you very much for the beautiful stay... The cleanliness and the service were impeccable... The environment is wonderful... We will choose you again on our next stay in Athens...
Comfortable, very clean, good location

Very pleasant apartment!
Clean and comfortable.Quiet place,cool neighbours.
Mr Mike is an incredible host.
Value for money,near the center of Athens (10 minutes).Kallithea is an area with a lot of every kind shops.
Really,a good choice.
I ll visit you again for sure!

place_name: The Flirty Athens - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Great place to stay, very clean, central and quiet

place_name: The Flirty Athens - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Spectacular apartment
We had an amazing stay! The pace really had the “Athenian vibe”. It was really clean and cosy and the yard is ideal for evening cocktails and snacks! Highly recommend it
Amazing place! Brand new, extremely clean and well decorated

The property was very well maintained, modern and comfortable. It was clean and the air conditioning was a god send. The roof top terrace was also a nice touch. It is about a 20/30 minute walk to the main attractions in Athens and there are plenty of bars and cafes within a 15 minute walk. We especially liked Koukai and Bite Box (the Poffies were unreal). When we had an issue with some work that was being done the contact dealt with it quickly and in a way that we were happy with.

One night the upstairs neighbours were quite noisy and banged around a lot which disturbed our sleep. However this comes with the territory of being in a city apartment. The other two nights we didn’t hear the neighbours at all.

New and beautiful apartment that is super conveniently located. The apartment is modern, well equipped and stylishly furnished. Quick walk to a coffee shop and 10 minute walk to the Acropolis. Will definitely be back!
Lovely apartment in a great location! We got to enjoy some wine on the roof terrace which was awesome!
Super clean apartment and great host!

Really very good! Beautiful renovation. Welcoming, clean and comfortable. The terrace also offers a very nice aperitif space. Air conditioning in all rooms. The kitchen equipment is basic in the 1st floor condo and therefore not suitable for elaborate meals. Very popular Espresso coffee maker but few capsules and they are impossible to find in the neighborhood. Very very recommendable.

place_name: Filopappou Hill Suites by Athens Stay
review_text: Ridiculously small room! We booked the rooftop room with private terrace and jacuzzi. It’s on floor 7, the lift only goes to floor 6. The room is tiny - no space for clothes or any kind of luggage and certainly not enough space to accommodate more than one person comfortably! The rooftop room with jacuzzi is really the old maintenance room, the lift shaft is right outside the door to the room, and is left unlocked, so it’s both noisy and dangerous. The selling point of this room is the pictures online - in reality it’s nothing like those…the beanbags are filthy, the hanging egg chair is filthy, the outdoor dining table is dirty and broken, the terrace floor is filthy, the glass surrounding the terrace is also filthy. Quite literally the only saving graces for this shoebox of a room are the air conditioning and comfortable bed. Maybe the other rooms with jacuzzi are ok, but judging by the state of the rooftop room, it’s probably best to avoid the place altogether.

place_name: Filopappou Hill Suites by Athens Stay
review_text: Amazing terrace ! The room itself is pretty small but you'll find everything you need. Hot water doesn't last long in the shower so be quick. You may hear the noise of the elevator but it didn't bother me. Otherwise, the hot tub is great, water was already warm at 37.5°C when I arrived (goes up to 40°C). Entry is by a code given the same day of arrival. Thanks for all.

place_name: Filopappou Hill Suites by Athens Stay
review_text:
Terrible customer service. Our door was left open by housekeeping after cleaning in the morning.

We came in the evening to find it open. Took the reception more than 12 hours to respond to the incident.

Also The bathroom is terrible. The shower door dosent  stop the water from getting out causing the floor to be slippery.

Wouldn't reccomendation unless you are out of options.

place_name: Filopappou Hill Suites by Athens Stay
review_text: Very good for the price. I recommend getting the suite with the hot tub! Very relaxing. Some areas for improvement are: including more items in the apartment to make it livable (a kitchen knife, more kitchen items); including shampoo/conditioner. The response of the management needs to be improved, we had trouble with the shower and they did not respond to our question for the entire 5 night stay! Luckily we resolved it ourselves, but what if it had been more serious? There is a nice coffee shop downstairs that makes great coffee and was so friendly to us. The area was walkable for us (about 10min from the Acropolis) and has a more residential feel, definitely not very touristy. Taxi to Plaka/ Flea market was €4.50 and to the airport €35. There are large streets nearby but the noise is minimal from the terrace and we couldn't hear anything from the apartment! Overall we are quite happy with our stay.

place_name: Filopappou Hill Suites by Athens Stay
review_text:
The room did not look like the pictures at all. It's a very bare bones, simple accommodation that I would never pay 100+ euros for if I had known. I feel cheated in that front. Additionally, the flat was pretty dirty, with hair everywhere. There was no bathroom mat so we had to use one of the hand towels for that purpose. The aircon is super loud, even on the lowest setting. There was food still in the freezer from previous guests. The windows in the lounge look into the internal "courtyard" so basically other windows and walls. The bedroom looks out to a very busy road that is pretty loud even on the 4th floor. Would never stay again.

The staff was very responsive and polite. The check in was easy. They accommodated a request to change floors with no fuss.

place_name: Muses Residence Koukaki - My Greek Vacations
review_text:
Even before the trip, the host was very responsive and helpful.
The facilities were comfortable and clean. The location is great, easy access to the tourist spots and the neighborhood is safe. There was a grocery store nearby and a couple of great restaurants within 10min walk and even a quaint neighborhood bar ~2min away. We enjoyed the little backyard for fresh air and cooling down in the afternoon.

place_name: Muses Residence Koukaki - My Greek Vacations
review_text:
I stayed here with my family in early August, and we throughally enjoyed our stay. Very clean,comfortable and modern, and spacious. An ou yes AC as it was hot in Athens. Close to great restaurants and 20 minutes walk to the acropolis!!
Checkin was easy, and our host helped with a number of those typical tourist requests. We really appreciate our stay!!!

place_name: Muses Residence Koukaki - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Very nice apartment with balcony in a nice area. Few minute walk away from nice bars etc. Would recommend!

place_name: Muses Residence Koukaki - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Very comfortable apartments with all necessary facilities. Clean and tidy. The rooftop has a terrace with the barbecue grill. A bit away from the city centre, but taxi is very cheap (4-5 euros to Acropolis)

place_name: Muses Residence Koukaki - My Greek Vacations
review_text: I can't say anything bad about this place, quite a good location. A perfect spot for a few days in Athens.
Beautiful location in the center of Athens. The owners served us in everything and were very kind. On our next trip to Athens we will definitely prefer it.

Utterly delightful apartment, fully modernized yet retaining the beautiful old tile floor in the entrance way. Well appointed in every way, it was perfect for our friends and us to stay a few nights and be close to the Acropolis and other central Athens sights. Would gladly stay again.
Wonderful hosts, beautiful space and views of the city! Close walking distance to everything and super spacious. We booked this apartment through Airbnb
If you're planing a trip to Athens, this the best place to stay in, had a great time!
Nice owners and nice neighborhood

The villa is located in Philopappou, close by to excellent shopping and transport links.

The villa is spacious and has rooms spread over three floors. Unusually, the villa offers a guest a lift service and this is very useful when moving heavy cases at arrival and departure times. The villa was spotless on arrival and the agent arranged for our transportation to and from Athens Airport (80 euros each way / September 2023).

Minor niggles included a broken microwave but the agent replaced it immediately. The knives were all blunt and were replaced a few days later after requests were made to send photographs of them??? Slightly more concerning was an intermittent failing fridge freezer. This caused food in the freezer to melt on more than one occasion which was annoying. We reported the issue to the agent just before we left. Another area of improvement would be for the management company to collate a folder with useful information like, how to use the washing machine and dryer (all in Greek on the machines), where to eat, what to do in the local area, transport etc. There was a folder but it was full of blank sheets and forms for the agent to records occupants’ details. We have never stayed in a villa where this type of information has not been available.

The villa has an excellent outside courtyard however, be careful and watch out for mosquitoes!

We loved the Villa and the agent was extremely helpful. We would definitely stay there again.
Very lovely lodging for a large group of Great communication from management.
Beautiful home, everything you need,  great neighborhood with shops and restaurants walking distance to the Acropplis but on a quiet street below Philappapou Hill.
Wonderful Villa..enjoyed the balcony and lush plants
Spacious, clean and great hosts
Very nice, clean apartment. The owner is very kind and helpful. It was comfortable for 5 people.
Best house
Absolutely loved our stay! Cozy, well-equipped apartments close to everything in the city. Hosts were incredibly kind and accommodating. Highly recommend
The apartment is great for visiting Athens.It has a metro station and train station at 10 minutes walking distance,apse it was very clean and very comfortable to stay in .Definitely recommend it
The apartment was very clean and we had a great time,it was spacious and very comfortable
Very nice apartment,renovated, with plenty of space and very clean.Alse the hosts were very nice

Beautiful and functional apartment , very clean and comfortable! Next to many walking attractions.
Consistent and reliable hosts.

Very nice and comfortable apartment, very clean. Gracious hostess. It is very close to the historic center and historical attractions. You can find nice shops for food and drink. I will visit again on my next trip.
Very clean apartment, very helpful hosts and very close to all the archaeological sites!
Very nice place, central and convenient!!!! very good hospitality!!!
Perfect place to stay!!

Modern apartment fully equiped with every kind of utensils, excellent spot for someone who wants to stay in a safe and quiet neighbourhood just 15min walk away from Acropolis.
Clean and cozy with a 5* Bathroom , way better than many 5* hotels. Giannis the landlord was amazing and very helpfull and available at any time we needed him. I strongly recommend this apartment and I would definetely stay there again in my next trip to Athens.

The apartment was modern with stylish design and super clean. The kitchen was provided with coffee maker and everything else we needed.Also,the beds were very comfortable. Great location and super convenient to go anywhere. A good base to explore Athens. Really helpful and kind host, easily contactable using WhatsApp and provide non touristy information. Clean and modern settings - love it!I will definitely come back!!!!

I couldn’t have asked for a more comfortable, convenient, and welcoming place to stay in Athens!The best thing about Denaxas apts was the service. Giannis was absolutely lovely, helping us out with questions leading up to the trip, recommendations while we were there and everything else we needed. We loved the location and found the neighborhood to be vibrant and very close to the Acropolis. The nespresso machine is a huge plus for me as well and the showers are great. Would definitely stay here again!!
Lovely apartment, cosy, clean and well equipped. Ideal location very close to the Acropolis in a vibrant neighbourhood.
The apartment is in a very nice location full renovented beautiful decoration and its very near at acropolis museum and also near at metro station! I recommended to you!🙂

We were pleasantly surprised by this hotel. It is very well located and fully equipped with everything we needed. We had an issue with the water heating, but the lovely Liana immediately upgraded us to a new and better room. I highly recommend this hotel and will definitely stay here again on my next trip to Athens.
This place was spotless, comfortable, had a lovely pool on the roof and gym. The neighborhood isn’t great but it’s a short cab ride to everywhere we wanted to go. And the price was right!

I really do not get such a high ratings of this place. Price to quality ratio is very bad:
- location is far away from attractions and public transport. Need to take a taxi every time.
- souranded by high traffic street and homeless people spots
- swimming pool is a joke. It is rather a batch fo 4 people. Water is unclean, tried once, bad experience. Do not count on it.
- apartment is small, no balcony, low quality equipment. It looks good only for photos.
- hosts only contact you when they have a case. If you want to ask something they are not answering.
- we had problems with electricity, they tried to fix it moving our group from apartment to apartment several times.
I do not recommend this place at all.
Great building, with comfortable apartments. This could have been absolutely perfect. Unfortunately, the total experience was ruined by a smoky room that hit us every time we opened the door.

Staying at “The Edge” has been quite appalling. All looks but no substance. The building looks newly built and apartment is spacious. That’s where the good part of this ends. The apartment is far away from any public transportation unless you are willing to walk for a good 20 minutes through a rundown area or along the busy highway linking Piraeus to central Athens while being dotted by all kinds of strip clubs and other adult entertainment venues. Getting to the Acropolis will on average take about 35 minutes and Syntagama Square around 45 minutes. This is not convenient to most travelers. Had to rely on calling cabs using Uber and FreeNow which both would have an average wait time of 10-15 minutes before any driver showing up due to the cab drivers deciding to cancel for much more lucrative drives after accepting the booking already.

Managed by “My Greek Vacations” and their point of contact Liana felt like there was no control over anything. Liana was supposed to be in touch a week before arrival with all the details of the apartment and check-in procedure. Of course, she never got in touch with such details in time that would’ve allowed me free cancellation. Instead, waited until I contacted her the day before checking in to ask about the info.

To my surprise, I was given a basement apartment which had a grand view in their garage with easy access to anybody off the street as the garage doesn’t even have a gate. Any passerby could easily look into the apartment unless the blinds are closed shut the whole time. When I asked why was it not advertised as a basement apartment with no possibility to make use of windows, sunlight or anything you would expect during your vacation stay I was given the silent treatment. There was no advertising anywhere about them having basement apartments to start with nor was she willing to even answer a simple question.

Basement apartments should be advertised as they would fetch a lower price point and some client may want that, I definitely don’t and would’ve happily paid more for something else somewhere else. The apartment I booked was neither the same number of bedrooms nor had a mention of being in the basement. There’s no way of cracking a window for ventilation so had to rely on air-conditioning which is not something I enjoy having anywhere. The dismissive behaviour from Liana is something to be taught as the worst form of examples in customer service. Ignoring your client until 2 days into their stay saying this is what we had available for what you booked and trying to blame me for making the booking.

The furniture in the apartment, while pretty looking, is low end. Candy for electrical appliances for example don’t scream luxury or standard. The cleaning of the apartment left more to be desired with crumbs on the kitchen counter, old ticket stubs and vape filters left behind from previous tenant. Not to mention the amount of dust and trash under the bed which I saw thanks to coin I dropped and had to pick up. The hot water supply would last enough for a 10 minutes shower, anything beyond the 10 minutes and you are looking at an ice-cold continuation of your shower. Between each person showering in a 2 bed-room apartment for 4 adults, one would have to wait for about an hour between each and every single person for the tiny boiler to heat up enough water for a shower for 1 person. Internet was good most of the time.

I am very familiar with Athens and visit quite often, there are plenty of much better places offering a premium product for comparable prices in much better locations with better security measures in place. The area didn’t feel safe, it was remote, the finishing and furnishing of the apartment was done on the cheap, My Greek Vacations resort to false advertising and cover themselves with a disclaimer that states that they are not responsible for the information they themselves present on their very own website. The worst of all is having to deal with someone like Liana who has no understanding of basic communication or customer service skills. What a shame!

I’m probably the 1000th person to say this but the view for the pool/roof bar has to be the best in Athens. It alone makes the stay here fantastic. The service is good, the rooms adequate. My only area the needs improvement would be the dinners. It wasn’t very good in my opinion. But with the view, who cares!!

An added bonus is how close it is to the entry of the Acropolis and museum. Super convenient.

AND the park next door!  Holy cow was that a great place to stretch the legs in peace and quiet in the middle of Athens.

Neoma Hotel
5/5 Excellent
This beautiful new Neoma boutique hotel made us feel like family from the moment we arrived we were taken care of in every way possible from the concierge desk arranging transfers to and from the airport and housekeeping that kept our room spotless, every single need was met. We chose to stay in the smaller economy room because we weren’t going to be spending much time in a room, the bed was absolutely comfortable and the floor was quiet. This hotel went above and beyond for everything that we needed. Clean and comfortable. The highlight and the reason we chose Neoma was the pool, bar and Restaurant with 5* food that overlooked the Acropolis. The bartender and waitress were unbelievable at making you feel welcome and the service was the best we’ve ever had staying anywhere. The staff of this hotel are the stars. Choose Neoma you will truly not be disappointed. I could not find one thing to criticize and I am super hard to please. Staying at Neoma helped make visiting Athens one of our best vacations ever. Thank you so much from The Halls.

Staff is the best hotel staff we've ever experienced in our travels. The acropolis view room we rented didn't really have a good view of the Acropolis but the view from the rooftop bar and pool more than made up for it. Easy walking distance to the Acropolis and other monuments!
Only one outlet in the room though. And none in the bathroom.

This boutique hotel was absolutely lovely! It was tucked away on a quiet residential street, just a 5-10 minute walk from the acropolis.

It was clean, modern, quiet, and perfect for my husband and I.

I loooved the breakfasts in the morning, they were peaceful and delicious. They even packed us  a breakfast box on the day we left for the airport early. Staff was incredibly helpful. We had an issue with our lockbox and they went above and beyond to help us. The rooftop pool and bar were fantastic.

I would absolutely recommend this hotel.

The hotel is modern and clean (and the staff friendly) and the pool and bar facilities overlooking the Acropolis are excellent. However, one night we wanted to go up to the bar and it was hosting a private event and we were told to leave. I would expect some communication prior to this from the management so I could have made alternative arrangements. This was very disappointing!!! If this had been a one stay this I would have been absolutely gutted. I wouldn't trust the management enough to stay again

Took me a while to find this hotel while looking for one with a pool.
Location is top marks very close to all the sites Plaka, Acropolis, hop on busses, etc.
The hotel made an effort to give us a room with a view of the Acropolis which made our stay brilliant.
Breakfast is minimal but good.
Pool is small but ok.
Rooms are small and be careful with doors, open outwards and I pulled a toenail off.
Roof terrace is amazing the view is superb.
All in all will return. Thank you.

Just for the location alone it’s easily 5 stars. I visited for my 30th birthday last November, the room was lovely & big considering it seemed it would be small from the outside. Staff were lovely (gave the guy on the front desk the rest of my cat biscuits for his kitty when leaving & he showed me photos of it). Super easy to walk to all the main sights even for a pair of fatties like my mum & I

The staff were very friendly and helpful with any questions we had. Room was nice, the pool is a nice small pool to get into on the hot days and we really enjoyed sitting outside on the outdoor patio with a glass or two of wine. Reasonably priced and good walking distance to the acropolis, restaurants and other points of interest.

Overall, this hotel is excellent.  I would definitely stay here again.

From the friendliness and helpfulness of the people on the front desk, to the cleanliness of the rooms and facilities, to the pool, to the food in the restaurant - all great.

The view on the terrace is outstanding during sunrise and it's a nice place to be in the evening too.  Unfortunately our room was directly below that terrace and the noise of people scraping their chairs and tables back and forth at 10:30pm wasn't the greatest.

The room was compact but effective.  The glass bathroom door, however, is transparent at night with a light on so a bit awkward!

The only downside was how I was spoken to by one of the cleaners.  We had (wrongly) assumed that rooms would be cleaned unless the 'DND' sign was put out.  That's how every other hotel i've ever stayed in works.  I was angrily and aggressively corrected by a cleaner, who brandished the sign stating "this is for you, this is for you" over and over.  Given i was having an excellent day i decided not to make more of the interaction but her attitude was completely wrong.

Before arriving at Acropolis Hill Hotel, we saw pictures online that showed stunning views of the Acropolis. We thought "this is too good to be true for the price," but were pleasantly surprised that those pictures were true. The rooftop of Acropolis Hill Hotel has an incredible, uninterrupted, view of Athen's most iconic site - the Acropolis. The roof was a beautiful place to watch the city wake up in the mornings and to watch the Acropolis light up at night.

The location of the hotel is excellent not just for its views, but also for its walkability to the main historical sites, parks, and a great variety of restaurants and shops. It's in a beautiful neighborhood with access to everything you could want.

The staff at Acropolis Hill were friendly and helpful, providing tips for the best tour options in the city, restaurant recommendations, and baggage storage.

Excellent accommodation in the area of Koukaki, very vibrant neighbourhood with lots of choices for food, drinks and coffee. The apartment is very well equipped, very clean and the host is friendly and helpful!

Excellent Accomodation service.
Modern, comfortable and near Acropolis
We had a lovely stay! The apartment was excellent and the location was outstanding with all activities within walk in distance. We would definitely stay again here.
Best location ever, great cozy house and amazing host that was always there to help us with anything we needed! Highly recommended!
very nice place
One of the most amazing views in the city. Spacious flat that is within walking distance to great restaurants, shopping and historic sites including the Parthenon.
Best view in town, very close to Filopappou hill, the Acropolis and the Acropolis museum.
Top service. You can always find fault with certain details, but honestly it is very well located, well maintained, very large, and very beautiful.

Fantastic Weekend Stay at Athens Residence Apartments!

I recently stayed at Athens Residence Apartments over the weekend, and I couldn’t have been more pleased with my experience. The location is unbeatable—nestled in a quiet neighborhood but still within walking distance to the Acropolis and many other major attractions in Athens. It made exploring the city so convenient and stress-free.

The apartment itself was spacious, modern, and impeccably clean. It felt like a home away from home with all the amenities you could need, from a fully equipped kitchen to a comfortable living area. The bed was incredibly comfortable, ensuring we had restful nights after long days of sightseeing.

What really stood out was the attention to detail and the hospitality of Mr. Albert. He was welcoming and helpful, providing great recommendations for local restaurants and attractions. Check-in was smooth, and they even offered a handy guidebook with tips for making the most of our stay.

Overall, Athens Residence Apartments is perfect for anyone looking for a blend of comfort, convenience, and value. I highly recommend it for both short and extended stays. I’ll definitely be coming back next time I’m in Athens!

Albert is the best! This place is a great value for the money and was in a more residential area. Albert recommended places and we ate at a few. He provided cold water in our fridge and the ac was great. It is up a big hill  but is a great spot being 10 minutes from the Acropolis. Would stay again!

Albert is a legend, hats off to him. He helped us with everything, including the delivery of our lost luggage from an erratic airline company, he also relocated us in the best room for the same price because of an unexpected pipe problem in the basement. He’s an absolute gentleman and we were treated as kings. I would highly recommend this nice, modern, clean and tidy apartment so close to the Acropolis and Plaka areas (5 minutes walk)

Fantastic location in a peaceful area around 10 mins walk to the Acropolis. Stunning apartment with all the usual amenities, nice touches with the complimentary bathroom toiletries and flip-flops, and the bottle of water chilled in he fridge upon arrival. Lovely host who was very accommodating with our late check in, and also gave us fantastic recommendations on local places to eat and drink.

We have just spent 3 nights at the Apartment. Everything was great - from the initial arrangements over messages to organizing transfer from the airport, to meeting and greeting us and helping with information and all other needs. A huge thank you to Albert and Xenofon for such a wonderful first time experience in Athens!

We have enjoyed extremely our stay in this brand new modern super stylish apartments.
AAA! Hosting!
AAA! Location!

I think I have never been to such a clean, comfortable and well-equipped establishment.
Upon our arrival, the host welcomed us and explained the general rules, making himself available for every need.
We found coffee pods, dishwasher tablets and washing machine pods.
What matters in this structure are the details.
After wandering around the city on the first evening, upon our return, we decided to go up to the shared terrace and there I was shocked as soon as I saw the Parthenon in all its beauty.
It was a very strong emotion and I really want to thank the Rastoni Acropolis for this beautiful stay.
If the memory of Athens will be special in the memory, it is thanks to them too.
Professionals in the non-room rental sector.
Congratulations

Accommodation ideally located in a very quiet area just 10 minutes from the Acropolis.
A beautiful Roof Top available to apartment tenants which allows them to admire the Acropolis.  Household linen is provided and bathroom linen changed every 2 days. A top apartment, brand new and very well equipped.
I highly recommend.
The fantastic apartment and the large roof terrace with magnificent views of the Acropolis. I would repeat tomorrow, super modern and clean, quiet and quite central
Superb, ideally located for visiting Athens. The apartment is very clean and offers a magnificent view of the Acropolis.

place_name: Phaedon, the Terrace Suite Near Acropolis By CloudKeys
review_text: Very clean. Alexander was great welcoming us to our temporary quarters!

This hotel was good for it's price! It was easy to book, good communication with the owner, easy and clean access to the rooms and the rooms were very nice looking. The location was fantastic! It was near the main walkway which leads straight to the Acropolis and all the stores along there. As well, there were many stores and cafes nearby.

As shown in the photos, the rooms were nice looking, but we needed up having some problems. The bathroom sink leaked underneath, the shower head holder did not hold the shower head up and so it was quite difficult to shower, and we had cockroaches (NOTE, it appears that almost every place in Athens has cockroaches and so this isn't what bothered us). The cockroaches were inevitable but initially, they hadn't cleaned the room very well and so the blankets they kept in the cupboard had dead cockroaches in them. We also found a lighter from the previous owners in the room. Once we discovered these problems, we messaged the owner asking them to fix (and mediate the bugs) and asking for fresh towels. The owner was very quite to respond and they usually responded within the hour with 24/7 availability. They assured us that they would remedy the situation but there way no follow-through. When we got back to our room, the beds had been made, the bathroom sink no longer leaked, they set some cockroach traps, and they had replaced 2 out of our 3 towels of which the new towels were damp (so were they really new, or did they fold up our used towels?)... The shower head holder still didn't work, they missed a towel somehow, the 'new' towels were damp, and they didn't empty the garbages.

Our last problem with this place was that on our last day we needed a taxi early in the morning and so we filled out a transfer form with the owner. When we waited outside for our taxi, the taxi had not contacted us as we were assured they would've and he never came... We ended up installing an app (chase that's how they do it here unless you speak Greek) and ordering a taxi in order to not miss our ferry...

I liked the rooms, very clean, but I found out that the bosses steal the tips. When we leave tips, they are for the girls who clean the rooms. or deliver it personally to the girls because the owners steal the prizes

• Be careful.
The reviews of the apartment the scam.
The bed was dirty, and in general everything around was dirty.
In the shower i got into a huge tangle of someone else's hair with my hand when I took shower head.
The  hair was everywhere. In the bed and on the kitchen. The apartments are not cleaned before. They called the cleaning lady because we said about this, but she didn't do anything except took the dirty linen.  The huge tangle of hair stayed on the shower head.

The rooms here are clean, well appointed and comfortable.  The staff is very, very helpful.  The helped me arrange many details for transportation and storing my luggage during different legs of my trip.  The location is very close to the Acropolis and many wonderful cafes, shops and restaurants.  Would definitely stay again.

Pros, Rooms are well finished، and service was good. Cleaning service is excellent, however they don't work on Sunday.

Cons, what they call standard room is actually a basement. The air exhaust in the washroom is too weak or not working that the washroom air ends up in the room, whether it's shower steam or something else :)
From the room in the basement , you can hear and see people standing behind the hotel all night, cars idling and so on. They also can see you so that you have to close the window to keep your privacy.

I would recommend not to rent the basement, and stick to upper floors.

Small studio apartment not very central but close to the M2 metro so you can reach the plaka in a few stops. Good trattorias nearby to eat.
Very narrow spaces, well kept. Foldaway bed with good firm mattress. Well soundproofed
The host's availability is excellent.
I would recommend cleaning the floors more, an extra towel per person (1 towel each is a bit little) and 1/2 liter of water in the fridge would be nice to find especially when you arrive late.
However for 1 night it's fine

We had a fantastic experience at Absolute Athens Acropolis View! As frequent travelers, we can confidently say this is one of the nicest places we've ever stayed. The service and communication were impeccable—10/10! Our room was clean and fresh, complete with a lovely fruit bowl,  water, a bottle of Rose and an abundance of Nespresso capsules.

The bed and pillows provided a truly comfortable night's sleep. The highlight, however, was the rooftop bar; the clear view of the Acropolis was absolutely breathtaking. We highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Athens!

Wonderful stay at a centrally located, very clean and comfortable apartment for me, my wife and our 3 year old toddler. The Absolute Athens team had great whatsapp communication - created a group. Then they arranged a taxi from airport for a reasonable price, including a booster car seat. The apartment has a wonderful view of the Acropolis from a shared rooftop terrace. There is a complimentary rooftop bar - drinks and snack plate included! Location wise, it is on a steep hill (bit annoying for a pram), but location great, very central, 10 minutes from Acropolis and Plaka. It was perfect size for 3 (2 adults 1 child). One slight drawback were some loud, dusty roadworks for 2 of days we stayed - but good noise cancelling balcony doors helped keep out the noise. The team were very helpful however, offering extra cleaning of balcony due to dust. They continued to be very attentive during stay, giving us extra water bottles and coffee pods on request. They were able to arrange a taxi for our return journey to the airport. Incidentally I would strongly recommend Opos Palia restaurant - great food and exceptional value, very close to the apartment.

Absolute Athens provided a spacious apartment within easy walking distance to the Acropolis. The rooftop terrace had great views of the Acropolis and was a relaxing way to end a day with a bottle of wine. Everyone provided amazing hospitality and helped us with transportation when needed. Would highly recommend this if you are visiting Athens. We would absolutely stay here again.

The apartment 2 room apartment we stayed was well furnished. Rooms were clean with comfortable beds. Air-conditioning was good. Fully equipped with fridge, washing machine /dryer, dish washer. Everything in there was fairly new. The location is walking distance to the Acropolis area and are close to restaurants and supermarket.
The host are very helpful and responds fast to any queries.

We had 4 nights in Apartment 5.

The pre-arrival communication was excellent. The team contacted me via WhatsApp and provide all the information we needed for our stay.

Gianni met us, on time, and showed us through the very well equipped rooms. Some welcome gifts were a nice touch.

The location is excellent with easy access to the tram and metro. It's also walking distance to the Acropolis. There are many very good local restaurants nearby.

Very pleased we stayed here for the night! The room was exactly as the picture portrayed. It was reasonably priced and just a very short walk right down the street from the Acropolis! Thanos greeted us as we arrived and was very pleasant and welcoming. The room is very clean and tidy. A wonderful balcony overlooking the street with peek a boo views of the Acropolis. The rooftop deck is the bomb! Amazing views of the Parthenon and Acropolis, especially in the evening! A delightful place to stay!

We had a great stay at Acro Urban Suites! The room was clean and in great condition. Going up to the rooftop with the view of the Acropolis was such a wonderful experience. The staff were very friendly and accommodating. The place was quiet, we didn’t hear any noises from other rooms or outside. It’s a 10 min walk to the Acropolis which is so convenient. There were some cafés, restaurants, grocery stores walking distance as well. Would definitely recommend this place!

I cannot praise this hotel enough! First of all, the price was spectacularly affordable compared to other hotels of this calibre. We booked the cheapest room and our expectations were exceeded when we arrived; the room was clean, spacious (think studio apartment) and had everything needed for our stay. The check in process was seamless with excellent communication from the front desk. Anna at the front desk was SO kind, friendly and helpful along the way. The hotel is in a great location, situated on a quiet street that is walking distance to everything you need. The neighbourhood felt safe and the Acropolis metro station was only a 7min walk away. Bakeries, restaurants and cafes are littered all around this hotel. Lastly, the gorgeous view of the acropolis from the rooftop made our stay extra special.

We only had time for a short 1 night stay but our room was very nice, comfy, and well-equipped. The location was great - very close to the Acropolis and on a quiet street. The view from the outdoor terrace is terrific! The staff communicated well and arranged transfers to and from the airport for us. We had an issue with room access and the staff was very quick to respond, which we certainly appreciated! We will stay here again if we're back in Athens.

Friendly and responsive staff, beautiful rooftop view of the Acropolis, and clean room. Within easy walking distance of the Acropolis and other neighborhoods we wanted to explore. We had an evening flight departing Athens and I'm very glad we were able to use the lobby bathroom with shower to freshen up after a long day of walking. The luggage lockers and kitchenette were also super useful. The staff helped us arrange airport transfer. The check-in process is fast and easy since the building and rooms all have digital door codes. It was quiet at night. FYI the elevator is snug, we had to go up one at a time with our luggage, and the pull-out sofa bed was a bit thin and squeaky, but overall a positive stay for one night in Athens.

Amazing hotel / apartments. Very close to the Akropolis but in a quiet residential area. Lots of good places around to eat. And best of all, the hostess Adriana is just amazing, she's extremely helpful and friendly.
The rooms are relatively large and have a small kitchen and a balcony, and are very clean. Absolutely recommended!

Perfect getaway for a stay in Athens. Very clean, spacious and luxurious apartment close to the metro. Best of all was our host Adriana who was so kind and helpful, giving us tips for our stay, always ready to help and so friendly! If you're looking for a 5* stay in Athens, don't look any further. Thank you Adriana and Lume Athens!

The place is beautiful. It’s on a relatively quiet street. The flat was spotlessly clean, well furnished, and had balconies to hang out on. The terrace on top is beautiful. The staff was also very kind, helping us to organize our taxis to and from the airport. I highly recommend this place, and we will be coming back again!
Fantastic rooms and terrace . Really clean and tidy. Lovely host, wouldn't hesitate to stay again.
Perfect! Great location, very confortable and well equipped, very clean. Definitely our go-to when in Athens
The best apartments in Athens! We are so proud and happy cooperating with such a professional in BnB rentals. Keep up the excellent work!

The apartment is located in a boutique building and offers a unique staying experience. It is very centrally located and super quite since it is located  in a pedestrian area. The house is very clean and modern and offers all the amenities a traveler may need either traveling for business or leisure. The host , Alexander, is very friendly and offered very useful advice. Filoppapou Hill is very close for a nice walk in the nature and the pathway leads straight to Acropolis! I would choose the particular place for sure next time I visit Athens! Thank you Alexander for making our stay unforgettable !😀
Amazing luxurious apartments close to everything you would like to see and visit in central Athens! Enjoy and please yourself by visiting this place!

In a really perfect place, a great double suite
quiet and calm Great design. Spacious and comfortable for guests
An excellent location for those who desire a competitive experience far from the mass crowd of tourists
Excellent bed, excellent shower and toilet.
There is nothing to be confused about, this is the place for a vacation
Great, top order, very clean street, good service and very friendly landlord

Everything was lovely and clean. The apartment is in an excellent location with a stunning view of the Acropolis. Comfortable beds, nice and neat space. The host very welcoming and responds immediately. We will definitely be back..

I had an absolutely fantastic stay at this apartment! From the moment I walked in, I was impressed by the cleanliness and modern amenities. The location is perfect, with easy access to restaurants, shops, and public transportation. The host was incredibly responsive and made sure I had everything I needed for a comfortable stay. The apartment was spacious and beautifully decorated. I couldn’t have asked for a better place to stay, and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a top-notch accommodation in the area.

Super place !! Nice location …you have an easy access to Acropolis museum, metro and all means of transport.
The hosts are easy to find them and very helpful …
I would suggested to all my friends 10/10 definitely
Amazing service. Great location. Will definitely visit again!

The check-in process was quick and smooth. The hostess was friendly and served us excellently. He gave us useful information about the area and answered all our questions promptly.
The room was spotlessly clean and tidy.
The bed was very comfortable and the room had enough space for our luggage. The room was quite quiet.
The location was ideal, close to many attractions, restaurants and shops. We had easy access to public transportation, which made our commute a lot easier.
Overall, our stay at Mandevilia Suites was excellent and we will definitely choose it again on future visits to the city. I highly recommend this to anyone looking for a comfortable and welcoming place to stay.

Super modern and very comfortable apartment, when we arrived everything was very clean and the location is also good. A few minutes away from the central points of the city, a quiet neighborhood with bars and restaurants nearby.
The owner has always been very kind and super available to help us and advise us on how best to get around the city.
Recommended to a couple of people for their stay in Athens.

The owner, Akis, was a wonderful host.  He arranged for us to have a driver pick us up at the airport (for a reasonable price) and what an unexpected pleasure that was.  The driver gave us a mini tour on the the way to the apartment.  Once there, Akis gave us a very detailed overview of the unit and provided us with excellent suggestions for food and sites to see and the order in which to see them.  The apartment was very spacious and modern with AC in both rooms.  He also provided cereal,  bread, candies, coffee, butter and jam.  We were so impressed!  There is a grocery store only 2 minutes from the unit.  I spent every morning on the balcony with a cup of coffee enjoying the morning activities of the surrounding apartment residents. It felt like I was immersed in their culture.
Thank you for our amazing holidays in this comfy and clean appartement and your warm welcome. We definitely will come back.
Clean, quiet, fully furnished, electronic equipment for all your needs, service impeccable! My only choice when we visit Athens!
Omg! Best best best airbnb i have ever stayed in. The place was amazing, close to everything! You will love your stay there!

Excellent apartment comfortable and very clean, in addition he provided us with breakfast cereals, jam, coffee etc. In an excellent location, everything is next to you and the meter is a 2-minute walk away. Well done to Akis and Hectors very helpful

Just amazing. The view from the balcony was stunning at all times of day or night.

Neighbourhood was pretty quiet, with the exception of market day. But, honestly, that just added to the charm of the trip!

Would 100% recommend staying here for any trip to Athens. So well located to transport links, historical sites, great restaurants.
Excelent view. Nice host and very kind. The apartment is very beautifull.
Nice place beautiful view!

Average apartment for the price.

The view from the balcony is great, especially in the evening. And it's close to everything, on foot. We were able to enter the apartment before the scheduled check-in time, a flexibility that was appreciated.

The neighbor downstairs shouted at us from her balcony not to rub the chairs.... however, we hadn't really made any noise and we had been on the balcony for 1 minute. It was quite unpleasant.

See nice and cozy accommodation with a view of the Acropolis. CRAZINESS! Everything was there from A to Z in the apartment. Everything within walking distance.  Parking spaces in front of the house are always available. Despite the proximity to the Acropolis and the center, quiet location. Landlord very very friendly and answered immediately. Ephcharisto
The apartment is really nice and spotless and the location is extremely convenient. It’s a 5-min walk to Acropolis. Marios, the owner, has been very kind and helpful. I would absolutely recommend it.
A very good position for visiting the heart of Athens. The rooms here are in a good condition and deco is Beautiful.
Comfortable, clean, well-equipped apartment. A stone's throw from the Acropolis and the clubs in the centre. Equipped with a kitchenette and all related equipment. Well heated. Present TV and Wifi.
Fantastic apartment, everything is practically there. Market nearby around the corner. Bus stop at the door. Sightseeing buses pass by constantly. Nice to see. Top location!
comfortable and perfectly designed home with an incredible view of the Acropolis!Katerina is a special person who really cares about her visitors.
I totally recommend it, great spot, beautiful inside, I had a wonderful time
Amazing hospitality next to Acropolis
great service, courteous staff, recommend it unreservedly

Marianna, our hostess,  epitomizes GREAT customer service and care. When our visits to the archaeology sites on the Acropolis, including the Parthenon  were at the height of the heat wave impacting Athens, she checked in on us when we returned and made sure we were okay. Her recommendations for restaurants were fantastic, from formal to casual. The food was wonderful as was the service. We had an unfortunate cancellation with our airline and when we reached out to her for two more nights stay, she accommodated us quickly,  “ Come back and relax”.

One more personal touch to add more,  she  saved the wine from the night before that my spouse and I didn’t finish. WOW!

I love this hotel but it is the service from Marianna, that takes this experience above and beyond.

Noble Suites was an awesome place to stay. The location is 10/10 which made a big difference. You are about a 5 min walk from Acropolis. Breakfast was also very good and peaceful.

Mariana did a very good job making sure everything was ok ALL the time. The rooms are not your average size rooms. I stayed in the 2 bedroom, 3 bathroom suite which was very big. This is not your average hotel either - the lobby is very small and the hotel only about 5 hotel rooms in the whole place. That being said it was a very enjoyable stay.

Such a wonderful boutique hotel and extraordinary service.  Our hostess, Mariana, made us feel at home with high touch service.  The location is less than 100 yards from the Acropolis. Mariana arranged transportation from the cruise port at Piraeus to the hotel and from the hotel to the airport.  Finally, she provided a wonderful recommendation for dinner at Dionysos Zonar's which had a spectacular view of the Acropolis.

We stayed in the Junior Suite for six nights and it was the perfect size for 2 adults and 2 kids. The room was very clean and our kids found the sofa bed very comfortable. It didn’t bother us at all that the room is technically in the basement. We still were able to get plenty of sunlight and fresh air from the windows and although you didn’t have a view it didn’t matter because the acropolis is a very short walk away. The bathroom was on the smaller side but it was very clean and served our needs. Also the shower is enclosed which apparently isn’t always the case in Athens. Breakfast was always delicious and the perfect way to start our day. The service we received from everyone during our stay was wonderful and we would not hesitate to recommend this hotel.

Spectacular little place to stay at the foot of the acropolis! It’s close to the major sights and public transit, and the service is amazing. I stayed there on my birthday and the staff, especially Mariana, treated me like family. It felt like less of a hotel stay and more like staying with your aunt. I am on a gluten-free diet and they went above and beyond to accommodate my needs!

It is a very nice hotel, and the rooms are clean. There is no reception, but they provide you with very good information, and you do not encounter any problems. We were satisfied during our stay. Having coffee in the courtyard was quite enjoyable. There is a street market set up on the street where the hotel is located. It happened on Friday during our stay, but I'm not sure if it's there on other days. Because of the market, you might wake up a bit early on Friday due to the noise from the stalls being set up.

They said not to use internet but buy from website. I ended up paying $150 more. I was so annoyed and they tried to offer a crap explanation, but saw through their BS. Very tired. Light bulbs out. Black hair in bath plug hole. Front door like Fort Knox very difficult to open, their attention to detail is very poor and would definitely not recommend it. Left a very sore and bitter taste in my mouth
We were only there for one night but they were very friendly and very attentive to our needs. We were able to walk to the Acropolis.

This was my very first time in Greece(Sept 2022) and I was alone. I couldn’t have  picked a better place to stay! First, the hotel was quiet and clean. Second, it was within walking distance to many of the sites or a short taxi ride(Acropolis was an 8 minute walk tops). But what set this hotel apart, was how wonderful Konstantinos was! He did a great job communicating with me before I arrived. And when I did arrive, he sat down with me to let me know where to go and where not to go. He gave AMAZING recommendations for area bars, bakeries, and restaurants. Lastly, he set up cab rides for me whenever I needed them. Seriously, my stay was perfect here. I believe he is the reason why I am dying to go back to Greece. You will not be disappointed with this location, trust me, especially if you are traveling solo.

I stayed in the Blue Lilly room in Oct 2023. Beautiful well kept property. I was very happy, enjoy every minute I was there. Great location, food and restaurant everywhere! Mr K the host was fabulous! Loved my stay, miss it now!!!
