The room was cozy, with private bathroom, automatic chek-in via pin. The host is really kind and can help you with tips. 5 mins by walk from Alegria house there's a nightlife area with some interesting restaurants and cafes: Geor. Olimpiou street. Have fun!
Loved this studio apartment, very clean and well presented. Host could not have been more helpful
Good location, attentive host, well stocked, A/C, fast WiFi, great value.
Perfect for an overnight

Cozy studio located in a central area from which it is easy to reach the main tourist attractions of Athens on foot, however a 10 minute walk from the nearest metro station.
Despite being located in a busy area it is not noisy and this is very good for sleep.
The studio is essentially furnished and is equipped with the necessary material to be able to cook and eat freely, the spaces are sufficient for a decent stay.
For breakfast, everything you need is left available (sweet, savory, fruit and drinks).
The wifi is fast and accurate.
As soon as you arrive you are a little disoriented as the building where the studio is located is quite dilapidated on the outside, but as soon as you enter the studio the disorientation stops.
The only flaw of the studio is the bathroom which is small and not easily usable, the shower is equipped with a shower curtain (common to almost all Greek bathrooms), so while taking a shower, if you are not careful, it tends to get all over the place wet. bath.
Furthermore, there is a persistent slight smell of sewage in the bathroom, so much so that it is advisable to always keep the bathroom door closed.
Considering the location, the quality/price ratio is quite high.

The apartment was comfortable, spotlessly clean and had literally everything. Space enough for one person as well as a couple. The location is very practical/convenient as it is located near a central hub, with the result that all transportation is available (taxi, trolley buses, Metro, etc.). The area (Kukaki) is well organized. In addition to the nearby shops, there are pedestrian streets with catering & entertainment shops at a distance of 5-10 minutes. For someone who likes to walk, Monastiraki and the Acropolis are about 15' away on main shopping streets. Finally, the owner is kind and completely cooperative. Overall the accommodation is an excellent choice and I will definitely prefer it again.

We had a great experience here! The host of this establishment is a very kind and helpful guy. He provides all the information you can possibly need and will make sure you have a great stay. Also the apartment was very clean and the location is exactly where you wanna be in Athens with lot of things to do in the area.
Absolutely loved our stay. Hosts were amazing and very accommodative. Lovely spot close to everything we wanted to see. The jacuzzi is definitely the star of this apartment!

Very cosy and comfortable apartment that has more than anyone could ask. The Jacuzzi is super good and helped us relax in a nicely decorated yard. Hosts gave us EVERYTHING we needed to have a nice time in Athens.
Amazing apartment and facilities. Superb location close to Acropolis and a number of shops and restaurants. Hosts are extremely helpful and accommodated all of our needs

Very clean, location was good and the host Hector
was very nice.

Just stayed here with my daughter while in Athens. The hotel is very clean and comfortable. The staff is friendly and helpful. The rooftop bar has a wonderful view of the Acropolis as well. While it’s not the closest to the main sites, it is close for walking to the metro to get where you want to go. Also, the bus is close to get you around as well. We used both, the metro to get to the sites we wanted and the busy to get to the beach.

Clean, comfortable and SO CLOSE to the acropolis. It took us about 20 mins to walk there from the hotel. We loved the rooftop terrace too, it has a beautiful view of the parthenon. We booked it for our last night in Greece. Super easy check in, beds were really comfortable and the room was perfectly clean. Found it at a great price on booking.com. Look no further.

The lobby of the hotel is absolutely beautiful. But the rooms give a strong 80's vibe, stuffy carpet dark interior and pretty much a hospital bathroom. The breakfast is absolutely atrocious, if you take a small walk of 10 to 15 mins you have much much better breakfast for less money. The staff was quite helpful and willing to help. Overall the hotel is not worth the money and it should not be a four star hotel, but if you are in a pinch the hotel is fine and the location is good enough

The location is great near the main bit of everything around 15 to 30 minutes walk to acropolis and lidle around same distance, the staff are wonderful, very kind and welcoming. They also have a rooftop bar with food and drinks serving. Room is okay considering how cheap it was, it has a spacious bathroom, air conditioning is nice and the addition of a fridge made sure we were hydrated with cold water 😁 would recommend

Very good hotel with excellent food. The rooms are very clean. The top restaurant has a view of the acropolis, which is a big plus for the atmosphere. Near the hotel there are a lot of cheap fast foods, shops, bars and nice walks around the city. Great recommendation for this hotel.

Loved the apartment and the owner (very nice and communicative woman). Location is perfect, makes it possible to get to the main attractions in the city centre by foot. But watch yourself with the air conditioning, i cranked it up a little too much and got a cold 🤧
Clean, with all the things needed. The owner is helpful. Even give me directions to a few places to visit.

The apartment was very good, check-in was easy. We followed the instructions that we received by message to take the keys in a little box before entering and with all the indications to know which is our door. The apartment is spacious, with all the comforts. It has a kettle, toaster and coffee maker. Very happy.
Very attentive treatment and homely place

place_name: Athens Luxury Apartment - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Our experience here was a very positive one. Communication with the host was quick and easy, self check in too. The apartment was clean, spacious for 8 persons and comfortable. There are 4 real bedrooms (not sofa beds) 3 bathrooms and guest WC. Fully equipped kitchen, fully airconditioned and a very big terrace.

The apartment is immaculate in every way if you are noise tolerant. For me personally (I was traveling without a child), the noise did not interfere with my sleep, but I have St. Petersburg training, and I walked 10 km a day and got tired. And here is probably the noisiest street in the city: many restaurants and bars (life is in full swing from 7 pm to 4 am), cats are fighting, car alarms are blaring. But in the morning there is complete calm.

Otherwise, it is spotlessly clean, fully equipped down to the ironing board, and the hostess promptly answers questions. The TV was not very useful, since it is not a smart TV, alas. The air conditioners are silent and work great. The bed may be a little soft, but you can sleep on the sofa, it is harder.

From a location point of view, it’s ideal, 20 minutes walk to the Acropolis. Within walking distance are several pharmacies, supermarkets, and a second-hand bookstore with literature in different languages.

I definitely recommend it.

Perfect location, nice and clean apartment.
Highly recommended.

Spacious living room, fully equipped kitchen, 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms.
Great location.
nice apartment in a very good location.
Excellent apartment with great location
Nice and clean apartment in the heart of Athens!

place_name: Boutique Acropolis Apartment - Just 5 minutes walk to Acropolis Museum
review_text: Spacious apartment.  4th floor, The view on the backyard(at least for the apartment for 4 people) I don't know about the others. Small but nice balcony. Very nice style of the apartment. Very Quiet air-cons. Well equipped kitchen. Beds are comfortable, but I think the mattress soon should be changed for the big bed :) The host was very nice and welcomed us well. Close to shops,bakery downstairs, relatively cheep restaurants downstairs. Safe neighborhood. 15-20 min. walking to Acropolis and to the center. No problem finding parking places on the streets.  The only thing which bothered me was that It was hard to open the doors when you enter to the building, you need a bit to struggle with it.  I think the lock should be changed.

place_name: Boutique Acropolis Apartment - Just 5 minutes walk to Acropolis Museum
review_text:
It's 2am, and music outside is not loud, it's LOUD. Closing the windows doesn't help.
Don't stay here if you plan to sleep at night.

place_name: Boutique Acropolis Apartment - Just 5 minutes walk to Acropolis Museum
review_text: Really close to everything. The owner is so lovely and Helpful!

place_name: Boutique Acropolis Apartment - Just 5 minutes walk to Acropolis Museum
review_text: Nice apartment, everything you need is there. The center is just a stone's throw away. There are many cafes nearby where you can eat inexpensively and deliciously.

Not a great experience and the flat certainly needs an upgrade, desperately...from the walls to the furniture. The place has an unrealised potential. I liked the balcony, but then there was water dripping from the ac and slippery tiles were all wet. The flat has two toilets and only 1 bathroom. Not great for such a spacious apartment. We stayed in a group of 11 people and we only had one pair of keys. I would suggest the owner changes the name from "beautiful" to basic homes. The good point was the location: walking distance to the Centre and excellent dining options all around. Overall I would not recommend.

We have booked this aparment via booking.com several weeks ago. I really understand that all prices went up due to war in Ukraine. If the price was deemed too low, it could be subject to further negotiation. But the owners did something absolutely unacceptable and refused to let us in on the day of our arrival! I suspect that this was due to reason that they booked it outside booking.com to a third party for a higher price. They only said over the intercom downstairs "Apartment is under renovation, goodbye" and we were suddenly forced to find 3 nights accomodation for 8 people and a baby. To add insult to the injury they informed booking.com that they cancel our stay because we did not check in!!! Combined with the reviews below about the standard, I really discourage everyone from staying here.

The Place doesn't even deserve 1 star but I can not give 0 stars. It was a total desaster. I travel much and I booked many accomodations with booking.com but it was the first time that I had a situation like this. I booked a stay for 3 nights in Athens in Veikou Beautiful Homes via booking in February. The booking succeeded and I even had a contact with the owner recording airport transfer. Everything seemed to be normal. At the day of our arrival i wrote her a message from the airport via booking that we will be there in about 30 mins. Ok asked how we can get to the apartment. She didnt reply. We took a taxi to the location. And I couldn't believe my eyes and ears. The location was closed. I called her and first she didn't pick up and then she picked up and said "We are having a renovation. Hotel is closed". And she hang up 🙈 I tried to call her many times but she didn't pick up. Then I asked her Greek  neighbor to call her from the Greek number. She picked up only for a moment and said something in Greek that I didn't understand. Then she cancelled our booking in booking.com and said the reason was we didn't show up 🤯🤯🙈🙈🙈 I never saw something like this. Such an ignorance. Probably there was no renovation because it didn't looked like this. I guess she just got different clients who probably paid more. No idea. But I was traveling with my whole family. 9 people and  (among the others 1 year old baby,one ill person and two seniors).  It was already late evening. We were hungry, with all baggages, and with no place to live the next 3 days. I was searching quickly for some apartment or suite or some hotel to stay in this area (because it was very good located, close to Acropolis. That's why I booked it). But everything was already booked or too small for our group or just too expensive to book it in the very last moment.

Please people - DON'T BOOK THIS PLACE!!!

THEY ARE CHEATING

FINGER WEG!!!

TRZYMAĆ SIĘ Z DALEKA!!! OSZUŚCI!!!!

DO NOT BOOK HERE
We (4 friends) booked here 2 months before our vacation (Booking.com) The booking said "Confirmed" so no problem, right? 2 days before arriving I messaged the owner to let them know about our arrival time - no response. At the airport of departure I messaged them again - no response. Then I found another review here on Maps about the same place, saying they cancelled lat minute (literally when they were already there outside the door). Same thing: no communication whatsoever. With that review we all tried calling as soon as we landed. The first time the call got through and rang 5 times before being sent to voicemail, then for all other calls, as soon as it rang they sent us to voicemail. At the 9th or 10th call they did answer and all they said was THAT THE APARTMENT DOESN'T EXIST ANYMORE. To not go there, and that it is a problem we should solve with Booking.com.
So we were left at the airport with no confirmed booking for our group 🙃

Aaaaand of course so far they haven't cancelled the booking, so on Booking.com it shows like if we want to cancel it they'll charge us €100+. Already requested via the site for the owner to waive the fees, will update if successful.

Do not book here for any reason, they don't answer, do not let you know about anything, do not even pick up the phone. Would be 0 stars if possible.

As always, Veikou Beautiful Homes is the perfect place to stay, or start the trip to the islands, with its spacious two apartments, quietly and centrally located close to the ancient town. Super clean and a lot of space at low cost. Top.

It is a very comfortable, warm environment like your home, they have thought of everything and put it together for you. The location is very nice, there are many nice restaurants, cafes and markets around it to meet your needs. Transportation from the airport is very easy, you can walk to central places very easily, and you can also reach it very easily by metro. We recommend.
A great apartment in a good location (shops, bars, restaurants, monuments), at a very good price. Equipped with everything you need for relaxation. I sincerely recommend it

Nice apartment, very clean, with many facilities around (restaurants, cafes, tavernas, bars, supermarkets, train-metro station, etc).
Very close to major sightseeing places.

Apartment in a great location! Both close to Plaka and 2 minutes from a nice neighborhood pedestrian street with excellent restaurants and cafes. Our hosts were amazing, excellent communication and explanations of everything happening in the area. The apartment was very clean, spacious rooms with very comfortable beds and an excellent shower. Plenty of hot water, air conditioners in all rooms and living room, well equipped kitchen. They left us coffee, tea, sugar, bread, jam and honey!!! Definitely recommended and we will come back again

Excellent apartment. Very modern and well decorated. It has everything one needs for a perfect stay in Athens. Full functional kitchen, separated from the living area. Two full size bedrooms with large beds. Washing machine and drier. TV with Netflix, etc. nice large shower and bathroom, and air conditioning in all rooms.

The apartment also has a large terrace with couches and tables.

The owners were very nice and helpful with everything we needed.

I would recommend this apartment when visiting Athens. If I return I will definitely book here again.

10/10

Wonderful apartment -- spacious and close to restaurants, metro and Plaka for shopping.  The apartment has all the amenities you could want during your stay in Athens.  Ilias is an amazing host -- super friendly and helpful.  Very clean and we loved the decor!  We would recommend this place to anyone looking for a short or long-term stay in Koukaki.  We enjoyed our stay tremendously.

The ideal place to stay in Athens. We were here for 14 days and felt very comfortable. Great connection to metro and bus. The Koukaki district was the perfect choice for Athens and has a nice neighborhood. Nikolaos is the great host who was always there when we needed him and had lots of tips for us. What more do you want? Oh yes, I really enjoyed the view of Athens while showering and I miss it a lot 😉.

Absolutely loved our stay at AthenSun Apartment. It felt so much like home. Host Ilias and his partner Nek are wonderful persons, very warm and welcoming. No host ever has explained everything in detail like they do to help you. My little daughter was so much at ease here in comparison to really pricy hotels and resorts in some of the greek islands. The location and neighborhood is great too.

What can i say about this beautiful apartment that hasn’t been said? It is light and sunny and extremely clean. The apartment is furnished very tastefully. You can tell a lot of thought and pride went into putting it all together. Both bedrooms were roomy and the mattresses were very comfortable.
Well within a 15 minute walk of the Acropolis and the quaint neighborhood of Plaka with its many squares and cafes/restaurants.
Plenty of little markets very nearby. Bus stop is literally in front of the door and the Metro is down the street. We walked everywhere.
Owner is extremely accommodating and helpful and answers within an hour.
We’ve stayed in a lot of Airbnb’s across Europe, all beautiful, but this apartment surpassed them all and is at the top of our list.
Thank you Ilias for your kindness in more ways than one
Johanna

Great central location! Beautiful apartment and George was able to assist us with our transportation and tours around Athens. The residence had everything we wished for and was close to nice restaurants and bars. We are surely going to be back in our next stop to Athens.

We had a great time staying in this lovely apartment. George was a great host and helped us a lot with his recommendations and with the transportation from/to the airport. The apartment was very comfortable for our group of 4 and it was even better than the photos shows. Highly recommended for families and group of friends!

An absolutely gorgeous Airbnb apartment, spick and span, with beautiful and spacious rooms, in a central location with nearby bars and restaurants in a lovely neighborhood of Athens. The host was much helpful offering even transportation from the airport and was able to store some groceries for us in the fridge as we arrived late at night.

We stayed here over two weekends and it was very quiet and tranquil which is fantastic considering our proximity to the city centre and the nearby city tourist sites. We barely heard any noise from outside. The apartment is located in Koukaki, close to the Acropolis, and we found it very safe. And speaking with locals they all confirmed it’s a lovely, friendly and safe neighbourhood. There are countless wonderful cafes, bistros, restaurants, supermarkets, bakeries, boutiques, small bars and patisseries. The food in this area is much better quality with reasonable prices compared to the tourist areas and all run by family businesses. We also enjoyed shopping in the delicatessens to buy fresh local produce and supporting the small local family stores and restaurants. It’s close to the metro and it’s also very easy to get a taxi or public transport if required. The photos don’t do the apartment justice. It’s very spacious and modern with tasteful Greek decor. There are two large bathrooms both with showers, a modern kitchen with excellent cooking facilities and dishwasher, two balconies, a large dining area, a lounge and a useful office/desk area plus laundry. Both mattresses are good quality and very comfortable. There is air conditioning in each bedroom and lounge as well as a large tv in the lounge and two smaller tvs in each bedroom. The apartment has everything you could need for an enjoyable holiday and we felt very comfortable, relaxed and at home here. Everything is spotless and well-maintained with plentiful supplies for a relaxing vacation. The building and surrounding area is also very quiet with friendly neighbours and there is a small lift. The host is fantastic and checked in with us regularly during our stay, he provided useful information throughout our visit and helped us to book wonderful tours. He is very accommodating and responded to all messages promptly and went above and beyond to ensure we had an amazing experience.

Excellent location! Lucky to be one of the first to stay in this brand new restorated apartment! Very friendly host, helped with transfers and planning our tours even with short cruises. The best way to explore Athens staying in a shinning clean beautiful place right right where the heart of the city beats! Definitely coming back!!!
💕😍Amazing apartment

Location near the center, Grade 10. Cleanliness Grade 10. Friendly staff. All utilities. Kitchen with everything you need... Good price for Athens... I recommend. Many neighborhood restaurants in the area with good food and decent prices...

This place! Look no further if you want to be in the center of everything (even though, the rooms are super quiet.) An easy walk to all things Athens. The rooms have a clean, modern vibe and are supplied with everything you need for a great stay. The linens and pillows are top notch. The bed is comfy. I stayed two nights and wish it were more. And the security of the building is great as well. Just book it! Happy Travels!
Very impressive! Ice cold air conditioning! Great check in . Super clean - very  spacious- the bed and pillows top notch quality . Would most definitely stay again.

We stayed here for 12 nights. It is not a hotel but a modern block of c 20 rooms for rent in the Koukaki district. It is quite well located with Syrgrou Fix the nearest Metro about 600 metres away and bus and tram stops around the corner. Walking to the centre of Athens takes about a 30 minutes. There are also lots of places to eat and buy groceries a few minutes away. There is someone at the entrance to book you in and deal with any issues from early til late and a daily room service. The service is excellent with the staff there happy to help with any query. There is a lift to all 5 floors. The rooms are clean and well appointed with a fridge and coffee making machine but they don't provide tea so do take your own. If you want a kettle, just ask. The bed was soft for our taste but comfortable with plenty of pillows. The TV has BBC News or you can cast your own programmes from your phone or tablet. There is also a table and 2 chairs if you want to eat your pre-bought food but there are no cooking facilities. Overall, we enjoyed our stay, found it good value and would probably stay there again.
I stayed here for two nights during my trip to Greece and could not recommend it more. Easy check in, accommodating, and an ice cold AC. Don’t hesitate!

A wonderful apartment hotel, excellently located, near the metro, near the area of ​​recommended restaurants, close to tourist sites. The place is new, very very clean, immediate service for any question. Highly recommend
Location very good. Clean, elevator, close to shops.

The location is amazing, close to everything but not in the very noisy tourist area. The view from the balcony is amazing, you see the Acropolis from close. The apartment is cute, well furnished, very modern and high-tech. The host is very kind and helpful.

Extremely cozy and modern loft with a lovely, lovely view and a beautiful terrace!! It's very clean, well equipped and close to the subway which is a huge plus. Just beautiful, I truly enjoyed my stay!!

Also, the neighborhood is pretty quiet and safe so that's another huge plus! Overall, just absolutely lovely!!

Konstantina the manager was very nice, hospitable and super helpful. She suggested us a lot of places all of which were excellent. The loft itself is in a very good location, nicely decorated and well equipped. It's a bit too small for a couple especially during bad weather when the use of balcony is limited. However we enjoyed our stay a lot.

Everything was perfect! The loft is located near the museum of contemporary art, an area, where you find everything you need and the transportation to all the spots of interest was very easy! The loft is modern, cosy, felt like home. The terrace is wonderful! We sat every night enjoying the beautiful view of Athens and Acropolis! Many thanks to Konstantina who was super helpful and caring our during our stay making sure we have everything we need! I recommend you stay at the loft!

Excellent loft very nice view on Athens Acropolis
well designed, Comfortable, clean safe place
Excellent location, it has coffee machine and small refrigerator ,television,
Very big trace
Need to contact them before arrival to arrang the check in
Very helpful manager

The apartment was in a prime location, close to a main train station, great for going from the airport and moving around Athens. It was also wlaking distance to restaurants, and attractions (entrance to acropolis).
The place itself was spacious, and kept neat and tidy, comfy beds and pillows, it is in a 4th level, but there is a lift.
The communication with the hosts was great, no issues at all.

Within walking distance to Plaka, very clean, comfortable and quiet apartment.
Great coffee shop across the street and burek place on the same road for breakfast.
Beautiful apartment in a great location with air conditioning and many amenities. Perfect for our family of four.

Whoever is going to Athens I would definitely recommend to contact Athens For Heartbeat. The hosts were very friendly, helpful and was easy to communicate. The apartment that my family and I stayed in were was super clean, had all the necessary things needed in the apartment and the location of the apartment was great.
Awesome stay ! Reasonable price 👌🏻

The rooms are clean and comfy. The checkin process was a little confusing as there are quite a few things we need to know. But with the location and the view from the loft, it is worth the price we paid.

A spectacular penthouse! A large terrace with views of the acropolis. Everything super modern and cozy. The city center is close, just a short walk away. Without a doubt 100% recommended. It far exceeded our expectations and the price is quite affordable.

We went with high expectations, but we were disappointed. The apartment itself is very cozy, but it was quite dirty, a lot of DUST from not being CLEANED in quite some time! and the floor without mopping and with stains from a previous guest, cleanliness is essential!! A shame for such a nice apartment with excellent views. One and no more!

Fantastic apartment in an ideal location 2 metro stops from Syntagma Square. Well equipped (kitchen with hob, coffee machine, toaster). Very comfortable bed and view of the Acropolis, huge terrace with table and sun loungers.

Very nice house, too good value for the amenities, location and view! The contactless check-in experience was very good and Mrs. Maria was very helpful throughout our communication through the booking. It's the perfect apartment for a couple, I booked it as a birthday present for my boyfriend and he loved it.

place_name: Museum of Modern Art Rooms in apartment, next to metro Suggrou Fix, walk to Acropolis
review_text:
Very friendly staff. I received a lot of tips and detailed information about the house rules. The place was very clean (except for microwave) and comfy. There is a washing machine in the apartment(you only need to buy your own chemicals). Location is superior.
I was concerned about the safety of my belongings, because the rooms’ locks are super basic. I would suggest the cleaning doesn’t happen before 11 when guest prepare to check-out and want to use bathroom or kitchen before leaving.

place_name: Museum of Modern Art Rooms in apartment, next to metro Suggrou Fix, walk to Acropolis
review_text: Unfortunately not the best experience I was hoping for, as you walk in it smelt like something had died in the toilet at that smell didn't leave.. the other bathroom was bigger but if you are taller than 6ft you simply couldn't use it, paint was peeling from the walls of the bathroom poor shower facility, good size kitchen shame it hasn't been looked after, fridge freezer was a good size but dirty. The room was clean the bed was pretty hard, plenty of storage  but no hangers I personally didn't like various notes left telling you what not to do. Good value for money If you are on a strict budget, and for the location, this was actually not that bad considering how much I paid to stay there.

place_name: Museum of Modern Art Rooms in apartment, next to metro Suggrou Fix, walk to Acropolis
review_text:
DON’T COME TO THIS HOTEL!
The never sent me the instructions to self check despite I sent them my documents. When I landed in Athens I still didn’t have any instructions, I tried to call them many times (still in the available hour for them) they never picked up the phone. I found my self in the middle of the street, with no place to go, all night. The next day they said it was my fault and refused to refund me.
The worst experience with an hotel in my life, I will probably sue them

place_name: Museum of Modern Art Rooms in apartment, next to metro Suggrou Fix, walk to Acropolis
review_text:
Horrible hôtel ! The photos must be fake on Booking.com ! Extremly Noisy /horrible entrence
. The *Aparment was not a private appartement the room was just a bedroom with commun Kitchen and commun toilet and bathroom. « The 3 people bedroom » was just a double bed and a déplorable bed with a 2cm matelas ( look the photos ! ) only good point was That the Host answers quickly ! Highly NOT RECOMMANDED !

place_name: Museum of Modern Art Rooms in apartment, next to metro Suggrou Fix, walk to Acropolis
review_text:
IT IS ABSOLUTELY HORRIBLE. IT WAS VERY VERY DIFFICULT TO GET IN. SECOND THERE WAS NOBODY TO ANSWER OUR PHONES. AND FINALLY IT APPEARED TO BE A BLODDY HOSTEL.
Definitely should not visit

Good location on south side of Acropolis, just off of the busy main street so that helped reduce the traffic noise. Very nice staff, room was good, breakfast was excellent. Glad I chose this hotel! Good value for the money.

Booked this hotel for 1 night as we were headed to the airport to fly home the next day. We booked the “family suite” and upon check in we’re surprised to find out that this particular room is actually located at their 2nd location which is about 75m up the street. The receptionist took us there but it was news to us. The suite itself was okay, not particularly clean as we found Viagra wrappers/receipts on top of cabinets 🫢 and scuff marks on the walls. The suite is two levels, with the common area on the ground floor with couches, a large TV, bathroom, and small kitchenette. The stairs to the second level were spiralled and very narrow, a bit awkward to bring luggage up as the bedrooms are all on the second level. The rooms were basic and came with a robe and pair of slippers as well as a tv in each one - but the remote in one room didn’t have batteries which was frustrating. The bathroom was okay, came with toothbrushes and  toothpaste for each guest but had no shampoo/conditioner, just 2 body washes. The included breakfast was nothing special and limited to mostly sweets, cookies and cakes. The coffee machine provided lots of options which was nice. One plus is that they stored our luggage so we could explore the next day as our flight was delayed. It’s also in a very good location for getting to the Acropolis and Plaka areas. Overall it was very okay, not sure we’d return.

We had an excellent experience with the hotel @ syngrou fix. After having to leave our airbnb in the middle of the night due to a health hazard, we walked into the lobby of the syngrou fix at 1am desperate to see if they had any open rooms. The front desk staff was kind, empathetic, and set us up in a suite right away. The suite was extremely clean, well designed, high-tech, and equipped with amenities like bathrobes, slippers, and toothbrushes. The sheets on the bed were crisp and spotless. It was the perfect place to relax after a harrowing ordeal at our airbnb. Any issues we had were handled with immediate attention by hotel staff. And they had a phenomenal breakfast spread - easily the best I've ever seen. Excellent location -close to the metro, 10 minute walk to the acropolis, but still on a quiet street in a residential local neighborhood. Would definitely recommend for anyone traveling to Athens!

We had en suite with a twin room; toilet, square shower and sink squeezed in, if that part was bigger I would have awarded 5 stars. Everything couldn't fault.
BTW no lifts, we knew that but in case you don't know.

The hotel is in a very good location in Athens, in a less touristy area but still has a buzz to it. Lots of good restaurants and fun bars just a short walk and a supermarket at the end of the road up. The room was really nice and modern, I wish the balcony had a few chairs we could sit on but otherwise I would recommend this hotel 100%

So if you have booked the suites, you have to check in at the main hotel down the road, very short walk.  The suites r huge with a king bed, sitting area with a sofa bed.  Bed was ok not really massively comfortable.  There was a fridge, cooker, sink and tea and coffee facilities.   A safe and bathrobes and slippers.  The bathroom was small but adequate.   The rooms were clean with a tv, iron and not a particularly powerful hairdryer in the bathroom.  There were plug sockets on the wall near the foot of the bed on 1 side and no sockets on the other side of the bed, so make sure u have long charging cables (at least 2m) the usb sockets didn't work in our room.  They have free wifi.  Staff were very friendly and polite,  however the cleaners left our door wide open after cleaning it 1 day.  There r only 2 suites per floor, so fortunately no harm done.  Breakfast is quite basic but adequate and served in the main hotel.  Vegans and Veggies aren't really catered for unless u r happy with toast and jam.  Nothing was labelled  and no vegan milk even on request.   The cheese was with the cold meat so as a vegetarian I couldn't eat it.  There was tea, coffee, juices, cereal (hot milk in the coffee machine for porridge) bread with toaster, melba toast, Greek yoghurt, canned peaches and whole fruit and some pastries and cakes and a variety of spreads for the bread.  In addition there were fried and hardboiled eggs, toasted meat & cheese sandwiches, crossaints, again filled with meat and cheese.  I was happy with tea and toast, so wasnt too much of an issue.  My vegan friend could only have fruit, had they offered vegan milk, she could have had porridge or cereal.  They have a luggage storage cupboard after u check out.  It is in a really good location to be able to walk to the acropolis (is up hill walk), the hop on hop off bus stop and plenty of restaurants, coffee shops and other amenities within minutes.  The fire alarm went off 1 morning (we didnt realise that is what it was), but no-one came to make sure we evacuated our room!  We evacuated to err on the side of caution.   I would recommend staying here and would stay here again despite the negative points.
The location is perfect, close to restaurants, bars and stores and a 10 minute walk to the Acropolis. The room was very spacious and clean. The staff at the reception was very friendly and helpful.

Booked this hotel and did not regret it! Close to the metro stop, plenty of bars, restaurants and grocery stores. We enjoyed the area alot. The hotel staff was amazing, our room was not ready, they held our luggage while we got some lunch. Our room was not in the main building, but their suites building just down the road. We had a nice balcony and plenty of space for 2. The bed was comfortable, especially for Europe! Breakfast was great, plenty to choose from, typical European breakfast. We walked everywhere once we arrived. The night before we left, I asked the reception to book a taxi for us in the morning to the Port. The taxi was on time (early!) It was a great stay in Athens!
We had a great time in Suites@syngroufix. Thank you

Spotless room, wonderfully decorated, with well-thought-out amenities such as bathrobes, toothbrush and toothpaste, a kettle and an espresso machine.
Very polite and helpful staff, always welcoming us with a smile.
The hotel is conveniently located near the metro station, a big supermarket and a pedestrian road in Koukaki filled with cafés, bars and restaurants to enjoy.
Would definitely recommend! Thank you! 10/10

The hotel and staff were outstanding in this hotel! The rooms had everything you could ask for and looked exactly as they do in the photos, all very clean and well equipped.  The location is perfect to get a sense of local Athenian culture as well as being close to the tourist spots.  The neighbourhood felt very safe and I could not fault my 4 nights in this wonderful hotel!

Had a fantastic stay here. The room was nice, very clean and very convenient walking distance to Acropolis. But I cannot speak highly enough of the staff, all so helpful and friendly. They were a huge help when our flight out of Athens was delayed. Highly recommend!

This hotel was literally close to everything we wanted to do. In fact there is even a grocery store, pharmacy, and the metro near by (steps away). The Metro also takes you directly to the airport as well - great location.

We arrived late to the hotel, and upon contacting the hotel Angie answered and informed us of the normal rate for taxi and informed us how to get a hold of one and where to go! When we arrived at the hotel Angie was wonderful, welcoming and informative -she waited for us to arrive to check us in! They left a cake for us in our room to celebrate our anniversary which was a great way for us to end the day as we were travelling the entire day!

In terms of service, extremely clean, amenities are amazing… in fact my husband and I have stayed at numerous 5 star hotels around the world and even they don’t have the number amenities this one does!

Lastly you can see the view of the Parthenon/acropolis from the rooftop as well! This hotel is amazing I will recommend everyone I know to stay here for sure and I myself will surely stay here time and time again when I visit Athens!

We stayed 4 days in Koniama Acropolis and we were very happy with the decision. The location is perfect, 10 minutes walking distance from the Acropolis, and 1 minute distance to the metro and the trolley car. The people working there were really kind, helping us a lot with which places to visit there and how to move around easily. The hotel is very new, and all the facilities are perfect. Everything was really clean and comfortable. The breakfast option was in a typical greek cafe, with typical greek desserts and coffee, and very tasty. If at some point we decide to visit again Athens, I will choose again this hotel without no doubt. Totally recommended!

Always a pleasure for me to go to Koniama Acropolis Hotel. Great rooms, great service.
Special mention to Fotini, whom is a great person, hope to see her for my next stay at Koniama !

Our stay at this apartment in Athens was fantastic! The location was excellent, with easy access to the main attractions and public transport. The apartment itself was clean, modern, and equipped with everything we needed for a comfortable stay.

The host was incredibly helpful and responsive, not only providing great recommendations but also arranging a taxi to the airport, which made our departure stress-free. We especially appreciated the attention to detail and the care taken to ensure a smooth check-in and check-out process.

We highly recommend this apartment for anyone visiting Athens and would gladly stay here again in the future!

We stayed 4 nights at Absolute Athens XII and are happy to confirm all the positive reviews: the appartment is ideally located to reach all athens Highlights on foot, has great restaurants nearby - while the apartment itself is perfectly clean, relatively calm and perfectly equipped. And not to forget the great service by the Team- as to welcome fruits and Marmelades or the Transfer to and from the airport. Thank you very much!!
Cute apartment! The toilet is its own room and is kinda small so tall/big people may struggle. Otherwise is lovely

Perfect for us! Good location - 10 minutes to walk to the old town. Helpful people working there. The apartment was clean and had lots of amenities. Fresh fruit, water, jam and juice in the fridge. Coffee and filter to brew coffee in the morning - perfect if you want to enjoy a coffee on the balcony before heading out in the morning. Clean towels, good beds and clean slippers to use inside.

We stayed with 3 kids and the smallest slept on a sofa bed.

There is a 24/7 bakery 2 minutes walk on the mainstreet offering lots and lots of baked stuff, pastry, drinks and even warm food.

The building is a typical greek old builing that does not look really nice on the outside, but don’t be scared.

If for price and value alone it deserves five stars. But not exactly what I expected from the pictures I saw from Expedia . It is roughly renovated and still shows the age of the apartment. The down sides in the apartment is only one small bathroom for a  two bedroom is less than adequate. Kitchen is not renovated and the washing machine is broken (there is a free laundry room that I haven't discovered yet).
After all for what I paid, you can't complain.  But if I can choose again I would go for a more expensive one. This is solely a personal choice.
Excellent, clean and in a nice spot!

A beautiful house with an elegant taste, one breathe away from the metro and tram station,in combination with the amazing hostess, makes this place irresistible!
Live the experience!

It is very close to the meter and serves to go to any destination you wish. It is close to the Acropolis and the museums! It is also close to the center where you can go and enjoy the route on foot! It is spotlessly clean and despite being in the center, there is no fuss at all. Also, the hostess is very helpful, and explains everything to you, whatever questions you may have!!!
Very beautiful apartment that corresponds exactly to the photos with a very kind hostess, in a very good spot in the center of Athens in front of metro and tram.
It is perfect...close to the center and in general I recommend it as the hostess is very welcoming

Excellent accommodation!!!! Comfortable!!! Spotless!!! Close to everything you need!!! Easily accessible!!! The hostess is friendly, pleasant and always available for anything we needed!!! He gave us instructions for everything!!! I highly recommend!!!!!

place_name: Your Address in Koukaki by Athenian Homes
review_text: Excellent spacious apartment, with 2 separate rooms and a living room. The apartment has a washing machine, refrigerator, air conditioning in every room and hall, hot water. Each room has a balcony-terrace. Near the house there is a descent to the metro, a 10-minute walk to the center. There are many cafes, bars and restaurants around the house. Very clean apartment, renovated in 2022. The owner of the apartment also took care of a wonderful time (wine, coffee, cookies, sugar, olive oil, etc.) Everything you need. In the shower there are towels, shampoo, hair conditioner, hand soap. The apartment has high-speed Wi-Fi. The apartment is located on the 1st floor. I recommend to everyone!

place_name: Your Address in Koukaki by Athenian Homes
review_text: Very tasty food

Spacious and impeccably clean. Being close to the Acropolis and the metro made exploring the city a breeze. There were plenty of great dining options around, although a bit of a walk to the other side of town, it was totally worth it in a city as vibrant as Athens. Highly recommended!

We recently stayed at City Lights Athen and were thoroughly impressed with its exceptional location in the heart of the city, providing easy access to all public transportation and within a radius of 2.5 km or a 20-minute walk to all significant historic buildings such as the Acropolis and Parliament building of Greece, and the main town centre. We were delighted to discover a variety of dining options within a short walking distance of the hotel. Within just 3 to 5 minutes, we found an excellent selection of restaurants serving various cuisines including Indian restaurants.

A very comfortable apartment albeit with a very tiny elevator to the rooms. Excellent location in terms of the closeness to the metro. No cleaning done while we were there and the cleaning lady hurried us out of the place before our time of departure. She spoke no English so we could not communicate and she ended up throwing our breakfast out while we were putting our luggage in storage for our late flight.
The host however was on the ball when we needed help logging on etc the first day. Definitely a place to stay in for reasonable comfort and rent
Everything was just great, spacious, clean and comfortable

One of the best in Athens !!!
Great location, very clean and sweet.

place_name: Hub Suites, Luxury living in Athens
review_text: We had a great short but sweet stay at Hub Suites, its in a perfect location with easy check-in & out accessibility. One thing I would mention is the room we stayed in (S4), the inside wardrobe light didn’t turn off even when we used force to close it, so we didn’t have complete darkness when we slept. But besides that everything was great.

place_name: Hub Suites, Luxury living in Athens
review_text:
This place is definitely one of the best we've stayed so far. The S1 suite is simply amazing. Large and comfortable, great the design and the modern style, the tub is candy. On one side the view of Parthenon from the bed and on the other seeing all the city from the terrace was speechless, well done indeed!
The location is fantastic, just outside the touristic area but still in a quiet and pleasant neighborhood with all facilities, you can easily move by foot evewhere (15 min walk from the top of Acropolis) or take public transports (metro/tram/bus stops are litteraly next to the place). The host is more than kind, always very helpful, and communication simple and clear. More than advised, a true gem. We'll come back for sure!

place_name: Hub Suites, Luxury living in Athens
review_text:
We spend 4 nights in the Hub Suites and would definitely like to come back.
The design was fantastic, very warm, welcoming plus you have everything that you may need for a stay away from home. We had a beautiful terrace with view on Acropolis and the city.
The neighborhood has some amazing food places and cute art galleries.

place_name: Hub Suites, Luxury living in Athens
review_text: Amazing apartment not far from Plaka. Very clean and comfortable

place_name: Hub Suites, Luxury living in Athens
review_text: Lovely and cozy style, comfortable accomodations and a really nice terrace, that we couldn't sadly use because of the weather. Also a nice view to the Acropolis from the window. The only problem is that the last day, before leaving, we found a cockroach in the restroom.
Great place and location
Great apartment in a very good location
Very nice place but a little small, just right for 2 people, but perfect location with minimarket nearby
The apartment was amazing. Close to ftelia beach. The host Neoklis really helpful with everything we needed and his kindeness unique! Highly recommended!
Really amazing

Good apartments for a good price! We had a basement apartment with a terrace, which doesn't have a good view, but it is really nice for just sitting there and having your breakfast. This apartment has everything you need for cooking, also clean room and comfortable bed. Highly recommend!

The apartment is situated at a reasonable distance from the main attractions- about 15 min walk. It is small but clean and averagely quiet. The check-in/out was super easy. Great option for a weekend stay.

Few apartments and rooms for rent. Very clean and loaded with everything needed, dishes, good coffee, wine and juice. Misses some tea and maybe explanation which exactly place do you get since some are with windows and living area while other are basement type. Overall well furnished and comfortable.

Location central ✔
Walkable✔
Comfortable Studio & bed✔
Gas leak in the apartment across the hall that prompted an evacution of building & 2 Fire Trucks✔
Made the best of the gas leak situation ✔
Slight lingering smell of gas in my bathroom for next 2 days✔
No nice Welcome Basket in room til mentioned it to owner✔
Got Basket later✔
Easy walk to metro✔
Restaurants and coffee walkable distance ✔
Very Good value. Small, but very charming & clean, quite central, and a welcome basket. Thumbs up!

Elena went above and beyond to make our stay unforgettable. From the moment we arrived, she greeted us with warmth and a friendly smile, instantly making us feel at home. Her local knowledge was invaluable, recommending hidden gems and the best dining spots nearby. Elena consistently checked in to ensure we had everything we needed, showing genuine care and professionalism. Thanks to her exceptional service, our trip was seamless and enjoyable. She truly made our stay special!

The room was clean and neat.

The shower would back up and cause slight flooding and there’s mold issues for sure.

The Kitchenette was great although the cooking items were old, dirty and scratched.

The noise from the road below is very loud. It felt like we were sleeping in the middle of the road. The windows didnt close well.

Location was otherwise a convenient short walk to Acropolis and some less touristy restaurants.

The highlight of our stay was undoubtedly the friendly and attentive staff. Upon arrival, they took the time to recommend top tourist attractions and local dining favorites, which added a personal touch to our visit. My wife and I stayed in the Attic Suite, the largest room in this seven-story hotel. Located on the 7th floor as the only room on that level, it features a private Wi-Fi network and daily breakfast delivery. The room was clean, spacious, and offered a spectacular view of the Acropolis through floor-to-ceiling glass panels. Blackout curtains ensured a restful night.

The hotel is conveniently located within an 8-minute walk from Plaka, one of Athens’ main hubs. While the old-style elevator, common in European buildings, can feel tight for two people with luggage, it efficiently serves up to the 6th floor. Guests staying in the Attic Suite will need to take a short flight of stairs to reach the 7th floor.

The suite includes a large bedroom, European and USB outlets for easy device charging, and a Nespresso machine with small portion cups. The bathroom, while functional, has limited counter space and a slightly awkward showerhead.

Additional conveniences include a 24/7 front desk, a secure entrance accessible with the room key, and a nearby gas station for snacks and essentials. The hotel’s location on a main road also makes it easy for taxis and Ubers to find.

The location is good, but the hotel's maintenance is terrible. Our room have a serious problem with the pipes. They give us a room with a blocked sink in the toilet and only fixed on the other day. While using the kitchen sink it bubbled into the bathroom drain. The shower was dirty with water liking from everywhere and also blocked, provoking a flood into de room. The sofa bed is super uncomfortable. The windows are massively dirty to the point that you can barely see outside. The curtains also needs maintenance as it goes outside the trail and can't block the sun properly. The hotel is an old residential building adapted to a hotel but with very low maintenance and only one staff available.

We stayed in this hotel for 4 nights in Sept 2024 and was big mistake.  We are very surprised and disappointed that there was NO HOT WATER most of the time.  We'd wake up to find no hot water, and then we would have to go to lobby to complain, and each time they said "OK we will turn on the hot water and please wait 30+ minutes".  After waiting the water would be only warm.  Very odd they would turn on water heater by request! Bathroom also very dirty and moldy see pictures.

I have stayed in Marble House for 3 nights and it was very good experience. The place is very nice and clean, lobby has a lot of mirrors which I like a lot. Staff is very friendly and helpful. Our room had two bed, small fridge, closet and balcony. The restroom with shower was shared with one other room.

Within 3 minutes of walk, you have plenty of bars, coffee places and restaurants. There is also subway station 5 minutes walk away. Acropolis museum is about 15-20 minutes away.

I highly recommend this place for short stays near city center of Athens.

I stayed at Marble House for 6 nights. And I am happy that I did.
Marble House is located in a good neighbourhood, close to Metro station, and other services.
The rooms are clean, comfortable and satisfactory.
The staff are knowledgeable, courteous, helpful and friendly.
I would certainly stay at Marble House again.

I've got been 2 nights this week in Marble House. I've seen it in Lonely Planet, and after the seek I choose this place. Great choice, easy to reserve, welcome suggestions by email really useful. The place is nice, comfortable, clean, quiet (maybe in high season it changes, don't know). Very well located, the staff, they seems more like the owners or really friendly people, give me all information I needed. I can only speak well. If I have the change to come back to Athina sure repeat. Thanks, Rosa from Madrid.

We loved staying at Marble House! Such kind and accommodating staff. And fabulous AC! There were some nice cafe/restaurants in the area and it was a nice walk to the acropolis. Probably not the best if anyone in your group has a hard time with stairs, although it depends on what level your room is on. And the staff can carry your bags for you. They were also very accommodating for a late check out even during a busy time of year! Of course that can't always happen but we so appreciated the attention to detail on their end! The only suggestion I would have is a TV we could cast to.

We recently spent five nights at the Marble House Hotel in Athens, and it was an absolute delight. From the moment we arrived, we were struck by how impeccably clean our room was, and the warm, welcoming nature of the staff made us feel right at home. They went above and beyond, offering us insider tips on the best local restaurants and authentic Greek taverns. Thanks to their fantastic recommendations, we avoided tourist traps and enjoyed delicious meals daily, immersing ourselves in the true flavors of Athens.

The hotel’s location is perfect—nestled in a genuine Athens neighborhood that’s within comfortable walking distance of the city center, yet away from the hustle and bustle. If you’re looking for a cozy, family-run boutique hotel experience and prefer to steer clear of the larger chains, Marble House is the perfect choice. Our stay here was nothing short of wonderful, and we will definitely be returning whenever we find ourselves in Athens again!

Highly recommended!

Big Apartment with 2 bedrooms. Aircon in every room. Fully equiped kitchenette with oven, kettle, coffee maker, sandwich maker and the owner also keeps Greek coffee powder and Jam packets for breakfast. Close to Victoria station.

Our stay at Heritage Hill Hotel in Athens was fantastic! The room was spotless and beautifully designed, making us feel instantly comfortable. The breakfast each morning was delicious, with fresh, local ingredients. They make absolutely amazing coffee for your breakfast! The staff were incredibly polite and welcoming, and the hotel was clean. Highly recommend for anyone visiting Athens!

One of the worst stays of my travel career:
- very smelly room (mold/canal). I was allowed to change rooms, the second one was better but still smelled
- very loud on busy street, I am not noise sensitive but I could only sleep with earplugs
- careless cleaning staff: Two high quality white clothing items went missing on two consecutive days, I assume they were mistaken for laundry
- rude staff and management: I was accused of lying about the missing clothing items and treated without much respect and very slow response times

Location is fabulous. Located on one of the main streets, so options for Bus and Uber was easy. They have an incredible restaurant on the rooftop, Zale with stunning views of both sunset and the Acropolis Temple. Staff were very friendly but the rooms where a little tight especially with two travellers staying a week. Located close to bars, coffee shops, cafes, bakeries and checkout the Indian reactant next door.

Perfect hotail in all senses. Location is in 5 minutes from all the historical sights. Personnel is very friendly and always happy to help. Breakfest was perfect and the restaurant on the last floor deserves a Michelin star.

This hotel is nice. Aesthetically very pleasing. However, the details are not what you’d expect from an alleged 4-star hotel. The toilet seat was broken; shampoo, soap, etc. were never refilled; the safe did not work; and the breakfast was the least appealing of all hotels I’ve stayed at in Athens. The walls are paper thin and you hear absolutely everything. The cleaning personnel was incredibly loud all day.

The house is perfect, just like in the photos! Fully equipped, comfortable and clean! With many options for going out in the wider area but also very close to points of interest in the city! Ideal choice for the center of Athens!

place_name: The Athens Explorer - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Conveniently located and close to many attractions, restaurants and shops.  The apartment is well maintained, clean and with everything needed for a comfortable stay.  Perfect for a group or family with children.  The hostess was kind and helpful.   I’d recommend without hesitation.

place_name: The Athens Explorer - My Greek Vacations
review_text: That apartament was more than we expected . It looks the same as on a pictures or even better- super specious, clean, modern with all  necessary equipment. Close to shops and walking distance from all important monuments. Definitely recommend! We loved our stay!

place_name: The Athens Explorer - My Greek Vacations
review_text: Excellent rental. Exactly as shown in the photos. Immaculate. TVs in each room and individually controlled air conditioning. Great location with many great restaurants within walking distance. Esmeralda arranged our transfer to and from the airport making it very convenient for us. Highly recommend My Greek Vacations rentals.

place_name: The Athens Explorer - My Greek Vacations
review_text: 5 Stars - the apartment is in a great location, it’s been beautifully renovated, super clean, well equipped with extra towels and bed linen, along with all the mod cons. Restaurants, metro, tram, sites, shops, supermarkets etc are right on the doorstep. During our stay our needs changed from a 2 week holiday stay to 8 weeks due to Covid. This apartment was great for both a holiday stay and long term stay. All bedrooms had workstation so it meant everyone had a desk to do remote schooling and work from. Mary and Esmeralda were great hosts and responded immediately to all our text messages and calls and even provided a complimentary clean and change of bed linen, which was very generous and appreciated. We would stay at any of the apartments hosted by Mary and Esmeralda. It’s places and hosts like this that put ones faith in online bookings and Airbnb.

place_name: The Athens Explorer - My Greek Vacations
review_text:
Lovely spacious, clean apartment in an area with lots of very tempting cafes, bakeries, bars and restaurants.
We walked to all the major sights and attractions from the accommodation - would thoroughly recommend.

Had a lovely stay at the apartment. Lots of space. Everything was clean. Location is perfect, super close to all the hot spots. All in walking distance. The host Hector was very helpful with all the ins and outs of the city. Definitely will come back if I visit Athens again.

We have stayed here for 2 days .Mr.Hector was a great host. Gave all the information about the area . And guided us with tourist palm let.room had all the necessary facilities including kitchen ware and washing machine.
Room was spacious .Clean and perfect.Highly recommended !!
There is everything you need in the apartment. The location is also quite central.
Great location! Great service! Very nice apartment.

Stayed with my partner and son at Blue Ark from Wednesday 14th to Tuesday 20th August.
After a delayed flight and struggling to find the address I contacted Hector the owner, who sent a link of directions to the property. When we arrived at the property Hector greeted us. The whole experience with him was amazing. A bottle of wine was left in the fridge with a loaf of bread and cereal supply. The apartment was complete with kitchen utensils and plates etc. It was very nice fully equipped place to stay. Hector was very helpful and WhatsApp me links to recommended Restaurants, local supermarket and local beaches. Our stay was perfect. Thank you.

place_name: Blue Ark Boho Stay at Acropolis
review_text:
We went from Thessaloniki to Athens, a trip of 3 moms with 3 children of 12 years old!!!! We stayed 2 nights in this apartment!!!! What can I say... Nice area, everything at our feet, the apartment had everything!!! Treats for the children and us bread jams cereals for breakfast. Shampoo, towels, hair dryer, etc. Fully equipped!!!! Akis and Hektor are willing to answer any question and help us with anything we need!!!! Athena perfect!!!! If I find myself there again I will stay there!!!!
Thank you very much!!!!!!

I stayed here at the end of July with my two boys, and we absolutely loved it! Such a cozy little gem! The hotel is perfectly located just a short walk from the city center, making it super easy to explore Athens on foot. Plus, there's public transport nearby, which made it so convenient to get to the beach! The staff were incredibly friendly and went above and beyond when we had an issue with a forgotten bag—they helped us recover it without any hassle. The highlight, though, is definitely the stunning rooftop. The view of the Acropolis is unbeatable, and the restaurant up there is top-notch. I would absolutely stay here again!

Wonderful experience! We stayed here one night prior to our cruise. The staff is very kind and helpful. We received welcome drinks at the rooftop bar and also had excellent authentic Greek food. The hotel itself is beautiful with a modern look. And you have a great view of the Acropolis from the rooftop bar!
The room had a good amount of space for us. The shower was a little smaller than we are used. They were also to take our luggage for us while we explored the town before and after our reservation. The shop and restaurants are a short walk from the hotel. Overall great experience!!

Best part of the stay is the wonderful staff and the beautiful common area. The room was nicely appointed but poorly lit (need a light near the entry door) and the bathroom was poorly designed — strange tub with very little room to stand to take a shower then the shower curtain sticks to you. Hardly any room to step out of the tub/shower without bumping into the vanity or toilet. No outlet in bathroom so the hair dryer sits on the desk in the main part of the room and is plugged underneath. First room I had suffered from an unpleasant smell in the drains; second room was better. The staff absolutely could not be any nicer, but the room was a disappointment.

The staff is friendly, and the room is clean, though it is small. The elevator is tiny, but I later discovered that many elevators in Greek hotels are similar. The only downside was the shower. However, the location is perfect, just 5 minutes from the Acropolis Museum.

Everything about this place was perfect! The air conditioning was heaven after long hot days of exploring, great location to get around, stocked with everything we needed and the balcony was such a nice touch to enjoy our morning coffee (provided) and our wine & snacks from a local gem down the street. The only issue was the front door to the building itself definitely needs to be replaced, but it was worth every second of minor inconvenience! Highly recommend staying here if you're visiting Athens! Wonderfully romantic for couples.
Highly recommend this apartment for affordable accommodations in Greece.

Very nice and spacious apartment. Very clean, modern and equipped with everything necessary. Balconies were very helpful for us as we smoke. Location is great - 15-20 min walk to Acropolis. Metro and other public transport is 5-7 min walk. The host Stella and her husband are incredibly nice polite and helpful! We ( the family of 5 ) spent a great and very joyful week in Athens.

Amazing host, amazing place. I recommend it to families or friends visiting Athens.
Keep up the good job.
Fantastic 😊

Stella's apartment is perfect for a family stay in the most quiet and homely atmosphere you can find in Athens. The apartment is very spacious, clean and equipped with everything you need and more. Beyond that, the host Stella is very nice and helpful, available and helpful in everything that is required. There is private parking for the apartment, which is very necessary and helpful, and the distance to the center is an easy and short walk. It is highly recommended to stay at Stella's place!
Stella - Thank you very much for your warm and inviting hospitality! We had a great time staying in the apartment!

We had a great stay here on our recent trip to Athens. The service was very good, all of the staff members were friendly and helpful. The room was really nice and clean, with comfortable beds and a nice shower. A really nice touch was the espresso machine inside the room! The location is close to the city center, close to the Acropolis. I would highly recommend this place.

Overall, I give this place 5 stars.  Getting there, I had a fallen down an escalator. Not the entire escalator, thank goodness, but the first 7 or so steps.  That left me with 3 large scratches down my right shin. Because of that,  I needed some medical supplies to clean up and bandages.  When we got to the hotel, I asked the front desk for some.   Well, Paul was extremely helpful and I feel he went above and beyond.  Not only did he go get the supplies, he actually cleaned it up for me and put some antiseptic iodine on it.  I want expecting that type of help from a stranger.  Paul definitely deserves recognition, and a huge thank you from me.  Like I said, he went above and beyond to help me out and make sure I was taken care of.  Not to mention,  he is just a very pleasant and genuinely nice man.  I can't say enough about him.  If you decide to stay here, which I highly recommend, tell Paul hello and shake his hand.  He will go out of his way to make sure you enjoy your stay.

Thank you to Acropolis Magenta, it was a great stay! The staffs are friendly and helpful. The rooms are clean, quiet and the air con worked very well. Clean towels and very comfortable bed and pillow. The location is terrific, very close to the acropolis museum, Mars Hill, eateries and acropolis entrance. Easily walkable to Plaka district. Very pleased with it and will be happy staying here again in the future.

Adding a second post because the first one was written during my stay and I wanted to add a bit more of what happened. 1. When asking for extra towels after we waited until the next day when they said they would give more towels the concierge laughed at me saying you will not be receiving any more towels during your stay because you check out tomorrow. I assume that the reasoning changed because at this point they seen our bad review and they just didn’t care about the image they are portraying to people like us who came from America to enjoy their country and spend our hard earned money here. 2. The electric cut out conveniently about the same time as our check out. They give you a card which you need to insert into a slot in the wall to turn the electric on. I checked to make sure I didn’t just have to take it out and reinsert it and it didn’t work. We had a lot of breast milk in the refrigerator that would have been lost if we hadn’t been awake already and about to head out the door. 3. The overall experience was bad. The concierge/hosts for these rooms are all rude when it comes to any issues. From the water(you will be provided one bottle and asked to refill it from a fountain in the lobby. You will be charge for an extra cleaning if you ask for towels so I suggest that if you do need extra towels just go to a store and buy them. It’s almost $12 in US Dollars (10 euros) for extra towels which is just mind blowing to me how they can charge that much to “borrow” extra towels. Also, they told me had I wanted better service or to be provided with extra towels I should have stayed at a 5 star hotel? Pretty much they said in less words that they would not treat us any better because if they treated us better they would have to treat everyone better. Honestly the worst part I’m of our trip to Athens.

**"Horrible Experience - Stay Away!"**

We stayed here during our honeymoon, and unfortunately, this hotel completely ruined the experience. While check-in was simple enough, it became apparent very quickly that this place cuts corners wherever possible. They give you one complimentary water bottle and expect you to come downstairs to refill it—no additional bottles allowed. The hotel also doesn’t provide washcloths, and if you need an extra towel, you’re forced to pay for it, which is ridiculous.

The rooms are small but decently kept, although it’s clear that they are trying to save money wherever possible—another red flag is the card system to operate the electricity in your room. Despite the price being low upfront, expect to be nickel-and-dimed for everything once you arrive.

To top it off, the staff was downright rude and dismissive. They had no regard for our personal situation and treated us with complete indifference. We tried to explain that we were on our honeymoon and didn’t want to deal with these petty issues, but the staff, including management, just didn’t care. Their attitude was unprofessional and inconsiderate. It’s unbelievable that we had to argue over something as simple as an extra towel. I would not recommend this hotel to anyone—there are much better places where you’ll be treated with respect."

This was a very lovely place and well maintained.  I was surprised at how comfortable it was.  I give it a 5 star at to how nice it was and how professional they were.  Only bad thing is the view and the washer was out of order.  But there was coffee and water in the fridge.

Spent 5 nights at 2b/2b apartment, spacious, clean. Convenient location, walking distance to all major attractions and plenty of restaurants. Great communication from staff. We really enjoying the place.

Great location and my family and I prefer these types of rentals to hotels when staying in European cities. The extra space is nice. We had an easy walk to the Acropolis. The team was very welcoming and met us at the apartment.

A great place to stay in walking distance to the Acropolis. The rooms and the living spaces are designed with comfort and a resort home in mind. In walking distance to a grocery store, restaurants, and major attractions. Eat at cafes by the Acropolis or the neighborhood restaurant and bakeries. Enjoyed every minute in the area and the I can't wait to come back and stay here again.

Couldn’t ask for a better place to stay in Athens !
Perfect location just minutes from the Acropolis
Stunning luxury apartment that has anything you could think of to make your stay comfortable.
Alex the host was so nice and attentive, helped us with everything we needed and gave us good advise on restaurants 😊

Property is exactly as in the photos - highly recommended!

Very  nicely decorated, clean and spacious apartment. The location is excellent: in a quite street on walking distance from the main attractions and lively restaurant and shopping areas. Comfortable beds  (pillows are really good) and good WiFi. Hosts made us feel very welcome.

Beautiful apartment for a beautiful stay. Big living-room, nice decorations (loved the lighting in the kitchen) and well-equipped. Very close to nice restaurants and supermarkets. Owner was very kind and welcoming. The stay was absolutely blissful
Best place and price in Athens!
Great location, good welcome and apparently very clean and cozy!

Top Notch!!!

This would actually have to get 6 Stars. We stayed in a wonderful luxury apartment in Falirou Street (Bill and John operates three apartments at this site). Every little detail was perfectly designed. Large TV, spacey living room. Top clean bathrooms with most modern features. Fully equipped kitchen including dish washer and laundry machine. On top we could use the free Netflix account of the apartment. It was hard to motivate the kids to leave the apartment and take a walk in Athens. We just all felt too well inside.
The staff was extremely friendly and helpful. We were absolutely happy!!!

Thanks to Dennis from Bill and John. He picked us up on the street and handled over the appartment in a very proffesional and friendly style.
Appartment was a bit "used" and we had some noisy neighbors. In General was the equipment and furniture 5 Stars and we had compared with a hotel for same price range a good stay. Our car parked 50m away in a Valet Parking Parkhouse for 15€.
In the bathroom you can indicate a bit mold on the upper wall which should get fixed soon I would suggest.
Hot water maker was super clean!
Marvelous apartment!!! Well equipped with everything you will need. Beautifully designed. Good Price. Kind hostes. Highly recommended. I'm sure you will not be disappointed. We enjoyed it very much.
There is no parking, the hotel is a lot smaller than described, thr location isn't the best with no view of anything. I wouldn't go back
Beautiful architecture.

place_name: Apartment in the Middle of Everything
review_text:
We stayed here for three nights, 21-24 May. As advertised, this apt is literally in the middle of everything. The location was on point.

The apartment was very spacious. The bathroom had a nice deep tub. This was great for recovery after walking all day. The washing machine was a very nice to have. For those worried about the heat, don't worry. The AC was ice cold.

We highly recommend staying here.

place_name: Apartment in the Middle of Everything
review_text: Nice and spacious appartment in the walking distance to the Acropolis. The restaurant, shop and bakery in the neigbourhood. And a very friendly and helpfull owner. I highly recommend.

place_name: Apartment in the Middle of Everything
review_text: Good

This property is in a great location near all the tourist spots.

It is modern, cosy & compact. With all the amenities for our 1 week stay.

Pros & Cons:

Pros:

1. Easy check in & Check out.

2. Close to the metro & main sights are in walking distance.

3. Good hot water, TV etc.

4. It is located in a quiet neighbourhood with a food market on during the week.

5. Friendly neighbourhood.

6. Aircon was great - we didn’t use it much though.

7. Wi-Fi was very fast.

8. The owner seems friendly.

9. They have a cosy balcony not private but it was nice.

Cons:

1. Upon arrival, we noticed our room smelt of cigarette smoke.

Despite it saying ‘no smoking’ on or door.

I’m not sure if this was someone before us, but the entrance to the flats also smell like this. This was the main issue we didn’t like.

* But I don’t think this is down to the owner, but possibly other guests.

2. We had an issue with ants near our sink area as seen in photos. But we were able to deal with this. I think you get these issues in hotter countries?

3. I’m not sure if it was just our room, but it was fairly noisy with people above us and the cleaner in the morning it was fairly loud, but they have to clean the apartments so, that’s that.

4. It was a little dusty with a big cobweb on our ceiling.

Overall, we loved Athens and we liked this apartment.

We would have liked to have some water in our fridge at least after brining our suite-cases up the hill, ( I noticed other people had water from reading other reviews).

However, there was a local supermarket near-by.

Despite the smell of cigarette smoke, it had everything we needed for our stay cooking utensils, microwave, fridge, hob, bathroom & double bed.

Overall, it was okay and we would stay here again, it was a smooth and relaxing check-in & check- out process. Thank you.

I spent a few nights here in the winter. Service was outstanding, communication with hosts was great. The room was quite small yet very well equipped. Comfortable bed, small balcony, small kitchenette, functional bathroom. Very clean and quiet. Highly recommend.

Cozy clean room but serves its purpose and well equipped with items like oil and salt if you have to cook and soap and towels and iron.
Every early Monday mornings, there will be and ope- market on the street right when you open the gate. So if you have car, it will be better to park it a little bit away on Sunday evening and you will easily find a free parking space 2-5mins away. The Monday market sells affordable fruits,clothes etc.

Stayed in this cute lil apartment for 4 nights with my wife and it was so cosy. It had everything we needed. The bed was comfortable and very convenient location. Experienced what its like staying in Athens neighbourhood. The owner was very responsive too. Safe environment to stay at. The interior deco is beautiful.

Excellent apartments to rent and enjoy Athens. I will definitely stay here again when I return. A 20 minute walk or less to attractions. In a residential neighborhood with an amazing market on weekdays. Excellent food around the corner and small grocery stores as well. Lazlo is incredibly responsive and goes above and beyond to make sure you are comfortable and happy. I had a few small problems but they are not worth mentioning as Lazlo fixed them and would do the same for everyone who stays here.

I felt like a local staying at Dinostratus House and I highly recommend you stay here while you explore this amazing city!

Great place! Clean, quiet and quant. Super comfortable bed. Use the freenow app to get a taxi anywhere near city center. The location around the apartment has great restaurants and a few pubs. I highly recommend!

A tastefully presented,cozy, clean and one of the top apartments for anyone looking for quality, practicality and confidence in their holidays. Inside you'll find everything you need, whilst being comfortable and quiet. Will return without hesitation!
Clean, very comfortable,  it's just difficult walking to rech the location.
