Every single staff member at this hotel is incredible! They are so friendly, welcoming and go out of their way to provide the best service imaginable. They truly made our stay in Greece amazing. This hotel has a very bright future ahead!

Also have to mention, the breakfast and rooftop restaurant "Opposite 507" are top notch. The view of the Parthenon from the rooftop is beautiful.

Would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Athens.

Thank you again 507 Athens!

I cannot say enough good things about the 507 Athens. Everyone is helpful, friendly, and understanding. We had an issue with my mobility device and Cleopatra went above and beyond to help me resolve the issue. Also, if we had an issue with our room they were so quick to answer our question or come up and resolve that problem.

Be sure and stay here when visiting Athens

We stayed at 507 Athens for two nights prior to leaving for our cruise. Due to our wonderful stay there, we made reservations for the night we return from our cruise.  The location is within a nice walk (or 5 minute Uber) to The Acropolis.  Kleopatra and Pano are very friendly, communicative, and gracious hosts.  The rooftop restaurant has a delicious menu and a spectacular view of The Parthenon on the Acropolis.   The rooms are modern and comfortable.  We encourage everyone to stay at 507 Athens!

place_name: InterContinental Athenaeum Athens, an IHG Hotel
review_text: Such a beautiful hotel. If youre on the top floors with a suite, you get an AMAZING large LARGE balcony with a view of the Acropolis. Also some of the most friendly warm and extremely beautiful/attractive staff/guests as well. This place is high class indeed and welcomes travelers from all over. Its close to the city center as well with lots to see and do around the area.

place_name: InterContinental Athenaeum Athens, an IHG Hotel
review_text:
This well-known hotel features modern rooms with a well-stocked minibar—definitely a pleasant surprise compared to the empty minibar at the Intercontinental Vienna. If your budget allows, I highly recommend choosing a room with a view of the Acropolis; the sight of this ancient landmark in the distance is truly breathtaking. However, be aware that your view might be slightly obstructed by some odd yellow structures nearby. Additionally, the soundproofing in the rooms could be improved, as it's easy to be disturbed while trying to sleep. Overall, it’s a great choice for those wanting a comfortable stay with a touch of history.

雅典還行的住宿

place_name: InterContinental Athenaeum Athens, an IHG Hotel
review_text:
I’m an IHG loyalist. I can tell you the difference between the breakfast buffet at the Intercontinental hotels in Rome and Athens (sheeps milk yogurt vs honey in the comb) and quality is a hallmark of the experience. It’s a luxury hotel. That’s what you are paying for. The locations, the ambiance, and the service. Generally, everything is as close to perfect as one can get.
We checked in last night. The desk staff was incredibly accommodating, the bellmen first rate, housekeeping perfect.
When we encounter someone who isn’t personable it’s frankly jarring. And when the incident is repeated you know it’s a pattern of behavior and not just someone having a bad day.
The officious gentleman with reading glasses who asks for your room number when entering the breakfast cafe near the pool is difficult. The first time we came, we were not yet guests, and he was rude.
Today, when we gave our room number, he practically spat, “Breakfast is not included with your room!” in a condescending and brisk manner which seemed to imply that it was out of our price range.
Everyone else here is absolutely tops! The servers and wait staff anticipate your needs, are friendly and helpful. It’s just this one guy who you have to get past, like a troll on a bridge.

place_name: InterContinental Athenaeum Athens, an IHG Hotel
review_text: Had a great stay at this hotel while visiting Athens, the location is ideal for exploring the city center and Acropolis using the nearby trams, buses, or metro. Staff were courteous and extremely helpful. They always went out of their way to be friendly and welcoming. Although the immediate surroundings look a bit dire the view from the rooftop restaurant and bar was absolutely stunning and more than made up for it. Speaking of the Premiere Bar, it was our favorite part of our stay. We had the pleasure of being served by Stella who was incredibly attentive and friendly, she even spoke spanish which greatly helped my family communicate their orders! All in all this was a great place to stay during our visit and I would absolutely stay again.

place_name: InterContinental Athenaeum Athens, an IHG Hotel
review_text: My wife and I just stayed here for two nights. This is a fantastic Hotel with outstanding service. It was located perfectly for us and what we wanted to see. Today was our last day there. We left our bags with the doorman, as we were going to an island for the day and were going to return in the afternoon to collect our bags as we were heading to the airport this afternoon. When the taxi dropped us off at the port for the ferry, my wife realized she left her cell phone in the taxi. My phone wouldn’t work as we were trying to call the taxi company. We decided to head back to the Intercontinental and talk to the doorman who we had left our bags with. He got on his phone immediately and started trying to locate the taxi. After a few minutes, he said go have a good time, when you come back, i will have your cell phone for you, the taxi driver has found it and he will be bringing it here. We went to the island and returned to the Intercontinental. Unfortunately, the same doorman wasn’t there, but as promised, my wife’s cellphone was there waiting for us. I hope management can reach out to me. I would like to thank him for his outstanding service and send him a token of our appreciation. This was outstanding customer service we really appreciate how we were treated. If ever in Athens again, we already know where we will stay.
In a very close place to transportation networks. Very close to the metro, tram and bus stops. The balcony of the house is great.
Great staff

Are you Dutch and living in Athens? Or a Greek with something Dutch in your heart?  Come here every second Friday of the month (we call it casual friday)

Gezellig plekje voor Nederlanders of gewoon Nederland gangers die in Athene wonen. Iedere 2e vrijdag avond van de maand is de tent open.
Clubhouse of the Dutch Association in Greece. See websites NVIG.GR
If you want to be in the Netherlands for a while, this is the right place to be
nice place of the Dutch association.

Our experience at Fix Divine Apartments was fabulous. The living space, bedroom, bathroom,  kitchen and the small balcony are renovated and well equipped. The host Kosmas made the checkin and check out process flow very smoothly. He even offered us a bottle of wine upon arrival which was very kind of him.

The location of the flat is very close to the main tourist attractions and entertainment districts. We didnt have to use public transport at all since one could walk to all the major spots at the city centre.

Excellent choice!! Nice, clean like your home!! Near Acropolis!! A place to be!!

I ll come again next year!! Thank you for your hospitality!!
The best in Athens!
Amazing apartment with all amenities!!! Beautiful space and spotlessly clean..Friendly atmosphere and very good organization..I highly recommend!!!!

Nice place, clean environment, careful details. Easy access to transportation. Good place to stay to visit places of interest in the city. Finally, kind owners ready to serve. It is a good choice in the center of Athens.

We recently stayed at Kyma Apartaments for two nights, and it was truly a delightful experience. From the moment we stepped into our room, we were impressed by the level of comfort and cleanliness it offered. The room was not only spacious but also equipped with all the amenities we needed for a cozy stay. The staff were incredibly friendly and accommodating, ensuring that our needs were met promptly. Their professionalism and hospitality made us feel welcome throughout our stay.
The location of the place was convenient, allowing us easy access to nearby tram, metro and dining options. Whether we wanted to explore the area or simply relax in our room (big TV with also access to Disney+) everything was within reach.

Amazing apartment with great proximity to Athens Metro & tram that can take you anywhere you like in Athens.
It’s also located within a short walk distance from Acropolis and Acropolis museum which are main attractions to visit. The apartment is clean/comfortable and our host Manos, helped us with all questions and queries we had. They also provide a luggage service in case you have a few spare hours after your checkout.
Highly recommended 👍🏻
Check their website as they have a wide range of apartments based on the numbers of your family/party.
Wonderful place, helpful owner, close to good restaurants (Vasilis grill house), and close to public transport.
The apartment is very spacious, fully equipped and spotless! The owner was very friendly and helpful. We really enjoyed the large balcony! Excellent choice!

Superb! What sets it apart is the over and above hospitality and care of the host, Kyriakos. I have never come across a more hospitable host. Excellent for families. Perfect for conferences at venues in the area. Well connected to the centre of Athens and the sea side. Stavros Niarhos Foundation centre and park, and Flisvos marina (5 playgrounds) are stunning landmarks nearby and perfect for families. Best value for money in Athens. Everything you need for a pleasant stay.
Excellent in every way. Clean, modern and spacious. Great, responsive host that was very helpful and welcoming. Would definitely stay again.
Amazing stay! Would definitely recommend it! Great hosts and great facility!
Check-in deadlines are not respected. We had to wait a few hours. I do not recommend.
Very comfortable and clean apartment. Has got whatever you like to make you feel like home. Close to tram and metro. Congratulations to the owner. I highly recommend
Very clean Apartment with all the basics you need for your stay

This 30 sq meter studio is a hidden gem! The space is cleverly designed with a cozy living area, fully equipped kitchenette, and comfortable bed. The location is unbeatable—right in the heart of the city with everything within walking distance and perfect airport metro connection. Impeccable hospitality from the hosts seals the deal. Highly recommended for a memorable stay in the city! Extremely quiet, perfect for solo travelers or couples. We had a great one week long stay.
Cozy Apartment with a perfect location. The host is very friendly and helpful. I would definitely recommend it!
Beautiful studio near the metro station, supermarket. Clean and comfortable, excellent communication with hostess.
a simple and beautiful hotel, also Paola at the reception gives you a perfect guide for the city, a friendly service, thank you for everything 🙏

They have BEDBUGS and being fully aware about it keep accepting guests and make them suffer. I was beaten by them so badly that even got allergic reaction and had to buy medication. My whole vacation was ruined! I can’t go to the beach being in Greece. They’ve changed my room, but new bites kept appearing on my body. So, I decided to leave and went to talk to the manager. While I tried to explain my situation he was texting with someone on the phone and not even giving me full attention. Lastly I said that I want to leave and get money back for the last 3 nights that were paid and was not going to stay. At this moment he became super angry shouting at me and running around. He was agressive to the extend that I barricaded in my room and only with the booking.com help was able to leave the building safely. They said that this place decides that they will not give any refund. The minute I left the building they cancelled my reservation on the hotel’s end stating that I didn’t show up (with all the booking.com recorded calls while they were trying to get me out of there). They do it, so people, won’t leave them reviews on booking platform.

PROS:
- easy access right next to a metro station and ok distance to the center - nice size room and balcony - good price - checked in earlier than the normal hours - room was clean except for the reasons below (BEDBUGS)

CONS:
1. BEDBUGS...so go at your own risk. I have attached a photo of the sheets which were washed but dried up blood stains were visible. During the last night after turning on the light I also found a bedbug on the headrest of the bed. Towels were also not the cleanest.
2. Should had went to another couple which booked an identical room 2 minutes before my reservation a few months before arrival. We had our flight at 6AM which arrived at 8AM in Athens and we were in the city at around 10AM. Our friends with the other room got up at 3AM and went to the airport only to realize that their reservation was cancelled a few hours before and only received an email from Booking...Although we checked in, we had to spend the entire first day to find other accommodations for my friends on such short notice.

That was awful - there were bedbugs in rooms. One room was a coincidence, I thought, but after moving into another one there were more and more bedbugs. Rezeption guy was not polite in solving this problem and I felt not safe even standing next to this guy cause he was shouting at me and running around… a BIG NO to this place!

The hotel can turn your vacation into a nightmare.  There is a MASSIVE amount of bedbugs and extremely rude personnel who think it's not a problem. Besides everything in the room was dirty and old—the worst possible recommendations for the hotel.

Great location, however I found the shower rooms smelling like pee, I would change the shower curtains more often. The beds were alright, each of them had a power socket. The garden is not that nice, it's just an area surrounded with walls with 4 tables and few seats, there are no plants or trees. I'm disappointed because someone stole my shoes which I left next to the bed because I couldn't fit them in my locker as I had too much luggage. You need to be careful when opting for a hostel but next time for my own comfort I'll get Airbnb instead.

I reserved one female dorm... and they gave me a mixed gender dorm... I tried... but it was really smelling like a dead corpse... and a lot more stories here (they was like get refund and go find other place now in the evening, or just stay... they didn't help me with card refund so I called to the company by myself...) I didn't wanna waste more of my time writing all about this problem which made me waste time and emotions... But even room image of ad is very far away from the reality. Not modern, very bad stinky molded mood... 🤢 if you hold the pillar of the bed, the black paint stick to your hand

Location is the best thing about this hostel. Easy to get here from the airport by  subway, 3 mins walking from the subway station Neos Kosmos, 3 mins walking from Carrefour, 10 mins walking from Lidl supermarket, 15 mins walking from a hill where you can go and enjoy some amazing views, 25 mins walking from the Acropolis and like 5 mins by subway to the Acropolis metro station. Absolutely perfect. Some say this area is a bit sketchy, but I couldnt disagree more. Everybody is super friendly in Athens.

The hostel is still in good condition, the rooms are nice and beds are comfortable. You get your own locker. Bathrooms are relatively clean and well-maintained. The staff really do their best to keep it clean the rest really depends on the people staying there. Dont make a mess and it wont be messy.

The self check-in went ok. All important info was sent via Whatsapp or mail. You can chat with the reception if you need anything.

Kitchen was large and equipped just enough. Maybe a larger fridge would be fine.

I would appreciate if the recycling situation was better, because right now there is no recycling system established in the hostel and it would be such an easy fix.

Everything was perfect from checkin to checkout! Comfortable beds, own closet, cleanliness, bathrooms for everyone and close to the subway! I felt very good, and I will definitely come back! You can also rent a towel for 2 euros, and you can wash your clothes for 5 euros!

Excellent location - in 1 minute walk to a metro station. Clean, comfortable bed and mattress, every bed has curtains which gives you personal space. Nice common area and patio with tables and chairs. Helpful and friendly staff.

Great place with good location.
Everything was very clean and well maintained. For an extra charge you can rent a car park for your stay. If your car is too big, there is no way to park it, but there is a paid car park near one metro station.
There is a subway nearby to the hotel, with which you can reach the central hour of the city and all the sights in 15 minutes. There is also another type of transport, many shops and restaurants. If we visit Athens again, we would come back here again.

We stayed here for a week. The room since arrival was NOT clean. Room service mainly includes changing towels (which are rough) and just dusting the bed (not changing the linens) Floors were never swept, there was a lot of dust. The location is in the center. Uber finds it easily and is a relatively close distance to various parts of the city. The landlord is helpful and replies quite quickly. It is convenient with fast check in.

There is no reception in the building but the emails are clear about the check-in procedure and you receive the building code and apartment code by email on the day of your arrival.

I found the staff - especially manager Miltiadis - very responsive. I received email responses quickly and never needed to followup or make a phone call.

The apartment was clean and spacious, and the temperature was already quite cool when we arrived which was nice after being out in the heat. The area is quiet and safe. You need to head to the Neos Kosmos metro to get most places but I knew that before booking and I'm sure it is one of the reasons these apartments are so affordable.

I enjoyed my stay and would recommend Lux&Easy.

Pros:

• When you go up from the street, there's a hill nearby where you can see almost all the Athens from.

• Gym is ok for a quick pump.

• Temperature control in rooms is great. The balconies are nice.

• Bunch of coffee places, restaurants and shops nearby

Cons:

• Would like an access to a waching machine.

• Kitchen would like some better appliences but that's nitpicking.

Good : Location + nice gym

Bad : it looks like a airbnb disguised as a hotel
No reception, the cleaning is bad (they don’t clean dishes, they leave dust on the ground and don’t come to clean daily)
You have to pay extra to be able to use the jacuzzi
Very expensive for what it is
Very small fridge for a pricey room

Very good, clean and spacious apartments, in very good locations. Next to any kind of shop one might need, 2 minutes by foot from the metro (2 stops to Acropolis). In a quiet alley and as an extra bonus the 2 parking spaces it has.

Very nice apartments, clean, renovated. In a beautiful apartment building. The hosts are very kind and helpful. As soon as we asked for anything, they responded immediately.
Equipped with the necessary household utensils.  Be well!
Your friends from Crete.

Beautiful apartments and clean with nice layout and colors. Very close to Neos Kosmos metro and just a quarter of a walk from Thisio. Someone worth staying!! The hosts are kind and welcoming.  I will go again for sure. A wine was waiting for us upon our arrival.
everything was ok, very clean.. the only negative thing is that there is a problem with the wifi, but that's a small problem!
Excellent.. spotlessly clean with all amenities!

place_name: “Olympic Spirit” Apt in N. Kosmos neighbourhood
review_text: Unbelievable dirt and awful musty smell

I arrived at the place I booked through "Booking", the conditions were not as stated in the description, the place was dirty, with insects in the beds, I don't know if they were bedbugs or ticks, the bathroom was unpresentable, dirty and had a bad smell. I hope they close this place, I understand that it is not a hotel, the price was very cheap, but the least that is asked is a little bit of cleanliness and order.

I booked for the entire apartment through booking, but when I got there all I was given were two beds in a shared room. And the room looked nothing like the pictures, filled with stuff and very dirty.

Don t even think about booking for such a trash hole! Below decent and basic hygiene and it is a big shame for this accomodation to be allowed in booking and other big travel platforms! I regret not taking photos! I ve traveled and stayed in cheap places and hostels all around the world but what i have seen there exceeded by far my worst expectations ever!

Had a VERY BAD EXPERIENCE!!!! Waited 1 hour outside this hostel hoping someone could open the gate for me, coz aparently the doorbell isnt working. Called and message many times the host but didnt come out! So decided to leave the place because its getting dark and the area looks not very safe. I have asked for a full refund but they havent refunded me at all!! Dont stay here as service and communication is not very good! They have left me alone and dark outside without anywhere to stay in Athens!!

The worst house I've ever seen, like the first thing you notice is the smell around like the house hasn't been cleaned in the past century, then you notice it's like house for ilegal imigrante cause we sleep 12 people all together, then if you actually move inside the house you will find garbage everywhere like no one cleans they just throwing everything on the floor and they are holding to every trash then the owner comes to you and say who ever makes trash needs to clean but he doesn't clean his own.

Such an ideal place for those who appreciate the home atmosphere. The place is not luxury, but very homey and full of friendly atmosphere on the part of the host. I recommend to everyone who does not care about 5 stars, but well spent time.

Nice, comfortable appartments. Hospitality, chearfuĺl, patient owners. We were in a warm family atmosphere all days with full support in all our questions. There's an incredible view to all Athens hills in 2 mins, an interesting and nice street market with fresh fruits, vegetables, fish, olives, herbs in 3-5 mins.
Great atmosphere, very nice, hospitable people. Beautiful views and places filled up the stay in this place. I highly recommend it because you will not find it in any hotel.
Good value for money: nice spot, close to metro in a safe area, the host is very kind! Ask him about the secret view spot on the rock!
Very, very nice, helpful hosts, delicious breakfasts, quiet and peaceful surroundings, well-equipped rooms. I definitely recommend it.
Apartment with everything necessary for a long stay. Access to all means of transport in minutes. Clean and quiet. Easy check in and detailed instructions from the hosts
Great apartment, close to the center, clean and quiet!
Nice apartment in a convenient area. The owners take care of their clients.

place_name: Acropolis View Villa Free Cancellation Rooftop Terrace
review_text: Very beautiful place with an amazing view.

Lovely stay at the Sky Inn. Great spacious well equipped apartment. Very clean and quiet with the added bonus of an amazing view of the Acropolis, especially from the rooftop terrace.
Air conditioned, WiFi, kitchen area if you wanna self cater.
Agios Ioannis Metro station is around 5 minutes walk away (Red line)
From there the Acropolis is just 3 stops away. A metro day ticket costs €4.20
You can also change lines at Syntagma and get the Blue line to the airport or Piraeus Port.
Very helpful friendly host who arranged transport for us.
Would definitely recommend and stay here again.
One point to note is there is quite a steep hill and stairs to climb to reach the building so anybody with limited mobility may struggle. We had luggage and managed ok.
Quiet, calm, clean with an outstanding view. Very recommended.
very quiet and comfortable, I will recommend to friends
best view and amaizing hosts

My husband and I have been lucky enough to spend a few days in this apartment. The views from the terrace are unbeatable, as is the treatment from the landlady who has been very friendly. Highly recommended

place_name: Supreme Comfort Apartments by Athens Stay
review_text:
The good: Big appartment in an amazing location very close to the metro, coffee shops and markets. We never interacted with anyone and it everything was easily talked via chat. We were given codes to enter both the building and the apartment. They even booked a transfer for us from the airport (it's expensive as the airport is very far, but if arriving late at night, it's a blessing).

The bad: - Most of the times the code to open the apartment door wouldn't work. The first time it opened after 5min but the next days stopped working. I had to contact via booking to find a solution which was very quick even late at night.
- There's a key in a lockbox protected by a code. This code was inserted already!! Major security breach. Of course someone from outside would have to get into the building and know there's a key but still, felt unsafe after knowing that so I randomised the code and notified the hotel.
- The bathroom was not very clean. We found some hairs on the floor and even a contact lens... 🙄
- There's a stereo speaker connected... Apparently anyone can connect via Bluetooth. We thought it was off but it wasn't. At 5am some funny people decided to connect to it and blast music, which scared us a lot. Now we laugh at it but wasn't funny when it happened.

These few issues could have been isolated and only happen once but we're enough to bring the rating down but I WOULD comeback there if we comeback to Athens as overall it was good!

place_name: Supreme Comfort Apartments by Athens Stay
review_text: Great stay!!!! Clean, spacious and comfortable apartment, very close to the subway and within walking distance from major tourist attractions; it took us 25' to get to the Acropolis on foot. Very good air-conditioning, new home appliances, awesome mattress and the best of all; free access to the jacuzzi and sauna area on the 5th floor!! We are definitely coming back!!!

place_name: Supreme Comfort Apartments by Athens Stay
review_text: Everything was great! The room was comfortable and fully equipped, close to metro station and shops. The staff was very kind and helpful, and room was super clean. What else to ask for? We will be back on our next trip to Athens for sure!!!

place_name: Supreme Comfort Apartments by Athens Stay
review_text:
One of the best accomodations I have been in.

The apartment looks way smaller on the pictures so you will really be suprised on how big it is.

There are literally no issues with the apartment.
It has a jacuzzi which is available to all Tennant's which was great and had.some privacy in.

It's all accessible by codes that you receive which is amazing as this really supports the current pandemic issues we have.

The house was really clean.
The staff was extremely nice and helped a lot.
Overall great experience 💛

place_name: Supreme Comfort Apartments by Athens Stay
review_text: Perfect stay, building full automated, clean and value for money! Staff everything that i needed reply to my messages and calls! Ill come back soon, see you and thanks for everything

The most important part about this hotel is how helpful and polite the staff is. For example, they helped us with transport and to print documents. Additionally, the room was very clean and nice decorated. The only issue was that ruby rooms was about 30min away from the center of Athens, but thankfully there was a metro station close by.

We spent thee days in this hotel and it was a positive experience except a few details. The building is extremely clean and tidy , the staff was very helpful and ready to help us and answer any questions about Athens , best spots to visit, where to go.. The room was very big and cozy and most important it was very clean. The location was just 200m away from the metro station, something that made it very easy for us to travel everywhere every day. Our only complaint is that there’s no breakfast area and the breakfast is served in your room if you ask it and it was just standard. It was a toast with bread and cheese and one juice and one coffee with one chocolate croissant. Enough , but i have seen better breakfasts in almost every hotel i have been. Our second complaint was that the shower was not existent and it was just a shower head in the corner of the “bathroom” right next to the toilet. Every time we took shower , all the room ended up being a big pond and we had to leave the door open for everything to get dry after the water would go down the drain. The third thing that bothered us was that the rooms had terrible sound proof and we could hear all the noises from the floor rooms and even from the upper floor rooms. And the last complaint was that the room had no curtains so we had to close the balcony door and use the lights every time. The hotel is excellent if you want a clean and tidy place to rest at night for your next adventure and you are the type of person that spent as little time in the hotel as possible and just uses the hotel as a place of rest for the next day. But only for this. It’s obvious that the hotel is functioning as a short stay place , most of the times a single night stay and nothing more. But everything was clean and new and tidy and the personnel amazing and that is a plus.

We stop one night for our trip and we found an amazing room for good price. The staff is super friendly and accommodating, especially Nadia the receptionist. She is amazing! She went to find almond milk for breakfast to accomodate me because I'm vegan :) really good customer service!

The location is great :) the only thing I can complain about are the rooms, you have to be aware that not all of them are suitable for a group of friends, but for couples. There were a few things missing, but they were minor things :) In the end, I still recommend it!
It's not what it looks like in the photos... there was a problem with cleaning. The breakfast is inadequate. The staff is friendly and caring

Great house.
Spotless.
Beautiful surroundings.
The Owners very welcoming. It is in the center and accessible by metro. I highly recommend it.
Great apartment, everything clean and renovated with very good taste. It has everything you need to spend a few days comfortably in Athens. Super recommended.

Comfortable and well-equipped apartment.
Happy 👍🏻
The best place for meditation in Greece
Best Osho Meditation Center for me  !!!
The best place to breath and relax

A place where, with the help of various techniques of working with the body (the main of which is bioenergetic breathing) and meditation, you can return Life to the body and feelings, and find Joy in all its manifestations. This is where the path home begins...
The best meeting place in Athens. Where hearts open 😇

Nice and clean aparments, have all for visitors.... location is between centre and  sea coast.

Owner is good and provide all you needed for pleasant stay.  Wi fi is ok.

Noise is a bit higher because everyone drive a motorcycle in Athens (!? 🥶).

Honestly, it's alright, got a price to quality ratio you probably get what you pay for, it's located directly in the middle of two metro stations both a 9 minute walk (Dafni is the easier to get to). The room itself was modern, clean and was generally very nice. However  only the 1st and 4th floors have apartments the other floors are building sites which if the cleaner has disabled the lift you'll need to walk up and down the stairs!  And I'm not convinced that an extract fan going directly into a cupboard is going to extract much.

The biggest issue was the lack of sound proofing, you could hear everything from neighbours to the never end stream of mopeds.

Amazing apartment! Super clean and easy to check in. The building look old from the outside and the balcony is facing the main road . But once all doors close you can’t hear anything else.
Location is very good , about 5 min walk there is a metro station where you can take it to all the main attractions in Athens, takes us about 20 min to reach acropolis museum in one metro ride which I find it super convenient. Also there is supermarkets and restaurants within walking distant as well.

The best price-quality ratio. Very nice, even luxurious, recently renovated apartments with rich equipment. Well-functioning free Wifi. Air conditioning in every room. Very nice and helpful staff. I got answers to all my questions quickly.
Disadvantages: Not an interesting, poor district, 3km from the center. The only advantage of the location is close to the metro station (350m). What may not be ideal in an apartment (especially for a longer stay) is the lack of a dishwasher, washing machine and cabinets for clothes. And what surprised us the most (it was our first time in Greece) was that you can't throw toilet paper into the toilet. But this is apparently normal in Greece. For us it was a big surprise and a bit bothersome.
very clean, pristine rooms, all-new construction. I got my apartment, with special price, so it was even more great. Definitely i recommend it.

My stay in the apartment was really excellent and left the best impressions! Its location was ideal, a stone's throw from everything you need, with easy access to the main attractions and transport. The apartment was very comfortable and neat, decorated with elegance and aesthetics that makes you immediately feel at home. In terms of amenities, it was fully equipped with quality electrical appliances, which made our stay even more enjoyable. The level of cleanliness was excellent and the details taken care of. The host was welcoming and very helpful, always willing to help us and give suggestions for local points of interest. I highly recommend this apartment to anyone looking for a special and comfortable stay!

A hidden gem close to the city center! Amazing and very stylish penthouse with beautiful furniture. The hosts were very friendly, super quick to respond to any message and always on hand to offer advice and suggestions.
A good place to stay.
Excellent
Excellent place
Perfect👍👍👍

WE STAY AT THE ACCOMMODATION ON 1/2024 FOR THE SECOND TIME.
VERY NICE PLACE, CLEAN WITH ALL THE NECESSITIES.
IN A QUIET NEIGHBORHOOD.
UPON OUR ARRIVAL, A WELCOME BASKET WITH WINE AND SWEETS WAS WAITING FOR US!
Excellent!! Perfect service, we were very pleased
Large clean apartment, in a great spot close to shops. Nice additions to make our stay comfortable including coffee pods. It took us 5 minutes to reach the Piraeus port. I would stay here again.

Unfortunately I didn’t take pictures of our rooms before we moved in all of our luggage and the kids started to settle in. We got two rooms and they were on separate floors but right underneath one another so it was the same floor plan. The rooms generally look the same as the owner’s photos with small differences that shouldn’t impact your stay.

You have everything you need to feel at home and it was clean. The kitchen had a small stove with 2 heating areas, a sink, mini fridge, utensils, plates, bowls, cups, pots and pans. There is a closet to hang clothes and drawers. Bathroom shower had a rain fall shower head and a handheld shower head. We didn’t have a couch and coffee table in our room. Each room had a King bed. Because we have 5 people, we needed rooms that also had extra sleeping space. To make it a room that sleeps extra people, there is some sort of small chair that pulls out to make a twin size bed (it was actually smaller but for the purposes of this review of I am saying twin so it gives you an idea of the size). No one wanted to sleep on the extra bed because it would separate. One part of the pull out is on wheels and there is just hard surface flooring so the bed pieces would slide away as the kids shifted in bed. The kids also said the pull out bed was hard and uncomfortable with the tuft and uneven sections of the bed. My kids have sleep on the bare ground for camping and in hotels with old pull out sofas and said this bed was the worst. I deducted one star for the uncomfortable extra bed. Bonus: they have complimentary washer and dryer to use in case you planned on doing laundry during your stay, which we did to limit the amount of clothing we brought on the trip since we are traveling to multiple countries during a month. Note: dryer takes about 3 hours to dry our clothes so we would go out for a walk or meal and come back to swap the clothes for next load.

We booked through Chase credit cards’ travel site and there was no indication that this was NOT a hotel. So if you book this place, be aware that there is no lobby, no place to wait if you arrive early (inconvenient when you have traveled from afar and want to rest), only communication is through WhatsApp (which means you will need some sort of internet connection so plan accordingly), and they only give you details of how to get into the locked building and your room when your room is ready (checkin at 3pm and one room was ready at 3 but the other wasn’t ready till 3:22. No email communications were made at all; nothing in advance of our stay for directions and instructions, nothing day of on how to get in, and nothing during to tell us about check out details.  so luckily I reached out via WhatsApp when we arrived. I think I found the WhatsApp number via this Google listing and clicking on their website link to their contact.

The host offered a room for us to store our luggage on a “semi floor” since we arrived early but we opted to stay with our luggage.

The location was a short distance to the shopping district and to the marina. There is also a street with local vendors with veggie and fruit stands. We felt safe in the area. The only drawback is that you hear every noise from the street. We were on level two which is like level 3 back home so we were higher up and we faced the street. We could hear loud modified cars and motorcycles, honking, and racing in the middle of the night. You can also hear upstairs neighbor who have loud walking.

I had a terrible experience after booking this property prior to a cruise which was a big mistake. Our usual hotel was fully booked and this serviced apartment left a lot to be desired.

There was mould on shower head.
Half a roll of toilet paper provided on self check in.
Curtain hanging off rail could not be closed fully.
Only gave the code to the front door after chasing via WhatsApp after reading other bad reviews about the property being unattended. The owner then sent the wrong code with a typo causing delay to accessing key safe after a long journey which was not appreciated.
There is no one present to help you and we were told to help ourselves to another room. But they wouldn't allow us to see the room first. By text message they said if we are taking the other room by default we are agreeing to vacating the first one.
We had to contact the property to get the codes to the front door and key safe. Without mobile data this would of been impossible and a lot of people don't have roaming.
No duvet or comforter provided. The top sheet was so thin I've seen thicker face masks.
The owner told me to go into the basement to obtain more than a half of the toilet roll intially given.
Coffee pod provided but no water.
No hot water on arrival. I was told by the owner by text message that I need to operate the fuse board myself to turn on the electrics as they had been turned off to save money.
The door didn't lock securely.
In the morning we could not leave as the housekeeping was using the only elevator and we had 6 pieces of we could not send down.

You receive an AirB&B service for a hotel price. Would not recommend.

Reported that the wooden bed mattress support was broken on the first day. I was told it will be fixed the following day but no one ever came to fix it. By day 2, another issue arised. The smell of sewage started to come from the bathroom. Reported this issue as well with no resolution. No proper handbook/instruction in room. Did not receive the WIFI password until our last day. The highlight of this stay was receiving extra toilet paper after i requested it not knowing that you have to provide your own after the existing toilet paper was depleted, saved a trip to the store. Be aware that there is no front desk, so no one is available to help you if anything should arise. Everything is communicated thru Whats App.

Perfect for a ‘pit stop’ between airport and the port, Can grab a taxi in the street in seconds to the port for less than 10 Euro (I was worried it wasn’t close to the port at all) Owners are on call all the time on WhatsApp, little shop next door with a lovely old lady where you can grab some snacks / beers before bed, we got there just before 11pm
The place is amazing all around. I loved it how clean and well made it was. It combines city centre and seaside.
Spotlessly clean, in a quiet area in one word perfect.

Very nice and clean, the owner immediate response to our needs and kind. Right next to the niarhos and very close to eleforotio venizelos which has a bus stop and public transport.. totally satisfied! I would highly recommend it!!
Spotlessly clean house. Nice room in a good area. The hosts are kind and very hospitable!!! I highly recommend it. I will visit again for sure!!!!
The ideal place to rest and relax for a weekend, very quiet neighborhood near the Stavros Niarchos Foundation and near the sea....

We were a family of 4 and stayed in apartment 3.

The apartment was very clean, beds were comfortable, and we loved having the balcony to watch the boats and sunsets. Great neighborhood with several restaurant options nearby as well as a Lidl (grocery) if you wanted to stock the fridge/kitchen. Transportation to downtown Athens was convenient and cheap. Also, the host was super responsive and the Earth Cafe personnel very friendly and helpful.

Only downside, our flight arrived early and there was nowhere to store our bags until check-in. Otherwise, we enjoyed a gorgeous double-rainbow over the city on the last night of our stay. :))

The apartment was modern, clean, and beautifully decorated, with all the amenities needed for a comfortable stay. The location was perfect—close to public transport, shops, and local attractions, making it easy to explore the area. The host was very accommodating and responsive, providing clear instructions and ensuring everything was in order for my stay. I especially appreciated the thoughtful touches, like the welcome pack and local tips. Overall, it was a wonderful experience, and I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a cozy and stylish place to stay in Kallithea."

We stayed in apartment 5 and had a generally good experience. The host was very nice and responded quickly to our messages. The location is convenient, with trams nearby making it easy to reach everything. However, we did encounter an issue with cockroaches in the apartment; we found dead ones multiple days in a row. While it's clear that disinfection measures are in place, this might be unpleasant for future guests. Overall, a decent stay with a few drawbacks.
Very nice and clean room with a nice view and close to the city center. The staff was helpful and the cafe downstairs is  a great place to chill :)
Great apartment with amazing view on a terrace on top floor. Walking distance to marina

Beautiful and brand new apartment, with a wonderful view. Fully equipped, cleaning is done periodically during the stay.
Recommend it.
It's a little far from the center of the city, but the area is quiet, beautiful and next to the Stavros Niarchos Foundation Cultural Centre

Great apartment in a new building with private parking, close to Niarchos Center, Flisvos Marina and a 10 minutes drive to the center of Athens.  Many excellent cafes and restaurants within walking distance.  Highly responsive host with great local recommendations!

Lovely appartment, with a terrace enjoying a wonderful view! Brand new, fully equipped, with all amenities you would enjoy at home! So close to everything (the centre of Athens, the sea, Niarchos)! Warmly recommended, for both tourists and business travellers!
Very beautiful apartment nice service. Definitely recommend 🥇

Excellent apartment, brand new. Although very clean. Kind and helpful!! In a very beautiful place next to the Stavros Niarchos culture center. In a few steps you have everything you might need from a market, kiosk, etc. We will come again for sure!! Thank you very much!!

Location is nice and convenient, but quite far from the airport and there is no shuttle service. The service is really nice, but the rooms are not very large and the bathroom in my room was tiny with even tinier shower space and sink.

Smallest bathroom sink ever. Whoever designed this hotel bathroom was an amateur. Hotel itself is nice, breakfast is mediocre, location excellent, very safe, next to government buildings with security, easily you can park outside.

I have stayed in this hotel for a total of 5 times with an average of 4 days per visit. The purpose of traveling was professional as I was attending seminars nearby. Each time I visited I stayed in a different room of either the 3rd or the 4th floor.

+ Pros
A great value-for-money hotel not far away from points of interest, especially for a tourist. Being right next to the SNF, it’s a great opportunity to go for a stroll around. There’re also several bus stops nearby. The beds are comfy, soft and always clean. The employees are all very pleasant and helpful. Room service, even in late hours, was always fast. There’s also free underground parking available.

- Cons
Your ability to join the hotel’s wifi will really depend on the room you will get. Sometimes I had perfect signal, other times I couldn’t even find it. The bathroom and specifically the shower is unfortunately very small resulting to water splashing all over the floor. A weird disadvantage is also that in some rooms the toilet flush-ability is really weak.

Overall, it was a pleasant stay!

Really different bright cheerful hotel. Staff brilliant  even room service which is unheard of in most places now.  The only downside was the bathroom  still large but very badly designed  as you sat on the toilet with your feet in the shower. No shower curtain or glass water everywhere. Hopefully justbthat room as I would definitely  return.

The location is right behind a bus stop for 10. And an extended walk to a metro station (Sygou-fix). The service staff speak both Greek and English.

My only complaint is the bathroom.  It is very small which is okay, but doesn't have a shower curtain.  Therefore, water goes everywhere. I removed 2 stars for this.  If not for the shower oversight, then I would definitely stay again without hesitation.

Oh by the way, the 5 euro breakfast is not worth it. A sandwich with cheese,  coffee and oj.

Beautiful new hotel!
Great size bedroom and bathroom with all necessary amenities.
Suuuuper apartment , taxi to akropolis 6eur . Very friendy owner.
Perfect apartment in Athens! Friendly Staff:)
My favourite and only choice in Athens!

The definition of the expression 'like your home'.
Wonderful and spotlessly clean apartment that can comfortably accommodate a family of up to 4 people. Perfect communication and cooperation with the owner who has really taken care of the smallest detail that can be thought of.. treats for our children, breakfast in the fridge, all kinds of coffee and all the necessary appliances, from coffee machines to washing machine, iron , vacuum cleaner. Detail that shows the professionalism and the small Christmas decorations in the house because of the season. Aki, congratulations.. of course, next time we will try to stay at the blue ark. Thank you very much!!!
Perfect house, comfortable for a family and beautiful. Many benefits so that you don't need to carry a hair dryer, shampoo, iron... and especially spotlessly clean. Thank you very much

place_name: Hommy Flat, National Opera, Onassio & Rea Hosp.
review_text: amazing

Excellent apartment, equipped with everything including washing machine, dishwasher, iron and ironing board, very clean, welcoming and very knowledgeable manager, congratulations. Possibility of moving around by public transport... as soon as we arrived the owner made some things available, such as water , coffee, bread not indifferent for those arriving directly from the airport. Thanks again

Just the right accommodation for a short holiday for two in Athens.
The location is great for getting around the city on foot, but also by tram or metro. Despite the urban location, it is very quiet. So you get a good night's sleep before you throw yourself into the urban action. The shower room is small but functional and can also be easily ventilated through a tilting window. The terrace, which is great to hang out on, is great and essentially doubles the size of the living room. The landlord is very personable, helps with all questions, provides very personal support and even arranged an excellent taxi ride to and from the airport for us (€48 at night, €45 in the morning). Otherwise, we used the 5-day public transport ticket for our stay, which was extremely cheap and practical for €8.20. We can only recommend this.
But a very nice house. The owner is very kind. There was breakfast and 1 bottle of wine in the fridge
Big apartment, comfortable, two bedrooms, well equipped, and well located, near Neos Cosmos metro station.

Central apartment, 10 minutes from the metro in a quiet neighborhood.
It is carefully decorated, very well maintained, the air conditioning works perfectly, the beds are very comfortable, it has everything you need for a comfortable stay.
The charming owner takes care of you professionally and provides you with all the information and help you need.
We will definitely recommend it and if we return to the city, we will return to this accommodation.
Congratulations Heleni for your great work!!

Spotlessly clean, in a very central location and with easy 24-hour parking.
Incredibly warm and ideal apartment for a getaway to the capital.

Modern, comfortable, "warm" and five-room apartment, quiet neighborhood and at the same time two steps away from transport and the market!! And the owners kind willing and discreet. Unreservedly 5 Stars!!
Excellent house! Located near the Dafni metro station! Perfect communication with the host! I would choose it again for a stay

Very nice, very clean, very kind owners. Like your home.
I will definitely go again
It was great, clean, tidy, courteous service, parking, in short, everything?
Cozy apartment, good location, very friendly host Thanos

We had a great time in the apartment! It was spotlessly clean, sun-splashed and equipped with anything you need. The location is great, just a few steps from the metro station, from where you can go easily everywhere in the city, including main attractions like Acropolis and Plaka. Plus, it is close to lovely bars, restaurants and supermarkets. Τhe hostess is super helpful. The communication was super easy and quick. I️ would 100% recommend a stay in Loft4All!
Comfortable, clean & classy. All the key highlights are walkable ❤️

I recommend it to anyone who wants direct access to METRO (3 minutes) Modern furniture, pin code entrance. Supermarket 5 minutes away, cafes, restaurants nearby. The neighbourhood is friendly. Direct bus to the beach!
Clean. We paid for 3 people, but the 3rd space is for small children only.

Raise Athens Metro Apartments is a holiday apartment rental in Dafni, near Athens. It's very close to Dafni metro station on line 2 (only a 2 minute walk away!), and the city center from there is only 7 minutes away! This property has a very good price to rating ratio, so we couldn't resist! The building looks nice and modern and you can get to the apartments via stairs or elevator, so there's a nice element of accessibility! You get into the apartment by entering a key code that they give you via the Booking.com chat. Our apartment looked very nice! It had a living room with a sofa bed, a kitchen, a bedroom, a bathroom and a balcony with a beautiful mountain and city view! The living room and bedroom had air conditioners that worked wonderfully and the living room had Netflix on the TV, which we really appreciated. The kitchen had everything we needed (too bad there wasn't a microwave, but that wasn't a problem for us). The beds were comfy and tidy and the bathroom was nice and clean. The toilet flushed as expected, the shower worked nicely (adjusting the water temperature was a bit finicky, but it wasn't a big deal) and the washbasin wasn't clogged. But you must remember to put your toilet paper in the trash can next to the toilet. Greek pipes are too narrow to accommodate toilet paper. Overall, a great holiday apartment rental which I highly recommend for any Athenian tourist.
Very nice apartment but too loud as it is on a main road and no parking available

Room was clean, but ants, mosquitoes all over the place,  ad says for 6 people? Lol... not true at all. 1 full size bed and 2 twin beds... show me how you can fit 6 people? No hot water, heater was off and cold. AC don't even cool the room, I  am not going to recommend anyone for this appointment. I got bit by ants and mosquitoes like hell. OMG...
Very nice appartment, easy contact with the owner. Perfect situated to visit Athens.
Quiet location, comfortable flat.
Nice!!
Nice, clean and spacious apartment, well located, close to a metro stop.

Such a wonderful experience in this hotel!
The room is very clean, the location is perfect (4 stops to go to the Acropolis thanks to the subway). The staff was very kind, everything was perfect ! And the pool was very appreciated ☀️👌 Thanks again!

Highly recommended! It was a great find! We came early before check-in time but the host let us in and while waiting for our room to be cleaned up, we were offered cold drinks by the pool. The host is very welcoming and very friendly. Our room was huge and super clean, and comfortable. The area is very safe, quiet and close to subway, 4 stations away from downtown (5mins). The area is full of local coffees and restaurants, at local prices. We would definitely stay here for our next trip on athens. 😊

Highly recommended.
Our room was basically perfect. Great lighting and very comfortable. The service was also very good, the staff was very polite and understanding, an easy five stars from me.
Just the only thing you want to do is bring towels with you for the swimming pool because the towels are for room use apparently.

First time in Athens and Grec Suites Dafni became home! Hospitable hosts and spacious clean and modern rooms! Loved it! There are shops and cafes close by for any of your needs. It’s also in a calm neighborhood but close enough to the metro to take you to all the top attractions! Highly recommend! Thank you Voula!

I’ll recommend this place to everyone. The rooms are really nice and very clean. The apartament building is located in quiet, residential area. So it’s safe to take a walk at night. The location is great. A metro station is 6 minutes away and the line that goes there  can take you to every major Athens’ attractions in just couple stops. If I ever be back to Athens I’ll book this place immediately.
Very friendly landlord. Apartment very clean and very well equipped. Three minutes to the metro station. Supermarket right nearby. So, we were completely satisfied. Would love to come back.

+ We really liked our stay in this apartment. Dafni is very nice, not crowded and without tourists. The apartment and kitchen had everything we needed. The view was phenomenal!
- The wifi was not working and it was very hot in the bathroom. The floor tiles are in bad condition also. However these are not things that ruins your stay and we believe it will get improved.

It was clean with a good bed. Nice view from windows and from balcony. Small but good for one night accommodation. Floor had few pieces coming off so be careful with your toes. These are easy to fix so do it Mic😊

3rd floor apartment (no lift) in a nice area, 5 mins walk from Delphi tube station. Nice and clean and mostly modern, but dated kitchen. 1 bedroom with sofa bed in living room. Nice and quiet. View of Acropolis about 2km away over the roof tops. Really enjoyed our stay and good for city centre access via metro. Recommended!

Perfect to stay in Athens.
Hospitable and friendly hosts, close to Daphne metro station and free parking around the building.

Highly recommended!

+: Close to the metro station, bedroom is correct and quiet enough
-: Hanging wires, opened plugs, poor renovation, no finition were made, balcony with building material, ancient shutter from the last century. Third floor with no lift, the "Mountain View" is just Athen's suburbs with an ok mountain. The bathroom is shared with another, there are no curtains and the toilet ring is broken.

It's ok for one night but you can find better for a bit more expensive in Athens.
Excellent - amazing
Very clean, modern, Acropolis within walking distance and friendly landlord. Great, highly recommended.
Very clean and cozy apartment!
Excellent apartments in a quiet area, metro within walking distance.
Professional services, impeccable service

We rented a two-bedroom apartment in Dafni, Greece, through Airbnb for 11 days in June, and our experience was exceptional. This was our first time using Airbnb, and Renata, our host, made it truly memorable. The apartment was impeccably clean, well-stocked, and exactly as depicted in the photos, making us feel instantly at home. The check-in and entry/exit process was seamless. Renata deserves every bit of her 5-star rating. We were especially delighted by the complimentary Rosé and savory snacks at check-in.

Nearby: Cafés, Restaurants, Bars, Bakery, Mall, Supermarket, Metro station, Bus stop

Location: 5*
Proximity to Public Transport: 5*
Cleanliness: 5*
Host Response: 5*
Excellent space, neat, clean, modern with all amenities!!! and incredible goddess, we will prefer you again for sure!!!
Very nice stay, the guy was very willing to serve us, the apartment was great!!

Been coming to Greece for over 30 years, The Alex is the best hotel I've been to here.
Visited once in 2022 and a second time in 2023, can guarantee I'll be staying here again when I'm back later on in 2024.
The service is to the level of a very high class hotel. The staff are amazing; courteous, friendly, helpful, and professional.
The view is breathtaking.
The food is fantastic.
The area is great to either walk around and explore; but now it is a 5m taxi  into the center, or about 10m away to catch your boat.
Can't recommend The Alex highly enough, this accommodation is supreme.

The beat place we’ve stayed in the area.
The service is amazing - very welcoming staff accept you when you arrived, offering a welcoming drink on the rooftop.
The room is well arranged and attendant every day, well maintained.
The view is great. Especially when you wake up early for a breakfast on the roof when the sunshines.

We received The most wonderful welcome, friendly attentive staff, delicious reasonable priced food and the roof top bar had incredible 360 degree views.
Great choice of bars and restaurants close by with a lovely vibe.
Definitely would return, highly recommend.

Check in for the hotel was very quick and easy and they had my room available at 11am which was very convenient since I was traveling that morning. The room had a smelly odor that resembled musty mild scent. I spoke to front desk and they sent someone with a spray bottle of fresh scent and just sprayed it a few times. The bed was very hard and the pillows were very thin. The room was a spacious size but it seemed so empty. The balcony was a nice touch since it was really long and I could see the ocean from my room. The bathroom shower set up is strange compared to other hotels that I had, it was poor drainage so the bathroom would fill up with water. The hotel did offer us welcome drinks so that was a nice touch and their rooftop area was beautiful for seeing the city of Piraeus. No shuttle to the cruise port but they did arrange a taxi for 10 euros. There is no pool so make sure to be mindful of that as well. It is close to restaurants and bars that are only 5-15 mins away so that was convenient for a nice lunch and gelato. I would stay again if I needed to since I only had to pay 140$ a night.

Hidden gem - book a sea view room,  you won't regret it.
I want to give more stars for Service - from check in (where we were fortunate to get an early check in after our long trip), to the restaurant,  to check out the team were exceptional.
A special mention to Maria in the restaurant, she was lovely to chat to, sharing a little about her and chatting about Melbourne with us.  We need more Maria's in the world - we will wave to your parents in Corfu lovely lady 😊
Highly recommend this hotel,  we were there on orthodox Easter,  so it was quiet in the surrounds. Location is good, with hop on bus tours stopping just outside. Great space for anyone staying before a cruise,  only around 15 euro taxi fare to the port.
Thanks to the team at The Alex, keep doing what you do! 🇬🇷

I chose it without knowing what it is like and we had a great time, from the reception, the captain, the crew, the boat, the service, the food, the drinks everything was perfect and I will do it again.  thank you very much.

Rang prior to our arrival to book a room , was quoted €50 cash , when we arrived he wanted €60 .. Greek not fluent so tried explaining what he said , of course he didn’t speak English…. On leaving tried to charge us €75 … refused to pay it , gave him €60… room dirty , no soap, toiletries etc
Very rude man ,
Don’t bother staying here
Much better hotel just down the road
VOTSALAKIA, modern, clean and very very helpful with everything you need
One of the worst hotel experiences of our lives. I highly recommend staying away.

Location hospitality.
Perfect!
Very good service, friendly staff, pleasant stay with a beautiful view, I highly recommend it!!!

Evaluating the hotel we visited, I can say that it is a pleasant experience with several positive elements. One of the most impressive aspects of the hotel is the magnificent view it offers. We were able to enjoy an amazing view while staying at the hotel, which added a unique character to our stay in Salamis.

The owner of the hotel is very kind, offering a positive atmosphere during your stay. Also, it's nice to hear that the owner plans to make changes to the rooms in the future. This indicates that it is committed to improving its service delivery and the experience of its visitors.

Regarding the restaurant, it is not open yet because you are still preparing. This gives us the impression that the owner is open to adapting and upgrading the space and the Hotel.

I can't wait to go again.

Great quality hotel! So far it’s been a great experience. We flew in with a group of about 70 people for a tour with discovery tours.

We showed up at the hotel, 10 minutes later, we were all checked in and in our rooms.

Excellent service. Nice, clean, and neat rooms. The buffet and other accommodation have been wonderful!

Stayed one night prior to transfer to the cruise ship. Air France misplaced luggage so we got into the hotel later than anticipated. For the little while we stayed there the hotel was great. The processed a lot of people in and out to the ships. Had dinner and breakfast in the hotel restaurant and was very good. Rooms were comfortable.

We had an extra night after our cruise. Room was ready  an hour earlier. We left our bags very early without any issues an started our scheduled sightseeing. Perfect location on the main Ave to access all the most famous sites. Entire hotel felt very high class compared to other US Marriotts.

Late night stop-over between island ferry and next day flight. Staff was AMAZING when we checked in and got all our details taken care of, including early airport cab and breakfast to go since we would be leaving before the restaurant opened. Rooftop view of Acropolis and all the shopping you need just outside the door. Just 10 or so minutes from the ferry port, and 45 minute cab ride to airport ($45). The hotel and room set-ups are a little wonky since the remodel but the staff and location were perfect for us. Would definitely return.

This hotel was booked as part of our air canada vacations.  It was okay but I wouldn't rate it as a 5 star.  Seems more suitable for conferences.  We weren't able to enjoy the free breakfast due to early morning bookings but it looked nice.  The hotel was at least a 1/2 hour drive to the main city and traffic was crazy!   It seemed to take forever so I wouldn't book it due to location.  Others with  our AC vacation group stayed at a hotel much closer to the city centre.  that looked very nice.

I really wanted to love this hotel. It's definitely a 2 star hotel, and honestly they're trying to do the best they can with what they have.
Pros
- good location for price. I needed one night before a sailing trip and this was a good compromise between my departure point and the sights of Athens.
- generous check in/out times. Both check in and check out is midday. And my room was ready when I arrived at 9am (planning to leave my bags) and they generously let me go straight in.
- bus stops nearby. You just need to have prepurchased your ticket! Also the x96 bus from the airport will drop you very close for 5.5 euro.
- if you stay here, make sure you go across the road to see the cultural centre with the most amazing "green roof"!
- it's clean
- very comprehensive breakfast that includes cooked eggs, bacon etc as well as continental and traditional Greek foods (spinach pies are so good). I can't vouch for the coffee but I think you can get espresso for extra €
-24hr front desk with helpful staff who speak very good English.
- effective air conditioning in the room
- elevator access
- good Wi-Fi

Cons
- it is old. Very run down.
- shower bracket was broken, which I reported, but it couldn't be fixed during my stay obviously.
- the shower temperature is affected easily? During one shower it went hot/cold /hot etc, but not every shower
- they provided a kettle in the room, but I don't know why. There was no tea etc or even any mugs.
- the beds were HARD. All my bony prominences hurt. The pillows were also quite hard.
- hotels.com advertised a rooftop terrace?? You can certainly access the roof, going past a collection of junk and broken things along with stored toilet paper, however it is certainly not intended for guests I'm sure. Which is a huge pity. It has great potential, but like so many places in Greece the economy has not been kind, and as I said, they seem to be doing the best they cash with what they have. I noted on my floor, one of the rooms appeared to be in the middle of refurbishment, so perhaps they are slowly getting around to each room.
All in all its a good budget stay.
I would stay here again.  For one or two people this perfect.  If I go to Greece alone, I will definitely use this Hotel again.

Wonderful hotel! Located in a very lovely area near the sea and close to several bus stops to city center as well as tram stop. Room was very clean and well mentained with a small balcony. Great classic European breakfast, shady lounge zone near the entrance for smokers and people who just want to chill outside. Helpful staff. All in all highly recommend and personally next time I go to Athens I'll sure choose Nestorion hotel again! Thank you!

Hotel room had bugs probably some kind of Bettel
Hotel was far from city and public transport was awful

This hotel is really the best one, especially the service. During my stay there was receptionist Mr john he was really an amazing person and very helpful

Let's come to the rooms and location

The room was very neat and tidy.
Wifi speed is very bad.. it's not what we expect it is too slow
the corridor outside is very clean and hygiene
There is nothing wrong with it.
There are people always in the reception area 24×7
And they have a breakfast option
And the breakfast food is good, not so bad..
Variety of food options for breakfast

The location

Beach location 10-15 min walkable distance
The hotel is bit far from the airport (45 min drive)
Not nearby..
If you need to go for the sightseeing
There is a jw marriot hotel nearby just 3-5 min walk. Just get into the reception in the jw marriot Hotel and book for the city sightseeing bus, and there is even a bus stop right in front of the hotel
It is 20 euro it will take you to Acropolis etc.. the main city sightseeing places so you can explore in that bus and you can even come back to you are hotel from the same stop which is opposite site of the hotel they will drop you off 3 min walk to the hotel area.

There are no any restaurants near this hotel that's the only problem
If you are looking for asisan food you can't find any
Even KFC or MCDONALD there is nothing near by
There are local restaurants but you have to walk for 10- 15 min

Our stay at Athens Welcome Apartments was exceptional.  Coming from New York, it was extremely important to see that all disinfecting/covid cleaning guidelines were followed.  The host was super nice and attentive to all our questions and concerns.  We will definitely be back and thank you for everything!!!!
Very good location! The host is always by your side for whatever you need! I prefer it every time I go down to Athens

Because he thinks that the gentleman who owns this stinky house is smart, I had the same experience as Mr. Zikidis, 2 years ago. I also brought the sanitary so that we can remember a little bit. Because it's your tactic to undermine it by deleting the profiles on the maps and making new ones. It doesn't hurt him to know: I rent a stinking house. They are honest.
For the record, the booking does not return easily. He has no standards for what he rents. DOES NOT GIVE PROOF, EVEN OVER 500 EUROS.
Shame and shame with your audacity!

I immediately left this unacceptable apartment. Very bad condition, dirty, smelled awful, abandoned. Very big mistake of booking that has it in the list of accommodations. I demand my money back immediately

It is a particularly welcoming and warm house, with absolute cleanliness and facilities!! It was exactly what is mentioned, a warm, comfortable, quiet and spotlessly clean house! I highly recommend it !! The location is extremely convenient for our travels !! The owner is extremely helpful and willing !! Thank you very much for the hospitality!!

“Our stay at the apartment was wonderful! The place has undergone a complete renovation, with modern and beautiful design, and the cleanliness was spotless. It has a lovely balcony and a large inner garden full of flowers. The location is excellent—just a three-minute walk to the supermarket and close to Nea Smyrni Square, great tavernas, and bakeries. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a comfortable and inviting place to stay in Athens!”

I stayed in the Nea Smyrni neighborhood in a newly designed, modern and inviting apartment, the owner was available and charming.
The building has been renovated from the ground up and is tastefully decorated with all the necessities needed in a modern home, the shower is well designed and fun.
Air conditioner in every room, heating by gas system, alarm system, intercom and complete feeling of security.
I loved the balcony overlooking the back yard with a deserted and colorful garden with lots of flowers and pastoral silence in the heart of the vibrant city.
The apartment is located near a bus station and a 12-minute walk to the tram in Nea Smyrni, 15 minutes to a metro station in the Dafni neighborhood and a 15-minute walk to the mall and shopping center in Agios Dimitrios.
We especially enjoyed the proximity to a local tavern with authentic bouzouki music and a Greek atmosphere, 8 minutes' walk away.
Proximity to a large and cheap supermarket.
I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a pleasant, quiet and safe place to sleep in Athens.
Five nights in Athens on a very quiet street. Amazing apartments, spacious rooms, clean, and modern. Excellent location, highly recommended! I will definitely return here on my next trip.
Awesome apartment and very nice hospitality! Clean and beautiful! The location is also perfect! We will visit again for sure!
Great hospitality, comfortable and cozy place

The location is just far enough away from hustle and bustle and busy streets but also close enough to the local market with restaurants-shopping etc. We liked it a lot as in just a few minutes' walk we could get coffee and food as well as everything we needed for the home. The accommodation is suitable for a multi-day stay as it is fully equipped and has a comfortable kitchen. We are a bit demanding in terms of cleanliness and what we encountered was a pleasant surprise. Everything clean and tidy, the bathroom amazing and the whole decoration invited you to relax. Well done, good job.
Wonderful space, tasteful, fully equipped, spotlessly clean and friendly. I highly recommend it for your stay in Athens.

The place is great, totally renovated and clean . It’s suitable for business and pleasure since it’s close to the subway, to the mall and only 15 minutes away from Glyfada (great place for walking near the beach) by car.
I would recommend this place with all my heart and I will choose it again next that I will visit Athens !

Cozy and beautiful room.
Extremely clean
Quiet neighborhood very close to the subway.
Kind and hostess. Always there for everything we need.
Totally recommended!

This place is great. The location is good and close by restaurants, the main street and the Mall.
It is comfy and clean.
Its so beautiful and very neat, I will definitely come back again
Walking distance from restaurants, pubs, coffee shops, bakery and metro!
Awesome beautiful place clean 👌.
Great apartment with awesome owner!
Very warm place, wonderful hospitality, cleanliness and easy access to MMM
Ici little gem close to Athens Belvàrosà.

I do not recommend it for accommodation. There was no hot water, we had to call to have it turned on for us with the excuse that it is not sunny. From warm to a poor air-condition that struggled to produce warm and no cleanliness

Very beautiful!!! An old mansion that has been renovated, in the square of Levidio. It excels in aesthetics, cleanliness and hospitality!!! The rooms are decorated with great taste, in the atmosphere of an old mansion, but without exaggeration, and with attention to detail! Nice hot tub with independent heating! Sofia, the owner, sympathetic and very friendly, treated me to cakes and cookies from her little hands!! I will definitely go again!!
(note. The photos on the website do it justice...)

This lodge is amazing. 3 different apartments in a private high end residence. Tbe view from the terrace is breathtaking. Can't wait to be back.
Be careful though the roads around the place are steep. Excellent for a workout! :)

The place was not what we expected as we saw the fotos on booking platform.  Still, the closets were locked and there was not enough room in the little one tha was available.
Rooney finished and the mattress was worn out as well as the sofa.

As advertised! Very very kind owner. The place is as marketed on their websites. Very clean and spacious. Bonus, it smells like summer! The view is also pretty astonishing. Would definitely recommend.

Great apartament, very clean, cosy and close to bus stop. Amazing views as in description :)
Would recommend

Bravo !!!
Very clean, very comfortable .
I’ll visit it again.
Enchanting view and a super nice atmosphere! Great restaurant and bar scene right outside the door. The hosts were also super nice and accommodating. Always my pleasure!

Beautiful views in a unique bay in Piraeus.
Very nice hosts!

Great hospitality with Amazing view
Perfect combination.
Definitely visit again

Nice spot in Kastela with lots of food and drink shops around
And beautiful view
Fantastic stay! Beautiful view and very nice host. Lots of cozy restaurants and bars close by.
Very bad

In the end, our trip was cancelled. However, I must say the host is very polite and cooperative. It offers convenient (in his words) parking, which is difficult to achieve in Athens. The man answered any questions during the night very adequately and kindly. I would look it up if necessary
Welcoming host, spacious apartment in very nice area.

Very comfortable place, really close to the sea and very convenient for the family! Nice stay for a long weekend in Athens. Really close to the beaches in Vouliagmeni and to the center as well!! Would love stay here again!!

Ms. Mary & her home were fantastic! The home was extremely clean, her cleaning staff were very friendly, communication with Ms. Mary was quick and so helpful, and needless to say, the balcony was our favorite location in the entire home! Ms. Mary even held our luggage for us for the day since our flight left late! I highly recommend the Dodeca Home!!
Great apartment, recently renovated so everything is brand new. The location is ideal and the private parking is very convenient.
Great apartment. Super clean and conveniently situated near SN cultural centre. We had a great time. Thank you!
Very good apartment with two bathrooms, two bedrooms and beautiful terrace! 5 stars for everything

place_name: The Lop Athens Holiday Luxury Suites
review_text: Excellent accommodation and perfect facilities (so clean and has everything you need) very good and safe location (around 8-10euro Uber ride to the city or bus) the owner is sooo helpful and kind. Would definitely come back again!

place_name: The Lop Athens Holiday Luxury Suites
review_text: Wow! where to start? Our three night stay in this accommodation was absolutely phenomenal. Our group consisted of 8 guests who were welcomed by the host as we arrived. The apartments are the bests ones I’ve seen in a while. All your toiletries are available, the beds are amazing, the architecture and layout of the place make you feel like your walking around in a little palace. Plenty of balconies to hang out in the sun and even a little garden if you’re staying on the ground level apartments. Besides the apartment being great, the host is just wonderful. She kept us informed about places to visit when we had some spare time, advised us on where to go for dinner and she even got us some beers when we were hanging out in the garden. Thank you “The lop” you made my business trip feel like a five star vacation. ❤️

place_name: The Lop Athens Holiday Luxury Suites
review_text: Very nice and great hotel to stay and enjoy your time. Management is great people.

place_name: The Lop Athens Holiday Luxury Suites
review_text: Great place, amazing hospitality, friendly and nice owner 🙏🏼

place_name: The Lop Athens Holiday Luxury Suites
