review_text: This place simply doesn't exist, it's incredible, you don't want to leave there... But even more fantastic is the owner, I've never seen a more hospitable and kind-hearted person, just wonderful!!!

Small rooftop apartment ideal for a couple, with an incredible view of the city and in a quiet residential area, which is nice in Athens.
20 minutes from the center by public transport, it's easy by the A2 bus, and a few minutes from the seaside.

I would highly recommend! The apartment is located on the top floor of a building with a beautiful terrace. There are many shops and restaurants in the area, good access to the center and the Acropolis. The area is quiet and peaceful. The owner was very helpful. If someone is looking for a place for an atmospheric stay in Athens - this is it!

place_name: Casa Bonita Athens: Sunny n quite house with Garden
review_text: We had an amazing stay in this delightful home perfectly located between the sea and the city center. The area offers a unique blend of coastal charm and urban convenience, providing an ideal setting for a memorable getaway. The home itself was not only comfortable but also beautifully designed, creating a welcoming retreat. Whether strolling along the seaside or exploring the vibrant city center, our experience was truly special. I highly recommend this!

place_name: Casa Bonita Athens: Sunny n quite house with Garden
review_text: The convenient location of the house allowed us easy access to the center of Athens and the sea. The combination of a clean and modern house made us stay truly memorable. We look forward to returning in the future.

place_name: Casa Bonita Athens: Sunny n quite house with Garden
review_text:
This place is mega great! The inside yard is amazing, the place is splendid, feels like a real Greek place to stay! 🐢
The neighborhood is super quiet and safe, though has perfect connections with public transportation, many beaches nearby! Everything you need is present in the place.
The host and the whole family is simply amazing and super friendly. We had small talks and got many suggestions and especially she was really flexible with us being so undecided. We left our luggage after the check-out for the whole day.
Definitely recommend to everyone to stay here, everything was simply perfect, they made the whole stay way better!

place_name: Casa Bonita Athens: Sunny n quite house with Garden
review_text: Beautiful house located on a peaceful neighborhood. The installations are really nice and clean. The hosts are super nice and welcoming. Loved our stay at casa Bonita! They speak Spanish very well.

place_name: Casa Bonita Athens: Sunny n quite house with Garden
review_text: Very nice! Great garden with turtles

Everything is perfect.

Stay at Bedwave made my Athens' adventure a great experience. There's amazing view from the terrace which makes you feel like the world doesn't exist. Also the owners Sofia and George make great atmosphere there. I highly recommend this place! 👌🏻🙂

I extended a night in Athens only to stay here. I initially had plans of renting a car and just driving along the riviera but one look at the views cancelled all my plans. Honestly, often when we’re travelling, we’re too focused on getting from one place to another but sometimes you just need to pause and reflect and this property helped me do just that. It’s the kind of place you’d just want to lie on a hammock on a nice sunny afternoon and read your latest kindle download. There’s a beautiful beach 5 mins walk away for when you’re bored of reading and plenty of amazing waterside cafes/restaurants that are perfect for date nights (solo or with your significant other)!

It’s a stunning place! And people who manage it are so caring. I loved everything about it: a beautiful location in Piraeus, truly spacious common area, lovely rooms (mine was pink and girlish), excellent conditioners (really important when it’s +37 every day), and direct access to marvellous private beach straight from the house!

P.S. Also, Sofia, thank you for being so attentive and caring💕 You have a beautiful soul✨(from Maria in a pink dress)

review_text:

Thank you for this beautiful experience Sophia and hope to see you again soon!

Be aware, that this hostel is only available during summer. For 2024 start date is 15 July and they close end of August.

Absolutely luxury. The place has nice dorms and privates. The facilities are excellent and the cleaners makes the place spotless. Direct access to the beach and located between 2 harbours that are full of good restaurants. Really nice and welcoming hosts that will take care of all your needs. Probably the best hostel you'll find in Greece.

A very nice, cozy and friendly place where have a very cheap, cold greek coffee and a fruity fresh wine. We didn't know there are some rooms for renting and having the complete greek experience, but next time we already know where to go! Thanks for everything!
The owner is great. The rooms are fantastic. The coffee great. Wow. To stay here in this house how fantastic

I had great a few hours in LaRocka in this summer. I would stay upstairs if i had enough day. It is very authentic place. View is great. Owner is very kind. He is so generous hand friendly. We sat and talk in front of the view upstairs looking through the palm trees and sea. Inside the building there are so much to see. I could not finish looking at them. I would like to visit and stay there next time.
We come here every single time we visit Athens, grab a drink and sit outside. The owner is very very hospitable and everything about this place feels authentic and genuine.
Amazing place the building is almost 100 years old the area is spectacular and the owner is such a nice guy definitely worth a visit highly recommended!

It's a very classic and old-fashioned hotel.
I stayed there for 4 days.
All staff were very polite and friendly.
Nice light breakfast.
Subway, beach,  Marina port, all amazing restaurants are in walking distance.
If someday I decided to come back to Athens I would stay only in that hotel.

I recently stayed at the Cavo d’Oro Hotel in Athens and had a pleasant experience overall. The hotel is a bit dated and could benefit from some refurbishment, but the charm of its location and the quality of service more than made up for it.

The room itself was suitable and well-maintained, thanks to the diligent cleaner who ensured everything was spotless. I especially appreciated the hotel-branded towels, which added a nice touch to the stay. The highlight of the room was undoubtedly the balcony—sitting there with a stunning view of the sea was truly beautiful and relaxing.

The staff at Cavo d’Oro were exceptionally friendly and helpful, always ready to assist with any queries or requests. The hotel’s location is also a major plus—just a short walk from bars and the marina, making it easy to enjoy the local scene. There’s a convenient shop right next door, perfect for grabbing essentials like water.

I also found the in-room fridge very handy for keeping drinks cold, though the air conditioning was somewhat inconsistent and could use some attention. Despite that, the overall comfort of the room was good.

For those wanting to explore Athens, the hotel is well-connected with local buses running past the property and a subway station within walking distance. This made it easy to get to the city center without any hassle.

In summary, while the Cavo d’Oro Hotel may be showing its age, it offers good value for money with its excellent location, stunning views, and friendly staff. With a few updates, it could be even better.

We recently stayed at the Cavo D’Oro hotel and we had a great experience. The location is great, we had an absolutely stunning view from our room, and everyone at the hotel was more than helpful with luggage, finding places to eat, car service, and even some extra morning coffee.  The hotel has a lot of charm and some of the reviews note the dated rooms, which they are, but the hotel is clean and great value for the money. Definitely consider Cavo D’Oro if you have some time to spend in Piraeus.

We had a wonderful stay at the hotel. The location is brilliant, and the sea facing rooms are worth the extra charge. Had a wonderful view of the Piraeus Riviera. The service was quite good, the reception and staff are very helpful and accommodating. The rooms are alright, a little cramped but have a large balcony. They have a good breakfast, which is the same eveyday but quite nice. The restaurant only serves pizza and sushi. It is situated next to a bus stop and you can catch buses directly to the train station. It's near a hop on hop off stop as well and they had tickets at the reception. It is a short walk to the Mikrolimano and Pasalimani.  There is also a department store next door. Overall, great stay.
Very simple room. No blinds in the room. The cleaning team woke me at 10am although I asked for late checkout.
Very very comfortable and clean apartment in an amazing location and with an underground closed garage..

Overall the experience wasn't terrible, but it wasn't great either. We booked a transfer which was badly handled, we had to wait for an hour to get in contact with the transfer company. The second transfer we booked had the wrong location, so definitely don't do that through the hotel. Upon arrival, there was no one at the desk to welcome us, so we had to wait yet again. The room was clean and tidy, pretty nice. The bathroom was subpar, with a badly fitted toilet seat. We asked for two singles and got two singles that were pushed together to make a double, which would have made it awkward if we weren't family. We couldn't actually get to our room because the hotel staff kept calling the elevator down while we were inside, so we almost got stuck in there as the doors would lock before we could get out on our floor. The breakfast was good, but the set up was a bit awkward and the atmosphere was strange.
I would say we were misled by the high ratings on booking.com
We thought we booked a nice Hotel when really it was the type of place you book last minute for a quick stay. Definitely wouldn't recommend it for over a night or two.
Other than that the staff were polite and helpful when they could, and the location is excellent.

The rooms are clean but really small. Air condition is quite loud. The hotel is located close to the busy street - noisy during day and night. In general ok but rather for short visit in the city.

The marina, which is within walking distance, offers various good restaurants and bars. An apartment that is fully recommended.

The only downside was that my online traffic was being tracked via their WIFI (it's possible from every wifi but never happened before & creeped me out).

We have spent a very nice week staying in the studio FH 11 in Paleo Faliro.

The staff has always been kind and helpful, since the very beginning with the booking and then when we arrived, their hospitality has been on top.
We are glad to have chosen them for our stay and we really enjoyed this zone around Athens for our vacation (we easily reached all the beaches all above the coast and also the center of Athens with the local tram).
For sure we will consider other of their apartment options for the future.

The location is perfect: close to the beach, close to local restaurants and bakeries and the city center of Athens was merely around 10-15 min by taxi. The host is a very friendly woman which also recommended some fun things to do and nice places to eat nearby. Overall, it was a wonderful experience!

Amazing place. The Apartment was awesome and the views were breathtaking.
Thank you!

I really enjoyed my stay in these apartments! Clean and tidy. Friendly hosts! Beautiful view of the sunset and the sea. Everything you need for a holiday is nearby. I recommend!

Cozy apartments with beautiful views on the seashore! The apartment has everything, there are many shops and cafes nearby. Public transport within walking distance. The airport is easily accessible in 40 minutes by bus X96.

We had an absolutely wonderful stay at the Coral Hotel Athens. The location is perfect, right next to the sea, offering stunning views and convenient access to key attractions. The hotel manager and staff were incredibly friendly and went out of their way to ensure our stay was comfortable. The rooms were clean, spacious, and well-maintained, with reasonable prices that made our stay even better. The breakfast spread was delicious and had a variety of options to choose from. Highly recommend this hotel for anyone visiting Athens!

In my personal opinion, this is not a good hotel.

I've had a couple of issues during my stay but the highlight is how we could hear every sound that came from the room next door. Whether they were just speaking to each other, or slightly more intimate sounds, this was not a pleasant experience.

When I mentioned this issue to the staff at the front desk, their suggestion was for me to speak to the room next to us (no thanks), or for the front desk to call them and ask them to be quiet. I told them I do not think it's reasonable to demand that person to just be silent for their entire stay, as they were not being purposefully loud. The rooms were badly insulated and shared a wooden door with no soundproofing. We asked to move rooms and were denied to the claim that the hotel is at full capacity. Eventually, the front desk insisted on calling the room next to us and asked them to be quiet, this solved nothing as they were not even that loud in the first place, and the issue was the horrible soundproofing between the rooms.

This went on for the next 2 days and I'm sure it was as uncomfortable to next door room as it was to us. There was no follow up from the hotel to this situation, and they did not offer us to switch rooms even after other rooms became available.

Bad customer care, bad room insulation, no problem solving whatsoever.

For the amount of money we paid and considering the expectation of a 4 star hotel, this was a horrible experience and I cannot recommend you stay there.

I had the pleasure of staying at the Coral Hotel recently and I'm delighted to share my experience. From the moment I arrived, I was impressed by the hotel's impeccable cleanliness and the warm hospitality of the staff. The rooms were spotless, and the attention to detail was evident in every corner.

The breakfast was amazing. The buffet offered a wide variety of delicious options, from fresh pastries and fruits to hot breakfast items like eggs and bacon. The quality of the food was excellent, and the service was attentive and friendly.

I cannot say enough about the staff at Coral Hotel. They were always willing to assist with any request, and their friendly demeanor made me feel welcome and valued. Overall, my stay at Coral Hotel was exceptional, and I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a clean, comfortable, and enjoyable experience.  I have family members that stay there for 2 months at a time and keep going back.  Thanks Gregory! Your employees are the best in the business!  Can't say enough about your hotel.

I found this to be a perfect choice for a few days before boarding a cruise. The hotel has a shuttle to the busier parts of Athens and to a private beach. The rooms were clean and well maintained. The restaurant and breakfast buffet were both decent and fairly priced.

The most outstanding service! There’s a lot of competition between hotels and these people are the best at what they do. Nadia in the buffet breakfast hospitality was exceptional, according to one of their favorite customers, Christine Rogers, and her family who are returning customers.

The ocean front room has fantastic views and there are all the creature comforts. Their front desk, especially Panagoitis, were the most cordial and efficient. The buffet breakfast is one of the best I’ve ever had.
The location cannot be beat. Close to Piraeus and Athens.
Will be returning again ! Keep our room open for us!😉

Very nice clean and comfortable 2nd floor apartment offered for short term rental. The area is very quiet and safe. The accommodation is excellent and the apartment is fully equipped. Everything is within walking distance... supermarkets, restaurants, cafes and of course the sea. The owner is an excellent person, very kind and willing to serve you with anything you need. Definitely and highly recommended!
Very nice apartment with everything you need. Good terrace, parking, equipment in the kitchen. Very clean and comfortable for the family. Recommend it surely

A very clean and beautiful villa for short-term and long-term stay, in a very beautiful and relaxing area, the owner of the house is very polite, hospitable and kind, and whenever you need help, he will help you at the first time.  The distance to the sea is less than 10 minutes on foot and 2 minutes by car.  On the main street of Kalamakiou, all your daily needs will be met and all kinds of services will be available around you on this street, the cooling and heating system is completely suitable and all the equipment in the house is new and clean.

Very nice apartment. Everything clean and new. There is also AC every room and in the living room. Also have wash machine to wash clothes. Complimentary drinks and snacks were served too! The best apartment in Athen. 2 min away from supermarket, 3 min to asia Imbiss, 10 min to beach. Lovely!! Top service!
We had a very good days in this villa 💕
I highly recommend it. Grazing
Very nice apartment. It has everything one needs for a beautiful stay.  The service was impeccable and the place was spotless. Thank you very much for the hospitality!
Great place to stay with accommodating hosts. I will book again.

Excellent and tasteful space, very good communication with the hosts. The apartment has everything one needs for their stay, it is easily accessible by public transport or private and its highlight is the endless view from the 6th floor to the beautiful marina of Alimos. The neighborhood has everything one might need. I highly recommend
Excellent apartments, fully equipped for daily needs. Good value for money, nice location.
Dot!!!! Well done!! Great stay and amazing service!! Thank you very much!!
Excellent and spotlessly clean.

Blue Riviera Suites Alimos: Comfort and tranquility by the sea

The Blue Riviera Suites in Alimos are an excellent destination for those looking for relaxation and comfort close to Athens. Their location is ideal, just a few steps from the beach and with easy access to the city center.

The suites are modern, spacious and fully equipped with all the necessary amenities. The decor is elegant and minimal, creating a sense of calm and relaxation. The terraces offer a wonderful view of the sea, ideal for enjoying your coffee or a romantic dinner.

The staff are friendly and helpful, always willing to help and offer advice on the area. The cleanliness of the premises is impeccable, while the quality-price ratio is very good.

Blue Riviera Suites are an excellent choice for couples, families and groups of friends looking for a comfortable and relaxing stay near the sea. The location, facilities and service will make you feel right at home. I will definitely prefer them again on my next visit to Athens.
Great hotel for business trips. Manager Dmitris is very helpful, his contact person responds to all inquiries very quickly. We will definitely come back

I loved my stay in Snooze hotel, because rooms are spacious, clean and the bed is amazing.  You will sleep like a just born baby. The service is excellent and the owner will help you with everything you need, from directions in the city, to personal training in the gym in the -1 floor. The neighborhood is quiet, so you can enjoy calm and easy time spent in the hotel. I spent a week there, and will stay in this hotel whenever I am in Athens. My warm recommendations for this facility.
Great houst,very clean,peacefull,gread matrece for sleep,good gym cros fit,very pleasent to stay.👌✨️✨️✨️✨️✨️

I loved this hotel. Great location. Quiet area and had the best naps ever .Very helpful staff. Very clean and comfortable rooms. I would definitely stay at this hotel again and again. Snooze hotel  is a great place to stay..

**AVOID** this is the worst hotel i have ever been.  They do not have a bed sheet and you have to use the bed cover, the shower is very very small and the tap is with a counter of 20 seconds so it is impossible to shower, the apartment  does not have a fridge (of course it does not have TV - kitchen etc), the parking is locked and they do not offer it to clients so you have to park in the street, you are not allowed to eat in your room, or order take away!   and YOU ARE NOT ALLOW TO GO TO THIS HOTEL if you respect your self and your money,.  Although i had booked to stay 3 days because i needed the fridge, i left after 1 day i was there (i arrived at 21:00 and left at 10:00 in the morning) and not even the owner talked about a refund, he was also very aggressive to me and he implied i was lying about the need of the fridge.

Worst experience in Athens 🥲 I forgot money at safety box and they “disappeared” (c) There was a vip suite for almost 300 euros per night. At first I could not close the safety box in the room and just put money there. Don’t close it.

The only reason went there was the jacuzzi in the room -RN 11 unfortunately the room was right next to the employees room so was waking up at 06:00 am by the workers who work there ,so required to move to another room .All the staff were very kind and helpful 😁 so we are glad about it ,the location is far from the metro station,need to walk about 900 meters ,and far from the city - 45 minutes away with metro till the center

I consider myself a well-known customer of this hotel and in fact why shouldn't I? With such a nice and clean environment along with a very helpful staff that does everything with professionalism and discretion, as well as the prices of the packages available, I consider it a must hotel for couples who want to spend some quality time together. The rooms are spotless and neat as it has a shop in case you forgot something at home or want to try something new. It also has a discreet parking space for shy souls. It is one of the best half-board hotels in Attica and I recommend it to everyone.
Great location, discrete staff

Little hotel,  but has many different rooms for every wallet, parking for about 15-20 cars, design of every room is different, there is bar as well and little sexshop. Of course its hotel for romantic dates, not for tourists with kids.

Staff was very helpful and welcoming. Room extremely clean and good sized.
Easy to reach with metro from the airport.

place_name: Dolce Casa Athens: Athenian Residence with private Garden
review_text: We had a wonderful stay in this charming home. The area is delightful, offering a perfect blend of tranquility and convenience. The home itself was not only comfortable but also thoughtfully designed, providing a welcoming atmosphere. From exploring nearby attractions to enjoying the cozy ambiance, our experience was truly memorable. Highly recommend this!

place_name: Dolce Casa Athens: Athenian Residence with private Garden
review_text: The size of the house was perfect for our family and the cleanliness was truly impressive. Also, the proximity to the metro is one of the standout features of its property as well as the amazing restaurants nearby.

review_text: Everything was great! The house was very comfy and the area was full of life!

place_name: Dolce Casa Athens: Athenian Residence with private Garden
review_text: Excellent!

We chose this apartment mainly for 2 reasons: the private parking and the proximity to the subway. In fact we had thought about not using the car to visit Athens. Right choice. The Argiroupoli metro station was a 5 minute walk away and in 10 minutes with line 3 you get to the Acropoli stop. The apartment is on the ground floor in an elegant and quiet neighborhood, with a classy open space and a very well equipped kitchen. There is also a capsule coffee machine. The entrance door opens with an app, very easy to use. Fast Wifi. Upon arrival we also found some very welcome desserts. Excellent communication with the owner, who also provided us with useful advice on the beaches in the area. At 30 meters there is a fairly well-stocked market. A truly positive experience that I would recommend both for visiting Athens and for the beaches of Attica and Cape Sounion.
Everything neat and clean. It has everything a traveler could need
The apartment is excellent and complete, with the only drawback being the lack of parking
